authors_text: Tan Nhu Nhat Doan,Kyungeun Kim,Boram Song,Jin Tae Kwak
title: GradMix for nuclei segmentation and classification in imbalanced pathology image datasets
title_zh: GradMix 用于不平衡病理图像数据集中的细胞核分割和分类
abstract: An automated segmentation and classification of nuclei is an essential task in digital pathology. The current deep learning-based approaches require a vast amount of annotated datasets by pathologists. However, the existing datasets are imbalanced among different types of nuclei in general, leading to a substantial performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective data augmentation technique, termed GradMix, that is specifically designed for nuclei segmentation and classification. GradMix takes a pair of a major-class nucleus and a rare-class nucleus, creates a customized mixing mask, and combines them using the mask to generate a new rare-class nucleus. As it combines two nuclei, GradMix considers both nuclei and the neighboring environment by using the customized mixing mask. This allows us to generate realistic rare-class nuclei with varying environments. We employed two datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of GradMix. The experimental results suggest that GradMix is able to improve the performance of nuclei segmentation and classification in imbalanced pathology image datasets.
summary: An automated segmentation and classification of nuclei is an essential task in digital pathology. The current deep learning-based approaches require a vast amount of annotated datasets by pathologists. However, the existing datasets are imbalanced among different types of nuclei in general, leading to a substantial performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective data augmentation technique, termed GradMix, that is specifically designed for nuclei segmentation and classification. GradMix takes a pair of a major-class nucleus and a rare-class nucleus, creates a customized mixing mask, and combines them using the mask to generate a new rare-class nucleus. As it combines two nuclei, GradMix considers both nuclei and the neighboring environment by using the customized mixing mask. This allows us to generate realistic rare-class nuclei with varying environments. We employed two datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of GradMix. The experimental results suggest that GradMix is able to improve the performance of nuclei segmentation and classification in imbalanced pathology image datasets.
abstract_zh: 细胞核的自动分割和分类是数字病理学中的一项基本任务。当前基于深度学习的方法需要病理学家提供大量带注释的数据集。然而，现有的数据集通常在不同类型的核之间不平衡，导致性能大幅下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的数据增强技术，称为 GradMix，专为细胞核分割和分类而设计。 GradMix 采用一对主要类核和稀有类核，创建自定义混合掩模，并使用该掩模将它们组合起来生成新的稀有类核。由于它结合了两个核，GradMix 通过使用定制的混合掩模来考虑核和邻近环境。这使我们能够在不同的环境下生成真实的稀有级核。我们使用两个数据集来评估 GradMix 的有效性。实验结果表明，GradMix 能够提高不平衡病理图像数据集中的细胞核分割和分类的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GradMix的数据增强技术，用于解决病理图像中细胞核分割与分类任务的数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理病理图像数据集时，因不同类别细胞核数量不平衡导致性能下降，亟需有效数据增强方案。
AI.method: GradMix通过混合主要类别与稀有类别的细胞核，利用定制化掩码生成具有真实环境的稀有类样本，同时保留两类细胞核及其周围信息。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上验证表明，GradMix显著提升了细胞核分割与分类的准确率，尤其改善了稀有类别的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: GradMix作为一种简单有效的数据增强方法，能有效缓解病理图像数据不平衡问题，提升模型在分割与分类任务中的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Bolivar Solarte,Chin-Hsuan Wu,Yueh-Cheng Liu,Yi-Hsuan Tsai,Min Sun
title: 360-MLC: Multi-view Layout Consistency for Self-training and Hyper-parameter Tuning
title_zh: 360-MLC：用于自我训练和超参数调整的多视图布局一致性
abstract: We present 360-MLC, a self-training method based on multi-view layout consistency for finetuning monocular room-layout models using unlabeled 360-images only. This can be valuable in practical scenarios where a pre-trained model needs to be adapted to a new data domain without using any ground truth annotations. Our simple yet effective assumption is that multiple layout estimations in the same scene must define a consistent geometry regardless of their camera positions. Based on this idea, we leverage a pre-trained model to project estimated layout boundaries from several camera views into the 3D world coordinate. Then, we re-project them back to the spherical coordinate and build a probability function, from which we sample the pseudo-labels for self-training. To handle unconfident pseudo-labels, we evaluate the variance in the re-projected boundaries as an uncertainty value to weight each pseudo-label in our loss function during training. In addition, since ground truth annotations are not available during training nor in testing, we leverage the entropy information in multiple layout estimations as a quantitative metric to measure the geometry consistency of the scene, allowing us to evaluate any layout estimator for hyper-parameter tuning, including model selection without ground truth annotations. Experimental results show that our solution achieves favorable performance against state-of-the-art methods when self-training from three publicly available source datasets to a unique, newly labeled dataset consisting of multi-view of the same scenes.
summary: We present 360-MLC, a self-training method based on multi-view layout consistency for finetuning monocular room-layout models using unlabeled 360-images only. This can be valuable in practical scenarios where a pre-trained model needs to be adapted to a new data domain without using any ground truth annotations. Our simple yet effective assumption is that multiple layout estimations in the same scene must define a consistent geometry regardless of their camera positions. Based on this idea, we leverage a pre-trained model to project estimated layout boundaries from several camera views into the 3D world coordinate. Then, we re-project them back to the spherical coordinate and build a probability function, from which we sample the pseudo-labels for self-training. To handle unconfident pseudo-labels, we evaluate the variance in the re-projected boundaries as an uncertainty value to weight each pseudo-label in our loss function during training. In addition, since ground truth annotations are not available during training nor in testing, we leverage the entropy information in multiple layout estimations as a quantitative metric to measure the geometry consistency of the scene, allowing us to evaluate any layout estimator for hyper-parameter tuning, including model selection without ground truth annotations. Experimental results show that our solution achieves favorable performance against state-of-the-art methods when self-training from three publicly available source datasets to a unique, newly labeled dataset consisting of multi-view of the same scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 360-MLC，这是一种基于多视图布局一致性的自训练方法，仅使用未标记的 360 度图像来微调单目房间布局模型。这在实际场景中非常有价值，在这种场景中，预训练模型需要适应新的数据域而不使用任何真实注释。我们简单而有效的假设是，同一场景中的多个布局估计必须定义一致的几何形状，无论它们的相机位置如何。基于这个想法，我们利用预先训练的模型将估计的布局边界从多个摄像机视图投影到 3D 世界坐标中。然后，我们将它们重新投影回球坐标并构建一个概率函数，从中我们对伪标签进行采样以进行自我训练。为了处理不自信的伪标签，我们将重新投影边界的方差评估为不确定性值，以在训练期间对损失函数中的每个伪标签进行加权。此外，由于地面实况注释在训练和测试期间均不可用，因此我们利用多个布局估计中的熵信息作为定量指标来测量场景的几何一致性，从而使我们能够评估任何布局估计器以进行超参数调整，包括没有地面实况注释的模型选择。实验结果表明，当从三个公开可用的源数据集进行自我训练到由相同场景的多视图组成的独特的、新标记的数据集时，我们的解决方案相对于最先进的方法取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角布局一致性的自训练方法360-MLC，用于在无标注的360度图像上微调单目房间布局模型。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中预训练模型需适应新数据域但缺乏标注数据，需开发无需真实标注的自训练方法。
AI.method: 通过预训练模型从多视角估计布局边界并投影至3D世界坐标，再反投影至球面坐标构建概率函数生成伪标签；利用重投影边界方差作为不确定性权重，结合熵值衡量几何一致性以指导超参数调优。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集到新标注数据集的自训练实验中，该方法性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 360-MLC通过多视角布局一致性有效利用无标注数据进行自训练和模型选择，为无监督域适应提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yuhao Jiang,Kunjie Zhang,Qimai Li,Jiaxin Chen,Xiaolong Zhu
title: Multi-Agent Path Finding via Tree LSTM
title_zh: 通过 Tree LSTM 进行多代理路径查找
abstract: In recent years, Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) has attracted attention from the fields of both Operations Research (OR) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, in the 2021 Flatland3 Challenge, a competition on MAPF, the best RL method scored only 27.9, far less than the best OR method. This paper proposes a new RL solution to Flatland3 Challenge, which scores 125.3, several times higher than the best RL solution before. We creatively apply a novel network architecture, TreeLSTM, to MAPF in our solution. Together with several other RL techniques, including reward shaping, multiple-phase training, and centralized control, our solution is comparable to the top 2-3 OR methods.
summary: In recent years, Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) has attracted attention from the fields of both Operations Research (OR) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, in the 2021 Flatland3 Challenge, a competition on MAPF, the best RL method scored only 27.9, far less than the best OR method. This paper proposes a new RL solution to Flatland3 Challenge, which scores 125.3, several times higher than the best RL solution before. We creatively apply a novel network architecture, TreeLSTM, to MAPF in our solution. Together with several other RL techniques, including reward shaping, multiple-phase training, and centralized control, our solution is comparable to the top 2-3 OR methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多智能体路径寻找（MAPF）引起了运筹学（OR）和强化学习（RL）领域的关注。然而，在 2021 年 MAPF 上的竞赛 Flatland3 Challenge 中，最佳 RL 方法得分仅为 27.9，远低于最佳 OR 方法。本文针对 Flatland3 Challenge 提出了一种新的 RL 解决方案，得分为 125.3，比之前最好的 RL 解决方案高出数倍。我们创造性地将一种新颖的网络架构 TreeLSTM 应用于我们的解决方案中的 MAPF。与其他几种 RL 技术（包括奖励塑造、多阶段训练和集中控制）一起，我们的解决方案可与排名前 2-3 的 OR 方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于TreeLSTM的强化学习方法，用于解决多智能体路径寻找（MAPF）问题，以提高在Flatland3挑战中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在MAPF任务中的表现远低于运筹学方法，亟需改进RL方法以提升其效率和效果。
AI.method: 采用TreeLSTM网络架构，结合奖励塑形、多阶段训练和集中式控制等强化学习技术，以增强模型对复杂路径规划任务的处理能力。
AI.result: 在Flatland3挑战中，新方法得分125.3，显著优于之前的RL方法，并可与前2-3名的运筹学方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: TreeLSTM结合RL技术有效提升了MAPF问题的解决能力，为多智能体路径规划提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化模型结构。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于TreeLSTM的强化学习方法，用于解决多智能体路径寻找（MAPF）问题，以提高在Flatland3挑战中的表现。
ai_content.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在MAPF任务中的表现远低于运筹学方法，亟需改进RL方法以提升其效率和效果。
ai_content.method: 采用TreeLSTM网络架构，结合奖励塑形、多阶段训练和集中式控制等强化学习技术，以增强模型对复杂路径规划任务的处理能力。
ai_content.result: 在Flatland3挑战中，新方法得分125.3，显著优于之前的RL方法，并可与前2-3名的运筹学方法相媲美。
ai_content.conclusion: TreeLSTM结合RL技术有效提升了MAPF问题的解决能力，为多智能体路径规划提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化模型结构。

search_text: Multi-Agent Path Finding via Tree LSTM 通过 Tree LSTM 进行多代理路径查找 In recent years, Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) has attracted attention from the fields of both Operations Research (OR) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, in the 2021 Flatland3 Challenge, a competition on MAPF, the best RL method scored only 27.9, far less than the best OR method. This paper proposes a new RL solution to Flatland3 Challenge, which scores 125.3, several times higher than the best RL solution before. We creatively apply a novel network architecture, TreeLSTM, to MAPF in our solution. Together with several other RL techniques, including reward shaping, multiple-phase training, and centralized control, our solution is comparable to the top 2-3 OR methods. 近年来，多智能体路径寻找（MAPF）引起了运筹学（OR）和强化学习（RL）领域的关注。然而，在 2021 年 MAPF 上的竞赛 Flatland3 Challenge 中，最佳 RL 方法得分仅为 27.9，远低于最佳 OR 方法。本文针对 Flatland3 Challenge 提出了一种新的 RL 解决方案，得分为 125.3，比之前最好的 RL 解决方案高出数倍。我们创造性地将一种新颖的网络架构 TreeLSTM 应用于我们的解决方案中的 MAPF。与其他几种 RL 技术（包括奖励塑造、多阶段训练和集中控制）一起，我们的解决方案可与排名前 2-3 的 OR 方法相媲美。 本文提出了一种基于TreeLSTM的强化学习方法，用于解决多智能体路径寻找（MAPF）问题，以提高在Flatland3挑战中的表现。 Yuhao Jiang,Kunjie Zhang,Qimai Li,Jiaxin Chen,Xiaolong Zhu cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

title: Finding Memo: Extractive Memorization in Constrained Sequence Generation Tasks
title_zh: 寻找备忘录：约束序列生成任务中的提取记忆
abstract: Memorization presents a challenge for several constrained Natural Language Generation (NLG) tasks such as Neural Machine Translation (NMT), wherein the proclivity of neural models to memorize noisy and atypical samples reacts adversely with the noisy (web crawled) datasets. However, previous studies of memorization in constrained NLG tasks have only focused on counterfactual memorization, linking it to the problem of hallucinations. In this work, we propose a new, inexpensive algorithm for extractive memorization (exact training data generation under insufficient context) in constrained sequence generation tasks and use it to study extractive memorization and its effects in NMT. We demonstrate that extractive memorization poses a serious threat to NMT reliability by qualitatively and quantitatively characterizing the memorized samples as well as the model behavior in their vicinity. Based on empirical observations, we develop a simple algorithm which elicits non-memorized translations of memorized samples from the same model, for a large fraction of such samples. Finally, we show that the proposed algorithm could also be leveraged to mitigate memorization in the model through finetuning. We have released the code to reproduce our results at https://github.com/vyraun/Finding-Memo.
summary: Memorization presents a challenge for several constrained Natural Language Generation (NLG) tasks such as Neural Machine Translation (NMT), wherein the proclivity of neural models to memorize noisy and atypical samples reacts adversely with the noisy (web crawled) datasets. However, previous studies of memorization in constrained NLG tasks have only focused on counterfactual memorization, linking it to the problem of hallucinations. In this work, we propose a new, inexpensive algorithm for extractive memorization (exact training data generation under insufficient context) in constrained sequence generation tasks and use it to study extractive memorization and its effects in NMT. We demonstrate that extractive memorization poses a serious threat to NMT reliability by qualitatively and quantitatively characterizing the memorized samples as well as the model behavior in their vicinity. Based on empirical observations, we develop a simple algorithm which elicits non-memorized translations of memorized samples from the same model, for a large fraction of such samples. Finally, we show that the proposed algorithm could also be leveraged to mitigate memorization in the model through finetuning. We have released the code to reproduce our results at https://github.com/vyraun/Finding-Memo.
abstract_zh: 记忆对神经机器翻译（NMT）等一些受约束的自然语言生成（NLG）任务提出了挑战，其中神经模型记忆噪声和非典型样本的倾向与噪声（网络抓取）数据集产生不利反应。然而，之前对有限 NLG 任务中记忆的研究仅关注反事实记忆，将其与幻觉问题联系起来。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的、廉价的算法，用于约束序列生成任务中的提取记忆（在上下文不足的情况下生成精确的训练数据），并用它来研究提取记忆及其在 NMT 中的效果。我们通过定性和定量地描述记忆样本及其附近的模型行为，证明提取记忆对 NMT 的可靠性构成了严重威胁。基于经验观察，我们开发了一种简单的算法，可以针对大部分此类样本，从同一模型中引出记忆样本的非记忆翻译。最后，我们表明，所提出的算法还可以通过微调来减轻模型中的记忆。我们已在 https://github.com/vyraun/Finding-Memo 发布了重现结果的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新算法用于检测和缓解约束序列生成任务（如神经机器翻译）中的提取式记忆问题，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注对抗性记忆与幻觉问题，而提取式记忆（模型在上下文不足时直接复制训练数据）对NMT可靠性的影响尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 设计一种低成本算法，通过分析模型输出与训练数据的重叠度识别提取式记忆样本，并进一步开发细调方法减少记忆现象。
AI.result: 实验表明提取式记忆会显著降低NMT可靠性，且该算法能有效识别记忆样本并生成非记忆化翻译，细调后可缓解记忆问题。
AI.conclusion: 提取式记忆是NMT中的重要风险因素，本文提出的算法为分析和缓解该问题提供了实用工具。

authors_text: Dianbo Liu,Moksh Jain,Bonaventure Dossou,Qianli Shen,Salem Lahlou,Anirudh Goyal,Nikolay Malkin,Chris Emezue,Dinghuai Zhang,Nadhir Hassen,Xu Ji,Kenji Kawaguchi,Yoshua Bengio
title: GFlowOut: Dropout with Generative Flow Networks
title_zh: GFlowOut：生成流网络的 Dropout
abstract: Bayesian Inference offers principled tools to tackle many critical problems with modern neural networks such as poor calibration and generalization, and data inefficiency. However, scaling Bayesian inference to large architectures is challenging and requires restrictive approximations. Monte Carlo Dropout has been widely used as a relatively cheap way for approximate Inference and to estimate uncertainty with deep neural networks. Traditionally, the dropout mask is sampled independently from a fixed distribution. Recent works show that the dropout mask can be viewed as a latent variable, which can be inferred with variational inference. These methods face two important challenges: (a) the posterior distribution over masks can be highly multi-modal which can be difficult to approximate with standard variational inference and (b) it is not trivial to fully utilize sample-dependent information and correlation among dropout masks to improve posterior estimation. In this work, we propose GFlowOut to address these issues. GFlowOut leverages the recently proposed probabilistic framework of Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to learn the posterior distribution over dropout masks. We empirically demonstrate that GFlowOut results in predictive distributions that generalize better to out-of-distribution data, and provide uncertainty estimates which lead to better performance in downstream tasks.
summary: Bayesian Inference offers principled tools to tackle many critical problems with modern neural networks such as poor calibration and generalization, and data inefficiency. However, scaling Bayesian inference to large architectures is challenging and requires restrictive approximations. Monte Carlo Dropout has been widely used as a relatively cheap way for approximate Inference and to estimate uncertainty with deep neural networks. Traditionally, the dropout mask is sampled independently from a fixed distribution. Recent works show that the dropout mask can be viewed as a latent variable, which can be inferred with variational inference. These methods face two important challenges: (a) the posterior distribution over masks can be highly multi-modal which can be difficult to approximate with standard variational inference and (b) it is not trivial to fully utilize sample-dependent information and correlation among dropout masks to improve posterior estimation. In this work, we propose GFlowOut to address these issues. GFlowOut leverages the recently proposed probabilistic framework of Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to learn the posterior distribution over dropout masks. We empirically demonstrate that GFlowOut results in predictive distributions that generalize better to out-of-distribution data, and provide uncertainty estimates which lead to better performance in downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯推理提供了原理性工具来解决现代神经网络的许多关键问题，例如校准和泛化不良以及数据效率低下。然而，将贝叶斯推理扩展到大型架构具有挑战性，并且需要限制性近似。蒙特卡罗 Dropout 已被广泛用作近似推理和估计深度神经网络不确定性的相对便宜的方法。传统上，丢失掩模是独立于固定分布进行采样的。最近的研究表明，dropout mask 可以被视为一个潜在变量，可以通过变分推理来推断。这些方法面临两个重要的挑战：（a）掩模上的后验分布可能是高度多模态的，这可能很难用标准变分推理来近似；（b）充分利用样本相关信息和丢失掩模之间的相关性来改进后验估计并非易事。在这项工作中，我们提出 GFlowOut 来解决这些问题。 GFlowOut 利用最近提出的生成流网络 (GFlowNets) 概率框架来学习 dropout mask 上的后验分布。我们凭经验证明，GFlowOut 产生的预测分布可以更好地推广到分布外数据，并提供不确定性估计，从而在下游任务中带来更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GFlowOut方法，利用生成流网络改进Dropout机制，以提升神经网络的不确定性估计和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统Monte Carlo Dropout在处理多峰后验分布和样本依赖信息时存在局限，现有变分推断方法难以有效建模dropout掩码的复杂分布。
AI.method: 基于生成流网络（GFlowNets）框架，学习dropout掩码的后验分布，通过建模掩码间的相关性提升不确定性估计。
AI.result: 实验表明GFlowOut在分布外数据上具有更优的泛化性能，且不确定性估计显著提升下游任务表现。
AI.conclusion: GFlowOut通过生成流网络有效解决了传统Dropout的局限性，在不确定性量化与模型泛化方面取得进展。

In this work, we propose GFlowOut to address these issues. GFlowOut leverages the recently proposed probabilistic framework of Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to learn the posterior distribution over dropout masks. We empirically demonstrate that GFlowOut results in predictive distributions that generalize better to out-of-distribution data, and provide uncertainty estimates which lead to better performance in downstream tasks. 贝叶斯推理提供了原理性工具来解决现代神经网络的许多关键问题，例如校准和泛化不良以及数据效率低下。然而，将贝叶斯推理扩展到大型架构具有挑战性，并且需要限制性近似。蒙特卡罗 Dropout 已被广泛用作近似推理和估计深度神经网络不确定性的相对便宜的方法。传统上，丢失掩模是独立于固定分布进行采样的。最近的研究表明，dropout mask 可以被视为一个潜在变量，可以通过变分推理来推断。这些方法面临两个重要的挑战：（a）掩模上的后验分布可能是高度多模态的，这可能很难用标准变分推理来近似；（b）充分利用样本相关信息和丢失掩模之间的相关性来改进后验估计并非易事。在这项工作中，我们提出 GFlowOut 来解决这些问题。 GFlowOut 利用最近提出的生成流网络 (GFlowNets) 概率框架来学习 dropout mask 上的后验分布。我们凭经验证明，GFlowOut 产生的预测分布可以更好地推广到分布外数据，并提供不确定性估计，从而在下游任务中带来更好的性能。 本文提出GFlowOut方法，利用生成流网络改进Dropout机制，以提升神经网络的不确定性估计和泛化能力。 Dianbo Liu,Moksh Jain,Bonaventure Dossou,Qianli Shen,Salem Lahlou,Anirudh Goyal,Nikolay Malkin,Chris Emezue,Dinghuai Zhang,Nadhir Hassen,Xu Ji,Kenji Kawaguchi,Yoshua Bengio cs.LG,cs.AI

title: The Design and Realization of Multi-agent Obstacle Avoidance based on Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于强化学习的多智能体避障设计与实现
abstract: Intelligence agents and multi-agent systems play important roles in scenes like the control system of grouped drones, and multi-agent navigation and obstacle avoidance which is the foundational function of advanced application has great importance. In multi-agent navigation and obstacle avoidance tasks, the decision-making interactions and dynamic changes of agents are difficult for traditional route planning algorithms or reinforcement learning algorithms with the increased complexity of the environment. The classical multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm, Multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient(MADDPG), solved precedent algorithms' problems of having unstationary training process and unable to deal with environment randomness. However, MADDPG ignored the temporal message hidden beneath agents' interaction with the environment. Besides, due to its CTDE technique which let each agent's critic network to calculate over all agents' action and the whole environment information, it lacks ability to scale to larger amount of agents. To deal with MADDPG's ignorance of the temporal information of the data, this article proposes a new algorithm called MADDPG-LSTMactor, which combines MADDPG with Long short term memory (LSTM). By using agent's observations of continuous timesteps as the input of its policy network, it allows the LSTM layer to process the hidden temporal message. Experimental result demonstrated that this algorithm had better performance in scenarios where the amount of agents is small. Besides, to solve MADDPG's drawback of not being efficient in scenarios where agents are too many, this article puts forward a light-weight MADDPG (MADDPG-L) algorithm, which simplifies the input of critic network. The result of experiments showed that this algorithm had better performance than MADDPG when the amount of agents was large.
summary: Intelligence agents and multi-agent systems play important roles in scenes like the control system of grouped drones, and multi-agent navigation and obstacle avoidance which is the foundational function of advanced application has great importance. In multi-agent navigation and obstacle avoidance tasks, the decision-making interactions and dynamic changes of agents are difficult for traditional route planning algorithms or reinforcement learning algorithms with the increased complexity of the environment. However, MADDPG ignored the temporal message hidden beneath agents' interaction with the environment. Besides, due to its CTDE technique which let each agent's critic network to calculate over all agents' action and the whole environment information, it lacks ability to scale to larger amount of agents. To deal with MADDPG's ignorance of the temporal information of the data, this article proposes a new algorithm called MADDPG-LSTMactor, which combines MADDPG with Long short term memory (LSTM). By using agent's observations of continuous timesteps as the input of its policy network, it allows the LSTM layer to process the hidden temporal message. Experimental result demonstrated that this algorithm had better performance in scenarios where the amount of agents is small. Besides, to solve MADDPG's drawback of not being efficient in scenarios where agents are too many, this article puts forward a light-weight MADDPG (MADDPG-L) algorithm, which simplifies the input of critic network. The result of experiments showed that this algorithm had better performance than MADDPG when the amount of agents was large.
abstract_zh: 智能体和多智能体系统在编组无人机控制系统等场景中发挥着重要作用，而多智能体导航和避障作为高级应用的基础功能具有重要意义。在多智能体导航和避障任务中，随着环境复杂性的增加，智能体的决策交互和动态变化对于传统的路径规划算法或强化学习算法来说是困难的。经典的多智能体强化学习算法多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（MADDPG）解决了现有算法训练过程不稳定、无法处理环境随机性的问题。然而，MADDPG 忽略了隐藏在智能体与环境交互之下的时间信息。此外，由于其CTDE技术让每个智能体的批评者网络计算所有智能体的动作和整个环境信息，因此它缺乏扩展到更大量智能体的能力。为了解决MADDPG对数据时间信息的无知，本文提出了一种名为MADDPG-LSTMactor的新算法，它将MADDPG与长短期记忆（LSTM）相结合。通过使用代理对连续时间步长的观察作为其策略网络的输入，它允许 LSTM 层处理隐藏的时间消息。实验结果表明，该算法在智能体数量较少的场景下具有较好的性能。此外，针对MADDPG在agent过多场景下效率不高的缺点，本文提出了一种轻量级MADDPG（MADDPG-L）算法，简化了critic网络的输入。实验结果表明，当智能体数量较大时，该算法比MADDPG具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种改进的多智能体强化学习算法MADDPG-LSTMactor和MADDPG-L，以解决多智能体避障中的时序信息处理和大规模智能体扩展问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体强化学习算法MADDPG在处理时序信息和大规模智能体场景时存在局限性，需改进以提升复杂环境下的避障性能。
AI.method: 将LSTM网络集成到MADDPG的策略网络中处理时序信息（MADDPG-LSTMactor），并设计轻量化版本MADDPG-L通过简化评论家网络输入以提升大规模智能体效率。
AI.result: 实验表明MADDPG-LSTMactor在小规模智能体场景中表现更优，MADDPG-L在大规模智能体场景中效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两种算法有效解决了MADDPG在时序建模和扩展性方面的不足，为不同规模的多智能体避障任务提供了针对性解决方案。

authors_text: Yiheng Shu,Zhiwei Yu,Yuhan Li,Börje F. Karlsson,Tingting Ma,Yuzhong Qu,Chin-Yew Lin
title: TIARA: Multi-grained Retrieval for Robust Question Answering over Large Knowledge Bases
title_zh: TIARA：针对大型知识库的稳健问答的多粒度检索
abstract: Pre-trained language models (PLMs) have shown their effectiveness in multiple scenarios. However, KBQA remains challenging, especially regarding coverage and generalization settings. This is due to two main factors: i) understanding the semantics of both questions and relevant knowledge from the KB; ii) generating executable logical forms with both semantic and syntactic correctness. In this paper, we present a new KBQA model, TIARA, which addresses those issues by applying multi-grained retrieval to help the PLM focus on the most relevant KB contexts, viz., entities, exemplary logical forms, and schema items. Moreover, constrained decoding is used to control the output space and reduce generation errors. Experiments over important benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. TIARA outperforms previous SOTA, including those using PLMs or oracle entity annotations, by at least 4.1 and 1.1 F1 points on GrailQA and WebQuestionsSP, respectively.
summary: Pre-trained language models (PLMs) have shown their effectiveness in multiple scenarios. However, KBQA remains challenging, especially regarding coverage and generalization settings. This is due to two main factors: i) understanding the semantics of both questions and relevant knowledge from the KB; ii) generating executable logical forms with both semantic and syntactic correctness. In this paper, we present a new KBQA model, TIARA, which addresses those issues by applying multi-grained retrieval to help the PLM focus on the most relevant KB contexts, viz., entities, exemplary logical forms, and schema items. Moreover, constrained decoding is used to control the output space and reduce generation errors. Experiments over important benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. TIARA outperforms previous SOTA, including those using PLMs or oracle entity annotations, by at least 4.1 and 1.1 F1 points on GrailQA and WebQuestionsSP, respectively.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型 (PLM) 已在多种场景中显示出其有效性。然而，KBQA 仍然具有挑战性，特别是在覆盖范围和泛化设置方面。这是由于两个主要因素：i）理解两个问题的语义和知识库中的相关知识； ii) 生成具有语义和句法正确性的可执行逻辑形式。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 KBQA 模型 TIARA，它通过应用多粒度检索来帮助 PLM 关注最相关的知识库上下文（即实体、示例性逻辑形式和模式项）来解决这些问题。此外，使用约束解码来控制输出空间并减少生成错误。对重要基准的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 TIARA 在 GrailQA 和 WebQuestionsSP 上分别比以前的 SOTA（包括使用 PLM 或 Oracle 实体注释的 SOTA）分别高出至少 4.1 和 1.1 F1 点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TIARA的新知识库问答（KBQA）模型，通过多粒度检索和约束解码提升模型在大型知识库上的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型在KBQA任务中面临语义理解不足和逻辑形式生成错误的问题，导致覆盖性和泛化能力不足。
AI.method: TIARA采用多粒度检索技术，聚焦实体、示例逻辑形式和模式项等关键知识上下文，并结合约束解码减少生成错误。
AI.result: 在GrailQA和WebQuestionsSP基准测试中，TIARA分别超越现有最优方法4.1和1.1 F1分数，包括使用预训练语言模型和人工实体标注的方法。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度检索与约束解码的结合显著提升了KBQA性能，为复杂知识库问答提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TIARA的新知识库问答（KBQA）模型，通过多粒度检索和约束解码提升模型在大型知识库上的鲁棒性。

title: BARS: A Benchmark for Airport Runway Segmentation
title_zh: BARS：机场跑道分割的基准
abstract: Airport runway segmentation can effectively reduce the accident rate during the landing phase, which has the largest risk of flight accidents. With the rapid development of deep learning (DL), related methods achieve good performance on segmentation tasks and can be well adapted to complex scenes. However, the lack of large-scale, publicly available datasets in this field makes the development of methods based on DL difficult. Therefore, we propose a benchmark for airport runway segmentation, named BARS. Additionally, a semiautomatic annotation pipeline is designed to reduce the annotation workload. BARS has the largest dataset with the richest categories and the only instance annotation in the field. The dataset, which was collected using the X-Plane simulation platform, contains 10,256 images and 30,201 instances with three categories. We evaluate eleven representative instance segmentation methods on BARS and analyze their performance. Based on the characteristic of an airport runway with a regular shape, we propose a plug-and-play smoothing postprocessing module (SPM) and a contour point constraint loss (CPCL) function to smooth segmentation results for mask-based and contour-based methods, respectively. Furthermore, a novel evaluation metric named average smoothness (AS) is developed to measure smoothness. The experiments show that existing instance segmentation methods can achieve prediction results with good performance on BARS. SPM and CPCL can effectively enhance the AS metric while modestly improving accuracy. Our work will be available at https://github.com/c-wenhui/BARS.

SPM and CPCL can effectively enhance the AS metric while modestly improving accuracy. Our work will be available at https://github.com/c-wenhui/BARS.
abstract_zh: 机场跑道分段可以有效降低飞行事故风险最大的着陆阶段的事故率。随着深度学习（DL）的快速发展，相关方法在分割任务上取得了良好的性能，并且能够很好地适应复杂场景。然而，该领域缺乏大规模、公开的数据集，使得基于深度学习的方法的开发变得困难。因此，我们提出了机场跑道分割的基准，命名为BARS。此外，还设计了半自动注释管道来减少注释工作量。 BARS拥有该领域最大的数据集、最丰富的类别以及唯一的实例标注。该数据集是使用 X-Plane 模拟平台收集的，包含 10,256 张图像和 30,201 个实例，分为三个类别。我们在 BARS 上评估了 11 种代表性的实例分割方法并分析了它们的性能。基于形状规则的机场跑道的特点，我们提出了即插即用的平滑后处理模块（SPM）和轮廓点约束损失（CPCL）函数，分别用于平滑基于掩模和基于轮廓的方法的分割结果。此外，还开发了一种名为平均平滑度（AS）的新颖评估指标来测量平滑度。实验表明，现有的实例分割方法可以在BARS上取得良好性能的预测结果。 SPM和CPCL可以有效增强AS度量，同时适度提高准确性。我们的工作将在 https://github.com/c-wenhui/BARS 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为BARS的机场跑道分割基准数据集，包含10,256张图像和30,201个实例，并设计了半自动标注流程及优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法缺乏大规模公开数据集，导致机场跑道分割研究进展受限，且现有数据集类别单一、无实例标注。
AI.method: 基于X-Plane模拟平台构建BARS数据集，设计半自动标注流程；提出SPM平滑模块和CPCL损失函数，并开发平均平滑度(AS)评价指标。
AI.result: 11种分割方法在BARS上表现良好，SPM和CPCL分别提升mask和轮廓方法的平滑度，同时小幅提高精度。
AI.conclusion: BARS是当前规模最大的机场跑道分割数据集，提出的优化方法有效提升分割结果质量，为相关研究提供新基准。

authors_text: Ahnaf Mozib Samin,M. Humayon Kobir,Md. Mushtaq Shahriyar Rafee,M. Firoz Ahmed,Mehedi Hasan,Partha Ghosh,Shafkat Kibria,M. Shahidur Rahman
title: Investigating self-supervised, weakly supervised and fully supervised training approaches for multi-domain automatic speech recognition: a study on Bangladeshi Bangla
title_zh: 研究多域自动语音识别的自监督、弱监督和完全监督训练方法：针对孟加拉国孟加拉语的研究
abstract: Despite huge improvements in automatic speech recognition (ASR) employing neural networks, ASR systems still suffer from a lack of robustness and generalizability issues due to domain shifting. This is mainly because principal corpus design criteria are often not identified and examined adequately while compiling ASR datasets. In this study, we investigate the robustness of the state-of-the-art transfer learning approaches such as self-supervised wav2vec 2.0 and weakly supervised Whisper as well as fully supervised convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for multi-domain ASR. We also demonstrate the significance of domain selection while building a corpus by assessing these models on a novel multi-domain Bangladeshi Bangla ASR evaluation benchmark - BanSpeech, which contains approximately 6.52 hours of human-annotated speech and 8085 utterances from 13 distinct domains. SUBAK.KO, a mostly read speech corpus for the morphologically rich language Bangla, has been used to train the ASR systems. Experimental evaluation reveals that self-supervised cross-lingual pre-training is the best strategy compared to weak supervision and full supervision to tackle the multi-domain ASR task. Moreover, the ASR models trained on SUBAK.KO face difficulty recognizing speech from domains with mostly spontaneous speech. The BanSpeech will be publicly available to meet the need for a challenging evaluation benchmark for Bangla ASR.
summary: Despite huge improvements in automatic speech recognition (ASR) employing neural networks, ASR systems still suffer from a lack of robustness and generalizability issues due to domain shifting. This is mainly because principal corpus design criteria are often not identified and examined adequately while compiling ASR datasets. In this study, we investigate the robustness of the state-of-the-art transfer learning approaches such as self-supervised wav2vec 2.0 and weakly supervised Whisper as well as fully supervised convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for multi-domain ASR. We also demonstrate the significance of domain selection while building a corpus by assessing these models on a novel multi-domain Bangladeshi Bangla ASR evaluation benchmark - BanSpeech, which contains approximately 6.52 hours of human-annotated speech and 8085 utterances from 13 distinct domains. SUBAK.KO, a mostly read speech corpus for the morphologically rich language Bangla, has been used to train the ASR systems. Experimental evaluation reveals that self-supervised cross-lingual pre-training is the best strategy compared to weak supervision and full supervision to tackle the multi-domain ASR task. Moreover, the ASR models trained on SUBAK.KO face difficulty recognizing speech from domains with mostly spontaneous speech. The BanSpeech will be publicly available to meet the need for a challenging evaluation benchmark for Bangla ASR.
abstract_zh: 尽管采用神经网络的自动语音识别 (ASR) 取得了巨大进步，但由于域转移，ASR 系统仍然缺乏鲁棒性和通用性问题。这主要是因为在编译 ASR 数据集时，通常没有充分确定和检查主要语料库设计标准。在这项研究中，我们研究了最先进的迁移学习方法的鲁棒性，例如自监督 wav2vec 2.0 和弱监督 Whisper 以及用于多域 ASR 的完全监督卷积神经网络 (CNN)。我们还通过在新颖的多域孟加拉孟加拉语 ASR 评估基准 - BanSpeech 上评估这些模型，展示了构建语料库时域选择的重要性，该基准包含约 6.52 小时的人工注释语音和来自 13 个不同域的 8085 条话语。 SUBAK.KO 是形态丰富的孟加拉语的最常阅读的语音语料库，已用于训练 ASR 系统。实验评估表明，与弱监督和全监督相比，自监督跨语言预训练是解决多领域 ASR 任务的最佳策略。此外，在 SUBAK.KO 上训练的 ASR 模型面临着识别来自大部分自发语音领域的语音的困难。 BanSpeech 将公开发布，以满足孟加拉 ASR 具有挑战性的评估基准的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督、弱监督和全监督训练方法在孟加拉国孟加拉语多领域自动语音识别（ASR）中的应用，使用新型基准数据集BanSpeech进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统在领域迁移时存在鲁棒性和泛化性不足的问题，主要因数据集构建时未充分考虑领域选择的重要性。
AI.method: 对比实验采用自监督wav2vec 2.0、弱监督Whisper和全监督CNN方法，基于包含13个领域的BanSpeech数据集（6.52小时标注语音）进行多领域ASR性能评估。
AI.result: 自监督跨语言预训练在多领域ASR任务中表现最佳，但基于SUBAK.KO语料训练的模型在自发性语音领域识别效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习是解决多领域ASR问题的有效方法，BanSpeech基准数据集可为孟加拉语ASR研究提供挑战性评估平台。

title: Unsupervised Object Representation Learning using Translation and Rotation Group Equivariant VAE
title_zh: 使用平移和旋转组等变 VAE 的无监督对象表示学习
abstract: In many imaging modalities, objects of interest can occur in a variety of locations and poses (i.e. are subject to translations and rotations in 2d or 3d), but the location and pose of an object does not change its semantics (i.e. the object's essence). That is, the specific location and rotation of an airplane in satellite imagery, or the 3d rotation of a chair in a natural image, or the rotation of a particle in a cryo-electron micrograph, do not change the intrinsic nature of those objects. Here, we consider the problem of learning semantic representations of objects that are invariant to pose and location in a fully unsupervised manner. We address shortcomings in previous approaches to this problem by introducing TARGET-VAE, a translation and rotation group-equivariant variational autoencoder framework. TARGET-VAE combines three core innovations: 1) a rotation and translation group-equivariant encoder architecture, 2) a structurally disentangled distribution over latent rotation, translation, and a rotation-translation-invariant semantic object representation, which are jointly inferred by the approximate inference network, and 3) a spatially equivariant generator network. In comprehensive experiments, we show that TARGET-VAE learns disentangled representations without supervision that significantly improve upon, and avoid the pathologies of, previous methods. When trained on images highly corrupted by rotation and translation, the semantic representations learned by TARGET-VAE are similar to those learned on consistently posed objects, dramatically improving clustering in the semantic latent space. Furthermore, TARGET-VAE is able to perform remarkably accurate unsupervised pose and location inference. We expect methods like TARGET-VAE will underpin future approaches for unsupervised object generation, pose prediction, and object detection.
summary: In many imaging modalities, objects of interest can occur in a variety of locations and poses (i.e. are subject to translations and rotations in 2d or 3d), but the location and pose of an object does not change its semantics (i.e. the object's essence). That is, the specific location and rotation of an airplane in satellite imagery, or the 3d rotation of a chair in a natural image, or the rotation of a particle in a cryo-electron micrograph, do not change the intrinsic nature of those objects. Here, we consider the problem of learning semantic representations of objects that are invariant to pose and location in a fully unsupervised manner. We address shortcomings in previous approaches to this problem by introducing TARGET-VAE, a translation and rotation group-equivariant variational autoencoder framework. TARGET-VAE combines three core innovations: 1) a rotation and translation group-equivariant encoder architecture, 2) a structurally disentangled distribution over latent rotation, translation, and a rotation-translation-invariant semantic object representation, which are jointly inferred by the approximate inference network, and 3) a spatially equivariant generator network. In comprehensive experiments, we show that TARGET-VAE learns disentangled representations without supervision that significantly improve upon, and avoid the pathologies of, previous methods. When trained on images highly corrupted by rotation and translation, the semantic representations learned by TARGET-VAE are similar to those learned on consistently posed objects, dramatically improving clustering in the semantic latent space. Furthermore, TARGET-VAE is able to perform remarkably accurate unsupervised pose and location inference. We expect methods like TARGET-VAE will underpin future approaches for unsupervised object generation, pose prediction, and object detection.
abstract_zh: 在许多成像模式中，感兴趣的对象可以出现在各种位置和姿势（即在 2d 或 3d 中进行平移和旋转），但对象的位置和姿势不会改变其语义（即对象的本质）。也就是说，卫星图像中飞机的具体位置和旋转，或者自然图像中椅子的 3d 旋转，或者低温电子显微照片中粒子的旋转，都不会改变这些物体的内在性质。在这里，我们考虑以完全无监督的方式学习对姿势和位置不变的对象的语义表示的问题。我们通过引入 TARGET-VAE（一种平移和旋转组等变变分自动编码器框架）来解决此问题的先前方法的缺点。 TARGET-VAE 结合了三个核心创新：1）旋转和平移组等变编码器架构，2）潜在旋转、平移和旋转平移不变语义对象表示的结构解缠分布，这些由近似推理网络联合推断，3）空间等变生成器网络。在综合实验中，我们表明 TARGET-VAE 在没有监督的情况下学习解缠结的表示，这显着改进并避免了以前方法的病态。当在因旋转和平移而高度损坏的图像上进行训练时，TARGET-VAE 学习到的语义表示与在一致姿势的对象上学习到的语义表示相似，从而极大地改善了语义潜在空间中的聚类。此外，TARGET-VAE 能够执行非常准确的无监督姿势和位置推断。我们预计像 TARGET-VAE 这样的方法将支持未来无监督对象生成、姿态预测和对象检测的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习方法TARGET-VAE，用于学习对物体位置和姿态（平移和旋转）不变的语义表示。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中物体的位置和姿态变化不影响其语义本质，但现有方法难以在无监督条件下有效学习这种不变性表示。
AI.method: 设计了平移旋转群等变编码器、解耦的潜在空间分布（包含姿态参数和语义表示）以及空间等变生成网络的VAE框架。
AI.result: 在高度畸变数据集上实现了优于现有方法的语义表示学习，显著提升聚类效果并实现准确的无监督姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: TARGET-VAE为无监督物体生成、姿态预测和检测等任务提供了基础性解决方案。

authors_text: Wei Wang,Gang Wang,Chenlong Hu,K. C. Ho
title: Robust Ellipse Fitting Based on Maximum Correntropy Criterion With Variable Center
title_zh: 基于变中心最大熵准则的鲁棒椭圆拟合
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: 13 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: The presence of outliers can significantly degrade the performance of ellipse fitting methods. We develop an ellipse fitting method that is robust to outliers based on the maximum correntropy criterion with variable center (MCC-VC), where a Laplacian kernel is used. For single ellipse fitting, we formulate a non-convex optimization problem to estimate the kernel bandwidth and center and divide it into two subproblems, each estimating one parameter. We design sufficiently accurate convex approximation to each subproblem such that computationally efficient closed-form solutions are obtained. The two subproblems are solved in an alternate manner until convergence is reached. We also investigate coupled ellipses fitting. While there exist multiple ellipses fitting methods that can be used for coupled ellipses fitting, we develop a couple ellipses fitting method by exploiting the special structure. Having unknown association between data points and ellipses, we introduce an association vector for each data point and formulate a non-convex mixed-integer optimization problem to estimate the data associations, which is approximately solved by relaxing it into a second-order cone program. Using the estimated data associations, we extend the proposed method to achieve the final coupled ellipses fitting. The proposed method is shown to have significantly better performance over the existing methods in both simulated data and real images.
summary: The presence of outliers can significantly degrade the performance of ellipse fitting methods. We develop an ellipse fitting method that is robust to outliers based on the maximum correntropy criterion with variable center (MCC-VC), where a Laplacian kernel is used. For single ellipse fitting, we formulate a non-convex optimization problem to estimate the kernel bandwidth and center and divide it into two subproblems, each estimating one parameter. We design sufficiently accurate convex approximation to each subproblem such that computationally efficient closed-form solutions are obtained. The two subproblems are solved in an alternate manner until convergence is reached. We also investigate coupled ellipses fitting. While there exist multiple ellipses fitting methods that can be used for coupled ellipses fitting, we develop a couple ellipses fitting method by exploiting the special structure. Having unknown association between data points and ellipses, we introduce an association vector for each data point and formulate a non-convex mixed-integer optimization problem to estimate the data associations, which is approximately solved by relaxing it into a second-order cone program. Using the estimated data associations, we extend the proposed method to achieve the final coupled ellipses fitting. The proposed method is shown to have significantly better performance over the existing methods in both simulated data and real images.
abstract_zh: 异常值的存在会显着降低椭圆拟合方法的性能。我们开发了一种基于可变中心最大相关熵准则（MCC-VC）的椭圆拟合方法，该方法对异常值具有鲁棒性，其中使用了拉普拉斯核。对于单椭圆拟合，我们制定一个非凸优化问题来估计核带宽和中心，并将其分为两个子问题，每个子问题估计一个参数。我们为每个子问题设计足够精确的凸近似，以便获得计算有效的封闭式解决方案。两个子问题交替求解，直至收敛。我们还研究了耦合椭圆拟合。虽然存在多种可用于耦合椭圆拟合的椭圆拟合方法，但我们通过利用特殊结构开发了耦合椭圆拟合方法。由于数据点和椭圆之间的关联未知，我们为每个数据点引入一个关联向量，并制定一个非凸混合整数优化问题来估计数据关联，通过将其松弛为二阶锥程序来近似求解。使用估计的数据关联，我们扩展了所提出的方法以实现最终的耦合椭圆拟合。在模拟数据和真实图像中，所提出的方法比现有方法具有明显更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大相关熵准则与可变中心（MCC-VC）的鲁棒椭圆拟合方法，以应对数据中的异常值问题。
AI.motivation: 传统椭圆拟合方法在存在异常值时性能显著下降，需开发对异常值鲁棒的拟合算法。
AI.method: 采用拉普拉斯核函数构建MCC-VC模型，将单椭圆拟合分解为两个凸子问题交替求解；针对耦合椭圆拟合，引入关联向量并通过二阶锥规划松弛解决混合整数优化问题。
AI.result: 在仿真数据和真实图像实验中，该方法相较现有技术表现出更优的拟合精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过可变中心机制和凸近似策略有效抑制异常值影响，为单/多椭圆鲁棒拟合提供了新思路。

C. Ho cs.CV

authors_text: Jiyoung Lee,Hantae Kim,Hyunchang Cho,Edward Choi,Cheonbok Park
title: Specializing Multi-domain NMT via Penalizing Low Mutual Information
title_zh: 通过惩罚低互信息来专业化多域 NMT
abstract: Multi-domain Neural Machine Translation (NMT) trains a single model with multiple domains. It is appealing because of its efficacy in handling multiple domains within one model. An ideal multi-domain NMT should learn distinctive domain characteristics simultaneously, however, grasping the domain peculiarity is a non-trivial task. In this paper, we investigate domain-specific information through the lens of mutual information (MI) and propose a new objective that penalizes low MI to become higher. Our method achieved the state-of-the-art performance among the current competitive multi-domain NMT models. Also, we empirically show our objective promotes low MI to be higher resulting in domain-specialized multi-domain NMT.
summary: Multi-domain Neural Machine Translation (NMT) trains a single model with multiple domains. It is appealing because of its efficacy in handling multiple domains within one model. An ideal multi-domain NMT should learn distinctive domain characteristics simultaneously, however, grasping the domain peculiarity is a non-trivial task. In this paper, we investigate domain-specific information through the lens of mutual information (MI) and propose a new objective that penalizes low MI to become higher. Our method achieved the state-of-the-art performance among the current competitive multi-domain NMT models. Also, we empirically show our objective promotes low MI to be higher resulting in domain-specialized multi-domain NMT.
abstract_zh: 多域神经机器翻译 (NMT) 训练具有多个域的单个模型。它之所以有吸引力，是因为它能够在一个模型中处理多个领域。理想的多领域 NMT 应该同时学习独特的领域特征，然而，掌握领域特性是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们通过互信息（MI）的视角研究特定领域的信息，并提出一个新的目标，惩罚低 MI 使其变得更高。我们的方法在当前具有竞争力的多域 NMT 模型中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们凭经验表明我们的目标将低 MI 提升到更高，从而产生领域专业化的多领域 NMT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过惩罚低互信息来提升多领域神经机器翻译性能的新方法。
AI.motivation: 多领域NMT需同时学习不同领域特征，但现有方法难以有效捕捉领域特异性信息。
AI.method: 通过互信息理论分析领域特征，设计惩罚低互信息的目标函数以增强领域区分度。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到当时最优性能，实验证明该方法能有效提升领域间信息区分度。
AI.conclusion: 惩罚低互信息的目标函数可有效促进多领域NMT模型学习领域特异性表示。

search_text: Specializing Multi-domain NMT via Penalizing Low Mutual Information 通过惩罚低互信息来专业化多域 NMT Multi-domain Neural Machine Translation (NMT) trains a single model with multiple domains. It is appealing because of its efficacy in handling multiple domains within one model. An ideal multi-domain NMT should learn distinctive domain characteristics simultaneously, however, grasping the domain peculiarity is a non-trivial task. In this paper, we investigate domain-specific information through the lens of mutual information (MI) and propose a new objective that penalizes low MI to become higher. Our method achieved the state-of-the-art performance among the current competitive multi-domain NMT models. Also, we empirically show our objective promotes low MI to be higher resulting in domain-specialized multi-domain NMT. 多域神经机器翻译 (NMT) 训练具有多个域的单个模型。它之所以有吸引力，是因为它能够在一个模型中处理多个领域。理想的多领域 NMT 应该同时学习独特的领域特征，然而，掌握领域特性是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们通过互信息（MI）的视角研究特定领域的信息，并提出一个新的目标，惩罚低 MI 使其变得更高。我们的方法在当前具有竞争力的多域 NMT 模型中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们凭经验表明我们的目标将低 MI 提升到更高，从而产生领域专业化的多领域 NMT。 本文提出一种通过惩罚低互信息来提升多领域神经机器翻译性能的新方法。 Jiyoung Lee,Hantae Kim,Hyunchang Cho,Edward Choi,Cheonbok Park cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Gallery Filter Network for Person Search
title_zh: 用于人物搜索的图库过滤网络
abstract: In person search, we aim to localize a query person from one scene in other gallery scenes. The cost of this search operation is dependent on the number of gallery scenes, making it beneficial to reduce the pool of likely scenes. We describe and demonstrate the Gallery Filter Network (GFN), a novel module which can efficiently discard gallery scenes from the search process, and benefit scoring for persons detected in remaining scenes. We show that the GFN is robust under a range of different conditions by testing on different retrieval sets, including cross-camera, occluded, and low-resolution scenarios. In addition, we develop the base SeqNeXt person search model, which improves and simplifies the original SeqNet model. We show that the SeqNeXt+GFN combination yields significant performance gains over other state-of-the-art methods on the standard PRW and CUHK-SYSU person search datasets. To aid experimentation for this and other models, we provide standardized tooling for the data processing and evaluation pipeline typically used for person search research.
summary: In person search, we aim to localize a query person from one scene in other gallery scenes. The cost of this search operation is dependent on the number of gallery scenes, making it beneficial to reduce the pool of likely scenes. We describe and demonstrate the Gallery Filter Network (GFN), a novel module which can efficiently discard gallery scenes from the search process, and benefit scoring for persons detected in remaining scenes. We show that the GFN is robust under a range of different conditions by testing on different retrieval sets, including cross-camera, occluded, and low-resolution scenarios. In addition, we develop the base SeqNeXt person search model, which improves and simplifies the original SeqNet model. We show that the SeqNeXt+GFN combination yields significant performance gains over other state-of-the-art methods on the standard PRW and CUHK-SYSU person search datasets. To aid experimentation for this and other models, we provide standardized tooling for the data processing and evaluation pipeline typically used for person search research.
abstract_zh: 在人物搜索中，我们的目标是在其他画廊场景中定位来自一个场景的查询人物。此搜索操作的成本取决于图库场景的数量，因此有利于减少可能场景的池。我们描述并演示了画廊过滤网络（GFN），这是一个新颖的模块，可以有效地从搜索过程中丢弃画廊场景，并为在剩余场景中检测到的人员提供有益的评分。我们通过对不同检索集（包括跨摄像机、遮挡和低分辨率场景）进行测试，证明 GFN 在各种不同条件下具有鲁棒性。此外，我们还开发了基本的 SeqNeXt 人物搜索模型，该模型改进并简化了原始的 SeqNet 模型。我们证明，在标准 PRW 和 CUHK-SYSU 人物搜索数据集上，SeqNeXt+GFN 组合比其他最先进的方法具有显着的性能提升。为了帮助该模型和其他模型的实验，我们为通常用于人员搜索研究的数据处理和评估管道提供标准化工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Gallery Filter Network (GFN)的新模块，用于在人员搜索任务中高效过滤无关的画廊场景，并结合改进的SeqNeXt模型提升搜索性能。
AI.motivation: 人员搜索的计算成本与画廊场景数量相关，减少需搜索的场景池可提升效率。现有方法在复杂场景（如跨摄像头、遮挡、低分辨率）下鲁棒性不足，且模型结构复杂。
AI.method: 设计GFN模块通过特征匹配快速过滤无关场景，结合改进的SeqNeXt模型（基于SeqNet的简化与优化），形成SeqNeXt+GFN组合方法。
AI.result: 在PRW和CUHK-SYSU数据集上，SeqNeXt+GFN组合方法显著优于现有先进算法，且工具链支持标准化实验流程。
AI.conclusion: GFN有效降低搜索场景数量并提升鲁棒性，SeqNeXt模型改进简化了结构，二者结合在人员搜索任务中取得显著性能提升。

authors_text: Abhishek Moitra,Abhiroop Bhattacharjee,Runcong Kuang,Gokul Krishnan,Yu Cao,Priyadarshini Panda
title: SpikeSim: An end-to-end Compute-in-Memory Hardware Evaluation Tool for Benchmarking Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: SpikeSim：用于对尖峰神经网络进行基准测试的端到端内存计算硬件评估工具
abstract: SNNs are an active research domain towards energy efficient machine intelligence. Compared to conventional ANNs, SNNs use temporal spike data and bio-plausible neuronal activation functions such as Leaky-Integrate Fire/Integrate Fire (LIF/IF) for data processing. However, SNNs incur significant dot-product operations causing high memory and computation overhead in standard von-Neumann computing platforms. Today, In-Memory Computing (IMC) architectures have been proposed to alleviate the "memory-wall bottleneck" prevalent in von-Neumann architectures. Although recent works have proposed IMC-based SNN hardware accelerators, the following have been overlooked- 1) the adverse effects of crossbar non-ideality on SNN performance due to repeated analog dot-product operations over multiple time-steps, 2) hardware overheads of essential SNN-specific components such as the LIF/IF and data communication modules. To this end, we propose SpikeSim, a tool that can perform realistic performance, energy, latency and area evaluation of IMC-mapped SNNs. SpikeSim consists of a practical monolithic IMC architecture called SpikeFlow for mapping SNNs. Additionally, the non-ideality computation engine (NICE) and energy-latency-area (ELA) engine performs hardware-realistic evaluation of SpikeFlow-mapped SNNs. Based on 65nm CMOS implementation and experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and TinyImagenet datasets, we find that the LIF/IF neuronal module has significant area contribution (>11% of the total hardware area). We propose SNN topological modifications leading to 1.24x and 10x reduction in the neuronal module's area and the overall energy-delay-product value, respectively. Furthermore, in this work, we perform a holistic comparison between IMC implemented ANN and SNNs and conclude that lower number of time-steps are the key to achieve higher throughput and energy-efficiency for SNNs compared to 4-bit ANNs.

Compared to conventional ANNs, SNNs use temporal spike data and bio-plausible neuronal activation functions such as Leaky-Integrate Fire/Integrate Fire (LIF/IF) for data processing. However, SNNs incur significant dot-product operations causing high memory and computation overhead in standard von-Neumann computing platforms. To this end, we propose SpikeSim, a tool that can perform realistic performance, energy, latency and area evaluation of IMC-mapped SNNs. SpikeSim consists of a practical monolithic IMC architecture called SpikeFlow for mapping SNNs. Additionally, the non-ideality computation engine (NICE) and energy-latency-area (ELA) engine performs hardware-realistic evaluation of SpikeFlow-mapped SNNs. Based on 65nm CMOS implementation and experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and TinyImagenet datasets, we find that the LIF/IF neuronal module has significant area contribution (>11% of the total hardware area). We propose SNN topological modifications leading to 1.24x and 10x reduction in the neuronal module's area and the overall energy-delay-product value, respectively. Furthermore, in this work, we perform a holistic comparison between IMC implemented ANN and SNNs and conclude that lower number of time-steps are the key to achieve higher throughput and energy-efficiency for SNNs compared to 4-bit ANNs.
abstract_zh: SNN 是节能机器智能的一个活跃研究领域。与传统的 ANN 相比，SNN 使用时间尖峰数据和生物合理的神经元激活函数（例如 Leaky-Integrate Fire/Integrate Fire (LIF/IF)）进行数据处理。然而，SNN 会产生大量的点积运算，导致标准冯诺依曼计算平台中的内存和计算开销较高。如今，内存计算（IMC）架构已被提出来缓解冯诺依曼架构中普遍存在的“内存墙瓶颈”。尽管最近的工作提出了基于 IMC 的 SNN 硬件加速器，但以下几点被忽视了：1）由于多个时间步上重复的模拟点积运算，交叉开关非理想性对 SNN 性能的不利影响；2）基本 SNN 特定组件（如 LIF/IF 和数据通信模块）的硬件开销。为此，我们提出了 SpikeSim，这是一种可以对 IMC 映射的 SNN 进行实际性能、能量、延迟和面积评估的工具。 SpikeSim 包含一个名为 SpikeFlow 的实用整体 IMC 架构，用于映射 SNN。此外，非理想计算引擎 (NICE) 和能量延迟区域 (ELA) 引擎对 SpikeFlow 映射的 SNN 进行硬件现实评估。基于 65nm CMOS 实现以及在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 TinyImagenet 数据集上的实验，我们发现 LIF/IF 神经元模块具有显着的面积贡献（> 总硬件面积的 11%）。我们提出 SNN 拓扑修改，导致神经元模块面积和整体能量延迟乘积值分别减少 1.24 倍和 10 倍。此外，在这项工作中，我们对 IMC 实现的 ANN 和 SNN 进行了全面比较，并得出结论：与 4 位 ANN 相比，较少的时间步数是 SNN 实现更高吞吐量和能源效率的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpikeSim工具，用于对基于存内计算（IMC）的脉冲神经网络（SNN）进行性能、能耗、延迟和面积的端到端评估。
AI.motivation: 传统SNN在冯·诺依曼架构下存在高内存和计算开销，现有IMC加速器未充分考虑交叉条非理想性影响及SNN专用模块的硬件开销。
AI.method: 设计包含SpikeFlow架构的SpikeSim工具，结合非理想性计算引擎（NICE）和能效面积（ELA）评估模块，基于65nm CMOS实现并实验验证。
AI.result: LIF/IF模块占硬件面积超11%，拓扑优化使该模块面积减少1.24倍且整体能效延迟积降低10倍，证明SNN需更少时间步以提升效率。
AI.conclusion: SpikeSim为IMC-SNN提供真实评估框架，表明减少时间步是SNN相比4位ANN实现高吞吐和能效的关键。

motivation: 传统SNN在冯·诺依曼架构下存在高内存和计算开销，现有IMC加速器未充分考虑交叉条非理想性影响及SNN专用模块的硬件开销。
method: 设计包含SpikeFlow架构的SpikeSim工具，结合非理想性计算引擎（NICE）和能效面积（ELA）评估模块，基于65nm CMOS实现并实验验证。
result: LIF/IF模块占硬件面积超11%，拓扑优化使该模块面积减少1.24倍且整体能效延迟积降低10倍，证明SNN需更少时间步以提升效率。
conclusion: SpikeSim为IMC-SNN提供真实评估框架，表明减少时间步是SNN相比4位ANN实现高吞吐和能效的关键。
search_text: SpikeSim: An end-to-end Compute-in-Memory Hardware Evaluation Tool for Benchmarking Spiking Neural Networks SpikeSim：用于对尖峰神经网络进行基准测试的端到端内存计算硬件评估工具 SNNs are an active research domain towards energy efficient machine intelligence. Compared to conventional ANNs, SNNs use temporal spike data and bio-plausible neuronal activation functions such as Leaky-Integrate Fire/Integrate Fire (LIF/IF) for data processing. However, SNNs incur significant dot-product operations causing high memory and computation overhead in standard von-Neumann computing platforms. Today, In-Memory Computing (IMC) architectures have been proposed to alleviate the "memory-wall bottleneck" prevalent in von-Neumann architectures. Although recent works have proposed IMC-based SNN hardware accelerators, the following have been overlooked- 1) the adverse effects of crossbar non-ideality on SNN performance due to repeated analog dot-product operations over multiple time-steps, 2) hardware overheads of essential SNN-specific components such as the LIF/IF and data communication modules. To this end, we propose SpikeSim, a tool that can perform realistic performance, energy, latency and area evaluation of IMC-mapped SNNs. SpikeSim consists of a practical monolithic IMC architecture called SpikeFlow for mapping SNNs. Additionally, the non-ideality computation engine (NICE) and energy-latency-area (ELA) engine performs hardware-realistic evaluation of SpikeFlow-mapped SNNs. Based on 65nm CMOS implementation and experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and TinyImagenet datasets, we find that the LIF/IF neuronal module has significant area contribution (>11% of the total hardware area). We propose SNN topological modifications leading to 1.24x and 10x reduction in the neuronal module's area and the overall energy-delay-product value, respectively. Furthermore, in this work, we perform a holistic comparison between IMC implemented ANN and SNNs and conclude that lower number of time-steps are the key to achieve higher throughput and energy-efficiency for SNNs compared to 4-bit ANNs. SNN 是节能机器智能的一个活跃研究领域。与传统的 ANN 相比，SNN 使用时间尖峰数据和生物合理的神经元激活函数（例如 Leaky-Integrate Fire/Integrate Fire (LIF/IF)）进行数据处理。然而，SNN 会产生大量的点积运算，导致标准冯诺依曼计算平台中的内存和计算开销较高。如今，内存计算（IMC）架构已被提出来缓解冯诺依曼架构中普遍存在的“内存墙瓶颈”。尽管最近的工作提出了基于 IMC 的 SNN 硬件加速器，但以下几点被忽视了：1）由于多个时间步上重复的模拟点积运算，交叉开关非理想性对 SNN 性能的不利影响；2）基本 SNN 特定组件（如 LIF/IF 和数据通信模块）的硬件开销。为此，我们提出了 SpikeSim，这是一种可以对 IMC 映射的 SNN 进行实际性能、能量、延迟和面积评估的工具。 SpikeSim 包含一个名为 SpikeFlow 的实用整体 IMC 架构，用于映射 SNN。此外，非理想计算引擎 (NICE) 和能量延迟区域 (ELA) 引擎对 SpikeFlow 映射的 SNN 进行硬件现实评估。基于 65nm CMOS 实现以及在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 TinyImagenet 数据集上的实验，我们发现 LIF/IF 神经元模块具有显着的面积贡献（> 总硬件面积的 11%）。我们提出 SNN 拓扑修改，导致神经元模块面积和整体能量延迟乘积值分别减少 1.24 倍和 10 倍。此外，在这项工作中，我们对 IMC 实现的 ANN 和 SNN 进行了全面比较，并得出结论：与 4 位 ANN 相比，较少的时间步数是 SNN 实现更高吞吐量和能源效率的关键。 本文提出SpikeSim工具，用于对基于存内计算（IMC）的脉冲神经网络（SNN）进行性能、能耗、延迟和面积的端到端评估。 Abhishek Moitra,Abhiroop Bhattacharjee,Runcong Kuang,Gokul Krishnan,Yu Cao,Priyadarshini Panda cs.NE,cs.CV

authors_text: Shijie Han,Siyuan Li,Bo An,Wei Zhao,Peng Liu
title: Classifying Ambiguous Identities in Hidden-Role Stochastic Games with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 利用多智能体强化学习对隐藏角色随机博弈中的模糊身份进行分类
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is a prevalent learning paradigm for solving stochastic games. In most MARL studies, agents in a game are defined as teammates or enemies beforehand, and the relationships among the agents remain fixed throughout the game. However, in real-world problems, the agent relationships are commonly unknown in advance or dynamically changing. Many multi-party interactions start off by asking: who is on my team? This question arises whether it is the first day at the stock exchange or the kindergarten. Therefore, training policies for such situations in the face of imperfect information and ambiguous identities is an important problem that needs to be addressed. In this work, we develop a novel identity detection reinforcement learning (IDRL) framework that allows an agent to dynamically infer the identities of nearby agents and select an appropriate policy to accomplish the task. In the IDRL framework, a relation network is constructed to deduce the identities of other agents by observing the behaviors of the agents. A danger network is optimized to estimate the risk of false-positive identifications. Beyond that, we propose an intrinsic reward that balances the need to maximize external rewards and accurate identification. After identifying the cooperation-competition pattern among the agents, IDRL applies one of the off-the-shelf MARL methods to learn the policy. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on Red-10 card-shedding game, and the results show that IDRL achieves superior performance over other state-of-the-art MARL methods. Impressively, the relation network has the par performance to identify the identities of agents with top human players; the danger network reasonably avoids the risk of imperfect identification. The code to reproduce all the reported results is available online at https://github.com/MR-BENjie/IDRL.

In most MARL studies, agents in a game are defined as teammates or enemies beforehand, and the relationships among the agents remain fixed throughout the game. However, in real-world problems, the agent relationships are commonly unknown in advance or dynamically changing. Many multi-party interactions start off by asking: who is on my team? This question arises whether it is the first day at the stock exchange or the kindergarten. In this work, we develop a novel identity detection reinforcement learning (IDRL) framework that allows an agent to dynamically infer the identities of nearby agents and select an appropriate policy to accomplish the task. In the IDRL framework, a relation network is constructed to deduce the identities of other agents by observing the behaviors of the agents. A danger network is optimized to estimate the risk of false-positive identifications. Beyond that, we propose an intrinsic reward that balances the need to maximize external rewards and accurate identification. After identifying the cooperation-competition pattern among the agents, IDRL applies one of the off-the-shelf MARL methods to learn the policy. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on Red-10 card-shedding game, and the results show that IDRL achieves superior performance over other state-of-the-art MARL methods. The code to reproduce all the reported results is available online at https://github.com/MR-BENjie/IDRL.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）是解决随机博弈的流行学习范例。在大多数 MARL 研究中，游戏中的智能体事先被定义为队友或敌人，并且智能体之间的关系在整个游戏过程中保持固定。然而，在现实问题中，代理关系通常是预先未知的或动态变化的。许多多方互动首先会问：我的团队中有谁？无论是在证券交易所还是在幼儿园的第一天，都会出现这个问题。因此，面对信息不完善和身份模糊的情况，针对此类情况的培训政策是需要解决的重要问题。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的身份检测强化学习（IDRL）框架，该框架允许代理动态推断附近代理的身份并选择适当的策略来完成任务。在IDRL框架中，构建了一个关系网络，通过观察智能体的行为来推断其他智能体的身份。危险网络经过优化以估计误报识别的风险。除此之外，我们提出了一种内在奖励，可以平衡最大化外部奖励和准确识别的需求。在识别智能体之间的合作竞争模式后，IDRL 应用一种现成的 MARL 方法来学习策略。为了评估所提出的方法，我们在 Red-10 脱牌游戏上进行了实验，结果表明 IDRL 比其他最先进的 MARL 方法具有更优越的性能。令人印象深刻的是，关系网络在识别代理与顶级人类玩家的身份方面具有同等的性能；危险网络合理规避了识别不完善的风险。重现所有报告结果的代码可在线获取：https://github.com/MR-BENjie/IDRL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的框架（IDRL），用于在隐藏角色的随机博弈中动态识别邻近智能体的身份并选择合适的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体强化学习（MARL）假设智能体角色固定，但现实场景中智能体关系常未知或动态变化，需解决在不完美信息和模糊身份下的策略训练问题。
AI.method: 构建关系网络通过观察行为推断其他智能体身份，优化危险网络以降低误判风险，并设计内在奖励平衡外部收益与识别准确性，最后结合现有MARL方法学习策略。
AI.result: 在Red-10纸牌游戏中，IDRL性能优于其他先进MARL方法，关系网络表现与顶级人类玩家相当，危险网络有效规避误判风险。
AI.conclusion: IDRL框架有效解决了动态身份识别问题，为处理现实场景中的模糊角色交互提供了可行方案。

title: AACHER: Assorted Actor-Critic Deep Reinforcement Learning with Hindsight Experience Replay
title_zh: AACHER：各种演员评论家深度强化学习与事后经验回放
abstract: Actor learning and critic learning are two components of the outstanding and mostly used Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning method. Since actor and critic learning plays a significant role in the overall robot's learning, the performance of the DDPG approach is relatively sensitive and unstable as a result. We propose a multi-actor-critic DDPG for reliable actor-critic learning to further enhance the performance and stability of DDPG. This multi-actor-critic DDPG is then integrated with Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) to form our new deep learning framework called AACHER. AACHER uses the average value of multiple actors or critics to substitute the single actor or critic in DDPG to increase resistance in the case when one actor or critic performs poorly. Numerous independent actors and critics can also gain knowledge from the environment more broadly. We implemented our proposed AACHER on goal-based environments: AuboReach, FetchReach-v1, FetchPush-v1, FetchSlide-v1, and FetchPickAndPlace-v1. For our experiments, we used various instances of actor/critic combinations, among which A10C10 and A20C20 were the best-performing combinations. Overall results show that AACHER outperforms the traditional algorithm (DDPG+HER) in all of the actor/critic number combinations that are used for evaluation. When used on FetchPickAndPlace-v1, the performance boost for A20C20 is as high as roughly 3.8 times the success rate in DDPG+HER.
summary: Actor learning and critic learning are two components of the outstanding and mostly used Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning method. Since actor and critic learning plays a significant role in the overall robot's learning, the performance of the DDPG approach is relatively sensitive and unstable as a result. We propose a multi-actor-critic DDPG for reliable actor-critic learning to further enhance the performance and stability of DDPG. This multi-actor-critic DDPG is then integrated with Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) to form our new deep learning framework called AACHER. AACHER uses the average value of multiple actors or critics to substitute the single actor or critic in DDPG to increase resistance in the case when one actor or critic performs poorly. Numerous independent actors and critics can also gain knowledge from the environment more broadly. We implemented our proposed AACHER on goal-based environments: AuboReach, FetchReach-v1, FetchPush-v1, FetchSlide-v1, and FetchPickAndPlace-v1. For our experiments, we used various instances of actor/critic combinations, among which A10C10 and A20C20 were the best-performing combinations. Overall results show that AACHER outperforms the traditional algorithm (DDPG+HER) in all of the actor/critic number combinations that are used for evaluation. When used on FetchPickAndPlace-v1, the performance boost for A20C20 is as high as roughly 3.8 times the success rate in DDPG+HER.
abstract_zh: 行动者学习和批评者学习是杰出且最常用的深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习方法的两个组成部分。由于演员和评论家学习在整个机器人的学习中起着重要作用，因此 DDPG 方法的性能相对敏感且不稳定。我们提出了一种多 Actor-Critic DDPG，用于可靠的 Actor-Critic 学习，以进一步提高 DDPG 的性能和稳定性。然后，将这种多参与者评论家 DDPG 与 Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) 集成，形成我们名为 AACHER 的新深度学习框架。 AACHER使用多个演员或批评家的平均值来替代DDPG中的单个演员或批评家，以在一个演员或批评家表现不佳的情况下增加抵抗力。许多独立的行动者和评论家也可以从更广泛的环境中获得知识。我们在基于目标的环境上实现了我们提出的 AACHER：AuboReach、FetchReach-v1、FetchPush-v1、FetchSlide-v1 和 FetchPickAndPlace-v1。在我们的实验中，我们使用了演员/评论家组合的各种实例，其中 A10C10 和 A20C20 是表现最好的组合。总体结果表明，AACHER 在用于评估的所有演员/评论家数字组合中均优于传统算法（DDPG+HER）。在 FetchPickAndPlace-v1 上使用时，A20C20 的性能提升约为 DDPG+HER 成功率的 3.8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AACHER框架，通过集成多演员-评论家结构与 hindsight experience replay（HER）技术，提升深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在目标导向环境中的性能与稳定性。
AI.motivation: DDPG算法因演员（Actor）与评论家（Critic）学习的不稳定性导致性能波动，需通过增强演员-评论家学习的鲁棒性来提升整体表现。
AI.method: 设计多演员-评论家结构，用多个演员/评论家的平均值替代单一模型，结合HER技术优化经验回放，通过A10C10、A20C20等组合在Fetch系列环境中验证效果。
AI.result: AACHER在所有测试组合中均优于传统DDPG+HER，其中A20C20在FetchPickAndPlace-v1任务中成功率提升达3.8倍。

search_text: AACHER: Assorted Actor-Critic Deep Reinforcement Learning with Hindsight Experience Replay AACHER：各种演员评论家深度强化学习与事后经验回放 Actor learning and critic learning are two components of the outstanding and mostly used Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning method. Since actor and critic learning plays a significant role in the overall robot's learning, the performance of the DDPG approach is relatively sensitive and unstable as a result. We propose a multi-actor-critic DDPG for reliable actor-critic learning to further enhance the performance and stability of DDPG. This multi-actor-critic DDPG is then integrated with Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) to form our new deep learning framework called AACHER. AACHER uses the average value of multiple actors or critics to substitute the single actor or critic in DDPG to increase resistance in the case when one actor or critic performs poorly. Numerous independent actors and critics can also gain knowledge from the environment more broadly. We implemented our proposed AACHER on goal-based environments: AuboReach, FetchReach-v1, FetchPush-v1, FetchSlide-v1, and FetchPickAndPlace-v1. For our experiments, we used various instances of actor/critic combinations, among which A10C10 and A20C20 were the best-performing combinations. Overall results show that AACHER outperforms the traditional algorithm (DDPG+HER) in all of the actor/critic number combinations that are used for evaluation. When used on FetchPickAndPlace-v1, the performance boost for A20C20 is as high as roughly 3.8 times the success rate in DDPG+HER. 行动者学习和批评者学习是杰出且最常用的深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习方法的两个组成部分。由于演员和评论家学习在整个机器人的学习中起着重要作用，因此 DDPG 方法的性能相对敏感且不稳定。我们提出了一种多 Actor-Critic DDPG，用于可靠的 Actor-Critic 学习，以进一步提高 DDPG 的性能和稳定性。然后，将这种多参与者评论家 DDPG 与 Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) 集成，形成我们名为 AACHER 的新深度学习框架。 AACHER使用多个演员或批评家的平均值来替代DDPG中的单个演员或批评家，以在一个演员或批评家表现不佳的情况下增加抵抗力。许多独立的行动者和评论家也可以从更广泛的环境中获得知识。我们在基于目标的环境上实现了我们提出的 AACHER：AuboReach、FetchReach-v1、FetchPush-v1、FetchSlide-v1 和 FetchPickAndPlace-v1。在我们的实验中，我们使用了演员/评论家组合的各种实例，其中 A10C10 和 A20C20 是表现最好的组合。总体结果表明，AACHER 在用于评估的所有演员/评论家数字组合中均优于传统算法（DDPG+HER）。在 FetchPickAndPlace-v1 上使用时，A20C20 的性能提升约为 DDPG+HER 成功率的 3.8 倍。 本文提出AACHER框架，通过集成多演员-评论家结构与 hindsight experience replay（HER）技术，提升深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在目标导向环境中的性能与稳定性。 Adarsh Sehgal,Muskan Sehgal,Hung Manh La cs.RO,cs.LG

title: DALL-E 2 Fails to Reliably Capture Common Syntactic Processes
title_zh: DALL-E 2 无法可靠地捕获常见语法过程
abstract: Machine intelligence is increasingly being linked to claims about sentience, language processing, and an ability to comprehend and transform natural language into a range of stimuli. We systematically analyze the ability of DALL-E 2 to capture 8 grammatical phenomena pertaining to compositionality that are widely discussed in linguistics and pervasive in human language: binding principles and coreference, passives, word order, coordination, comparatives, negation, ellipsis, and structural ambiguity. Whereas young children routinely master these phenomena, learning systematic mappings between syntax and semantics, DALL-E 2 is unable to reliably infer meanings that are consistent with the syntax. These results challenge recent claims concerning the capacity of such systems to understand of human language. We make available the full set of test materials as a benchmark for future testing.
summary: Machine intelligence is increasingly being linked to claims about sentience, language processing, and an ability to comprehend and transform natural language into a range of stimuli. We systematically analyze the ability of DALL-E 2 to capture 8 grammatical phenomena pertaining to compositionality that are widely discussed in linguistics and pervasive in human language: binding principles and coreference, passives, word order, coordination, comparatives, negation, ellipsis, and structural ambiguity. Whereas young children routinely master these phenomena, learning systematic mappings between syntax and semantics, DALL-E 2 is unable to reliably infer meanings that are consistent with the syntax. These results challenge recent claims concerning the capacity of such systems to understand of human language. We make available the full set of test materials as a benchmark for future testing.
abstract_zh: 机器智能越来越多地与感知、语言处理以及理解自然语言并将其转化为一系列刺激的能力联系在一起。我们系统地分析了 DALL-E 2 捕获 8 种与组合性相关的语法现象的能力，这些语法现象在语言学中广泛讨论并普遍存在于人类语言中：结合原则和共指、被动、词序、协调、比较、否定、省略和结构歧义。尽管年幼的孩子通常会掌握这些现象，学习语法和语义之间的系统映射，但 DALL-E 2 无法可靠地推断出与语法一致的含义。这些结果挑战了最近有关此类系统理解人类语言能力的说法。我们提供全套测试材料作为未来测试的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析DALL-E 2在捕捉8种常见句法现象（如绑定原则、被动语态等）方面的可靠性，挑战其理解人类语言的能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器智能常被赋予语言理解能力，但现有系统在句法-语义映射的系统性理解方面缺乏验证，需通过基准测试明确其局限性。
AI.method: 设计包含8种核心句法现象的测试材料，评估DALL-E 2生成图像是否符合语法结构所隐含的语义逻辑。
AI.result: DALL-E 2无法可靠推断与句法一致的语义，表现显著弱于人类儿童对同类语法现象的掌握能力。
AI.conclusion: 结果质疑当前视觉语言模型对人类语言结构的深层理解能力，并为未来研究提供标准化测试基准。

authors_text: Wenhao Yu,Chenguang Zhu,Zhihan Zhang,Shuohang Wang,Zhuosheng Zhang,Yuwei Fang,Meng Jiang
title: Retrieval Augmentation for Commonsense Reasoning: A Unified Approach
title_zh: 常识推理的检索增强：统一方法
abstract: A common thread of retrieval-augmented methods in the existing literature focuses on retrieving encyclopedic knowledge, such as Wikipedia, which facilitates well-defined entity and relation spaces that can be modeled. However, applying such methods to commonsense reasoning tasks faces two unique challenges, i.e., the lack of a general large-scale corpus for retrieval and a corresponding effective commonsense retriever. In this paper, we systematically investigate how to leverage commonsense knowledge retrieval to improve commonsense reasoning tasks. We proposed a unified framework of retrieval-augmented commonsense reasoning (called RACo), including a newly constructed commonsense corpus with over 20 million documents and novel strategies for training a commonsense retriever. We conducted experiments on four different commonsense reasoning tasks. Extensive evaluation results showed that our proposed RACo can significantly outperform other knowledge-enhanced method counterparts, achieving new SoTA performance on the CommonGen and CREAK leaderboards.
summary: A common thread of retrieval-augmented methods in the existing literature focuses on retrieving encyclopedic knowledge, such as Wikipedia, which facilitates well-defined entity and relation spaces that can be modeled. However, applying such methods to commonsense reasoning tasks faces two unique challenges, i.e., the lack of a general large-scale corpus for retrieval and a corresponding effective commonsense retriever. In this paper, we systematically investigate how to leverage commonsense knowledge retrieval to improve commonsense reasoning tasks. We proposed a unified framework of retrieval-augmented commonsense reasoning (called RACo), including a newly constructed commonsense corpus with over 20 million documents and novel strategies for training a commonsense retriever. We conducted experiments on four different commonsense reasoning tasks. Extensive evaluation results showed that our proposed RACo can significantly outperform other knowledge-enhanced method counterparts, achieving new SoTA performance on the CommonGen and CREAK leaderboards.
abstract_zh: 现有文献中检索增强方法的一个共同主线侧重于检索百科全书知识，例如维基百科，它有助于明确定义的实体和可建模的关系空间。然而，将此类方法应用于常识推理任务面临两个独特的挑战，即缺乏通用的大规模检索语料库和相应的有效常识检索器。在本文中，我们系统地研究了如何利用常识知识检索来改进常识推理任务。我们提出了一个检索增强常识推理的统一框架（称为 RACo），包括一个新构建的常识语料库，包含超过 2000 万份文档和训练常识检索器的新颖策略。我们对四种不同的常识推理任务进行了实验。广泛的评估结果表明，我们提出的 RACo 可以显着优于其他知识增强方法，在 CommonGen 和 CREAK 排行榜上实现新的 SoTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的检索增强常识推理框架（RACo），通过构建大规模常识语料库和优化检索策略，显著提升常识推理任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强方法依赖百科全书知识，但缺乏针对常识推理的通用大规模语料库及有效检索模型，限制了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含2000万文档的常识语料库，并设计新型检索器训练策略，提出RACo框架将检索增强技术系统应用于常识推理任务。
AI.result: 在CommonGen和CREAK等四个常识推理任务中，RACo显著优于现有知识增强方法，刷新了相关榜单的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: RACo验证了检索增强技术对常识推理的有效性，为后续研究提供了统一框架和基准，推动了该领域的发展。

We conducted experiments on four different commonsense reasoning tasks. Extensive evaluation results showed that our proposed RACo can significantly outperform other knowledge-enhanced method counterparts, achieving new SoTA performance on the CommonGen and CREAK leaderboards. 现有文献中检索增强方法的一个共同主线侧重于检索百科全书知识，例如维基百科，它有助于明确定义的实体和可建模的关系空间。然而，将此类方法应用于常识推理任务面临两个独特的挑战，即缺乏通用的大规模检索语料库和相应的有效常识检索器。在本文中，我们系统地研究了如何利用常识知识检索来改进常识推理任务。我们提出了一个检索增强常识推理的统一框架（称为 RACo），包括一个新构建的常识语料库，包含超过 2000 万份文档和训练常识检索器的新颖策略。我们对四种不同的常识推理任务进行了实验。广泛的评估结果表明，我们提出的 RACo 可以显着优于其他知识增强方法，在 CommonGen 和 CREAK 排行榜上实现新的 SoTA 性能。 本文提出了一种统一的检索增强常识推理框架（RACo），通过构建大规模常识语料库和优化检索策略，显著提升常识推理任务性能。 Wenhao Yu,Chenguang Zhu,Zhihan Zhang,Shuohang Wang,Zhuosheng Zhang,Yuwei Fang,Meng Jiang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: A Greek Parliament Proceedings Dataset for Computational Linguistics and Political Analysis
title_zh: 用于计算语言学和政治分析的希腊议会会议记录数据集
comment: Accepted to the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Accepted to the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Large, diachronic datasets of political discourse are hard to come across, especially for resource-lean languages such as Greek. In this paper, we introduce a curated dataset of the Greek Parliament Proceedings that extends chronologically from 1989 up to 2020. It consists of more than 1 million speeches with extensive metadata, extracted from 5,355 parliamentary record files. We explain how it was constructed and the challenges that we had to overcome. The dataset can be used for both computational linguistics and political analysis-ideally, combining the two. We present such an application, showing (i) how the dataset can be used to study the change of word usage through time, (ii) between significant historical events and political parties, (iii) by evaluating and employing algorithms for detecting semantic shifts.
summary: Large, diachronic datasets of political discourse are hard to come across, especially for resource-lean languages such as Greek. In this paper, we introduce a curated dataset of the Greek Parliament Proceedings that extends chronologically from 1989 up to 2020. It consists of more than 1 million speeches with extensive metadata, extracted from 5,355 parliamentary record files. We explain how it was constructed and the challenges that we had to overcome. The dataset can be used for both computational linguistics and political analysis-ideally, combining the two. We present such an application, showing (i) how the dataset can be used to study the change of word usage through time, (ii) between significant historical events and political parties, (iii) by evaluating and employing algorithms for detecting semantic shifts.
abstract_zh: 政治话语的大型历时数据集很难找到，尤其是对于希腊语等资源匮乏的语言。在本文中，我们介绍了希腊议会会议记录的精选数据集，该数据集按时间顺序从 1989 年一直延伸到 2020 年。它包含从 5,355 个议会记录文件中提取的超过 100 万篇演讲以及广泛的元数据。我们解释了它是如何构建的以及我们必须克服的挑战。该数据集可用于计算语言学和政治分析——理想情况下，将两者结合起来。我们提出了这样一个应用程序，展示了（i）如何使用数据集来研究词语使用随时间的变化，（ii）重大历史事件和政党之间的变化，（iii）通过评估和采用检测语义变化的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个涵盖1989年至2020年希腊议会辩论记录的大型语料库，包含超过100万篇演讲和元数据，用于计算语言学和政治分析研究。
AI.motivation: 资源匮乏语言（如希腊语）缺乏长期政治话语数据集，限制了相关研究的发展，因此需要构建一个系统化的议会辩论语料库。
AI.method: 通过爬取5355份议会记录文件，提取演讲内容并标注元数据，同时开发算法检测语义变化，验证数据集在语言学和政治分析中的应用价值。
AI.result: 展示了数据集在分析词汇使用演变、历史事件与政党关联性及语义漂移检测中的应用，证明其在跨学科研究中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为希腊语计算语言学和政治分析提供了基础资源，促进了语言变化与政治动态的联合研究方法的发展。
