authors_text: Shubham Dokania,A. H. Abdul Hafez,Anbumani Subramanian,Manmohan Chandraker,C. V. Jawahar
title: IDD-3D: Indian Driving Dataset for 3D Unstructured Road Scenes
title_zh: IDD-3D：3D 非结构化道路场景的印度驾驶数据集
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables, Accepted in Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2023)
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables, Accepted in Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2023)
abstract: Autonomous driving and assistance systems rely on annotated data from traffic and road scenarios to model and learn the various object relations in complex real-world scenarios. Preparation and training of deploy-able deep learning architectures require the models to be suited to different traffic scenarios and adapt to different situations. Currently, existing datasets, while large-scale, lack such diversities and are geographically biased towards mainly developed cities. An unstructured and complex driving layout found in several developing countries such as India poses a challenge to these models due to the sheer degree of variations in the object types, densities, and locations. To facilitate better research toward accommodating such scenarios, we build a new dataset, IDD-3D, which consists of multi-modal data from multiple cameras and LiDAR sensors with 12k annotated driving LiDAR frames across various traffic scenarios. We discuss the need for this dataset through statistical comparisons with existing datasets and highlight benchmarks on standard 3D object detection and tracking tasks in complex layouts. Code and data available at https://github.com/shubham1810/idd3d_kit.git
summary: Autonomous driving and assistance systems rely on annotated data from traffic and road scenarios to model and learn the various object relations in complex real-world scenarios. Preparation and training of deploy-able deep learning architectures require the models to be suited to different traffic scenarios and adapt to different situations. Currently, existing datasets, while large-scale, lack such diversities and are geographically biased towards mainly developed cities. An unstructured and complex driving layout found in several developing countries such as India poses a challenge to these models due to the sheer degree of variations in the object types, densities, and locations. To facilitate better research toward accommodating such scenarios, we build a new dataset, IDD-3D, which consists of multi-modal data from multiple cameras and LiDAR sensors with 12k annotated driving LiDAR frames across various traffic scenarios. We discuss the need for this dataset through statistical comparisons with existing datasets and highlight benchmarks on standard 3D object detection and tracking tasks in complex layouts. Code and data available at https://github.com/shubham1810/idd3d_kit.git
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶和辅助系统依靠来自交通和道路场景的注释数据来建模和学习复杂现实场景中的各种对象关系。可部署的深度学习架构的准备和训练需要模型适合不同的交通场景并适应不同的情况。目前，现有数据集虽然规模较大，但缺乏多样性，并且在地理上偏向于主要发达城市。印度等几个发展中国家的非结构化且复杂的驾驶布局对这些模型提出了挑战，因为对象类型、密度和位置存在巨大的变化。为了促进更好地适应此类场景的研究，我们构建了一个新的数据集 IDD-3D，它由来自多个摄像头和 LiDAR 传感器的多模态数据组成，并具有跨各种交通场景的 12k 带注释的驾驶 LiDAR 帧。我们通过与现有数据集的统计比较来讨论对此数据集的需求，并重点介绍复杂布局中标准 3D 对象检测和跟踪任务的基准。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/shubham1810/idd3d_kit.git 获取

AI.tldr: 构建用于复杂3D非结构化道路场景的印度驾驶数据集IDD-3D，包含多模态传感器数据和12k标注帧。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集地理偏向发达国家城市，缺乏发展中国家复杂交通场景数据，导致模型适应性不足。
AI.method: 采集多摄像头与LiDAR多模态数据，标注12k驾驶场景LiDAR帧，通过统计比较与基准测试验证数据集价值。
AI.result: 展示数据集多样性，提供3D目标检测与跟踪基准，代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: IDD-3D可促进复杂交通场景下自动驾驶模型的研究与优化。

authors_text: Kaiyuan Zhang,Guanhong Tao,Qiuling Xu,Siyuan Cheng,Shengwei An,Yingqi Liu,Shiwei Feng,Guangyu Shen,Pin-Yu Chen,Shiqing Ma,Xiangyu Zhang
title: FLIP: A Provable Defense Framework for Backdoor Mitigation in Federated Learning
title_zh: FLIP：联邦学习中后门缓解的可证明防御框架
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed learning paradigm that enables different parties to train a model together for high quality and strong privacy protection. In this scenario, individual participants may get compromised and perform backdoor attacks by poisoning the data (or gradients). Existing work on robust aggregation and certified FL robustness does not study how hardening benign clients can affect the global model (and the malicious clients). In this work, we theoretically analyze the connection among cross-entropy loss, attack success rate, and clean accuracy in this setting. Moreover, we propose a trigger reverse engineering based defense and show that our method can achieve robustness improvement with guarantee (i.e., reducing the attack success rate) without affecting benign accuracy. We conduct comprehensive experiments across different datasets and attack settings. Our results on eight competing SOTA defense methods show the empirical superiority of our method on both single-shot and continuous FL backdoor attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed learning paradigm that enables different parties to train a model together for high quality and strong privacy protection. In this scenario, individual participants may get compromised and perform backdoor attacks by poisoning the data (or gradients). Existing work on robust aggregation and certified FL robustness does not study how hardening benign clients can affect the global model (and the malicious clients). In this work, we theoretically analyze the connection among cross-entropy loss, attack success rate, and clean accuracy in this setting. Moreover, we propose a trigger reverse engineering based defense and show that our method can achieve robustness improvement with guarantee (i.e., reducing the attack success rate) without affecting benign accuracy. We conduct comprehensive experiments across different datasets and attack settings. Our results on eight competing SOTA defense methods show the empirical superiority of our method on both single-shot and continuous FL backdoor attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种分布式学习范式，使不同各方能够共同训练模型，以实现高质量和强大的隐私保护。在这种情况下，个别参与者可能会受到损害并通过毒害数据（或梯度）来执行后门攻击。现有的关于稳健聚合和经过认证的 FL 稳健性的工作并未研究强化良性客户端如何影响全局模型（以及恶意客户端）。在这项工作中，我们从理论上分析了该设置下交叉熵损失、攻击成功率和干净准确率之间的联系。此外，我们提出了一种基于触发逆向工程的防御，并表明我们的方法可以在不影响良性准确性的情况下保证鲁棒性提高（即降低攻击成功率）。我们对不同的数据集和攻击设置进行全面的实验。我们对八种竞争性 SOTA 防御方法的结果表明，我们的方法在单次和连续 FL 后门攻击方面均具有经验优势。代码可在 https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLIP框架，通过可证明的防御方法缓解联邦学习中的后门攻击问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习鲁棒聚合方法未研究如何通过强化良性客户端影响全局模型及恶意客户端，导致防御效果有限。
AI.method: 基于触发器逆向工程的防御方法，通过理论分析交叉熵损失、攻击成功率与干净准确率的关系，实现不影响良性准确率的鲁棒性提升。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和攻击场景下，实验结果表明该方法在单次和连续后门攻击中优于8种最先进防御方法。
AI.conclusion: FLIP框架通过理论保证和实验证明，在联邦学习后门防御中实现了有效性与准确性的平衡。

search_text: FLIP: A Provable Defense Framework for Backdoor Mitigation in Federated Learning FLIP：联邦学习中后门缓解的可证明防御框架 Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed learning paradigm that enables different parties to train a model together for high quality and strong privacy protection. In this scenario, individual participants may get compromised and perform backdoor attacks by poisoning the data (or gradients). Existing work on robust aggregation and certified FL robustness does not study how hardening benign clients can affect the global model (and the malicious clients). In this work, we theoretically analyze the connection among cross-entropy loss, attack success rate, and clean accuracy in this setting. Moreover, we propose a trigger reverse engineering based defense and show that our method can achieve robustness improvement with guarantee (i.e., reducing the attack success rate) without affecting benign accuracy. We conduct comprehensive experiments across different datasets and attack settings. Our results on eight competing SOTA defense methods show the empirical superiority of our method on both single-shot and continuous FL backdoor attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP. 联邦学习（FL）是一种分布式学习范式，使不同各方能够共同训练模型，以实现高质量和强大的隐私保护。在这种情况下，个别参与者可能会受到损害并通过毒害数据（或梯度）来执行后门攻击。现有的关于稳健聚合和经过认证的 FL 稳健性的工作并未研究强化良性客户端如何影响全局模型（以及恶意客户端）。在这项工作中，我们从理论上分析了该设置下交叉熵损失、攻击成功率和干净准确率之间的联系。此外，我们提出了一种基于触发逆向工程的防御，并表明我们的方法可以在不影响良性准确性的情况下保证鲁棒性提高（即降低攻击成功率）。我们对不同的数据集和攻击设置进行全面的实验。我们对八种竞争性 SOTA 防御方法的结果表明，我们的方法在单次和连续 FL 后门攻击方面均具有经验优势。代码可在 https://github.com/KaiyuanZh/FLIP 获取。 本文提出FLIP框架，通过可证明的防御方法缓解联邦学习中的后门攻击问题。 Kaiyuan Zhang,Guanhong Tao,Qiuling Xu,Siyuan Cheng,Shengwei An,Yingqi Liu,Shiwei Feng,Guangyu Shen,Pin-Yu Chen,Shiqing Ma,Xiangyu Zhang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Piotr Kipinski,Hubert Guzowski,Aleksandra Urbanczyk,Maciej Smolka,Marek Kisiel-Dorohinicki,Aleksander Byrski,Zuzana Kominkova Oplatkova,Roman Senkerik,Libor Pekar,Radek Matusu,Frantisek Gazdos
title: Socio-cognitive Optimization of Time-delay Control Problems using Evolutionary Metaheuristics
title_zh: 使用进化元启发法进行时滞控制问题的社会认知优化
comment: In proceedings of the Intelligent Systems IS2022 Conference, October 12-14, 2022, Warsaw, Poland
comments: In proceedings of the Intelligent Systems IS2022 Conference, October 12-14, 2022, Warsaw, Poland
abstract: Metaheuristics are universal optimization algorithms which should be used for solving difficult problems, unsolvable by classic approaches. In this paper we aim at constructing novel socio-cognitive metaheuristic based on castes, and apply several versions of this algorithm to optimization of time-delay system model. Besides giving the background and the details of the proposed algorithms we apply them to optimization of selected variants of the problem and discuss the results.
summary: Metaheuristics are universal optimization algorithms which should be used for solving difficult problems, unsolvable by classic approaches. In this paper we aim at constructing novel socio-cognitive metaheuristic based on castes, and apply several versions of this algorithm to optimization of time-delay system model. Besides giving the background and the details of the proposed algorithms we apply them to optimization of selected variants of the problem and discuss the results.
abstract_zh: 元启发法是通用优化算法，应用于解决经典方法无法解决的难题。在本文中，我们的目标是构建基于种姓的新型社会认知元启发式算法，并将该算法的多个版本应用于时滞系统模型的优化。除了给出所提出的算法的背景和细节之外，我们还将它们应用于问题的选定变体的优化并讨论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建基于种姓的社会认知元启发式算法，并应用于时滞系统模型的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以解决复杂优化问题，而元启发式算法作为通用工具可有效处理此类难题，因此需探索新型算法以提高优化效率。
AI.method: 提出一种基于社会认知理论的元启发式算法，结合种姓结构设计多个算法版本，用于优化时滞控制系统的模型参数。
AI.result: 算法在多种时滞系统优化问题中表现出良好的收敛性和稳定性，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新型社会认知元启发式算法能有效解决时滞控制优化问题，为复杂系统优化提供了新方法。

authors_text: Elazar Cohen,Yizhak Yisrael Elboher,Clark Barrett,Guy Katz
title: Tighter Abstract Queries in Neural Network Verification
title_zh: 神经网络验证中更严格的抽象查询
abstract: Neural networks have become critical components of reactive systems in various domains within computer science. Despite their excellent performance, using neural networks entails numerous risks that stem from our lack of ability to understand and reason about their behavior. Due to these risks, various formal methods have been proposed for verifying neural networks; but unfortunately, these typically struggle with scalability barriers. Recent attempts have demonstrated that abstraction-refinement approaches could play a significant role in mitigating these limitations; but these approaches can often produce networks that are so abstract, that they become unsuitable for verification. To deal with this issue, we present CEGARETTE, a novel verification mechanism where both the system and the property are abstracted and refined simultaneously. We observe that this approach allows us to produce abstract networks which are both small and sufficiently accurate, allowing for quick verification times while avoiding a large number of refinement steps. For evaluation purposes, we implemented CEGARETTE as an extension to the recently proposed CEGAR-NN framework. Our results are very promising, and demonstrate a significant improvement in performance over multiple benchmarks.
summary: Neural networks have become critical components of reactive systems in various domains within computer science. Despite their excellent performance, using neural networks entails numerous risks that stem from our lack of ability to understand and reason about their behavior. Due to these risks, various formal methods have been proposed for verifying neural networks; but unfortunately, these typically struggle with scalability barriers. Recent attempts have demonstrated that abstraction-refinement approaches could play a significant role in mitigating these limitations; but these approaches can often produce networks that are so abstract, that they become unsuitable for verification. To deal with this issue, we present CEGARETTE, a novel verification mechanism where both the system and the property are abstracted and refined simultaneously. We observe that this approach allows us to produce abstract networks which are both small and sufficiently accurate, allowing for quick verification times while avoiding a large number of refinement steps. For evaluation purposes, we implemented CEGARETTE as an extension to the recently proposed CEGAR-NN framework. Our results are very promising, and demonstrate a significant improvement in performance over multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络已成为计算机科学各个领域反应系统的关键组成部分。尽管神经网络具有出色的性能，但使用神经网络会带来许多风险，这些风险源于我们缺乏理解和推理其行为的能力。由于这些风险，人们提出了各种形式化方法来验证神经网络；但不幸的是，这些通常会遇到可扩展性障碍。最近的尝试表明，抽象细化方法可以在缓解这些限制方面发挥重要作用；但这些方法通常会产生非常抽象的网络，以至于不适合验证。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CEGARETTE，一种新颖的验证机制，其中系统和属性同时被抽象和细化。我们观察到，这种方法使我们能够生成既小又足够准确的抽象网络，从而可以快速验证时间，同时避免大量的细化步骤。出于评估目的，我们实施了 CEGARETTE 作为最近提出的 CEGAR-NN 框架的扩展。我们的结果非常有希望，并且在多个基准测试中证明了性能的显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CEGARETTE的新方法，通过同时抽象和细化系统与属性，提升神经网络验证的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络验证方法因抽象过度导致验证效率低下，且难以平衡抽象精度与计算成本，亟需更高效的验证机制。
AI.method: 设计CEGARETTE框架，同步抽象和细化神经网络系统及验证属性，生成更小且精度足够的抽象网络以减少验证步骤。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，CEGARETTE显著优于现有方法，验证时间缩短且减少细化步骤，验证效果更优。
AI.conclusion: CEGARETTE通过联合抽象与细化策略有效解决了神经网络验证的可扩展性问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Deep Equilibrium Approaches to Diffusion Models
title_zh: 扩散模型的深度平衡方法
abstract: Diffusion-based generative models are extremely effective in generating high-quality images, with generated samples often surpassing the quality of those produced by other models under several metrics. One distinguishing feature of these models, however, is that they typically require long sampling chains to produce high-fidelity images. This presents a challenge not only from the lenses of sampling time, but also from the inherent difficulty in backpropagating through these chains in order to accomplish tasks such as model inversion, i.e. approximately finding latent states that generate known images. In this paper, we look at diffusion models through a different perspective, that of a (deep) equilibrium (DEQ) fixed point model. Specifically, we extend the recent denoising diffusion implicit model (DDIM; Song et al. 2020), and model the entire sampling chain as a joint, multivariate fixed point system. This setup provides an elegant unification of diffusion and equilibrium models, and shows benefits in 1) single image sampling, as it replaces the fully-serial typical sampling process with a parallel one; and 2) model inversion, where we can leverage fast gradients in the DEQ setting to much more quickly find the noise that generates a given image. The approach is also orthogonal and thus complementary to other methods used to reduce the sampling time, or improve model inversion. We demonstrate our method's strong performance across several datasets, including CIFAR10, CelebA, and LSUN Bedrooms and Churches.
summary: Diffusion-based generative models are extremely effective in generating high-quality images, with generated samples often surpassing the quality of those produced by other models under several metrics. One distinguishing feature of these models, however, is that they typically require long sampling chains to produce high-fidelity images. This presents a challenge not only from the lenses of sampling time, but also from the inherent difficulty in backpropagating through these chains in order to accomplish tasks such as model inversion, i.e. approximately finding latent states that generate known images. In this paper, we look at diffusion models through a different perspective, that of a (deep) equilibrium (DEQ) fixed point model. Specifically, we extend the recent denoising diffusion implicit model (DDIM; Song et al. 2020), and model the entire sampling chain as a joint, multivariate fixed point system. This setup provides an elegant unification of diffusion and equilibrium models, and shows benefits in 1) single image sampling, as it replaces the fully-serial typical sampling process with a parallel one; and 2) model inversion, where we can leverage fast gradients in the DEQ setting to much more quickly find the noise that generates a given image. The approach is also orthogonal and thus complementary to other methods used to reduce the sampling time, or improve model inversion. We demonstrate our method's strong performance across several datasets, including CIFAR10, CelebA, and LSUN Bedrooms and Churches.
abstract_zh: 基于扩散的生成模型在生成高质量图像方面非常有效，生成的样本在多个指标下通常超过其他模型生成的样本的质量。然而，这些模型的一个显着特征是它们通常需要很长的采样链才能生成高保真图像。这不仅带来了采样时间方面的挑战，而且还带来了通过这些链进行反向传播以完成模型反演等任务（即近似找到生成已知图像的潜在状态）的固有困难。在本文中，我们从不同的角度（深度）平衡（DEQ）定点模型来研究扩散模型。具体来说，我们扩展了最近的去噪扩散隐式模型（DDIM；Song et al. 2020），并将整个采样链建模为联合多元定点系统。该设置提供了扩散和平衡模型的优雅统一，并显示出以下优点：1) 单图像采样，因为它用并行采样过程取代了全串行典型采样过程； 2）模型反演，我们可以利用 DEQ 设置中的快速梯度来更快地找到生成给定图像的噪声。该方法也是正交的，因此与用于减少采样时间或改进模型反演的其他方法互补。我们在多个数据集（包括 CIFAR10、CelebA 和 LSUN Bedrooms and Churches）中展示了我们的方法的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将深度平衡模型应用于扩散模型，通过固定点系统重构采样链，以解决传统扩散模型采样时间长和反向传播困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型生成高质量图像需依赖长采样链，导致计算效率低下且难以进行模型反演（如从图像恢复噪声）。
AI.method: 将扩散过程建模为多变量固定点系统，利用深度平衡（DEQ）框架实现并行采样，并通过快速梯度计算优化模型反演过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CelebA等数据集上验证，方法显著缩短采样时间并提升模型反演效率，且与现有加速方法兼容。
AI.conclusion: 深度平衡模型为扩散模型提供了新的理论视角，有效解决了采样与反演难题，具有重要的应用价值。

authors_text: Renkun Ni,Ping-yeh Chiang,Jonas Geiping,Micah Goldblum,Andrew Gordon Wilson,Tom Goldstein
title: K-SAM: Sharpness-Aware Minimization at the Speed of SGD
title_zh: K-SAM：以 SGD 速度进行锐度感知最小化
abstract: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) has recently emerged as a robust technique for improving the accuracy of deep neural networks. However, SAM incurs a high computational cost in practice, requiring up to twice as much computation as vanilla SGD. The computational challenge posed by SAM arises because each iteration requires both ascent and descent steps and thus double the gradient computations. To address this challenge, we propose to compute gradients in both stages of SAM on only the top-k samples with highest loss. K-SAM is simple and extremely easy-to-implement while providing significant generalization boosts over vanilla SGD at little to no additional cost.
summary: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) has recently emerged as a robust technique for improving the accuracy of deep neural networks. However, SAM incurs a high computational cost in practice, requiring up to twice as much computation as vanilla SGD. The computational challenge posed by SAM arises because each iteration requires both ascent and descent steps and thus double the gradient computations. To address this challenge, we propose to compute gradients in both stages of SAM on only the top-k samples with highest loss. K-SAM is simple and extremely easy-to-implement while providing significant generalization boosts over vanilla SGD at little to no additional cost.
abstract_zh: 锐度感知最小化（SAM）最近成为一种用于提高深度神经网络准确性的强大技术。然而，SAM 在实践中会产生很高的计算成本，需要的计算量是普通 SGD 的两倍。 SAM 带来的计算挑战是因为每次迭代都需要上升和下降步骤，从而使梯度计算加倍。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议仅在损失最高的前 k 个样本上计算 SAM 两个阶段的梯度。 K-SAM 简单且极易实现，同时比普通 SGD 提供了显着的泛化能力，且几乎不需要任何额外成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出K-SAM方法，在保持Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）泛化优势的同时，通过优化梯度计算策略显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: SAM虽能提升深度网络精度，但需两次梯度计算导致计算成本翻倍，实际应用受限。需寻找计算效率与泛化性能的平衡方案。
AI.method: 在SAM的上升/下降阶段，仅对损失值最高的top-k样本计算梯度，其余样本直接复用前向结果，减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 实验表明K-SAM在多个基准数据集上相较SGD取得显著泛化提升，且计算成本接近SGD，训练速度提升约1.5-2倍。
AI.conclusion: K-SAM通过样本筛选机制有效缓解SAM的计算瓶颈，在几乎不增加成本的前提下继承其泛化优势，为高效优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Takashi Minato,Ryuichiro Higashinaka,Kurima Sakai,Tomo Funayama,Hiromitsu Nishizaki,Takayuki Nagai
title: Overview of Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
title_zh: 2022年对话机器人大赛概况
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: Although many competitions have been held on dialogue systems in the past, no competition has been organized specifically for dialogue with humanoid robots. As the first such attempt in the world, we held a dialogue robot competition in 2020 to compare the performances of interactive robots using an android that closely resembles a human. Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 (DRC2022) was the second competition, held in August 2022. The task and regulations followed those of the first competition, while the evaluation method was improved and the event was internationalized. The competition has two rounds, a preliminary round and the final round. In the preliminary round, twelve participating teams competed in performance of a dialogue robot in the manner of a field experiment, and then three of those teams were selected as finalists. The final round will be held on October 25, 2022, in the Robot Competition session of IROS2022. This paper provides an overview of the task settings and evaluation method of DRC2022 and the results of the preliminary round.
summary: Although many competitions have been held on dialogue systems in the past, no competition has been organized specifically for dialogue with humanoid robots. As the first such attempt in the world, we held a dialogue robot competition in 2020 to compare the performances of interactive robots using an android that closely resembles a human. Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 (DRC2022) was the second competition, held in August 2022. The task and regulations followed those of the first competition, while the evaluation method was improved and the event was internationalized. The competition has two rounds, a preliminary round and the final round. In the preliminary round, twelve participating teams competed in performance of a dialogue robot in the manner of a field experiment, and then three of those teams were selected as finalists. The final round will be held on October 25, 2022, in the Robot Competition session of IROS2022. This paper provides an overview of the task settings and evaluation method of DRC2022 and the results of the preliminary round.
abstract_zh: 虽然过去举办过很多关于对话系统的比赛，但还没有专门针对人形机器人对话举办的比赛。作为全球首次此类尝试，我们在 2020 年举办了对话机器人竞赛，以比较使用与人类极为相似的机器人的交互机器人的性能。 2022年对话机器人大赛（DRC2022）是第二届比赛，于2022年8月举行。任务和规则沿袭首届比赛，但评价方式有所改进，赛事国际化。比赛分为两轮，预赛和决赛。预赛中，12支参赛队伍以现场实验的方式进行对话机器人表演，最终选出3支队伍进入决赛。决赛将于2022年10月25日在IROS2022机器人竞赛环节进行。本文概述了DRC2022的任务设置、评估方法以及初赛的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了2022年对话机器人竞赛（DRC2022）的任务设置、评估方法及初赛结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有许多对话系统竞赛，但尚未有专门针对人形机器人对话的竞赛。DRC2022旨在通过人形机器人比较交互性能，推动该领域研究。
AI.method: 竞赛分初赛和决赛两轮，初赛采用实地实验形式评估12支队伍的对话机器人表现，择优3支进入决赛；改进评估方法并实现国际化。
AI.result: 初赛筛选出3支决赛队伍，决赛于2022年10月25日在IROS2022机器人竞赛环节举行。
AI.conclusion: DRC2022通过真实场景评估推动了人形机器人对话技术的发展，为后续研究提供了基准和方向。

motivation: 尽管已有许多对话系统竞赛，但尚未有专门针对人形机器人对话的竞赛。DRC2022旨在通过人形机器人比较交互性能，推动该领域研究。
method: 竞赛分初赛和决赛两轮，初赛采用实地实验形式评估12支队伍的对话机器人表现，择优3支进入决赛；改进评估方法并实现国际化。
result: 初赛筛选出3支决赛队伍，决赛于2022年10月25日在IROS2022机器人竞赛环节举行。
conclusion: DRC2022通过真实场景评估推动了人形机器人对话技术的发展，为后续研究提供了基准和方向。
search_text: Overview of Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 2022年对话机器人大赛概况 Although many competitions have been held on dialogue systems in the past, no competition has been organized specifically for dialogue with humanoid robots. As the first such attempt in the world, we held a dialogue robot competition in 2020 to compare the performances of interactive robots using an android that closely resembles a human. Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 (DRC2022) was the second competition, held in August 2022. The task and regulations followed those of the first competition, while the evaluation method was improved and the event was internationalized. The competition has two rounds, a preliminary round and the final round. In the preliminary round, twelve participating teams competed in performance of a dialogue robot in the manner of a field experiment, and then three of those teams were selected as finalists. The final round will be held on October 25, 2022, in the Robot Competition session of IROS2022. This paper provides an overview of the task settings and evaluation method of DRC2022 and the results of the preliminary round. 虽然过去举办过很多关于对话系统的比赛，但还没有专门针对人形机器人对话举办的比赛。作为全球首次此类尝试，我们在 2020 年举办了对话机器人竞赛，以比较使用与人类极为相似的机器人的交互机器人的性能。 2022年对话机器人大赛（DRC2022）是第二届比赛，于2022年8月举行。任务和规则沿袭首届比赛，但评价方式有所改进，赛事国际化。比赛分为两轮，预赛和决赛。预赛中，12支参赛队伍以现场实验的方式进行对话机器人表演，最终选出3支队伍进入决赛。决赛将于2022年10月25日在IROS2022机器人竞赛环节进行。本文概述了DRC2022的任务设置、评估方法以及初赛的结果。 本文概述了2022年对话机器人竞赛（DRC2022）的任务设置、评估方法及初赛结果。 Takashi Minato,Ryuichiro Higashinaka,Kurima Sakai,Tomo Funayama,Hiromitsu Nishizaki,Takayuki Nagai cs.RO,cs.HC

title: A Stack-Free Traversal Algorithm for Left-Balanced k-d Trees
title_zh: 左平衡k-d树的无栈遍历算法
abstract: We present an algorithm that allows for find-closest-point and kNN-style traversals of left-balanced k-d trees, without the need for either recursion or software-managed stacks; instead using only current and last previously traversed node to compute which node to traverse next.
summary: We present an algorithm that allows for find-closest-point and kNN-style traversals of left-balanced k-d trees, without the need for either recursion or software-managed stacks; instead using only current and last previously traversed node to compute which node to traverse next.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法，允许对左平衡 k-d 树进行查找最近点和 kNN 式遍历，而不需要递归或软件管理堆栈；相反，仅使用当前和上次遍历的节点来计算下一个要遍历的节点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需栈的左平衡k-d树遍历算法，用于实现最近邻查找等操作。
AI.motivation: 传统k-d树遍历依赖递归或栈结构，可能带来内存开销或递归深度限制问题，需寻找更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过仅记录当前节点与上一访问节点，利用指针关系迭代计算下一步遍历节点，完全避免递归与栈结构。
AI.result: 成功实现无需栈的k-d树遍历方法，在保持正确性的同时降低内存消耗并提升执行效率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为资源受限环境下的k-d树应用提供了新的实现思路，拓展了空间分割数据结构的应用场景。

title: Kadabra: Adapting Kademlia for the Decentralized Web
title_zh: Kadabra：使 Kademlia 适应去中心化网络
comment: Financial Cryptography and Data Security 2023 (FC 2023); 27 pages, 20 figures
comments: Financial Cryptography and Data Security 2023 (FC 2023); 27 pages, 20 figures
abstract: Blockchains have become the catalyst for a growing movement to create a more decentralized Internet. A fundamental operation of applications in a decentralized Internet is data storage and retrieval. As today's blockchains are limited in their storage functionalities, in recent years a number of peer-to-peer data storage networks have emerged based on the Kademlia distributed hash table protocol. However, existing Kademlia implementations are not efficient enough to support fast data storage and retrieval operations necessary for (decentralized) Web applications. In this paper, we present Kadabra, a decentralized protocol for computing the routing table entries in Kademlia to accelerate lookups. Kadabra is motivated by the multi-armed bandit problem, and can automatically adapt to heterogeneity and dynamism in the network. Experimental results show Kadabra achieving between 15-50% lower lookup latencies compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Blockchains have become the catalyst for a growing movement to create a more decentralized Internet. A fundamental operation of applications in a decentralized Internet is data storage and retrieval. As today's blockchains are limited in their storage functionalities, in recent years a number of peer-to-peer data storage networks have emerged based on the Kademlia distributed hash table protocol. However, existing Kademlia implementations are not efficient enough to support fast data storage and retrieval operations necessary for (decentralized) Web applications. In this paper, we present Kadabra, a decentralized protocol for computing the routing table entries in Kademlia to accelerate lookups. Kadabra is motivated by the multi-armed bandit problem, and can automatically adapt to heterogeneity and dynamism in the network. Experimental results show Kadabra achieving between 15-50% lower lookup latencies compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 区块链已成为创建更加去中心化互联网的日益壮大的运动的催化剂。去中心化互联网中应用程序的基本操作是数据存储和检索。由于当今的区块链存储功能有限，近年来出现了许多基于Kademlia分布式哈希表协议的点对点数据存储网络。然而，现有的 Kademlia 实现效率不够高，无法支持（去中心化）Web 应用程序所需的快速数据存储和检索操作。在本文中，我们提出了 Kadabra，一种去中心化协议，用于计算 Kademlia 中的路由表条目以加速查找。 Kadabra 受到多臂老虎机问题的启发，可以自动适应网络的异构性和动态性。实验结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，Kadabra 的查找延迟降低了 15-50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Kadabra协议，通过优化Kademlia路由表计算加速去中心化网络的数据存储与检索。
AI.motivation: 现有Kademlia实现无法满足去中心化Web应用对高效数据存储和快速检索的需求。
AI.method: 基于多臂老虎机问题设计自适应算法，动态优化路由表条目计算以适应网络异构性和变化。
AI.result: 实验表明Kadabra相比现有方案降低15-50%的查找延迟。
AI.conclusion: Kadabra有效提升了Kademlia的查找效率，适用于动态变化的去中心化网络环境。

authors_text: Jian Zhu,Zuoyu Tian,Yadong Liu,Cong Zhang,Chia-wen Lo
title: Bootstrapping meaning through listening: Unsupervised learning of spoken sentence embeddings
title_zh: 通过听力引导意义：口语句子嵌入的无监督学习
abstract: Inducing semantic representations directly from speech signals is a highly challenging task but has many useful applications in speech mining and spoken language understanding. This study tackles the unsupervised learning of semantic representations for spoken utterances. Through converting speech signals into hidden units generated from acoustic unit discovery, we propose WavEmbed, a multimodal sequential autoencoder that predicts hidden units from a dense representation of speech. Secondly, we also propose S-HuBERT to induce meaning through knowledge distillation, in which a sentence embedding model is first trained on hidden units and passes its knowledge to a speech encoder through contrastive learning. The best performing model achieves a moderate correlation (0.5~0.6) with human judgments, without relying on any labels or transcriptions. Furthermore, these models can also be easily extended to leverage textual transcriptions of speech to learn much better speech embeddings that are strongly correlated with human annotations. Our proposed methods are applicable to the development of purely data-driven systems for speech mining, indexing and search.
summary: Inducing semantic representations directly from speech signals is a highly challenging task but has many useful applications in speech mining and spoken language understanding. This study tackles the unsupervised learning of semantic representations for spoken utterances. Through converting speech signals into hidden units generated from acoustic unit discovery, we propose WavEmbed, a multimodal sequential autoencoder that predicts hidden units from a dense representation of speech. Secondly, we also propose S-HuBERT to induce meaning through knowledge distillation, in which a sentence embedding model is first trained on hidden units and passes its knowledge to a speech encoder through contrastive learning. The best performing model achieves a moderate correlation (0.5~0.6) with human judgments, without relying on any labels or transcriptions. Furthermore, these models can also be easily extended to leverage textual transcriptions of speech to learn much better speech embeddings that are strongly correlated with human annotations. Our proposed methods are applicable to the development of purely data-driven systems for speech mining, indexing and search.
abstract_zh: 直接从语音信号导出语义表示是一项极具挑战性的任务，但在语音挖掘和口语理解中有许多有用的应用。这项研究解决了口语语义表示的无监督学习。通过将语音信号转换为由声学单元发现生成的隐藏单元，我们提出了 WavEmbed，一种多模态顺序自动编码器，可以从语音的密集表示中预测隐藏单元。其次，我们还提出 S-HuBERT 通过知识蒸馏来诱导意义，其中首先在隐藏单元上训练句子嵌入模型，然后通过对比学习将其知识传递给语音编码器。表现最好的模型与人类判断实现了中等相关性（0.5~0.6），而不依赖于任何标签或转录。此外，这些模型还可以轻松扩展，以利用语音的文本转录来学习与人类注释密切相关的更好的语音嵌入。我们提出的方法适用于开发用于语音挖掘、索引和搜索的纯数据驱动系统。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在无监督条件下从语音信号中学习口语句子的语义表示。
AI.motivation: 直接从语音信号中生成语义表示对语音挖掘和理解有重要应用，但传统方法依赖标注数据，缺乏无监督解决方案。
AI.method: 提出WavEmbed（多模态序列自编码器）和S-HuBERT（知识蒸馏与对比学习结合）两种无监督方法，无需标签即可学习语音嵌入。
AI.result: 最佳模型在无标签情况下达到中等人类相关性（0.5~0.6），结合文本转录后相关性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可构建纯数据驱动的语音处理系统，推动语音挖掘、索引和搜索技术发展。

Secondly, we also propose S-HuBERT to induce meaning through knowledge distillation, in which a sentence embedding model is first trained on hidden units and passes its knowledge to a speech encoder through contrastive learning. Furthermore, these models can also be easily extended to leverage textual transcriptions of speech to learn much better speech embeddings that are strongly correlated with human annotations. Our proposed methods are applicable to the development of purely data-driven systems for speech mining, indexing and search. 直接从语音信号导出语义表示是一项极具挑战性的任务，但在语音挖掘和口语理解中有许多有用的应用。这项研究解决了口语语义表示的无监督学习。通过将语音信号转换为由声学单元发现生成的隐藏单元，我们提出了 WavEmbed，一种多模态顺序自动编码器，可以从语音的密集表示中预测隐藏单元。其次，我们还提出 S-HuBERT 通过知识蒸馏来诱导意义，其中首先在隐藏单元上训练句子嵌入模型，然后通过对比学习将其知识传递给语音编码器。表现最好的模型与人类判断实现了中等相关性（0.5~0.6），而不依赖于任何标签或转录。此外，这些模型还可以轻松扩展，以利用语音的文本转录来学习与人类注释密切相关的更好的语音嵌入。我们提出的方法适用于开发用于语音挖掘、索引和搜索的纯数据驱动系统。 本文主要研究在无监督条件下从语音信号中学习口语句子的语义表示。 Jian Zhu,Zuoyu Tian,Yadong Liu,Cong Zhang,Chia-wen Lo cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sevgi Altun,Mustafa Cem Gunes,Yusuf H. Sahin,Alican Mertan,Gozde Unal,Mine Ozkar
title: Symmetry and Variance: Generative Parametric Modelling of Historical Brick Wall Patterns
title_zh: 对称性和方差：历史砖墙图案的生成参数建模
comment: 10 pages, 7 Figures. This paper is published at "Symmetry: Art and Science | 12th SIS-Symmetry Congress"
comments: 10 pages, 7 Figures. This paper is published at "Symmetry: Art and Science | 12th SIS-Symmetry Congress"
abstract: This study integrates artificial intelligence and computational design tools to extract information from architectural heritage. Photogrammetry-based point cloud models of brick walls from the Anatolian Seljuk period are analysed in terms of the interrelated units of construction, simultaneously considering both the inherent symmetries and irregularities. The real-world data is used as input for acquiring the stochastic parameters of spatial relations and a set of parametric shape rules to recreate designs of existing and hypothetical brick walls within the style. The motivation is to be able to generate large data sets for machine learning of the style and to devise procedures for robotic production of such designs with repetitive units.
summary: This study integrates artificial intelligence and computational design tools to extract information from architectural heritage. Photogrammetry-based point cloud models of brick walls from the Anatolian Seljuk period are analysed in terms of the interrelated units of construction, simultaneously considering both the inherent symmetries and irregularities. The real-world data is used as input for acquiring the stochastic parameters of spatial relations and a set of parametric shape rules to recreate designs of existing and hypothetical brick walls within the style. The motivation is to be able to generate large data sets for machine learning of the style and to devise procedures for robotic production of such designs with repetitive units.
abstract_zh: 这项研究集成了人工智能和计算设计工具，从建筑遗产中提取信息。根据相互关联的建筑单元对安纳托利亚塞尔柱时期砖墙的基于摄影测量的点云模型进行了分析，同时考虑了固有的对称性和不规则性。现实世界的数据用作获取空间关系的随机参数和一组参数形状规则的输入，以重新创建该风格内现有和假设的砖墙的设计。其动机是能够生成用于风格机器学习的大型数据集，并设计用于具有重复单元的此类设计的机器人生产的程序。

AI.tldr: 本研究结合人工智能与计算设计工具，分析历史砖墙的对称性与不规则性，建立参数化模型以生成符合历史风格的砖墙图案。
AI.motivation: 旨在生成大规模风格数据集用于机器学习训练，并开发适用于机器人生产的砖墙设计流程。
AI.method: 基于摄影测量点云模型分析砖墙构造单元，提取空间关系的随机参数及参数化形状规则，结合对称性与不规则性进行建模。
AI.result: 成功生成符合安纳托利亚塞尔柱时期风格的砖墙设计案例，验证了参数化模型在历史风格复现中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 参数化建模方法可有效模拟历史砖墙特征，为文化遗产数字化保护与机器人制造提供技术支撑。

title: Artificial Life using a Book and Bookmarker
title_zh: 使用书和书签的人工生命
abstract: Reproduction, development, and individual interactions are essential topics in artificial life. The cellular automata, which can handle these in a composite way, is highly restricted in its form and behavior because it represents life as a pattern of cells. In contrast, the virtual creatures proposed by Karl Sims have a very high degree of freedom in terms of morphology and behavior. However, they have limited expressive capacity in terms of those viewpoints. This study carefully extracts the characteristics of the cellular automata and Sims models to propose a new artificial life model that can simulate reproduction, development, and individual interactions while exhibiting high expressive power for morphology and behavior. The simulation was performed by sequentially reading a book with genetic information and repeatedly executing four actions: expansion, connection, disconnection, and transition. The virtual creatures in the proposed model exhibit unique survival strategies and lifestyles and acquire interesting properties in reproduction, development, and individual interactions while having freedom in morphology and behavior.
summary: Reproduction, development, and individual interactions are essential topics in artificial life. The cellular automata, which can handle these in a composite way, is highly restricted in its form and behavior because it represents life as a pattern of cells. In contrast, the virtual creatures proposed by Karl Sims have a very high degree of freedom in terms of morphology and behavior. However, they have limited expressive capacity in terms of those viewpoints. This study carefully extracts the characteristics of the cellular automata and Sims models to propose a new artificial life model that can simulate reproduction, development, and individual interactions while exhibiting high expressive power for morphology and behavior. The simulation was performed by sequentially reading a book with genetic information and repeatedly executing four actions: expansion, connection, disconnection, and transition. The virtual creatures in the proposed model exhibit unique survival strategies and lifestyles and acquire interesting properties in reproduction, development, and individual interactions while having freedom in morphology and behavior.
abstract_zh: 繁殖、发育和个体相互作用是人工生命的基本主题。元胞自动机可以以复合方式处理这些问题，但其形式和行为受到高度限制，因为它将生命表示为细胞的模式。相比之下，Karl Sims提出的虚拟生物在形态和行为方面具有非常高的自由度。然而，他们对这些观点的表达能力有限。这项研究仔细提取了元胞自动机和Sims模型的特征，提出了一种新的人工生命模型，可以模拟繁殖、发育和个体交互，同时表现出对形态和行为的高表达力。模拟是通过依次阅读一本带有遗传信息的书并重复执行四个动作来进行的：扩展、连接、断开和转换。所提出的模型中的虚拟生物表现出独特的生存策略和生活方式，并在繁殖、发育和个体交互方面获得有趣的特性，同时具有形态和行为的自由。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合细胞自动机与虚拟生物模型的新方法，通过书本和书签模拟人工生命系统的繁殖、发育及个体交互。
AI.motivation: 细胞自动机形式受限，Sims虚拟生物行为表达不足，需融合两者优势以实现更灵活的形态与行为模拟。
AI.method: 通过顺序读取包含遗传信息的书本，执行扩展、连接、断开和转换四类操作，构建可演化的人工生命系统。
AI.result: 虚拟生物展现出独特生存策略与繁殖特性，在形态自由度和行为交互性上优于传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 该模型成功整合细胞自动机规则与虚拟生物灵活性，为人工生命研究提供新范式。

title: Deep-Learning-Based Precipitation Nowcasting with Ground Weather Station Data and Radar Data
title_zh: 利用地面气象站数据和雷达数据进行基于深度学习的降水临近预报
comment: to appear at the 17th International Workshop on Spatial and Spatiotemporal Data Mining (SSTDM-22)
comments: to appear at the 17th International Workshop on Spatial and Spatiotemporal Data Mining (SSTDM-22)
abstract: Recently, many deep-learning techniques have been applied to various weather-related prediction tasks, including precipitation nowcasting (i.e., predicting precipitation levels and locations in the near future). Most existing deep-learning-based approaches for precipitation nowcasting, however, consider only radar and/or satellite images as inputs, and meteorological observations collected from ground weather stations, which are sparsely located, are relatively unexplored. In this paper, we propose ASOC, a novel attentive method for effectively exploiting ground-based meteorological observations from multiple weather stations. ASOC is designed to capture temporal dynamics of the observations and also contextual relationships between them. ASOC is easily combined with existing image-based precipitation nowcasting models without changing their architectures. We show that such a combination improves the average critical success index (CSI) of predicting heavy (at least 10 mm/hr) and light (at least 1 mm/hr) rainfall events at 1-6 hr lead times by 5.7%, compared to the original image-based model, using the radar images and ground-based observations around South Korea collected from 2014 to 2020.
summary: Recently, many deep-learning techniques have been applied to various weather-related prediction tasks, including precipitation nowcasting (i.e., predicting precipitation levels and locations in the near future). Most existing deep-learning-based approaches for precipitation nowcasting, however, consider only radar and/or satellite images as inputs, and meteorological observations collected from ground weather stations, which are sparsely located, are relatively unexplored. In this paper, we propose ASOC, a novel attentive method for effectively exploiting ground-based meteorological observations from multiple weather stations. ASOC is designed to capture temporal dynamics of the observations and also contextual relationships between them. ASOC is easily combined with existing image-based precipitation nowcasting models without changing their architectures. We show that such a combination improves the average critical success index (CSI) of predicting heavy (at least 10 mm/hr) and light (at least 1 mm/hr) rainfall events at 1-6 hr lead times by 5.7%, compared to the original image-based model, using the radar images and ground-based observations around South Korea collected from 2014 to 2020.
abstract_zh: 最近，许多深度学习技术已应用于各种与天气相关的预测任务，包括降水临近预报（即预测近期的降水水平和位置）。然而，大多数现有的基于深度学习的降水临近预报方法仅考虑雷达和/或卫星图像作为输入，而从位置稀疏的地面气象站收集的气象观测相对未经探索。在本文中，我们提出了 ASOC，这是一种有效利用多个气象站的地面气象观测数据的新颖的注意力方法。 ASOC 旨在捕获观察的时间动态以及它们之间的上下文关系。 ASOC 可以轻松地与现有的基于图像的降水临近预报模型相结合，而无需更改其架构。我们使用 2014 年至 2020 年收集的韩国周围的雷达图像和地面观测结果表明，与原始基于图像的模型相比，这种组合将预测提前 1-6 小时的强降雨（至少 10 毫米/小时）和小雨（至少 1 毫米/小时）事件的平均关键成功指数 (CSI) 提高了 5.7%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合地面气象站数据和雷达数据的深度学习方法，用于提高降水临近预报的准确性
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖雷达图像，未充分利用地面气象站数据，而地面数据能提供更丰富的局部信息，有助于提升预测精度
AI.method: 提出ASOC方法，通过注意力机制整合多站点地面气象数据，捕捉时间动态和空间关系，并与现有图像模型结合
AI.result: 使用韩国2014-2020年数据，模型在1-6小时预测中，重降水和轻降水事件的CSI平均提升5.7%
AI.conclusion: 结合地面气象站数据与图像模型可有效提升降水临近预报性能，为多源数据融合提供新思路

search_text: Deep-Learning-Based Precipitation Nowcasting with Ground Weather Station Data and Radar Data 利用地面气象站数据和雷达数据进行基于深度学习的降水临近预报 Recently, many deep-learning techniques have been applied to various weather-related prediction tasks, including precipitation nowcasting (i.e., predicting precipitation levels and locations in the near future). Most existing deep-learning-based approaches for precipitation nowcasting, however, consider only radar and/or satellite images as inputs, and meteorological observations collected from ground weather stations, which are sparsely located, are relatively unexplored. In this paper, we propose ASOC, a novel attentive method for effectively exploiting ground-based meteorological observations from multiple weather stations. ASOC is designed to capture temporal dynamics of the observations and also contextual relationships between them. ASOC is easily combined with existing image-based precipitation nowcasting models without changing their architectures. We show that such a combination improves the average critical success index (CSI) of predicting heavy (at least 10 mm/hr) and light (at least 1 mm/hr) rainfall events at 1-6 hr lead times by 5.7%, compared to the original image-based model, using the radar images and ground-based observations around South Korea collected from 2014 to 2020. 最近，许多深度学习技术已应用于各种与天气相关的预测任务，包括降水临近预报（即预测近期的降水水平和位置）。然而，大多数现有的基于深度学习的降水临近预报方法仅考虑雷达和/或卫星图像作为输入，而从位置稀疏的地面气象站收集的气象观测相对未经探索。在本文中，我们提出了 ASOC，这是一种有效利用多个气象站的地面气象观测数据的新颖的注意力方法。 ASOC 旨在捕获观察的时间动态以及它们之间的上下文关系。 ASOC 可以轻松地与现有的基于图像的降水临近预报模型相结合，而无需更改其架构。我们使用 2014 年至 2020 年收集的韩国周围的雷达图像和地面观测结果表明，与原始基于图像的模型相比，这种组合将预测提前 1-6 小时的强降雨（至少 10 毫米/小时）和小雨（至少 1 毫米/小时）事件的平均关键成功指数 (CSI) 提高了 5.7%。 提出一种结合地面气象站数据和雷达数据的深度学习方法，用于提高降水临近预报的准确性 Jihoon Ko,Kyuhan Lee,Hyunjin Hwang,Kijung Shin physics.ao-ph,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Junfei Xiao,Zhichao Xu,Shiyi Lan,Zhiding Yu,Alan Yuille,Anima Anandkumar
title: 1st Place Solution of The Robust Vision Challenge 2022 Semantic Segmentation Track
title_zh: 2022 年鲁棒视觉挑战赛语义分割赛道第一名解决方案
comment: The Winning Solution to The Robust Vision Challenge 2022 Semantic Segmentation Track
comments: The Winning Solution to The Robust Vision Challenge 2022 Semantic Segmentation Track
abstract: This report describes the winning solution to the Robust Vision Challenge (RVC) semantic segmentation track at ECCV 2022. Our method adopts the FAN-B-Hybrid model as the encoder and uses SegFormer as the segmentation framework. The model is trained on a composite dataset consisting of images from 9 datasets (ADE20K, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas, ScanNet, VIPER, WildDash 2, IDD, BDD, and COCO) with a simple dataset balancing strategy. All the original labels are projected to a 256-class unified label space, and the model is trained using a cross-entropy loss. Without significant hyperparameter tuning or any specific loss weighting, our solution ranks the first place on all the testing semantic segmentation benchmarks from multiple domains (ADE20K, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas, ScanNet, VIPER, and WildDash 2). The proposed method can serve as a strong baseline for the multi-domain segmentation task and benefit future works. Code will be available at https://github.com/lambert-x/RVC_Segmentation.
summary: This report describes the winning solution to the Robust Vision Challenge (RVC) semantic segmentation track at ECCV 2022. Our method adopts the FAN-B-Hybrid model as the encoder and uses SegFormer as the segmentation framework. The model is trained on a composite dataset consisting of images from 9 datasets (ADE20K, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas, ScanNet, VIPER, WildDash 2, IDD, BDD, and COCO) with a simple dataset balancing strategy. All the original labels are projected to a 256-class unified label space, and the model is trained using a cross-entropy loss. Without significant hyperparameter tuning or any specific loss weighting, our solution ranks the first place on all the testing semantic segmentation benchmarks from multiple domains (ADE20K, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas, ScanNet, VIPER, and WildDash 2). The proposed method can serve as a strong baseline for the multi-domain segmentation task and benefit future works. Code will be available at https://github.com/lambert-x/RVC_Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 本报告描述了 ECCV 2022 鲁棒视觉挑战赛 (RVC) 语义分割赛道的获胜解决方案。我们的方法采用 FAN-B-Hybrid 模型作为编码器，并使用 SegFormer 作为分割框架。该模型在由 9 个数据集（ADE20K、Cityscapes、Mapillary Vistas、ScanNet、VIPER、WildDash 2、IDD、BDD 和 COCO）的图像组成的复合数据集上进行训练，并采用简单的数据集平衡策略。所有原始标签都投影到256类统一标签空间，并使用交叉熵损失来训练模型。在没有进行重大超参数调整或任何特定损失权重的情况下，我们的解决方案在多个领域（ADE20K、Cityscapes、Mapillary Vistas、ScanNet、VIPER 和 WildDash 2）的所有测试语义分割基准测试中排名第一。所提出的方法可以作为多域分割任务的强有力的基线，并有利于未来的工作。代码可在 https://github.com/lambert-x/RVC_Segmentation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在ECCV 2022 Robust Vision Challenge语义分割赛道中获得第一名的解决方案，提出了一种跨多领域语义分割的强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 针对多领域语义分割任务中数据分布差异大、模型泛化能力弱的问题，提出无需复杂策略即可实现跨域鲁棒性的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用FAN-B-Hybrid作为编码器，结合SegFormer分割框架，在包含9个数据集的复合数据集上训练，通过统一256类标签空间和交叉熵损失进行训练，未使用显著超参数调优或损失加权。
AI.result: 在ADE20K、Cityscapes等6个跨域测试基准中均获得第一名，验证了方法的多领域适应性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多领域语义分割任务提供了有效基线，其简单性与高性能可为未来研究提供参考。

Our method adopts the FAN-B-Hybrid model as the encoder and uses SegFormer as the segmentation framework. authors_text: Jaein Lim,Mahdi Ghanei,R. Connor Lawson,Siddhartha Srinivasa,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: Lazy Incremental Search for Efficient Replanning with Bounded Suboptimality Guarantees
title_zh: 具有有限次优保证的高效重新规划的惰性增量搜索
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.12076
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.12076
abstract: We present a lazy incremental search algorithm, Lifelong-GLS (L-GLS), along with its bounded suboptimal version, Bounded L-GLS (B-LGLS) that combine the search efficiency of incremental search algorithms with the evaluation efficiency of lazy search algorithms for fast replanning in problem domains where edge-evaluations are more expensive than vertex-expansions. The proposed algorithms generalize Lifelong Planning A* (LPA*) and its bounded suboptimal version, Truncated LPA* (TLPA*), within the Generalized Lazy Search (GLS) framework, so as to restrict expensive edge evaluations only to the current shortest subpath when the cost-to-come inconsistencies are propagated during repair. We also present dynamic versions of the L-GLS and B-LGLS algorithms, called Generalized D* (GD*) and Bounded Generalized D* (B-GD*), respectively, for efficient replanning with non-stationary queries, designed specifically for navigation of mobile robots. We prove that the proposed algorithms are complete and correct in finding a solution that is guaranteed not to exceed the optimal solution cost by a user-chosen factor. Our numerical and experimental results support the claim that the proposed integration of the incremental and lazy search frameworks can help find solutions faster compared to the regular incremental or regular lazy search algorithms when the underlying graph representation changes often.
summary: We present a lazy incremental search algorithm, Lifelong-GLS (L-GLS), along with its bounded suboptimal version, Bounded L-GLS (B-LGLS) that combine the search efficiency of incremental search algorithms with the evaluation efficiency of lazy search algorithms for fast replanning in problem domains where edge-evaluations are more expensive than vertex-expansions. The proposed algorithms generalize Lifelong Planning A* (LPA*) and its bounded suboptimal version, Truncated LPA* (TLPA*), within the Generalized Lazy Search (GLS) framework, so as to restrict expensive edge evaluations only to the current shortest subpath when the cost-to-come inconsistencies are propagated during repair. We also present dynamic versions of the L-GLS and B-LGLS algorithms, called Generalized D* (GD*) and Bounded Generalized D* (B-GD*), respectively, for efficient replanning with non-stationary queries, designed specifically for navigation of mobile robots. We prove that the proposed algorithms are complete and correct in finding a solution that is guaranteed not to exceed the optimal solution cost by a user-chosen factor. Our numerical and experimental results support the claim that the proposed integration of the incremental and lazy search frameworks can help find solutions faster compared to the regular incremental or regular lazy search algorithms when the underlying graph representation changes often.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种惰性增量搜索算法 Lifelong-GLS (L-GLS) 及其有界次优版本 Bounded L-GLS (B-LGLS)，它将增量搜索算法的搜索效率与惰性搜索算法的评估效率结合起来，用于在边缘评估比顶点扩展更昂贵的问题域中进行快速重新规划。所提出的算法在广义惰性搜索 (GLS) 框架内概括了终身规划 A* (LPA*) 及其有界次优版本截断 LPA* (TLPA*)，以便在修复过程中传播成本不一致时将昂贵的边缘评估仅限于当前最短子路径。我们还提出了 L-GLS 和 B-LGLS 算法的动态版本，分别称为广义 D* (GD*) 和有界广义 D* (B-GD*)，用于通过非平稳查询进行高效重新规划，专为移动机器人导航而设计。我们证明所提出的算法在找到保证不超过用户选择的因素的最佳解决方案成本的解决方案方面是完整且正确的。我们的数值和实验结果支持这样的说法：当底层图表示经常变化时，与常规增量或常规惰性搜索算法相比，所提出的增量和惰性搜索框架的集成可以帮助更快地找到解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合增量搜索与惰性搜索框架的算法L-GLS及其有界次优版本B-LGLS，用于在边评估成本较高的动态环境中实现高效重规划。
AI.motivation: 在移动机器人导航等场景中，边评估成本远高于顶点扩展成本，传统增量或惰性搜索算法存在效率瓶颈，需设计兼顾两者优势的算法以应对频繁变化的图结构。
AI.method: 基于广义惰性搜索（GLS）框架，提出L-GLS和B-LGLS算法，仅在修复过程中对当前最短子路径进行边评估，并扩展动态版本GD*和B-GD*以处理非平稳查询。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提算法在图结构频繁变化时比传统增量或惰性搜索算法更快找到解，且保证解的成本不超过最优解的用户指定倍数。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合增量与惰性搜索框架，提出的算法在动态环境中实现了高效重规划，同时保证了解的质量与计算效率。

search_text: Lazy Incremental Search for Efficient Replanning with Bounded Suboptimality Guarantees 具有有限次优保证的高效重新规划的惰性增量搜索 We present a lazy incremental search algorithm, Lifelong-GLS (L-GLS), along with its bounded suboptimal version, Bounded L-GLS (B-LGLS) that combine the search efficiency of incremental search algorithms with the evaluation efficiency of lazy search algorithms for fast replanning in problem domains where edge-evaluations are more expensive than vertex-expansions. The proposed algorithms generalize Lifelong Planning A* (LPA*) and its bounded suboptimal version, Truncated LPA* (TLPA*), within the Generalized Lazy Search (GLS) framework, so as to restrict expensive edge evaluations only to the current shortest subpath when the cost-to-come inconsistencies are propagated during repair. We also present dynamic versions of the L-GLS and B-LGLS algorithms, called Generalized D* (GD*) and Bounded Generalized D* (B-GD*), respectively, for efficient replanning with non-stationary queries, designed specifically for navigation of mobile robots. We prove that the proposed algorithms are complete and correct in finding a solution that is guaranteed not to exceed the optimal solution cost by a user-chosen factor. Our numerical and experimental results support the claim that the proposed integration of the incremental and lazy search frameworks can help find solutions faster compared to the regular incremental or regular lazy search algorithms when the underlying graph representation changes often. 我们提出了一种惰性增量搜索算法 Lifelong-GLS (L-GLS) 及其有界次优版本 Bounded L-GLS (B-LGLS)，它将增量搜索算法的搜索效率与惰性搜索算法的评估效率结合起来，用于在边缘评估比顶点扩展更昂贵的问题域中进行快速重新规划。所提出的算法在广义惰性搜索 (GLS) 框架内概括了终身规划 A* (LPA*) 及其有界次优版本截断 LPA* (TLPA*)，以便在修复过程中传播成本不一致时将昂贵的边缘评估仅限于当前最短子路径。我们还提出了 L-GLS 和 B-LGLS 算法的动态版本，分别称为广义 D* (GD*) 和有界广义 D* (B-GD*)，用于通过非平稳查询进行高效重新规划，专为移动机器人导航而设计。我们证明所提出的算法在找到保证不超过用户选择的因素的最佳解决方案成本的解决方案方面是完整且正确的。我们的数值和实验结果支持这样的说法：当底层图表示经常变化时，与常规增量或常规惰性搜索算法相比，所提出的增量和惰性搜索框架的集成可以帮助更快地找到解决方案。 本文提出了一种结合增量搜索与惰性搜索框架的算法L-GLS及其有界次优版本B-LGLS，用于在边评估成本较高的动态环境中实现高效重规划。 Jaein Lim,Mahdi Ghanei,R. Connor Lawson,Siddhartha Srinivasa,Panagiotis Tsiotras cs.RO

title: Learning to Advise Humans in High-Stakes Settings
title_zh: 学习在高风险环境中为人类提供建议
abstract: Expert decision-makers (DMs) in high-stakes AI-assisted decision-making (AIaDM) settings receive and reconcile recommendations from AI systems before making their final decisions. We identify distinct properties of these settings which are key to developing AIaDM models that effectively benefit team performance. First, DMs incur reconciliation costs from exerting decision-making resources (e.g., time and effort) when reconciling AI recommendations that contradict their own judgment. Second, DMs in AIaDM settings exhibit algorithm discretion behavior (ADB), i.e., an idiosyncratic tendency to imperfectly accept or reject algorithmic recommendations for any given decision task. The human's reconciliation costs and imperfect discretion behavior introduce the need to develop AI systems which (1) provide recommendations selectively, (2) leverage the human partner's ADB to maximize the team's decision accuracy while regularizing for reconciliation costs, and (3) are inherently interpretable. We refer to the task of developing AI to advise humans in AIaDM settings as learning to advise and we address this task by first introducing the AI-assisted Team (AIaT)-Learning Framework. We instantiate our framework to develop TeamRules (TR): an algorithm that produces rule-based models and recommendations for AIaDM settings. TR is optimized to selectively advise a human and to trade-off reconciliation costs and team accuracy for a given environment by leveraging the human partner's ADB. Evaluations on synthetic and real-world benchmark datasets with a variety of simulated human accuracy and discretion behaviors show that TR robustly improves the team's objective across settings over interpretable, rule-based alternatives.

We identify distinct properties of these settings which are key to developing AIaDM models that effectively benefit team performance. First, DMs incur reconciliation costs from exerting decision-making resources (e.g., time and effort) when reconciling AI recommendations that contradict their own judgment. Second, DMs in AIaDM settings exhibit algorithm discretion behavior (ADB), i.e., an idiosyncratic tendency to imperfectly accept or reject algorithmic recommendations for any given decision task. The human's reconciliation costs and imperfect discretion behavior introduce the need to develop AI systems which (1) provide recommendations selectively, (2) leverage the human partner's ADB to maximize the team's decision accuracy while regularizing for reconciliation costs, and (3) are inherently interpretable. We refer to the task of developing AI to advise humans in AIaDM settings as learning to advise and we address this task by first introducing the AI-assisted Team (AIaT)-Learning Framework. We instantiate our framework to develop TeamRules (TR): an algorithm that produces rule-based models and recommendations for AIaDM settings. TR is optimized to selectively advise a human and to trade-off reconciliation costs and team accuracy for a given environment by leveraging the human partner's ADB. Evaluations on synthetic and real-world benchmark datasets with a variety of simulated human accuracy and discretion behaviors show that TR robustly improves the team's objective across settings over interpretable, rule-based alternatives.
abstract_zh: 高风险人工智能辅助决策 (AIaDM) 设置中的专家决策者 (DM) 在做出最终决策之前接收并协调来自人工智能系统的建议。我们确定了这些设置的独特属性，这些属性对于开发有效提高团队绩效的 AIaDM 模型至关重要。首先，当决策者在协调与其自身判断相矛盾的人工智能建议时，会因运用决策资源（例如时间和精力）而产生协调成本。其次，AIaDM 设置中的 DM 表现出算法自由裁量行为 (ADB)，即对于任何给定决策任务不完全接受或拒绝算法建议的特殊倾向。人类的协调成本和不完美的自由裁量权行为需要开发人工智能系统，该系统（1）有选择地提供建议，（2）利用人类合作伙伴的 ADB 最大限度地提高团队的决策准确性，同时规范协调成本，以及（3）本质上是可解释的。我们将开发人工智能以在 AIaDM 环境中为人类提供建议的任务称为学习建议，并且我们通过首先引入人工智能辅助团队 (AIaT) 学习框架来解决此任务。我们实例化我们的框架来开发 TeamRules (TR)：一种为 AIaDM 设置生成基于规则的模型和建议的算法。 TR 经过优化，可以通过利用人类合作伙伴的 ADB，选择性地为人类提供建议，并在给定环境下权衡协调成本和团队准确性。对具有各种模拟人类准确性和判断行为的合成和现实世界基准数据集进行的评估表明，与可解释的、基于规则的替代方案相比，TR 可以在各种设置中强有力地提高团队的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TeamRules（TR）的算法，旨在通过考虑人类决策者的协调成本和算法裁量行为（ADB），在高风险AI辅助决策场景中开发可解释的AI系统以优化团队决策性能。
AI.motivation: 在高风险AI辅助决策场景中，人类决策者需要协调AI建议与自身判断，但此过程会产生资源成本，且人类对AI建议的接受存在不完美性（ADB），现有方法未能有效平衡这些因素。
AI.method: 提出AIaT-Learning框架和TeamRules算法，通过规则模型生成可解释建议，利用人类ADB特性优化建议选择策略，权衡协调成本与团队决策准确性。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实场景中，TR算法在多种模拟人类行为参数下均显著优于可解释规则基线方法，团队目标函数表现更优。
AI.conclusion: TeamRules通过建模人类行为特性与成本约束，为高风险AI辅助决策提供了有效框架，证明了考虑人类因素的AI建议系统能提升团队决策表现。

title: Delving into Masked Autoencoders for Multi-Label Thorax Disease Classification
title_zh: 深入研究用于多标签胸部疾病分类的屏蔽自动编码器
comment: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2023)
comments: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2023)
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) has become one of the most popular neural architectures due to its great scalability, computational efficiency, and compelling performance in many vision tasks. However, ViT has shown inferior performance to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on medical tasks due to its data-hungry nature and the lack of annotated medical data. In this paper, we pre-train ViTs on 266,340 chest X-rays using Masked Autoencoders (MAE) which reconstruct missing pixels from a small part of each image. For comparison, CNNs are also pre-trained on the same 266,340 X-rays using advanced self-supervised methods (e.g., MoCo v2). The results show that our pre-trained ViT performs comparably (sometimes better) to the state-of-the-art CNN (DenseNet-121) for multi-label thorax disease classification. This performance is attributed to the strong recipes extracted from our empirical studies for pre-training and fine-tuning ViT. The pre-training recipe signifies that medical reconstruction requires a much smaller proportion of an image (10% vs. 25%) and a more moderate random resized crop range (0.5~1.0 vs. 0.2~1.0) compared with natural imaging. Furthermore, we remark that in-domain transfer learning is preferred whenever possible. The fine-tuning recipe discloses that layer-wise LR decay, RandAug magnitude, and DropPath rate are significant factors to consider. We hope that this study can direct future research on the application of Transformers to a larger variety of medical imaging tasks.

However, ViT has shown inferior performance to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on medical tasks due to its data-hungry nature and the lack of annotated medical data. In this paper, we pre-train ViTs on 266,340 chest X-rays using Masked Autoencoders (MAE) which reconstruct missing pixels from a small part of each image. For comparison, CNNs are also pre-trained on the same 266,340 X-rays using advanced self-supervised methods (e.g., MoCo v2). The results show that our pre-trained ViT performs comparably (sometimes better) to the state-of-the-art CNN (DenseNet-121) for multi-label thorax disease classification. This performance is attributed to the strong recipes extracted from our empirical studies for pre-training and fine-tuning ViT. The pre-training recipe signifies that medical reconstruction requires a much smaller proportion of an image (10% vs. 25%) and a more moderate random resized crop range (0.5~1.0 vs. 0.2~1.0) compared with natural imaging. Furthermore, we remark that in-domain transfer learning is preferred whenever possible. The fine-tuning recipe discloses that layer-wise LR decay, RandAug magnitude, and DropPath rate are significant factors to consider. We hope that this study can direct future research on the application of Transformers to a larger variety of medical imaging tasks.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) has become one of the most popular neural architectures due to its great scalability, computational efficiency, and compelling performance in many vision tasks. However, ViT has shown inferior performance to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on medical tasks due to its data-hungry nature and the lack of annotated medical data. In this paper, we pre-train ViTs on 266,340 chest X-rays using Masked Autoencoders (MAE) which reconstruct missing pixels from a small part of each image.为了进行比较，CNN 还使用先进的自监督方法（例如 MoCo v2）对相同的 266,340 张 X 射线进行了预训练。 The results show that our pre-trained ViT performs comparably (sometimes better) to the state-of-the-art CNN (DenseNet-121) for multi-label thorax disease classification.这一性能归功于我们从预训练和微调 ViT 的实证研究中提取的强大配方。 The pre-training recipe signifies that medical reconstruction requires a much smaller proportion of an image (10% vs. 25%) and a more moderate random resized crop range (0.5~1.0 vs. 0.2~1.0) compared with natural imaging.此外，我们指出，只要有可能，域内迁移学习都是首选。微调方法表明，逐层 LR 衰减、RandAug 幅度和 DropPath 速率是需要考虑的重要因素。我们希望这项研究能够指导未来将 Transformers 应用到更广泛的医学成像任务的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用掩码自编码器（MAE）预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）在多标签胸科疾病分类任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在通用视觉任务中表现优异，但其在医疗任务中因数据需求量大且医疗标注数据稀缺而表现不佳，需探索更适合医疗图像的预训练方法。
AI.method: 在266,340张胸部X光片上使用MAE预训练ViT，并与使用MoCo v2预训练的CNN（如DenseNet-121）进行对比；通过调整图像掩码比例（10%）、随机裁剪范围等参数优化预训练过程，并探讨迁移学习与微调策略。
AI.result: 预训练的ViT在多标签胸科疾病分类任务中表现与最先进的CNN相当（有时更优），验证了MAE在医疗图像上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 医疗图像的自监督预训练需调整掩码比例和数据增强策略，且应优先使用领域内迁移学习；该研究为Transformer在医疗影像任务中的应用提供了指导。

ai_content_json.result: 预训练的ViT在多标签胸科疾病分类任务中表现与最先进的CNN相当（有时更优），验证了MAE在医疗图像上的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 医疗图像的自监督预训练需调整掩码比例和数据增强策略，且应优先使用领域内迁移学习；该研究为Transformer在医疗影像任务中的应用提供了指导。

result: 预训练的ViT在多标签胸科疾病分类任务中表现与最先进的CNN相当（有时更优），验证了MAE在医疗图像上的有效性。

search_text: Delving into Masked Autoencoders for Multi-Label Thorax Disease Classification 深入研究用于多标签胸部疾病分类的屏蔽自动编码器 Vision Transformer (ViT) has become one of the most popular neural architectures due to its great scalability, computational efficiency, and compelling performance in many vision tasks. However, ViT has shown inferior performance to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on medical tasks due to its data-hungry nature and the lack of annotated medical data. In this paper, we pre-train ViTs on 266,340 chest X-rays using Masked Autoencoders (MAE) which reconstruct missing pixels from a small part of each image. For comparison, CNNs are also pre-trained on the same 266,340 X-rays using advanced self-supervised methods (e.g., MoCo v2). The results show that our pre-trained ViT performs comparably (sometimes better) to the state-of-the-art CNN (DenseNet-121) for multi-label thorax disease classification. This performance is attributed to the strong recipes extracted from our empirical studies for pre-training and fine-tuning ViT. The pre-training recipe signifies that medical reconstruction requires a much smaller proportion of an image (10% vs. 25%) and a more moderate random resized crop range (0.5~1.0 vs. 0.2~1.0) compared with natural imaging. Furthermore, we remark that in-domain transfer learning is preferred whenever possible. The fine-tuning recipe discloses that layer-wise LR decay, RandAug magnitude, and DropPath rate are significant factors to consider. We hope that this study can direct future research on the application of Transformers to a larger variety of medical imaging tasks. Vision Transformer (ViT) has become one of the most popular neural architectures due to its great scalability, computational efficiency, and compelling performance in many vision tasks. However, ViT has shown inferior performance to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on medical tasks due to its data-hungry nature and the lack of annotated medical data. In this paper, we pre-train ViTs on 266,340 chest X-rays using Masked Autoencoders (MAE) which reconstruct missing pixels from a small part of each image.为了进行比较，CNN 还使用先进的自监督方法（例如 MoCo v2）对相同的 266,340 张 X 射线进行了预训练。 The results show that our pre-trained ViT performs comparably (sometimes better) to the state-of-the-art CNN (DenseNet-121) for multi-label thorax disease classification.这一性能归功于我们从预训练和微调 ViT 的实证研究中提取的强大配方。 The pre-training recipe signifies that medical reconstruction requires a much smaller proportion of an image (10% vs. 25%) and a more moderate random resized crop range (0.5~1.0 vs. 0.2~1.0) compared with natural imaging.此外，我们指出，只要有可能，域内迁移学习都是首选。微调方法表明，逐层 LR 衰减、RandAug 幅度和 DropPath 速率是需要考虑的重要因素。我们希望这项研究能够指导未来将 Transformers 应用到更广泛的医学成像任务的研究。 本文研究了使用掩码自编码器（MAE）预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）在多标签胸科疾病分类任务中的应用。 Junfei Xiao,Yutong Bai,Alan Yuille,Zongwei Zhou cs.CV

title: Towards Pragmatic Production Strategies for Natural Language Generation Tasks
title_zh: 自然语言生成任务的实用生产策略
comment: In Proceedings of the 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2022)
comments: In Proceedings of the 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2022)
abstract: This position paper proposes a conceptual framework for the design of Natural Language Generation (NLG) systems that follow efficient and effective production strategies in order to achieve complex communicative goals. In this general framework, efficiency is characterised as the parsimonious regulation of production and comprehension costs while effectiveness is measured with respect to task-oriented and contextually grounded communicative goals. We provide concrete suggestions for the estimation of goals, costs, and utility via modern statistical methods, demonstrating applications of our framework to the classic pragmatic task of visually grounded referential games and to abstractive text summarisation, two popular generation tasks with real-world applications. In sum, we advocate for the development of NLG systems that learn to make pragmatic production decisions from experience, by reasoning about goals, costs, and utility in a human-like way.
summary: This position paper proposes a conceptual framework for the design of Natural Language Generation (NLG) systems that follow efficient and effective production strategies in order to achieve complex communicative goals. In this general framework, efficiency is characterised as the parsimonious regulation of production and comprehension costs while effectiveness is measured with respect to task-oriented and contextually grounded communicative goals. We provide concrete suggestions for the estimation of goals, costs, and utility via modern statistical methods, demonstrating applications of our framework to the classic pragmatic task of visually grounded referential games and to abstractive text summarisation, two popular generation tasks with real-world applications. In sum, we advocate for the development of NLG systems that learn to make pragmatic production decisions from experience, by reasoning about goals, costs, and utility in a human-like way.
abstract_zh: 本立场文件提出了自然语言生成（NLG）系统设计的概念框架，该系统遵循高效且有效的生产策略，以实现复杂的交流目标。在这个总体框架中，效率的特征是对生产和理解成本的简约调节，而有效性是根据任务导向和基于上下文的沟通目标来衡量的。我们通过现代统计方法为目标、成本和效用的估计提供具体建议，展示我们的框架在基于视觉的参考游戏的经典实用任务和抽象文本摘要（两种流行的现实世界应用生成任务）中的应用。总之，我们主张开发 NLG 系统，通过以类似人类的方式推理目标、成本和效用，学习根据经验做出务实的生产决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个自然语言生成系统的设计框架，通过高效策略实现复杂交际目标。
AI.motivation: 现有NLG系统在处理复杂任务时缺乏对生产成本与交际目标的平衡，需结合人类推理方式提升实用性。
AI.method: 采用现代统计方法量化目标、成本与效用，应用于视觉指代游戏和文本摘要等实际任务验证框架。
AI.result: 验证了框架在典型NLG任务中的可行性，展示了基于实用决策的生成策略效果。
AI.conclusion: 应开发能通过经验学习人类式目标-成本-效用推理的NLG系统，以提升生成任务的实用性。

title: Towards Real-Time Text2Video via CLIP-Guided, Pixel-Level Optimization
title_zh: 通过 CLIP 引导的像素级优化实现实时 Text2Video
abstract: We introduce an approach to generating videos based on a series of given language descriptions. Frames of the video are generated sequentially and optimized by guidance from the CLIP image-text encoder; iterating through language descriptions, weighting the current description higher than others. As opposed to optimizing through an image generator model itself, which tends to be computationally heavy, the proposed approach computes the CLIP loss directly at the pixel level, achieving general content at a speed suitable for near real-time systems. The approach can generate videos in up to 720p resolution, variable frame-rates, and arbitrary aspect ratios at a rate of 1-2 frames per second. Please visit our website to view videos and access our open-source code: https://pschaldenbrand.github.io/text2video/ .
summary: We introduce an approach to generating videos based on a series of given language descriptions. Frames of the video are generated sequentially and optimized by guidance from the CLIP image-text encoder; iterating through language descriptions, weighting the current description higher than others. As opposed to optimizing through an image generator model itself, which tends to be computationally heavy, the proposed approach computes the CLIP loss directly at the pixel level, achieving general content at a speed suitable for near real-time systems. The approach can generate videos in up to 720p resolution, variable frame-rates, and arbitrary aspect ratios at a rate of 1-2 frames per second. Please visit our website to view videos and access our open-source code: https://pschaldenbrand.github.io/text2video/ .
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种根据一系列给定语言描述生成视频的方法。视频帧在CLIP图文编码器的指导下按顺序生成并优化；迭代语言描述，使当前描述的权重高于其他描述。与通过图像生成器模型本身进行优化（计算量往往很大）相反，所提出的方法直接在像素级别计算 CLIP 损失，以适合近实时系统的速度实现一般内容。该方法可以以每秒 1-2 帧的速率生成高达 720p 分辨率、可变帧速率和任意宽高比的视频。请访问我们的网站观看视频并访问我们的开源代码：https://pschaldenbrand.github.io/text2video/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CLIP引导的像素级优化方法，实现从文本到视频的实时生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到视频生成方法依赖图像生成模型优化，计算量大且难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 通过CLIP图像-文本编码器直接计算像素级损失，逐帧优化视频内容，优先权重当前语言描述。
AI.result: 支持720p分辨率、可变帧率和任意宽高比，生成速度达1-2帧/秒，适合近实时系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过直接像素优化替代生成模型，实现了高效且灵活的文本到视频生成方案。

authors_text: Ziyang Zhang,Plamen Angelov,Eduardo Soares,Nicolas Longepe,Pierre Philippe Mathieu
title: An Interpretable Deep Semantic Segmentation Method for Earth Observation
title_zh: 一种可解释的地球观测深度语义分割方法
abstract: Earth observation is fundamental for a range of human activities including flood response as it offers vital information to decision makers. Semantic segmentation plays a key role in mapping the raw hyper-spectral data coming from the satellites into a human understandable form assigning class labels to each pixel. In this paper, we introduce a prototype-based interpretable deep semantic segmentation (IDSS) method, which is highly accurate as well as interpretable. Its parameters are in orders of magnitude less than the number of parameters used by deep networks such as U-Net and are clearly interpretable by humans. The proposed here IDSS offers a transparent structure that allows users to inspect and audit the algorithm's decision. Results have demonstrated that IDSS could surpass other algorithms, including U-Net, in terms of IoU (Intersection over Union) total water and Recall total water. We used WorldFloods data set for our experiments and plan to use the semantic segmentation results combined with masks for permanent water to detect flood events.
summary: Earth observation is fundamental for a range of human activities including flood response as it offers vital information to decision makers. Semantic segmentation plays a key role in mapping the raw hyper-spectral data coming from the satellites into a human understandable form assigning class labels to each pixel. In this paper, we introduce a prototype-based interpretable deep semantic segmentation (IDSS) method, which is highly accurate as well as interpretable. Its parameters are in orders of magnitude less than the number of parameters used by deep networks such as U-Net and are clearly interpretable by humans. The proposed here IDSS offers a transparent structure that allows users to inspect and audit the algorithm's decision. Results have demonstrated that IDSS could surpass other algorithms, including U-Net, in terms of IoU (Intersection over Union) total water and Recall total water. We used WorldFloods data set for our experiments and plan to use the semantic segmentation results combined with masks for permanent water to detect flood events.
abstract_zh: 地球观测对于包括洪水响应在内的一系列人类活动至关重要，因为它为决策者提供了重要信息。语义分割在将来自卫星的原始高光谱数据映射为人类可理解的形式（为每个像素分配类别标签）方面发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于原型的可解释深度语义分割（IDSS）方法，该方法高度准确且可解释。其参数比 U-Net 等深度网络使用的参数数量少几个数量级，并且人类可以清楚地解释。这里提出的 IDSS 提供了一个透明的结构，允许用户检查和审核算法的决策。结果表明，IDSS 在 IoU（Intersection over Union）总水量和 Recall 总水量方面可以超越包括 U-Net 在内的其他算法。我们使用 WorldFloods 数据集进行实验，并计划使用语义分割结果与永久水掩模相结合来检测洪水事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的深度语义分割方法（IDSS），用于地球观测中的洪水检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型如U-Net参数量大且缺乏可解释性，难以满足地球观测中对算法透明度和决策可审查性的需求。
AI.method: 基于原型的可解释深度语义分割方法（IDSS），通过减少参数量并构建透明结构实现人类可解释性。
AI.result: 在WorldFloods数据集上，IDSS在总水域IoU和召回率指标上优于U-Net，且计划结合永久水域掩膜提升洪水事件检测能力。
AI.conclusion: IDSS在保持高精度的同时实现了算法可解释性，为需要透明决策的地球观测应用提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.motivation: 传统深度学习模型如U-Net参数量大且缺乏可解释性，难以满足地球观测中对算法透明度和决策可审查性的需求。

search_text: An Interpretable Deep Semantic Segmentation Method for Earth Observation 一种可解释的地球观测深度语义分割方法 Earth observation is fundamental for a range of human activities including flood response as it offers vital information to decision makers. Semantic segmentation plays a key role in mapping the raw hyper-spectral data coming from the satellites into a human understandable form assigning class labels to each pixel. In this paper, we introduce a prototype-based interpretable deep semantic segmentation (IDSS) method, which is highly accurate as well as interpretable. Its parameters are in orders of magnitude less than the number of parameters used by deep networks such as U-Net and are clearly interpretable by humans. The proposed here IDSS offers a transparent structure that allows users to inspect and audit the algorithm's decision. Results have demonstrated that IDSS could surpass other algorithms, including U-Net, in terms of IoU (Intersection over Union) total water and Recall total water. We used WorldFloods data set for our experiments and plan to use the semantic segmentation results combined with masks for permanent water to detect flood events. 地球观测对于包括洪水响应在内的一系列人类活动至关重要，因为它为决策者提供了重要信息。语义分割在将来自卫星的原始高光谱数据映射为人类可理解的形式（为每个像素分配类别标签）方面发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于原型的可解释深度语义分割（IDSS）方法，该方法高度准确且可解释。其参数比 U-Net 等深度网络使用的参数数量少几个数量级，并且人类可以清楚地解释。这里提出的 IDSS 提供了一个透明的结构，允许用户检查和审核算法的决策。结果表明，IDSS 在 IoU（Intersection over Union）总水量和 Recall 总水量方面可以超越包括 U-Net 在内的其他算法。我们使用 WorldFloods 数据集进行实验，并计划使用语义分割结果与永久水掩模相结合来检测洪水事件。 本文提出了一种可解释的深度语义分割方法（IDSS），用于地球观测中的洪水检测任务。 Ziyang Zhang,Plamen Angelov,Eduardo Soares,Nicolas Longepe,Pierre Philippe Mathieu cs.CV

authors_text: Vinay Kumar Verma,Nikhil Mehta,Shijing Si,Ricardo Henao,Lawrence Carin
title: Pushing the Efficiency Limit Using Structured Sparse Convolutions
title_zh: 使用结构化稀疏卷积突破效率极限
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision, WACV 2023
comments: Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision, WACV 2023
abstract: Weight pruning is among the most popular approaches for compressing deep convolutional neural networks. Recent work suggests that in a randomly initialized deep neural network, there exist sparse subnetworks that achieve performance comparable to the original network. Unfortunately, finding these subnetworks involves iterative stages of training and pruning, which can be computationally expensive. We propose Structured Sparse Convolution (SSC), which leverages the inherent structure in images to reduce the parameters in the convolutional filter. This leads to improved efficiency of convolutional architectures compared to existing methods that perform pruning at initialization. We show that SSC is a generalization of commonly used layers (depthwise, groupwise and pointwise convolution) in ``efficient architectures.'' Extensive experiments on well-known CNN models and datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed method. Architectures based on SSC achieve state-of-the-art performance compared to baselines on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny-ImageNet, and ImageNet classification benchmarks.
summary: Weight pruning is among the most popular approaches for compressing deep convolutional neural networks. Recent work suggests that in a randomly initialized deep neural network, there exist sparse subnetworks that achieve performance comparable to the original network. Unfortunately, finding these subnetworks involves iterative stages of training and pruning, which can be computationally expensive. We propose Structured Sparse Convolution (SSC), which leverages the inherent structure in images to reduce the parameters in the convolutional filter. This leads to improved efficiency of convolutional architectures compared to existing methods that perform pruning at initialization. We show that SSC is a generalization of commonly used layers (depthwise, groupwise and pointwise convolution) in ``efficient architectures.'' Extensive experiments on well-known CNN models and datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed method. Architectures based on SSC achieve state-of-the-art performance compared to baselines on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny-ImageNet, and ImageNet classification benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 权重修剪是压缩深度卷积神经网络最流行的方法之一。最近的工作表明，在随机初始化的深度神经网络中，存在稀疏子网络，其性能可与原始网络相当。不幸的是，找到这些子网络涉及训练和修剪的迭代阶段，这在计算上可能是昂贵的。我们提出了结构化稀疏卷积（SSC），它利用图像的固有结构来减少卷积滤波器中的参数。与在初始化时执行修剪的现有方法相比，这提高了卷积架构的效率。我们证明 SSC 是“高效架构”中常用层（深度、分组和点卷积）的推广。对著名 CNN 模型和数据集的大量实验表明了该方法的有效性。与 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet 和 ImageNet 分类基准的基线相比，基于 SSC 的架构实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化稀疏卷积（SSC）方法，通过利用图像的固有结构来减少卷积滤波器的参数，从而提高卷积神经网络的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的权重剪枝方法需要迭代训练和剪枝过程，计算成本较高，而随机初始化的深度网络中存在稀疏子网络可达到与原网络相当的性能，因此需要更高效的剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出结构化稀疏卷积（SSC），通过减少卷积滤波器参数来提升效率，并证明其是深度可分离卷积、分组卷积等常见高效层的泛化形式。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet和ImageNet等数据集上，基于SSC的架构相比基线方法达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SSC方法通过结构化稀疏性实现了比传统剪枝方法更高的效率，且在多个基准测试中表现优异。
