title: Data Augmentation for Automated Essay Scoring using Transformer Models
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 模型进行自动论文评分的数据增强
abstract: Automated essay scoring is one of the most important problem in Natural Language Processing. It has been explored for a number of years, and it remains partially solved. In addition to its economic and educational usefulness, it presents research problems. Transfer learning has proved to be beneficial in NLP. Data augmentation techniques have also helped build state-of-the-art models for automated essay scoring. Many works in the past have attempted to solve this problem by using RNNs, LSTMs, etc. This work examines the transformer models like BERT, RoBERTa, etc. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of transformer models and data augmentation for automated essay grading across many topics using a single model.
summary: Automated essay scoring is one of the most important problem in Natural Language Processing. It has been explored for a number of years, and it remains partially solved. In addition to its economic and educational usefulness, it presents research problems. Transfer learning has proved to be beneficial in NLP. Data augmentation techniques have also helped build state-of-the-art models for automated essay scoring. Many works in the past have attempted to solve this problem by using RNNs, LSTMs, etc. This work examines the transformer models like BERT, RoBERTa, etc. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of transformer models and data augmentation for automated essay grading across many topics using a single model.
abstract_zh: 自动论文评分是自然语言处理中最重要的问题之一。这个问题已经被探索了很多年，但仍然部分得到解决。除了其经济和教育用途之外，它还提出了研究问题。事实证明，迁移学习在 NLP 中是有益的。数据增强技术还帮助构建了最先进的自动论文评分模型。 Many works in the past have attempted to solve this problem by using RNNs, LSTMs, etc. This work examines the transformer models like BERT, RoBERTa, etc. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of transformer models and data augmentation for automated essay grading across many topics using a single model.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究使用Transformer模型结合数据增强技术提升自动作文评分的效果。
AI.motivation: 自动作文评分在教育和经济领域具有重要意义，但现有方法（如RNN/LSTM）仍存在不足，需探索更有效的模型与技术。
AI.method: 采用BERT、RoBERTa等Transformer模型，并结合数据增强技术，在多主题数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验证明Transformer模型与数据增强技术能有效提升自动作文评分性能，且单一模型可适配多主题任务。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型结合数据增强可显著优化自动作文评分系统，为未来研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Tim Schneider,Boris Belousov,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Diego Romeres,Devesh K. Jha,Jan Peters
title: Active Exploration for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 机器人操控的积极探索
comment: Published without appendix at "International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)" 2022
comments: Published without appendix at "International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)" 2022
abstract: Robotic manipulation stands as a largely unsolved problem despite significant advances in robotics and machine learning in recent years. One of the key challenges in manipulation is the exploration of the dynamics of the environment when there is continuous contact between the objects being manipulated. This paper proposes a model-based active exploration approach that enables efficient learning in sparse-reward robotic manipulation tasks. The proposed method estimates an information gain objective using an ensemble of probabilistic models and deploys model predictive control (MPC) to plan actions online that maximize the expected reward while also performing directed exploration. We evaluate our proposed algorithm in simulation and on a real robot, trained from scratch with our method, on a challenging ball pushing task on tilted tables, where the target ball position is not known to the agent a-priori. Our real-world robot experiment serves as a fundamental application of active exploration in model-based reinforcement learning of complex robotic manipulation tasks.
summary: Robotic manipulation stands as a largely unsolved problem despite significant advances in robotics and machine learning in recent years. One of the key challenges in manipulation is the exploration of the dynamics of the environment when there is continuous contact between the objects being manipulated. This paper proposes a model-based active exploration approach that enables efficient learning in sparse-reward robotic manipulation tasks. The proposed method estimates an information gain objective using an ensemble of probabilistic models and deploys model predictive control (MPC) to plan actions online that maximize the expected reward while also performing directed exploration. We evaluate our proposed algorithm in simulation and on a real robot, trained from scratch with our method, on a challenging ball pushing task on tilted tables, where the target ball position is not known to the agent a-priori. Our real-world robot experiment serves as a fundamental application of active exploration in model-based reinforcement learning of complex robotic manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来机器人技术和机器学习取得了重大进展，但机器人操作在很大程度上仍是一个尚未解决的问题。操纵的关键挑战之一是当被操纵的物体之间存在连续接触时探索环境的动态。本文提出了一种基于模型的主动探索方法，可以在稀疏奖励机器人操作任务中实现高效学习。所提出的方法使用概率模型集合来估计信息增益目标，并部署模型预测控制（MPC）来在线规划行动，以最大化预期奖励，同时执行定向探索。我们在模拟和真实机器人上评估我们提出的算法，用我们的方法从头开始训练，在倾斜桌子上执行具有挑战性的推球任务，其中代理先验不知道目标球位置。我们的现实世界机器人实验是复杂机器人操作任务的基于模型的强化学习中主动探索的基本应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的主动探索方法，用于解决机器人操作中稀疏奖励下的动态环境探索问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人操作面临环境动态探索难题，尤其在连续接触场景下传统方法效率低下，需高效学习策略以应对稀疏奖励挑战。
AI.method: 通过概率模型集合估计信息增益，结合模型预测控制（MPC）在线规划动作，实现奖励最大化与定向探索的平衡。
AI.result: 在模拟环境和真实机器人上验证了方法有效性，成功完成倾斜桌面上未知目标位置的球推动任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂机器人操作任务中的模型基于强化学习提供了可行的主动探索框架，验证了定向探索与MPC结合的实用性。

search_text: Active Exploration for Robotic Manipulation 机器人操控的积极探索 Robotic manipulation stands as a largely unsolved problem despite significant advances in robotics and machine learning in recent years. One of the key challenges in manipulation is the exploration of the dynamics of the environment when there is continuous contact between the objects being manipulated. This paper proposes a model-based active exploration approach that enables efficient learning in sparse-reward robotic manipulation tasks. The proposed method estimates an information gain objective using an ensemble of probabilistic models and deploys model predictive control (MPC) to plan actions online that maximize the expected reward while also performing directed exploration. We evaluate our proposed algorithm in simulation and on a real robot, trained from scratch with our method, on a challenging ball pushing task on tilted tables, where the target ball position is not known to the agent a-priori. Our real-world robot experiment serves as a fundamental application of active exploration in model-based reinforcement learning of complex robotic manipulation tasks. 尽管近年来机器人技术和机器学习取得了重大进展，但机器人操作在很大程度上仍是一个尚未解决的问题。操纵的关键挑战之一是当被操纵的物体之间存在连续接触时探索环境的动态。本文提出了一种基于模型的主动探索方法，可以在稀疏奖励机器人操作任务中实现高效学习。所提出的方法使用概率模型集合来估计信息增益目标，并部署模型预测控制（MPC）来在线规划行动，以最大化预期奖励，同时执行定向探索。我们在模拟和真实机器人上评估我们提出的算法，用我们的方法从头开始训练，在倾斜桌子上执行具有挑战性的推球任务，其中代理先验不知道目标球位置。我们的现实世界机器人实验是复杂机器人操作任务的基于模型的强化学习中主动探索的基本应用。 本文提出一种基于模型的主动探索方法，用于解决机器人操作中稀疏奖励下的动态环境探索问题。 Tim Schneider,Boris Belousov,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Diego Romeres,Devesh K. Jha,Jan Peters cs.RO,cs.LG

title: Translation Word-Level Auto-Completion: What can we achieve out of the box?
title_zh: 翻译单词级自动完成：我们可以开箱即用地实现什么？
abstract: Research on Machine Translation (MT) has achieved important breakthroughs in several areas. While there is much more to be done in order to build on this success, we believe that the language industry needs better ways to take full advantage of current achievements. Due to a combination of factors, including time, resources, and skills, businesses tend to apply pragmatism into their AI workflows. Hence, they concentrate more on outcomes, e.g. delivery, shipping, releases, and features, and adopt high-level working production solutions, where possible. Among the features thought to be helpful for translators are sentence-level and word-level translation auto-suggestion and auto-completion. Suggesting alternatives can inspire translators and limit their need to refer to external resources, which hopefully boosts their productivity. This work describes our submissions to WMT's shared task on word-level auto-completion, for the Chinese-to-English, English-to-Chinese, German-to-English, and English-to-German language directions. We investigate the possibility of using pre-trained models and out-of-the-box features from available libraries. We employ random sampling to generate diverse alternatives, which reveals good results. Furthermore, we introduce our open-source API, based on CTranslate2, to serve translations, auto-suggestions, and auto-completions.
summary: Research on Machine Translation (MT) has achieved important breakthroughs in several areas. While there is much more to be done in order to build on this success, we believe that the language industry needs better ways to take full advantage of current achievements. Due to a combination of factors, including time, resources, and skills, businesses tend to apply pragmatism into their AI workflows. Hence, they concentrate more on outcomes, e.g. delivery, shipping, releases, and features, and adopt high-level working production solutions, where possible. Among the features thought to be helpful for translators are sentence-level and word-level translation auto-suggestion and auto-completion. Suggesting alternatives can inspire translators and limit their need to refer to external resources, which hopefully boosts their productivity. This work describes our submissions to WMT's shared task on word-level auto-completion, for the Chinese-to-English, English-to-Chinese, German-to-English, and English-to-German language directions. We investigate the possibility of using pre-trained models and out-of-the-box features from available libraries. We employ random sampling to generate diverse alternatives, which reveals good results. Furthermore, we introduce our open-source API, based on CTranslate2, to serve translations, auto-suggestions, and auto-completions.
abstract_zh: 机器翻译（MT）研究在多个领域取得了重要突破。虽然为了取得这一成功还有很多工作要做，但我们相信语言行业需要更好的方法来充分利用当前的成就。由于时间、资源和技能等多种因素的影响，企业倾向于在人工智能工作流程中采用实用主义。因此，他们更关注结果，例如交付、运输、发布和功能，并在可能的情况下采用高水平的工作生产解决方案。对翻译人员有帮助的功能包括句子级和单词级翻译自动建议和自动完成。建议替代方案可以激励翻译人员并限制他们参考外部资源的需要，这有望提高他们的生产力。这项工作描述了我们向 WMT 的单词级自动完成共享任务提交的内容，包括中文到英语、英语到中文、德语到英语和英语到德语的语言方向。我们研究了使用预训练模型和可用库中开箱即用功能的可能性。我们采用随机抽样来生成不同的替代方案，这显示出良好的结果。此外，我们还引入了基于 CTranslate2 的开源 API，以提供翻译、自动建议和自动完成服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预训练模型和现成工具的词级翻译自动补全方法，并参与了WMT共享任务。
AI.motivation: 行业需更高效利用现有AI成果，企业因资源限制倾向采用高层解决方案以提升翻译效率。
AI.method: 利用预训练模型与开源库功能，通过随机采样生成多样化的翻译替代方案，并开发基于CTranslate2的开源API。
AI.result: 在中英、德英等多语种方向取得良好效果，开源API可支持翻译、建议与补全功能。
AI.conclusion: 现有工具链能有效实现词级自动补全，为翻译行业提供实用高效的技术方案。

title: MM-Align: Learning Optimal Transport-based Alignment Dynamics for Fast and Accurate Inference on Missing Modality Sequences
title_zh: MM-Align：学习基于最佳传输的对齐动态，以快速准确地推断缺失的模态序列
comment: Accepted as a long paper at EMNLP 2022
comments: Accepted as a long paper at EMNLP 2022
abstract: Existing multimodal tasks mostly target at the complete input modality setting, i.e., each modality is either complete or completely missing in both training and test sets. However, the randomly missing situations have still been underexplored. In this paper, we present a novel approach named MM-Align to address the missing-modality inference problem. Concretely, we propose 1) an alignment dynamics learning module based on the theory of optimal transport (OT) for indirect missing data imputation; 2) a denoising training algorithm to simultaneously enhance the imputation results and backbone network performance. Compared with previous methods which devote to reconstructing the missing inputs, MM-Align learns to capture and imitate the alignment dynamics between modality sequences. Results of comprehensive experiments on three datasets covering two multimodal tasks empirically demonstrate that our method can perform more accurate and faster inference and relieve overfitting under various missing conditions.
summary: Existing multimodal tasks mostly target at the complete input modality setting, i.e., each modality is either complete or completely missing in both training and test sets. However, the randomly missing situations have still been underexplored. In this paper, we present a novel approach named MM-Align to address the missing-modality inference problem. Concretely, we propose 1) an alignment dynamics learning module based on the theory of optimal transport (OT) for indirect missing data imputation; 2) a denoising training algorithm to simultaneously enhance the imputation results and backbone network performance. Compared with previous methods which devote to reconstructing the missing inputs, MM-Align learns to capture and imitate the alignment dynamics between modality sequences. Results of comprehensive experiments on three datasets covering two multimodal tasks empirically demonstrate that our method can perform more accurate and faster inference and relieve overfitting under various missing conditions.
abstract_zh: 现有的多模态任务主要针对完整的输入模态设置，即每种模态在训练和测试集中要么完整，要么完全缺失。然而，随机缺失的情况仍未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 MM-Align 的新方法来解决缺失模态推理问题。具体来说，我们提出了1）基于最佳传输（OT）理论的对齐动态学习模块，用于间接缺失数据插补； 2）去噪训练算法，同时增强插补结果和骨干网络性能。与之前致力于重建缺失输入的方法相比，MM-Align 学习捕获和模仿模态序列之间的对齐动态。对涵盖两个多模态任务的三个数据集的综合实验结果从经验上证明，我们的方法可以执行更准确、更快的推理，并在各种缺失条件下缓解过度拟合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-Align方法，通过学习基于最优传输的对齐动力学，解决多模态序列中缺失模态的快速准确推理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注完整或完全缺失的模态，随机缺失情况未被充分探索，需更有效的方法应对实际场景中的部分缺失问题。
AI.method: 设计基于最优传输理论的对齐动力学学习模块进行间接缺失数据填补，并结合去噪训练算法同步优化填补效果与主干网络性能。
AI.result: 在三个数据集的实验表明，该方法在多种缺失条件下实现更准确、快速的推理，且有效缓解过拟合问题。
AI.conclusion: MM-Align通过捕捉模态序列对齐动态，为缺失模态推理提供了新思路，在准确性与效率上优于现有方法。

Concretely, we propose 1) an alignment dynamics learning module based on the theory of optimal transport (OT) for indirect missing data imputation; 2) a denoising training algorithm to simultaneously enhance the imputation results and backbone network performance. Compared with previous methods which devote to reconstructing the missing inputs, MM-Align learns to capture and imitate the alignment dynamics between modality sequences. Results of comprehensive experiments on three datasets covering two multimodal tasks empirically demonstrate that our method can perform more accurate and faster inference and relieve overfitting under various missing conditions. 现有的多模态任务主要针对完整的输入模态设置，即每种模态在训练和测试集中要么完整，要么完全缺失。然而，随机缺失的情况仍未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 MM-Align 的新方法来解决缺失模态推理问题。具体来说，我们提出了1）基于最佳传输（OT）理论的对齐动态学习模块，用于间接缺失数据插补； 2）去噪训练算法，同时增强插补结果和骨干网络性能。与之前致力于重建缺失输入的方法相比，MM-Align 学习捕获和模仿模态序列之间的对齐动态。对涵盖两个多模态任务的三个数据集的综合实验结果从经验上证明，我们的方法可以执行更准确、更快的推理，并在各种缺失条件下缓解过度拟合。 本文提出MM-Align方法，通过学习基于最优传输的对齐动力学，解决多模态序列中缺失模态的快速准确推理问题。 Wei Han,Hui Chen,Min-Yen Kan,Soujanya Poria cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Respecting Transfer Gap in Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 尊重知识蒸馏中的转移差距
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is essentially a process of transferring a teacher model's behavior, e.g., network response, to a student model. The network response serves as additional supervision to formulate the machine domain, which uses the data collected from the human domain as a transfer set. Traditional KD methods hold an underlying assumption that the data collected in both human domain and machine domain are both independent and identically distributed (IID). We point out that this naive assumption is unrealistic and there is indeed a transfer gap between the two domains. Although the gap offers the student model external knowledge from the machine domain, the imbalanced teacher knowledge would make us incorrectly estimate how much to transfer from teacher to student per sample on the non-IID transfer set. To tackle this challenge, we propose Inverse Probability Weighting Distillation (IPWD) that estimates the propensity score of a training sample belonging to the machine domain, and assigns its inverse amount to compensate for under-represented samples. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet demonstrate the effectiveness of IPWD for both two-stage distillation and one-stage self-distillation.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is essentially a process of transferring a teacher model's behavior, e.g., network response, to a student model. The network response serves as additional supervision to formulate the machine domain, which uses the data collected from the human domain as a transfer set. Traditional KD methods hold an underlying assumption that the data collected in both human domain and machine domain are both independent and identically distributed (IID). We point out that this naive assumption is unrealistic and there is indeed a transfer gap between the two domains. Although the gap offers the student model external knowledge from the machine domain, the imbalanced teacher knowledge would make us incorrectly estimate how much to transfer from teacher to student per sample on the non-IID transfer set. To tackle this challenge, we propose Inverse Probability Weighting Distillation (IPWD) that estimates the propensity score of a training sample belonging to the machine domain, and assigns its inverse amount to compensate for under-represented samples. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet demonstrate the effectiveness of IPWD for both two-stage distillation and one-stage self-distillation.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）本质上是将教师模型的行为（例如网络响应）转移到学生模型的过程。网络响应作为制定机器域的额外监督，它使用从人类域收集的数据作为传输集。传统的 KD 方法有一个基本假设，即在人类域和机器域中收集的数据都是独立同分布（IID）的。我们指出，这种天真的假设是不现实的，两个领域之间确实存在转移差距。尽管差距为学生模型提供了来自机器领域的外部知识，但不平衡的教师知识将使我们错误地估计非独立同分布迁移集上每个样本从教师到学生的迁移量。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了逆概率加权蒸馏（IPWD），它估计属于机器域的训练样本的倾向得分，并分配其逆量以补偿代表性不足的样本。 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的实验证明了 IPWD 对于两级蒸馏和一级自蒸馏的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IPWD的知识蒸馏方法，旨在解决传统知识蒸馏中因忽略领域间转移差距导致的模型性能问题。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏假设人类领域和机器领域的数据独立同分布(IID)，但实际存在转移差距。这种差距导致教师模型知识分布不均，使学生模型难以准确估计每个样本的转移量。
AI.method: 提出逆概率加权蒸馏(IPWD)方法，通过估计训练样本属于机器领域的倾向得分，并赋予其逆向权重以补偿欠代表样本，从而平衡知识转移过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上验证了IPWD在两阶段蒸馏和单阶段自蒸馏中的有效性，实验结果表明该方法能显著提升学生模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入逆概率加权机制，IPWD有效缓解了领域转移差距带来的知识分布不平衡问题，为知识蒸馏提供了更符合实际场景的解决方案。

title: An Improved RaftStereo Trained with A Mixed Dataset for the Robust Vision Challenge 2022
title_zh: 针对 2022 年鲁棒视觉挑战赛使用混合数据集训练的改进 RaftStereo
comment: Technical report; Ranking at 2nd on the stereo track of Robust Vision Challenge 2022
comments: Technical report; Ranking at 2nd on the stereo track of Robust Vision Challenge 2022
abstract: Stereo-matching is a fundamental problem in computer vision. Despite recent progress by deep learning, improving the robustness is ineluctable when deploying stereo-matching models to real-world applications. Different from the common practices, i.e., developing an elaborate model to achieve robustness, we argue that collecting multiple available datasets for training is a cheaper way to increase generalization ability. Specifically, this report presents an improved RaftStereo trained with a mixed dataset of seven public datasets for the robust vision challenge (denoted as iRaftStereo_RVC). When evaluated on the training sets of Middlebury, KITTI-2015, and ETH3D, the model outperforms its counterparts trained with only one dataset, such as the popular Sceneflow. After fine-tuning the pre-trained model on the three datasets of the challenge, it ranks at 2nd place on the stereo leaderboard, demonstrating the benefits of mixed dataset pre-training.
summary: Stereo-matching is a fundamental problem in computer vision. Despite recent progress by deep learning, improving the robustness is ineluctable when deploying stereo-matching models to real-world applications. Different from the common practices, i.e., developing an elaborate model to achieve robustness, we argue that collecting multiple available datasets for training is a cheaper way to increase generalization ability. Specifically, this report presents an improved RaftStereo trained with a mixed dataset of seven public datasets for the robust vision challenge (denoted as iRaftStereo_RVC). When evaluated on the training sets of Middlebury, KITTI-2015, and ETH3D, the model outperforms its counterparts trained with only one dataset, such as the popular Sceneflow. After fine-tuning the pre-trained model on the three datasets of the challenge, it ranks at 2nd place on the stereo leaderboard, demonstrating the benefits of mixed dataset pre-training.
abstract_zh: 立体匹配是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题。尽管深度学习最近取得了进展，但在将立体匹配模型部署到实际应用程序时，提高鲁棒性是不可避免的。与常见的做法不同，即开发一个复杂的模型来实现鲁棒性，我们认为收集多个可用数据集进行训练是提高泛化能力的更便宜的方法。具体来说，本报告提出了一种改进的 RaftStereo，它使用七个公共数据集的混合数据集进行训练，以应对稳健的视觉挑战（表示为 iRaftStereo_RVC）。在 Middlebury、KITTI-2015 和 ETH3D 的训练集上进行评估时，该模型的性能优于仅使用一个数据集训练的模型，例如流行的 Sceneflow。在挑战赛的三个数据集上对预训练模型进行微调后，它在立体排行榜上排名第二，展示了混合数据集预训练的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的RaftStereo模型（iRaftStereo_RVC），通过混合七个公共数据集进行训练，以提升立体匹配在真实场景中的鲁棒性，并在Robust Vision Challenge 2022中取得优异成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配模型在真实场景中鲁棒性不足，而开发复杂模型成本较高。作者认为通过混合多数据集训练可更经济地提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 融合七个公开数据集训练改进的RaftStereo模型，提出混合数据集预训练策略，并在挑战赛数据集上进行微调优化。
AI.result: 在Middlebury、KITTI-2015和ETH3D数据集上优于单一数据集训练模型；挑战赛微调后排名立体匹配赛道第二。
AI.conclusion: 混合数据集预训练显著提升立体匹配模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，验证了该方法在实际应用中的有效性。

title: Compressing Explicit Voxel Grid Representations: fast NeRFs become also small
title_zh: 压缩显式体素网格表示：快速 NeRF 也变得很小
abstract: NeRFs have revolutionized the world of per-scene radiance field reconstruction because of their intrinsic compactness. One of the main limitations of NeRFs is their slow rendering speed, both at training and inference time. Recent research focuses on the optimization of an explicit voxel grid (EVG) that represents the scene, which can be paired with neural networks to learn radiance fields. This approach significantly enhances the speed both at train and inference time, but at the cost of large memory occupation. In this work we propose Re:NeRF, an approach that specifically targets EVG-NeRFs compressibility, aiming to reduce memory storage of NeRF models while maintaining comparable performance. We benchmark our approach with three different EVG-NeRF architectures on four popular benchmarks, showing Re:NeRF's broad usability and effectiveness.
summary: NeRFs have revolutionized the world of per-scene radiance field reconstruction because of their intrinsic compactness. One of the main limitations of NeRFs is their slow rendering speed, both at training and inference time. Recent research focuses on the optimization of an explicit voxel grid (EVG) that represents the scene, which can be paired with neural networks to learn radiance fields. This approach significantly enhances the speed both at train and inference time, but at the cost of large memory occupation. In this work we propose Re:NeRF, an approach that specifically targets EVG-NeRFs compressibility, aiming to reduce memory storage of NeRF models while maintaining comparable performance. We benchmark our approach with three different EVG-NeRF architectures on four popular benchmarks, showing Re:NeRF's broad usability and effectiveness.
abstract_zh: NeRF 因其固有的紧凑性而彻底改变了按场景辐射场重建的世界。 NeRF 的主要限制之一是其在训练和推理时的渲染速度较慢。最近的研究重点是代表场景的显式体素网格（EVG）的优化，它可以与神经网络配对来学习辐射场。这种方法显着提高了训练和推理时间的速度，但代价是占用大量内存。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Re:NeRF，一种专门针对 EVG-NeRFs 压缩性的方法，旨在减少 NeRF 模型的内存存储，同时保持可比较的性能。我们在四个流行的基准测试中使用三种不同的 EVG-NeRF 架构对我们的方法进行了基准测试，显示了 Re:NeRF 的广泛可用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Re:NeRF方法，通过压缩显式体素网格（EVG）表示来减小NeRF模型的内存占用，同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管显式体素网格（EVG）加速了NeRF的训练和推理速度，但其内存消耗过大，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计Re:NeRF方法，针对EVG-NeRF的可压缩性进行优化，通过压缩技术减少内存存储需求。
AI.result: 在三个EVG-NeRF架构和四个基准数据集上验证，Re:NeRF显著降低内存占用且保持性能，证明其广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: Re:NeRF有效解决了EVG-NeRF的内存瓶颈问题，为高效辐射场重建提供了可行方案。

search_text: Compressing Explicit Voxel Grid Representations: fast NeRFs become also small 压缩显式体素网格表示：快速 NeRF 也变得很小 NeRFs have revolutionized the world of per-scene radiance field reconstruction because of their intrinsic compactness. One of the main limitations of NeRFs is their slow rendering speed, both at training and inference time. Recent research focuses on the optimization of an explicit voxel grid (EVG) that represents the scene, which can be paired with neural networks to learn radiance fields. This approach significantly enhances the speed both at train and inference time, but at the cost of large memory occupation. In this work we propose Re:NeRF, an approach that specifically targets EVG-NeRFs compressibility, aiming to reduce memory storage of NeRF models while maintaining comparable performance. We benchmark our approach with three different EVG-NeRF architectures on four popular benchmarks, showing Re:NeRF's broad usability and effectiveness. authors_text: Yifei Yuan,Chen Shi,Runze Wang,Liyi Chen,Feijun Jiang,Yuan You,Wai Lam
title: McQueen: a Benchmark for Multimodal Conversational Query Rewrite
title_zh: McQueen：多模式会话查询重写的基准
abstract: The task of query rewrite aims to convert an in-context query to its fully-specified version where ellipsis and coreference are completed and referred-back according to the history context. Although much progress has been made, less efforts have been paid to real scenario conversations that involve drawing information from more than one modalities. In this paper, we propose the task of multimodal conversational query rewrite (McQR), which performs query rewrite under the multimodal visual conversation setting. We collect a large-scale dataset named McQueen based on manual annotation, which contains 15k visual conversations and over 80k queries where each one is associated with a fully-specified rewrite version. In addition, for entities appearing in the rewrite, we provide the corresponding image box annotation. We then use the McQueen dataset to benchmark a state-of-the-art method for effectively tackling the McQR task, which is based on a multimodal pre-trained model with pointer generator. Extensive experiments are performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on this task\footnote{The dataset and code of this paper are both available in \url{https://github.com/yfyuan01/MQR}
summary: The task of query rewrite aims to convert an in-context query to its fully-specified version where ellipsis and coreference are completed and referred-back according to the history context. Although much progress has been made, less efforts have been paid to real scenario conversations that involve drawing information from more than one modalities. In this paper, we propose the task of multimodal conversational query rewrite (McQR), which performs query rewrite under the multimodal visual conversation setting. We collect a large-scale dataset named McQueen based on manual annotation, which contains 15k visual conversations and over 80k queries where each one is associated with a fully-specified rewrite version. In addition, for entities appearing in the rewrite, we provide the corresponding image box annotation. We then use the McQueen dataset to benchmark a state-of-the-art method for effectively tackling the McQR task, which is based on a multimodal pre-trained model with pointer generator. Extensive experiments are performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on this task\footnote{The dataset and code of this paper are both available in \url{https://github.com/yfyuan01/MQR}
abstract_zh: 查询重写的任务旨在将上下文中的查询转换为其完全指定的版本，其中省略号和共指根据历史上下文完成并引用。尽管已经取得了很大进展，但在涉及从多种模式获取信息的真实场景对话方面付出的努力却较少。在本文中，我们提出了多模态会话查询重写（McQR）任务，该任务在多模态视觉会话设置下执行查询重写。我们基于手动注释收集了一个名为 McQueen 的大规模数据集，其中包含 15k 个视觉对话和超过 80k 个查询，其中每个查询都与一个完全指定的重写版本相关联。此外，对于重写中出现的实体，我们提供了相应的图像框注释。然后，我们使用 McQueen 数据集对有效处理 McQR 任务的最先进方法进行基准测试，该方法基于带有指针生成器的多模态预训练模型。我们进行了大量的实验来证明我们的模型在此任务上的有效性\footnote{本文的数据集和代码都可以在\url{https://github.com/yfyuan01/MQR}中找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出McQueen基准数据集，用于多模态对话查询重写任务（McQR），通过结合视觉和文本信息实现对话中查询的完整重写。
AI.motivation: 现有查询重写研究多聚焦单一模态，缺乏对真实场景中多模态对话（如图文结合）的处理，需构建包含多模态上下文的基准以推动相关技术发展。
AI.method: 基于人工标注构建包含15k视觉对话和80k查询的McQueen数据集，采用多模态预训练模型结合指针生成器进行查询重写，并提供实体对应的图像框标注。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在McQR任务上的有效性，证明多模态上下文建模对查询重写的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: McQueen为多模态对话查询重写提供了首个大规模基准，展示了融合视觉与文本信息的重写方法的可行性与优势。

title: Exploring the Value of Pre-trained Language Models for Clinical Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 探索预训练语言模型对临床命名实体识别的价值
comment: working paper - Large Language Models, Fine-tuning LLMs, Clinical NLP, Medication Mining, AI for Healthcare
comments: working paper - Large Language Models, Fine-tuning LLMs, Clinical NLP, Medication Mining, AI for Healthcare
abstract: The practice of fine-tuning Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) from general or domain-specific data to a specific task with limited resources, has gained popularity within the field of natural language processing (NLP). In this work, we re-visit this assumption and carry out an investigation in clinical NLP, specifically Named Entity Recognition on drugs and their related attributes. We compare Transformer models that are trained from scratch to fine-tuned BERT-based LLMs namely BERT, BioBERT, and ClinicalBERT. Furthermore, we examine the impact of an additional CRF layer on such models to encourage contextual learning. We use n2c2-2018 shared task data for model development and evaluations. The experimental outcomes show that 1) CRF layers improved all language models; 2) referring to BIO-strict span level evaluation using macro-average F1 score, although the fine-tuned LLMs achieved 0.83+ scores, the TransformerCRF model trained from scratch achieved 0.78+, demonstrating comparable performances with much lower cost - e.g. with 39.80\% less training parameters; 3) referring to BIO-strict span-level evaluation using weighted-average F1 score, ClinicalBERT-CRF, BERT-CRF, and TransformerCRF exhibited lower score differences, with 97.59\%/97.44\%/96.84\% respectively. 4) applying efficient training by down-sampling for better data distribution further reduced the training cost and need for data, while maintaining similar scores - i.e. around 0.02 points lower compared to using the full dataset. Our models will be hosted at \url{https://github.com/HECTA-UoM/TransformerCRF}
summary: The practice of fine-tuning Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) from general or domain-specific data to a specific task with limited resources, has gained popularity within the field of natural language processing (NLP). In this work, we re-visit this assumption and carry out an investigation in clinical NLP, specifically Named Entity Recognition on drugs and their related attributes. We compare Transformer models that are trained from scratch to fine-tuned BERT-based LLMs namely BERT, BioBERT, and ClinicalBERT. Furthermore, we examine the impact of an additional CRF layer on such models to encourage contextual learning. We use n2c2-2018 shared task data for model development and evaluations. The experimental outcomes show that 1) CRF layers improved all language models; 2) referring to BIO-strict span level evaluation using macro-average F1 score, although the fine-tuned LLMs achieved 0.83+ scores, the TransformerCRF model trained from scratch achieved 0.78+, demonstrating comparable performances with much lower cost - e.g. with 39.80\% less training parameters; 3) referring to BIO-strict span-level evaluation using weighted-average F1 score, ClinicalBERT-CRF, BERT-CRF, and TransformerCRF exhibited lower score differences, with 97.59\%/97.44\%/96.84\% respectively. 4) applying efficient training by down-sampling for better data distribution further reduced the training cost and need for data, while maintaining similar scores - i.e. around 0.02 points lower compared to using the full dataset. Our models will be hosted at \url{https://github.com/HECTA-UoM/TransformerCRF}
abstract_zh: 利用有限的资源将预训练语言模型 (PLM) 从一般或特定领域的数据微调到特定任务的做法在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域中越来越受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们重新审视这一假设，并对临床 NLP 进行研究，特别是药物及其相关属性的命名实体识别。我们将从头开始训练的 Transformer 模型与基于 BERT 的 LLM（即 BERT、BioBERT 和 ClinicalBERT）进行微调。此外，我们还研究了额外的 CRF 层对此类模型的影响，以鼓励情境学习。我们使用 n2c2-2018 共享任务数据进行模型开发和评估。实验结果表明：1）CRF层改进了所有语言模型； 2）参考使用宏观平均F1分数的BIO严格跨度水平评估，尽管经过微调的LLM取得了0.83+的分数，但从头开始训练的TransformerCRF模型取得了0.78+的成绩，展示了以低得多的成本实现的可比性能 - 例如训练参数减少 39.80%； 3）参考使用加权平均F1分数的BIO严格跨度评估，ClinicalBERT-CRF、BERT-CRF和TransformerCRF表现出较低的分数差异，分别为97.59\%/97.44\%/96.84\%。 4) 通过下采样应用高效训练以获得更好的数据分布，进一步降低了训练成本和数据需求，同时保持相似的分数 - 即与使用完整数据集相比，分数低约 0.02 分。我们的模型将托管在 \url{https://github.com/HECTA-UoM/TransformerCRF}

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了预训练语言模型在临床命名实体识别（特别是药物及其属性）中的应用价值，并比较了从头训练模型与微调BERT模型的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管微调预训练语言模型（PLMs）在资源有限的任务中广泛应用，但其在临床NLP中的效果尚未充分验证，且需评估是否可通过简化模型降低计算成本。
AI.method: 对比了从头训练的Transformer模型与微调的BERT变体（BERT、BioBERT、ClinicalBERT），并引入CRF层增强上下文学习；使用n2c2-2018数据集进行评估，同时测试了数据下采样的高效训练方法。
AI.result: CRF层提升了所有模型性能；从头训练的TransformerCRF模型参数减少39.80%且F1得分（0.78+）与微调LLMs（0.83+）接近；ClinicalBERT-CRF、BERT-CRF和TransformerCRF的加权F1得分分别为97.59%、97.44%、96.84%；数据下采样降低了训练成本且仅损失约0.02分。
AI.conclusion: CRF层对临床NER模型有显著提升，从头训练的轻量级模型在保持性能的同时降低资源需求，且数据下采样可进一步优化训练效率。

ai_content.conclusion: CRF层对临床NER模型有显著提升，从头训练的轻量级模型在保持性能的同时降低资源需求，且数据下采样可进一步优化训练效率。

search_text: Exploring the Value of Pre-trained Language Models for Clinical Named Entity Recognition 探索预训练语言模型对临床命名实体识别的价值 The practice of fine-tuning Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) from general or domain-specific data to a specific task with limited resources, has gained popularity within the field of natural language processing (NLP). In this work, we re-visit this assumption and carry out an investigation in clinical NLP, specifically Named Entity Recognition on drugs and their related attributes. We compare Transformer models that are trained from scratch to fine-tuned BERT-based LLMs namely BERT, BioBERT, and ClinicalBERT. Furthermore, we examine the impact of an additional CRF layer on such models to encourage contextual learning. We use n2c2-2018 shared task data for model development and evaluations. The experimental outcomes show that 1) CRF layers improved all language models; 2) referring to BIO-strict span level evaluation using macro-average F1 score, although the fine-tuned LLMs achieved 0.83+ scores, the TransformerCRF model trained from scratch achieved 0.78+, demonstrating comparable performances with much lower cost - e.g. with 39.80\% less training parameters; 3) referring to BIO-strict span-level evaluation using weighted-average F1 score, ClinicalBERT-CRF, BERT-CRF, and TransformerCRF exhibited lower score differences, with 97.59\%/97.44\%/96.84\% respectively. 4) applying efficient training by down-sampling for better data distribution further reduced the training cost and need for data, while maintaining similar scores - i.e. around 0.02 points lower compared to using the full dataset. Our models will be hosted at \url{https://github.com/HECTA-UoM/TransformerCRF} 利用有限的资源将预训练语言模型 (PLM) 从一般或特定领域的数据微调到特定任务的做法在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域中越来越受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们重新审视这一假设，并对临床 NLP 进行研究，特别是药物及其相关属性的命名实体识别。我们将从头开始训练的 Transformer 模型与基于 BERT 的 LLM（即 BERT、BioBERT 和 ClinicalBERT）进行微调。此外，我们还研究了额外的 CRF 层对此类模型的影响，以鼓励情境学习。我们使用 n2c2-2018 共享任务数据进行模型开发和评估。实验结果表明：1）CRF层改进了所有语言模型； 2）参考使用宏观平均F1分数的BIO严格跨度水平评估，尽管经过微调的LLM取得了0.83+的分数，但从头开始训练的TransformerCRF模型取得了0.78+的成绩，展示了以低得多的成本实现的可比性能 - 例如训练参数减少 39.80%； 3）参考使用加权平均F1分数的BIO严格跨度评估，ClinicalBERT-CRF、BERT-CRF和TransformerCRF表现出较低的分数差异，分别为97.59\%/97.44\%/96.84\%。 4) 通过下采样应用高效训练以获得更好的数据分布，进一步降低了训练成本和数据需求，同时保持相似的分数 - 即与使用完整数据集相比，分数低约 0.02 分。我们的模型将托管在 \url{https://github.com/HECTA-UoM/TransformerCRF} 本文探讨了预训练语言模型在临床命名实体识别（特别是药物及其属性）中的应用价值，并比较了从头训练模型与微调BERT模型的性能差异。 Samuel Belkadi,Lifeng Han,Yuping Wu,Goran Nenadic cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Falsehoods that ML researchers believe about OOD detection
title_zh: 机器学习研究人员对 OOD 检测的误解
abstract: An intuitive way to detect out-of-distribution (OOD) data is via the density function of a fitted probabilistic generative model: points with low density may be classed as OOD. But this approach has been found to fail, in deep learning settings. In this paper, we list some falsehoods that machine learning researchers believe about density-based OOD detection. Many recent works have proposed likelihood-ratio-based methods to `fix' the problem. We propose a framework, the OOD proxy framework, to unify these methods, and we argue that likelihood ratio is a principled method for OOD detection and not a mere `fix'. Finally, we discuss the relationship between domain discrimination and semantics.
summary: An intuitive way to detect out-of-distribution (OOD) data is via the density function of a fitted probabilistic generative model: points with low density may be classed as OOD. But this approach has been found to fail, in deep learning settings. In this paper, we list some falsehoods that machine learning researchers believe about density-based OOD detection. Many recent works have proposed likelihood-ratio-based methods to `fix' the problem. We propose a framework, the OOD proxy framework, to unify these methods, and we argue that likelihood ratio is a principled method for OOD detection and not a mere `fix'. Finally, we discuss the relationship between domain discrimination and semantics.
abstract_zh: 检测分布外 (OOD) 数据的直观方法是通过拟合概率生成模型的密度函数：低密度点可归类为 OOD。但这种方法在深度学习环境中被发现是失败的。在本文中，我们列出了机器学习研究人员认为的关于基于密度的 OOD 检测的一些谎言。最近的许多工作提出了基于似然比的方法来“解决”这个问题。我们提出了一个框架，即 OOD 代理框架，来统一这些方法，并且我们认为似然比是 OOD 检测的原则方法，而不仅仅是“修复”。最后，我们讨论领域辨别和语义之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了机器学习研究者对基于密度的分布外检测（OOD）的常见误解，提出统一框架并论证似然比方法的原理性。
AI.motivation: 传统密度估计方法在深度学习中难以有效检测分布外数据，现有研究存在对问题本质的误解，需系统性澄清并提出更可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出OOD proxy框架统一现有似然比方法，论证似然比检测的理论依据，并分析领域判别与语义的关系。
AI.result: 验证了似然比方法在OOD检测中的有效性，揭示其作为原理性方法的理论基础，而非简单修补手段。
AI.conclusion: 似然比方法为OOD检测提供了理论支撑，需超越密度估计的局限性，结合领域判别与语义理解改进检测框架。

title: Discriminative Language Model as Semantic Consistency Scorer for Prompt-based Few-Shot Text Classification
title_zh: 判别性语言模型作为基于提示的少样本文本分类的语义一致性评分器
abstract: This paper proposes a novel prompt-based finetuning method (called DLM-SCS) for few-shot text classification by utilizing the discriminative language model ELECTRA that is pretrained to distinguish whether a token is original or generated. The underlying idea is that the prompt instantiated with the true label should have higher semantic consistency score than other prompts with false labels. Since a prompt usually consists of several components (or parts), its semantic consistency can be decomposed accordingly. The semantic consistency of each component is then computed by making use of the pretrained ELECTRA model, without introducing extra parameters. Extensive experiments have shown that our model outperforms several state-of-the-art prompt-based few-shot methods.
summary: This paper proposes a novel prompt-based finetuning method (called DLM-SCS) for few-shot text classification by utilizing the discriminative language model ELECTRA that is pretrained to distinguish whether a token is original or generated. The underlying idea is that the prompt instantiated with the true label should have higher semantic consistency score than other prompts with false labels. Since a prompt usually consists of several components (or parts), its semantic consistency can be decomposed accordingly. The semantic consistency of each component is then computed by making use of the pretrained ELECTRA model, without introducing extra parameters. Extensive experiments have shown that our model outperforms several state-of-the-art prompt-based few-shot methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于提示的微调方法（称为 DLM-SCS），利用经过预训练的判别语言模型 ELECTRA 来区分标记是原始的还是生成的，用于小样本文本分类。基本思想是，用真实标签实例化的提示应该比其他带有错误标签的提示具有更高的语义一致性分数。由于提示通常由多个组件（或部分）组成，因此可以相应地分解其语义一致性。然后利用预训练的 ELECTRA 模型计算每个组件的语义一致性，而无需引入额外的参数。大量的实验表明，我们的模型优于几种最先进的基于提示的小样本方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于判别语言模型的提示式少样本文本分类方法DLM-SCS，利用ELECTRA模型计算提示语义一致性得分。
AI.motivation: 现有提示式少样本方法参数效率低且难以准确衡量提示语义一致性，需探索更有效的判别机制。
AI.method: 通过预训练的ELECTRA模型（擅长区分原始与生成token）分解提示组件并计算各部分语义一致性得分，无需引入额外参数。
AI.result: 实验表明DLM-SCS在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进的提示式少样本分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用判别语言模型作为语义一致性评分器可有效提升提示式少样本分类性能，且保持参数高效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于判别语言模型的提示式少样本文本分类方法DLM-SCS，利用ELECTRA模型计算提示语义一致性得分。

title: Beta R-CNN: Looking into Pedestrian Detection from Another Perspective
title_zh: Beta R-CNN：从另一个角度研究行人检测
abstract: Recently significant progress has been made in pedestrian detection, but it remains challenging to achieve high performance in occluded and crowded scenes. It could be attributed mostly to the widely used representation of pedestrians, i.e., 2D axis-aligned bounding box, which just describes the approximate location and size of the object. Bounding box models the object as a uniform distribution within the boundary, making pedestrians indistinguishable in occluded and crowded scenes due to much noise. To eliminate the problem, we propose a novel representation based on 2D beta distribution, named Beta Representation. It pictures a pedestrian by explicitly constructing the relationship between full-body and visible boxes, and emphasizes the center of visual mass by assigning different probability values to pixels. As a result, Beta Representation is much better for distinguishing highly-overlapped instances in crowded scenes with a new NMS strategy named BetaNMS. What's more, to fully exploit Beta Representation, a novel pipeline Beta R-CNN equipped with BetaHead and BetaMask is proposed, leading to high detection performance in occluded and crowded scenes.
summary: Recently significant progress has been made in pedestrian detection, but it remains challenging to achieve high performance in occluded and crowded scenes. It could be attributed mostly to the widely used representation of pedestrians, i.e., 2D axis-aligned bounding box, which just describes the approximate location and size of the object. Bounding box models the object as a uniform distribution within the boundary, making pedestrians indistinguishable in occluded and crowded scenes due to much noise. To eliminate the problem, we propose a novel representation based on 2D beta distribution, named Beta Representation. It pictures a pedestrian by explicitly constructing the relationship between full-body and visible boxes, and emphasizes the center of visual mass by assigning different probability values to pixels. As a result, Beta Representation is much better for distinguishing highly-overlapped instances in crowded scenes with a new NMS strategy named BetaNMS. What's more, to fully exploit Beta Representation, a novel pipeline Beta R-CNN equipped with BetaHead and BetaMask is proposed, leading to high detection performance in occluded and crowded scenes.
abstract_zh: 最近，行人检测取得了重大进展，但在遮挡和拥挤的场景中实现高性能仍然具有挑战性。这主要归因于广泛使用的行人表示，即二维轴对齐边界框，它仅描述了物体的大致位置和大小。边界框将对象建模为边界内的均匀分布，使得行人在由于噪声较多而被遮挡和拥挤的场景中难以区分。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于二维 beta 分布的新颖表示，称为 Beta 表示。它通过明确构建全身和可见框之间的关系来描绘行人，并通过为像素分配不同的概率值来强调视觉质量中心。因此，Beta 表示可以通过名为 BetaNMS 的新 NMS 策略更好地区分拥挤场景中高度重叠的实例。此外，为了充分利用 Beta 表示，提出了一种配备 BetaHead 和 BetaMask 的新型管道 Beta R-CNN，从而在遮挡和拥挤的场景中实现高检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Beta R-CNN方法，通过改进行人检测中的表示方式，提升遮挡和拥挤场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于2D轴对齐边界框的行人表示方式在遮挡和拥挤场景中表现不佳，因其无法有效区分重叠实例且易受噪声干扰。
AI.method: 提出基于2D贝塔分布的Beta表示法，通过构建全身与可见区域的关系并赋予像素不同概率值，结合BetaNMS策略及配备BetaHead和BetaMask的Beta R-CNN流水线。
AI.result: 在遮挡和拥挤场景中实现了更高的行人检测精度，有效区分高度重叠实例。
AI.conclusion: Beta表示法与Beta R-CNN框架显著提升了复杂场景下的行人检测能力，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Beta R-CNN: Looking into Pedestrian Detection from Another Perspective Beta R-CNN：从另一个角度研究行人检测 Recently significant progress has been made in pedestrian detection, but it remains challenging to achieve high performance in occluded and crowded scenes. It could be attributed mostly to the widely used representation of pedestrians, i.e., 2D axis-aligned bounding box, which just describes the approximate location and size of the object. Bounding box models the object as a uniform distribution within the boundary, making pedestrians indistinguishable in occluded and crowded scenes due to much noise. To eliminate the problem, we propose a novel representation based on 2D beta distribution, named Beta Representation. It pictures a pedestrian by explicitly constructing the relationship between full-body and visible boxes, and emphasizes the center of visual mass by assigning different probability values to pixels. As a result, Beta Representation is much better for distinguishing highly-overlapped instances in crowded scenes with a new NMS strategy named BetaNMS. What's more, to fully exploit Beta Representation, a novel pipeline Beta R-CNN equipped with BetaHead and BetaMask is proposed, leading to high detection performance in occluded and crowded scenes. 最近，行人检测取得了重大进展，但在遮挡和拥挤的场景中实现高性能仍然具有挑战性。这主要归因于广泛使用的行人表示，即二维轴对齐边界框，它仅描述了物体的大致位置和大小。边界框将对象建模为边界内的均匀分布，使得行人在由于噪声较多而被遮挡和拥挤的场景中难以区分。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于二维 beta 分布的新颖表示，称为 Beta 表示。它通过明确构建全身和可见框之间的关系来描绘行人，并通过为像素分配不同的概率值来强调视觉质量中心。因此，Beta 表示可以通过名为 BetaNMS 的新 NMS 策略更好地区分拥挤场景中高度重叠的实例。此外，为了充分利用 Beta 表示，提出了一种配备 BetaHead 和 BetaMask 的新型管道 Beta R-CNN，从而在遮挡和拥挤的场景中实现高检测性能。 本文提出Beta R-CNN方法，通过改进行人检测中的表示方式，提升遮挡和拥挤场景下的检测性能。 Zixuan Xu,Banghuai Li,Ye Yuan,Anhong Dang cs.CV

title: VP-SLAM: A Monocular Real-time Visual SLAM with Points, Lines and Vanishing Points
title_zh: VP-SLAM：具有点、线和消失点的单目实时视觉 SLAM
abstract: Traditional monocular Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) systems can be divided into three categories: those that use features, those that rely on the image itself, and hybrid models. In the case of feature-based methods, new research has evolved to incorporate more information from their environment using geometric primitives beyond points, such as lines and planes. This is because in many environments, which are man-made environments, characterized as Manhattan world, geometric primitives such as lines and planes occupy most of the space in the environment. The exploitation of these schemes can lead to the introduction of algorithms capable of optimizing the trajectory of a Visual SLAM system and also helping to construct an exuberant map. Thus, we present a real-time monocular Visual SLAM system that incorporates real-time methods for line and VP extraction, as well as two strategies that exploit vanishing points to estimate the robot's translation and improve its rotation.Particularly, we build on ORB-SLAM2, which is considered the current state-of-the-art solution in terms of both accuracy and efficiency, and extend its formulation to handle lines and VPs to create two strategies the first optimize the rotation and the second refine the translation part from the known rotation. First, we extract VPs using a real-time method and use them for a global rotation optimization strategy. Second, we present a translation estimation method that takes advantage of last-stage rotation optimization to model a linear system. Finally, we evaluate our system on the TUM RGB-D benchmark and demonstrate that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art results and runs in real time, and its performance remains close to the original ORB-SLAM2 system
summary: Traditional monocular Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) systems can be divided into three categories: those that use features, those that rely on the image itself, and hybrid models. In the case of feature-based methods, new research has evolved to incorporate more information from their environment using geometric primitives beyond points, such as lines and planes. This is because in many environments, which are man-made environments, characterized as Manhattan world, geometric primitives such as lines and planes occupy most of the space in the environment. The exploitation of these schemes can lead to the introduction of algorithms capable of optimizing the trajectory of a Visual SLAM system and also helping to construct an exuberant map. Thus, we present a real-time monocular Visual SLAM system that incorporates real-time methods for line and VP extraction, as well as two strategies that exploit vanishing points to estimate the robot's translation and improve its rotation.Particularly, we build on ORB-SLAM2, which is considered the current state-of-the-art solution in terms of both accuracy and efficiency, and extend its formulation to handle lines and VPs to create two strategies the first optimize the rotation and the second refine the translation part from the known rotation. First, we extract VPs using a real-time method and use them for a global rotation optimization strategy. Second, we present a translation estimation method that takes advantage of last-stage rotation optimization to model a linear system. Finally, we evaluate our system on the TUM RGB-D benchmark and demonstrate that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art results and runs in real time, and its performance remains close to the original ORB-SLAM2 system
abstract_zh: 传统的单目视觉同步定位与建图（vSLAM）系统可以分为三类：使用特征的系统、依赖图像本身的系统以及混合模型。就基于特征的方法而言，新的研究已经发展到使用点之外的几何基元（例如直线和平面）来整合来自环境的更多信息。这是因为在许多以曼哈顿世界为特征的人造环境中，线和面等几何图元占据了环境中的大部分空间。这些方案的利用可以引入能够优化视觉 SLAM 系统轨迹并帮助构建丰富地图的算法。因此，我们提出了一种实时单目视觉 SLAM 系统，该系统结合了用于线和 VP 提取的实时方法，以及两种利用消失点来估计机器人平移并改善其旋转的策略。特别是，我们在 ORB-SLAM2 的基础上构建，ORB-SLAM2 在准确性和效率方面被认为是当前最先进的解决方案，并将其公式扩展到处理线和 VP，以创建两种策略，第一个优化旋转，第二个根据已知的细化平移部分旋转。首先，我们使用实时方法提取 VP，并将其用于全局轮换优化策略。其次，我们提出了一种利用最后阶段旋转优化来建模线性系统的平移估计方法。最后，我们在 TUM RGB-D 基准上评估我们的系统，并证明所提出的系统实现了最先进的结果并实时运行，并且其性能仍然接近原始的 ORB-SLAM2 系统

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合点、线和消失点的实时单目视觉SLAM系统VP-SLAM，通过优化轨迹和地图构建提升定位与建图性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单目SLAM系统在人工环境中因依赖点特征而存在鲁棒性不足的问题，利用线、平面及消失点等几何先验可提升复杂场景下的定位精度与地图丰富性。
AI.method: 基于ORB-SLAM2框架，扩展线与消失点（VP）的实时提取方法，提出双策略：1）利用VP进行全局旋转优化；2）结合优化后的旋转估计翻译量，构建线性系统模型。
AI.result: 在TUM RGB-D基准测试中，系统实现接近原ORB-SLAM2的精度，且保持实时性，验证了方法的有效性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 融合几何先验信息可显著提升单目SLAM性能，VP-SLAM通过结构化环境建模为复杂场景下的实时定位提供了新思路。

title: LCPFormer: Towards Effective 3D Point Cloud Analysis via Local Context Propagation in Transformers
title_zh: LCPFormer：通过 Transformers 中的局部上下文传播实现有效的 3D 点云分析
abstract: Transformer with its underlying attention mechanism and the ability to capture long-range dependencies makes it become a natural choice for unordered point cloud data. However, separated local regions from the general sampling architecture corrupt the structural information of the instances, and the inherent relationships between adjacent local regions lack exploration, while local structural information is crucial in a transformer-based 3D point cloud model. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel module named Local Context Propagation (LCP) to exploit the message passing between neighboring local regions and make their representations more informative and discriminative. More specifically, we use the overlap points of adjacent local regions (which statistically show to be prevalent) as intermediaries, then re-weight the features of these shared points from different local regions before passing them to the next layers. Inserting the LCP module between two transformer layers results in a significant improvement in network expressiveness. Finally, we design a flexible LCPFormer architecture equipped with the LCP module. The proposed method is applicable to different tasks and outperforms various transformer-based methods in benchmarks including 3D shape classification and dense prediction tasks such as 3D object detection and semantic segmentation. Code will be released for reproduction.
summary: Transformer with its underlying attention mechanism and the ability to capture long-range dependencies makes it become a natural choice for unordered point cloud data. However, separated local regions from the general sampling architecture corrupt the structural information of the instances, and the inherent relationships between adjacent local regions lack exploration, while local structural information is crucial in a transformer-based 3D point cloud model. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel module named Local Context Propagation (LCP) to exploit the message passing between neighboring local regions and make their representations more informative and discriminative. More specifically, we use the overlap points of adjacent local regions (which statistically show to be prevalent) as intermediaries, then re-weight the features of these shared points from different local regions before passing them to the next layers. Inserting the LCP module between two transformer layers results in a significant improvement in network expressiveness. Finally, we design a flexible LCPFormer architecture equipped with the LCP module. The proposed method is applicable to different tasks and outperforms various transformer-based methods in benchmarks including 3D shape classification and dense prediction tasks such as 3D object detection and semantic segmentation. Code will be released for reproduction.
abstract_zh: Transformer 以其底层的注意力机制和捕获长程依赖的能力，使其成为无序点云数据的自然选择。然而，与一般采样架构分离的局部区域破坏了实例的结构信息，并且相邻局部区域之间的内在关系缺乏探索，而局部结构信息在基于 Transformer 的 3D 点云模型中至关重要。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种名为局部上下文传播（LCP）的新模块来利用相邻局部区域之间的消息传递，并使它们的表示更具信息性和辨别力。更具体地说，我们使用相邻局部区域的重叠点（统计显示这种现象很普遍）作为中介，然后重新加权来自不同局部区域的这些共享点的特征，然后将它们传递到下一层。在两个变压器层之间插入 LCP 模块可以显着提高网络表达能力。最后，我们设计了一个配备LCP模块的灵活的LCPFormer架构。该方法适用于不同的任务，并且在基准测试中优于各种基于 Transformer 的方法，包括 3D 形状分类和密集预测任务（例如 3D 对象检测和语义分割）。代码将被发布以供复制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LCP的局部上下文传播模块，通过增强Transformer中相邻局部区域的特征交互，提升3D点云分析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在处理点云时因分离局部区域导致结构信息丢失，且未充分探索相邻区域间的关联性，而局部结构对模型性能至关重要。
AI.method: 设计LCP模块利用相邻区域的重叠点作为中介，通过重加权共享点特征实现跨局部区域的信息传递，并将其嵌入Transformer架构中。
AI.result: LCPFormer在3D形状分类、物体检测和语义分割等任务中超越多种基于Transformer的现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LCP模块有效捕捉局部结构关联性，显著提升Transformer处理点云的能力，且架构灵活适用于多种下游任务。

search_text: LCPFormer: Towards Effective 3D Point Cloud Analysis via Local Context Propagation in Transformers LCPFormer：通过 Transformers 中的局部上下文传播实现有效的 3D 点云分析 Transformer with its underlying attention mechanism and the ability to capture long-range dependencies makes it become a natural choice for unordered point cloud data. However, separated local regions from the general sampling architecture corrupt the structural information of the instances, and the inherent relationships between adjacent local regions lack exploration, while local structural information is crucial in a transformer-based 3D point cloud model. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel module named Local Context Propagation (LCP) to exploit the message passing between neighboring local regions and make their representations more informative and discriminative. More specifically, we use the overlap points of adjacent local regions (which statistically show to be prevalent) as intermediaries, then re-weight the features of these shared points from different local regions before passing them to the next layers. Inserting the LCP module between two transformer layers results in a significant improvement in network expressiveness. Finally, we design a flexible LCPFormer architecture equipped with the LCP module. The proposed method is applicable to different tasks and outperforms various transformer-based methods in benchmarks including 3D shape classification and dense prediction tasks such as 3D object detection and semantic segmentation. Code will be released for reproduction. Transformer 以其底层的注意力机制和捕获长程依赖的能力，使其成为无序点云数据的自然选择。然而，与一般采样架构分离的局部区域破坏了实例的结构信息，并且相邻局部区域之间的内在关系缺乏探索，而局部结构信息在基于 Transformer 的 3D 点云模型中至关重要。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种名为局部上下文传播（LCP）的新模块来利用相邻局部区域之间的消息传递，并使它们的表示更具信息性和辨别力。更具体地说，我们使用相邻局部区域的重叠点（统计显示这种现象很普遍）作为中介，然后重新加权来自不同局部区域的这些共享点的特征，然后将它们传递到下一层。在两个变压器层之间插入 LCP 模块可以显着提高网络表达能力。最后，我们设计了一个配备LCP模块的灵活的LCPFormer架构。该方法适用于不同的任务，并且在基准测试中优于各种基于 Transformer 的方法，包括 3D 形状分类和密集预测任务（例如 3D 对象检测和语义分割）。代码将被发布以供复制。 本文提出一种名为LCP的局部上下文传播模块，通过增强Transformer中相邻局部区域的特征交互，提升3D点云分析效果。 Zhuoxu Huang,Zhiyou Zhao,Banghuai Li,Jungong Han cs.CV

authors_text: Wanyi Zhuang,Qi Chu,Zhentao Tan,Qiankun Liu,Haojie Yuan,Changtao Miao,Zixiang Luo,Nenghai Yu
title: UIA-ViT: Unsupervised Inconsistency-Aware Method based on Vision Transformer for Face Forgery Detection
title_zh: UIA-ViT：基于 Vision Transformer 的人脸伪造检测的无监督不一致感知方法
abstract: Intra-frame inconsistency has been proved to be effective for the generalization of face forgery detection. However, learning to focus on these inconsistency requires extra pixel-level forged location annotations. Acquiring such annotations is non-trivial. Some existing methods generate large-scale synthesized data with location annotations, which is only composed of real images and cannot capture the properties of forgery regions. Others generate forgery location labels by subtracting paired real and fake images, yet such paired data is difficult to collected and the generated label is usually discontinuous. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel Unsupervised Inconsistency-Aware method based on Vision Transformer, called UIA-ViT, which only makes use of video-level labels and can learn inconsistency-aware feature without pixel-level annotations. Due to the self-attention mechanism, the attention map among patch embeddings naturally represents the consistency relation, making the vision Transformer suitable for the consistency representation learning. Based on vision Transformer, we propose two key components: Unsupervised Patch Consistency Learning (UPCL) and Progressive Consistency Weighted Assemble (PCWA). UPCL is designed for learning the consistency-related representation with progressive optimized pseudo annotations. PCWA enhances the final classification embedding with previous patch embeddings optimized by UPCL to further improve the detection performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Intra-frame inconsistency has been proved to be effective for the generalization of face forgery detection. However, learning to focus on these inconsistency requires extra pixel-level forged location annotations. Acquiring such annotations is non-trivial. Some existing methods generate large-scale synthesized data with location annotations, which is only composed of real images and cannot capture the properties of forgery regions. Others generate forgery location labels by subtracting paired real and fake images, yet such paired data is difficult to collected and the generated label is usually discontinuous. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel Unsupervised Inconsistency-Aware method based on Vision Transformer, called UIA-ViT, which only makes use of video-level labels and can learn inconsistency-aware feature without pixel-level annotations. Due to the self-attention mechanism, the attention map among patch embeddings naturally represents the consistency relation, making the vision Transformer suitable for the consistency representation learning. Based on vision Transformer, we propose two key components: Unsupervised Patch Consistency Learning (UPCL) and Progressive Consistency Weighted Assemble (PCWA). UPCL is designed for learning the consistency-related representation with progressive optimized pseudo annotations. PCWA enhances the final classification embedding with previous patch embeddings optimized by UPCL to further improve the detection performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 帧内不一致已被证明对于人脸伪造检测的泛化是有效的。然而，学习关注这些不一致性需要额外的像素级伪造位置注释。获取此类注释并非易事。一些现有方法生成带有位置注释的大规模合成数据，这些数据仅由真实图像组成，无法捕获伪造区域的属性。其他人通过减去配对的真实图像和伪造图像来生成伪造位置标签，但这种配对数据很难收集，并且生成的标签通常是不连续的。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种基于 Vision Transformer 的新型无监督不一致感知方法，称为 UIA-ViT，该方法仅使用视频级标签，并且可以在没有像素级注释的情况下学习不一致感知特征。由于自注意力机制，块嵌入之间的注意力图自然地表示一致性关系，使得视觉 Transformer 适合一致性表示学习。基于 Vision Transformer，我们提出了两个关键组件：无监督补丁一致性学习（UPCL）和渐进一致性加权组装（PCWA）。 UPCL 旨在通过渐进优化的伪注释来学习与一致性相关的表示。 PCWA 通过 UPCL 优化的先前补丁嵌入来增强最终分类嵌入，以进一步提高检测性能。大量的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的无监督不一致性感知方法UIA-ViT，用于人脸伪造检测，无需像素级标注即可学习不一致性特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖像素级伪造位置标注或配对数据，存在标注困难、数据局限等问题，难以有效捕捉伪造区域特性。
AI.method: 基于视觉Transformer的自注意力机制，设计无监督块一致性学习（UPCL）和渐进一致性加权组装（PCWA）组件，利用视频级标签学习不一致性特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了UIA-ViT在无需像素级标注情况下有效提升人脸伪造检测性能。
AI.conclusion: UIA-ViT通过无监督学习解决标注难题，为视觉Transformer在伪造检测中的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: UIA-ViT: Unsupervised Inconsistency-Aware Method based on Vision Transformer for Face Forgery Detection UIA-ViT：基于 Vision Transformer 的人脸伪造检测的无监督不一致感知方法 Intra-frame inconsistency has been proved to be effective for the generalization of face forgery detection. However, learning to focus on these inconsistency requires extra pixel-level forged location annotations. Acquiring such annotations is non-trivial. Some existing methods generate large-scale synthesized data with location annotations, which is only composed of real images and cannot capture the properties of forgery regions. Others generate forgery location labels by subtracting paired real and fake images, yet such paired data is difficult to collected and the generated label is usually discontinuous. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel Unsupervised Inconsistency-Aware method based on Vision Transformer, called UIA-ViT, which only makes use of video-level labels and can learn inconsistency-aware feature without pixel-level annotations. Due to the self-attention mechanism, the attention map among patch embeddings naturally represents the consistency relation, making the vision Transformer suitable for the consistency representation learning. Based on vision Transformer, we propose two key components: Unsupervised Patch Consistency Learning (UPCL) and Progressive Consistency Weighted Assemble (PCWA). UPCL is designed for learning the consistency-related representation with progressive optimized pseudo annotations. PCWA enhances the final classification embedding with previous patch embeddings optimized by UPCL to further improve the detection performance. authors_text: Xin Wu,Hao Zhao,Shunkai Li,Yingdian Cao,Hongbin Zha
title: SC-wLS: Towards Interpretable Feed-forward Camera Re-localization
title_zh: SC-wLS：迈向可解释的前馈相机重定位
abstract: Visual re-localization aims to recover camera poses in a known environment, which is vital for applications like robotics or augmented reality. Feed-forward absolute camera pose regression methods directly output poses by a network, but suffer from low accuracy. Meanwhile, scene coordinate based methods are accurate, but need iterative RANSAC post-processing, which brings challenges to efficient end-to-end training and inference. In order to have the best of both worlds, we propose a feed-forward method termed SC-wLS that exploits all scene coordinate estimates for weighted least squares pose regression. This differentiable formulation exploits a weight network imposed on 2D-3D correspondences, and requires pose supervision only. Qualitative results demonstrate the interpretability of learned weights. Evaluations on 7Scenes and Cambridge datasets show significantly promoted performance when compared with former feed-forward counterparts. Moreover, our SC-wLS method enables a new capability: self-supervised test-time adaptation on the weight network. Codes and models are publicly available.
summary: Visual re-localization aims to recover camera poses in a known environment, which is vital for applications like robotics or augmented reality. Feed-forward absolute camera pose regression methods directly output poses by a network, but suffer from low accuracy. Meanwhile, scene coordinate based methods are accurate, but need iterative RANSAC post-processing, which brings challenges to efficient end-to-end training and inference. In order to have the best of both worlds, we propose a feed-forward method termed SC-wLS that exploits all scene coordinate estimates for weighted least squares pose regression. This differentiable formulation exploits a weight network imposed on 2D-3D correspondences, and requires pose supervision only. Qualitative results demonstrate the interpretability of learned weights. Evaluations on 7Scenes and Cambridge datasets show significantly promoted performance when compared with former feed-forward counterparts. Moreover, our SC-wLS method enables a new capability: self-supervised test-time adaptation on the weight network. Codes and models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 视觉重新定位旨在恢复已知环境中的相机姿势，这对于机器人或增强现实等应用至关重要。前馈绝对相机位姿回归方法直接通过网络输出位姿，但精度较低。同时，基于场景坐标的方法虽然准确，但需要迭代RANSAC后处理，这给高效的端到端训练和推理带来了挑战。为了两全其美，我们提出了一种称为 SC-wLS 的前馈方法，该方法利用所有场景坐标估计来进行加权最小二乘姿态回归。这种可微分公式利用了 2D-3D 对应的权重网络，并且仅需要姿势监督。定性结果证明了学习权重的可解释性。对 7Scenes 和 Cambridge 数据集的评估显示，与之前的前馈数据集相比，性能显着提升。此外，我们的 SC-wLS 方法实现了一项新功能：权重网络上的自监督测试时间自适应。代码和模型是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的前馈相机重定位方法SC-wLS，旨在通过结合场景坐标估计与加权最小二乘回归，提升相机位姿预测的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈方法精度不足，基于场景坐标的迭代RANSAC方法效率低且难以端到端训练，需在准确率与效率间取得平衡。
AI.method: 设计SC-wLS方法，利用场景坐标估计进行加权最小二乘回归，通过可微分的权重网络处理2D-3D对应关系，仅需位姿监督即可训练。
AI.result: 在7Scenes和Cambridge数据集上显著优于传统前馈方法，并支持权重网络的自监督测试时适应。
AI.conclusion: SC-wLS在保持高效前馈特性的同时提升精度，且具备可解释性与自适应能力，为相机重定位提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有前馈方法精度不足，基于场景坐标的迭代RANSAC方法效率低且难以端到端训练，需在准确率与效率间取得平衡。

search_text: SC-wLS: Towards Interpretable Feed-forward Camera Re-localization SC-wLS：迈向可解释的前馈相机重定位 Visual re-localization aims to recover camera poses in a known environment, which is vital for applications like robotics or augmented reality. Feed-forward absolute camera pose regression methods directly output poses by a network, but suffer from low accuracy. Meanwhile, scene coordinate based methods are accurate, but need iterative RANSAC post-processing, which brings challenges to efficient end-to-end training and inference. In order to have the best of both worlds, we propose a feed-forward method termed SC-wLS that exploits all scene coordinate estimates for weighted least squares pose regression. This differentiable formulation exploits a weight network imposed on 2D-3D correspondences, and requires pose supervision only. Qualitative results demonstrate the interpretability of learned weights. Evaluations on 7Scenes and Cambridge datasets show significantly promoted performance when compared with former feed-forward counterparts. Moreover, our SC-wLS method enables a new capability: self-supervised test-time adaptation on the weight network. Codes and models are publicly available. 视觉重新定位旨在恢复已知环境中的相机姿势，这对于机器人或增强现实等应用至关重要。前馈绝对相机位姿回归方法直接通过网络输出位姿，但精度较低。同时，基于场景坐标的方法虽然准确，但需要迭代RANSAC后处理，这给高效的端到端训练和推理带来了挑战。为了两全其美，我们提出了一种称为 SC-wLS 的前馈方法，该方法利用所有场景坐标估计来进行加权最小二乘姿态回归。这种可微分公式利用了 2D-3D 对应的权重网络，并且仅需要姿势监督。定性结果证明了学习权重的可解释性。对 7Scenes 和 Cambridge 数据集的评估显示，与之前的前馈数据集相比，性能显着提升。此外，我们的 SC-wLS 方法实现了一项新功能：权重网络上的自监督测试时间自适应。代码和模型是公开的。 本文提出了一种可解释的前馈相机重定位方法SC-wLS，旨在通过结合场景坐标估计与加权最小二乘回归，提升相机位姿预测的准确性与效率。 Xin Wu,Hao Zhao,Shunkai Li,Yingdian Cao,Hongbin Zha cs.CV

title: Principal Component Classification
title_zh: 主成分分类
abstract: We propose to directly compute classification estimates by learning features encoded with their class scores using PCA. Our resulting model has a encoder-decoder structure suitable for supervised learning, it is computationally efficient and performs well for classification on several datasets.
summary: We propose to directly compute classification estimates by learning features encoded with their class scores using PCA. Our resulting model has a encoder-decoder structure suitable for supervised learning, it is computationally efficient and performs well for classification on several datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过使用 PCA 学习用类别分数编码的特征来直接计算分类估计。我们得到的模型具有适合监督学习的编码器-解码器结构，它计算效率高，并且在多个数据集上的分类方面表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主成分分析（PCA）的分类方法，通过编码器-解码器结构直接学习特征及其类别评分。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法可能在特征提取与计算效率上存在不足，而PCA在降维和特征编码方面具有优势，需结合监督学习提升分类性能。
AI.method: 利用PCA学习特征编码并关联类别评分，构建编码器-解码器结构，实现高效监督分类。
AI.result: 模型在多个数据集上表现出良好的分类效果，且计算效率较高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过PCA编码与监督学习结合，为分类任务提供了高效且有效的解决方案。

title: HiFi-WaveGAN: Generative Adversarial Network with Auxiliary Spectrogram-Phase Loss for High-Fidelity Singing Voice Generation
title_zh: HiFi-WaveGAN：具有辅助频谱图相位损失的生成对抗网络，用于高保真歌声生成
abstract: Entertainment-oriented singing voice synthesis (SVS) requires a vocoder to generate high-fidelity (e.g. 48kHz) audio. However, most text-to-speech (TTS) vocoders cannot reconstruct the waveform well in this scenario. In this paper, we propose HiFi-WaveGAN to synthesize the 48kHz high-quality singing voices in real-time. Specifically, it consists of an Extended WaveNet served as a generator, a multi-period discriminator proposed in HiFiGAN, and a multi-resolution spectrogram discriminator borrowed from UnivNet. To better reconstruct the high-frequency part from the full-band mel-spectrogram, we incorporate a pulse extractor to generate the constraint for the synthesized waveform. Additionally, an auxiliary spectrogram-phase loss is utilized to approximate the real distribution further. The experimental results show that our proposed HiFi-WaveGAN obtains 4.23 in the mean opinion score (MOS) metric for the 48kHz SVS task, significantly outperforming other neural vocoders.
summary: Entertainment-oriented singing voice synthesis (SVS) requires a vocoder to generate high-fidelity (e.g. 48kHz) audio. However, most text-to-speech (TTS) vocoders cannot reconstruct the waveform well in this scenario. In this paper, we propose HiFi-WaveGAN to synthesize the 48kHz high-quality singing voices in real-time. Specifically, it consists of an Extended WaveNet served as a generator, a multi-period discriminator proposed in HiFiGAN, and a multi-resolution spectrogram discriminator borrowed from UnivNet. To better reconstruct the high-frequency part from the full-band mel-spectrogram, we incorporate a pulse extractor to generate the constraint for the synthesized waveform. Additionally, an auxiliary spectrogram-phase loss is utilized to approximate the real distribution further. The experimental results show that our proposed HiFi-WaveGAN obtains 4.23 in the mean opinion score (MOS) metric for the 48kHz SVS task, significantly outperforming other neural vocoders.
abstract_zh: 面向娱乐的歌声合成 (SVS) 需要声码器来生成高保真（例如 48kHz）音频。然而，大多数文本转语音 (TTS) 声码器在这种情况下无法很好地重建波形。在本文中，我们提出 HiFi-WaveGAN 来实时合成 48kHz 高质量歌声。具体来说，它由用作生成器的扩展 WaveNet、HiFiGAN 中提出的多周期鉴别器以及借用 UnivNet 的多分辨率频谱图鉴别器组成。为了更好地从全带梅尔频谱图中重建高频部分，我们采用了脉冲提取器来生成合成波形的约束。此外，还利用辅助频谱图相位损失来进一步近似真实分布。实验结果表明，我们提出的 HiFi-WaveGAN 在 48kHz SVS 任务的平均意见得分 (MOS) 指标中获得了 4.23，显着优于其他神经声码器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiFi-WaveGAN，一种用于实时生成48kHz高质量歌唱语音的生成对抗网络（GAN）。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音（TTS）声码器难以在高保真（如48kHz）场景下重建波形，需开发专门针对歌唱语音合成（SVS）的高保真声码器。
AI.method: 采用扩展WaveNet作为生成器，结合HiFiGAN的多周期判别器和UnivNet的多分辨率频谱判别器，并引入脉冲提取器与辅助频谱-相位损失函数以优化高频重建。
AI.result: 在48kHz SVS任务中，HiFi-WaveGAN的平均意见得分（MOS）达到4.23，显著优于其他神经声码器。
AI.conclusion: HiFi-WaveGAN通过多判别器架构与辅助损失函数设计，有效提升了歌唱语音的高保真生成质量。

In this paper, we propose HiFi-WaveGAN to synthesize the 48kHz high-quality singing voices in real-time. title: Functional Indirection Neural Estimator for Better Out-of-distribution Generalization
title_zh: 用于更好的分布外泛化的函数间接神经估计器
abstract: The capacity to achieve out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization is a hallmark of human intelligence and yet remains out of reach for machines. This remarkable capability has been attributed to our abilities to make conceptual abstraction and analogy, and to a mechanism known as indirection, which binds two representations and uses one representation to refer to the other. Inspired by these mechanisms, we hypothesize that OOD generalization may be achieved by performing analogy-making and indirection in the functional space instead of the data space as in current methods. To realize this, we design FINE (Functional Indirection Neural Estimator), a neural framework that learns to compose functions that map data input to output on-the-fly. FINE consists of a backbone network and a trainable semantic memory of basis weight matrices. Upon seeing a new input-output data pair, FINE dynamically constructs the backbone weights by mixing the basis weights. The mixing coefficients are indirectly computed through querying a separate corresponding semantic memory using the data pair. We demonstrate empirically that FINE can strongly improve out-of-distribution generalization on IQ tasks that involve geometric transformations. In particular, we train FINE and competing models on IQ tasks using images from the MNIST, Omniglot and CIFAR100 datasets and test on tasks with unseen image classes from one or different datasets and unseen transformation rules. FINE not only achieves the best performance on all tasks but also is able to adapt to small-scale data scenarios.
summary: The capacity to achieve out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization is a hallmark of human intelligence and yet remains out of reach for machines. This remarkable capability has been attributed to our abilities to make conceptual abstraction and analogy, and to a mechanism known as indirection, which binds two representations and uses one representation to refer to the other. Inspired by these mechanisms, we hypothesize that OOD generalization may be achieved by performing analogy-making and indirection in the functional space instead of the data space as in current methods. To realize this, we design FINE (Functional Indirection Neural Estimator), a neural framework that learns to compose functions that map data input to output on-the-fly. FINE consists of a backbone network and a trainable semantic memory of basis weight matrices. Upon seeing a new input-output data pair, FINE dynamically constructs the backbone weights by mixing the basis weights. The mixing coefficients are indirectly computed through querying a separate corresponding semantic memory using the data pair. We demonstrate empirically that FINE can strongly improve out-of-distribution generalization on IQ tasks that involve geometric transformations. In particular, we train FINE and competing models on IQ tasks using images from the MNIST, Omniglot and CIFAR100 datasets and test on tasks with unseen image classes from one or different datasets and unseen transformation rules. FINE not only achieves the best performance on all tasks but also is able to adapt to small-scale data scenarios.
abstract_zh: 实现分布外（OOD）泛化的能力是人类智能的标志，但机器仍然无法实现。这种非凡的能力归因于我们进行概念抽象和类比的能力，以及一种称为间接的机制，它绑定两种表示并使用一种表示来引用另一种表示。受这些机制的启发，我们假设 OOD 泛化可以通过在函数空间而不是当前方法中的数据空间中进行类比和间接来实现。为了实现这一点，我们设计了 FINE（函数间接神经估计器），这是一个神经框架，可以学习组合将数据输入动态映射到输出的函数。 FINE 由主干网络和基本权重矩阵的可训练语义记忆组成。当看到新的输入输出数据对时，FINE 通过混合基本权重动态构建主干权重。通过使用数据对查询单独的相应语义存储器来间接计算混合系数。我们凭经验证明，FINE 可以极大地提高涉及几何变换的 IQ 任务的分布外泛化能力。特别是，我们使用 MNIST、Omniglot 和 CIFAR100 数据集的图像在 IQ 任务上训练 FINE 和竞争模型，并使用来自一个或不同数据集的未见过的图像类和未见过的转换规则来测试任务。 FINE不仅在所有任务上都取得了最佳性能，而且能够适应小规模数据场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FINE的神经网络框架，通过功能间接机制提升模型在分布外（OOD）数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 人类通过概念抽象、类比和间接机制实现跨分布泛化，而现有方法在数据空间操作难以模拟此类能力，因此需在功能空间中实现类比与间接机制。
AI.method: 设计FINE框架，包含主干网络和可训练的语义记忆基矩阵。通过查询语义记忆动态混合基矩阵生成主干网络权重，间接计算混合系数以实现功能空间的间接映射。
AI.result: 在涉及几何变换的IQ任务中，FINE在MNIST、Omniglot和CIFAR100数据集上均优于对比模型，且能适应小规模数据场景。
AI.conclusion: 功能间接机制有效提升了模型的分布外泛化能力，为复杂任务和数据规模提供了新的解决方案。
