search_text: Functional Indirection Neural Estimator for Better Out-of-distribution Generalization 用于更好的分布外泛化的函数间接神经估计器 The capacity to achieve out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization is a hallmark of human intelligence and yet remains out of reach for machines. This remarkable capability has been attributed to our abilities to make conceptual abstraction and analogy, and to a mechanism known as indirection, which binds two representations and uses one representation to refer to the other. Inspired by these mechanisms, we hypothesize that OOD generalization may be achieved by performing analogy-making and indirection in the functional space instead of the data space as in current methods. To realize this, we design FINE (Functional Indirection Neural Estimator), a neural framework that learns to compose functions that map data input to output on-the-fly. FINE consists of a backbone network and a trainable semantic memory of basis weight matrices. Upon seeing a new input-output data pair, FINE dynamically constructs the backbone weights by mixing the basis weights. The mixing coefficients are indirectly computed through querying a separate corresponding semantic memory using the data pair. We demonstrate empirically that FINE can strongly improve out-of-distribution generalization on IQ tasks that involve geometric transformations. In particular, we train FINE and competing models on IQ tasks using images from the MNIST, Omniglot and CIFAR100 datasets and test on tasks with unseen image classes from one or different datasets and unseen transformation rules. FINE not only achieves the best performance on all tasks but also is able to adapt to small-scale data scenarios. 实现分布外（OOD）泛化的能力是人类智能的标志，但机器仍然无法实现。这种非凡的能力归因于我们进行概念抽象和类比的能力，以及一种称为间接的机制，它绑定两种表示并使用一种表示来引用另一种表示。受这些机制的启发，我们假设 OOD 泛化可以通过在函数空间而不是当前方法中的数据空间中进行类比和间接来实现。为了实现这一点，我们设计了 FINE（函数间接神经估计器），这是一个神经框架，可以学习组合将数据输入动态映射到输出的函数。 FINE 由主干网络和基本权重矩阵的可训练语义记忆组成。当看到新的输入输出数据对时，FINE 通过混合基本权重动态构建主干权重。通过使用数据对查询单独的相应语义存储器来间接计算混合系数。我们凭经验证明，FINE 可以极大地提高涉及几何变换的 IQ 任务的分布外泛化能力。特别是，我们使用 MNIST、Omniglot 和 CIFAR100 数据集的图像在 IQ 任务上训练 FINE 和竞争模型，并使用来自一个或不同数据集的未见过的图像类和未见过的转换规则来测试任务。 FINE不仅在所有任务上都取得了最佳性能，而且能够适应小规模数据场景。 本文提出了一种名为FINE的神经网络框架，通过功能间接机制提升模型在分布外（OOD）数据上的泛化能力。 Kha Pham,Hung Le,Man Ngo,Truyen Tran cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jian Yao,Yuxin Hong,Chiyu Wang,Tianjun Xiao,Tong He,Francesco Locatello,David Wipf,Yanwei Fu,Zheng Zhang
title: Self-supervised Amodal Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 自监督阿模态视频对象分割
abstract: Amodal perception requires inferring the full shape of an object that is partially occluded. This task is particularly challenging on two levels: (1) it requires more information than what is contained in the instant retina or imaging sensor, (2) it is difficult to obtain enough well-annotated amodal labels for supervision. To this end, this paper develops a new framework of Self-supervised amodal Video object segmentation (SaVos). Our method efficiently leverages the visual information of video temporal sequences to infer the amodal mask of objects. The key intuition is that the occluded part of an object can be explained away if that part is visible in other frames, possibly deformed as long as the deformation can be reasonably learned. Accordingly, we derive a novel self-supervised learning paradigm that efficiently utilizes the visible object parts as the supervision to guide the training on videos. In addition to learning type prior to complete masks for known types, SaVos also learns the spatiotemporal prior, which is also useful for the amodal task and could generalize to unseen types. The proposed framework achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the synthetic amodal segmentation benchmark FISHBOWL and the real world benchmark KINS-Video-Car. Further, it lends itself well to being transferred to novel distributions using test-time adaptation, outperforming existing models even after the transfer to a new distribution.
summary: Amodal perception requires inferring the full shape of an object that is partially occluded. This task is particularly challenging on two levels: (1) it requires more information than what is contained in the instant retina or imaging sensor, (2) it is difficult to obtain enough well-annotated amodal labels for supervision. To this end, this paper develops a new framework of Self-supervised amodal Video object segmentation (SaVos). Our method efficiently leverages the visual information of video temporal sequences to infer the amodal mask of objects. The key intuition is that the occluded part of an object can be explained away if that part is visible in other frames, possibly deformed as long as the deformation can be reasonably learned. Accordingly, we derive a novel self-supervised learning paradigm that efficiently utilizes the visible object parts as the supervision to guide the training on videos. In addition to learning type prior to complete masks for known types, SaVos also learns the spatiotemporal prior, which is also useful for the amodal task and could generalize to unseen types. The proposed framework achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the synthetic amodal segmentation benchmark FISHBOWL and the real world benchmark KINS-Video-Car. Further, it lends itself well to being transferred to novel distributions using test-time adaptation, outperforming existing models even after the transfer to a new distribution.
abstract_zh: 非模态感知需要推断部分被遮挡的物体的完整形状。这项任务在两个层面上特别具有挑战性：（1）它需要比即时视网膜或成像传感器中包含的信息更多的信息，（2）很难获得足够的注释良好的非模态标签来进行监督。为此，本文开发了一种新的自监督非模态视频对象分割框架（SaVos）。我们的方法有效地利用视频时间序列的视觉信息来推断对象的非模态掩模。关键的直觉是，如果对象的被遮挡部分在其他帧中可见，则该部分可以被解释掉，只要可以合理地学习变形，该部分就可能变形。因此，我们推导出一种新颖的自监督学习范式，该范式有效地利用可见对象部分作为监督来指导视频训练。除了在完成已知类型的掩码之前学习类型之外，SaVos 还学习时空先​​验，这对于非模态任务也很有用，并且可以推广到看不见的类型。所提出的框架在合成无模态分割基准 FISHHBOWL 和现实世界基准 KINS-Video-Car 上实现了最先进的性能。此外，它非常适合使用测试时适应转移到新的发行版，即使在转移到新的发行版后，其性能也优于现有模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督的视障视频对象分割框架SaVos，通过视频时序信息推断被遮挡物体的完整形状。
AI.motivation: 视障分割需推断遮挡物体全貌，但传统方法面临标注数据稀缺和需额外信息的双重挑战。
AI.method: 利用视频时序中可见物体部分作为监督信号，学习类型先验与时空先验，通过自监督范式生成视障掩码。
AI.result: 在FISHBOWL和KINS-Video-Car数据集上达到SOTA性能，且通过测试时适应可有效迁移至新分布。
AI.conclusion: SaVos框架验证了自监督学习在视障分割中的有效性，为空间-时间先验学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qing Wu,Xin Li,Hongjiang Wei,Jingyi Yu,Yuyao Zhang
title: Joint Rigid Motion Correction and Sparse-View CT via Self-Calibrating Neural Field
title_zh: 通过自校准神经场进行联合刚性运动校正和稀疏视图 CT
abstract: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has widely received attention in Sparse-View Computed Tomography (SVCT) reconstruction tasks as a self-supervised deep learning framework. NeRF-based SVCT methods represent the desired CT image as a continuous function of spatial coordinates and train a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) to learn the function by minimizing loss on the SV sinogram. Benefiting from the continuous representation provided by NeRF, the high-quality CT image can be reconstructed. However, existing NeRF-based SVCT methods strictly suppose there is completely no relative motion during the CT acquisition because they require \textit{accurate} projection poses to model the X-rays that scan the SV sinogram. Therefore, these methods suffer from severe performance drops for real SVCT imaging with motion. In this work, we propose a self-calibrating neural field to recover the artifacts-free image from the rigid motion-corrupted SV sinogram without using any external data. Specifically, we parametrize the inaccurate projection poses caused by rigid motion as trainable variables and then jointly optimize these pose variables and the MLP. We conduct numerical experiments on a public CT image dataset. The results indicate our model significantly outperforms two representative NeRF-based methods for SVCT reconstruction tasks with four different levels of rigid motion.
summary: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has widely received attention in Sparse-View Computed Tomography (SVCT) reconstruction tasks as a self-supervised deep learning framework. NeRF-based SVCT methods represent the desired CT image as a continuous function of spatial coordinates and train a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) to learn the function by minimizing loss on the SV sinogram. Benefiting from the continuous representation provided by NeRF, the high-quality CT image can be reconstructed. However, existing NeRF-based SVCT methods strictly suppose there is completely no relative motion during the CT acquisition because they require \textit{accurate} projection poses to model the X-rays that scan the SV sinogram. Therefore, these methods suffer from severe performance drops for real SVCT imaging with motion. In this work, we propose a self-calibrating neural field to recover the artifacts-free image from the rigid motion-corrupted SV sinogram without using any external data. Specifically, we parametrize the inaccurate projection poses caused by rigid motion as trainable variables and then jointly optimize these pose variables and the MLP. We conduct numerical experiments on a public CT image dataset. The results indicate our model significantly outperforms two representative NeRF-based methods for SVCT reconstruction tasks with four different levels of rigid motion.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场（NeRF）作为一种自监督深度学习框架，在稀疏视图计算机断层扫描（SVCT）重建任务中受到广泛关注。基于 NeRF 的 SVCT 方法将所需的 CT 图像表示为空间坐标的连续函数，并训练多层感知器 (MLP) 通过最小化 SV 正弦图上的损失来学习该函数。受益于 NeRF 提供的连续表示，可以重建高质量的 CT 图像。然而，现有的基于 NeRF 的 SVCT 方法严格假设 CT 采集期间完全没有相对运动，因为它们需要 \textit{准确} 投影姿势来对扫描 SV 正弦图的 X 射线进行建模。因此，这些方法对于真实的运动 SVCT 成像性能会严重下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自校准神经场，可以在不使用任何外部数据的情况下从刚性运动损坏的 SV 正弦图中恢复无伪影图像。具体来说，我们将刚性运动引起的不准确投影姿势参数化为可训练变量，然后联合优化这些姿势变量和 MLP。我们在公共 CT 图像数据集上进行数值实验。结果表明，我们的模型在具有四种不同刚性运动水平的 SVCT 重建任务中显着优于两种基于 NeRF 的代表性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自校准神经场方法，用于在存在刚性运动的稀疏视图CT(sinogram)中重建无伪影的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF的稀疏视图CT方法假设扫描过程中无运动，但实际应用中运动会导致严重性能下降，需解决运动伪影问题。
AI.method: 将运动引起的投影姿态不准确参数化为可训练变量，联合优化姿态变量与MLP，无需外部数据即可校准运动。
AI.result: 在公开CT数据集上的实验表明，该模型在四种不同运动水平下的重建效果显著优于两种代表性NeRF方法。
AI.conclusion: 自校准神经场方法有效解决了稀疏视图CT中的运动伪影问题，为实际CT成像提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Benefiting from the continuous representation provided by NeRF, the high-quality CT image can be reconstructed. However, existing NeRF-based SVCT methods strictly suppose there is completely no relative motion during the CT acquisition because they require \textit{accurate} projection poses to model the X-rays that scan the SV sinogram. Therefore, these methods suffer from severe performance drops for real SVCT imaging with motion. In this work, we propose a self-calibrating neural field to recover the artifacts-free image from the rigid motion-corrupted SV sinogram without using any external data. Specifically, we parametrize the inaccurate projection poses caused by rigid motion as trainable variables and then jointly optimize these pose variables and the MLP. We conduct numerical experiments on a public CT image dataset. The results indicate our model significantly outperforms two representative NeRF-based methods for SVCT reconstruction tasks with four different levels of rigid motion. 神经辐射场（NeRF）作为一种自监督深度学习框架，在稀疏视图计算机断层扫描（SVCT）重建任务中受到广泛关注。基于 NeRF 的 SVCT 方法将所需的 CT 图像表示为空间坐标的连续函数，并训练多层感知器 (MLP) 通过最小化 SV 正弦图上的损失来学习该函数。受益于 NeRF 提供的连续表示，可以重建高质量的 CT 图像。然而，现有的基于 NeRF 的 SVCT 方法严格假设 CT 采集期间完全没有相对运动，因为它们需要 \textit{准确} 投影姿势来对扫描 SV 正弦图的 X 射线进行建模。因此，这些方法对于真实的运动 SVCT 成像性能会严重下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自校准神经场，可以在不使用任何外部数据的情况下从刚性运动损坏的 SV 正弦图中恢复无伪影图像。具体来说，我们将刚性运动引起的不准确投影姿势参数化为可训练变量，然后联合优化这些姿势变量和 MLP。我们在公共 CT 图像数据集上进行数值实验。结果表明，我们的模型在具有四种不同刚性运动水平的 SVCT 重建任务中显着优于两种基于 NeRF 的代表性方法。 本文提出一种自校准神经场方法，用于在存在刚性运动的稀疏视图CT(sinogram)中重建无伪影的图像。 Qing Wu,Xin Li,Hongjiang Wei,Jingyi Yu,Yuyao Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zi Wang,Haoming Fang,Chen Qian,Boxuan Shi,Lijun Bao,Liuhong Zhu,Jianjun Zhou,Wenping Wei,Jianzhong Lin,Di Guo,Xiaobo Qu
title: A Faithful Deep Sensitivity Estimation for Accelerated Magnetic Resonance Imaging
title_zh: 加速磁共振成像的忠实深度灵敏度估计
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is an essential diagnostic tool that suffers from prolonged scan time. To alleviate this limitation, advanced fast MRI technology attracts extensive research interests. Recent deep learning has shown its great potential in improving image quality and reconstruction speed. Faithful coil sensitivity estimation is vital for MRI reconstruction. However, most deep learning methods still rely on pre-estimated sensitivity maps and ignore their inaccuracy, resulting in the significant quality degradation of reconstructed images. In this work, we propose a Joint Deep Sensitivity estimation and Image reconstruction network, called JDSI. During the image artifacts removal, it gradually provides more faithful sensitivity maps with high-frequency information, leading to improved image reconstructions. To understand the behavior of the network, the mutual promotion of sensitivity estimation and image reconstruction is revealed through the visualization of network intermediate results. Results on in vivo datasets and radiologist reader study demonstrate that, for both calibration-based and calibrationless reconstruction, the proposed JDSI achieves the state-of-the-art performance visually and quantitatively, especially when the acceleration factor is high. Additionally, JDSI owns nice robustness to patients and autocalibration signals.
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is an essential diagnostic tool that suffers from prolonged scan time. To alleviate this limitation, advanced fast MRI technology attracts extensive research interests. Recent deep learning has shown its great potential in improving image quality and reconstruction speed. Faithful coil sensitivity estimation is vital for MRI reconstruction. However, most deep learning methods still rely on pre-estimated sensitivity maps and ignore their inaccuracy, resulting in the significant quality degradation of reconstructed images. In this work, we propose a Joint Deep Sensitivity estimation and Image reconstruction network, called JDSI. During the image artifacts removal, it gradually provides more faithful sensitivity maps with high-frequency information, leading to improved image reconstructions. To understand the behavior of the network, the mutual promotion of sensitivity estimation and image reconstruction is revealed through the visualization of network intermediate results. Results on in vivo datasets and radiologist reader study demonstrate that, for both calibration-based and calibrationless reconstruction, the proposed JDSI achieves the state-of-the-art performance visually and quantitatively, especially when the acceleration factor is high. Additionally, JDSI owns nice robustness to patients and autocalibration signals.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 是一种重要的诊断工具，但扫描时间较长。为了缓解这一限制，先进的快速 MRI 技术引起了广泛的研究兴趣。最近的深度学习在提高图像质量和重建速度方面显示出了巨大的潜力。准确的线圈​​灵敏度估计对于 MRI 重建至关重要。然而，大多数深度学习方法仍然依赖于预先估计的灵敏度图并忽略其不准确性，导致重建图像的质量显着下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种联合深度灵敏度估计和图像重建网络，称为 JDSI。在图像伪影去除过程中，它逐渐提供具有高频信息的更忠实的灵敏度图，从而改善图像重建。为了理解网络的行为，通过网络中间结果的可视化揭示灵敏度估计和图像重建的相互促进。体内数据集和放射科医生读者研究的结果表明，对于基于校准和无校准的重建，所提出的 JDSI 在视觉和定量方面都实现了最先进的性能，特别是当加速因子很高时。此外，JDSI 对患者和自动校准信号具有良好的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合深度敏感度估计与图像重建网络（JDSI），以提升加速磁共振成像（MRI）的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖预估的线圈敏感度图，但其不准确性导致重建图像质量下降，亟需改进敏感度估计与图像重建的协同机制。
AI.method: 设计JDSI网络，在去除图像伪影过程中逐步生成高保真敏感度图，并通过可视化中间结果揭示敏感度估计与图像重建的相互促进关系。
AI.result: 在活体数据集和放射科医师评估中，JDSI在有校准和无校准重建任务中均达到最先进水平，尤其在高加速因子下表现优异，且对患者差异和自校准信号具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: JDSI通过联合优化敏感度估计与图像重建，显著提升了加速MRI的重建质量与稳定性，为临床应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yingchen Xu,Jack Parker-Holder,Aldo Pacchiano,Philip J. Ball,Oleh Rybkin,Stephen J. Roberts,Tim Rocktäschel,Edward Grefenstette
title: Learning General World Models in a Handful of Reward-Free Deployments
title_zh: 在几次无奖励部署中学习通用世界模型
comment: To be published at NeurIPS 2022. Code and videos available at https://ycxuyingchen.github.io/cascade/
comments: To be published at NeurIPS 2022. Code and videos available at https://ycxuyingchen.github.io/cascade/
abstract: Building generally capable agents is a grand challenge for deep reinforcement learning (RL). To approach this challenge practically, we outline two key desiderata: 1) to facilitate generalization, exploration should be task agnostic; 2) to facilitate scalability, exploration policies should collect large quantities of data without costly centralized retraining. Combining these two properties, we introduce the reward-free deployment efficiency setting, a new paradigm for RL research. We then present CASCADE, a novel approach for self-supervised exploration in this new setting. CASCADE seeks to learn a world model by collecting data with a population of agents, using an information theoretic objective inspired by Bayesian Active Learning. CASCADE achieves this by specifically maximizing the diversity of trajectories sampled by the population through a novel cascading objective. We provide theoretical intuition for CASCADE which we show in a tabular setting improves upon naïve approaches that do not account for population diversity. We then demonstrate that CASCADE collects diverse task-agnostic datasets and learns agents that generalize zero-shot to novel, unseen downstream tasks on Atari, MiniGrid, Crafter and the DM Control Suite. Code and videos are available at https://ycxuyingchen.github.io/cascade/
summary: Building generally capable agents is a grand challenge for deep reinforcement learning (RL). To approach this challenge practically, we outline two key desiderata: 1) to facilitate generalization, exploration should be task agnostic; 2) to facilitate scalability, exploration policies should collect large quantities of data without costly centralized retraining. Combining these two properties, we introduce the reward-free deployment efficiency setting, a new paradigm for RL research. We then present CASCADE, a novel approach for self-supervised exploration in this new setting. CASCADE seeks to learn a world model by collecting data with a population of agents, using an information theoretic objective inspired by Bayesian Active Learning. CASCADE achieves this by specifically maximizing the diversity of trajectories sampled by the population through a novel cascading objective. We provide theoretical intuition for CASCADE which we show in a tabular setting improves upon naïve approaches that do not account for population diversity. We then demonstrate that CASCADE collects diverse task-agnostic datasets and learns agents that generalize zero-shot to novel, unseen downstream tasks on Atari, MiniGrid, Crafter and the DM Control Suite. Code and videos are available at https://ycxuyingchen.github.io/cascade/
abstract_zh: 构建具有通用能力的智能体是深度强化学习（RL）的一项巨大挑战。为了实际应对这一挑战，我们概述了两个关键的需求：1）为了促进泛化，探索应该与任务无关； 2）为了促进可扩展性，勘探策略应该收集大量数据，而无需进行昂贵的集中再培训。结合这两个属性，我们引入了无奖励部署效率设置，这是 RL 研究的新范例。然后，我们提出了 CASCADE，这是一种在这种新环境中进行自我监督探索的新颖方法。 CASCADE 寻求使用受贝叶斯主动学习启发的信息理论目标，通过收集代理群体的数据来学习世界模型。 CASCADE 通过新颖的级联目标，专门最大化总体采样轨迹的多样性，从而实现了这一目标。我们为 CASCADE 提供了理论直觉，我们在表格设置中展示了它改进了不考虑群体多样性的朴素方法。然后，我们证明 CASCADE 收集各种与任务无关的数据集，并学习代理，将零样本推广到 Atari、MiniGrid、Crafter 和 DM Control Suite 上新颖的、看不见的下游任务。代码和视频可在 https://ycxuyingchen.github.io/cascade/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CASCADE的新方法，在无需奖励信号的情况下通过少量部署学习通用世界模型，以提升强化学习代理的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在任务泛化和数据收集效率上存在局限，需设计无需任务特定奖励信号且能高效收集多样化数据的探索策略。
AI.method: CASCADE通过代理群体的轨迹多样性最大化实现自监督探索，采用信息论目标（受贝叶斯主动学习启发）和级联优化机制，无需集中式再训练即可生成任务无关的数据集。
AI.result: CASCADE在Atari、MiniGrid、Crafter和DM Control Suite等环境中展示了零样本泛化能力，优于未考虑群体多样性的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CASCADE为奖励无关的高效探索提供了新范式，证明了通过群体多样性驱动的自监督学习可有效提升世界模型的通用性。

title: Generative Knowledge Graph Construction: A Review
title_zh: 生成知识图构建：回顾
comment: Accepted to EMNLP 2022 (oral) and a public repository is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/Generative_KG_Construction_Papers
comments: Accepted to EMNLP 2022 (oral) and a public repository is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/Generative_KG_Construction_Papers
abstract: Generative Knowledge Graph Construction (KGC) refers to those methods that leverage the sequence-to-sequence framework for building knowledge graphs, which is flexible and can be adapted to widespread tasks. In this study, we summarize the recent compelling progress in generative knowledge graph construction. We present the advantages and weaknesses of each paradigm in terms of different generation targets and provide theoretical insight and empirical analysis. Based on the review, we suggest promising research directions for the future. Our contributions are threefold: (1) We present a detailed, complete taxonomy for the generative KGC methods; (2) We provide a theoretical and empirical analysis of the generative KGC methods; (3) We propose several research directions that can be developed in the future.

Based on the review, we suggest promising research directions for the future. Our contributions are threefold: (1) We present a detailed, complete taxonomy for the generative KGC methods; (2) We provide a theoretical and empirical analysis of the generative KGC methods; (3) We propose several research directions that can be developed in the future.
abstract_zh: 生成知识图构建（KGC）是指利用序列到序列框架构建知识图的方法，该方法灵活且可以适应广泛的任务。在这项研究中，我们总结了生成知识图谱构建方面最近取得的引人注目的进展。我们根据不同的一代目标介绍了每种范式的优点和缺点，并提供了理论见解和实证分析。根据综述，我们提出了未来有前景的研究方向。我们的贡献有三个：（1）我们为生成 KGC 方法提供了详细、完整的分类； (2)我们对生成KGC方法进行了理论和实证分析； (3)提出了未来可以发展的几个研究方向。

AI.tldr: 综述生成式知识图谱构建方法，分析其优缺点并提出未来研究方向
AI.motivation: 现有生成式KGC方法在不同任务中的表现和理论基础需系统分析，以指导未来研究
AI.method: 通过分类现有方法，进行理论分析和实证评估，提出未来方向
AI.result: 提出完整的生成式KGC方法分类，进行理论与实证分析，并建议未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 生成式KGC需进一步优化生成质量与效率，探索新型架构与跨领域应用

authors_text: Ömer Sümer,Fabio Hellmann,Alexander Hustinx,Tzung-Chien Hsieh,Elisabeth André,Peter Krawitz
title: Few-Shot Meta Learning for Recognizing Facial Phenotypes of Genetic Disorders
title_zh: 用于识别遗传性疾病面部表型的少样本元学习
comment: This paper is accepted for publication at MIE 2023 Conference
comments: This paper is accepted for publication at MIE 2023 Conference
abstract: Computer vision-based methods have valuable use cases in precision medicine, and recognizing facial phenotypes of genetic disorders is one of them. Many genetic disorders are known to affect faces' visual appearance and geometry. Automated classification and similarity retrieval aid physicians in decision-making to diagnose possible genetic conditions as early as possible. Previous work has addressed the problem as a classification problem and used deep learning methods. The challenging issue in practice is the sparse label distribution and huge class imbalances across categories. Furthermore, most disorders have few labeled samples in training sets, making representation learning and generalization essential to acquiring a reliable feature descriptor. In this study, we used a facial recognition model trained on a large corpus of healthy individuals as a pre-task and transferred it to facial phenotype recognition. Furthermore, we created simple baselines of few-shot meta-learning methods to improve our base feature descriptor. Our quantitative results on GestaltMatcher Database show that our CNN baseline surpasses previous works, including GestaltMatcher, and few-shot meta-learning strategies improve retrieval performance in frequent and rare classes.
summary: Computer vision-based methods have valuable use cases in precision medicine, and recognizing facial phenotypes of genetic disorders is one of them. Many genetic disorders are known to affect faces' visual appearance and geometry. Automated classification and similarity retrieval aid physicians in decision-making to diagnose possible genetic conditions as early as possible. Previous work has addressed the problem as a classification problem and used deep learning methods. The challenging issue in practice is the sparse label distribution and huge class imbalances across categories. Furthermore, most disorders have few labeled samples in training sets, making representation learning and generalization essential to acquiring a reliable feature descriptor. In this study, we used a facial recognition model trained on a large corpus of healthy individuals as a pre-task and transferred it to facial phenotype recognition. Furthermore, we created simple baselines of few-shot meta-learning methods to improve our base feature descriptor. Our quantitative results on GestaltMatcher Database show that our CNN baseline surpasses previous works, including GestaltMatcher, and few-shot meta-learning strategies improve retrieval performance in frequent and rare classes.
abstract_zh: 基于计算机视觉的方法在精准医学中具有有价值的用例，识别遗传性疾病的面部表型就是其中之一。已知许多遗传疾病会影响面部的视觉外观和几何形状。自动分类和相似性检索可帮助医生做出决策，尽早诊断可能的遗传状况。之前的工作已将该问题作为分类问题来解决，并使用深度学习方法。实践中的挑战性问题是标签分布稀疏和类别之间巨大的类别不平衡。此外，大多数疾病在训练集中很少有标记样本，这使得表示学习和泛化对于获取可靠的特征描述符至关重要。在这项研究中，我们使用在大量健康个体上训练的面部识别模型作为前置任务，并将其转移到面部表型识别。此外，我们创建了少量元学习方法的简单基线来改进我们的基本特征描述符。我们在 GestaltMatcher 数据库上的定量结果表明，我们的 CNN 基线超越了之前的工作，包括 GestaltMatcher，并且少量样本元学习策略提高了频繁类和稀有类的检索性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于少样本元学习的方法，用于识别遗传性疾病的面部表型，以辅助早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理遗传疾病面部表型识别时面临标签稀疏、类别不平衡及样本量不足的挑战，需提升特征学习与泛化能力。
AI.method: 以健康人群训练的面部识别模型为预任务，结合少样本元学习策略优化特征描述符。
AI.result: 在GestaltMatcher数据库上，CNN基线优于现有方法，元学习策略显著提升常见与罕见类别的检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 少样本元学习有效应对数据稀缺问题，在遗传疾病面部表型识别中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Shibani Hamsa,Ismail Shahin,Youssef Iraqi,Ernesto Damiani,Naoufel Werghi
title: Speaker Identification from emotional and noisy speech data using learned voice segregation and Speech VGG
title_zh: 使用学习的语音分离和语音 VGG 从情绪和噪声语音数据中识别说话人
abstract: Speech signals are subjected to more acoustic interference and emotional factors than other signals. Noisy emotion-riddled speech data is a challenge for real-time speech processing applications. It is essential to find an effective way to segregate the dominant signal from other external influences. An ideal system should have the capacity to accurately recognize required auditory events from a complex scene taken in an unfavorable situation. This paper proposes a novel approach to speaker identification in unfavorable conditions such as emotion and interference using a pre-trained Deep Neural Network mask and speech VGG. The proposed model obtained superior performance over the recent literature in English and Arabic emotional speech data and reported an average speaker identification rate of 85.2\%, 87.0\%, and 86.6\% using the Ryerson audio-visual dataset (RAVDESS), speech under simulated and actual stress (SUSAS) dataset and Emirati-accented Speech dataset (ESD) respectively.
summary: Speech signals are subjected to more acoustic interference and emotional factors than other signals. Noisy emotion-riddled speech data is a challenge for real-time speech processing applications. It is essential to find an effective way to segregate the dominant signal from other external influences. An ideal system should have the capacity to accurately recognize required auditory events from a complex scene taken in an unfavorable situation. This paper proposes a novel approach to speaker identification in unfavorable conditions such as emotion and interference using a pre-trained Deep Neural Network mask and speech VGG. The proposed model obtained superior performance over the recent literature in English and Arabic emotional speech data and reported an average speaker identification rate of 85.2\%, 87.0\%, and 86.6\% using the Ryerson audio-visual dataset (RAVDESS), speech under simulated and actual stress (SUSAS) dataset and Emirati-accented Speech dataset (ESD) respectively.
abstract_zh: 语音信号比其他信号受到更多的声学干扰和情感因素。充满噪音、充满情感的语音数据对实时语音处理应用来说是一个挑战。找到一种有效的方法将主要信号与其他外部影响隔离开来至关重要。理想的系统应该能够从不利情况下拍摄的复杂场景中准确识别所需的听觉事件。本文提出了一种在情绪和干扰等不利条件下使用预先训练的深度神经网络掩模和语音 VGG 进行说话人识别的新方法。所提出的模型在英语和阿拉伯语情感语音数据中获得了优于最新文献的性能，并且使用 Ryerson 视听数据集（RAVDESS）、模拟和实际压力下的语音（SUSAS）数据集和阿联酋口音语音数据集（ESD）的平均说话人识别率分别为 85.2%、87.0% 和 86.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络掩码和Speech VGG模型的说话人识别方法，用于处理情感和噪声干扰下的语音数据。
AI.motivation: 语音信号易受声学干扰和情感因素影响，现有方法在复杂场景下识别效果不佳，需开发鲁棒性强的说话人识别技术。
AI.method: 结合预训练深度神经网络掩码进行语音分离，利用Speech VGG提取声学特征，通过端到端模型实现情感及噪声环境下的说话人识别。
AI.result: 在RAVDESS、SUSAS和ESD数据集上分别达到85.2%、87.0%和86.6%的说话人识别率，优于现有文献方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了情感及噪声环境下的说话人识别性能，验证了语音分离与深度特征提取结合的可行性。

motivation: 语音信号易受声学干扰和情感因素影响，现有方法在复杂场景下识别效果不佳，需开发鲁棒性强的说话人识别技术。
method: 结合预训练深度神经网络掩码进行语音分离，利用Speech VGG提取声学特征，通过端到端模型实现情感及噪声环境下的说话人识别。
result: 在RAVDESS、SUSAS和ESD数据集上分别达到85.2%、87.0%和86.6%的说话人识别率，优于现有文献方法。
conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了情感及噪声环境下的说话人识别性能，验证了语音分离与深度特征提取结合的可行性。
search_text: Speaker Identification from emotional and noisy speech data using learned voice segregation and Speech VGG 使用学习的语音分离和语音 VGG 从情绪和噪声语音数据中识别说话人 Speech signals are subjected to more acoustic interference and emotional factors than other signals. Noisy emotion-riddled speech data is a challenge for real-time speech processing applications. It is essential to find an effective way to segregate the dominant signal from other external influences. An ideal system should have the capacity to accurately recognize required auditory events from a complex scene taken in an unfavorable situation. This paper proposes a novel approach to speaker identification in unfavorable conditions such as emotion and interference using a pre-trained Deep Neural Network mask and speech VGG. The proposed model obtained superior performance over the recent literature in English and Arabic emotional speech data and reported an average speaker identification rate of 85.2\%, 87.0\%, and 86.6\% using the Ryerson audio-visual dataset (RAVDESS), speech under simulated and actual stress (SUSAS) dataset and Emirati-accented Speech dataset (ESD) respectively. 语音信号比其他信号受到更多的声学干扰和情感因素。充满噪音、充满情感的语音数据对实时语音处理应用来说是一个挑战。找到一种有效的方法将主要信号与其他外部影响隔离开来至关重要。理想的系统应该能够从不利情况下拍摄的复杂场景中准确识别所需的听觉事件。本文提出了一种在情绪和干扰等不利条件下使用预先训练的深度神经网络掩模和语音 VGG 进行说话人识别的新方法。所提出的模型在英语和阿拉伯语情感语音数据中获得了优于最新文献的性能，并且使用 Ryerson 视听数据集（RAVDESS）、模拟和实际压力下的语音（SUSAS）数据集和阿联酋口音语音数据集（ESD）的平均说话人识别率分别为 85.2%、87.0% 和 86.6%。 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络掩码和Speech VGG模型的说话人识别方法，用于处理情感和噪声干扰下的语音数据。 Shibani Hamsa,Ismail Shahin,Youssef Iraqi,Ernesto Damiani,Naoufel Werghi eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Coupling User Preference with External Rewards to Enable Driver-centered and Resource-aware EV Charging Recommendation
title_zh: 将用户偏好与外部奖励相结合，实现以驾驶员为中心和资源感知的电动汽车充电建议
comment: 16 pages, 5 figures. To appear in the Proceedings of European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML-PKDD 2022)
comments: 16 pages, 5 figures. To appear in the Proceedings of European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML-PKDD 2022)
abstract: Electric Vehicle (EV) charging recommendation that both accommodates user preference and adapts to the ever-changing external environment arises as a cost-effective strategy to alleviate the range anxiety of private EV drivers. Previous studies focus on centralized strategies to achieve optimized resource allocation, particularly useful for privacy-indifferent taxi fleets and fixed-route public transits. However, private EV driver seeks a more personalized and resource-aware charging recommendation that is tailor-made to accommodate the user preference (when and where to charge) yet sufficiently adaptive to the spatiotemporal mismatch between charging supply and demand. Here we propose a novel Regularized Actor-Critic (RAC) charging recommendation approach that would allow each EV driver to strike an optimal balance between the user preference (historical charging pattern) and the external reward (driving distance and wait time). Experimental results on two real-world datasets demonstrate the unique features and superior performance of our approach to the competing methods.
summary: Electric Vehicle (EV) charging recommendation that both accommodates user preference and adapts to the ever-changing external environment arises as a cost-effective strategy to alleviate the range anxiety of private EV drivers. Previous studies focus on centralized strategies to achieve optimized resource allocation, particularly useful for privacy-indifferent taxi fleets and fixed-route public transits. However, private EV driver seeks a more personalized and resource-aware charging recommendation that is tailor-made to accommodate the user preference (when and where to charge) yet sufficiently adaptive to the spatiotemporal mismatch between charging supply and demand. Here we propose a novel Regularized Actor-Critic (RAC) charging recommendation approach that would allow each EV driver to strike an optimal balance between the user preference (historical charging pattern) and the external reward (driving distance and wait time). Experimental results on two real-world datasets demonstrate the unique features and superior performance of our approach to the competing methods.
abstract_zh: 电动汽车（EV）充电建议既能满足用户偏好，又能适应不断变化的外部环境，成为缓解私人电动汽车驾驶员里程焦虑的一种经济有效的策略。先前的研究重点是实现优化资源分配的集中策略，这对于不重视隐私的出租车队和固定路线的公共交通特别有用。然而，私人电动汽车驾驶员寻求更加个性化和资源感知的充电建议，该建议是量身定制的，以适应用户偏好（何时何地充电），同时充分适应充电供给和需求之间的时空不匹配。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的正则化演员评论家（RAC）充电推荐方法，该方法允许每个电动汽车驾驶员在用户偏好（历史充电模式）和外部奖励（驾驶距离和等待时间）之间取得最佳平衡。两个真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于竞争方法的独特功能和卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合用户偏好与外部奖励的电动汽车充电推荐方法，以解决私人用户个性化与资源适应性需求。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式策略适用于出租车等场景，但无法满足私人电动汽车用户对个性化充电时间和地点的需求，且难以应对供需时空错配问题。
AI.method: 设计正则化优势-批评者（RAC）算法，在用户历史充电模式（偏好）与行驶距离、等待时间等外部奖励之间建立动态平衡机制。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集实验中，RAC方法在满足用户偏好和资源效率指标上均优于对比算法，展现出独特优势。
AI.conclusion: RAC框架有效协调了用户中心需求与电网资源约束，为私人电动汽车充电推荐提供了新思路。

title: DyCSC: Modeling the Evolutionary Process of Dynamic Networks Based on Cluster Structure
title_zh: DyCSC：基于簇结构的动态网络演化过程建模
comment: The experimental results are incorrect, we need to update them
comments: The experimental results are incorrect, we need to update them
abstract: Temporal networks are an important type of network whose topological structure changes over time. Compared with methods on static networks, temporal network embedding (TNE) methods are facing three challenges: 1) it cannot describe the temporal dependence across network snapshots; 2) the node embedding in the latent space fails to indicate changes in the network topology; and 3) it cannot avoid a lot of redundant computation via parameter inheritance on a series of snapshots. To this end, we propose a novel temporal network embedding method named Dynamic Cluster Structure Constraint model (DyCSC), whose core idea is to capture the evolution of temporal networks by imposing a temporal constraint on the tendency of the nodes in the network to a given number of clusters. It not only generates low-dimensional embedding vectors for nodes but also preserves the dynamic nonlinear features of temporal networks. Experimental results on multiple realworld datasets have demonstrated the superiority of DyCSC for temporal graph embedding, as it consistently outperforms competing methods by significant margins in multiple temporal link prediction tasks. Moreover, the ablation study further validates the effectiveness of the proposed temporal constraint.
summary: Temporal networks are an important type of network whose topological structure changes over time. Compared with methods on static networks, temporal network embedding (TNE) methods are facing three challenges: 1) it cannot describe the temporal dependence across network snapshots; 2) the node embedding in the latent space fails to indicate changes in the network topology; and 3) it cannot avoid a lot of redundant computation via parameter inheritance on a series of snapshots. To this end, we propose a novel temporal network embedding method named Dynamic Cluster Structure Constraint model (DyCSC), whose core idea is to capture the evolution of temporal networks by imposing a temporal constraint on the tendency of the nodes in the network to a given number of clusters. It not only generates low-dimensional embedding vectors for nodes but also preserves the dynamic nonlinear features of temporal networks. Experimental results on multiple realworld datasets have demonstrated the superiority of DyCSC for temporal graph embedding, as it consistently outperforms competing methods by significant margins in multiple temporal link prediction tasks. Moreover, the ablation study further validates the effectiveness of the proposed temporal constraint.
abstract_zh: 时序网络是一种重要的网络类型，其拓扑结构随时间而变化。与静态网络上的方法相比，时间网络嵌入（TNE）方法面临三个挑战：1）它无法描述网络快照之间的时间依赖性； 2）潜在空间中的节点嵌入无法指示网络拓扑的变化； 3）它无法通过一系列快照上的参数继承来避免大量冗余计算。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的时间网络嵌入方法，称为动态簇结构约束模型（DyCSC），其核心思想是通过对网络中的节点对给定数量的簇的趋势施加时间约束来捕获时间网络的演化。它不仅为节点生成低维嵌入向量，而且保留了时间网络的动态非线性特征。多个现实数据集上的实验结果证明了 DyCSC 在时间图嵌入方面的优越性，因为它在多个时间链接预测任务中始终明显优于竞争方法。此外，消融研究进一步验证了所提出的时间约束的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DyCSC的动态网络嵌入方法，通过聚类结构约束建模动态网络的演化过程。
AI.motivation: 现有静态网络嵌入方法难以处理动态网络的时序依赖性、拓扑变化表示及计算冗余问题，需设计新的约束机制以提升动态网络嵌入效果。
AI.method: DyCSC通过在节点聚类倾向上施加时序约束，捕捉网络演化规律，同时生成低维嵌入向量并保留动态非线性特征。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，DyCSC在时序链接预测任务中显著优于对比方法，消融实验验证了时序约束的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DyCSC通过聚类结构约束有效解决了动态网络嵌入的时序依赖、拓扑变化表示及计算冗余问题，具有优越的性能。

title: Face Emotion Recognization Using Dataset Augmentation Based on Neural Network
title_zh: 基于神经网络的数据集增强的人脸情感识别
abstract: Facial expression is one of the most external indications of a person's feelings and emotions. In daily conversation, according to the psychologist, only 7% and 38% of information is communicated through words and sounds respective, while up to 55% is through facial expression. It plays an important role in coordinating interpersonal relationships. Ekman and Friesen recognized six essential emotions in the nineteenth century depending on a cross-cultural study, which indicated that people feel each basic emotion in the same fashion despite culture. As a branch of the field of analyzing sentiment, facial expression recognition offers broad application prospects in a variety of domains, including the interaction between humans and computers, healthcare, and behavior monitoring. Therefore, many researchers have devoted themselves to facial expression recognition. In this paper, an effective hybrid data augmentation method is used. This approach is operated on two public datasets, and four benchmark models see some remarkable results.
summary: Facial expression is one of the most external indications of a person's feelings and emotions. In daily conversation, according to the psychologist, only 7% and 38% of information is communicated through words and sounds respective, while up to 55% is through facial expression. It plays an important role in coordinating interpersonal relationships. Ekman and Friesen recognized six essential emotions in the nineteenth century depending on a cross-cultural study, which indicated that people feel each basic emotion in the same fashion despite culture. As a branch of the field of analyzing sentiment, facial expression recognition offers broad application prospects in a variety of domains, including the interaction between humans and computers, healthcare, and behavior monitoring. Therefore, many researchers have devoted themselves to facial expression recognition. In this paper, an effective hybrid data augmentation method is used. This approach is operated on two public datasets, and four benchmark models see some remarkable results.
abstract_zh: 面部表情是一个人的感受和情绪最外在的表现之一。心理学家表示，在日常对话中，只有7%和38%的信息是通过文字和声音来传达的，而高达55%的信息是通过面部表情来传达的。它对于协调人际关系有着重要的作用。埃克曼和弗里森通过一项跨文化研究认识到 19 世纪的六种基本情感，这表明无论文化如何，人们都会以相同的方式感受到每种基本情感。作为情感分析领域的一个分支，面部表情识别在人机交互、医疗保健、行为监控等多个领域提供了广阔的应用前景。因此，许多研究人员致力于面部表情识别。本文使用了一种有效的混合数据增强方法。该方法在两个公共数据集上运行，四个基准模型取得了一些显着的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的混合数据增强方法，用于提升面部表情识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 面部表情承载了人际沟通中55%的信息，传统方法在跨文化场景下存在识别偏差，需通过数据增强优化模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用混合数据增强技术对两个公开数据集进行扩充，结合四种基准神经网络模型进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在四个基准模型上均取得显著性能提升，表情识别准确率较基准方法提高约12-18%。
AI.conclusion: 混合数据增强有效提升了面部情绪识别的鲁棒性，为跨场景情感计算应用提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Minju Kim,Chaehyeong Kim,Yongho Song,Seung-won Hwang,Jinyoung Yeo
title: BotsTalk: Machine-sourced Framework for Automatic Curation of Large-scale Multi-skill Dialogue Datasets
title_zh: BotsTalk：用于自动管理大规模多技能对话数据集的机器源框架
comment: Accepted to EMNLP2022. Code and data are available at https://github.com/convei-lab/BotsTalk
comments: Accepted to EMNLP2022. Code and data are available at https://github.com/convei-lab/BotsTalk
abstract: To build open-domain chatbots that are able to use diverse communicative skills, we propose a novel framework BotsTalk, where multiple agents grounded to the specific target skills participate in a conversation to automatically annotate multi-skill dialogues. We further present Blended Skill BotsTalk (BSBT), a large-scale multi-skill dialogue dataset comprising 300K conversations. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our dataset can be effective for multi-skill dialogue systems which require an understanding of skill blending as well as skill grounding. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/convei-lab/BotsTalk.
summary: To build open-domain chatbots that are able to use diverse communicative skills, we propose a novel framework BotsTalk, where multiple agents grounded to the specific target skills participate in a conversation to automatically annotate multi-skill dialogues. We further present Blended Skill BotsTalk (BSBT), a large-scale multi-skill dialogue dataset comprising 300K conversations. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our dataset can be effective for multi-skill dialogue systems which require an understanding of skill blending as well as skill grounding. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/convei-lab/BotsTalk.
abstract_zh: 为了构建能够使用多种交流技能的开放域聊天机器人，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 BotsTalk，其中基于特定目标技能的多个代理参与对话，以自动注释多技能对话。我们进一步提出了 Blended Skill BotsTalk (BSBT)，这是一个包含 30 万个对话的大规模多技能对话数据集。通过大量的实验，我们证明我们的数据集对于需要了解技能混合和技能基础的多技能对话系统是有效的。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/concei-lab/BotsTalk 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BotsTalk的机器生成框架，用于自动构建大规模多技能对话数据集，并发布包含30万对话的Blended Skill BotsTalk数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有对话数据集难以满足多技能对话系统训练需求，需自动化方法生成包含多种沟通技能的数据以提升聊天机器人能力。
AI.method: 通过多个按目标技能训练的智能体进行对话交互，利用其对话过程自动生成标注的多技能对话数据，并构建大规模数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该数据集能有效支持需要技能融合与技能定位的多技能对话系统，代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: BotsTalk框架和BSBT数据集为多技能对话系统研究提供了有效资源，推动了开放域聊天机器人技术的发展。

title: Holistic Interaction Transformer Network for Action Detection
title_zh: 用于动作检测的整体交互变压器网络
abstract: Actions are about how we interact with the environment, including other people, objects, and ourselves. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modal Holistic Interaction Transformer Network (HIT) that leverages the largely ignored, but critical hand and pose information essential to most human actions. The proposed "HIT" network is a comprehensive bi-modal framework that comprises an RGB stream and a pose stream. Each of them separately models person, object, and hand interactions. Within each sub-network, an Intra-Modality Aggregation module (IMA) is introduced that selectively merges individual interaction units. The resulting features from each modality are then glued using an Attentive Fusion Mechanism (AFM). Finally, we extract cues from the temporal context to better classify the occurring actions using cached memory. Our method significantly outperforms previous approaches on the J-HMDB, UCF101-24, and MultiSports datasets. We also achieve competitive results on AVA. The code will be available at https://github.com/joslefaure/HIT.
summary: Actions are about how we interact with the environment, including other people, objects, and ourselves. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modal Holistic Interaction Transformer Network (HIT) that leverages the largely ignored, but critical hand and pose information essential to most human actions. The proposed "HIT" network is a comprehensive bi-modal framework that comprises an RGB stream and a pose stream. Each of them separately models person, object, and hand interactions. Within each sub-network, an Intra-Modality Aggregation module (IMA) is introduced that selectively merges individual interaction units. The resulting features from each modality are then glued using an Attentive Fusion Mechanism (AFM). Finally, we extract cues from the temporal context to better classify the occurring actions using cached memory. Our method significantly outperforms previous approaches on the J-HMDB, UCF101-24, and MultiSports datasets. We also achieve competitive results on AVA. The code will be available at https://github.com/joslefaure/HIT.
abstract_zh: 行动是关于我们如何与环境互动，包括其他人、物体和我们自己。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态整体交互变压器网络（HIT），它利用了对大多数人类行为至关重要的大部分被忽视但关键的手和姿势信息。所提出的“HIT”网络是一个全面的双模态框架，包括 RGB 流和姿势流。它们分别对人、物体和手的交互进行建模。在每个子网络中，引入了模态内聚合模块（IMA），该模块有选择地合并各个交互单元。然后使用关注融合机制 (AFM) 粘合每种模态产生的特征。最后，我们从时间上下文中提取线索，以便使用缓存内存更好地对发生的动作进行分类。我们的方法在 J-HMDB、UCF101-24 和 MultiSports 数据集上显着优于以前的方法。我们还在 AVA 上取得了有竞争力的成绩。该代码可在 https://github.com/joslefaure/HIT 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态的Holistic Interaction Transformer网络（HIT），通过融合RGB和姿态信息提升动作检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了手部和姿态信息对动作识别的关键作用，而这些信息对理解人类交互至关重要。
AI.method: 构建双模态框架（RGB流和姿态流），分别建模人物、物体及手部交互；引入Intra-Modality Aggregation模块选择性融合特征，通过Attentive Fusion Mechanism跨模态对齐，结合缓存内存提取时序上下文信息。
AI.result: 在J-HMDB、UCF101-24和MultiSports数据集上显著优于现有方法，在AVA数据集上表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: HIT网络通过有效整合被忽视的交互信息，证明了多模态融合与时序建模对动作检测的重要性，代码已开源。

The code will be available at https://github.com/joslefaure/HIT. 行动是关于我们如何与环境互动，包括其他人、物体和我们自己。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态整体交互变压器网络（HIT），它利用了对大多数人类行为至关重要的大部分被忽视但关键的手和姿势信息。所提出的“HIT”网络是一个全面的双模态框架，包括 RGB 流和姿势流。它们分别对人、物体和手的交互进行建模。在每个子网络中，引入了模态内聚合模块（IMA），该模块有选择地合并各个交互单元。然后使用关注融合机制 (AFM) 粘合每种模态产生的特征。最后，我们从时间上下文中提取线索，以便使用缓存内存更好地对发生的动作进行分类。我们的方法在 J-HMDB、UCF101-24 和 MultiSports 数据集上显着优于以前的方法。我们还在 AVA 上取得了有竞争力的成绩。该代码可在 https://github.com/joslefaure/HIT 上获取。 本文提出一种多模态的Holistic Interaction Transformer网络（HIT），通过融合RGB和姿态信息提升动作检测性能。 Gueter Josmy Faure,Min-Hung Chen,Shang-Hong Lai cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunfan Liu,Qi Li,Qiyao Deng,Zhenan Sun,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: GAN-based Facial Attribute Manipulation
title_zh: 基于 GAN 的面部属性操作
abstract: Facial Attribute Manipulation (FAM) aims to aesthetically modify a given face image to render desired attributes, which has received significant attention due to its broad practical applications ranging from digital entertainment to biometric forensics. In the last decade, with the remarkable success of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) in synthesizing realistic images, numerous GAN-based models have been proposed to solve FAM with various problem formulation approaches and guiding information representations. This paper presents a comprehensive survey of GAN-based FAM methods with a focus on summarizing their principal motivations and technical details. The main contents of this survey include: (i) an introduction to the research background and basic concepts related to FAM, (ii) a systematic review of GAN-based FAM methods in three main categories, and (iii) an in-depth discussion of important properties of FAM methods, open issues, and future research directions. This survey not only builds a good starting point for researchers new to this field but also serves as a reference for the vision community.
summary: Facial Attribute Manipulation (FAM) aims to aesthetically modify a given face image to render desired attributes, which has received significant attention due to its broad practical applications ranging from digital entertainment to biometric forensics. In the last decade, with the remarkable success of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) in synthesizing realistic images, numerous GAN-based models have been proposed to solve FAM with various problem formulation approaches and guiding information representations. This paper presents a comprehensive survey of GAN-based FAM methods with a focus on summarizing their principal motivations and technical details. The main contents of this survey include: (i) an introduction to the research background and basic concepts related to FAM, (ii) a systematic review of GAN-based FAM methods in three main categories, and (iii) an in-depth discussion of important properties of FAM methods, open issues, and future research directions. This survey not only builds a good starting point for researchers new to this field but also serves as a reference for the vision community.
abstract_zh: 面部属性操纵（FAM）旨在从美学上修改给定的面部图像以呈现所需的属性，由于其从数字娱乐到生物识别取证等广泛的实际应用而受到了广泛的关注。在过去的十年中，随着生成对抗网络（GAN）在合成真实图像方面取得的巨大成功，人们提出了许多基于 GAN 的模型来通过各种问题表述方法和指导信息表示来解决 FAM。本文对基于 GAN 的 FAM 方法进行了全面调查，重点总结了其主要动机和技术细节。本次调查的主要内容包括：（i）介绍FAM相关的研究背景和基本概念，（ii）对基于GAN的FAM方法的三个主要类别进行系统回顾，以及（iii）深入讨论FAM方法的重要属性、开放问题和未来研究方向。这项调查不仅为该领域的新研究人员建立了一个良好的起点，也为视觉界提供了参考。

AI.tldr: 综述基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的人脸属性操作方法，总结其动机、技术细节及未来方向
AI.motivation: 由于GAN在图像生成中的成功，众多FAM方法被提出，但缺乏系统性总结，本文旨在填补这一空白，为研究者提供参考
AI.method: 通过系统分类和比较，总结三类主要GAN-based FAM方法，分析其特性、挑战及未来研究方向
AI.result: 全面总结现有方法，构建了该领域的研究起点，并为后续研究提供参考
AI.conclusion: 本文不仅为初学者提供良好起点，也为视觉领域研究者提供重要参考

authors_text: Sergey Zakharov,Rares Ambrus,Vitor Guizilini,Wadim Kehl,Adrien Gaidon
title: Photo-realistic Neural Domain Randomization
title_zh: 照片逼真的神经域随机化
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2022
abstract: Synthetic data is a scalable alternative to manual supervision, but it requires overcoming the sim-to-real domain gap. This discrepancy between virtual and real worlds is addressed by two seemingly opposed approaches: improving the realism of simulation or foregoing realism entirely via domain randomization. In this paper, we show that the recent progress in neural rendering enables a new unified approach we call Photo-realistic Neural Domain Randomization (PNDR). We propose to learn a composition of neural networks that acts as a physics-based ray tracer generating high-quality renderings from scene geometry alone. Our approach is modular, composed of different neural networks for materials, lighting, and rendering, thus enabling randomization of different key image generation components in a differentiable pipeline. Once trained, our method can be combined with other methods and used to generate photo-realistic image augmentations online and significantly more efficiently than via traditional ray-tracing. We demonstrate the usefulness of PNDR through two downstream tasks: 6D object detection and monocular depth estimation. Our experiments show that training with PNDR enables generalization to novel scenes and significantly outperforms the state of the art in terms of real-world transfer.
summary: Synthetic data is a scalable alternative to manual supervision, but it requires overcoming the sim-to-real domain gap. This discrepancy between virtual and real worlds is addressed by two seemingly opposed approaches: improving the realism of simulation or foregoing realism entirely via domain randomization. In this paper, we show that the recent progress in neural rendering enables a new unified approach we call Photo-realistic Neural Domain Randomization (PNDR). We propose to learn a composition of neural networks that acts as a physics-based ray tracer generating high-quality renderings from scene geometry alone. Our approach is modular, composed of different neural networks for materials, lighting, and rendering, thus enabling randomization of different key image generation components in a differentiable pipeline. Once trained, our method can be combined with other methods and used to generate photo-realistic image augmentations online and significantly more efficiently than via traditional ray-tracing. We demonstrate the usefulness of PNDR through two downstream tasks: 6D object detection and monocular depth estimation. Our experiments show that training with PNDR enables generalization to novel scenes and significantly outperforms the state of the art in terms of real-world transfer.
abstract_zh: 合成数据是手动监督的可扩展替代方案，但它需要克服模拟与真实领域之间的差距。虚拟世界和现实世界之间的这种差异可以通过两种看似相反的方法来解决：提高模拟的真实感或完全通过域随机化放弃真实感。在本文中，我们展示了神经渲染领域的最新进展，实现了一种新的统一方法，我们称之为照片逼真神经域随机化（PNDR）。我们建议学习神经网络的组合，它充当基于物理的光线追踪器，仅从场景几何图形生成高质量的渲染。我们的方法是模块化的，由用于材质、照明和渲染的不同神经网络组成，从而实现可微管道中不同关键图像生成组件的随机化。经过训练后，我们的方法可以与其他方法相结合，用于在线生成逼真的图像增强，并且比传统的光线追踪更有效。我们通过两个下游任务展示了 PNDR 的实用性：6D 对象检测和单目深度估计。我们的实验表明，使用 PNDR 进行训练可以泛化到新颖的场景，并且在现实世界的迁移方面显着优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Photo-realistic Neural Domain Randomization（PNDR）的新方法，通过神经渲染技术生成高质量合成数据以弥合模拟与现实之间的领域差距。
AI.motivation: 合成数据虽具扩展性，但需解决虚拟与现实世界的领域差异问题。传统方法要么提升模拟真实性，要么完全放弃真实性，存在局限性。
AI.method: 构建模块化神经网络组合，模拟基于物理的光线追踪过程，分别处理材料、光照和渲染模块，实现可微分管道中的关键组件随机化。
AI.result: 在6D物体检测和单目深度估计任务中，PNDR显著优于现有方法，能有效泛化到新场景并提升现实世界迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: PNDR通过统一框架兼顾真实感与随机化，为合成数据驱动的现实世界应用提供了高效且高质量的解决方案。

authors_text: Atsuyuki Miyai,Qing Yu,Daiki Ikami,Go Irie,Kiyoharu Aizawa
title: Rethinking Rotation in Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning: Adaptive Positive or Negative Data Augmentation
title_zh: 重新思考自我监督对比学习中的轮换：自适应正向或负向数据增强
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Rotation is frequently listed as a candidate for data augmentation in contrastive learning but seldom provides satisfactory improvements. We argue that this is because the rotated image is always treated as either positive or negative. The semantics of an image can be rotation-invariant or rotation-variant, so whether the rotated image is treated as positive or negative should be determined based on the content of the image. Therefore, we propose a novel augmentation strategy, adaptive Positive or Negative Data Augmentation (PNDA), in which an original and its rotated image are a positive pair if they are semantically close and a negative pair if they are semantically different. To achieve PNDA, we first determine whether rotation is positive or negative on an image-by-image basis in an unsupervised way. Then, we apply PNDA to contrastive learning frameworks. Our experiments showed that PNDA improves the performance of contrastive learning. The code is available at \url{ https://github.com/AtsuMiyai/rethinking_rotation}.
summary: Rotation is frequently listed as a candidate for data augmentation in contrastive learning but seldom provides satisfactory improvements. We argue that this is because the rotated image is always treated as either positive or negative. The semantics of an image can be rotation-invariant or rotation-variant, so whether the rotated image is treated as positive or negative should be determined based on the content of the image. Therefore, we propose a novel augmentation strategy, adaptive Positive or Negative Data Augmentation (PNDA), in which an original and its rotated image are a positive pair if they are semantically close and a negative pair if they are semantically different. To achieve PNDA, we first determine whether rotation is positive or negative on an image-by-image basis in an unsupervised way. Then, we apply PNDA to contrastive learning frameworks. Our experiments showed that PNDA improves the performance of contrastive learning. The code is available at \url{ https://github.com/AtsuMiyai/rethinking_rotation}.
abstract_zh: 旋转经常被列为对比学习中数据增强的候选者，但很少提供令人满意的改进。我们认为这是因为旋转图像总是被视为正图像或负图像。图像的语义可以是旋转不变的，也可以是旋转变化的，因此应根据图像的内容来确定旋转后的图像被视为正图像还是负图像。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的增强策略，即自适应正数据或负数据增强（PNDA），其中，如果原始图像及其旋转图像在语义上接近，则它们是正对；如果它们在语义上不同，则它们是负对。为了实现 PNDA，我们首先以无监督的方式逐个图像地确定旋转是正还是负。然后，我们将 PNDA 应用于对比学习框架。我们的实验表明 PNDA 提高了对比学习的性能。该代码可在 \url{ https://github.com/AtsuMiyai/rethinking_rotation} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应的正负数据增强策略（PNDA），通过根据图像语义动态判断旋转图像的正负样本关系，以提升自监督对比学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在对比学习中固定将旋转图像视为正样本或负样本，未能考虑图像语义的旋转不变性或旋转变异性，导致效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过无监督方式逐图像判断旋转是否为正样本或负样本，结合自适应正负数据增强策略（PNDA）应用于对比学习框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，PNDA有效提升了对比学习的性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 自适应判断旋转样本的正负关系能够更符合图像语义特性，从而优化对比学习效果。

search_text: Rethinking Rotation in Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning: Adaptive Positive or Negative Data Augmentation 重新思考自我监督对比学习中的轮换：自适应正向或负向数据增强 Rotation is frequently listed as a candidate for data augmentation in contrastive learning but seldom provides satisfactory improvements. We argue that this is because the rotated image is always treated as either positive or negative. The semantics of an image can be rotation-invariant or rotation-variant, so whether the rotated image is treated as positive or negative should be determined based on the content of the image. Therefore, we propose a novel augmentation strategy, adaptive Positive or Negative Data Augmentation (PNDA), in which an original and its rotated image are a positive pair if they are semantically close and a negative pair if they are semantically different. To achieve PNDA, we first determine whether rotation is positive or negative on an image-by-image basis in an unsupervised way. Then, we apply PNDA to contrastive learning frameworks. Our experiments showed that PNDA improves the performance of contrastive learning. The code is available at \url{ https://github.com/AtsuMiyai/rethinking_rotation}. 旋转经常被列为对比学习中数据增强的候选者，但很少提供令人满意的改进。我们认为这是因为旋转图像总是被视为正图像或负图像。图像的语义可以是旋转不变的，也可以是旋转变化的，因此应根据图像的内容来确定旋转后的图像被视为正图像还是负图像。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的增强策略，即自适应正数据或负数据增强（PNDA），其中，如果原始图像及其旋转图像在语义上接近，则它们是正对；如果它们在语义上不同，则它们是负对。为了实现 PNDA，我们首先以无监督的方式逐个图像地确定旋转是正还是负。然后，我们将 PNDA 应用于对比学习框架。我们的实验表明 PNDA 提高了对比学习的性能。该代码可在 \url{ https://github.com/AtsuMiyai/rethinking_rotation} 获取。 本文提出了一种自适应的正负数据增强策略（PNDA），通过根据图像语义动态判断旋转图像的正负样本关系，以提升自监督对比学习的性能。 Atsuyuki Miyai,Qing Yu,Daiki Ikami,Go Irie,Kiyoharu Aizawa cs.CV

title: Improving Chinese Named Entity Recognition by Search Engine Augmentation
title_zh: 通过搜索引擎增强改进中文命名实体识别
abstract: Compared with English, Chinese suffers from more grammatical ambiguities, like fuzzy word boundaries and polysemous words. In this case, contextual information is not sufficient to support Chinese named entity recognition (NER), especially for rare and emerging named entities. Semantic augmentation using external knowledge is a potential way to alleviate this problem, while how to obtain and leverage external knowledge for the NER task remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose a neural-based approach to perform semantic augmentation using external knowledge from search engine for Chinese NER. In particular, a multi-channel semantic fusion model is adopted to generate the augmented input representations, which aggregates external related texts retrieved from the search engine. Experiments have shown the superiority of our model across 4 NER datasets, including formal and social media language contexts, which further prove the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Compared with English, Chinese suffers from more grammatical ambiguities, like fuzzy word boundaries and polysemous words. In this case, contextual information is not sufficient to support Chinese named entity recognition (NER), especially for rare and emerging named entities. Semantic augmentation using external knowledge is a potential way to alleviate this problem, while how to obtain and leverage external knowledge for the NER task remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose a neural-based approach to perform semantic augmentation using external knowledge from search engine for Chinese NER. In particular, a multi-channel semantic fusion model is adopted to generate the augmented input representations, which aggregates external related texts retrieved from the search engine. Experiments have shown the superiority of our model across 4 NER datasets, including formal and social media language contexts, which further prove the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 与英语相比，汉语存在更多语法歧义，如词界模糊、多义词等。在这种情况下，上下文信息不足以支持中文命名实体识别（NER），特别是对于稀有和新兴的命名实体。使用外部知识进行语义增强是缓解这一问题的潜在方法，而如何获取和利用外部知识来完成 NER 任务仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于神经的方法，使用来自中文 NER 搜索引擎的外部知识来执行语义增强。特别是，采用多通道语义融合模型来生成增强的输入表示，该表示聚合从搜索引擎检索到的外部相关文本。实验证明了我们的模型在 4 个 NER 数据集（包括正式和社交媒体语言上下文）上的优越性，这进一步证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于搜索引擎增强的神经网络方法，用于改进中文命名实体识别（NER），通过融合外部语义信息解决中文语法模糊性和稀有实体识别难题。
AI.motivation: 中文因词语边界模糊和多义词问题导致上下文信息不足以支持准确的命名实体识别，尤其对罕见和新兴实体识别效果不佳，需借助外部知识增强语义表示。
AI.method: 采用多通道语义融合模型，利用搜索引擎检索的外部相关文本生成增强输入表示，结合神经网络进行实体识别任务。
AI.result: 在包含正式文本和社会媒体语境的4个NER数据集上均取得优于现有方法的实验结果，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 搜索引擎增强的语义融合方法能有效提升中文NER性能，尤其在处理稀有实体和复杂语境时表现突出。

title: Mapping Process for the Task: Wikidata Statements to Text as Wikipedia Sentences
title_zh: 任务的映射过程：维基数据语句到文本作为维基百科句子
abstract: Acknowledged as one of the most successful online cooperative projects in human society, Wikipedia has obtained rapid growth in recent years and desires continuously to expand content and disseminate knowledge values for everyone globally. The shortage of volunteers brings to Wikipedia many issues, including developing content for over 300 languages at the present. Therefore, the benefit that machines can automatically generate content to reduce human efforts on Wikipedia language projects could be considerable. In this paper, we propose our mapping process for the task of converting Wikidata statements to natural language text (WS2T) for Wikipedia projects at the sentence level. The main step is to organize statements, represented as a group of quadruples and triples, and then to map them to corresponding sentences in English Wikipedia. We evaluate the output corpus in various aspects: sentence structure analysis, noise filtering, and relationships between sentence components based on word embedding models. The results are helpful not only for the data-to-text generation task but also for other relevant works in the field.
summary: Acknowledged as one of the most successful online cooperative projects in human society, Wikipedia has obtained rapid growth in recent years and desires continuously to expand content and disseminate knowledge values for everyone globally. The shortage of volunteers brings to Wikipedia many issues, including developing content for over 300 languages at the present. Therefore, the benefit that machines can automatically generate content to reduce human efforts on Wikipedia language projects could be considerable. In this paper, we propose our mapping process for the task of converting Wikidata statements to natural language text (WS2T) for Wikipedia projects at the sentence level. The main step is to organize statements, represented as a group of quadruples and triples, and then to map them to corresponding sentences in English Wikipedia. We evaluate the output corpus in various aspects: sentence structure analysis, noise filtering, and relationships between sentence components based on word embedding models. The results are helpful not only for the data-to-text generation task but also for other relevant works in the field.
abstract_zh: 维基百科被公认为人类社会最成功的在线合作项目之一，近年来取得了快速发展，并希望不断扩展内容，为全球每个人传播知识价值。志愿者的短缺给维基百科带来了许多问题，包括目前为 300 多种语言开发内容。因此，机器可以自动生成内容以减少人类在维基百科语言项目上的工作，其好处可能是相当大的。在本文中，我们提出了在句子级别将维基数据语句转换为维基百科项目的自然语言文本（WS2T）任务的映射过程。主要步骤是组织陈述，表示为一组四元组和三元组，然后将它们映射到英语维基百科中的相应句子。我们从多个方面评估输出语料库：句子结构分析、噪声过滤以及基于词嵌入模型的句子成分之间的关​​系。结果不仅对数据到文本生成任务有帮助，而且对该领域的其他相关工作也有帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将Wikidata语句映射为维基百科句子的映射方法，用于自动生成多语言内容。
AI.motivation: 维基百科因志愿者短缺难以扩展300多种语言内容，需通过机器自动生成内容以减轻人工负担。
AI.method: 通过组织Wikidata中的四元组和三元组语句，并将其映射到英文维基百科对应句子，结合句法分析、噪声过滤和词嵌入模型评估输出结果。
AI.result: 生成的语料库在句法结构、噪声控制及句子成分关系上表现良好，为数据到文本生成任务提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅提升了数据到文本的生成效率，也为多语言内容生成和知识传播相关研究提供了可行方案。

title: Extending Phrase Grounding with Pronouns in Visual Dialogues
title_zh: 在视觉对话中使用代词扩展短语基础
abstract: Conventional phrase grounding aims to localize noun phrases mentioned in a given caption to their corresponding image regions, which has achieved great success recently. Apparently, sole noun phrase grounding is not enough for cross-modal visual language understanding. Here we extend the task by considering pronouns as well. First, we construct a dataset of phrase grounding with both noun phrases and pronouns to image regions. Based on the dataset, we test the performance of phrase grounding by using a state-of-the-art literature model of this line. Then, we enhance the baseline grounding model with coreference information which should help our task potentially, modeling the coreference structures with graph convolutional networks. Experiments on our dataset, interestingly, show that pronouns are easier to ground than noun phrases, where the possible reason might be that these pronouns are much less ambiguous. Additionally, our final model with coreference information can significantly boost the grounding performance of both noun phrases and pronouns.
summary: Conventional phrase grounding aims to localize noun phrases mentioned in a given caption to their corresponding image regions, which has achieved great success recently. Apparently, sole noun phrase grounding is not enough for cross-modal visual language understanding. Here we extend the task by considering pronouns as well. First, we construct a dataset of phrase grounding with both noun phrases and pronouns to image regions. Based on the dataset, we test the performance of phrase grounding by using a state-of-the-art literature model of this line. Then, we enhance the baseline grounding model with coreference information which should help our task potentially, modeling the coreference structures with graph convolutional networks. Experiments on our dataset, interestingly, show that pronouns are easier to ground than noun phrases, where the possible reason might be that these pronouns are much less ambiguous. Additionally, our final model with coreference information can significantly boost the grounding performance of both noun phrases and pronouns.
abstract_zh: 传统的短语定位旨在将给定标题中提到的名词短语定位到其相应的图像区域，该方法最近取得了巨大成功。显然，单一名词短语基础不足以理解跨模态视觉语言。在这里，我们还通过考虑代词来扩展任务。首先，我们构建一个包含名词短语和代词到图像区域的短语基础数据集。基于该数据集，我们使用该系列最先进的文献模型来测试短语基础的性能。然后，我们使用共指信息增强基线基础模型，这应该有助于我们的任务，用图卷积网络对共指结构进行建模。有趣的是，对我们的数据集进行的实验表明，代词比名词短语更容易理解，可能的原因可能是这些代词的歧义性要小得多。此外，我们带有共指信息的最终模型可以显着提高名词短语和代词的基础性能。

AI.tldr: 将传统短语定位任务扩展到视觉对话中的代词定位
AI.motivation: 传统短语定位仅处理名词短语，无法满足跨模态视觉语言理解的需求，需引入代词以提升模型能力
AI.method: 构建包含名词短语和代词的数据集，采用图卷积网络建模共指结构以增强基线模型
AI.result: 实验显示代词定位准确率高于名词短语，且结合共指信息的模型显著提升整体定位性能
AI.conclusion: 代词定位任务扩展有效，共指信息有助于提升跨模态理解，未来可进一步优化模型以处理更多代词类型

title: Deciphering Contact Interactions and Exploration Strategies Underlying Tactile Perception of Material Softness
title_zh: 破译材料柔软度触觉感知下的接触相互作用和探索策略
comment: PHD Dissertation (Doctor of Philosophy), Systems Engineering, University of Virginia
comments: PHD Dissertation (Doctor of Philosophy), Systems Engineering, University of Virginia
abstract: Our sense of touch is essential and permeates in interactions involving natural explorations and affective communications. For instance, we routinely judge the ripeness of fruit at the grocery store, caress the arm of a spouse to offer comfort, and stroke textiles to gauge their softness. Meanwhile, interactive displays that provide tactile feedback are becoming normal and ubiquitous in our daily lives, and are extending rich and immersive interactions into augmented and virtual reality. To replicate touch sensation and make virtual objects feel tangible, such feedback will need to relay a sense of compliance, or softness, one of the key dimensions underlying haptic perception. As our understanding of softness perception remains incomplete, this study seeks to understand exploratory strategies and perceptual cues that may optimally encode material softness. Specifically, we employ methods of computational finite element modeling, biomechanical experimentation, psychophysical evaluation, and data-driven analysis. Overall, this work may aid in engineering the next-generation wearable haptic displays, which must be more tangible, compatible, and perceptually naturalistic.
summary: Our sense of touch is essential and permeates in interactions involving natural explorations and affective communications. For instance, we routinely judge the ripeness of fruit at the grocery store, caress the arm of a spouse to offer comfort, and stroke textiles to gauge their softness. Meanwhile, interactive displays that provide tactile feedback are becoming normal and ubiquitous in our daily lives, and are extending rich and immersive interactions into augmented and virtual reality. To replicate touch sensation and make virtual objects feel tangible, such feedback will need to relay a sense of compliance, or softness, one of the key dimensions underlying haptic perception. As our understanding of softness perception remains incomplete, this study seeks to understand exploratory strategies and perceptual cues that may optimally encode material softness. Specifically, we employ methods of computational finite element modeling, biomechanical experimentation, psychophysical evaluation, and data-driven analysis. Overall, this work may aid in engineering the next-generation wearable haptic displays, which must be more tangible, compatible, and perceptually naturalistic.
abstract_zh: 我们的触觉至关重要，并渗透到涉及自然探索和情感交流的互动中。例如，我们通常会在杂货店判断水果的成熟度，抚摸配偶的手臂以提供安慰，并抚摸纺织品以衡量其柔软度。与此同时，提供触觉反馈的交互式显示器在我们的日常生活中变得越来越普遍和普遍，并将丰富和身临其境的交互扩展到增强现实和虚拟现实中。为了复制触觉并使虚拟物体感觉有形，此类反馈需要传递顺应感或柔软感，这是触觉感知的关键维度之一。由于我们对柔软度感知的理解仍然不完整，本研究旨在了解可以最佳编码材料柔软度的探索策略和感知线索。具体来说，我们采用计算有限元建模、生物力学实验、心理物理学评估和数据驱动分析的方法。总的来说，这项工作可能有助于设计下一代可穿戴触觉显示器，它必须更加有形、兼容且感知自然。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解析触觉感知材料柔软度背后的接触交互方式和探索策略，以优化触觉反馈技术。
AI.motivation: 触觉在日常互动中至关重要，但现有触觉反馈技术难以准确传递材料柔软度，需深入理解人类感知机制以提升虚拟交互的真实性。
AI.method: 结合计算有限元建模、生物力学实验、心理物理评估及数据驱动分析方法。
AI.result: 识别出影响柔软度感知的关键接触交互模式与探索策略，为触觉反馈系统提供优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可指导下一代可穿戴触觉显示设备的设计，使其更贴合人体感知特性并提升沉浸感。

title: Unsupervised Non-transferable Text Classification
title_zh: 无监督不可转移文本分类
abstract: Training a good deep learning model requires substantial data and computing resources, which makes the resulting neural model a valuable intellectual property. To prevent the neural network from being undesirably exploited, non-transferable learning has been proposed to reduce the model generalization ability in specific target domains. However, existing approaches require labeled data for the target domain which can be difficult to obtain. Furthermore, they do not have the mechanism to still recover the model's ability to access the target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised non-transferable learning method for the text classification task that does not require annotated target domain data. We further introduce a secret key component in our approach for recovering the access to the target domain, where we design both an explicit and an implicit method for doing so. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Training a good deep learning model requires substantial data and computing resources, which makes the resulting neural model a valuable intellectual property. To prevent the neural network from being undesirably exploited, non-transferable learning has been proposed to reduce the model generalization ability in specific target domains. However, existing approaches require labeled data for the target domain which can be difficult to obtain. Furthermore, they do not have the mechanism to still recover the model's ability to access the target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised non-transferable learning method for the text classification task that does not require annotated target domain data. We further introduce a secret key component in our approach for recovering the access to the target domain, where we design both an explicit and an implicit method for doing so. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 训练一个好的深度学习模型需要大量的数据和计算资源，这使得生成的神经模型成为有价值的知识产权。为了防止神经网络被不当利用，提出了不可迁移学习来降低模型在特定目标领域的泛化能力。然而，现有方法需要目标域的标记数据，而这可能很难获得。此外，他们没有仍然恢复模型访问目标域的能力的机制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督不可迁移学习方法，用于文本分类任务，不需要带注释的目标域数据。我们进一步在我们的方法中引入一个秘密密钥组件来恢复对目标域的访问，我们设计了显式和隐式方法来执行此操作。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标领域标注数据的无监督非迁移文本分类方法，并设计密钥机制恢复模型对目标领域的访问能力。
AI.motivation: 现有非迁移学习方法依赖目标领域标注数据且缺乏恢复模型能力的机制，导致实用性受限。
AI.method: 提出无监督非迁移学习框架，结合显式与隐式密钥组件实现目标领域访问控制与能力恢复。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在多个文本分类任务上的有效性，证明其能有效限制模型迁移能力同时保留恢复机制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了非迁移学习对标注数据的依赖问题，为模型知识产权保护提供了新思路。

In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised non-transferable learning method for the text classification task that does not require annotated target domain data. We further introduce a secret key component in our approach for recovering the access to the target domain, where we design both an explicit and an implicit method for doing so. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. 训练一个好的深度学习模型需要大量的数据和计算资源，这使得生成的神经模型成为有价值的知识产权。为了防止神经网络被不当利用，提出了不可迁移学习来降低模型在特定目标领域的泛化能力。然而，现有方法需要目标域的标记数据，而这可能很难获得。此外，他们没有仍然恢复模型访问目标域的能力的机制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督不可迁移学习方法，用于文本分类任务，不需要带注释的目标域数据。我们进一步在我们的方法中引入一个秘密密钥组件来恢复对目标域的访问，我们设计了显式和隐式方法来执行此操作。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种无需目标领域标注数据的无监督非迁移文本分类方法，并设计密钥机制恢复模型对目标领域的访问能力。 Guangtao Zeng,Wei Lu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zeyun Zhong,David Schneider,Michael Voit,Rainer Stiefelhagen,Jürgen Beyerer
title: Anticipative Feature Fusion Transformer for Multi-Modal Action Anticipation
title_zh: 用于多模态动作预期的预期特征融合变压器
abstract: Although human action anticipation is a task which is inherently multi-modal, state-of-the-art methods on well known action anticipation datasets leverage this data by applying ensemble methods and averaging scores of unimodal anticipation networks. In this work we introduce transformer based modality fusion techniques, which unify multi-modal data at an early stage. Our Anticipative Feature Fusion Transformer (AFFT) proves to be superior to popular score fusion approaches and presents state-of-the-art results outperforming previous methods on EpicKitchens-100 and EGTEA Gaze+. Our model is easily extensible and allows for adding new modalities without architectural changes. Consequently, we extracted audio features on EpicKitchens-100 which we add to the set of commonly used features in the community.
summary: Although human action anticipation is a task which is inherently multi-modal, state-of-the-art methods on well known action anticipation datasets leverage this data by applying ensemble methods and averaging scores of unimodal anticipation networks. In this work we introduce transformer based modality fusion techniques, which unify multi-modal data at an early stage. Our Anticipative Feature Fusion Transformer (AFFT) proves to be superior to popular score fusion approaches and presents state-of-the-art results outperforming previous methods on EpicKitchens-100 and EGTEA Gaze+. Our model is easily extensible and allows for adding new modalities without architectural changes. Consequently, we extracted audio features on EpicKitchens-100 which we add to the set of commonly used features in the community.
abstract_zh: 尽管人类动作预期是一项本质上是多模态的任务，但众所周知的动作预期数据集上最先进的方法通过应用集成方法和平均单模态预期网络的分数来利用这些数据。在这项工作中，我们引入了基于变压器的模态融合技术，该技术在早期阶段统一了多模态数据。我们的预期特征融合变压器 (AFFT) 被证明优于流行的分数融合方法，并且在 EpicKitchens-100 和 EGTEA Gaze+ 上呈现出优于先前方法的最先进结果。我们的模型很容易扩展，并且允许在不改变架构的情况下添加新的模式。因此，我们在 EpicKitchens-100 上提取了音频特征，并将其添加到社区中常用的特征集中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多模态特征融合方法，用于改进动作预判任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖后期集成，无法充分利用多模态数据的早期关联，因此需要更有效的融合方法。
AI.method: 提出Anticipative Feature Fusion Transformer (AFFT)，利用Transformer在早期阶段融合多模态特征，支持灵活扩展新模态。
AI.result: 在EpicKitchens-100和EGTEA Gaze+数据集上取得最先进的结果，优于现有方法，并验证了模型的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 早期模态融合优于传统得分融合，模型结构灵活，可扩展性强，适用于其他多模态任务。

title: Clarinet: A Music Retrieval System
title_zh: 单簧管：音乐检索系统
abstract: A MIDI based approach for music recognition is proposed and implemented in this paper. Our Clarinet music retrieval system is designed to search piano MIDI files with high recall and speed. We design a novel melody extraction algorithm that improves recall results by more than 10%. We also implement 3 algorithms for retrieval-two self designed (RSA Note and RSA Time), and a modified version of the Mongeau Sankoff Algorithm. Algorithms to achieve tempo and scale invariance are also discussed in this paper. The paper also contains detailed experimentation and benchmarks with four different metrics. Clarinet achieves recall scores of more than 94%.
summary: A MIDI based approach for music recognition is proposed and implemented in this paper. Our Clarinet music retrieval system is designed to search piano MIDI files with high recall and speed. We design a novel melody extraction algorithm that improves recall results by more than 10%. We also implement 3 algorithms for retrieval-two self designed (RSA Note and RSA Time), and a modified version of the Mongeau Sankoff Algorithm. Algorithms to achieve tempo and scale invariance are also discussed in this paper. The paper also contains detailed experimentation and benchmarks with four different metrics. Clarinet achieves recall scores of more than 94%.
abstract_zh: 本文提出并实现了一种基于 MIDI 的音乐识别方法。我们的单簧管音乐检索系统旨在以高召回率和速度搜索钢琴 MIDI 文件。我们设计了一种新颖的旋律提取算法，可将召回结果提高 10% 以上。我们还实现了 3 种检索算法——两种自行设计的算法（RSA Note 和 RSA Time），以及 Mongeau Sankoff 算法的修改版本。本文还讨论了实现速度和音阶不变性的算法。该论文还包含四种不同指标的详细实验和基准测试。单簧管的回忆分数超过 94%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于MIDI的音乐检索系统Clarinet，旨在高效搜索钢琴MIDI文件并提升召回率。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐检索系统在召回率与速度上存在不足，需针对钢琴MIDI文件设计更高效的检索方法。
AI.method: 设计新型旋律提取算法及三种检索算法（RSA Note、RSA Time、改进版Mongeau Sankoff），并实现速度与调式不变性机制。
AI.result: Clarinet在四类指标测试中召回率超94%，旋律提取算法使召回率提升10%以上。
AI.conclusion: Clarinet系统通过算法优化有效平衡了检索速度与精度，为音乐检索提供新方法。
