title: PoKE: Prior Knowledge Enhanced Emotional Support Conversation with Latent Variable
title_zh: PoKE：先验知识增强情感支持对话与潜在变量
abstract: Emotional support conversation (ESC) task can utilize various support strategies to help people relieve emotional distress and overcome the problem they face, which has attracted much attention in these years. However, most state-of-the-art works rely heavily on external commonsense knowledge to infer the mental state of the user in every dialogue round. Although effective, they may suffer from significant human effort, knowledge update and domain change in a long run. Therefore, in this article, we focus on exploring the task itself without using any external knowledge. We find all existing works ignore two significant characteristics of ESC. (a) Abundant prior knowledge exists in historical conversations, such as the responses to similar cases and the general order of support strategies, which has a great reference value for current conversation. (b) There is a one-to-many mapping relationship between context and support strategy, i.e.multiple strategies are reasonable for a single context. It lays a better foundation for the diversity of generations. Taking into account these two key factors, we propose Prior Knowledge Enhanced emotional support model with latent variable, PoKE. The proposed model fully taps the potential of prior knowledge in terms of exemplars and strategy sequence and then utilizes a latent variable to model the one-to-many relationship of strategy. Furthermore, we introduce a memory schema to incorporate the encoded knowledge into decoder. Experiment results on benchmark dataset show that our PoKE outperforms existing baselines on both automatic evaluation and human evaluation. Compared with the model using external knowledge, PoKE still can make a slight improvement in some metrics. Further experiments prove that abundant prior knowledge is conducive to high-quality emotional support, and a well-learned latent variable is critical to the diversity of generations.
summary: Emotional support conversation (ESC) task can utilize various support strategies to help people relieve emotional distress and overcome the problem they face, which has attracted much attention in these years. However, most state-of-the-art works rely heavily on external commonsense knowledge to infer the mental state of the user in every dialogue round. Although effective, they may suffer from significant human effort, knowledge update and domain change in a long run. Therefore, in this article, we focus on exploring the task itself without using any external knowledge. We find all existing works ignore two significant characteristics of ESC. (a) Abundant prior knowledge exists in historical conversations, such as the responses to similar cases and the general order of support strategies, which has a great reference value for current conversation. (b) There is a one-to-many mapping relationship between context and support strategy, i.e.multiple strategies are reasonable for a single context. It lays a better foundation for the diversity of generations. Taking into account these two key factors, we propose Prior Knowledge Enhanced emotional support model with latent variable, PoKE. The proposed model fully taps the potential of prior knowledge in terms of exemplars and strategy sequence and then utilizes a latent variable to model the one-to-many relationship of strategy. Furthermore, we introduce a memory schema to incorporate the encoded knowledge into decoder. Experiment results on benchmark dataset show that our PoKE outperforms existing baselines on both automatic evaluation and human evaluation. Compared with the model using external knowledge, PoKE still can make a slight improvement in some metrics. Further experiments prove that abundant prior knowledge is conducive to high-quality emotional support, and a well-learned latent variable is critical to the diversity of generations.
abstract_zh: 情绪支持对话（ESC）任务可以利用各种支持策略来帮助人们缓解情绪困扰并克服所面临的问题，近年来备受关注。然而，大多数最先进的作品都严重依赖外部常识知识来推断用户在每轮对话中的心理状态。尽管有效，但从长远来看，它们可能会受到大量人力、知识更新和领域变化的影响。因此，在本文中，我们专注于探索任务本身，而不使用任何外部知识。我们发现所有现有的工作都忽略了 ESC 的两个重要特征。 (a) 历史对话中存在丰富的先验知识，例如对类似案例的反应以及支持策略的一般顺序，对当前对话具有很大的参考价值。 (b)上下文和支持策略之间存在一对多的映射关系，即对于单个上下文，多个策略是合理的。它为世代的多样性奠定了更好的基础。考虑到这两个关键因素，我们提出了带有潜在变量的先验知识增强情感支持模型PoKE。该模型充分挖掘了先验知识在样本和策略序列方面的潜力，然后利用潜在变量对策略的一对多关系进行建模。此外，我们引入了一种内存模式，将编码知识合并到解码器中。基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 PoKE 在自动评估和人工评估方面均优于现有基线。与使用外部知识的模型相比，PoKE 在某些指标上仍然可以做出微小的改进。进一步的实验证明，丰富的先验知识有利于高质量的情感支持，而良好学习的潜在变量对于世代的多样性至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部知识的情感支持对话模型PoKE，通过挖掘历史对话中的先验知识和引入潜在变量来提升对话质量与多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持对话模型过度依赖外部常识知识，导致人力成本高且难以适应领域变化，而对话历史中蕴含的先验知识未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 提出PoKE模型，通过记忆模块提取历史对话中的案例与策略序列知识，并利用潜在变量建模上下文到多策略的映射关系以增强生成多样性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，PoKE在自动评估和人工评估中均优于现有基线模型，且部分指标超越使用外部知识的模型，验证了先验知识与潜在变量的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PoKE通过有效利用对话历史中的先验知识和潜在变量，为情感支持对话提供了无需外部知识的高质量、多样化生成方案。

motivation: 现有情感支持对话模型过度依赖外部常识知识，导致人力成本高且难以适应领域变化，而对话历史中蕴含的先验知识未被充分挖掘。
method: 提出PoKE模型，通过记忆模块提取历史对话中的案例与策略序列知识，并利用潜在变量建模上下文到多策略的映射关系以增强生成多样性。
result: 在基准数据集上，PoKE在自动评估和人工评估中均优于现有基线模型，且部分指标超越使用外部知识的模型，验证了先验知识与潜在变量的有效性。
conclusion: PoKE通过有效利用对话历史中的先验知识和潜在变量，为情感支持对话提供了无需外部知识的高质量、多样化生成方案。
search_text: PoKE: Prior Knowledge Enhanced Emotional Support Conversation with Latent Variable PoKE：先验知识增强情感支持对话与潜在变量 Emotional support conversation (ESC) task can utilize various support strategies to help people relieve emotional distress and overcome the problem they face, which has attracted much attention in these years. However, most state-of-the-art works rely heavily on external commonsense knowledge to infer the mental state of the user in every dialogue round. Although effective, they may suffer from significant human effort, knowledge update and domain change in a long run. Therefore, in this article, we focus on exploring the task itself without using any external knowledge. We find all existing works ignore two significant characteristics of ESC. (a) Abundant prior knowledge exists in historical conversations, such as the responses to similar cases and the general order of support strategies, which has a great reference value for current conversation. (b) There is a one-to-many mapping relationship between context and support strategy, i.e.multiple strategies are reasonable for a single context. It lays a better foundation for the diversity of generations. Taking into account these two key factors, we propose Prior Knowledge Enhanced emotional support model with latent variable, PoKE. The proposed model fully taps the potential of prior knowledge in terms of exemplars and strategy sequence and then utilizes a latent variable to model the one-to-many relationship of strategy. Furthermore, we introduce a memory schema to incorporate the encoded knowledge into decoder. Experiment results on benchmark dataset show that our PoKE outperforms existing baselines on both automatic evaluation and human evaluation. Compared with the model using external knowledge, PoKE still can make a slight improvement in some metrics. Further experiments prove that abundant prior knowledge is conducive to high-quality emotional support, and a well-learned latent variable is critical to the diversity of generations. 情绪支持对话（ESC）任务可以利用各种支持策略来帮助人们缓解情绪困扰并克服所面临的问题，近年来备受关注。然而，大多数最先进的作品都严重依赖外部常识知识来推断用户在每轮对话中的心理状态。尽管有效，但从长远来看，它们可能会受到大量人力、知识更新和领域变化的影响。因此，在本文中，我们专注于探索任务本身，而不使用任何外部知识。我们发现所有现有的工作都忽略了 ESC 的两个重要特征。 (a) 历史对话中存在丰富的先验知识，例如对类似案例的反应以及支持策略的一般顺序，对当前对话具有很大的参考价值。 (b)上下文和支持策略之间存在一对多的映射关系，即对于单个上下文，多个策略是合理的。它为世代的多样性奠定了更好的基础。考虑到这两个关键因素，我们提出了带有潜在变量的先验知识增强情感支持模型PoKE。该模型充分挖掘了先验知识在样本和策略序列方面的潜力，然后利用潜在变量对策略的一对多关系进行建模。此外，我们引入了一种内存模式，将编码知识合并到解码器中。基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 PoKE 在自动评估和人工评估方面均优于现有基线。与使用外部知识的模型相比，PoKE 在某些指标上仍然可以做出微小的改进。进一步的实验证明，丰富的先验知识有利于高质量的情感支持，而良好学习的潜在变量对于世代的多样性至关重要。 本文提出了一种无需外部知识的情感支持对话模型PoKE，通过挖掘历史对话中的先验知识和引入潜在变量来提升对话质量与多样性。 Xiaohan Xu,Xuying Meng,Yequan Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Quantitative Evidence on Overlooked Aspects of Enrollment Speaker Embeddings for Target Speaker Separation
title_zh: 用于目标说话人分离的注册说话人嵌入被忽视方面的定量证据
abstract: Single channel target speaker separation (TSS) aims at extracting a speaker's voice from a mixture of multiple talkers given an enrollment utterance of that speaker. A typical deep learning TSS framework consists of an upstream model that obtains enrollment speaker embeddings and a downstream model that performs the separation conditioned on the embeddings. In this paper, we look into several important but overlooked aspects of the enrollment embeddings, including the suitability of the widely used speaker identification embeddings, the introduction of the log-mel filterbank and self-supervised embeddings, and the embeddings' cross-dataset generalization capability. Our results show that the speaker identification embeddings could lose relevant information due to a sub-optimal metric, training objective, or common pre-processing. In contrast, both the filterbank and the self-supervised embeddings preserve the integrity of the speaker information, but the former consistently outperforms the latter in a cross-dataset evaluation. The competitive separation and generalization performance of the previously overlooked filterbank embedding is consistent across our study, which calls for future research on better upstream features.
summary: Single channel target speaker separation (TSS) aims at extracting a speaker's voice from a mixture of multiple talkers given an enrollment utterance of that speaker. A typical deep learning TSS framework consists of an upstream model that obtains enrollment speaker embeddings and a downstream model that performs the separation conditioned on the embeddings. In this paper, we look into several important but overlooked aspects of the enrollment embeddings, including the suitability of the widely used speaker identification embeddings, the introduction of the log-mel filterbank and self-supervised embeddings, and the embeddings' cross-dataset generalization capability. Our results show that the speaker identification embeddings could lose relevant information due to a sub-optimal metric, training objective, or common pre-processing. In contrast, both the filterbank and the self-supervised embeddings preserve the integrity of the speaker information, but the former consistently outperforms the latter in a cross-dataset evaluation. The competitive separation and generalization performance of the previously overlooked filterbank embedding is consistent across our study, which calls for future research on better upstream features.
abstract_zh: 单通道目标说话者分离 (TSS) 的目的是在给定说话者的注册话语的情况下，从多个说话者的混合中提取该说话者的声音。典型的深度学习 TSS 框架由获取注册说话人嵌入的上游模型和根据嵌入执行分离的下游模型组成。在本文中，我们研究了注册嵌入的几个重要但被忽视的方面，包括广泛使用的说话人识别嵌入的适用性、log-mel 滤波器组和自监督嵌入的引入，以及嵌入的跨数据集泛化能力。我们的结果表明，说话人识别嵌入可能会由于次优指标、训练目标或常见预处理而丢失相关信息。相比之下，滤波器组和自监督嵌入都保留了说话人信息的完整性，但前者在跨数据集评估中始终优于后者。之前被忽视的滤波器组嵌入的竞争性分离和泛化性能在我们的研究中是一致的，这需要未来对更好的上游特征的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究目标说话人分离中被忽视的注册说话人嵌入特性，比较不同嵌入方法对分离效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注说话人识别嵌入，但其可能因度量方式或预处理导致信息丢失，而其他嵌入方法（如log-mel滤波器、自监督嵌入）的潜力未被充分验证。
AI.method: 通过定量实验对比分析三类嵌入：传统说话人识别嵌入、log-mel滤波器提取的嵌入及自监督学习嵌入，并评估其跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.result: 说话人识别嵌入因子优度量等问题导致信息损失，而log-mel嵌入在保持说话人信息完整性方面优于自监督嵌入，且在跨数据集测试中表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: log-mel滤波器嵌入在分离性能和泛化能力上具有竞争力，未来应进一步探索更优的上游特征提取方法。

title: RSVG: Exploring Data and Models for Visual Grounding on Remote Sensing Data
title_zh: RSVG：探索遥感数据视觉基础的数据和模型
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the task of visual grounding for remote sensing data (RSVG). RSVG aims to localize the referred objects in remote sensing (RS) images with the guidance of natural language. To retrieve rich information from RS imagery using natural language, many research tasks, like RS image visual question answering, RS image captioning, and RS image-text retrieval have been investigated a lot. However, the object-level visual grounding on RS images is still under-explored. Thus, in this work, we propose to construct the dataset and explore deep learning models for the RSVG task. Specifically, our contributions can be summarized as follows. 1) We build the new large-scale benchmark dataset of RSVG, termed RSVGD, to fully advance the research of RSVG. This new dataset includes image/expression/box triplets for training and evaluating visual grounding models. 2) We benchmark extensive state-of-the-art (SOTA) natural image visual grounding methods on the constructed RSVGD dataset, and some insightful analyses are provided based on the results. 3) A novel transformer-based Multi-Level Cross-Modal feature learning (MLCM) module is proposed. Remotely-sensed images are usually with large scale variations and cluttered backgrounds. To deal with the scale-variation problem, the MLCM module takes advantage of multi-scale visual features and multi-granularity textual embeddings to learn more discriminative representations. To cope with the cluttered background problem, MLCM adaptively filters irrelevant noise and enhances salient features. In this way, our proposed model can incorporate more effective multi-level and multi-modal features to boost performance. Furthermore, this work also provides useful insights for developing better RSVG models. The dataset and code will be publicly available at https://github.com/ZhanYang-nwpu/RSVG-pytorch.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the task of visual grounding for remote sensing data (RSVG). RSVG aims to localize the referred objects in remote sensing (RS) images with the guidance of natural language. To retrieve rich information from RS imagery using natural language, many research tasks, like RS image visual question answering, RS image captioning, and RS image-text retrieval have been investigated a lot. However, the object-level visual grounding on RS images is still under-explored. Thus, in this work, we propose to construct the dataset and explore deep learning models for the RSVG task. Specifically, our contributions can be summarized as follows. 1) We build the new large-scale benchmark dataset of RSVG, termed RSVGD, to fully advance the research of RSVG. This new dataset includes image/expression/box triplets for training and evaluating visual grounding models. 2) We benchmark extensive state-of-the-art (SOTA) natural image visual grounding methods on the constructed RSVGD dataset, and some insightful analyses are provided based on the results. 3) A novel transformer-based Multi-Level Cross-Modal feature learning (MLCM) module is proposed. Remotely-sensed images are usually with large scale variations and cluttered backgrounds. To deal with the scale-variation problem, the MLCM module takes advantage of multi-scale visual features and multi-granularity textual embeddings to learn more discriminative representations. To cope with the cluttered background problem, MLCM adaptively filters irrelevant noise and enhances salient features. In this way, our proposed model can incorporate more effective multi-level and multi-modal features to boost performance. Furthermore, this work also provides useful insights for developing better RSVG models. The dataset and code will be publicly available at https://github.com/ZhanYang-nwpu/RSVG-pytorch.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了遥感数据视觉接地（RSVG）的任务。 RSVG旨在在自然语言的指导下定位遥感（RS）图像中的参考对象。为了使用自然语言从遥感图像中检索丰富的信息，人们对遥感图像视觉问答、遥感图像字幕和遥感图像文本检索等许多研究任务进行了大量研究。然而，遥感图像上的物体级视觉基础仍处于探索之中。因此，在这项工作中，我们建议构建数据集并探索 RSVG 任务的深度学习模型。具体来说，我们的贡献可以总结如下。 1）我们构建了RSVG新的大规模基准数据集RSVGD，以全面推进RSVG的研究。这个新数据集包括用于训练和评估视觉基础模型的图像/表达式/框三元组。 2）我们在构建的RSVGD数据集上对广泛的最先进（SOTA）自然图像视觉基础方法进行了基准测试，并根据结果提供了一些富有洞察力的分析。 3）提出了一种新型的基于变压器的多级跨模态特征学习（MLCM）模块。遥感图像通常具有较大的尺度变化和杂乱的背景。为了处理尺度变化问题，MLCM 模块利用多尺度视觉特征和多粒度文本嵌入来学习更具辨别力的表示。为了应对杂乱的背景问题，MLCM 自适应地过滤不相关的噪声并增强显着特征。通过这种方式，我们提出的模型可以结合更有效的多层次和多模式特征来提高性能。此外，这项工作还为开发更好的 RSVG 模型提供了有用的见解。数据集和代码将在 https://github.com/ZhanYang-nwpu/RSVG-pytorch 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对遥感图像的视觉定位任务（RSVG），通过构建大规模数据集RSVGD和设计多级跨模态特征学习模块MLCM，推动遥感图像与自然语言的结合研究。
AI.motivation: 尽管遥感图像在问答、 captioning等任务上已有研究，但基于自然语言的物体级视觉定位仍处于探索阶段，缺乏统一的数据集和有效模型。
AI.method: 构建包含图像/表达式/框三元组的RSVGD数据集，基准测试SOTA视觉定位方法，并提出MLCM模块，通过多尺度视觉特征与多粒度文本嵌入处理尺度变化和复杂背景问题。
AI.result: 在RSVGD数据集上验证了MLCM模块的有效性，提供了对现有方法的基准分析，并展示了模型在处理遥感图像尺度差异和背景干扰方面的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文为RSVG任务提供了首个大规模基准数据集和创新模型，为未来研究提供了数据支持和方法启示，相关资源已开源。

method: 构建包含图像/表达式/框三元组的RSVGD数据集，基准测试SOTA视觉定位方法，并提出MLCM模块，通过多尺度视觉特征与多粒度文本嵌入处理尺度变化和复杂背景问题。
result: 在RSVGD数据集上验证了MLCM模块的有效性，提供了对现有方法的基准分析，并展示了模型在处理遥感图像尺度差异和背景干扰方面的性能提升。
conclusion: 本文为RSVG任务提供了首个大规模基准数据集和创新模型，为未来研究提供了数据支持和方法启示，相关资源已开源。
search_text: RSVG: Exploring Data and Models for Visual Grounding on Remote Sensing Data RSVG：探索遥感数据视觉基础的数据和模型 In this paper, we introduce the task of visual grounding for remote sensing data (RSVG). RSVG aims to localize the referred objects in remote sensing (RS) images with the guidance of natural language. To retrieve rich information from RS imagery using natural language, many research tasks, like RS image visual question answering, RS image captioning, and RS image-text retrieval have been investigated a lot. However, the object-level visual grounding on RS images is still under-explored. Thus, in this work, we propose to construct the dataset and explore deep learning models for the RSVG task. Specifically, our contributions can be summarized as follows. 1) We build the new large-scale benchmark dataset of RSVG, termed RSVGD, to fully advance the research of RSVG. This new dataset includes image/expression/box triplets for training and evaluating visual grounding models. 2) We benchmark extensive state-of-the-art (SOTA) natural image visual grounding methods on the constructed RSVGD dataset, and some insightful analyses are provided based on the results. 3) A novel transformer-based Multi-Level Cross-Modal feature learning (MLCM) module is proposed. Remotely-sensed images are usually with large scale variations and cluttered backgrounds. To deal with the scale-variation problem, the MLCM module takes advantage of multi-scale visual features and multi-granularity textual embeddings to learn more discriminative representations. To cope with the cluttered background problem, MLCM adaptively filters irrelevant noise and enhances salient features. In this way, our proposed model can incorporate more effective multi-level and multi-modal features to boost performance. Furthermore, this work also provides useful insights for developing better RSVG models. The dataset and code will be publicly available at https://github.com/ZhanYang-nwpu/RSVG-pytorch. 在本文中，我们介绍了遥感数据视觉接地（RSVG）的任务。 RSVG旨在在自然语言的指导下定位遥感（RS）图像中的参考对象。为了使用自然语言从遥感图像中检索丰富的信息，人们对遥感图像视觉问答、遥感图像字幕和遥感图像文本检索等许多研究任务进行了大量研究。然而，遥感图像上的物体级视觉基础仍处于探索之中。因此，在这项工作中，我们建议构建数据集并探索 RSVG 任务的深度学习模型。具体来说，我们的贡献可以总结如下。 1）我们构建了RSVG新的大规模基准数据集RSVGD，以全面推进RSVG的研究。这个新数据集包括用于训练和评估视觉基础模型的图像/表达式/框三元组。 2）我们在构建的RSVGD数据集上对广泛的最先进（SOTA）自然图像视觉基础方法进行了基准测试，并根据结果提供了一些富有洞察力的分析。 3）提出了一种新型的基于变压器的多级跨模态特征学习（MLCM）模块。遥感图像通常具有较大的尺度变化和杂乱的背景。为了处理尺度变化问题，MLCM 模块利用多尺度视觉特征和多粒度文本嵌入来学习更具辨别力的表示。为了应对杂乱的背景问题，MLCM 自适应地过滤不相关的噪声并增强显着特征。通过这种方式，我们提出的模型可以结合更有效的多层次和多模式特征来提高性能。此外，这项工作还为开发更好的 RSVG 模型提供了有用的见解。数据集和代码将在 https://github.com/ZhanYang-nwpu/RSVG-pytorch 公开提供。 本文提出了一种针对遥感图像的视觉定位任务（RSVG），通过构建大规模数据集RSVGD和设计多级跨模态特征学习模块MLCM，推动遥感图像与自然语言的结合研究。 Yang Zhan,Zhitong Xiong,Yuan Yuan cs.CV

title: LEAGUE: Guided Skill Learning and Abstraction for Long-Horizon Manipulation
title_zh: LEAGUE：长视野操纵的引导技能学习和抽象
abstract: To assist with everyday human activities, robots must solve complex long-horizon tasks and generalize to new settings. Recent deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise in fully autonomous learning, but they struggle to reach long-term goals in large environments. On the other hand, Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) approaches excel at solving and generalizing across long-horizon tasks, thanks to their powerful state and action abstractions. But they assume predefined skill sets, which limits their real-world applications. In this work, we combine the benefits of these two paradigms and propose an integrated task planning and skill learning framework named LEAGUE (Learning and Abstraction with Guidance). LEAGUE leverages the symbolic interface of a task planner to guide RL-based skill learning and creates abstract state space to enable skill reuse. More importantly, LEAGUE learns manipulation skills in-situ of the task planning system, continuously growing its capability and the set of tasks that it can solve. We evaluate LEAGUE on four challenging simulated task domains and show that LEAGUE outperforms baselines by large margins. We also show that the learned skills can be reused to accelerate learning in new tasks domains and transfer to a physical robot platform.
summary: To assist with everyday human activities, robots must solve complex long-horizon tasks and generalize to new settings. Recent deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise in fully autonomous learning, but they struggle to reach long-term goals in large environments. On the other hand, Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) approaches excel at solving and generalizing across long-horizon tasks, thanks to their powerful state and action abstractions. But they assume predefined skill sets, which limits their real-world applications. In this work, we combine the benefits of these two paradigms and propose an integrated task planning and skill learning framework named LEAGUE (Learning and Abstraction with Guidance). LEAGUE leverages the symbolic interface of a task planner to guide RL-based skill learning and creates abstract state space to enable skill reuse. More importantly, LEAGUE learns manipulation skills in-situ of the task planning system, continuously growing its capability and the set of tasks that it can solve. We evaluate LEAGUE on four challenging simulated task domains and show that LEAGUE outperforms baselines by large margins. We also show that the learned skills can be reused to accelerate learning in new tasks domains and transfer to a physical robot platform.
abstract_zh: 为了协助人类的日常活动，机器人必须解决复杂的长期任务并推广到新的环境。 Recent deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise in fully autonomous learning, but they struggle to reach long-term goals in large environments. On the other hand, Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) approaches excel at solving and generalizing across long-horizon tasks, thanks to their powerful state and action abstractions.但他们假设了预定义的技能集，这限制了他们在现实世界中的应用。 In this work, we combine the benefits of these two paradigms and propose an integrated task planning and skill learning framework named LEAGUE (Learning and Abstraction with Guidance). LEAGUE leverages the symbolic interface of a task planner to guide RL-based skill learning and creates abstract state space to enable skill reuse. More importantly, LEAGUE learns manipulation skills in-situ of the task planning system, continuously growing its capability and the set of tasks that it can solve.我们在四个具有挑战性的模拟任务领域对 LEAGUE 进行了评估，结果表明 LEAGUE 的性能大幅优于基线。我们还表明，学到的技能可以重复使用，以加速新任务领域的学习，并转移到物理机器人平台。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEAGUE框架，结合任务规划与技能学习，解决机器人长时域操作任务中的泛化与复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习难以处理长时域任务，而任务与运动规划依赖预定义技能集，限制了实际应用。需融合两者优势以提升机器人自主性与适应性。
AI.method: LEAGUE通过任务规划器的符号接口引导基于RL的技能学习，构建抽象状态空间实现技能复用，并在任务规划系统中实时学习新技能。
AI.result: 在四个模拟任务领域中显著优于基线方法，学习到的技能可加速新任务学习并迁移至物理机器人平台。
AI.conclusion: LEAGUE通过整合任务规划与技能学习，实现了长时域操作任务的有效解决与持续能力扩展。

title: Spending Thinking Time Wisely: Accelerating MCTS with Virtual Expansions
title_zh: 明智地花费思考时间：通过虚拟扩展加速 MCTS
abstract: One of the most important AI research questions is to trade off computation versus performance since ``perfect rationality" exists in theory but is impossible to achieve in practice. Recently, Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) has attracted considerable attention due to the significant performance improvement in various challenging domains. However, the expensive time cost during search severely restricts its scope for applications. This paper proposes the Virtual MCTS (V-MCTS), a variant of MCTS that spends more search time on harder states and less search time on simpler states adaptively. We give theoretical bounds of the proposed method and evaluate the performance and computations on $9 \times 9$ Go board games and Atari games. Experiments show that our method can achieve comparable performances to the original search algorithm while requiring less than $50\%$ search time on average. We believe that this approach is a viable alternative for tasks under limited time and resources. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/YeWR/V-MCTS.git}.
summary: One of the most important AI research questions is to trade off computation versus performance since ``perfect rationality" exists in theory but is impossible to achieve in practice. Recently, Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) has attracted considerable attention due to the significant performance improvement in various challenging domains. However, the expensive time cost during search severely restricts its scope for applications. This paper proposes the Virtual MCTS (V-MCTS), a variant of MCTS that spends more search time on harder states and less search time on simpler states adaptively. We give theoretical bounds of the proposed method and evaluate the performance and computations on $9 \times 9$ Go board games and Atari games. Experiments show that our method can achieve comparable performances to the original search algorithm while requiring less than $50\%$ search time on average. We believe that this approach is a viable alternative for tasks under limited time and resources. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/YeWR/V-MCTS.git}.
abstract_zh: 最重要的人工智能研究问题之一是权衡计算与性能，因为“完美理性”在理论上存在，但在实践中不可能实现。最近，蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）由于在各种具有挑战性的领域中的显着性能改进而引起了相当多的关注。然而，搜索过程中昂贵的时间成本严重限制了其应用范围。本文提出了虚拟MCTS（V-MCTS），它是MCTS的一种变体，它自适应地在较困难的状态上花费更多的搜索时间，在较简单的状态上花费更少的搜索时间。我们给出了所提出方法的理论界限，并评估了 9 美元×9 美元的围棋棋盘游戏和 Atari 游戏的性能和计算。实验表明，我们的方法可以实现与原始搜索算法相当的性能，同时平均需要不到 50 美元的搜索时间。我们相信，这种方法对于时间和资源有限的任务来说是一个可行的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出虚拟蒙特卡洛树搜索（V-MCTS），通过自适应分配搜索时间以提升MCTS效率。
AI.motivation: MCTS在复杂领域表现优异但计算成本高，限制了其应用范围，需在有限时间和资源下优化搜索效率。
AI.method: 设计V-MCTS方法，根据状态难度动态调整搜索时间分配，并提供理论分析及在围棋和Atari游戏中的实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，V-MCTS在保持性能的同时平均搜索时间减少超50%。
AI.conclusion: V-MCTS为资源受限场景提供了可行的替代方案，平衡了计算成本与性能表现。

title: Facial De-occlusion Network for Virtual Telepresence Systems
title_zh: 用于虚拟远程呈现系统的面部去遮挡网络
comment: This workshop paper is presented in CVPR Workshop on Computer Vision for Augmented and Virtual Reality, New Orleans, LA, 2022. Link: https://xr.cornell.edu/workshop/2022/papers
comments: This workshop paper is presented in CVPR Workshop on Computer Vision for Augmented and Virtual Reality, New Orleans, LA, 2022. Link: https://xr.cornell.edu/workshop/2022/papers
abstract: To see what is not in the image is one of the broader missions of computer vision. Technology to inpaint images has made significant progress with the coming of deep learning. This paper proposes a method to tackle occlusion specific to human faces. Virtual presence is a promising direction in communication and recreation for the future. However, Virtual Reality (VR) headsets occlude a significant portion of the face, hindering the photo-realistic appearance of the face in the virtual world. State-of-the-art image inpainting methods for de-occluding the eye region does not give usable results. To this end, we propose a working solution that gives usable results to tackle this problem enabling the use of the real-time photo-realistic de-occluded face of the user in VR settings.
summary: To see what is not in the image is one of the broader missions of computer vision. Technology to inpaint images has made significant progress with the coming of deep learning. This paper proposes a method to tackle occlusion specific to human faces. Virtual presence is a promising direction in communication and recreation for the future. However, Virtual Reality (VR) headsets occlude a significant portion of the face, hindering the photo-realistic appearance of the face in the virtual world. State-of-the-art image inpainting methods for de-occluding the eye region does not give usable results. To this end, we propose a working solution that gives usable results to tackle this problem enabling the use of the real-time photo-realistic de-occluded face of the user in VR settings.
abstract_zh: 看到图像中没有的东西是计算机视觉更广泛的使命之一。随着深度学习的到来，图像修复技术取得了重大进展。本文提出了一种解决人脸遮挡问题的方法。虚拟存在是未来沟通和娱乐的一个有前途的方向。然而，虚拟现实 (VR) 耳机遮挡了脸部的很大一部分，阻碍了虚拟世界中脸部的照片般逼真的外观。用于去遮挡眼睛区域的最先进的图像修复方法并不能给出可用的结果。为此，我们提出了一种可行的解决方案，可以提供可用的结果来解决这个问题，从而可以在 VR 设置中使用用户的实时照片般真实的去遮挡脸部。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向虚拟远程存在系统的面部去遮挡网络，解决VR头显遮挡导致的人脸真实感缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复技术难以有效处理VR头显遮挡的人脸区域（尤其是眼睛），影响虚拟世界中用户面部的逼真呈现效果。
AI.method: 设计专门针对人脸遮挡问题的深度学习网络，通过图像修复技术实现实时生成去遮挡的面部图像。
AI.result: 该方法在VR场景中成功生成可用的实时逼真去遮挡人脸，解决了现有技术在眼部区域修复效果不佳的问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的面部去遮挡网络为虚拟远程存在系统提供了有效的解决方案，提升了虚拟环境中的视觉真实感。

authors_text: Rafael I. Cabral Muchacho,Riddhiman Laha,Luis F. C. Figueredo,Sami Haddadin
title: A Solution to Slosh-free Robot Trajectory Optimization
title_zh: 无晃动机器人轨迹优化解决方案
abstract: This paper is about fast slosh free fluid transportation. Existing approaches are either computationally heavy or only suitable for specific robots and container shapes. We model the end effector as a point mass suspended by a spherical pendulum and study the requirements for slosh free motion and the validity of the point mass model. In this approach, slosh free trajectories are generated by controlling the pendulum's pivot and simulating the motion of the point mass. We cast the trajectory optimization problem as a quadratic program; this strategy can be used to obtain valid control inputs. Through simulations and experiments on a 7 DoF Franka Emika Panda robot we validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: This paper is about fast slosh free fluid transportation. Existing approaches are either computationally heavy or only suitable for specific robots and container shapes. We model the end effector as a point mass suspended by a spherical pendulum and study the requirements for slosh free motion and the validity of the point mass model. In this approach, slosh free trajectories are generated by controlling the pendulum's pivot and simulating the motion of the point mass. We cast the trajectory optimization problem as a quadratic program; this strategy can be used to obtain valid control inputs. Through simulations and experiments on a 7 DoF Franka Emika Panda robot we validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 本文是关于快速无晃动流体输送的。现有方法要么计算量大，要么仅适用于特定的机器人和容器形状。我们将末端执行器建模为由球形摆悬挂的点质量，并研究了晃动自由运动的要求以及点质量模型的有效性。在这种方法中，通过控制摆的枢轴并模拟点质量的运动来生成无晃动轨迹。我们将轨迹优化问题视为二次规划；该策略可用于获得有效的控制输入。通过对 7 DoF Franka Emika Panda 机器人进行仿真和实验，我们验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速无晃动流体运输的机器人轨迹优化方法，通过球形摆模型和二次规划解决现有方法计算量大或适用性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有流体运输轨迹优化方法存在计算复杂度高或仅适用于特定机器人/容器形状的局限性，需更通用高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将末端执行器建模为球形摆悬挂的质点，通过控制摆支点生成无晃动轨迹，并将优化问题转化为二次规划求解控制输入。
AI.result: 在7自由度Franka Emika Panda机器人上通过仿真和实验验证，证明方法能有效生成无晃动轨迹并满足实际应用需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过质点模型和二次规划实现了通用高效的无晃动轨迹优化，适用于不同机器人和容器形状的流体运输任务。

authors_text: Gourav Datta,Haoqin Deng,Robert Aviles,Peter A. Beerel
title: Towards Energy-Efficient, Low-Latency and Accurate Spiking LSTMs
title_zh: 迈向节能、低延迟且准确的尖峰 LSTM
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have emerged as an attractive spatio-temporal computing paradigm for complex vision tasks. However, most existing works yield models that require many time steps and do not leverage the inherent temporal dynamics of spiking neural networks, even for sequential tasks. Motivated by this observation, we propose an \rev{optimized spiking long short-term memory networks (LSTM) training framework that involves a novel ANN-to-SNN conversion framework, followed by SNN training}. In particular, we propose novel activation functions in the source LSTM architecture and judiciously select a subset of them for conversion to integrate-and-fire (IF) activations with optimal bias shifts. Additionally, we derive the leaky-integrate-and-fire (LIF) activation functions converted from their non-spiking LSTM counterparts which justifies the need to jointly optimize the weights, threshold, and leak parameter. We also propose a pipelined parallel processing scheme which hides the SNN time steps, significantly improving system latency, especially for long sequences. The resulting SNNs have high activation sparsity and require only accumulate operations (AC), in contrast to expensive multiply-and-accumulates (MAC) needed for ANNs, except for the input layer when using direct encoding, yielding significant improvements in energy efficiency. We evaluate our framework on sequential learning tasks including temporal MNIST, Google Speech Commands (GSC), and UCI Smartphone datasets on different LSTM architectures. We obtain test accuracy of 94.75% with only 2 time steps with direct encoding on the GSC dataset with 4.1x lower energy than an iso-architecture standard LSTM.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have emerged as an attractive spatio-temporal computing paradigm for complex vision tasks. However, most existing works yield models that require many time steps and do not leverage the inherent temporal dynamics of spiking neural networks, even for sequential tasks. Motivated by this observation, we propose an \rev{optimized spiking long short-term memory networks (LSTM) training framework that involves a novel ANN-to-SNN conversion framework, followed by SNN training}. In particular, we propose novel activation functions in the source LSTM architecture and judiciously select a subset of them for conversion to integrate-and-fire (IF) activations with optimal bias shifts. Additionally, we derive the leaky-integrate-and-fire (LIF) activation functions converted from their non-spiking LSTM counterparts which justifies the need to jointly optimize the weights, threshold, and leak parameter. We also propose a pipelined parallel processing scheme which hides the SNN time steps, significantly improving system latency, especially for long sequences. The resulting SNNs have high activation sparsity and require only accumulate operations (AC), in contrast to expensive multiply-and-accumulates (MAC) needed for ANNs, except for the input layer when using direct encoding, yielding significant improvements in energy efficiency. We evaluate our framework on sequential learning tasks including temporal MNIST, Google Speech Commands (GSC), and UCI Smartphone datasets on different LSTM architectures. We obtain test accuracy of 94.75% with only 2 time steps with direct encoding on the GSC dataset with 4.1x lower energy than an iso-architecture standard LSTM.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）已成为复杂视觉任务的一种有吸引力的时空计算范式。然而，大多数现有的工作产生的模型需要许多时间步长，并且没有利用尖峰神经网络固有的时间动态，即使对于顺序任务也是如此。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一个\rev{优化的尖峰长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 训练框架，其中涉及一种新颖的 ANN 到 SNN 转换框架，然后进行 SNN 训练}。特别是，我们在源 LSTM 架构中提出了新颖的激活函数，并明智地选择其中的一个子集，以转换为具有最佳偏差偏移的集成和激发 (IF) 激活。此外，我们还推导了从非尖峰 LSTM 对应函数转换而来的泄漏积分激发 (LIF) 激活函数，这证明了联合优化权重、阈值和泄漏参数的必要性。我们还提出了一种隐藏 SNN 时间步长的流水线并行处理方案，显着改善了系统延迟，尤其是对于长序列。由此产生的 SNN 具有较高的激活稀疏性，并且仅需要累加运算 (AC)，与 ANN 所需的昂贵的乘法累加 (MAC) 相比，除了使用直接编码时的输入层之外，从而显着提高了能源效率。我们在顺序学习任务上评估我们的框架，包括不同 LSTM 架构上的时态 MNIST、Google 语音命令 (GSC) 和 UCI 智能手机数据集。我们在 GSC 数据集上直接编码，仅用 2 个时间步即可获得 94.75% 的测试准确率，其能量比 iso 架构标准 LSTM 低 4.1 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化的脉冲长短期记忆网络（Spiking LSTM）训练框架，旨在实现高能效、低延迟且准确的序列学习。
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）在处理序列任务时需大量时间步，未能有效利用其固有时间动态特性，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计新型ANN到SNN转换框架，引入优化激活函数并结合漏积分-火（LIF）模型，联合优化权重、阈值和泄漏参数；采用流水线并行处理隐藏时间步，减少计算延迟。
AI.result: 在GSC数据集上以仅2个时间步实现94.75%测试准确率，相比传统LSTM节能4.1倍，且主要依赖低能耗累加操作（AC）而非乘加操作（MAC）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结构优化和并行计算有效提升了SNN在序列任务中的能效与实时性，为复杂场景下的低功耗AI应用提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种优化的脉冲长短期记忆网络（Spiking LSTM）训练框架，旨在实现高能效、低延迟且准确的序列学习。
motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）在处理序列任务时需大量时间步，未能有效利用其固有时间动态特性，导致效率低下。
method: 设计新型ANN到SNN转换框架，引入优化激活函数并结合漏积分-火（LIF）模型，联合优化权重、阈值和泄漏参数；采用流水线并行处理隐藏时间步，减少计算延迟。
result: 在GSC数据集上以仅2个时间步实现94.75%测试准确率，相比传统LSTM节能4.1倍，且主要依赖低能耗累加操作（AC）而非乘加操作（MAC）。
conclusion: 该框架通过结构优化和并行计算有效提升了SNN在序列任务中的能效与实时性，为复杂场景下的低功耗AI应用提供了新思路。
search_text: Towards Energy-Efficient, Low-Latency and Accurate Spiking LSTMs 迈向节能、低延迟且准确的尖峰 LSTM Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have emerged as an attractive spatio-temporal computing paradigm for complex vision tasks. However, most existing works yield models that require many time steps and do not leverage the inherent temporal dynamics of spiking neural networks, even for sequential tasks. Motivated by this observation, we propose an \rev{optimized spiking long short-term memory networks (LSTM) training framework that involves a novel ANN-to-SNN conversion framework, followed by SNN training}. In particular, we propose novel activation functions in the source LSTM architecture and judiciously select a subset of them for conversion to integrate-and-fire (IF) activations with optimal bias shifts. Additionally, we derive the leaky-integrate-and-fire (LIF) activation functions converted from their non-spiking LSTM counterparts which justifies the need to jointly optimize the weights, threshold, and leak parameter. We also propose a pipelined parallel processing scheme which hides the SNN time steps, significantly improving system latency, especially for long sequences. The resulting SNNs have high activation sparsity and require only accumulate operations (AC), in contrast to expensive multiply-and-accumulates (MAC) needed for ANNs, except for the input layer when using direct encoding, yielding significant improvements in energy efficiency. We evaluate our framework on sequential learning tasks including temporal MNIST, Google Speech Commands (GSC), and UCI Smartphone datasets on different LSTM architectures. We obtain test accuracy of 94.75% with only 2 time steps with direct encoding on the GSC dataset with 4.1x lower energy than an iso-architecture standard LSTM. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）已成为复杂视觉任务的一种有吸引力的时空计算范式。然而，大多数现有的工作产生的模型需要许多时间步长，并且没有利用尖峰神经网络固有的时间动态，即使对于顺序任务也是如此。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一个\rev{优化的尖峰长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 训练框架，其中涉及一种新颖的 ANN 到 SNN 转换框架，然后进行 SNN 训练}。特别是，我们在源 LSTM 架构中提出了新颖的激活函数，并明智地选择其中的一个子集，以转换为具有最佳偏差偏移的集成和激发 (IF) 激活。此外，我们还推导了从非尖峰 LSTM 对应函数转换而来的泄漏积分激发 (LIF) 激活函数，这证明了联合优化权重、阈值和泄漏参数的必要性。我们还提出了一种隐藏 SNN 时间步长的流水线并行处理方案，显着改善了系统延迟，尤其是对于长序列。由此产生的 SNN 具有较高的激活稀疏性，并且仅需要累加运算 (AC)，与 ANN 所需的昂贵的乘法累加 (MAC) 相比，除了使用直接编码时的输入层之外，从而显着提高了能源效率。我们在顺序学习任务上评估我们的框架，包括不同 LSTM 架构上的时态 MNIST、Google 语音命令 (GSC) 和 UCI 智能手机数据集。我们在 GSC 数据集上直接编码，仅用 2 个时间步即可获得 94.75% 的测试准确率，其能量比 iso 架构标准 LSTM 低 4.1 倍。 本文提出一种优化的脉冲长短期记忆网络（Spiking LSTM）训练框架，旨在实现高能效、低延迟且准确的序列学习。 Gourav Datta,Haoqin Deng,Robert Aviles,Peter A. Beerel cs.NE,cs.ET

authors_text: Victor S. Bursztyn,David Demeter,Doug Downey,Larry Birnbaum
title: Learning to Perform Complex Tasks through Compositional Fine-Tuning of Language Models
title_zh: 通过语言模型的组合微调学习执行复杂任务
comment: Accepted to findings of EMNLP 2022. Data and code available at https://github.com/vbursztyn/compositional-fine-tuning
comments: Accepted to findings of EMNLP 2022. Data and code available at https://github.com/vbursztyn/compositional-fine-tuning
abstract: How to usefully encode compositional task structure has long been a core challenge in AI. Recent work in chain of thought prompting has shown that for very large neural language models (LMs), explicitly demonstrating the inferential steps involved in a target task may improve performance over end-to-end learning that focuses on the target task alone. However, chain of thought prompting has significant limitations due to its dependency on huge pretrained LMs. In this work, we present compositional fine-tuning (CFT): an approach based on explicitly decomposing a target task into component tasks, and then fine-tuning smaller LMs on a curriculum of such component tasks. We apply CFT to recommendation tasks in two domains, world travel and local dining, as well as a previously studied inferential task (sports understanding). We show that CFT outperforms end-to-end learning even with equal amounts of data, and gets consistently better as more component tasks are modeled via fine-tuning. Compared with chain of thought prompting, CFT performs at least as well using LMs only 7.4% of the size, and is moreover applicable to task domains for which data are not available during pretraining.
summary: How to usefully encode compositional task structure has long been a core challenge in AI. Recent work in chain of thought prompting has shown that for very large neural language models (LMs), explicitly demonstrating the inferential steps involved in a target task may improve performance over end-to-end learning that focuses on the target task alone. However, chain of thought prompting has significant limitations due to its dependency on huge pretrained LMs. In this work, we present compositional fine-tuning (CFT): an approach based on explicitly decomposing a target task into component tasks, and then fine-tuning smaller LMs on a curriculum of such component tasks. We apply CFT to recommendation tasks in two domains, world travel and local dining, as well as a previously studied inferential task (sports understanding). We show that CFT outperforms end-to-end learning even with equal amounts of data, and gets consistently better as more component tasks are modeled via fine-tuning. Compared with chain of thought prompting, CFT performs at least as well using LMs only 7.4% of the size, and is moreover applicable to task domains for which data are not available during pretraining.
abstract_zh: 如何有效地编码组合任务结构长期以来一直是人工智能的核心挑战。最近在思想提示链方面的工作表明，对于非常大的神经语言模型（LM），明确展示目标任务中涉及的推理步骤可能会比仅关注目标任务的端到端学习提高性能。然而，由于其依赖于大量预训练的语言模型，思维链提示具有很大的局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了组合微调（CFT）：一种基于将目标任务显式分解为组件任务，然后在此类组件任务的课程上微调较小的 LM 的方法。我们将 CFT 应用于两个领域的推荐任务：世界旅行和当地餐饮，以及之前研究的推理任务（体育理解）。我们表明，即使在数据量相同的情况下，CFT 的性能也优于端到端学习，并且随着通过微调对更多组件任务进行建模，CFT 的表现会持续变得更好。与思维链提示相比，CFT 在使用仅 7.4% 大小的 LM 时表现至少一样好，而且适用于预训练期间无法获得数据的任务域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为组合微调（CFT）的方法，通过将复杂任务分解为子任务并逐步微调小型语言模型，以提升任务执行效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如思维链提示依赖巨大预训练模型且难以适应数据不足的领域，需寻找更高效的任务结构编码方式。
AI.method: 将目标任务分解为多个组件任务，设计课程学习 curriculum，依次对小型语言模型进行微调。
AI.result: 在推荐系统和推理任务中，CFT在相同数据量下优于端到端学习，且仅需7.4%规模的模型即可达到与思维链提示相当的效果。
AI.conclusion: 组合微调通过显式任务分解和渐进式微调，有效提升了模型性能，且降低了对大规模预训练数据的依赖。

title: Sublinear-Time Algorithms for Max Cut, Max E2Lin$(q)$, and Unique Label Cover on Expanders
title_zh: Max Cut、Max E2Lin$(q)$ 和扩展器上的独特标签覆盖的次线性时间算法
abstract: We show sublinear-time algorithms for Max Cut and Max E2Lin$(q)$ on expanders in the adjacency list model that distinguishes instances with the optimal value more than $1-\varepsilon$ from those with the optimal value less than $1-ρ$ for $ρ\gg \varepsilon$. The time complexities for Max Cut and Max $2$Lin$(q)$ are $\widetilde{O}(\frac{1}{φ^2ρ} \cdot m^{1/2+O(\varepsilon/(φ^2ρ))})$ and $\widetilde{O}(\mathrm{poly}(\frac{q}{φρ})\cdot {(mq)}^{1/2+O(q^6\varepsilon/φ^2ρ^2)})$, respectively, where $m$ is the number of edges in the underlying graph and $φ$ is its conductance. Then, we show a sublinear-time algorithm for Unique Label Cover on expanders with $φ\gg ε$ in the bounded-degree model. The time complexity of our algorithm is $\widetilde{O}_d(2^{q^{O(1)}\cdotφ^{1/q}\cdot \varepsilon^{-1/2}}\cdot n^{1/2+q^{O(q)}\cdot \varepsilon^{4^{1.5-q}}\cdot φ^{-2}})$, where $n$ is the number of variables. We complement these algorithmic results by showing that testing $3$-colorability requires $Ω(n)$ queries even on expanders.
summary: We show sublinear-time algorithms for Max Cut and Max E2Lin$(q)$ on expanders in the adjacency list model that distinguishes instances with the optimal value more than $1-\varepsilon$ from those with the optimal value less than $1-ρ$ for $ρ\gg \varepsilon$. The time complexities for Max Cut and Max $2$Lin$(q)$ are $\widetilde{O}(\frac{1}{φ^2ρ} \cdot m^{1/2+O(\varepsilon/(φ^2ρ))})$ and $\widetilde{O}(\mathrm{poly}(\frac{q}{φρ})\cdot {(mq)}^{1/2+O(q^6\varepsilon/φ^2ρ^2)})$, respectively, where $m$ is the number of edges in the underlying graph and $φ$ is its conductance. Then, we show a sublinear-time algorithm for Unique Label Cover on expanders with $φ\gg ε$ in the bounded-degree model. The time complexity of our algorithm is $\widetilde{O}_d(2^{q^{O(1)}\cdotφ^{1/q}\cdot \varepsilon^{-1/2}}\cdot n^{1/2+q^{O(q)}\cdot \varepsilon^{4^{1.5-q}}\cdot φ^{-2}})$, where $n$ is the number of variables. We complement these algorithmic results by showing that testing $3$-colorability requires $Ω(n)$ queries even on expanders.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了邻接列表模型中扩展器上 Max Cut 和 Max E2Lin$(q)$ 的亚线性时间算法，该算法将最优值大于 $1-\varepsilon$ 的实例与最优值小于 $ρ\gg \varepsilon$ 的实例区分开来。 Max Cut 和 Max $2$Lin$(q)$ 的时间复杂度为 $\widetilde{O}(\frac{1}{φ^2ρ} \cdot m^{1/2+O(\varepsilon/(φ^2ρ))})$ 和 $\widetilde{O}(\mathrm{poly}(\frac{q}{φρ})\cdot分别为 {(mq)}^{1/2+O(q^6\varepsilon/φ^2ρ^2)})$，其中 $m$ 是基础图中的边数，$φ$ 是其电导。然后，我们展示了在有界度模型中具有 $φ\gg ε$ 的扩展器上唯一标签覆盖的亚线性时间算法。我们算法的时间复杂度为 $\widetilde{O}_d(2^{q^{O(1)}\cdotφ^{1/q}\cdot \varepsilon^{-1/2}}\cdot n^{1/2+q^{O(q)}\cdot \varepsilon^{4^{1.5-q}}\cdot φ^{-2}})$，其中 $n$ 是变量的数量。我们通过证明即使在扩展器上测试 $3$-可着色性也需要 $Ω(n)$ 查询来补充这些算法结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了在扩展器图上解决最大割、最大E2Lin(q)和唯一标签覆盖问题的次线性时间算法。
AI.motivation: 扩展器图具有良好的导通性，适合设计高效算法。次线性时间算法能处理大规模数据，但现有方法在扩展器上的效率仍有待提升。
AI.method: 基于邻接表模型设计近似算法，利用扩展器的导通性参数φ和问题参数（如ε、ρ、q）控制采样复杂度，并结合随机化技术区分不同最优值情况。
AI.result: 提出算法的时间复杂度分别为：最大割为~O(1/(φ²ρ)·m^{1/2+O(ε/(φ²ρ))})，最大E2Lin(q)为~O(poly(q/φρ)·(mq)^{1/2+O(q⁶ε/φ²ρ²)})，唯一标签覆盖为~O_d(2^{q^{O(1)}·φ^{1/q}·ε^{-1/2}}·n^{1/2+...})，并证明3-着色性测试需Ω(n)次查询。
AI.conclusion: 在扩展器上实现高效次线性算法，同时确立了3-着色性测试的查询下界，为结构化图的近似算法研究提供了新思路。

result: 提出算法的时间复杂度分别为：最大割为~O(1/(φ²ρ)·m^{1/2+O(ε/(φ²ρ))})，最大E2Lin(q)为~O(poly(q/φρ)·(mq)^{1/2+O(q⁶ε/φ²ρ²)})，唯一标签覆盖为~O_d(2^{q^{O(1)}·φ^{1/q}·ε^{-1/2}}·n^{1/2+...})，并证明3-着色性测试需Ω(n)次查询。
conclusion: 在扩展器上实现高效次线性算法，同时确立了3-着色性测试的查询下界，为结构化图的近似算法研究提供了新思路。
search_text: Sublinear-Time Algorithms for Max Cut, Max E2Lin$(q)$, and Unique Label Cover on Expanders Max Cut、Max E2Lin$(q)$ 和扩展器上的独特标签覆盖的次线性时间算法 We show sublinear-time algorithms for Max Cut and Max E2Lin$(q)$ on expanders in the adjacency list model that distinguishes instances with the optimal value more than $1-\varepsilon$ from those with the optimal value less than $1-ρ$ for $ρ\gg \varepsilon$. The time complexities for Max Cut and Max $2$Lin$(q)$ are $\widetilde{O}(\frac{1}{φ^2ρ} \cdot m^{1/2+O(\varepsilon/(φ^2ρ))})$ and $\widetilde{O}(\mathrm{poly}(\frac{q}{φρ})\cdot {(mq)}^{1/2+O(q^6\varepsilon/φ^2ρ^2)})$, respectively, where $m$ is the number of edges in the underlying graph and $φ$ is its conductance. Then, we show a sublinear-time algorithm for Unique Label Cover on expanders with $φ\gg ε$ in the bounded-degree model. The time complexity of our algorithm is $\widetilde{O}_d(2^{q^{O(1)}\cdotφ^{1/q}\cdot \varepsilon^{-1/2}}\cdot n^{1/2+q^{O(q)}\cdot \varepsilon^{4^{1.5-q}}\cdot φ^{-2}})$, where $n$ is the number of variables. We complement these algorithmic results by showing that testing $3$-colorability requires $Ω(n)$ queries even on expanders. 我们展示了邻接列表模型中扩展器上 Max Cut 和 Max E2Lin$(q)$ 的亚线性时间算法，该算法将最优值大于 $1-\varepsilon$ 的实例与最优值小于 $ρ\gg \varepsilon$ 的实例区分开来。 Max Cut 和 Max $2$Lin$(q)$ 的时间复杂度为 $\widetilde{O}(\frac{1}{φ^2ρ} \cdot m^{1/2+O(\varepsilon/(φ^2ρ))})$ 和 $\widetilde{O}(\mathrm{poly}(\frac{q}{φρ})\cdot分别为 {(mq)}^{1/2+O(q^6\varepsilon/φ^2ρ^2)})$，其中 $m$ 是基础图中的边数，$φ$ 是其电导。然后，我们展示了在有界度模型中具有 $φ\gg ε$ 的扩展器上唯一标签覆盖的亚线性时间算法。我们算法的时间复杂度为 $\widetilde{O}_d(2^{q^{O(1)}\cdotφ^{1/q}\cdot \varepsilon^{-1/2}}\cdot n^{1/2+q^{O(q)}\cdot \varepsilon^{4^{1.5-q}}\cdot φ^{-2}})$，其中 $n$ 是变量的数量。我们通过证明即使在扩展器上测试 $3$-可着色性也需要 $Ω(n)$ 查询来补充这些算法结果。 本文提出了在扩展器图上解决最大割、最大E2Lin(q)和唯一标签覆盖问题的次线性时间算法。 Pan Peng,Yuichi Yoshida cs.DS

authors_text: Francesco Luzi,Aneesh Gupta,Leslie Collins,Kyle Bradbury,Jordan Malof
title: Transformers For Recognition In Overhead Imagery: A Reality Check
title_zh: 用于识别头顶图像中的变形金刚：现实检验
comment: This paper has been accepted to WACV 2023, but this is not the final version
comments: This paper has been accepted to WACV 2023, but this is not the final version
abstract: There is evidence that transformers offer state-of-the-art recognition performance on tasks involving overhead imagery (e.g., satellite imagery). However, it is difficult to make unbiased empirical comparisons between competing deep learning models, making it unclear whether, and to what extent, transformer-based models are beneficial. In this paper we systematically compare the impact of adding transformer structures into state-of-the-art segmentation models for overhead imagery. Each model is given a similar budget of free parameters, and their hyperparameters are optimized using Bayesian Optimization with a fixed quantity of data and computation time. We conduct our experiments with a large and diverse dataset comprising two large public benchmarks: Inria and DeepGlobe. We perform additional ablation studies to explore the impact of specific transformer-based modeling choices. Our results suggest that transformers provide consistent, but modest, performance improvements. We only observe this advantage however in hybrid models that combine convolutional and transformer-based structures, while fully transformer-based models achieve relatively poor performance.
summary: There is evidence that transformers offer state-of-the-art recognition performance on tasks involving overhead imagery (e.g., satellite imagery). However, it is difficult to make unbiased empirical comparisons between competing deep learning models, making it unclear whether, and to what extent, transformer-based models are beneficial. In this paper we systematically compare the impact of adding transformer structures into state-of-the-art segmentation models for overhead imagery. Each model is given a similar budget of free parameters, and their hyperparameters are optimized using Bayesian Optimization with a fixed quantity of data and computation time. We conduct our experiments with a large and diverse dataset comprising two large public benchmarks: Inria and DeepGlobe. We perform additional ablation studies to explore the impact of specific transformer-based modeling choices. Our results suggest that transformers provide consistent, but modest, performance improvements. We only observe this advantage however in hybrid models that combine convolutional and transformer-based structures, while fully transformer-based models achieve relatively poor performance.
abstract_zh: 有证据表明，Transformer 在涉及空中图像（例如卫星图像）的任务中提供了最先进的识别性能。然而，很难在竞争的深度学习模型之间进行公正的实证比较，因此不清楚基于 Transformer 的模型是否以及在多大程度上是有益的。在本文中，我们系统地比较了将变压器结构添加到最先进的俯视图像分割模型中的影响。每个模型都被赋予相似的自由参数预算，并且使用贝叶斯优化以固定的数据量和计算时间来优化它们的超参数。我们使用包含两个大型公共基准的大型且多样化的数据集进行实验：Inria 和 DeepGlobe。我们进行了额外的消融研究，以探索特定的基于变压器的建模选择的影响。我们的结果表明，变压器提供了一致但适度的性能改进。然而，我们仅在结合了卷积和基于变压器的结构的混合模型中观察到这种优势，而完全基于变压器的模型实现了相对较差的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了Transformer结构在航拍图像识别任务中的有效性，并与现有分割模型进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在航拍图像任务中表现优异，但缺乏无偏的实证比较，难以明确其实际优势与局限性。
AI.method: 在参数预算相同条件下，通过贝叶斯优化调整超参数，在Inria和DeepGlobe数据集上对比纯Transformer模型与混合模型性能，并进行消融实验。
AI.result: Transformer带来小幅性能提升，但仅在卷积与Transformer混合结构中显著，纯Transformer模型表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型能有效利用Transformer优势，但全Transformer架构在航拍图像任务中尚未展现显著竞争力。

authors_text: Junyuan Fang,Haixian Wen,Jiajing Wu,Qi Xuan,Zibin Zheng,Chi K. Tse
title: GANI: Global Attacks on Graph Neural Networks via Imperceptible Node Injections
title_zh: GANI：通过不可察觉的节点注入对图神经网络进行全局攻击
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have found successful applications in various graph-related tasks. However, recent studies have shown that many GNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In a vast majority of existing studies, adversarial attacks on GNNs are launched via direct modification of the original graph such as adding/removing links, which may not be applicable in practice. In this paper, we focus on a realistic attack operation via injecting fake nodes. The proposed Global Attack strategy via Node Injection (GANI) is designed under the comprehensive consideration of an unnoticeable perturbation setting from both structure and feature domains. Specifically, to make the node injections as imperceptible and effective as possible, we propose a sampling operation to determine the degree of the newly injected nodes, and then generate features and select neighbors for these injected nodes based on the statistical information of features and evolutionary perturbations obtained from a genetic algorithm, respectively. In particular, the proposed feature generation mechanism is suitable for both binary and continuous node features. Extensive experimental results on benchmark datasets against both general and defended GNNs show strong attack performance of GANI. Moreover, the imperceptibility analyses also demonstrate that GANI achieves a relatively unnoticeable injection on benchmark datasets.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have found successful applications in various graph-related tasks. However, recent studies have shown that many GNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In a vast majority of existing studies, adversarial attacks on GNNs are launched via direct modification of the original graph such as adding/removing links, which may not be applicable in practice. In this paper, we focus on a realistic attack operation via injecting fake nodes. The proposed Global Attack strategy via Node Injection (GANI) is designed under the comprehensive consideration of an unnoticeable perturbation setting from both structure and feature domains. Specifically, to make the node injections as imperceptible and effective as possible, we propose a sampling operation to determine the degree of the newly injected nodes, and then generate features and select neighbors for these injected nodes based on the statistical information of features and evolutionary perturbations obtained from a genetic algorithm, respectively. In particular, the proposed feature generation mechanism is suitable for both binary and continuous node features. Extensive experimental results on benchmark datasets against both general and defended GNNs show strong attack performance of GANI. Moreover, the imperceptibility analyses also demonstrate that GANI achieves a relatively unnoticeable injection on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已经在各种与图相关的任务中得到了成功的应用。然而，最近的研究表明，许多 GNN 很容易受到对抗性攻击。在绝大多数现有研究中，对 GNN 的对抗性攻击是通过直接修改原始图（例如添加/删除链接）来发起的，这在实践中可能不适用。在本文中，我们重点关注通过注入假节点的真实攻击操作。所提出的通过节点注入的全局攻击策略（GANI）是在综合考虑结构域和特征域的不明显扰动设置的情况下设计的。具体来说，为了使节点注入尽可能难以察觉和有效，我们提出了一种采样操作来确定新注入节点的程度，然后分别根据遗传算法获得的特征和进化扰动的统计信息为这些注入节点生成特征并选择邻居。特别是，所提出的特征生成机制适用于二元和连续节点特征。针对通用 GNN 和防御 GNN 的基准数据集的大量实验结果显示了 GANI 强大的攻击性能。此外，不可察觉性分析还表明，GANI 在基准数据集上实现了相对不易察觉的注入。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过不可察觉的节点注入对图神经网络（GNN）进行全局攻击的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法通过修改图结构（如增删边）可能不适用于实际场景，而注入虚假节点是一种更现实的攻击方式，但需确保扰动不可察觉。
AI.method: 设计了全局节点注入攻击策略（GANI），通过采样确定新节点度数，利用遗传算法生成特征并选择邻居，适用于二元和连续特征。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上对一般和防御后的GNN均表现出强攻击性能，且注入节点具有较高的不可察觉性。
AI.conclusion: GANI方法在攻击效果和不可察觉性上表现优异，为GNN的安全性研究提供了新的视角和挑战。

title: DMODE: Differential Monocular Object Distance Estimation Module without Class Specific Information
title_zh: DMODE：没有类特定信息的差分单目物体距离估计模块
abstract: Utilizing a single camera for measuring object distances is a cost-effective alternative to stereo-vision and LiDAR. Although monocular distance estimation has been explored in the literature, most existing techniques rely on object class knowledge to achieve high performance. Without this contextual data, monocular distance estimation becomes more challenging, lacking reference points and object-specific cues. However, these cues can be misleading for objects with wide-range variation or adversarial situations, which is a challenging aspect of object-agnostic distance estimation. In this paper, we propose DMODE, a class-agnostic method for monocular distance estimation that does not require object class knowledge. DMODE estimates an object's distance by fusing its fluctuation in size over time with the camera's motion, making it adaptable to various object detectors and unknown objects, thus addressing these challenges. We evaluate our model on the KITTI MOTS dataset using ground-truth bounding box annotations and outputs from TrackRCNN and EagerMOT. The object's location is determined using the change in bounding box sizes and camera position without measuring the object's detection source or class attributes. Our approach demonstrates superior performance in multi-class object distance detection scenarios compared to conventional methods.
summary: Utilizing a single camera for measuring object distances is a cost-effective alternative to stereo-vision and LiDAR. Although monocular distance estimation has been explored in the literature, most existing techniques rely on object class knowledge to achieve high performance. Without this contextual data, monocular distance estimation becomes more challenging, lacking reference points and object-specific cues. However, these cues can be misleading for objects with wide-range variation or adversarial situations, which is a challenging aspect of object-agnostic distance estimation. In this paper, we propose DMODE, a class-agnostic method for monocular distance estimation that does not require object class knowledge. DMODE estimates an object's distance by fusing its fluctuation in size over time with the camera's motion, making it adaptable to various object detectors and unknown objects, thus addressing these challenges. We evaluate our model on the KITTI MOTS dataset using ground-truth bounding box annotations and outputs from TrackRCNN and EagerMOT. The object's location is determined using the change in bounding box sizes and camera position without measuring the object's detection source or class attributes. Our approach demonstrates superior performance in multi-class object distance detection scenarios compared to conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 使用单个摄像头测量物体距离是立体视觉和激光雷达的一种经济高效的替代方案。尽管文献中已经探讨了单目距离估计，但大多数现有技术依赖于对象类知识来实现​​高性能。如果没有这些上下文数据，单眼距离估计就会变得更具挑战性，因为缺乏参考点和特定于物体的线索。然而，这些线索可能会误导具有大范围变化或对抗情况的对象，这是与对象无关的距离估计的一个具有挑战性的方面。在本文中，我们提出了 DMODE，一种用于单目距离估计的类无关方法，不需要对象类知识。 DMODE 通过将物体尺寸随时间的波动与相机的运动融合来估计物体的距离，使其能够适应各种物体探测器和未知物体，从而解决这些挑战。我们使用真实边界框注释以及 TrackRCNN 和 EagerMOT 的输出在 KITTI MOTS 数据集上评估我们的模型。使用边界框大小和相机位置的变化来确定对象的位置，而无需测量对象的检测源或类属性。与传统方法相比，我们的方法在多类物体距离检测场景中表现出卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需类别特定信息的单目物体距离估计模块DMODE，解决传统方法依赖物体类别知识的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有单目测距方法依赖物体类别信息，但此类信息在物体形态多变或对抗场景中可能产生误导，需开发一种无需类别知识的通用测距方法。
AI.method: 通过融合物体尺寸随时间变化与相机运动信息，无需依赖物体类别或检测来源，实现跨检测器和未知物体的适应性测距。
AI.result: 在KITTI MOTS数据集上，使用TrackRCNN和EagerMOT的标注数据验证，DMODE在多类别物体距离检测中表现优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: DMODE有效解决了单目测距中类别信息依赖问题，在无需类别知识的情况下提升了多类别场景下的距离估计准确性和适应性。

search_text: DMODE: Differential Monocular Object Distance Estimation Module without Class Specific Information DMODE：没有类特定信息的差分单目物体距离估计模块 Utilizing a single camera for measuring object distances is a cost-effective alternative to stereo-vision and LiDAR. Although monocular distance estimation has been explored in the literature, most existing techniques rely on object class knowledge to achieve high performance. Without this contextual data, monocular distance estimation becomes more challenging, lacking reference points and object-specific cues. However, these cues can be misleading for objects with wide-range variation or adversarial situations, which is a challenging aspect of object-agnostic distance estimation. In this paper, we propose DMODE, a class-agnostic method for monocular distance estimation that does not require object class knowledge. DMODE estimates an object's distance by fusing its fluctuation in size over time with the camera's motion, making it adaptable to various object detectors and unknown objects, thus addressing these challenges. We evaluate our model on the KITTI MOTS dataset using ground-truth bounding box annotations and outputs from TrackRCNN and EagerMOT. The object's location is determined using the change in bounding box sizes and camera position without measuring the object's detection source or class attributes. Our approach demonstrates superior performance in multi-class object distance detection scenarios compared to conventional methods. 使用单个摄像头测量物体距离是立体视觉和激光雷达的一种经济高效的替代方案。尽管文献中已经探讨了单目距离估计，但大多数现有技术依赖于对象类知识来实现​​高性能。如果没有这些上下文数据，单眼距离估计就会变得更具挑战性，因为缺乏参考点和特定于物体的线索。然而，这些线索可能会误导具有大范围变化或对抗情况的对象，这是与对象无关的距离估计的一个具有挑战性的方面。在本文中，我们提出了 DMODE，一种用于单目距离估计的类无关方法，不需要对象类知识。 DMODE 通过将物体尺寸随时间的波动与相机的运动融合来估计物体的距离，使其能够适应各种物体探测器和未知物体，从而解决这些挑战。我们使用真实边界框注释以及 TrackRCNN 和 EagerMOT 的输出在 KITTI MOTS 数据集上评估我们的模型。使用边界框大小和相机位置的变化来确定对象的位置，而无需测量对象的检测源或类属性。与传统方法相比，我们的方法在多类物体距离检测场景中表现出卓越的性能。 提出一种无需类别特定信息的单目物体距离估计模块DMODE，解决传统方法依赖物体类别知识的局限性。 Pedram Agand,Michael Chang,Mo Chen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Carlos Mougan,Klaus Broelemann,Gjergji Kasneci,Thanassis Tiropanis,Steffen Staab
title: Explanation Shift: Detecting distribution shifts on tabular data via the explanation space
title_zh: 解释转变：通过解释空间检测表格数据的分布变化
comment: Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Workshop on Distribution Shifts: Connecting Methods and Applications
comments: Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Workshop on Distribution Shifts: Connecting Methods and Applications
abstract: As input data distributions evolve, the predictive performance of machine learning models tends to deteriorate. In the past, predictive performance was considered the key indicator to monitor. However, explanation aspects have come to attention within the last years. In this work, we investigate how model predictive performance and model explanation characteristics are affected under distribution shifts and how these key indicators are related to each other for tabular data. We find that the modeling of explanation shifts can be a better indicator for the detection of predictive performance changes than state-of-the-art techniques based on representations of distribution shifts. We provide a mathematical analysis of different types of distribution shifts as well as synthetic experimental examples.
summary: As input data distributions evolve, the predictive performance of machine learning models tends to deteriorate. In the past, predictive performance was considered the key indicator to monitor. However, explanation aspects have come to attention within the last years. In this work, we investigate how model predictive performance and model explanation characteristics are affected under distribution shifts and how these key indicators are related to each other for tabular data. We find that the modeling of explanation shifts can be a better indicator for the detection of predictive performance changes than state-of-the-art techniques based on representations of distribution shifts. We provide a mathematical analysis of different types of distribution shifts as well as synthetic experimental examples.
abstract_zh: 随着输入数据分布的演变，机器学习模型的预测性能往往会恶化。过去，预测性能被认为是监控的关键指标。然而，解释方面在过去几年中引起了人们的关注。在这项工作中，我们研究了模型预测性能和模型解释特征在分布变化下如何受到影响，以及表格数据的这些关键指标如何相互关联。我们发现，与基于分布变化表示的最先进技术相比，解释变化建模可以成为检测预测性能变化的更好指标。我们提供了不同类型的分布变化的数学分析以及综合实验示例。

AI.tldr: 通过解释空间检测表格数据的分布偏移
AI.motivation: 传统分布偏移检测方法仅关注预测性能，但模型解释性变化未被充分研究，需探索解释特征与预测性能的关联性
AI.method: 建立数学框架分析不同分布偏移类型，结合合成实验验证解释空间特征的有效性
AI.result: 解释偏移建模比现有基于分布表示的方法更早且更准确地检测预测性能变化
AI.conclusion: 解释空间特征可作为更敏感的分布偏移检测指标，需同时监控预测性能与模型解释性变化

authors_text: Abbavaram Gowtham Reddy,Saloni Dash,Amit Sharma,Vineeth N Balasubramanian
title: Counterfactual Generation Under Confounding
title_zh: 混杂条件下的反事实生成
abstract: A machine learning model, under the influence of observed or unobserved confounders in the training data, can learn spurious correlations and fail to generalize when deployed. For image classifiers, augmenting a training dataset using counterfactual examples has been empirically shown to break spurious correlations. However, the counterfactual generation task itself becomes more difficult as the level of confounding increases. Existing methods for counterfactual generation under confounding consider a fixed set of interventions (e.g., texture, rotation) and are not flexible enough to capture diverse data-generating processes. Given a causal generative process, we formally characterize the adverse effects of confounding on any downstream tasks and show that the correlation between generative factors (attributes) can be used to quantitatively measure confounding between generative factors. To minimize such correlation, we propose a counterfactual generation method that learns to modify the value of any attribute in an image and generate new images given a set of observed attributes, even when the dataset is highly confounded. These counterfactual images are then used to regularize the downstream classifier such that the learned representations are the same across various generative factors conditioned on the class label. Our method is computationally efficient, simple to implement, and works well for any number of generative factors and confounding variables. Our experimental results on both synthetic (MNIST variants) and real-world (CelebA) datasets show the usefulness of our approach.
summary: A machine learning model, under the influence of observed or unobserved confounders in the training data, can learn spurious correlations and fail to generalize when deployed. For image classifiers, augmenting a training dataset using counterfactual examples has been empirically shown to break spurious correlations. However, the counterfactual generation task itself becomes more difficult as the level of confounding increases. Existing methods for counterfactual generation under confounding consider a fixed set of interventions (e.g., texture, rotation) and are not flexible enough to capture diverse data-generating processes. Given a causal generative process, we formally characterize the adverse effects of confounding on any downstream tasks and show that the correlation between generative factors (attributes) can be used to quantitatively measure confounding between generative factors. To minimize such correlation, we propose a counterfactual generation method that learns to modify the value of any attribute in an image and generate new images given a set of observed attributes, even when the dataset is highly confounded. These counterfactual images are then used to regularize the downstream classifier such that the learned representations are the same across various generative factors conditioned on the class label. Our method is computationally efficient, simple to implement, and works well for any number of generative factors and confounding variables. Our experimental results on both synthetic (MNIST variants) and real-world (CelebA) datasets show the usefulness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在训练数据中观察到或未观察到的混杂因素的影响下，可能会学习虚假相关性，并且在部署时无法泛化。对于图像分类器，经验表明使用反事实示例增强训练数据集可以打破虚假相关性。然而，随着混杂程度的增加，反事实生成任务本身变得更加困难。混杂条件下的反事实生成的现有方法考虑了一组固定的干预措施（例如纹理、旋转），并且不够灵活，无法捕获不同的数据生成过程。给定因果生成过程，我们正式描述了混杂对任何下游任务的不利影响，并表明生成因素（属性）之间的相关性可用于定量测量生成因素之间的混杂。为了最小化这种相关性，我们提出了一种反事实生成方法，该方法学习修改图像中任何属性的值，并在给定一组观察到的属性的情况下生成新图像，即使数据集高度混杂时也是如此。然后使用这些反事实图像来规范下游分类器，使得学习到的表示在以类标签为条件的各种生成因素中是相同的。我们的方法计算效率高，易于实现，并且适用于任意数量的生成因素和混杂变量。我们在合成（MNIST 变体）和真实世界（CelebA）数据集上的实验结果表明了我们方法的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在存在混淆因素的情况下生成反事实样本的方法，以打破图像分类器中的虚假相关性并提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实生成方法依赖固定干预方式，难以应对复杂数据生成过程中的混淆因素，导致模型无法有效学习真实特征。
AI.method: 通过量化生成因子间的相关性衡量混淆程度，提出一种可修改任意属性值的反事实生成方法，并利用生成的样本正则化下游分类器，使其在类标签条件下对不同生成因子保持表示一致性。
AI.result: 在MNIST变体和CelebA数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效减少混淆影响，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成多样化反事实样本，成功缓解了混淆因素导致的虚假相关性问题，适用于任意数量的生成因子和混淆变量。

conclusion: 该方法通过生成多样化反事实样本，成功缓解了混淆因素导致的虚假相关性问题，适用于任意数量的生成因子和混淆变量。
search_text: Counterfactual Generation Under Confounding 混杂条件下的反事实生成 A machine learning model, under the influence of observed or unobserved confounders in the training data, can learn spurious correlations and fail to generalize when deployed. For image classifiers, augmenting a training dataset using counterfactual examples has been empirically shown to break spurious correlations. However, the counterfactual generation task itself becomes more difficult as the level of confounding increases. Existing methods for counterfactual generation under confounding consider a fixed set of interventions (e.g., texture, rotation) and are not flexible enough to capture diverse data-generating processes. Given a causal generative process, we formally characterize the adverse effects of confounding on any downstream tasks and show that the correlation between generative factors (attributes) can be used to quantitatively measure confounding between generative factors. To minimize such correlation, we propose a counterfactual generation method that learns to modify the value of any attribute in an image and generate new images given a set of observed attributes, even when the dataset is highly confounded. These counterfactual images are then used to regularize the downstream classifier such that the learned representations are the same across various generative factors conditioned on the class label. Our method is computationally efficient, simple to implement, and works well for any number of generative factors and confounding variables. Our experimental results on both synthetic (MNIST variants) and real-world (CelebA) datasets show the usefulness of our approach. 机器学习模型在训练数据中观察到或未观察到的混杂因素的影响下，可能会学习虚假相关性，并且在部署时无法泛化。对于图像分类器，经验表明使用反事实示例增强训练数据集可以打破虚假相关性。然而，随着混杂程度的增加，反事实生成任务本身变得更加困难。混杂条件下的反事实生成的现有方法考虑了一组固定的干预措施（例如纹理、旋转），并且不够灵活，无法捕获不同的数据生成过程。给定因果生成过程，我们正式描述了混杂对任何下游任务的不利影响，并表明生成因素（属性）之间的相关性可用于定量测量生成因素之间的混杂。为了最小化这种相关性，我们提出了一种反事实生成方法，该方法学习修改图像中任何属性的值，并在给定一组观察到的属性的情况下生成新图像，即使数据集高度混杂时也是如此。然后使用这些反事实图像来规范下游分类器，使得学习到的表示在以类标签为条件的各种生成因素中是相同的。我们的方法计算效率高，易于实现，并且适用于任意数量的生成因素和混杂变量。我们在合成（MNIST 变体）和真实世界（CelebA）数据集上的实验结果表明了我们方法的有用性。 本文提出了一种在存在混淆因素的情况下生成反事实样本的方法，以打破图像分类器中的虚假相关性并提升模型泛化能力。 Abbavaram Gowtham Reddy,Saloni Dash,Amit Sharma,Vineeth N Balasubramanian cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoyu Pan,Huazheng Zhu,Jinglong Du,Guangtao Hu,Baoru Han,Yuanyuan Jia
title: MS-DCANet: A Novel Segmentation Network For Multi-Modality COVID-19 Medical Images
title_zh: MS-DCANet：一种用于多模态 COVID-19 医学图像的新型分割网络
abstract: The Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic has increased the public health burden and brought profound disaster to humans. For the particularity of the COVID-19 medical images with blurred boundaries, low contrast and different infection sites, some researchers have improved the accuracy by adding more complexity. Also, they overlook the complexity of lesions, which hinder their ability to capture the relationship between segmentation sites and the background, as well as the edge contours and global context. However, increasing the computational complexity, parameters and inference speed is unfavorable for model transfer from laboratory to clinic. A perfect segmentation network needs to balance the above three factors completely. To solve the above issues, this paper propose a symmetric automatic segmentation framework named MS-DCANet. We introduce Tokenized MLP block, a novel attention scheme that use a shift-window mechanism to conditionally fuse local and global features to get more continuous boundaries and spatial positioning capabilities. It has greater understanding of irregular lesions contours. MS-DCANet also uses several Dual Channel blocks and a Res-ASPP block to improve the ability to recognize small targets. On multi-modality COVID-19 tasks, MS-DCANet achieved state-of-the-art performance compared with other baselines. It can well trade off the accuracy and complexity. To prove the strong generalization ability of our proposed model, we apply it to other tasks (ISIC 2018 and BAA) and achieve satisfactory results.
summary: The Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic has increased the public health burden and brought profound disaster to humans. For the particularity of the COVID-19 medical images with blurred boundaries, low contrast and different infection sites, some researchers have improved the accuracy by adding more complexity. Also, they overlook the complexity of lesions, which hinder their ability to capture the relationship between segmentation sites and the background, as well as the edge contours and global context. However, increasing the computational complexity, parameters and inference speed is unfavorable for model transfer from laboratory to clinic. A perfect segmentation network needs to balance the above three factors completely. To solve the above issues, this paper propose a symmetric automatic segmentation framework named MS-DCANet. We introduce Tokenized MLP block, a novel attention scheme that use a shift-window mechanism to conditionally fuse local and global features to get more continuous boundaries and spatial positioning capabilities. It has greater understanding of irregular lesions contours. MS-DCANet also uses several Dual Channel blocks and a Res-ASPP block to improve the ability to recognize small targets. On multi-modality COVID-19 tasks, MS-DCANet achieved state-of-the-art performance compared with other baselines. It can well trade off the accuracy and complexity. To prove the strong generalization ability of our proposed model, we apply it to other tasks (ISIC 2018 and BAA) and achieve satisfactory results.
abstract_zh: 2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）大流行增加了公共卫生负担，给人类带来了深重灾难。针对COVID-19医学图像边界模糊、对比度低、感染部位不同的特殊性，一些研究人员通过增加复杂度来提高准确性。此外，他们忽视了病变的复杂性，这阻碍了他们捕获分割位点和背景之间的关系以及边缘轮廓和全局上下文之间的关系的能力。然而，增加计算复杂度、参数和推理速度不利于模型从实验室到临床的转移。一个完美的分割网络需要完全平衡以上三个因素。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种对称的自动分割框架MS-DCANet。我们引入了 Tokenized MLP 块，这是一种新颖的注意力方案，它使用移位窗口机制有条件地融合局部和全局特征，以获得更连续的边界和空间定位能力。它对不规则病变轮廓有更好的理解。 MS-DCANet 还使用多个双通道模块和 Res-ASPP 模块来提高识别小目标的能力。在多模态 COVID-19 任务上，与其他基线相比，MS-DCANet 实现了最先进的性能。它可以很好地权衡准确性和复杂性。为了证明我们提出的模型具有强大的泛化能力，我们将其应用于其他任务（ISIC 2018 和 BAA）并取得了令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MS-DCANet的对称分割网络，用于处理多模态COVID-19医学影像的病灶分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因忽视病灶复杂性导致边界分割不准确，且计算复杂度高影响临床应用，需平衡精度、复杂度与推理速度。
AI.method: 引入带移窗机制的Tokenized MLP模块融合局部与全局特征，结合双通道模块与Res-ASPP模块提升小目标识别能力。
AI.result: 在多模态COVID-19任务中达到SOTA性能，且在ISIC 2018和BAA等任务上表现良好，验证了模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MS-DCANet通过创新模块设计有效平衡了分割精度与计算效率，为医学影像分割提供了鲁棒解决方案。

title: Prompt-Tuning Can Be Much Better Than Fine-Tuning on Cross-lingual Understanding With Multilingual Language Models
title_zh: 在多语言语言模型的跨语言理解上，及时调整比微调要好得多
abstract: Pre-trained multilingual language models show significant performance gains for zero-shot cross-lingual model transfer on a wide range of natural language understanding (NLU) tasks. Previously, for zero-shot cross-lingual evaluation, pre-trained models are only fine-tuned on English data and tested on a variety of target languages. In this paper, we do cross-lingual evaluation on various NLU tasks (sentence classification, sequence labeling, question answering) using prompt-tuning and compare it with fine-tuning. The results show that prompt tuning achieves much better cross-lingual transfer than fine-tuning across datasets, with only 0.1% to 0.3% tuned parameters. Additionally, we demonstrate through the analysis that prompt tuning can have better cross-lingual transferability of representations on downstream tasks with better aligned decision boundaries.
summary: Pre-trained multilingual language models show significant performance gains for zero-shot cross-lingual model transfer on a wide range of natural language understanding (NLU) tasks. Previously, for zero-shot cross-lingual evaluation, pre-trained models are only fine-tuned on English data and tested on a variety of target languages. In this paper, we do cross-lingual evaluation on various NLU tasks (sentence classification, sequence labeling, question answering) using prompt-tuning and compare it with fine-tuning. The results show that prompt tuning achieves much better cross-lingual transfer than fine-tuning across datasets, with only 0.1% to 0.3% tuned parameters. Additionally, we demonstrate through the analysis that prompt tuning can have better cross-lingual transferability of representations on downstream tasks with better aligned decision boundaries.
abstract_zh: 预训练的多语言语言模型在各种自然语言理解 (NLU) 任务上显示出零样本跨语言模型迁移的显着性能提升。此前，对于零样本跨语言评估，预训练模型仅在英语数据上进行微调，并在多种目标语言上进行测试。在本文中，我们使用提示调整对各种 NLU 任务（句子分类、序列标记、问题回答）进行跨语言评估，并将其与微调进行比较。结果表明，即时调优比跨数据集微调实现了更好的跨语言迁移，仅调整了 0.1% 到 0.3% 的参数。此外，我们通过分析证明，即时调整可以在下游任务上具有更好的跨语言表示可迁移性，并具有更好的对齐决策边界。

AI.tldr: 比较提示调优与微调在跨语言理解任务中的效果
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法在跨语言任务中可能受限，需探索更高效的调优方法
AI.method: 在多个NLU任务中使用提示调优与微调进行对比实验
AI.result: 提示调优在参数量更少的情况下实现更优的跨语言迁移效果
AI.conclusion: 提示调优通过优化决策边界对齐，提升跨语言任务的迁移能力

title: Information-Transport-based Policy for Simultaneous Translation
title_zh: 基于信息传输的同声翻译策略
comment: Accept to EMNLP 2022 main conference. 22 pages, 16 figures, 8 tables
comments: Accept to EMNLP 2022 main conference. 22 pages, 16 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Simultaneous translation (ST) outputs translation while receiving the source inputs, and hence requires a policy to determine whether to translate a target token or wait for the next source token. The major challenge of ST is that each target token can only be translated based on the current received source tokens, where the received source information will directly affect the translation quality. So naturally, how much source information is received for the translation of the current target token is supposed to be the pivotal evidence for the ST policy to decide between translating and waiting. In this paper, we treat the translation as information transport from source to target and accordingly propose an Information-Transport-based Simultaneous Translation (ITST). ITST quantifies the transported information weight from each source token to the current target token, and then decides whether to translate the target token according to its accumulated received information. Experiments on both text-to-text ST and speech-to-text ST (a.k.a., streaming speech translation) tasks show that ITST outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Simultaneous translation (ST) outputs translation while receiving the source inputs, and hence requires a policy to determine whether to translate a target token or wait for the next source token. The major challenge of ST is that each target token can only be translated based on the current received source tokens, where the received source information will directly affect the translation quality. So naturally, how much source information is received for the translation of the current target token is supposed to be the pivotal evidence for the ST policy to decide between translating and waiting. In this paper, we treat the translation as information transport from source to target and accordingly propose an Information-Transport-based Simultaneous Translation (ITST). ITST quantifies the transported information weight from each source token to the current target token, and then decides whether to translate the target token according to its accumulated received information. Experiments on both text-to-text ST and speech-to-text ST (a.k.a., streaming speech translation) tasks show that ITST outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 同声翻译 (ST) 在接收源输入的同时输出翻译，因此需要一个策略来确定是翻译目标令牌还是等待下一个源令牌。 ST的主要挑战是每个目标token只能基于当前接收到的源token进行翻译，其中接收到的源信息将直接影响翻译质量。因此，自然地，当前目标 token 的翻译接收到多少源信息应该是 ST 策略决定翻译和等待的关键证据。在本文中，我们将翻译视为从源到目标的信息传输，并相应地提出了基于信息传输的同声翻译（ITST）。 ITST量化从每个源token到当前目标token传输的信息权重，然后根据其累积的接收信息决定是否翻译目标token。文本到文本 ST 和语音到文本 ST（又名流式语音翻译）任务的实验表明，ITST 的性能优于强大的基线，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于信息传输的同步翻译策略（ITST），以解决翻译过程中源信息接收与目标输出的协调问题。
AI.motivation: 同步翻译需要在接收到足够源信息后决定是否翻译，现有方法可能未有效量化信息传输，导致翻译质量受限。
AI.method: 将翻译视为信息传输过程，量化每个源词到目标词的信息权重，根据累积信息量决定是否进行翻译。
AI.result: 在文本和语音同步翻译任务中，ITST优于现有方法，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: ITST通过有效建模信息传输，提升了同步翻译的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。
