search_text: Information-Transport-based Policy for Simultaneous Translation 基于信息传输的同声翻译策略 Simultaneous translation (ST) outputs translation while receiving the source inputs, and hence requires a policy to determine whether to translate a target token or wait for the next source token. The major challenge of ST is that each target token can only be translated based on the current received source tokens, where the received source information will directly affect the translation quality. So naturally, how much source information is received for the translation of the current target token is supposed to be the pivotal evidence for the ST policy to decide between translating and waiting. In this paper, we treat the translation as information transport from source to target and accordingly propose an Information-Transport-based Simultaneous Translation (ITST). ITST quantifies the transported information weight from each source token to the current target token, and then decides whether to translate the target token according to its accumulated received information. Experiments on both text-to-text ST and speech-to-text ST (a.k.a., streaming speech translation) tasks show that ITST outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance. 同声翻译 (ST) 在接收源输入的同时输出翻译，因此需要一个策略来确定是翻译目标令牌还是等待下一个源令牌。 ST的主要挑战是每个目标token只能基于当前接收到的源token进行翻译，其中接收到的源信息将直接影响翻译质量。因此，自然地，当前目标 token 的翻译接收到多少源信息应该是 ST 策略决定翻译和等待的关键证据。在本文中，我们将翻译视为从源到目标的信息传输，并相应地提出了基于信息传输的同声翻译（ITST）。 ITST量化从每个源token到当前目标token传输的信息权重，然后根据其累积的接收信息决定是否翻译目标token。文本到文本 ST 和语音到文本 ST（又名流式语音翻译）任务的实验表明，ITST 的性能优于强大的基线，并实现了最先进的性能。 论文提出了一种基于信息传输的同步翻译策略（ITST），以解决翻译过程中源信息接收与目标输出的协调问题。 Shaolei Zhang,Yang Feng cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: NeuPhysics: Editable Neural Geometry and Physics from Monocular Videos
title_zh: NeuPhysics：来自单目视频的可编辑神经几何和物理
abstract: We present a method for learning 3D geometry and physics parameters of a dynamic scene from only a monocular RGB video input. To decouple the learning of underlying scene geometry from dynamic motion, we represent the scene as a time-invariant signed distance function (SDF) which serves as a reference frame, along with a time-conditioned deformation field. We further bridge this neural geometry representation with a differentiable physics simulator by designing a two-way conversion between the neural field and its corresponding hexahedral mesh, enabling us to estimate physics parameters from the source video by minimizing a cycle consistency loss. Our method also allows a user to interactively edit 3D objects from the source video by modifying the recovered hexahedral mesh, and propagating the operation back to the neural field representation. Experiments show that our method achieves superior mesh and video reconstruction of dynamic scenes compared to competing Neural Field approaches, and we provide extensive examples which demonstrate its ability to extract useful 3D representations from videos captured with consumer-grade cameras.
summary: We present a method for learning 3D geometry and physics parameters of a dynamic scene from only a monocular RGB video input. To decouple the learning of underlying scene geometry from dynamic motion, we represent the scene as a time-invariant signed distance function (SDF) which serves as a reference frame, along with a time-conditioned deformation field. We further bridge this neural geometry representation with a differentiable physics simulator by designing a two-way conversion between the neural field and its corresponding hexahedral mesh, enabling us to estimate physics parameters from the source video by minimizing a cycle consistency loss. Our method also allows a user to interactively edit 3D objects from the source video by modifying the recovered hexahedral mesh, and propagating the operation back to the neural field representation. Experiments show that our method achieves superior mesh and video reconstruction of dynamic scenes compared to competing Neural Field approaches, and we provide extensive examples which demonstrate its ability to extract useful 3D representations from videos captured with consumer-grade cameras.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种仅从单目 RGB 视频输入学习动态场景的 3D 几何和物理参数的方法。为了将底层场景几何的学习与动态运动解耦，我们将场景表示为时不变的有符号距离函数（SDF），它用作参考帧，以及时间条件变形场。我们通过设计神经场与其相应的六面体网格之间的双向转换，进一步将这种神经几何表示与可微物理模拟器联系起来，使我们能够通过最小化循环一致性损失来估计源视频中的物理参数。我们的方法还允许用户通过修改恢复的六面体网格，并将操作传播回神经场表示，以交互方式编辑源视频中的 3D 对象。实验表明，与竞争的神经场方法相比，我们的方法可以实现出色的动态场景网格和视频重建，并且我们提供了大量示例，证明其从消费级相机捕获的视频中提取有用的 3D 表示的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单目视频中学习动态场景3D几何和物理参数的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从单目视频中分离场景几何与动态运动，且缺乏对物理参数的估计能力。
AI.method: 通过时间不变的符号距离函数(SDF)表示场景几何，并结合时间条件变形场，设计神经场与六面体网格的双向转换以连接可微物理模拟器。
AI.result: 相比神经场方法，在动态场景网格和视频重建中表现更优，支持通过编辑网格反推神经场表示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了从消费级摄像头视频中提取可编辑的3D几何与物理表示，推动了神经场与物理模拟的结合应用。

title: Instance-Aware Image Completion
title_zh: 实例感知图像补全
comment: AI for Content Creation (AI4CC) CVPR workshop, 2023
comments: AI for Content Creation (AI4CC) CVPR workshop, 2023
abstract: Image completion is a task that aims to fill in the missing region of a masked image with plausible contents. However, existing image completion methods tend to fill in the missing region with the surrounding texture instead of hallucinating a visual instance that is suitable in accordance with the context of the scene. In this work, we propose a novel image completion model, dubbed ImComplete, that hallucinates the missing instance that harmonizes well with - and thus preserves - the original context. ImComplete first adopts a transformer architecture that considers the visible instances and the location of the missing region. Then, ImComplete completes the semantic segmentation masks within the missing region, providing pixel-level semantic and structural guidance. Finally, the image synthesis blocks generate photo-realistic content. We perform a comprehensive evaluation of the results in terms of visual quality (LPIPS and FID) and contextual preservation scores (CLIPscore and object detection accuracy) with COCO-panoptic and Visual Genome datasets. Experimental results show the superiority of ImComplete on various natural images.
summary: Image completion is a task that aims to fill in the missing region of a masked image with plausible contents. However, existing image completion methods tend to fill in the missing region with the surrounding texture instead of hallucinating a visual instance that is suitable in accordance with the context of the scene. In this work, we propose a novel image completion model, dubbed ImComplete, that hallucinates the missing instance that harmonizes well with - and thus preserves - the original context. ImComplete first adopts a transformer architecture that considers the visible instances and the location of the missing region. Then, ImComplete completes the semantic segmentation masks within the missing region, providing pixel-level semantic and structural guidance. Finally, the image synthesis blocks generate photo-realistic content. We perform a comprehensive evaluation of the results in terms of visual quality (LPIPS and FID) and contextual preservation scores (CLIPscore and object detection accuracy) with COCO-panoptic and Visual Genome datasets. Experimental results show the superiority of ImComplete on various natural images.
abstract_zh: 图像补全是一项旨在用合理的内容填充蒙版图像的缺失区域的任务。然而，现有的图像补全方法倾向于用周围的纹理来填充缺失的区域，而不是根据场景的上下文产生适合的视觉实例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的图像补全模型，称为 ImComplete，它会产生与原始上下文很好协调的缺失实例，从而保留原始上下文。 ImComplete 首先采用变压器架构，该架构考虑可见实例和缺失区域的位置。然后，ImComplete 完成缺失区域内的语义分割掩模，提供像素级语义和结构指导。最后，图像合成块生成照片般逼真的内容。我们使用 COCO-panoptic 和 Visual Genome 数据集对视觉质量（LPIPS 和 FID）和上下文保留分数（CLIPscore 和对象检测准确性）的结果进行综合评估。实验结果表明了ImComplete在各种自然图像上的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实例感知的图像补全模型ImComplete，通过生成与场景上下文协调的视觉实例来填补图像缺失区域，而非仅复制周围纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有图像补全方法倾向于用周围纹理填充缺失区域，导致无法生成符合场景语义的视觉实例，限制了补全结果的逼真度和上下文一致性。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构分析可见实例与缺失区域位置关系，生成语义分割掩码提供像素级结构指导，最后通过图像合成模块生成写实内容。
AI.result: 在COCO-panoptic和Visual Genome数据集上，ImComplete在LPIPS、FID、CLIPscore和目标检测准确率等指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ImComplete通过实例感知的上下文建模和语义引导，实现了更符合场景语义的高质量图像补全，验证了生成实例对上下文一致性的关键作用。

Finally, the image synthesis blocks generate photo-realistic content. We perform a comprehensive evaluation of the results in terms of visual quality (LPIPS and FID) and contextual preservation scores (CLIPscore and object detection accuracy) with COCO-panoptic and Visual Genome datasets. Experimental results show the superiority of ImComplete on various natural images. 图像补全是一项旨在用合理的内容填充蒙版图像的缺失区域的任务。然而，现有的图像补全方法倾向于用周围的纹理来填充缺失的区域，而不是根据场景的上下文产生适合的视觉实例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的图像补全模型，称为 ImComplete，它会产生与原始上下文很好协调的缺失实例，从而保留原始上下文。 ImComplete 首先采用变压器架构，该架构考虑可见实例和缺失区域的位置。然后，ImComplete 完成缺失区域内的语义分割掩模，提供像素级语义和结构指导。最后，图像合成块生成照片般逼真的内容。我们使用 COCO-panoptic 和 Visual Genome 数据集对视觉质量（LPIPS 和 FID）和上下文保留分数（CLIPscore 和对象检测准确性）的结果进行综合评估。实验结果表明了ImComplete在各种自然图像上的优越性。 本文提出一种实例感知的图像补全模型ImComplete，通过生成与场景上下文协调的视觉实例来填补图像缺失区域，而非仅复制周围纹理。 Jinoh Cho,Minguk Kang,Vibhav Vineet,Jaesik Park cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: A Task-aware Dual Similarity Network for Fine-grained Few-shot Learning
title_zh: 用于细粒度少样本学习的任务感知双相似性网络
abstract: The goal of fine-grained few-shot learning is to recognize sub-categories under the same super-category by learning few labeled samples. Most of the recent approaches adopt a single similarity measure, that is, global or local measure alone. However, for fine-grained images with high intra-class variance and low inter-class variance, exploring global invariant features and discriminative local details is quite essential. In this paper, we propose a Task-aware Dual Similarity Network(TDSNet), which applies global features and local patches to achieve better performance. Specifically, a local feature enhancement module is adopted to activate the features with strong discriminability. Besides, task-aware attention exploits the important patches among the entire task. Finally, both the class prototypes obtained by global features and discriminative local patches are employed for prediction. Extensive experiments on three fine-grained datasets demonstrate that the proposed TDSNet achieves competitive performance by comparing with other state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: The goal of fine-grained few-shot learning is to recognize sub-categories under the same super-category by learning few labeled samples. Most of the recent approaches adopt a single similarity measure, that is, global or local measure alone. However, for fine-grained images with high intra-class variance and low inter-class variance, exploring global invariant features and discriminative local details is quite essential. In this paper, we propose a Task-aware Dual Similarity Network(TDSNet), which applies global features and local patches to achieve better performance. Specifically, a local feature enhancement module is adopted to activate the features with strong discriminability. Besides, task-aware attention exploits the important patches among the entire task. Finally, both the class prototypes obtained by global features and discriminative local patches are employed for prediction. Extensive experiments on three fine-grained datasets demonstrate that the proposed TDSNet achieves competitive performance by comparing with other state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 细粒度少样本学习的目标是通过学习少量标记样本来识别同一超类别下的子类别。最近的大多数方法都采用单一相似性度量，即单独的全局或局部度量。然而，对于具有高类内方差和低类间方差的细粒度图像，探索全局不变特征和有区别的局部细节是非常必要的。在本文中，我们提出了一种任务感知双相似网络（TDSNet），它应用全局特征和局部补丁来实现更好的性能。具体来说，采用局部特征增强模块来激活具有强区分性的特征。此外，任务感知注意力会利用整个任务中的重要补丁。最后，利用全局特征和判别性局部补丁获得的类原型进行预测。对三个细粒度数据集的大量实验表明，通过与其他最先进的算法进行比较，所提出的 TDSNet 实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任务感知的双重相似性网络（TDSNet），用于解决细粒度少样本学习中类内方差大、类间方差小的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖单一相似度度量（全局或局部），难以同时捕捉细粒度图像的全局不变特征与判别性局部细节，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计TDSNet网络，包含局部特征增强模块和任务感知注意力机制，通过结合全局特征与关键局部块生成类原型进行预测。
AI.result: 在三个细粒度数据集上实验表明，TDSNet相较其他先进算法取得具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效融合全局与局部信息，TDSNet在细粒度少样本学习任务中展现了优越的识别能力。

authors_text: Qiuqiang Kong,Shilei Liu,Junjie Shi,Xuzhou Ye,Yin Cao,Qiaoxi Zhu,Yong Xu,Yuxuan Wang
title: Neural Sound Field Decomposition with Super-resolution of Sound Direction
title_zh: 具有声音方向超分辨率的神经声场分解
abstract: Sound field decomposition predicts waveforms in arbitrary directions using signals from a limited number of microphones as inputs. Sound field decomposition is fundamental to downstream tasks, including source localization, source separation, and spatial audio reproduction. Conventional sound field decomposition methods such as Ambisonics have limited spatial decomposition resolution. This paper proposes a learning-based Neural Sound field Decomposition (NeSD) framework to allow sound field decomposition with fine spatial direction resolution, using recordings from microphone capsules of a few microphones at arbitrary positions. The inputs of a NeSD system include microphone signals, microphone positions, and queried directions. The outputs of a NeSD include the waveform and the presence probability of a queried position. We model the NeSD systems respectively with different neural networks, including fully connected, time delay, and recurrent neural networks. We show that the NeSD systems outperform conventional Ambisonics and DOANet methods in sound field decomposition and source localization on speech, music, and sound events datasets. Demos are available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0GIr6doj3BQ.
summary: Sound field decomposition predicts waveforms in arbitrary directions using signals from a limited number of microphones as inputs. Sound field decomposition is fundamental to downstream tasks, including source localization, source separation, and spatial audio reproduction. Conventional sound field decomposition methods such as Ambisonics have limited spatial decomposition resolution. This paper proposes a learning-based Neural Sound field Decomposition (NeSD) framework to allow sound field decomposition with fine spatial direction resolution, using recordings from microphone capsules of a few microphones at arbitrary positions. The inputs of a NeSD system include microphone signals, microphone positions, and queried directions. The outputs of a NeSD include the waveform and the presence probability of a queried position. We model the NeSD systems respectively with different neural networks, including fully connected, time delay, and recurrent neural networks. We show that the NeSD systems outperform conventional Ambisonics and DOANet methods in sound field decomposition and source localization on speech, music, and sound events datasets. Demos are available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0GIr6doj3BQ.
abstract_zh: 声场分解使用来自有限数量的麦克风的信号作为输入来预测任意方向的波形。声场分解是下游任务的基础，包括源定位、源分离和空间音频再现。传统的声场分解方法（例如高保真度立体声响复制）的空间分解分辨率有限。本文提出了一种基于学习的神经声场分解（NeSD）框架，使用来自任意位置的几个麦克风的麦克风胶囊的录音，允许具有精细空间方向分辨率的声场分解。 NeSD系统的输入包括麦克风信号、麦克风位置和查询方向。 NeSD 的输出包括波形和查询位置的存在概率。我们分别使用不同的神经网络对 NeSD 系统进行建模，包括全连接神经网络、时滞神经网络和循环神经网络。我们表明，NeSD 系统在语音、音乐和声音事件数据集的声场分解和源定位方面优于传统的 Ambisonics 和 DOANet 方法。演示可在 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0GIr6doj3BQ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的声场分解框架NeSD，通过有限麦克风信号实现高分辨率声场分解与声源定位。
AI.motivation: 传统声场分解方法如Ambisonics存在空间分辨率不足的问题，限制了声源定位等下游任务的性能。
AI.method: 设计包含全连接、时延和循环神经网络的NeSD系统，输入麦克风信号、位置及查询方向，输出目标位置的波形及存在概率。
AI.result: NeSD在语音、音乐及声事件数据集上优于传统Ambisonics和DOANet方法，实现声场分解与定位性能提升。
AI.conclusion: NeSD框架通过学习声场分布规律，有效提升了空间分辨率和声源定位精度，为沉浸式音频应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Aparna Khare,Minhua Wu,Saurabhchand Bhati,Jasha Droppo,Roland Maas
title: Guided contrastive self-supervised pre-training for automatic speech recognition
title_zh: 自动语音识别的引导对比自监督预训练
abstract: Contrastive Predictive Coding (CPC) is a representation learning method that maximizes the mutual information between intermediate latent representations and the output of a given model. It can be used to effectively initialize the encoder of an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model. We present a novel modification of CPC called Guided Contrastive Predictive Coding (GCPC). Our proposed method maximizes the mutual information between representations from a prior-knowledge model and the output of the model being pre-trained, allowing prior knowledge injection during pre-training. We validate our method on 3 ASR tasks: German, French and English. Our method outperforms CPC pre-training on all three datasets, reducing the Word Error Rate (WER) by 4.44%, 6.55% and 15.43% relative on the German, French and English (Librispeech) tasks respectively, compared to training from scratch, while CPC pre-training only brings 2.96%, 1.01% and 14.39% relative WER reduction respectively.
summary: Contrastive Predictive Coding (CPC) is a representation learning method that maximizes the mutual information between intermediate latent representations and the output of a given model. It can be used to effectively initialize the encoder of an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model. We present a novel modification of CPC called Guided Contrastive Predictive Coding (GCPC). Our proposed method maximizes the mutual information between representations from a prior-knowledge model and the output of the model being pre-trained, allowing prior knowledge injection during pre-training. We validate our method on 3 ASR tasks: German, French and English. Our method outperforms CPC pre-training on all three datasets, reducing the Word Error Rate (WER) by 4.44%, 6.55% and 15.43% relative on the German, French and English (Librispeech) tasks respectively, compared to training from scratch, while CPC pre-training only brings 2.96%, 1.01% and 14.39% relative WER reduction respectively.
abstract_zh: 对比预测编码（CPC）是一种表示学习方法，可最大化中间潜在表示与给定模型的输出之间的互信息。它可用于有效地初始化自动语音识别（ASR）模型的编码器。我们提出了一种新颖的 CPC 修改，称为引导对比预测编码 (GCPC)。我们提出的方法最大化了先验知识模型的表示与预训练模型的输出之间的互信息，从而允许在预训练期间注入先验知识。我们在 3 个 ASR 任务上验证了我们的方法：德语、法语和英语。我们的方法在所有三个数据集上都优于 CPC 预训练，与从头开始训练相比，德语、法语和英语 (Librispeech) 任务的单词错误率 (WER) 分别降低了 4.44%、6.55% 和 15.43%，而 CPC 预训练仅分别带来了 2.96%、1.01% 和 14.39% 的相对 WER 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的对比预测编码方法（GCPC），用于自动语音识别（ASR）的预训练，通过注入先验知识提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的对比预测编码（CPC）在预训练时无法有效利用先验知识，导致模型初始化效果有限，需改进以提升ASR任务的准确性。
AI.method: 设计Guided Contrastive Predictive Coding（GCPC），通过最大化先验知识模型与预训练模型输出之间的互信息，实现预训练阶段的先验知识注入。
AI.result: 在德语、法语和英语（LibriSpeech）三个ASR任务中，GCPC相较CPC分别降低词错误率（WER）4.44%、6.55%和15.43%（相对值），优于从零训练和CPC预训练基线。
AI.conclusion: GCPC通过引入先验知识显著提升了ASR预训练效果，验证了知识引导的对比学习在语音识别中的有效性。

search_text: Guided contrastive self-supervised pre-training for automatic speech recognition 自动语音识别的引导对比自监督预训练 Contrastive Predictive Coding (CPC) is a representation learning method that maximizes the mutual information between intermediate latent representations and the output of a given model. It can be used to effectively initialize the encoder of an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model. We present a novel modification of CPC called Guided Contrastive Predictive Coding (GCPC). Our proposed method maximizes the mutual information between representations from a prior-knowledge model and the output of the model being pre-trained, allowing prior knowledge injection during pre-training. We validate our method on 3 ASR tasks: German, French and English. Our method outperforms CPC pre-training on all three datasets, reducing the Word Error Rate (WER) by 4.44%, 6.55% and 15.43% relative on the German, French and English (Librispeech) tasks respectively, compared to training from scratch, while CPC pre-training only brings 2.96%, 1.01% and 14.39% relative WER reduction respectively. 对比预测编码（CPC）是一种表示学习方法，可最大化中间潜在表示与给定模型的输出之间的互信息。它可用于有效地初始化自动语音识别（ASR）模型的编码器。我们提出了一种新颖的 CPC 修改，称为引导对比预测编码 (GCPC)。我们提出的方法最大化了先验知识模型的表示与预训练模型的输出之间的互信息，从而允许在预训练期间注入先验知识。我们在 3 个 ASR 任务上验证了我们的方法：德语、法语和英语。我们的方法在所有三个数据集上都优于 CPC 预训练，与从头开始训练相比，德语、法语和英语 (Librispeech) 任务的单词错误率 (WER) 分别降低了 4.44%、6.55% 和 15.43%，而 CPC 预训练仅分别带来了 2.96%、1.01% 和 14.39% 的相对 WER 降低。 本文提出了一种改进的对比预测编码方法（GCPC），用于自动语音识别（ASR）的预训练，通过注入先验知识提升模型性能。 Aparna Khare,Minhua Wu,Saurabhchand Bhati,Jasha Droppo,Roland Maas cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xiangyu Chen,Qinghao Hu,Kaidong Li,Cuncong Zhong,Guanghui Wang
title: Accumulated Trivial Attention Matters in Vision Transformers on Small Datasets
title_zh: 小数据集上视觉转换器中积累的琐碎注意力问题
abstract: Vision Transformers has demonstrated competitive performance on computer vision tasks benefiting from their ability to capture long-range dependencies with multi-head self-attention modules and multi-layer perceptron. However, calculating global attention brings another disadvantage compared with convolutional neural networks, i.e. requiring much more data and computations to converge, which makes it difficult to generalize well on small datasets, which is common in practical applications. Previous works are either focusing on transferring knowledge from large datasets or adjusting the structure for small datasets. After carefully examining the self-attention modules, we discover that the number of trivial attention weights is far greater than the important ones and the accumulated trivial weights are dominating the attention in Vision Transformers due to their large quantity, which is not handled by the attention itself. This will cover useful non-trivial attention and harm the performance when trivial attention includes more noise, e.g. in shallow layers for some backbones. To solve this issue, we proposed to divide attention weights into trivial and non-trivial ones by thresholds, then Suppressing Accumulated Trivial Attention (SATA) weights by proposed Trivial WeIghts Suppression Transformation (TWIST) to reduce attention noise. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet datasets show that our suppressing method boosts the accuracy of Vision Transformers by up to 2.3%. Code is available at https://github.com/xiangyu8/SATA.
summary: Vision Transformers has demonstrated competitive performance on computer vision tasks benefiting from their ability to capture long-range dependencies with multi-head self-attention modules and multi-layer perceptron. However, calculating global attention brings another disadvantage compared with convolutional neural networks, i.e. requiring much more data and computations to converge, which makes it difficult to generalize well on small datasets, which is common in practical applications. Previous works are either focusing on transferring knowledge from large datasets or adjusting the structure for small datasets. After carefully examining the self-attention modules, we discover that the number of trivial attention weights is far greater than the important ones and the accumulated trivial weights are dominating the attention in Vision Transformers due to their large quantity, which is not handled by the attention itself. This will cover useful non-trivial attention and harm the performance when trivial attention includes more noise, e.g. in shallow layers for some backbones. To solve this issue, we proposed to divide attention weights into trivial and non-trivial ones by thresholds, then Suppressing Accumulated Trivial Attention (SATA) weights by proposed Trivial WeIghts Suppression Transformation (TWIST) to reduce attention noise. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet datasets show that our suppressing method boosts the accuracy of Vision Transformers by up to 2.3%. Code is available at https://github.com/xiangyu8/SATA.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 在计算机视觉任务上表现出了具有竞争力的性能，这得益于它们通过多头自注意力模块和多层感知器捕获远程依赖关系的能力。然而，与卷积神经网络相比，计算全局注意力带来了另一个缺点，即需要更多的数据和计算才能收敛，这使得它很难在实际应用中常见的小数据集上很好地泛化。以前的工作要么侧重于从大型数据集中转移知识，要么调整小型数据集的结构。仔细检查自注意力模块后，我们发现琐碎注意力权重的数量远远大于重要权重，并且累积的琐碎权重由于数量庞大而在 Vision Transformers 中占据主导地位，而注意力本身无法处理这些权重。这将覆盖有用的非琐碎注意力，并在琐碎注意力包含更多噪音时损害性能，例如在一些骨干的浅层中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出通过阈值将注意力权重分为琐碎注意力权重和非琐碎注意力权重，然后通过提出的琐碎权重抑制变换（TWIST）来抑制累积琐碎注意力（SATA）权重以减少注意力噪声。对 CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的抑制方法将 Vision Transformers 的准确率提高了 2.3%。代码可在 https://github.com/xiangyu8/SATA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SATA的方法，通过抑制视觉Transformer中累积的琐碎注意力权重来提升其在小数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在处理小数据集时面临收敛困难和计算量大的问题，而琐碎注意力权重的累积会掩盖重要的非琐碎注意力，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 通过设定阈值将注意力权重分为琐碎和非琐碎两类，并使用TWIST方法抑制琐碎注意力权重，从而减少注意力噪声。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法使视觉Transformer的准确率提升了高达2.3%。
AI.conclusion: 抑制视觉Transformer中琐碎注意力权重可以有效提升其在小数据集上的性能。

search_text: Accumulated Trivial Attention Matters in Vision Transformers on Small Datasets 小数据集上视觉转换器中积累的琐碎注意力问题 Vision Transformers has demonstrated competitive performance on computer vision tasks benefiting from their ability to capture long-range dependencies with multi-head self-attention modules and multi-layer perceptron. However, calculating global attention brings another disadvantage compared with convolutional neural networks, i.e. requiring much more data and computations to converge, which makes it difficult to generalize well on small datasets, which is common in practical applications. Previous works are either focusing on transferring knowledge from large datasets or adjusting the structure for small datasets. After carefully examining the self-attention modules, we discover that the number of trivial attention weights is far greater than the important ones and the accumulated trivial weights are dominating the attention in Vision Transformers due to their large quantity, which is not handled by the attention itself. This will cover useful non-trivial attention and harm the performance when trivial attention includes more noise, e.g. in shallow layers for some backbones. To solve this issue, we proposed to divide attention weights into trivial and non-trivial ones by thresholds, then Suppressing Accumulated Trivial Attention (SATA) weights by proposed Trivial WeIghts Suppression Transformation (TWIST) to reduce attention noise. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet datasets show that our suppressing method boosts the accuracy of Vision Transformers by up to 2.3%. Code is available at https://github.com/xiangyu8/SATA. title: Deep Multi-Branch CNN Architecture for Early Alzheimer's Detection from Brain MRIs
title_zh: 用于通过脑 MRI 检测早期阿尔茨海默病的深度多分支 CNN 架构
abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a neuro-degenerative disease that can cause dementia and result severe reduction in brain function inhibiting simple tasks especially if no preventative care is taken. Over 1 in 9 Americans suffer from AD induced dementia and unpaid care for people with AD related dementia is valued at $271.6 billion. Hence, various approaches have been developed for early AD diagnosis to prevent its further progression. In this paper, we first review other approaches that could be used for early detection of AD. We then give an overview of our dataset that was from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and propose a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture consisting of 7,866,819 parameters. This model has three different convolutional branches with each having a different length. Each branch is comprised of different kernel sizes. This model can predict whether a patient is non-demented, mild-demented, or moderately demented with a 99.05% three class accuracy.
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a neuro-degenerative disease that can cause dementia and result severe reduction in brain function inhibiting simple tasks especially if no preventative care is taken. Over 1 in 9 Americans suffer from AD induced dementia and unpaid care for people with AD related dementia is valued at $271.6 billion. Hence, various approaches have been developed for early AD diagnosis to prevent its further progression. In this paper, we first review other approaches that could be used for early detection of AD. We then give an overview of our dataset that was from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and propose a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture consisting of 7,866,819 parameters. This model has three different convolutional branches with each having a different length. Each branch is comprised of different kernel sizes. This model can predict whether a patient is non-demented, mild-demented, or moderately demented with a 99.05% three class accuracy.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种神经退行性疾病，可导致痴呆并导致大脑功能严重下降，抑制简单的任务，尤其是在不采取预防措施的情况下。超过九分之一的美国人患有 AD 引起的痴呆症，而对 AD 相关痴呆症患者的无偿护理价值达 2,716 亿美元。因此，人们开发了各种早期 AD 诊断方法，以防止其进一步进展。在本文中，我们首先回顾了可用于 AD 早期检测的其他方法。然后，我们概述了来自阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 的数据集，并提出了一个由 7,866,819 个参数组成的深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构。该模型具有三个不同的卷积分支，每个分支具有不同的长度。每个分支由不同的内核大小组成。该模型可以预测患者是非痴呆、轻度痴呆还是中度痴呆，三级准确率高达 99.05%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度多分支卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，用于通过脑部MRI图像进行阿尔茨海默病（AD）的早期检测。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病导致严重脑功能退化且护理成本高昂，早期诊断对预防疾病进展至关重要。现有方法存在不足，需开发更高效的检测模型。
AI.method: 基于ADNI数据集构建包含786万参数的多分支CNN，采用三个不同长度的卷积分支，每个分支使用不同核尺寸的卷积层进行特征提取。
AI.result: 模型在三分类任务（非痴呆、轻度痴呆、中度痴呆）中达到99.05%的准确率，有效区分不同痴呆阶段。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多分支CNN架构在AD早期检测中表现优异，可为临床提供高效辅助诊断工具，推动个性化治疗方案制定。

motivation: 阿尔茨海默病导致严重脑功能退化且护理成本高昂，早期诊断对预防疾病进展至关重要。现有方法存在不足，需开发更高效的检测模型。
method: 基于ADNI数据集构建包含786万参数的多分支CNN，采用三个不同长度的卷积分支，每个分支使用不同核尺寸的卷积层进行特征提取。
result: 模型在三分类任务（非痴呆、轻度痴呆、中度痴呆）中达到99.05%的准确率，有效区分不同痴呆阶段。
conclusion: 提出的多分支CNN架构在AD早期检测中表现优异，可为临床提供高效辅助诊断工具，推动个性化治疗方案制定。
search_text: Deep Multi-Branch CNN Architecture for Early Alzheimer's Detection from Brain MRIs 用于通过脑 MRI 检测早期阿尔茨海默病的深度多分支 CNN 架构 Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a neuro-degenerative disease that can cause dementia and result severe reduction in brain function inhibiting simple tasks especially if no preventative care is taken. Over 1 in 9 Americans suffer from AD induced dementia and unpaid care for people with AD related dementia is valued at $271.6 billion. Hence, various approaches have been developed for early AD diagnosis to prevent its further progression. In this paper, we first review other approaches that could be used for early detection of AD. We then give an overview of our dataset that was from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and propose a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture consisting of 7,866,819 parameters. This model has three different convolutional branches with each having a different length. Each branch is comprised of different kernel sizes. This model can predict whether a patient is non-demented, mild-demented, or moderately demented with a 99.05% three class accuracy. 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种神经退行性疾病，可导致痴呆并导致大脑功能严重下降，抑制简单的任务，尤其是在不采取预防措施的情况下。超过九分之一的美国人患有 AD 引起的痴呆症，而对 AD 相关痴呆症患者的无偿护理价值达 2,716 亿美元。因此，人们开发了各种早期 AD 诊断方法，以防止其进一步进展。在本文中，我们首先回顾了可用于 AD 早期检测的其他方法。然后，我们概述了来自阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 的数据集，并提出了一个由 7,866,819 个参数组成的深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构。该模型具有三个不同的卷积分支，每个分支具有不同的长度。每个分支由不同的内核大小组成。该模型可以预测患者是非痴呆、轻度痴呆还是中度痴呆，三级准确率高达 99.05%。 本文提出一种深度多分支卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，用于通过脑部MRI图像进行阿尔茨海默病（AD）的早期检测。 Paul K. Mandal,Rakesh Mahto eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Fei Wang,Kaiqiang Song,Hongming Zhang,Lifeng Jin,Sangwoo Cho,Wenlin Yao,Xiaoyang Wang,Muhao Chen,Dong Yu
title: Salience Allocation as Guidance for Abstractive Summarization
title_zh: 显着性分配作为抽象概括的指导
comment: Accepted by EMNLP 2022. Code and model weights are available at https://github.com/tencent-ailab/season
comments: Accepted by EMNLP 2022. Code and model weights are available at https://github.com/tencent-ailab/season
abstract: Abstractive summarization models typically learn to capture the salient information from scratch implicitly. Recent literature adds extractive summaries as guidance for abstractive summarization models to provide hints of salient content and achieves better performance. However, extractive summaries as guidance could be over strict, leading to information loss or noisy signals. Furthermore, it cannot easily adapt to documents with various abstractiveness. As the number and allocation of salience content pieces vary, it is hard to find a fixed threshold deciding which content should be included in the guidance. In this paper, we propose a novel summarization approach with a flexible and reliable salience guidance, namely SEASON (SaliencE Allocation as Guidance for Abstractive SummarizatiON). SEASON utilizes the allocation of salience expectation to guide abstractive summarization and adapts well to articles in different abstractiveness. Automatic and human evaluations on two benchmark datasets show that the proposed method is effective and reliable. Empirical results on more than one million news articles demonstrate a natural fifteen-fifty salience split for news article sentences, providing a useful insight for composing news articles.
summary: Abstractive summarization models typically learn to capture the salient information from scratch implicitly. Recent literature adds extractive summaries as guidance for abstractive summarization models to provide hints of salient content and achieves better performance. However, extractive summaries as guidance could be over strict, leading to information loss or noisy signals. Furthermore, it cannot easily adapt to documents with various abstractiveness. As the number and allocation of salience content pieces vary, it is hard to find a fixed threshold deciding which content should be included in the guidance. In this paper, we propose a novel summarization approach with a flexible and reliable salience guidance, namely SEASON (SaliencE Allocation as Guidance for Abstractive SummarizatiON). SEASON utilizes the allocation of salience expectation to guide abstractive summarization and adapts well to articles in different abstractiveness. Automatic and human evaluations on two benchmark datasets show that the proposed method is effective and reliable. Empirical results on more than one million news articles demonstrate a natural fifteen-fifty salience split for news article sentences, providing a useful insight for composing news articles.
abstract_zh: 抽象摘要模型通常学习隐式地从头开始捕获显着信息。最近的文献添加了提取摘要作为抽象摘要模型的指导，以提供显着内容的提示并实现更好的性能。然而，作为指导的提取摘要可能过于严格，导致信息丢失或噪声信号。此外，它不能轻易适应具有各种抽象性的文档。由于显着内容片段的数量和分配各不相同，因此很难找到一个固定的阈值来决定哪些内容应包含在指南中。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有灵活可靠的显着性指导的新颖摘要方法，即 SEASON（SaliencE Allocation as Guidance for Abstractive Summarization）。 SEASON利用显着性期望的分配来指导抽象摘要，能够很好地适应不同抽象程度的文章。对两个基准数据集的自动和人工评估表明，所提出的方法是有效且可靠的。对超过一百万篇新闻文章的实证结果表明，新闻文章句子存在自然的十五到五十的显着性分裂，为撰写新闻文章提供了有用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的生成式摘要方法SEASON，通过灵活分配显著性信息来指导摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式摘要模型依赖提取式摘要作为指导，但存在信息丢失、噪声干扰及难以适配不同抽象程度文档的问题。
AI.method: 提出SEASON方法，利用显著性期望分配动态调整指导信息，适应不同抽象程度的文档结构。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上自动与人工评估均优于现有方法，实证显示新闻文章存在自然的15:50显著性分割比例。
AI.conclusion: SEASON方法有效提升摘要质量，揭示了新闻写作中显著性分配的规律性特征。

authors_text: Jiacheng Ye,Jiahui Gao,Jiangtao Feng,Zhiyong Wu,Tao Yu,Lingpeng Kong
title: ProGen: Progressive Zero-shot Dataset Generation via In-context Feedback
title_zh: ProGen：通过上下文反馈渐进式零样本数据集生成
abstract: Recently, dataset-generation-based zero-shot learning has shown promising results by training a task-specific model with a dataset synthesized from large pre-trained language models (PLMs). The final task-specific model often achieves compatible or even better performance than PLMs under the zero-shot setting, with orders of magnitude fewer parameters. However, synthetic datasets have their drawbacks. They have long been suffering from low-quality issues (e.g., low informativeness and redundancy). This explains why the massive synthetic data does not lead to better performance -- a scenario we would expect in the human-labeled data. To improve the quality of dataset synthesis, we propose a progressive zero-shot dataset generation framework, ProGen, which leverages the feedback from the task-specific model to guide the generation of new training data via in-context examples. Extensive experiments on five text classification datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We also show ProGen achieves on-par or superior performance with only 1\% synthetic dataset size compared to baseline methods without in-context feedback.
summary: Recently, dataset-generation-based zero-shot learning has shown promising results by training a task-specific model with a dataset synthesized from large pre-trained language models (PLMs). The final task-specific model often achieves compatible or even better performance than PLMs under the zero-shot setting, with orders of magnitude fewer parameters. However, synthetic datasets have their drawbacks. They have long been suffering from low-quality issues (e.g., low informativeness and redundancy). This explains why the massive synthetic data does not lead to better performance -- a scenario we would expect in the human-labeled data. To improve the quality of dataset synthesis, we propose a progressive zero-shot dataset generation framework, ProGen, which leverages the feedback from the task-specific model to guide the generation of new training data via in-context examples. Extensive experiments on five text classification datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We also show ProGen achieves on-par or superior performance with only 1\% synthetic dataset size compared to baseline methods without in-context feedback.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于数据集生成的零样本学习通过使用由大型预训练语言模型（PLM）合成的数据集来训练特定于任务的模型，显示出了有希望的结果。最终的特定任务模型通常可以在零样本设置下实现与 PLM 兼容甚至更好的性能，并且参数数量少几个数量级。然而，合成数据集也有其缺点。他们长期以来一直受到低质量问题的困扰（例如信息量低和冗余）。这解释了为什么大量的合成数据不会带来更好的性能——这是我们在人工标记数据中所期望的情况。为了提高数据集合成的质量，我们提出了一种渐进式零样本数据集生成框架 ProGen，它利用特定任务模型的反馈来指导通过上下文示例生成新的训练数据。对五个文本分类数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。我们还表明，与没有上下文反馈的基线方法相比，ProGen 仅用 1% 的合成数据集大小即可实现同等或卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用任务模型反馈的渐进式零样本数据集生成框架ProGen，以提升合成数据质量。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集存在低信息量和冗余问题，导致零样本学习效果不佳，需通过模型反馈优化数据生成过程。
AI.method: 通过任务模型的实时反馈指导合成数据生成，利用上下文示例迭代优化数据质量，实现渐进式数据集构建。
AI.result: 在五个文本分类数据集上验证有效性，仅需1%合成数据量即可达到基线方法同等或更优性能。
AI.conclusion: ProGen通过动态反馈机制显著提升合成数据质量，为零样本学习提供高效数据生成新范式。

title: Trustworthy Human Computation: A Survey
title_zh: 值得信赖的人类计算：一项调查
abstract: Human computation is an approach to solving problems that prove difficult using AI only, and involves the cooperation of many humans. Because human computation requires close engagement with both "human populations as users" and "human populations as driving forces," establishing mutual trust between AI and humans is an important issue to further the development of human computation. This survey lays the groundwork for the realization of trustworthy human computation. First, the trustworthiness of human computation as computing systems, that is, trust offered by humans to AI, is examined using the RAS (Reliability, Availability, and Serviceability) analogy, which define measures of trustworthiness in conventional computer systems. Next, the social trustworthiness provided by human computation systems to users or participants is discussed from the perspective of AI ethics, including fairness, privacy, and transparency. Then, we consider human--AI collaboration based on two-way trust, in which humans and AI build mutual trust and accomplish difficult tasks through reciprocal collaboration. Finally, future challenges and research directions for realizing trustworthy human computation are discussed.
summary: Human computation is an approach to solving problems that prove difficult using AI only, and involves the cooperation of many humans. Because human computation requires close engagement with both "human populations as users" and "human populations as driving forces," establishing mutual trust between AI and humans is an important issue to further the development of human computation. This survey lays the groundwork for the realization of trustworthy human computation. First, the trustworthiness of human computation as computing systems, that is, trust offered by humans to AI, is examined using the RAS (Reliability, Availability, and Serviceability) analogy, which define measures of trustworthiness in conventional computer systems. Next, the social trustworthiness provided by human computation systems to users or participants is discussed from the perspective of AI ethics, including fairness, privacy, and transparency. Then, we consider human--AI collaboration based on two-way trust, in which humans and AI build mutual trust and accomplish difficult tasks through reciprocal collaboration. Finally, future challenges and research directions for realizing trustworthy human computation are discussed.
abstract_zh: 人类计算是一种解决仅使用人工智能难以解决的问题的方法，并且涉及许多人的合作。由于人类计算需要与“作为用户的人类”和“作为驱动力的人类”密切接触，因此建立人工智能与人类之间的相互信任是人类计算进一步发展的重要问题。这项调查为实现可信的人类计算奠定了基础。首先，使用 RAS（可靠性、可用性和可服务性）类比来检查人类计算作为计算系统的可信度，即人类对人工智能提供的信任，RAS 类比定义了传统计算机系统中的可信度度量。接下来，从人工智能伦理的角度讨论人类计算系统为用户或参与者提供的社会可信度，包括公平、隐私和透明。然后，我们考虑基于双向信任的人与人工智能协作，人类和人工智能建立相互信任，通过相互协作完成困难的任务。最后，讨论了实现可信人类计算的未来挑战和研究方向。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何建立可信的人类计算系统，并分析其关键要素与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 由于人类计算需要人类与AI的协作，建立双方的互信是确保系统有效性和用户信任的关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过RAS类比分析系统可信度，结合AI伦理框架讨论社会信任，并探讨双向信任下的人机协作模式。
AI.result: 明确了可信人类计算的评估框架，识别了公平性、隐私等关键伦理问题，并提出了双向信任协作的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需要进一步解决伦理挑战，提升人机协作的互信机制，以推动可信人类计算的发展。

search_text: Trustworthy Human Computation: A Survey 值得信赖的人类计算：一项调查 Human computation is an approach to solving problems that prove difficult using AI only, and involves the cooperation of many humans. Because human computation requires close engagement with both "human populations as users" and "human populations as driving forces," establishing mutual trust between AI and humans is an important issue to further the development of human computation. This survey lays the groundwork for the realization of trustworthy human computation. First, the trustworthiness of human computation as computing systems, that is, trust offered by humans to AI, is examined using the RAS (Reliability, Availability, and Serviceability) analogy, which define measures of trustworthiness in conventional computer systems. Next, the social trustworthiness provided by human computation systems to users or participants is discussed from the perspective of AI ethics, including fairness, privacy, and transparency. Then, we consider human--AI collaboration based on two-way trust, in which humans and AI build mutual trust and accomplish difficult tasks through reciprocal collaboration. Finally, future challenges and research directions for realizing trustworthy human computation are discussed. 人类计算是一种解决仅使用人工智能难以解决的问题的方法，并且涉及许多人的合作。由于人类计算需要与“作为用户的人类”和“作为驱动力的人类”密切接触，因此建立人工智能与人类之间的相互信任是人类计算进一步发展的重要问题。这项调查为实现可信的人类计算奠定了基础。首先，使用 RAS（可靠性、可用性和可服务性）类比来检查人类计算作为计算系统的可信度，即人类对人工智能提供的信任，RAS 类比定义了传统计算机系统中的可信度度量。接下来，从人工智能伦理的角度讨论人类计算系统为用户或参与者提供的社会可信度，包括公平、隐私和透明。然后，我们考虑基于双向信任的人与人工智能协作，人类和人工智能建立相互信任，通过相互协作完成困难的任务。最后，讨论了实现可信人类计算的未来挑战和研究方向。 探讨如何建立可信的人类计算系统，并分析其关键要素与未来方向。 Hisashi Kashima,Satoshi Oyama,Hiromi Arai,Junichiro Mori cs.AI

title: Diffusion Motion: Generate Text-Guided 3D Human Motion by Diffusion Model
title_zh: 扩散运动：通过扩散模型生成文本引导的 3D 人体运动
abstract: We propose a simple and novel method for generating 3D human motion from complex natural language sentences, which describe different velocity, direction and composition of all kinds of actions. Different from existing methods that use classical generative architecture, we apply the Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model to this task, synthesizing diverse motion results under the guidance of texts. The diffusion model converts white noise into structured 3D motion by a Markov process with a series of denoising steps and is efficiently trained by optimizing a variational lower bound. To achieve the goal of text-conditioned image synthesis, we use the classifier-free guidance strategy to fuse text embedding into the model during training. Our experiments demonstrate that our model achieves competitive results on HumanML3D test set quantitatively and can generate more visually natural and diverse examples. We also show with experiments that our model is capable of zero-shot generation of motions for unseen text guidance.
summary: We propose a simple and novel method for generating 3D human motion from complex natural language sentences, which describe different velocity, direction and composition of all kinds of actions. Different from existing methods that use classical generative architecture, we apply the Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model to this task, synthesizing diverse motion results under the guidance of texts. The diffusion model converts white noise into structured 3D motion by a Markov process with a series of denoising steps and is efficiently trained by optimizing a variational lower bound. To achieve the goal of text-conditioned image synthesis, we use the classifier-free guidance strategy to fuse text embedding into the model during training. Our experiments demonstrate that our model achieves competitive results on HumanML3D test set quantitatively and can generate more visually natural and diverse examples. We also show with experiments that our model is capable of zero-shot generation of motions for unseen text guidance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单而新颖的方法，用于从复杂的自然语言句子生成 3D 人体运动，该句子描述了各种动作的不同速度、方向和组成。与使用经典生成架构的现有方法不同，我们将去噪扩散概率模型应用于此任务，在文本的指导下合成不同的运动结果。扩散模型通过具有一系列去噪步骤的马尔可夫过程将白噪声转换为结构化 3D 运动，并通过优化变分下界进行有效训练。为了实现文本条件图像合成的目标，我们使用无分类器指导策略在训练期间将文本嵌入融合到模型中。我们的实验表明，我们的模型在 HumanML3D 测试集上定量地取得了有竞争力的结果，并且可以生成视觉上更加自然和多样化的示例。我们还通过实验证明，我们的模型能够零样本生成运动，以实现看不见的文本引导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的方法，通过自然语言文本生成多样化的3D人体运动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成复杂文本描述的3D人体运动时存在多样性不足的问题，而扩散模型能通过去噪过程生成结构化数据，具有潜在优势。
AI.method: 采用去噪扩散概率模型，通过马尔可夫过程将白噪声转化为结构化3D运动，并利用无分类器引导策略融合文本嵌入，优化变分下界进行训练。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D数据集上取得具有竞争力的定量结果，生成更自然多样的运动样本，并支持未见过文本的零样本生成。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型有效解决了文本到3D运动生成任务，相比传统方法在多样性和自然度上具有显著优势。

authors_text: Akansha Singh Bansal,Yoonjin Lee,Kyle Hilburn,Imme Ebert-Uphoff
title: Tools for Extracting Spatio-Temporal Patterns in Meteorological Image Sequences: From Feature Engineering to Attention-Based Neural Networks
title_zh: 提取气象图像序列中时空模式的工具：从特征工程到基于注意力的神经网络
comment: The paper is submitted for review to the EDS Journal
comments: The paper is submitted for review to the EDS Journal
abstract: Atmospheric processes involve both space and time. This is why human analysis of atmospheric imagery can often extract more information from animated loops of image sequences than from individual images. Automating such an analysis requires the ability to identify spatio-temporal patterns in image sequences which is a very challenging task, because of the endless possibilities of patterns in both space and time. In this paper we review different concepts and techniques that are useful to extract spatio-temporal context specifically for meteorological applications. In this survey we first motivate the need for these approaches in meteorology using two applications, solar forecasting and detecting convection from satellite imagery. Then we provide an overview of many different concepts and techniques that are helpful for the interpretation of meteorological image sequences, such as (1) feature engineering methods to strengthen the desired signal in the input, using meteorological knowledge, classic image processing, harmonic analysis and topological data analysis (2) explain how different convolution filters (2D/3D/LSTM-convolution) can be utilized strategically in convolutional neural network architectures to find patterns in both space and time (3) discuss the powerful new concept of 'attention' in neural networks and the powerful abilities it brings to the interpretation of image sequences (4) briefly survey strategies from unsupervised, self-supervised and transfer learning to reduce the need for large labeled datasets. We hope that presenting an overview of these tools - many of which are underutilized - will help accelerate progress in this area.

We hope that presenting an overview of these tools - many of which are underutilized - will help accelerate progress in this area.
abstract_zh: 大气过程涉及空间和时间。 This is why human analysis of atmospheric imagery can often extract more information from animated loops of image sequences than from individual images. Automating such an analysis requires the ability to identify spatio-temporal patterns in image sequences which is a very challenging task, because of the endless possibilities of patterns in both space and time. In this paper we review different concepts and techniques that are useful to extract spatio-temporal context specifically for meteorological applications. In this survey we first motivate the need for these approaches in meteorology using two applications, solar forecasting and detecting convection from satellite imagery. Then we provide an overview of many different concepts and techniques that are helpful for the interpretation of meteorological image sequences, such as (1) feature engineering methods to strengthen the desired signal in the input, using meteorological knowledge, classic image processing, harmonic analysis and topological data analysis (2) explain how different convolution filters (2D/3D/LSTM-convolution) can be utilized strategically in convolutional neural network architectures to find patterns in both space and time (3) discuss the powerful new concept of 'attention' in neural networks and the powerful abilities it brings to the interpretation of image sequences (4) briefly survey strategies from unsupervised, self-supervised and transfer learning to reduce the need for large labeled datasets.我们希望对这些工具（其中许多工具未得到充分利用）进行概述将有助于加速这一领域的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从特征工程到基于注意力的神经网络在气象图像序列中提取时空模式的工具与技术。
AI.motivation: 气象学中需分析时空变化的天气现象，传统方法难以自动提取复杂时空模式，需借助先进工具提升预测与监测能力。
AI.method: 通过特征工程增强信号、设计时空卷积网络（2D/3D/LSTM-convolution）、引入注意力机制，并结合无监督/自监督学习减少标注数据依赖。
AI.result: 系统梳理了现有技术框架，指出注意力机制等新兴方法在气象图像分析中的潜力，并强调工具的未充分利用现状。
AI.conclusion: 综述为气象领域提供了技术路线图，未来需进一步探索注意力机制与多源数据融合以提升时空模式分析效率。

Then we provide an overview of many different concepts and techniques that are helpful for the interpretation of meteorological image sequences, such as (1) feature engineering methods to strengthen the desired signal in the input, using meteorological knowledge, classic image processing, harmonic analysis and topological data analysis (2) explain how different convolution filters (2D/3D/LSTM-convolution) can be utilized strategically in convolutional neural network architectures to find patterns in both space and time (3) discuss the powerful new concept of 'attention' in neural networks and the powerful abilities it brings to the interpretation of image sequences (4) briefly survey strategies from unsupervised, self-supervised and transfer learning to reduce the need for large labeled datasets. We hope that presenting an overview of these tools - many of which are underutilized - will help accelerate progress in this area. 大气过程涉及空间和时间。 This is why human analysis of atmospheric imagery can often extract more information from animated loops of image sequences than from individual images. Automating such an analysis requires the ability to identify spatio-temporal patterns in image sequences which is a very challenging task, because of the endless possibilities of patterns in both space and time. In this paper we review different concepts and techniques that are useful to extract spatio-temporal context specifically for meteorological applications. In this survey we first motivate the need for these approaches in meteorology using two applications, solar forecasting and detecting convection from satellite imagery. Then we provide an overview of many different concepts and techniques that are helpful for the interpretation of meteorological image sequences, such as (1) feature engineering methods to strengthen the desired signal in the input, using meteorological knowledge, classic image processing, harmonic analysis and topological data analysis (2) explain how different convolution filters (2D/3D/LSTM-convolution) can be utilized strategically in convolutional neural network architectures to find patterns in both space and time (3) discuss the powerful new concept of 'attention' in neural networks and the powerful abilities it brings to the interpretation of image sequences (4) briefly survey strategies from unsupervised, self-supervised and transfer learning to reduce the need for large labeled datasets.我们希望对这些工具（其中许多工具未得到充分利用）进行概述将有助于加速这一领域的进展。 本文综述了从特征工程到基于注意力的神经网络在气象图像序列中提取时空模式的工具与技术。 Akansha Singh Bansal,Yoonjin Lee,Kyle Hilburn,Imme Ebert-Uphoff cs.CV

authors_text: Songyang Zhang,Linfeng Song,Lifeng Jin,Haitao Mi,Kun Xu,Dong Yu,Jiebo Luo
title: Learning a Grammar Inducer from Massive Uncurated Instructional Videos
title_zh: 从大量未经策划的教学视频中学习语法诱导器
abstract: Video-aided grammar induction aims to leverage video information for finding more accurate syntactic grammars for accompanying text. While previous work focuses on building systems for inducing grammars on text that are well-aligned with video content, we investigate the scenario, in which text and video are only in loose correspondence. Such data can be found in abundance online, and the weak correspondence is similar to the indeterminacy problem studied in language acquisition. Furthermore, we build a new model that can better learn video-span correlation without manually designed features adopted by previous work. Experiments show that our model trained only on large-scale YouTube data with no text-video alignment reports strong and robust performances across three unseen datasets, despite domain shift and noisy label issues. Furthermore our model yields higher F1 scores than the previous state-of-the-art systems trained on in-domain data.
summary: Video-aided grammar induction aims to leverage video information for finding more accurate syntactic grammars for accompanying text. While previous work focuses on building systems for inducing grammars on text that are well-aligned with video content, we investigate the scenario, in which text and video are only in loose correspondence. Such data can be found in abundance online, and the weak correspondence is similar to the indeterminacy problem studied in language acquisition. Furthermore, we build a new model that can better learn video-span correlation without manually designed features adopted by previous work. Experiments show that our model trained only on large-scale YouTube data with no text-video alignment reports strong and robust performances across three unseen datasets, despite domain shift and noisy label issues. Furthermore our model yields higher F1 scores than the previous state-of-the-art systems trained on in-domain data.
abstract_zh: 视频辅助语法归纳旨在利用视频信息为伴随文本找到更准确的句法语法。虽然之前的工作重点是构建用于在与视频内容良好对齐的文本上归纳语法的系统，但我们研究了文本和视频仅处于松散对应关系的场景。这样的数据在网上可以找到很多，弱对应性类似于语言习得中研究的不确定性问题。此外，我们构建了一个新模型，可以更好地学习视频跨度相关性，而无需先前工作采用的手动设计特征。实验表明，我们的模型仅在大规模 YouTube 数据上进行训练，没有文本视频对齐，尽管存在域转移和噪声标签问题，但在三个未见过的数据集上报告了强大且稳健的性能。此外，我们的模型比之前在域内数据上训练的最先进的系统产生更高的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从大量未标注教学视频中学习语法归纳模型的方法，解决文本与视频对应关系松散的场景下的语法学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语法归纳方法依赖文本与视频的强对齐关系，但实际场景中在线数据存在松散对应关系，类似语言习得中的不确定性问题，需探索更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建无需人工设计特征的新模型，通过学习视频片段与文本的关联性，利用大规模YouTube数据进行训练。
AI.result: 模型在三个不同领域数据集上均表现稳健，F1分数优于基于领域内数据的最新方法，且能处理领域偏移和噪声标签问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了在未标注松散对应视频数据中学习语法归纳的有效性，为实际应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Niranjan Uma Naresh,Ziyan Jiang,Ankit,Sungjin Lee,Jie Hao,Xing Fan,Chenlei Guo
title: PENTATRON: PErsonalized coNText-Aware Transformer for Retrieval-based cOnversational uNderstanding
title_zh: PENTATRON：用于基于检索的对话理解的个性化上下文感知转换器
abstract: Conversational understanding is an integral part of modern intelligent devices. In a large fraction of the global traffic from customers using smart digital assistants, frictions in dialogues may be attributed to incorrect understanding of the entities in a customer's query due to factors including ambiguous mentions, mispronunciation, background noise and faulty on-device signal processing. Such errors are compounded by two common deficiencies from intelligent devices namely, (1) the device not being tailored to individual customers, and (2) the device responses being unaware of the context in the conversation session. Viewing this problem via the lens of retrieval-based search engines, we build and evaluate a scalable entity correction system, PENTATRON. The system leverages a parametric transformer-based language model to learn patterns from in-session customer-device interactions coupled with a non-parametric personalized entity index to compute the correct query, which aids downstream components in reasoning about the best response. In addition to establishing baselines and demonstrating the value of personalized and context-aware systems, we use multitasking to learn the domain of the correct entity. We also investigate the utility of language model prompts. Through extensive experiments, we show a significant upward movement of the key metric (Exact Match) by up to 500.97% (relative to the baseline).
summary: Conversational understanding is an integral part of modern intelligent devices. In a large fraction of the global traffic from customers using smart digital assistants, frictions in dialogues may be attributed to incorrect understanding of the entities in a customer's query due to factors including ambiguous mentions, mispronunciation, background noise and faulty on-device signal processing. Such errors are compounded by two common deficiencies from intelligent devices namely, (1) the device not being tailored to individual customers, and (2) the device responses being unaware of the context in the conversation session. Viewing this problem via the lens of retrieval-based search engines, we build and evaluate a scalable entity correction system, PENTATRON. The system leverages a parametric transformer-based language model to learn patterns from in-session customer-device interactions coupled with a non-parametric personalized entity index to compute the correct query, which aids downstream components in reasoning about the best response. In addition to establishing baselines and demonstrating the value of personalized and context-aware systems, we use multitasking to learn the domain of the correct entity. We also investigate the utility of language model prompts. Through extensive experiments, we show a significant upward movement of the key metric (Exact Match) by up to 500.97% (relative to the baseline).
abstract_zh: 对话理解是现代智能设备不可或缺的一部分。在使用智能数字助理的客户的全球流量中，很大一部分对话中的摩擦可能归因于对客户查询中的实体的不正确理解，原因包括含糊不清的提及、发音错误、背景噪音和错误的设备信号处理等因素。智能设备的两个常见缺陷加剧了此类错误，即：(1) 设备未针对个人客户量身定制，以及 (2) 设备响应不了解对话会话中的上下文。通过基于检索的搜索引擎的视角来看待这个问题，我们构建并评估了一个可扩展的实体校正系统 PENTATRON。该系统利用基于参数转换器的语言模型从会话中的客户设备交互中学习模式，并结合非参数个性化实体索引来计算正确的查询，这有助于下游组件推理最佳响应。除了建立基线和展示个性化和上下文感知系统的价值之外，我们还使用多任务处理来学习正确实体的领域。我们还研究了语言模型提示的实用性。通过大量实验，我们发现关键指标（精确匹配）显着向上移动高达 500.97%（相对于基线）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PENTATRON系统，通过个性化与上下文感知的Transformer模型解决对话理解中的实体错误问题。
AI.motivation: 智能设备因缺乏个性化和上下文感知能力，导致用户查询中实体理解错误，影响对话质量。
AI.method: 结合参数化Transformer模型与非参数化个性化实体索引，利用多任务学习和语言模型提示优化实体领域识别。
AI.result: 在关键指标Exact Match上相较基线提升高达500.97%。
AI.conclusion: 个性化与上下文感知机制显著提升实体纠错效果，验证了其在对话理解中的价值。

ai_content.conclusion: 个性化与上下文感知机制显著提升实体纠错效果，验证了其在对话理解中的价值。

authors_text: Masato Hagiwara,Benjamin Hoffman,Jen-Yu Liu,Maddie Cusimano,Felix Effenberger,Katie Zacarian
title: BEANS: The Benchmark of Animal Sounds
title_zh: BEANS：动物声音的基准
abstract: The use of machine learning (ML) based techniques has become increasingly popular in the field of bioacoustics over the last years. Fundamental requirements for the successful application of ML based techniques are curated, agreed upon, high-quality datasets and benchmark tasks to be learned on a given dataset. However, the field of bioacoustics so far lacks such public benchmarks which cover multiple tasks and species to measure the performance of ML techniques in a controlled and standardized way and that allows for benchmarking newly proposed techniques to existing ones. Here, we propose BEANS (the BEnchmark of ANimal Sounds), a collection of bioacoustics tasks and public datasets, specifically designed to measure the performance of machine learning algorithms in the field of bioacoustics. The benchmark proposed here consists of two common tasks in bioacoustics: classification and detection. It includes 12 datasets covering various species, including birds, land and marine mammals, anurans, and insects. In addition to the datasets, we also present the performance of a set of standard ML methods as the baseline for task performance. The benchmark and baseline code is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/beans} in the hope of establishing a new standard dataset for ML-based bioacoustic research.
summary: The use of machine learning (ML) based techniques has become increasingly popular in the field of bioacoustics over the last years. Fundamental requirements for the successful application of ML based techniques are curated, agreed upon, high-quality datasets and benchmark tasks to be learned on a given dataset. However, the field of bioacoustics so far lacks such public benchmarks which cover multiple tasks and species to measure the performance of ML techniques in a controlled and standardized way and that allows for benchmarking newly proposed techniques to existing ones. Here, we propose BEANS (the BEnchmark of ANimal Sounds), a collection of bioacoustics tasks and public datasets, specifically designed to measure the performance of machine learning algorithms in the field of bioacoustics. The benchmark proposed here consists of two common tasks in bioacoustics: classification and detection. It includes 12 datasets covering various species, including birds, land and marine mammals, anurans, and insects. In addition to the datasets, we also present the performance of a set of standard ML methods as the baseline for task performance. The benchmark and baseline code is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/beans} in the hope of establishing a new standard dataset for ML-based bioacoustic research.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于机器学习 (ML) 的技术在生物声学领域变得越来越流行。成功应用基于机器学习的技术的基本要求是精心策划、商定的高质量数据集和在给定数据集上学习的基准任务。然而，迄今为止，生物声学领域还缺乏这样的公共基准，这些基准涵盖多个任务和物种，以受控和标准化的方式衡量机器学习技术的性能，并且允许对新提出的技术与现有技术进行基准测试。在这里，我们提出了 BEANS（动物声音的基准），这是生物声学任务和公共数据集的集合，专门用于测量生物声学领域机器学习算法的性能。这里提出的基准包括生物声学中的两个常见任务：分类和检测。它包括 12 个数据集，涵盖各种物种，包括鸟类、陆地和海洋哺乳动物、无尾动物和昆虫。除了数据集之外，我们还提供了一组标准机器学习方法的性能作为任务性能的基准。基准和基线代码在 \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/beans} 上公开提供，希望为基于机器学习的生物声学研究建立一个新的标准数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEANS基准，包含12个动物声音数据集及分类与检测任务，用于评估机器学习在生物声学领域的性能。
AI.motivation: 生物声学领域缺乏标准化的公共基准数据集，难以客观比较机器学习方法的性能。
AI.method: 构建涵盖鸟类、哺乳动物、两栖类和昆虫的12个数据集，设计分类与检测任务，并提供基准机器学习方法的性能对比。
AI.result: 发布BEANS基准及基线代码，为后续研究提供标准化测试平台。
AI.conclusion: BEANS填补了生物声学领域基准数据集的空白，推动基于机器学习的声学研究标准化发展。

search_text: BEANS: The Benchmark of Animal Sounds BEANS：动物声音的基准 The use of machine learning (ML) based techniques has become increasingly popular in the field of bioacoustics over the last years. Fundamental requirements for the successful application of ML based techniques are curated, agreed upon, high-quality datasets and benchmark tasks to be learned on a given dataset. However, the field of bioacoustics so far lacks such public benchmarks which cover multiple tasks and species to measure the performance of ML techniques in a controlled and standardized way and that allows for benchmarking newly proposed techniques to existing ones. Here, we propose BEANS (the BEnchmark of ANimal Sounds), a collection of bioacoustics tasks and public datasets, specifically designed to measure the performance of machine learning algorithms in the field of bioacoustics. The benchmark proposed here consists of two common tasks in bioacoustics: classification and detection. It includes 12 datasets covering various species, including birds, land and marine mammals, anurans, and insects. In addition to the datasets, we also present the performance of a set of standard ML methods as the baseline for task performance. The benchmark and baseline code is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/beans} in the hope of establishing a new standard dataset for ML-based bioacoustic research. 近年来，基于机器学习 (ML) 的技术在生物声学领域变得越来越流行。成功应用基于机器学习的技术的基本要求是精心策划、商定的高质量数据集和在给定数据集上学习的基准任务。然而，迄今为止，生物声学领域还缺乏这样的公共基准，这些基准涵盖多个任务和物种，以受控和标准化的方式衡量机器学习技术的性能，并且允许对新提出的技术与现有技术进行基准测试。在这里，我们提出了 BEANS（动物声音的基准），这是生物声学任务和公共数据集的集合，专门用于测量生物声学领域机器学习算法的性能。这里提出的基准包括生物声学中的两个常见任务：分类和检测。它包括 12 个数据集，涵盖各种物种，包括鸟类、陆地和海洋哺乳动物、无尾动物和昆虫。除了数据集之外，我们还提供了一组标准机器学习方法的性能作为任务性能的基准。基准和基线代码在 \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/beans} 上公开提供，希望为基于机器学习的生物声学研究建立一个新的标准数据集。 本文提出BEANS基准，包含12个动物声音数据集及分类与检测任务，用于评估机器学习在生物声学领域的性能。 Masato Hagiwara,Benjamin Hoffman,Jen-Yu Liu,Maddie Cusimano,Felix Effenberger,Katie Zacarian cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Chen Chen,Matin Yarmand,Varun Singh,Michael V. Sherer,James D. Murphy,Yang Zhang,Nadir Weibel
title: VRContour: Bringing Contour Delineations of Medical Structures Into Virtual Reality
title_zh: VRContour：将医疗结构的轮廓描绘带入虚拟现实
comment: C. Chen, M. Yarmand, V. Singh, M.V. Sherer, J.D. Murphy, Y. Zhang and N. Weibel, "VRContour: Bringing Contour Delineations of Medical Structures Into Virtual Reality", 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR), 2022, pp. 1-10, doi: 10.1109/ISMAR55827.2022.00020
comments: C. Chen, M. Yarmand, V. Singh, M.V. Sherer, J.D. Murphy, Y. Zhang and N. Weibel, "VRContour: Bringing Contour Delineations of Medical Structures Into Virtual Reality", 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR), 2022, pp. 1-10, doi: 10.1109/ISMAR55827.2022.00020
abstract: Contouring is an indispensable step in Radiotherapy (RT) treatment planning. However, today's contouring software is constrained to only work with a 2D display, which is less intuitive and requires high task loads. Virtual Reality (VR) has shown great potential in various specialties of healthcare and health sciences education due to the unique advantages of intuitive and natural interactions in immersive spaces. VR-based radiation oncology integration has also been advocated as a target healthcare application, allowing providers to directly interact with 3D medical structures. We present VRContour and investigate how to effectively bring contouring for radiation oncology into VR. Through an autobiographical iterative design, we defined three design spaces focused on contouring in VR with the support of a tracked tablet and VR stylus, and investigating dimensionality for information consumption and input (either 2D or 2D + 3D). Through a within-subject study (n = 8), we found that visualizations of 3D medical structures significantly increase precision, and reduce mental load, frustration, as well as overall contouring effort. Participants also agreed with the benefits of using such metaphors for learning purposes.
summary: Contouring is an indispensable step in Radiotherapy (RT) treatment planning. However, today's contouring software is constrained to only work with a 2D display, which is less intuitive and requires high task loads. Virtual Reality (VR) has shown great potential in various specialties of healthcare and health sciences education due to the unique advantages of intuitive and natural interactions in immersive spaces. VR-based radiation oncology integration has also been advocated as a target healthcare application, allowing providers to directly interact with 3D medical structures. We present VRContour and investigate how to effectively bring contouring for radiation oncology into VR. Through an autobiographical iterative design, we defined three design spaces focused on contouring in VR with the support of a tracked tablet and VR stylus, and investigating dimensionality for information consumption and input (either 2D or 2D + 3D). Through a within-subject study (n = 8), we found that visualizations of 3D medical structures significantly increase precision, and reduce mental load, frustration, as well as overall contouring effort. Participants also agreed with the benefits of using such metaphors for learning purposes.
abstract_zh: 轮廓绘制是放射治疗 (RT) 治疗计划中不可或缺的步骤。然而，当今的轮廓绘制软件仅限于使用 2D 显示器，这不太直观并且需要高任务负载。虚拟现实（VR）由于在沉浸式空间中直观、自然交互的独特优势，在医疗保健和健康科学教育的各个专业领域显示出巨大的潜力。基于 VR 的放射肿瘤学集成也被提倡作为目标医疗保健应用，允许提供者直接与 3D 医疗结构交互。我们展示 VRContour 并研究如何有效地将放射肿瘤学轮廓引入 VR。通过自传式迭代设计，我们定义了三个设计空间，重点关注在跟踪平板电脑和 VR 手写笔的支持下在 VR 中绘制轮廓，并研究信息消费和输入的维度（2D 或 2D + 3D）。通过一项受试者内研究 (n = 8)，我们发现 3D 医疗结构的可视化可显着提高精确度，并减少精神负担、挫败感以及整体轮廓绘制工作。参与者还同意使用此类隐喻进行学习的好处。

AI.tldr: 开发VRContour系统，将医学结构的轮廓绘制引入虚拟现实环境以提升放射治疗计划的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有放射治疗轮廓软件受限于2D显示，交互不直观且任务负荷高，而VR的沉浸式交互特性可优化此流程。
AI.method: 通过迭代设计定义三个VR轮廓交互设计空间，结合追踪平板与VR笔进行2D/2D+3D维度对比实验，并开展8人被试内研究。
AI.result: 3D可视化显著提升轮廓精度，降低心理负荷与操作挫败感，参与者认可其在医学教育中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: VRContour验证了VR技术在放射肿瘤学轮廓绘制中的有效性，为医疗VR应用提供了可行设计框架。

title: Feature selection intelligent algorithm with mutual information and steepest ascent strategy
title_zh: 具有互信息和最陡上升策略的特征选择智能算法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1211.0613
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1211.0613
abstract: Remote sensing is a higher technology to produce knowledge for data mining applications. In principle hyperspectral images (HSIs) is a remote sensing tool that provides precise classification of regions. The HSI contains more than a hundred of images of the ground truth (GT) map. Some images are carrying relevant information, but others describe redundant information, or they are affected by atmospheric noise. The aim is to reduce dimensionality of HSI. Many studies use mutual information (MI) or normalised forms of MI to select appropriate bands. In this paper we design an algorithm based also on MI, and we combine MI with steepest ascent algorithm, to improve a symmetric uncertainty coefficient-based strategy to select relevant bands for classification of HSI. This algorithm is a feature selection tool and a wrapper strategy. We perform our study on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C. This is an artificial intelligent system to control redundancy; we had to clear the difference of the result's algorithm and the human decision, and this can be viewed as case study which human decision is perhaps different to an intelligent algorithm. Index Terms - Hyperspectral images, Classification, Fea-ture selection, Mutual Information, Redundancy, Steepest Ascent. Artificial Intelligence

abstract_zh: 遥感是一种为数据挖掘应用产生知识的高级技术。原则上，高光谱图像（HSIs）是一种遥感工具，可以提供精确的区域分类。 HSI 包含一百多张地面实况 (GT) 地图图像。有些图像携带相关信息，但其他图像描述冗余信息，或者受到大气噪声的影响。目的是降低 HSI 的维数。许多研究使用互信息 (MI) 或 MI 的标准化形式来选择合适的频段。在本文中，我们设计了一种同样基于MI的算法，并将MI与最速上升算法相结合，改进基于对称不确定性系数的策略来选择HSI分类的相关波段。该算法是一种特征选择工具和包装策略。我们对 HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C 进行研究。这是一个控制冗余的人工智能系统；我们必须明确结果的算法和人类决策的差异，这可以被视为人类决​​策可能与智能算法不同的案例研究。索引术语 - 高光谱图像、分类、特征选择、互信息、冗余、最速上升。人工智能

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合互信息与最速上升策略的特征选择算法，用于高光谱图像分类中的冗余信息消除。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像包含大量冗余和受噪声影响的波段，传统方法难以有效筛选关键特征，需改进特征选择策略以提升分类精度。
AI.method: 基于互信息理论，融合最速上升算法优化对称不确定性系数策略，设计一种包装式特征选择工具。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS 92AV3C数据集验证中，算法有效降低了冗余度，且与人工决策结果存在差异，证明了算法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为高光谱图像分类提供了智能化特征选择方案，同时揭示了人工智能与人工决策的差异性研究价值。

search_text: Feature selection intelligent algorithm with mutual information and steepest ascent strategy 具有互信息和最陡上升策略的特征选择智能算法 Remote sensing is a higher technology to produce knowledge for data mining applications. In principle hyperspectral images (HSIs) is a remote sensing tool that provides precise classification of regions. The HSI contains more than a hundred of images of the ground truth (GT) map. Some images are carrying relevant information, but others describe redundant information, or they are affected by atmospheric noise. The aim is to reduce dimensionality of HSI. Many studies use mutual information (MI) or normalised forms of MI to select appropriate bands. In this paper we design an algorithm based also on MI, and we combine MI with steepest ascent algorithm, to improve a symmetric uncertainty coefficient-based strategy to select relevant bands for classification of HSI. This algorithm is a feature selection tool and a wrapper strategy. We perform our study on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C. This is an artificial intelligent system to control redundancy; we had to clear the difference of the result's algorithm and the human decision, and this can be viewed as case study which human decision is perhaps different to an intelligent algorithm. Index Terms - Hyperspectral images, Classification, Fea-ture selection, Mutual Information, Redundancy, Steepest Ascent. Artificial Intelligence 遥感是一种为数据挖掘应用产生知识的高级技术。原则上，高光谱图像（HSIs）是一种遥感工具，可以提供精确的区域分类。 HSI 包含一百多张地面实况 (GT) 地图图像。有些图像携带相关信息，但其他图像描述冗余信息，或者受到大气噪声的影响。目的是降低 HSI 的维数。许多研究使用互信息 (MI) 或 MI 的标准化形式来选择合适的频段。在本文中，我们设计了一种同样基于MI的算法，并将MI与最速上升算法相结合，改进基于对称不确定性系数的策略来选择HSI分类的相关波段。该算法是一种特征选择工具和包装策略。我们对 HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C 进行研究。这是一个控制冗余的人工智能系统；我们必须明确结果的算法和人类决策的差异，这可以被视为人类决​​策可能与智能算法不同的案例研究。索引术语 - 高光谱图像、分类、特征选择、互信息、冗余、最速上升。人工智能 本文提出一种结合互信息与最速上升策略的特征选择算法，用于高光谱图像分类中的冗余信息消除。 Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch,Driss Aboutajdine cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Albert Q. Jiang,Sean Welleck,Jin Peng Zhou,Wenda Li,Jiacheng Liu,Mateja Jamnik,Timothée Lacroix,Yuhuai Wu,Guillaume Lample
title: Draft, Sketch, and Prove: Guiding Formal Theorem Provers with Informal Proofs
title_zh: 草稿、草图和证明：用非正式证明指导形式定理证明者
abstract: The formalization of existing mathematical proofs is a notoriously difficult process. Despite decades of research on automation and proof assistants, writing formal proofs remains arduous and only accessible to a few experts. While previous studies to automate formalization focused on powerful search algorithms, no attempts were made to take advantage of available informal proofs. In this work, we introduce Draft, Sketch, and Prove (DSP), a method that maps informal proofs to formal proof sketches, and uses the sketches to guide an automated prover by directing its search to easier sub-problems. We investigate two relevant setups where informal proofs are either written by humans or generated by a language model. Our experiments and ablation studies show that large language models are able to produce well-structured formal sketches that follow the same reasoning steps as the informal proofs. Guiding an automated prover with these sketches enhances its performance from 20.9% to 39.3% on a collection of mathematical competition problems.
summary: The formalization of existing mathematical proofs is a notoriously difficult process. Despite decades of research on automation and proof assistants, writing formal proofs remains arduous and only accessible to a few experts. While previous studies to automate formalization focused on powerful search algorithms, no attempts were made to take advantage of available informal proofs. In this work, we introduce Draft, Sketch, and Prove (DSP), a method that maps informal proofs to formal proof sketches, and uses the sketches to guide an automated prover by directing its search to easier sub-problems. We investigate two relevant setups where informal proofs are either written by humans or generated by a language model. Our experiments and ablation studies show that large language models are able to produce well-structured formal sketches that follow the same reasoning steps as the informal proofs. Guiding an automated prover with these sketches enhances its performance from 20.9% to 39.3% on a collection of mathematical competition problems.
abstract_zh: 现有数学证明的形式化是一个众所周知的困难过程。尽管对自动化和证明助手进行了数十年的研究，但编写正式的证明仍然很艰巨，并且只有少数专家才能完成。虽然以前的自动化形式化研究主要集中在强大的搜索算法上，但没有尝试利用可用的非正式证明。在这项工作中，我们介绍了草稿、草图和证明 (DSP)，这是一种将非正式证明映射到正式证明草图的方法，并使用草图通过将搜索引导到更简单的子问题来指导自动证明器。我们研究了两个相关的设置，其中非正式证明要么由人类编写，要么由语言模型生成。我们的实验和消融研究表明，大型语言模型能够生成结构良好的正式草图，其遵循与非正式证明相同的推理步骤。使用这些草图指导自动证明器可将其在一系列数学竞赛问题上的性能从 20.9% 提高到 39.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Draft, Sketch, and Prove (DSP)的方法，通过将非形式化证明映射为形式化证明草图来指导自动定理证明器。
AI.motivation: 形式化数学证明的过程极为困难且耗时，现有自动化方法未能有效利用已有的非形式化证明，导致效率低下。
AI.method: DSP方法通过两种场景验证：人类书写的非形式化证明和语言模型生成的非形式化证明，将两者转化为形式化草图以引导自动证明器的搜索方向。
AI.result: 实验表明，大型语言模型生成的草图能有效提升自动证明器性能，从20.9%提升至39.3%。
AI.conclusion: 结合非形式化证明与自动证明器可显著提高形式化证明效率，语言模型生成的草图在该过程中发挥关键作用。

authors_text: Tuluhan Akbulut,Max Merlin,Shane Parr,Benedict Quartey,Skye Thompson
title: Sample Efficient Robot Learning with Structured World Models
title_zh: 使用结构化世界模型进行高效机器人学习的示例
abstract: Reinforcement learning has been demonstrated as a flexible and effective approach for learning a range of continuous control tasks, such as those used by robots to manipulate objects in their environment. But in robotics particularly, real-world rollouts are costly, and sample efficiency can be a major limiting factor when learning a new skill. In game environments, the use of world models has been shown to improve sample efficiency while still achieving good performance, especially when images or other rich observations are provided. In this project, we explore the use of a world model in a deformable robotic manipulation task, evaluating its effect on sample efficiency when learning to fold a cloth in simulation. We compare the use of RGB image observation with a feature space leveraging built-in structure (keypoints representing the cloth configuration), a common approach in robot skill learning, and compare the impact on task performance and learning efficiency with and without the world model. Our experiments showed that the usage of keypoints increased the performance of the best model on the task by 50%, and in general, the use of a learned or constructed reduced feature space improved task performance and sample efficiency. The use of a state transition predictor(MDN-RNN) in our world models did not have a notable effect on task performance.
summary: Reinforcement learning has been demonstrated as a flexible and effective approach for learning a range of continuous control tasks, such as those used by robots to manipulate objects in their environment. But in robotics particularly, real-world rollouts are costly, and sample efficiency can be a major limiting factor when learning a new skill. In game environments, the use of world models has been shown to improve sample efficiency while still achieving good performance, especially when images or other rich observations are provided. In this project, we explore the use of a world model in a deformable robotic manipulation task, evaluating its effect on sample efficiency when learning to fold a cloth in simulation. We compare the use of RGB image observation with a feature space leveraging built-in structure (keypoints representing the cloth configuration), a common approach in robot skill learning, and compare the impact on task performance and learning efficiency with and without the world model. Our experiments showed that the usage of keypoints increased the performance of the best model on the task by 50%, and in general, the use of a learned or constructed reduced feature space improved task performance and sample efficiency. The use of a state transition predictor(MDN-RNN) in our world models did not have a notable effect on task performance.
abstract_zh: 强化学习已被证明是一种灵活有效的方法，用于学习一系列连续控制任务，例如机器人用来操纵环境中物体的任务。但特别是在机器人技术中，现实世界的推广成本高昂，并且样本效率可能是学习新技能时的主要限制因素。在游戏环境中，世界模型的使用已被证明可以提高样本效率，同时仍然实现良好的性能，特别是在提供图像或其他丰富的观察结果时。在这个项目中，我们探索了世界模型在可变形机器人操作任务中的使用，评估了在模拟中学习折叠布料时它对样本效率的影响。我们将 RGB 图像观察的使用与利用内置结构（代表布料配置的关键点）的特征空间（机器人技能学习中的常见方法）进行比较，并比较有和没有世界模型对任务性能和学习效率的影响。我们的实验表明，使用关键点可以将任务中最佳模型的性能提高 50%，而且一般来说，使用学习或构造的缩减特征空间可以提高任务性能和样本效率。在我们的世界模型中使用状态转换预测器（MDN-RNN）并没有对任务性能产生显着影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过结构化世界模型提高机器人学习折叠布料任务的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中机器人学习样本成本高，而世界模型在游戏环境中能提升样本效率，因此探索其在机器人操作任务中的应用。
AI.method: 比较RGB图像观察与基于关键点的特征空间，结合MDN-RNN状态转移预测器，评估其对任务性能和学习效率的影响。
AI.result: 关键点特征空间使最佳模型性能提升50%，结构化特征空间整体提升任务表现和样本效率，但MDN-RNN对任务性能无显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 结构化特征空间有效提升样本效率，但状态转移预测器（MDN-RNN）对任务性能影响有限。
