The use of a state transition predictor(MDN-RNN) in our world models did not have a notable effect on task performance. 强化学习已被证明是一种灵活有效的方法，用于学习一系列连续控制任务，例如机器人用来操纵环境中物体的任务。但特别是在机器人技术中，现实世界的推广成本高昂，并且样本效率可能是学习新技能时的主要限制因素。在游戏环境中，世界模型的使用已被证明可以提高样本效率，同时仍然实现良好的性能，特别是在提供图像或其他丰富的观察结果时。在这个项目中，我们探索了世界模型在可变形机器人操作任务中的使用，评估了在模拟中学习折叠布料时它对样本效率的影响。我们将 RGB 图像观察的使用与利用内置结构（代表布料配置的关键点）的特征空间（机器人技能学习中的常见方法）进行比较，并比较有和没有世界模型对任务性能和学习效率的影响。我们的实验表明，使用关键点可以将任务中最佳模型的性能提高 50%，而且一般来说，使用学习或构造的缩减特征空间可以提高任务性能和样本效率。在我们的世界模型中使用状态转换预测器（MDN-RNN）并没有对任务性能产生显着影响。 本论文旨在通过结构化世界模型提高机器人学习折叠布料任务的样本效率。 Tuluhan Akbulut,Max Merlin,Shane Parr,Benedict Quartey,Skye Thompson cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Alexandre Piche,Rafael Pardinas,David Vazquez,Igor Mordatch,Chris Pal
title: Implicit Offline Reinforcement Learning via Supervised Learning
title_zh: 通过监督学习进行隐式离线强化学习
abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) via Supervised Learning is a simple and effective way to learn robotic skills from a dataset collected by policies of different expertise levels. It is as simple as supervised learning and Behavior Cloning (BC), but takes advantage of return information. On datasets collected by policies of similar expertise, implicit BC has been shown to match or outperform explicit BC. Despite the benefits of using implicit models to learn robotic skills via BC, offline RL via Supervised Learning algorithms have been limited to explicit models. We show how implicit models can leverage return information and match or outperform explicit algorithms to acquire robotic skills from fixed datasets. Furthermore, we show the close relationship between our implicit methods and other popular RL via Supervised Learning algorithms to provide a unified framework. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on high-dimension manipulation and locomotion tasks.
summary: Offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) via Supervised Learning is a simple and effective way to learn robotic skills from a dataset collected by policies of different expertise levels. It is as simple as supervised learning and Behavior Cloning (BC), but takes advantage of return information. On datasets collected by policies of similar expertise, implicit BC has been shown to match or outperform explicit BC. Despite the benefits of using implicit models to learn robotic skills via BC, offline RL via Supervised Learning algorithms have been limited to explicit models. We show how implicit models can leverage return information and match or outperform explicit algorithms to acquire robotic skills from fixed datasets. Furthermore, we show the close relationship between our implicit methods and other popular RL via Supervised Learning algorithms to provide a unified framework. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on high-dimension manipulation and locomotion tasks.
abstract_zh: 通过监督学习的离线强化学习（RL）是一种简单而有效的方法，可以从不同专业水平的策略收集的数据集中学习机器人技能。它与监督学习和行为克隆（BC）一样简单，但利用了返回信息。在具有类似专业知识的政策收集的数据集上，隐式 BC 已被证明可以匹配或优于显式 BC。尽管通过BC使用隐式模型学习机器人技能有很多好处，但通过监督学习算法的离线强化学习仅限于显式模型。我们展示了隐式模型如何利用返回信息并匹配或超越显式算法来从固定数据集中获取机器人技能。此外，我们通过监督学习算法展示了我们的隐式方法和其他流行的强化学习之间的密切关系，以提供统一的框架。最后，我们证明了我们的方法在高维操作和运动任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过监督学习实现隐式离线强化学习的方法，利用固定数据集中的返回信息学习机器人技能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于监督学习的离线强化学习方法局限于显式模型，未能充分利用返回信息，而隐式模型在相似专家策略数据集上已展现竞争力。
AI.method: 设计隐式模型框架，通过行为克隆结合返回信息，建立与显式方法的联系，形成统一的离线强化学习框架。
AI.result: 在高维操作和运动任务中验证方法有效性，隐式模型性能匹配或超越显式算法。
AI.conclusion: 隐式方法能有效利用返回信息，为离线强化学习提供新视角，推动监督学习与强化学习的融合。

authors_text: Chen Chen,Matin Yarmand,Zhuoqun Xu,Varun Singh,Yang Zhang,Nadir Weibel
title: Investigating Input Modality and Task Geometry on Precision-first 3D Drawing in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 研究虚拟现实中精度优先 3D 绘图的输入模式和任务几何形状
comment: C. Chen, M. Yarmand, Z. Xu and V. Singh, Y. Zhang and N. Weibel, "Investigating Input Modality and Task Geometry on Precision-first 3D Drawing in Virtual Reality", 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR), 2022, pp. 1-10, doi: 10.1109/ISMAR55827.2022.00054
comments: C. Chen, M. Yarmand, Z. Xu and V. Singh, Y. Zhang and N. Weibel, "Investigating Input Modality and Task Geometry on Precision-first 3D Drawing in Virtual Reality", 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR), 2022, pp. 1-10, doi: 10.1109/ISMAR55827.2022.00054
abstract: Accurately drawing non-planar 3D curves in immersive Virtual Reality (VR) is indispensable for many precise 3D tasks. However, due to lack of physical support, limited depth perception, and the non-planar nature of 3D curves, it is challenging to adjust mid-air strokes to achieve high precision. Instead of creating new interaction techniques, we investigated how task geometric shapes and input modalities affect precision-first drawing performance in a within-subject study (n = 12) focusing on 3D target tracing in commercially available VR headsets. We found that compared to using bare hands, VR controllers and pens yield nearly 30% of precision gain, and that the tasks with large curvature, forward-backward or left-right orientations perform best. We finally discuss opportunities for designing novel interaction techniques for precise 3D drawing. We believe that our work will benefit future research aiming to create usable toolboxes for precise 3D drawing.
summary: Accurately drawing non-planar 3D curves in immersive Virtual Reality (VR) is indispensable for many precise 3D tasks. However, due to lack of physical support, limited depth perception, and the non-planar nature of 3D curves, it is challenging to adjust mid-air strokes to achieve high precision. Instead of creating new interaction techniques, we investigated how task geometric shapes and input modalities affect precision-first drawing performance in a within-subject study (n = 12) focusing on 3D target tracing in commercially available VR headsets. We found that compared to using bare hands, VR controllers and pens yield nearly 30% of precision gain, and that the tasks with large curvature, forward-backward or left-right orientations perform best. We finally discuss opportunities for designing novel interaction techniques for precise 3D drawing. We believe that our work will benefit future research aiming to create usable toolboxes for precise 3D drawing.
abstract_zh: 在沉浸式虚拟现实 (VR) 中准确绘制非平面 3D 曲线对于许多精确的 3D 任务是必不可少的。然而，由于缺乏物理支撑、有限的深度感知以及 3D 曲线的非平面性质，调整空中行程以实现高精度具有挑战性。我们没有创建新的交互技术，而是在一项受试者内研究 (n = 12) 中研究了任务几何形状和输入模式如何影响精度优先的绘图性能，该研究重点关注市售 VR 耳机中的 3D 目标跟踪。我们发现，与徒手相比，VR 控制器和笔的精度增益接近 30%，并且大曲率、前后或左右方向的任务表现最佳。最后，我们讨论了为精确 3D 绘图设计新颖交互技术的机会。我们相信，我们的工作将有利于未来的研究，旨在创建用于精确 3D 绘图的可用工具箱。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了输入方式和任务几何形状对虚拟现实（VR）中精确3D绘图的影响。
AI.motivation: 在VR中精确绘制非平面3D曲线面临物理支撑缺失、深度感知有限等挑战，需探索现有输入方式与任务几何对精度的影响以优化设计。
AI.method: 通过12名参与者的组内实验，比较裸手、VR控制器和笔三种输入方式在商业VR头显中的3D目标追踪表现，并分析任务曲率及方向对精度的影响。
AI.result: 与裸手相比，控制器和笔使精度提升近30%；具有大曲率或前后/左右方向的任务表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为设计精准3D绘图交互技术提供了理论依据，有助于未来构建实用的3D绘图工具集。

authors_text: Benedict Quartey,Tuluhan Akbulut,Wasiwasi Mgonzo,Zheng Xin Yong
title: An Exploration of Neural Radiance Field Scene Reconstruction: Synthetic, Real-world and Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 神经辐射场场景重建的探索：合成、真实世界和动态场景
abstract: This project presents an exploration into 3D scene reconstruction of synthetic and real-world scenes using Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) approaches. We primarily take advantage of the reduction in training and rendering time of neural graphic primitives multi-resolution hash encoding, to reconstruct static video game scenes and real-world scenes, comparing and observing reconstruction detail and limitations. Additionally, we explore dynamic scene reconstruction using Neural Radiance Fields for Dynamic Scenes(D-NeRF). Finally, we extend the implementation of D-NeRF, originally constrained to handle synthetic scenes to also handle real-world dynamic scenes.
summary: This project presents an exploration into 3D scene reconstruction of synthetic and real-world scenes using Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) approaches. We primarily take advantage of the reduction in training and rendering time of neural graphic primitives multi-resolution hash encoding, to reconstruct static video game scenes and real-world scenes, comparing and observing reconstruction detail and limitations. Additionally, we explore dynamic scene reconstruction using Neural Radiance Fields for Dynamic Scenes(D-NeRF). Finally, we extend the implementation of D-NeRF, originally constrained to handle synthetic scenes to also handle real-world dynamic scenes.
abstract_zh: 该项目探索了使用神经辐射场 (NeRF) 方法对合成场景和真实世界场景进行 3D 场景重建。我们主要利用神经图形基元多分辨率哈希编码训练和渲染时间的减少来重建静态视频游戏场景和现实世界场景，比较和观察重建细节和局限性。此外，我们探索使用动态场景神经辐射场（D-NeRF）进行动态场景重建。最后，我们扩展了 D-NeRF 的实现，最初仅限于处理合成场景，现在也可以处理现实世界的动态场景。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了使用神经辐射场（NeRF）方法对合成、现实世界及动态场景进行三维重建，重点优化训练效率并扩展动态场景应用。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法在处理现实场景和动态内容时存在效率与精度限制，需通过技术改进提升其适用性与重建质量。
AI.method: 采用多分辨率哈希编码降低训练与渲染时间，对比静态场景重建效果；基于D-NeRF方法扩展其对现实动态场景的处理能力。
AI.result: 实现了静态场景的高效重建，分析了现实场景的细节限制；成功将D-NeRF扩展至现实动态场景，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的NeRF方法提升了重建效率，动态场景扩展展示了潜力，但现实场景复杂性仍需进一步技术突破。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探索了使用神经辐射场（NeRF）方法对合成、现实世界及动态场景进行三维重建，重点优化训练效率并扩展动态场景应用。
ai_content.motivation: 现有NeRF方法在处理现实场景和动态内容时存在效率与精度限制，需通过技术改进提升其适用性与重建质量。

ai_content.result: 实现了静态场景的高效重建，分析了现实场景的细节限制；成功将D-NeRF扩展至现实动态场景，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: An Exploration of Neural Radiance Field Scene Reconstruction: Synthetic, Real-world and Dynamic Scenes 神经辐射场场景重建的探索：合成、真实世界和动态场景 This project presents an exploration into 3D scene reconstruction of synthetic and real-world scenes using Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) approaches. We primarily take advantage of the reduction in training and rendering time of neural graphic primitives multi-resolution hash encoding, to reconstruct static video game scenes and real-world scenes, comparing and observing reconstruction detail and limitations. Additionally, we explore dynamic scene reconstruction using Neural Radiance Fields for Dynamic Scenes(D-NeRF). Finally, we extend the implementation of D-NeRF, originally constrained to handle synthetic scenes to also handle real-world dynamic scenes. 该项目探索了使用神经辐射场 (NeRF) 方法对合成场景和真实世界场景进行 3D 场景重建。我们主要利用神经图形基元多分辨率哈希编码训练和渲染时间的减少来重建静态视频游戏场景和现实世界场景，比较和观察重建细节和局限性。此外，我们探索使用动态场景神经辐射场（D-NeRF）进行动态场景重建。最后，我们扩展了 D-NeRF 的实现，最初仅限于处理合成场景，现在也可以处理现实世界的动态场景。 本文探索了使用神经辐射场（NeRF）方法对合成、现实世界及动态场景进行三维重建，重点优化训练效率并扩展动态场景应用。 Benedict Quartey,Tuluhan Akbulut,Wasiwasi Mgonzo,Zheng Xin Yong cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yue Yang,Wenlin Yao,Hongming Zhang,Xiaoyang Wang,Dong Yu,Jianshu Chen
title: Z-LaVI: Zero-Shot Language Solver Fueled by Visual Imagination
title_zh: Z-LaVI：由视觉想象力推动的零样本语言求解器
abstract: Large-scale pretrained language models have made significant advances in solving downstream language understanding tasks. However, they generally suffer from reporting bias, the phenomenon describing the lack of explicit commonsense knowledge in written text, e.g., ''an orange is orange''. To overcome this limitation, we develop a novel approach, Z-LaVI, to endow language models with visual imagination capabilities. Specifically, we leverage two complementary types of ''imaginations'': (i) recalling existing images through retrieval and (ii) synthesizing nonexistent images via text-to-image generation. Jointly exploiting the language inputs and the imagination, a pretrained vision-language model (e.g., CLIP) eventually composes a zero-shot solution to the original language tasks. Notably, fueling language models with imagination can effectively leverage visual knowledge to solve plain language tasks. In consequence, Z-LaVI consistently improves the zero-shot performance of existing language models across a diverse set of language tasks.
summary: Large-scale pretrained language models have made significant advances in solving downstream language understanding tasks. However, they generally suffer from reporting bias, the phenomenon describing the lack of explicit commonsense knowledge in written text, e.g., ''an orange is orange''. To overcome this limitation, we develop a novel approach, Z-LaVI, to endow language models with visual imagination capabilities. Specifically, we leverage two complementary types of ''imaginations'': (i) recalling existing images through retrieval and (ii) synthesizing nonexistent images via text-to-image generation. Jointly exploiting the language inputs and the imagination, a pretrained vision-language model (e.g., CLIP) eventually composes a zero-shot solution to the original language tasks. Notably, fueling language models with imagination can effectively leverage visual knowledge to solve plain language tasks. In consequence, Z-LaVI consistently improves the zero-shot performance of existing language models across a diverse set of language tasks.
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练语言模型在解决下游语言理解任务方面取得了重大进展。 However, they generally suffer from reporting bias, the phenomenon describing the lack of explicit commonsense knowledge in written text, e.g., ''an orange is orange''.为了克服这一限制，我们开发了一种新方法 Z-LaVI，赋予语言模型视觉想象能力。 Specifically, we leverage two complementary types of ''imaginations'': (i) recalling existing images through retrieval and (ii) synthesizing nonexistent images via text-to-image generation. Jointly exploiting the language inputs and the imagination, a pretrained vision-language model (e.g., CLIP) eventually composes a zero-shot solution to the original language tasks.值得注意的是，用想象力增强语言模型可以有效地利用视觉知识来解决简单的语言任务。因此，Z-LaVI 在各种语言任务中持续改进现有语言模型的零样本性能。

AI.tldr: 开发Z-LaVI方法，通过视觉想象增强语言模型的零样本语言任务解决能力。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型因缺乏显式常识知识（如'橙子是橙色的'）导致报告偏差，需引入视觉知识弥补这一缺陷。
AI.method: 结合图像检索与文本生成两种视觉想象方式，利用视觉语言模型（如CLIP）融合语言输入与视觉信息生成零样本解决方案。
AI.result: Z-LaVI在多种语言任务中显著提升语言模型的零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 为语言模型注入视觉想象能力可有效利用视觉知识解决纯语言任务，验证了跨模态融合的有效性。

title: Efficient Automatic Machine Learning via Design Graphs
title_zh: 通过设计图进行高效的自动机器学习
comment: NeurIPS 2022 New Frontiers in Graph Learning Workshop (NeurIPS GLFrontiers 2022). 20 Pages
comments: NeurIPS 2022 New Frontiers in Graph Learning Workshop (NeurIPS GLFrontiers 2022). 20 Pages
abstract: Despite the success of automated machine learning (AutoML), which aims to find the best design, including the architecture of deep networks and hyper-parameters, conventional AutoML methods are computationally expensive and hardly provide insights into the relations of different model design choices. To tackle the challenges, we propose FALCON, an efficient sample-based method to search for the optimal model design. Our key insight is to model the design space of possible model designs as a design graph, where the nodes represent design choices, and the edges denote design similarities. FALCON features 1) a task-agnostic module, which performs message passing on the design graph via a Graph Neural Network (GNN), and 2) a task-specific module, which conducts label propagation of the known model performance information on the design graph. Both modules are combined to predict the design performances in the design space, navigating the search direction. We conduct extensive experiments on 27 node and graph classification tasks from various application domains, and an image classification task on the CIFAR-10 dataset. We empirically show that FALCON can efficiently obtain the well-performing designs for each task using only 30 explored nodes. Specifically, FALCON has a comparable time cost with the one-shot approaches while achieving an average improvement of 3.3% compared with the best baselines.
summary: Despite the success of automated machine learning (AutoML), which aims to find the best design, including the architecture of deep networks and hyper-parameters, conventional AutoML methods are computationally expensive and hardly provide insights into the relations of different model design choices. To tackle the challenges, we propose FALCON, an efficient sample-based method to search for the optimal model design. Our key insight is to model the design space of possible model designs as a design graph, where the nodes represent design choices, and the edges denote design similarities. FALCON features 1) a task-agnostic module, which performs message passing on the design graph via a Graph Neural Network (GNN), and 2) a task-specific module, which conducts label propagation of the known model performance information on the design graph. Both modules are combined to predict the design performances in the design space, navigating the search direction. We conduct extensive experiments on 27 node and graph classification tasks from various application domains, and an image classification task on the CIFAR-10 dataset. We empirically show that FALCON can efficiently obtain the well-performing designs for each task using only 30 explored nodes. Specifically, FALCON has a comparable time cost with the one-shot approaches while achieving an average improvement of 3.3% compared with the best baselines.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动化机器学习（AutoML）取得了成功，旨在寻找最佳设计，包括深度网络和超参数的架构，但传统的 AutoML 方法计算成本高昂，并且很难深入了解不同模型设计选择的关系。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 FALCON，一种有效的基于样本的方法来搜索最佳模型设计。我们的主要见解是将可能的模型设计的设计空间建模为设计图，其中节点表示设计选择，边表示设计相似性。 FALCON 具有 1) 任务无关模块，通过图神经网络 (GNN) 在设计图上执行消息传递，2) 特定于任务的模块，在设计图上进行已知模型性能信息的标签传播。两个模块结合起来可以预测设计空间中的设计性能，从而引导搜索方向。我们对来自不同应用领域的 27 个节点和图分类任务以及 CIFAR-10 数据集上的图像分类任务进行了广泛的实验。我们凭经验表明，FALCON 仅使用 30 个探索的节点就可以有效地获得每个任务的性能良好的设计。具体来说，FALCON 的时间成本与一次性方法相当，同时与最佳基线相比平均提高了 3.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FALCON方法，通过设计图建模模型设计空间，实现高效的自动机器学习。
AI.motivation: 传统AutoML方法计算成本高且难以揭示不同模型设计选择之间的关系，亟需更高效且具解释性的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建设计图表示模型设计空间，结合图神经网络（GNN）的任务无关模块与标签传播的任务相关模块，联合预测设计性能并引导搜索方向。
AI.result: 在27个图分类任务和CIFAR-10数据集上验证，仅需探索30个节点即可达到最佳性能，时间成本与单次方法相当，平均提升3.3%。
AI.conclusion: FALCON通过设计图建模有效平衡了搜索效率与性能，为自动机器学习提供了新范式。

title: Score-based Denoising Diffusion with Non-Isotropic Gaussian Noise Models
title_zh: 基于分数的非各向同性高斯噪声模型的去噪扩散
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop ; 4 pages, 1 page of references, 18 pages of appendix, 2 figures
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop ; 4 pages, 1 page of references, 18 pages of appendix, 2 figures
abstract: Generative models based on denoising diffusion techniques have led to an unprecedented increase in the quality and diversity of imagery that is now possible to create with neural generative models. However, most contemporary state-of-the-art methods are derived from a standard isotropic Gaussian formulation. In this work we examine the situation where non-isotropic Gaussian distributions are used. We present the key mathematical derivations for creating denoising diffusion models using an underlying non-isotropic Gaussian noise model. We also provide initial experiments with the CIFAR-10 dataset to help verify empirically that this more general modeling approach can also yield high-quality samples.
summary: Generative models based on denoising diffusion techniques have led to an unprecedented increase in the quality and diversity of imagery that is now possible to create with neural generative models. However, most contemporary state-of-the-art methods are derived from a standard isotropic Gaussian formulation. In this work we examine the situation where non-isotropic Gaussian distributions are used. We present the key mathematical derivations for creating denoising diffusion models using an underlying non-isotropic Gaussian noise model. We also provide initial experiments with the CIFAR-10 dataset to help verify empirically that this more general modeling approach can also yield high-quality samples.
abstract_zh: 基于去噪扩散技术的生成模型使图像的质量和多样性得到了前所未有的提高，现在可以使用神经生成模型创建图像。然而，大多数当代最先进的方法都源自标准各向同性高斯公式。在这项工作中，我们研究使用非各向同性高斯分布的情况。我们提出了使用底层非各向同性高斯噪声模型创建去噪扩散模型的关键数学推导。我们还提供了 CIFAR-10 数据集的初步实验，以帮助凭经验验证这种更通用的建模方法也可以产生高质量的样本。

AI.motivation: 现有先进生成模型多采用各向同性高斯噪声假设，限制了模型对复杂数据分布的建模能力，需探索更通用的噪声建模方式。

AI.result: 实验表明该方法能够生成高质量图像，验证了非各向同性建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 非各向同性高斯噪声模型为扩散生成模型提供了更灵活的建模方式，具有应用前景。

search_text: Score-based Denoising Diffusion with Non-Isotropic Gaussian Noise Models 基于分数的非各向同性高斯噪声模型的去噪扩散 Generative models based on denoising diffusion techniques have led to an unprecedented increase in the quality and diversity of imagery that is now possible to create with neural generative models. However, most contemporary state-of-the-art methods are derived from a standard isotropic Gaussian formulation. In this work we examine the situation where non-isotropic Gaussian distributions are used. We present the key mathematical derivations for creating denoising diffusion models using an underlying non-isotropic Gaussian noise model. We also provide initial experiments with the CIFAR-10 dataset to help verify empirically that this more general modeling approach can also yield high-quality samples. 基于去噪扩散技术的生成模型使图像的质量和多样性得到了前所未有的提高，现在可以使用神经生成模型创建图像。然而，大多数当代最先进的方法都源自标准各向同性高斯公式。在这项工作中，我们研究使用非各向同性高斯分布的情况。我们提出了使用底层非各向同性高斯噪声模型创建去噪扩散模型的关键数学推导。我们还提供了 CIFAR-10 数据集的初步实验，以帮助凭经验验证这种更通用的建模方法也可以产生高质量的样本。 本文提出了一种基于非各向同性高斯噪声模型的去噪扩散生成模型方法。 Vikram Voleti,Christopher Pal,Adam Oberman cs.LG,cs.CV

title: STAP: Sequencing Task-Agnostic Policies
title_zh: STAP：与任务无关的排序策略
comment: Video: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zp3qFeZLACNPsGLLP7p6q9X1tuA_PGEo/view. Project page: https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/stap. 12 pages, 7 figures. In proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. The first two authors contributed equally
comments: Video: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zp3qFeZLACNPsGLLP7p6q9X1tuA_PGEo/view. Project page: https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/stap. 12 pages, 7 figures. In proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Advances in robotic skill acquisition have made it possible to build general-purpose libraries of learned skills for downstream manipulation tasks. However, naively executing these skills one after the other is unlikely to succeed without accounting for dependencies between actions prevalent in long-horizon plans. We present Sequencing Task-Agnostic Policies (STAP), a scalable framework for training manipulation skills and coordinating their geometric dependencies at planning time to solve long-horizon tasks never seen by any skill during training. Given that Q-functions encode a measure of skill feasibility, we formulate an optimization problem to maximize the joint success of all skills sequenced in a plan, which we estimate by the product of their Q-values. Our experiments indicate that this objective function approximates ground truth plan feasibility and, when used as a planning objective, reduces myopic behavior and thereby promotes long-horizon task success. We further demonstrate how STAP can be used for task and motion planning by estimating the geometric feasibility of skill sequences provided by a task planner. We evaluate our approach in simulation and on a real robot. Qualitative results and code are made available at https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/stap.
summary: Advances in robotic skill acquisition have made it possible to build general-purpose libraries of learned skills for downstream manipulation tasks. However, naively executing these skills one after the other is unlikely to succeed without accounting for dependencies between actions prevalent in long-horizon plans. We present Sequencing Task-Agnostic Policies (STAP), a scalable framework for training manipulation skills and coordinating their geometric dependencies at planning time to solve long-horizon tasks never seen by any skill during training. Given that Q-functions encode a measure of skill feasibility, we formulate an optimization problem to maximize the joint success of all skills sequenced in a plan, which we estimate by the product of their Q-values. Our experiments indicate that this objective function approximates ground truth plan feasibility and, when used as a planning objective, reduces myopic behavior and thereby promotes long-horizon task success. We further demonstrate how STAP can be used for task and motion planning by estimating the geometric feasibility of skill sequences provided by a task planner. We evaluate our approach in simulation and on a real robot. Qualitative results and code are made available at https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/stap.
abstract_zh: 机器人技能获取的进步使得为下游操作任务构建通用学习技能库成为可能。然而，如果不考虑长期计划中普遍存在的行动之间的依赖关系，天真地一个接一个地执行这些技能不太可能成功。我们提出了与任务无关的测序策略（STAP），这是一个可扩展的框架，用于训练操作技能并在规划时协调其几何依赖关系，以解决任何技能在训练期间从未见过的长期任务。鉴于 Q 函数编码了技能可行性的衡量标准，我们制定了一个优化问题，以最大化计划中排序的所有技能的联合成功，我们通过其 Q 值的乘积来估计。我们的实验表明，该目标函数近似于真实计划的可行性，并且当用作规划目标时，可以减少短视行为，从而促进长期任务的成功。我们通过估计任务规划器提供的技能序列的几何可行性，进一步演示了 STAP 如何用于任务和运动规划。我们在模拟和真实机器人上评估我们的方法。定性结果和代码可在 https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/stap 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAP框架，通过协调几何依赖关系解决长时域任务中的技能序列问题。
AI.motivation: 现有技能库在执行长时域任务时因未考虑动作依赖性而难以成功，需解决技能序列的几何依赖协调问题。
AI.method: 利用Q函数衡量技能可行性，通过最大化技能序列Q值乘积的优化问题，结合任务规划器估计几何可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法减少短视行为，提升长时域任务成功率，并在仿真和真实机器人上验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: STAP通过优化技能序列的联合可行性，有效解决了未见过的长时域任务规划问题。

title: A Dataset for Plain Language Adaptation of Biomedical Abstracts
title_zh: 生物医学摘要的简单语言改编数据集
abstract: Though exponentially growing health-related literature has been made available to a broad audience online, the language of scientific articles can be difficult for the general public to understand. Therefore, adapting this expert-level language into plain language versions is necessary for the public to reliably comprehend the vast health-related literature. Deep Learning algorithms for automatic adaptation are a possible solution; however, gold standard datasets are needed for proper evaluation. Proposed datasets thus far consist of either pairs of comparable professional- and general public-facing documents or pairs of semantically similar sentences mined from such documents. This leads to a trade-off between imperfect alignments and small test sets. To address this issue, we created the Plain Language Adaptation of Biomedical Abstracts dataset. This dataset is the first manually adapted dataset that is both document- and sentence-aligned. The dataset contains 750 adapted abstracts, totaling 7643 sentence pairs. Along with describing the dataset, we benchmark automatic adaptation on the dataset with state-of-the-art Deep Learning approaches, setting baselines for future research.
summary: Though exponentially growing health-related literature has been made available to a broad audience online, the language of scientific articles can be difficult for the general public to understand. Therefore, adapting this expert-level language into plain language versions is necessary for the public to reliably comprehend the vast health-related literature. Deep Learning algorithms for automatic adaptation are a possible solution; however, gold standard datasets are needed for proper evaluation. Proposed datasets thus far consist of either pairs of comparable professional- and general public-facing documents or pairs of semantically similar sentences mined from such documents. This leads to a trade-off between imperfect alignments and small test sets. To address this issue, we created the Plain Language Adaptation of Biomedical Abstracts dataset. This dataset is the first manually adapted dataset that is both document- and sentence-aligned. The dataset contains 750 adapted abstracts, totaling 7643 sentence pairs. Along with describing the dataset, we benchmark automatic adaptation on the dataset with state-of-the-art Deep Learning approaches, setting baselines for future research.
abstract_zh: 尽管与健康相关的文献已在网上向广大受众提供，呈指数级增长，但科学文章的语言对于公众来说可能难以理解。因此，将这种专家级语言改编成通俗易懂的语言版本对于公众可靠地理解大量与健康相关的文献是必要的。自动适应的深度学习算法是一种可能的解决方案；然而，正确的评估需要黄金标准数据集。到目前为止，提出的数据集由可比较的专业和一般公众文档对组成，或从此类文档中挖掘出语义相似的句子对。这导致了不完美的对齐和小测试集之间的权衡。为了解决这个问题，我们创建了生物医学文摘数据集的简单语言适应。该数据集是第一个手动调整的、文档和句子对齐的数据集。该数据集包含 750 个改编摘要，总共 7643 个句子对。在描述数据集的同时，我们还使用最先进的深度学习方法对数据集的自动适应进行基准测试，为未来的研究设定基线。

AI.tldr: 创建用于生物医学摘要通俗化改编的数据集，并建立基准测试
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在对齐不完美和测试集过小的问题，需高质量数据集评估自动改编方法
AI.method: 构建文档与句子对齐的改编数据集，使用深度学习方法进行基准测试
AI.result: 数据集包含750个改编摘要（7643个句子对），设定了自动改编的基线
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了现有空白，为自动生物医学文本通俗化研究提供了资源和基准

title: FIND: An Unsupervised Implicit 3D Model of Articulated Human Feet
title_zh: FIND：无监督的隐式 3D 铰接式人足模型
abstract: In this paper we present a high fidelity and articulated 3D human foot model. The model is parameterised by a disentangled latent code in terms of shape, texture and articulated pose. While high fidelity models are typically created with strong supervision such as 3D keypoint correspondences or pre-registration, we focus on the difficult case of little to no annotation. To this end, we make the following contributions: (i) we develop a Foot Implicit Neural Deformation field model, named FIND, capable of tailoring explicit meshes at any resolution i.e. for low or high powered devices; (ii) an approach for training our model in various modes of weak supervision with progressively better disentanglement as more labels, such as pose categories, are provided; (iii) a novel unsupervised part-based loss for fitting our model to 2D images which is better than traditional photometric or silhouette losses; (iv) finally, we release a new dataset of high resolution 3D human foot scans, Foot3D. On this dataset, we show our model outperforms a strong PCA implementation trained on the same data in terms of shape quality and part correspondences, and that our novel unsupervised part-based loss improves inference on images.

While high fidelity models are typically created with strong supervision such as 3D keypoint correspondences or pre-registration, we focus on the difficult case of little to no annotation. To this end, we make the following contributions: (i) we develop a Foot Implicit Neural Deformation field model, named FIND, capable of tailoring explicit meshes at any resolution i.e. for low or high powered devices; (ii) an approach for training our model in various modes of weak supervision with progressively better disentanglement as more labels, such as pose categories, are provided; (iii) a novel unsupervised part-based loss for fitting our model to 2D images which is better than traditional photometric or silhouette losses; (iv) finally, we release a new dataset of high resolution 3D human foot scans, Foot3D. On this dataset, we show our model outperforms a strong PCA implementation trained on the same data in terms of shape quality and part correspondences, and that our novel unsupervised part-based loss improves inference on images.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个高保真度和铰接式 3D 人体足部模型。该模型通过形状、纹理和关节姿势方面的解开潜在代码进行参数化。虽然高保真模型通常是在强有力的监督下创建的，例如 3D 关键点对应或预注册，但我们关注的是很少或没有注释的困难情况。为此，我们做出以下贡献：（i）我们开发了一种足部隐式神经变形场模型，名为 FIND，能够以任何分辨率（即低功率或高功率设备）定制显式网格； （ii）一种在各种弱监督模式下训练我们的模型的方法，随着提供更多标签（例如姿势类别），逐渐更好地解开； (iii) 一种新颖的无监督的基于部分的损失，用于将我们的模型拟合到 2D 图像，这比传统的光度或轮廓损失更好； (iv) 最后，我们发布了一个新的高分辨率 3D 人体足部扫描数据集 Foot3D。在此数据集上，我们展示了我们的模型在形状质量和零件对应方面优于在相同数据上训练的强大 PCA 实现，并且我们新颖的无监督的基于零件的损失改进了图像推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注的高保真可变形3D人体足部模型FIND，通过隐式神经场实现形状、纹理和姿态的解耦表示。
AI.motivation: 现有高保真3D模型依赖强监督标注（如关键点对应），但足部建模面临标注稀缺且姿态复杂的问题，需探索弱监督/无监督方法。
AI.method: 开发隐式神经变形场FIND，结合解耦潜在码表示；设计渐进式弱监督训练框架；提出基于部分的无监督损失函数；构建高分辨率足部扫描数据集Foot3D。
AI.result: 在Foot3D数据集上，FIND在形状质量与部件对应关系上优于PCA方法，其无监督部分损失显著提升图像推理效果。
AI.conclusion: FIND实现了无需标注的足部3D建模，通过隐式场与部分损失有效解耦姿态信息，为弱监督人体建模提供新思路并贡献了足部数据集。

authors_text: Le Peng,Yash Travadi,Rui Zhang,Ying Cui,Ju Sun
title: Imbalanced Classification in Medical Imaging via Regrouping
title_zh: 通过重组实现医学影像分类不平衡
abstract: We propose performing imbalanced classification by regrouping majority classes into small classes so that we turn the problem into balanced multiclass classification. This new idea is dramatically different from popular loss reweighting and class resampling methods. Our preliminary result on imbalanced medical image classification shows that this natural idea can substantially boost the classification performance as measured by average precision (approximately area-under-the-precision-recall-curve, or AUPRC), which is more appropriate for evaluating imbalanced classification than other metrics such as balanced accuracy.
summary: We propose performing imbalanced classification by regrouping majority classes into small classes so that we turn the problem into balanced multiclass classification. This new idea is dramatically different from popular loss reweighting and class resampling methods. Our preliminary result on imbalanced medical image classification shows that this natural idea can substantially boost the classification performance as measured by average precision (approximately area-under-the-precision-recall-curve, or AUPRC), which is more appropriate for evaluating imbalanced classification than other metrics such as balanced accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过将多数类重新分组为小类来执行不平衡分类，以便将问题转化为平衡多类分类。这个新想法与流行的损失重新加权和类别重采样方法截然不同。我们对不平衡医学图像分类的初步结果表明，这种自然的想法可以显着提高以平均精度（近似精度召回曲线下面积，或 AUPRC）衡量的分类性能，这比平衡精度等其他指标更适合评估不平衡分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过重组多数类为小类解决医学影像不平衡分类问题，将其转化为平衡多分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统损失重加权和类重采样方法在医学影像不平衡分类中效果有限，需探索新思路提升模型性能。
AI.method: 将多数类拆分为更小的子类，使各类别样本量趋于平衡，转化为平衡多分类问题进行训练。
AI.result: 在医学影像分类实验中，该方法显著提升平均精度（AUPRC）指标，优于传统评估指标如平衡准确率。
AI.conclusion: 重组多数类策略有效解决医学影像不平衡分类问题，AUPRC指标验证了其在该领域的优越性。

title: "If sighted people know, I should be able to know:" Privacy Perceptions of Bystanders with Visual Impairments around Camera-based Technology
title_zh: “如果有视力的人知道，我应该能够知道：”有视觉障碍的旁观者对基于摄像头技术的隐私看法
abstract: Camera-based technology can be privacy-invasive, especially for bystanders who can be captured by the cameras but do not have direct control or access to the devices. The privacy threats become even more significant to bystanders with visual impairments (BVI) since they cannot visually discover the use of cameras nearby and effectively avoid being captured. While some prior research has studied visually impaired people's privacy concerns as direct users of camera-based assistive technologies, no research has explored their unique privacy perceptions and needs as bystanders. We conducted an in-depth interview study with 16 visually impaired participants to understand BVI's privacy concerns, expectations, and needs in different camera usage scenarios. A preliminary survey with 90 visually impaired respondents and 96 sighted controls was conducted to compare BVI and sighted bystanders' general attitudes towards cameras and elicit camera usage scenarios for the interview study. Our research revealed BVI's unique privacy challenges and perceptions around cameras, highlighting their needs for privacy awareness and protection. We summarized design considerations for future privacy-enhancing technologies to fulfill BVI's privacy needs.
summary: Camera-based technology can be privacy-invasive, especially for bystanders who can be captured by the cameras but do not have direct control or access to the devices. The privacy threats become even more significant to bystanders with visual impairments (BVI) since they cannot visually discover the use of cameras nearby and effectively avoid being captured. While some prior research has studied visually impaired people's privacy concerns as direct users of camera-based assistive technologies, no research has explored their unique privacy perceptions and needs as bystanders. We conducted an in-depth interview study with 16 visually impaired participants to understand BVI's privacy concerns, expectations, and needs in different camera usage scenarios. A preliminary survey with 90 visually impaired respondents and 96 sighted controls was conducted to compare BVI and sighted bystanders' general attitudes towards cameras and elicit camera usage scenarios for the interview study. Our research revealed BVI's unique privacy challenges and perceptions around cameras, highlighting their needs for privacy awareness and protection. We summarized design considerations for future privacy-enhancing technologies to fulfill BVI's privacy needs.
abstract_zh: 基于摄像头的技术可能会侵犯隐私，特别是对于可以被摄像头捕获但无法直接控制或访问设备的旁观者而言。对于有视觉障碍的旁观者（BVI）来说，隐私威胁变得更加严重，因为他们无法通过视觉发现附近摄像头的使用情况并有效避免被捕获。虽然之前的一些研究研究了视障人士作为基于摄像头的辅助技术的直接用户的隐私问题，但没有研究探讨他们作为旁观者的独特隐私感知和需求。我们对 16 名视障参与者进行了深入的访谈研究，以了解 BVI 在不同相机使用场景下的隐私问题、期望和需求。我们对 90 名视障受访者和 96 名视力正常的对照者进行了初步调查，以比较英属维尔京群岛和视力正常的旁观者对摄像机的总体态度，并引出访谈研究中的摄像机使用场景。我们的研究揭示了英属维尔京群岛独特的隐私挑战和对摄像头的看法，强调了他们对隐私意识和保护的需求。我们总结了未来隐私增强技术的设计注意事项，以满足英属维尔京群岛的隐私需求。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨视觉障碍者（BVI）作为摄像头技术旁观者的隐私感知与需求，分析其在不同摄像头使用场景下的隐私挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注视觉障碍者作为摄像头辅助技术的直接用户，但未研究其作为旁观者时的隐私感知与需求，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 通过16名视觉障碍者的深度访谈及90名视觉障碍者与96名视力正常者的初步调查，比较两者对摄像头的态度并收集访谈场景。
AI.result: 揭示了BVI因无法视觉感知摄像头而面临的独特隐私威胁，提出需增强隐私意识与保护措施，并总结未来隐私增强技术的设计方向。
AI.conclusion: 需开发针对性隐私保护技术，满足BVI在摄像头环境中的控制权与知情权，减少隐私风险。

motivation: 现有研究主要关注视觉障碍者作为摄像头辅助技术的直接用户，但未研究其作为旁观者时的隐私感知与需求，需填补这一研究空白。
method: 通过16名视觉障碍者的深度访谈及90名视觉障碍者与96名视力正常者的初步调查，比较两者对摄像头的态度并收集访谈场景。
result: 揭示了BVI因无法视觉感知摄像头而面临的独特隐私威胁，提出需增强隐私意识与保护措施，并总结未来隐私增强技术的设计方向。
conclusion: 需开发针对性隐私保护技术，满足BVI在摄像头环境中的控制权与知情权，减少隐私风险。
search_text: "If sighted people know, I should be able to know:" Privacy Perceptions of Bystanders with Visual Impairments around Camera-based Technology “如果有视力的人知道，我应该能够知道：”有视觉障碍的旁观者对基于摄像头技术的隐私看法 Camera-based technology can be privacy-invasive, especially for bystanders who can be captured by the cameras but do not have direct control or access to the devices. The privacy threats become even more significant to bystanders with visual impairments (BVI) since they cannot visually discover the use of cameras nearby and effectively avoid being captured. While some prior research has studied visually impaired people's privacy concerns as direct users of camera-based assistive technologies, no research has explored their unique privacy perceptions and needs as bystanders. We conducted an in-depth interview study with 16 visually impaired participants to understand BVI's privacy concerns, expectations, and needs in different camera usage scenarios. A preliminary survey with 90 visually impaired respondents and 96 sighted controls was conducted to compare BVI and sighted bystanders' general attitudes towards cameras and elicit camera usage scenarios for the interview study. Our research revealed BVI's unique privacy challenges and perceptions around cameras, highlighting their needs for privacy awareness and protection. We summarized design considerations for future privacy-enhancing technologies to fulfill BVI's privacy needs. 基于摄像头的技术可能会侵犯隐私，特别是对于可以被摄像头捕获但无法直接控制或访问设备的旁观者而言。对于有视觉障碍的旁观者（BVI）来说，隐私威胁变得更加严重，因为他们无法通过视觉发现附近摄像头的使用情况并有效避免被捕获。虽然之前的一些研究研究了视障人士作为基于摄像头的辅助技术的直接用户的隐私问题，但没有研究探讨他们作为旁观者的独特隐私感知和需求。我们对 16 名视障参与者进行了深入的访谈研究，以了解 BVI 在不同相机使用场景下的隐私问题、期望和需求。我们对 90 名视障受访者和 96 名视力正常的对照者进行了初步调查，以比较英属维尔京群岛和视力正常的旁观者对摄像机的总体态度，并引出访谈研究中的摄像机使用场景。我们的研究揭示了英属维尔京群岛独特的隐私挑战和对摄像头的看法，强调了他们对隐私意识和保护的需求。我们总结了未来隐私增强技术的设计注意事项，以满足英属维尔京群岛的隐私需求。 本文探讨视觉障碍者（BVI）作为摄像头技术旁观者的隐私感知与需求，分析其在不同摄像头使用场景下的隐私挑战。 Yuhang Zhao,Yaxing Yao,Jiaru Fu,Nihan Zhou cs.HC

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Stabilization of Large-scale Probabilistic Boolean Networks
title_zh: 用于稳定大规模概率布尔网络的深度强化学习
abstract: The ability to direct a Probabilistic Boolean Network (PBN) to a desired state is important to applications such as targeted therapeutics in cancer biology. Reinforcement Learning (RL) has been proposed as a framework that solves a discrete-time optimal control problem cast as a Markov Decision Process. We focus on an integrative framework powered by a model-free deep RL method that can address different flavours of the control problem (e.g., with or without control inputs; attractor state or a subset of the state space as the target domain). The method is agnostic to the distribution of probabilities for the next state, hence it does not use the probability transition matrix. The time complexity is linear on the time steps, or interactions between the agent (deep RL) and the environment (PBN), during training. Indeed, we explore the scalability of the deep RL approach to (set) stabilization of large-scale PBNs and demonstrate successful control on large networks, including a metastatic melanoma PBN with 200 nodes.
summary: The ability to direct a Probabilistic Boolean Network (PBN) to a desired state is important to applications such as targeted therapeutics in cancer biology. Reinforcement Learning (RL) has been proposed as a framework that solves a discrete-time optimal control problem cast as a Markov Decision Process. We focus on an integrative framework powered by a model-free deep RL method that can address different flavours of the control problem (e.g., with or without control inputs; attractor state or a subset of the state space as the target domain). The method is agnostic to the distribution of probabilities for the next state, hence it does not use the probability transition matrix. The time complexity is linear on the time steps, or interactions between the agent (deep RL) and the environment (PBN), during training. Indeed, we explore the scalability of the deep RL approach to (set) stabilization of large-scale PBNs and demonstrate successful control on large networks, including a metastatic melanoma PBN with 200 nodes.
abstract_zh: 将概率布尔网络 (PBN) 引导至所需状态的能力对于癌症生物学中的靶向治疗等应用非常重要。强化学习 (RL) 已被提出作为解决离散时间最优控制问题（马尔可夫决策过程）的框架。我们专注于由无模型深度强化学习方法提供支持的集成框架，该方法可以解决不同类型的控制问题（例如，有或没有控制输入；吸引子状态或状态空间的子集作为目标域）。该方法与下一状态的概率分布无关，因此它不使用概率转移矩阵。在训练过程中，时间复杂度与时间步长或代理（深度强化学习）和环境（PBN）之间的交互呈线性关系。事实上，我们探索了深度 RL 方法对大规模 PBN（设置）稳定性的可扩展性，并展示了对大型网络的成功控制，包括具有 200 个节点的转移性黑色素瘤 PBN。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法，用于稳定大规模概率布尔网络（PBN），以应用于癌症靶向治疗等场景。
AI.motivation: 概率布尔网络（PBN）在生物医学领域（如癌症治疗）中具有重要意义，但传统控制方法难以处理大规模网络的复杂性和不确定性。
AI.method: 采用无模型深度强化学习框架，无需依赖状态转移概率矩阵，通过线性时间复杂度实现对大规模PBN的控制，支持多种控制目标（如吸引子状态或子状态空间）。
AI.result: 成功在包含200个节点的转移性黑色素瘤PBN等大规模网络中验证了方法的可扩展性和控制效果。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为大规模PBN的稳定控制提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案，具有在复杂生物网络中应用的潜力。

authors_text: Bowen Zhao,Jiuding Sun,Bin Xu,Xingyu Lu,Yuchen Li,Jifan Yu,Minghui Liu,Tingjian Zhang,Qiuyang Chen,Hanming Li,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li
title: EDUKG: a Heterogeneous Sustainable K-12 Educational Knowledge Graph
title_zh: EDUKG：异构可持续 K-12 教育知识图
abstract: Web and artificial intelligence technologies, especially semantic web and knowledge graph (KG), have recently raised significant attention in educational scenarios. Nevertheless, subject-specific KGs for K-12 education still lack sufficiency and sustainability from knowledge and data perspectives. To tackle these issues, we propose EDUKG, a heterogeneous sustainable K-12 Educational Knowledge Graph. We first design an interdisciplinary and fine-grained ontology for uniformly modeling knowledge and resource in K-12 education, where we define 635 classes, 445 object properties, and 1314 datatype properties in total. Guided by this ontology, we propose a flexible methodology for interactively extracting factual knowledge from textbooks. Furthermore, we establish a general mechanism based on our proposed generalized entity linking system for EDUKG's sustainable maintenance, which can dynamically index numerous heterogeneous resources and data with knowledge topics in EDUKG. We further evaluate EDUKG to illustrate its sufficiency, richness, and variability. We publish EDUKG with more than 252 million entities and 3.86 billion triplets. Our code and data repository is now available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/EDUKG.
summary: Web and artificial intelligence technologies, especially semantic web and knowledge graph (KG), have recently raised significant attention in educational scenarios. Nevertheless, subject-specific KGs for K-12 education still lack sufficiency and sustainability from knowledge and data perspectives. To tackle these issues, we propose EDUKG, a heterogeneous sustainable K-12 Educational Knowledge Graph. We first design an interdisciplinary and fine-grained ontology for uniformly modeling knowledge and resource in K-12 education, where we define 635 classes, 445 object properties, and 1314 datatype properties in total. Guided by this ontology, we propose a flexible methodology for interactively extracting factual knowledge from textbooks. Furthermore, we establish a general mechanism based on our proposed generalized entity linking system for EDUKG's sustainable maintenance, which can dynamically index numerous heterogeneous resources and data with knowledge topics in EDUKG. We further evaluate EDUKG to illustrate its sufficiency, richness, and variability. We publish EDUKG with more than 252 million entities and 3.86 billion triplets. Our code and data repository is now available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/EDUKG.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网络和人工智能技术，特别是语义网络和知识图谱（KG）在教育场景中引起了广泛关注。然而，从知识和数据的角度来看，K-12教育的特定学科幼儿园仍然缺乏充分性和可持续性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 EDUKG，一种异构的可持续 K-12 教育知识图。我们首先设计了一个跨学科、细粒度的本体，用于对 K-12 教育中的知识和资源进行统一建模，其中总共定义了 635 个类、445 个对象属性和 1314 个数据类型属性。在这个本体论的指导下，我们提出了一种灵活的方法，用于从教科书中交互式地提取事实知识。此外，我们基于我们提出的广义实体链接系统建立了一种用于 EDUKG 可持续维护的通用机制，该机制可以动态索引 EDUKG 中具有知识主题的大量异构资源和数据。我们进一步评估 EDUKG 以说明其充分性、丰富性和可变性。我们发布的 EDUKG 拥有超过 2.52 亿个实体和 38.6 亿个三元组。我们的代码和数据存储库现已在 https://github.com/THU-KEG/EDUKG 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EDUKG，一个用于K-12教育的异构可持续知识图谱，旨在解决现有教育知识图谱在知识和数据层面的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前K-12教育领域的学科知识图谱存在知识覆盖不足和数据可持续性差的问题，需构建更全面且可持续的教育知识图谱以支持智能教育应用。
AI.method: 设计跨学科细粒度本体模型，定义635个类、445个对象属性和1314个数据类型属性；提出交互式教科书事实知识抽取方法，并构建基于通用实体链接系统的可持续维护机制以动态整合异构资源。
AI.result: EDUKG包含2.52亿实体和38.6亿三元组，通过评估验证其充分性、丰富性和可变性，并开源代码与数据仓库（https://github.com/THU-KEG/EDUKG）。
AI.conclusion: EDUKG通过异构数据整合与可持续维护机制，为K-12教育提供了高质量的知识图谱基础，可推动教育智能化发展。

Furthermore, we establish a general mechanism based on our proposed generalized entity linking system for EDUKG's sustainable maintenance, which can dynamically index numerous heterogeneous resources and data with knowledge topics in EDUKG. We further evaluate EDUKG to illustrate its sufficiency, richness, and variability. We publish EDUKG with more than 252 million entities and 3.86 billion triplets. Our code and data repository is now available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/EDUKG. 近年来，网络和人工智能技术，特别是语义网络和知识图谱（KG）在教育场景中引起了广泛关注。然而，从知识和数据的角度来看，K-12教育的特定学科幼儿园仍然缺乏充分性和可持续性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 EDUKG，一种异构的可持续 K-12 教育知识图。我们首先设计了一个跨学科、细粒度的本体，用于对 K-12 教育中的知识和资源进行统一建模，其中总共定义了 635 个类、445 个对象属性和 1314 个数据类型属性。在这个本体论的指导下，我们提出了一种灵活的方法，用于从教科书中交互式地提取事实知识。此外，我们基于我们提出的广义实体链接系统建立了一种用于 EDUKG 可持续维护的通用机制，该机制可以动态索引 EDUKG 中具有知识主题的大量异构资源和数据。我们进一步评估 EDUKG 以说明其充分性、丰富性和可变性。我们发布的 EDUKG 拥有超过 2.52 亿个实体和 38.6 亿个三元组。我们的代码和数据存储库现已在 https://github.com/THU-KEG/EDUKG 上提供。 本文提出EDUKG，一个用于K-12教育的异构可持续知识图谱，旨在解决现有教育知识图谱在知识和数据层面的不足。 Bowen Zhao,Jiuding Sun,Bin Xu,Xingyu Lu,Yuchen Li,Jifan Yu,Minghui Liu,Tingjian Zhang,Qiuyang Chen,Hanming Li,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Low-Resource Multilingual and Zero-Shot Multispeaker TTS
title_zh: 低资源多语言和零样本多扬声器 TTS
abstract: While neural methods for text-to-speech (TTS) have shown great advances in modeling multiple speakers, even in zero-shot settings, the amount of data needed for those approaches is generally not feasible for the vast majority of the world's over 6,000 spoken languages. In this work, we bring together the tasks of zero-shot voice cloning and multilingual low-resource TTS. Using the language agnostic meta learning (LAML) procedure and modifications to a TTS encoder, we show that it is possible for a system to learn speaking a new language using just 5 minutes of training data while retaining the ability to infer the voice of even unseen speakers in the newly learned language. We show the success of our proposed approach in terms of intelligibility, naturalness and similarity to target speaker using objective metrics as well as human studies and provide our code and trained models open source.
summary: While neural methods for text-to-speech (TTS) have shown great advances in modeling multiple speakers, even in zero-shot settings, the amount of data needed for those approaches is generally not feasible for the vast majority of the world's over 6,000 spoken languages. In this work, we bring together the tasks of zero-shot voice cloning and multilingual low-resource TTS. Using the language agnostic meta learning (LAML) procedure and modifications to a TTS encoder, we show that it is possible for a system to learn speaking a new language using just 5 minutes of training data while retaining the ability to infer the voice of even unseen speakers in the newly learned language. We show the success of our proposed approach in terms of intelligibility, naturalness and similarity to target speaker using objective metrics as well as human studies and provide our code and trained models open source.
abstract_zh: 尽管文本转语音 (TTS) 的神经方法在对多个说话人进行建模方面取得了巨大进步，即使在零样本设置中也是如此，但这些方法所需的数据量对于世界上 6,000 多种口语中的绝大多数来说通常是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们将零样本语音克隆和多语言低资源 TTS 任务结合在一起。使用与语言无关的元学习 (LAML) 过程和对 TTS 编码器的修改，我们证明系统可以仅使用 5 分钟的训练数据来学习说新语言，同时保留以新学习的语言推断甚至看不见的说话者的声音的能力。我们使用客观指标以及人类研究来展示我们提出的方法在清晰度、自然度和与目标说话者的相似性方面的成功，并开源我们的代码和训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低资源多语言和零样本多说话人文本到语音合成方法，利用5分钟训练数据实现新语言学习与未见说话人语音克隆。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络TTS方法对数据量要求高，难以覆盖全球6000多种语言，且零样本语音克隆与多语言合成任务尚未有效结合。
AI.method: 结合语言无关元学习（LAML）框架与改进的TTS编码器，通过元学习获得语言通用表征，使系统能用极少数据学习新语言并克隆新说话人。
AI.result: 客观指标与人类评估显示系统在可懂度、自然度和说话人相似度上表现优异，且开源了代码与预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了低资源与零样本场景下的多语言多说话人TTS难题，为语言技术普惠化提供新思路。

authors_text: Caitlin F. Harrigan,Gabriela Morgenshtern,Anna Goldenberg,Fanny Chevalier
title: Considerations for Visualizing Uncertainty in Clinical Machine Learning Models
title_zh: 可视化临床机器学习模型中的不确定性的注意事项
comment: Prepared for the CHI 2021 Workshop: Realizing AI in Healthcare: Challenges Appearing in the Wild https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3411763.3441347
comments: Prepared for the CHI 2021 Workshop: Realizing AI in Healthcare: Challenges Appearing in the Wild https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3411763.3441347
abstract: Clinician-facing predictive models are increasingly present in the healthcare setting. Regardless of their success with respect to performance metrics, all models have uncertainty. We investigate how to visually communicate uncertainty in this setting in an actionable, trustworthy way. To this end, we conduct a qualitative study with cardiac critical care clinicians. Our results reveal that clinician trust may be impacted most not by the degree of uncertainty, but rather by how transparent the visualization of what the sources of uncertainty are. Our results show a clear connection between feature interpretability and clinical actionability.
summary: Clinician-facing predictive models are increasingly present in the healthcare setting. Regardless of their success with respect to performance metrics, all models have uncertainty. We investigate how to visually communicate uncertainty in this setting in an actionable, trustworthy way. To this end, we conduct a qualitative study with cardiac critical care clinicians. Our results reveal that clinician trust may be impacted most not by the degree of uncertainty, but rather by how transparent the visualization of what the sources of uncertainty are. Our results show a clear connection between feature interpretability and clinical actionability.
abstract_zh: 面向临床医生的预测模型越来越多地出现在医疗保健环境中。无论它们在性能指标方面取得怎样的成功，所有模型都具有不确定性。我们研究如何以可操作、值得信赖的方式在这种情况下直观地传达不确定性。为此，我们与心脏重症监护临床医生进行了一项定性研究。我们的结果表明，对临床医生信任的影响最大的可能不是不确定性的程度，而是不确定性来源的可视化程度。我们的结果表明特征可解释性和临床可操作性之间存在明显的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何以可操作且可信的方式可视化临床机器学习模型中的不确定性，以增强临床医生的信任和行动力。
AI.motivation: 尽管临床预测模型性能良好，但其不确定性可能影响临床决策，需通过可视化手段提升透明度和信任度。
AI.method: 通过定性研究，对心脏重症监护临床医生进行访谈，分析其对不确定性的可视化需求与认知。
AI.result: 临床医生的信任度更依赖于不确定性来源的透明度，而非不确定性程度；特征可解释性与临床行动性存在显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 可视化不确定性时，应优先透明展示其来源并提升特征可解释性，而非单纯强调不确定性程度。

title: Entailer: Answering Questions with Faithful and Truthful Chains of Reasoning
title_zh: Entailer：用忠实而真实的推理链回答问题
comment: accepted at EMNLP 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.13074
comments: accepted at EMNLP 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.13074
abstract: Our goal is a question-answering (QA) system that can show how its answers are implied by its own internal beliefs via a systematic chain of reasoning. Such a capability would allow better understanding of why a model produced the answer it did. Our approach is to recursively combine a trained backward-chaining model, capable of generating a set of premises entailing an answer hypothesis, with a verifier that checks that the model itself believes those premises (and the entailment itself) through self-querying. To our knowledge, this is the first system to generate multistep chains that are both faithful (the answer follows from the reasoning) and truthful (the chain reflects the system's own internal beliefs). In evaluation using two different datasets, users judge that a majority (70%+) of generated chains clearly show how an answer follows from a set of facts - substantially better than a high-performance baseline - while preserving answer accuracy. By materializing model beliefs that systematically support an answer, new opportunities arise for understanding the model's system of belief, and diagnosing and correcting its misunderstandings when an answer is wrong.
summary: Our goal is a question-answering (QA) system that can show how its answers are implied by its own internal beliefs via a systematic chain of reasoning. Such a capability would allow better understanding of why a model produced the answer it did. Our approach is to recursively combine a trained backward-chaining model, capable of generating a set of premises entailing an answer hypothesis, with a verifier that checks that the model itself believes those premises (and the entailment itself) through self-querying. To our knowledge, this is the first system to generate multistep chains that are both faithful (the answer follows from the reasoning) and truthful (the chain reflects the system's own internal beliefs). In evaluation using two different datasets, users judge that a majority (70%+) of generated chains clearly show how an answer follows from a set of facts - substantially better than a high-performance baseline - while preserving answer accuracy. By materializing model beliefs that systematically support an answer, new opportunities arise for understanding the model's system of belief, and diagnosing and correcting its misunderstandings when an answer is wrong.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是建立一个问答（QA）系统，该系统可以通过系统的推理链显示其内部信念如何暗示其答案。这种能力可以让我们更好地理解模型为何会产生这样的答案。我们的方法是递归地将经过训练的后向链接模型与验证器相结合，该模型能够生成一组包含答案假设的前提，该验证器通过自查询检查模型本身是否相信这些前提（以及包含本身）。据我们所知，这是第一个生成多步链的系统，这些链既忠实（答案来自推理）又真实（链反映了系统自身的内部信念）。在使用两个不同数据集的评估中，用户判断大多数（70％以上）生成的链清楚地显示了答案如何从一组事实中得出 - 明显优于高性能基线 - 同时保持答案准确性。通过具体化系统地支持答案的模型信念，就会出现新的机会来理解模型的信念系统，并在答案错误时诊断和纠正其误解。

AI.tldr: 开发能够通过忠实且真实的推理链解释答案来源的问答系统。
AI.motivation: 使模型能够清晰展示答案如何由内部信念推导得出，提升透明度和可解释性，同时确保答案准确性。
AI.method: 结合向后链生成模型与自查询验证器，递归生成并验证前提假设，确保推理链既符合逻辑又反映模型自身信念。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上，70%以上的生成推理链被用户认为清晰展示答案逻辑，且保持高答案准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分析模型信念系统、诊断错误提供了新途径，有助于提升AI系统的可靠性与可解释性。

ai_content.tldr: 开发能够通过忠实且真实的推理链解释答案来源的问答系统。
ai_content.motivation: 使模型能够清晰展示答案如何由内部信念推导得出，提升透明度和可解释性，同时确保答案准确性。

ai_content.result: 在两个数据集上，70%以上的生成推理链被用户认为清晰展示答案逻辑，且保持高答案准确率。

search_text: Entailer: Answering Questions with Faithful and Truthful Chains of Reasoning Entailer：用忠实而真实的推理链回答问题 Our goal is a question-answering (QA) system that can show how its answers are implied by its own internal beliefs via a systematic chain of reasoning. Such a capability would allow better understanding of why a model produced the answer it did. Our approach is to recursively combine a trained backward-chaining model, capable of generating a set of premises entailing an answer hypothesis, with a verifier that checks that the model itself believes those premises (and the entailment itself) through self-querying. To our knowledge, this is the first system to generate multistep chains that are both faithful (the answer follows from the reasoning) and truthful (the chain reflects the system's own internal beliefs). In evaluation using two different datasets, users judge that a majority (70%+) of generated chains clearly show how an answer follows from a set of facts - substantially better than a high-performance baseline - while preserving answer accuracy. By materializing model beliefs that systematically support an answer, new opportunities arise for understanding the model's system of belief, and diagnosing and correcting its misunderstandings when an answer is wrong. 我们的目标是建立一个问答（QA）系统，该系统可以通过系统的推理链显示其内部信念如何暗示其答案。这种能力可以让我们更好地理解模型为何会产生这样的答案。我们的方法是递归地将经过训练的后向链接模型与验证器相结合，该模型能够生成一组包含答案假设的前提，该验证器通过自查询检查模型本身是否相信这些前提（以及包含本身）。据我们所知，这是第一个生成多步链的系统，这些链既忠实（答案来自推理）又真实（链反映了系统自身的内部信念）。在使用两个不同数据集的评估中，用户判断大多数（70％以上）生成的链清楚地显示了答案如何从一组事实中得出 - 明显优于高性能基线 - 同时保持答案准确性。通过具体化系统地支持答案的模型信念，就会出现新的机会来理解模型的信念系统，并在答案错误时诊断和纠正其误解。 开发能够通过忠实且真实的推理链解释答案来源的问答系统。 Oyvind Tafjord,Bhavana Dalvi Mishra,Peter Clark cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Feature Engineering and Classification Models for Partial Discharge in Power Transformers
title_zh: 电力变压器局部放电的特征工程和分类模型
abstract: To ensure reliability, power transformers are monitored for partial discharge (PD) events, which are symptoms of transformer failure. Since failures can have catastrophic cascading consequences, it is critical to preempt them as early as possible. Our goal is to classify PDs as corona, floating, particle, or void, to gain an understanding of the failure location. Using phase resolved PD signal data, we create a small set of features, which can be used to classify PDs with high accuracy. This set of features consists of the total magnitude, the maximum magnitude, and the length of the longest empty band. These features represent the entire signal and not just a single phase, so the feature set has a fixed size and is easily comprehensible. With both Random Forest and SVM classification methods, we attain a 99% classification accuracy, which is significantly higher than classification using phase based feature sets such as phase magnitude. Furthermore, we develop a stacking ensemble to combine several classification models, resulting in a superior model that outperforms existing methods in both accuracy and variance.
summary: To ensure reliability, power transformers are monitored for partial discharge (PD) events, which are symptoms of transformer failure. Since failures can have catastrophic cascading consequences, it is critical to preempt them as early as possible. Our goal is to classify PDs as corona, floating, particle, or void, to gain an understanding of the failure location. Using phase resolved PD signal data, we create a small set of features, which can be used to classify PDs with high accuracy. This set of features consists of the total magnitude, the maximum magnitude, and the length of the longest empty band. These features represent the entire signal and not just a single phase, so the feature set has a fixed size and is easily comprehensible. With both Random Forest and SVM classification methods, we attain a 99% classification accuracy, which is significantly higher than classification using phase based feature sets such as phase magnitude. Furthermore, we develop a stacking ensemble to combine several classification models, resulting in a superior model that outperforms existing methods in both accuracy and variance.
abstract_zh: 为了确保可靠性，需要监控电力变压器的局部放电 (PD) 事件，这是变压器故障的症状。由于故障可能会产生灾难性的连锁后果，因此尽早预防故障至关重要。我们的目标是将局部放电分类为电晕、浮动、颗粒或空洞，以了解故障位置。使用相位解析的局放信号数据，我们创建了一小组特征，可用于高精度地对局放进行分类。这组特征由总震级、最大震级和最长空带的长度组成。这些特征代表整个信号而不仅仅是单个相位，因此特征集具有固定的大小并且易于理解。通过随机森林和 SVM 分类方法，我们获得了 99% 的分类准确率，这明显高于使用基于相位的特征集（例如相位幅度）进行的分类。此外，我们开发了一个堆叠集成来组合多个分类模型，从而产生一个在准确性和方差方面都优于现有方法的高级模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究电力变压器局部放电的特征工程与分类模型，提出基于信号整体特征的分类方法并结合集成学习提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 电力变压器故障可能引发灾难性连锁反应，需通过局部放电分类提前预警。传统基于单相特征的方法存在分类精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 提取总幅度、最大幅度和最长空带长度等全局信号特征，采用随机森林和SVM进行分类，并构建堆叠集成模型融合多分类器。
AI.result: 实现99%的分类准确率，显著优于基于相位特征的传统方法，在准确率和方差控制上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的全局特征集与堆叠模型有效提升了局部放电分类性能，为变压器故障预警提供了可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Thien Nguyen,Nathalie Tran,Liuhui Deng,Thiago Fraga da Silva,Matthew Radzihovsky,Roger Hsiao,Henry Mason,Stefan Braun,Erik McDermott,Dogan Can,Pawel Swietojanski,Lyan Verwimp,Sibel Oyman,Tresi Arvizo,Honza Silovsky,Arnab Ghoshal,Mathieu Martel,Bharat Ram Ambati,Mohamed Ali
title: Optimizing Bilingual Neural Transducer with Synthetic Code-switching Text Generation
title_zh: 通过合成语码转换文本生成来优化双语神经传感器
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, submitted to ICASSP 2023, *: equal contributions
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, submitted to ICASSP 2023, *: equal contributions
abstract: Code-switching describes the practice of using more than one language in the same sentence. In this study, we investigate how to optimize a neural transducer based bilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) model for code-switching speech. Focusing on the scenario where the ASR model is trained without supervised code-switching data, we found that semi-supervised training and synthetic code-switched data can improve the bilingual ASR system on code-switching speech. We analyze how each of the neural transducer's encoders contributes towards code-switching performance by measuring encoder-specific recall values, and evaluate our English/Mandarin system on the ASCEND data set. Our final system achieves 25% mixed error rate (MER) on the ASCEND English/Mandarin code-switching test set -- reducing the MER by 2.1% absolute compared to the previous literature -- while maintaining good accuracy on the monolingual test sets.
summary: Code-switching describes the practice of using more than one language in the same sentence. In this study, we investigate how to optimize a neural transducer based bilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) model for code-switching speech. Focusing on the scenario where the ASR model is trained without supervised code-switching data, we found that semi-supervised training and synthetic code-switched data can improve the bilingual ASR system on code-switching speech. We analyze how each of the neural transducer's encoders contributes towards code-switching performance by measuring encoder-specific recall values, and evaluate our English/Mandarin system on the ASCEND data set. Our final system achieves 25% mixed error rate (MER) on the ASCEND English/Mandarin code-switching test set -- reducing the MER by 2.1% absolute compared to the previous literature -- while maintaining good accuracy on the monolingual test sets.
abstract_zh: 语码转换描述了在同一个句子中使用多种语言的做法。在本研究中，我们研究了如何优化基于神经换能器的双语自动语音识别（ASR）模型，以实现语码转换语音。着眼于在没有监督语码转换数据的情况下训练 ASR 模型的场景，我们发现半监督训练和合成语码转换数据可以改善语码转换语音的双语 ASR 系统。我们通过测量编码器特定的召回值来分析每个神经传感器的编码器如何对代码转换性能做出贡献，并在 ASCEND 数据集上评估我们的英语/普通话系统。我们的最终系统在 ASCEND 英语/普通话语码转换测试集上实现了 25% 的混合错误率 (MER)，与之前的文献相比，MER 绝对值降低了 2.1%，同时在单语测试集上保持了良好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过合成代码切换文本生成优化双语神经转录器，以提升代码切换语音的自动语音识别（ASR）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有双语ASR模型在无监督代码切换数据训练下难以有效处理代码切换语音，需探索半监督训练与合成数据的结合以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用半监督训练方法，结合合成代码切换数据增强模型，并通过分析编码器特异性召回率评估各编码器对代码切换性能的贡献。
AI.result: 在ASCEND数据集上，系统实现25%的混合错误率（MER），较之前文献降低2.1%绝对值，同时保持单语测试集的高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 合成代码切换数据与半监督训练有效提升双语ASR模型在代码切换场景下的表现，验证了编码器分析与数据增强方法的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何通过合成代码切换文本生成优化双语神经转录器，以提升代码切换语音的自动语音识别（ASR）性能。

title: SpaBERT: A Pretrained Language Model from Geographic Data for Geo-Entity Representation
title_zh: SpaBERT：基于地理数据的预训练语言模型，用于地理实体表示
abstract: Named geographic entities (geo-entities for short) are the building blocks of many geographic datasets. Characterizing geo-entities is integral to various application domains, such as geo-intelligence and map comprehension, while a key challenge is to capture the spatial-varying context of an entity. We hypothesize that we shall know the characteristics of a geo-entity by its surrounding entities, similar to knowing word meanings by their linguistic context. Accordingly, we propose a novel spatial language model, SpaBERT, which provides a general-purpose geo-entity representation based on neighboring entities in geospatial data. SpaBERT extends BERT to capture linearized spatial context, while incorporating a spatial coordinate embedding mechanism to preserve spatial relations of entities in the 2-dimensional space. SpaBERT is pretrained with masked language modeling and masked entity prediction tasks to learn spatial dependencies. We apply SpaBERT to two downstream tasks: geo-entity typing and geo-entity linking. Compared with the existing language models that do not use spatial context, SpaBERT shows significant performance improvement on both tasks. We also analyze the entity representation from SpaBERT in various settings and the effect of spatial coordinate embedding.

Characterizing geo-entities is integral to various application domains, such as geo-intelligence and map comprehension, while a key challenge is to capture the spatial-varying context of an entity. We hypothesize that we shall know the characteristics of a geo-entity by its surrounding entities, similar to knowing word meanings by their linguistic context. Accordingly, we propose a novel spatial language model, SpaBERT, which provides a general-purpose geo-entity representation based on neighboring entities in geospatial data. SpaBERT extends BERT to capture linearized spatial context, while incorporating a spatial coordinate embedding mechanism to preserve spatial relations of entities in the 2-dimensional space. SpaBERT is pretrained with masked language modeling and masked entity prediction tasks to learn spatial dependencies. We apply SpaBERT to two downstream tasks: geo-entity typing and geo-entity linking. Compared with the existing language models that do not use spatial context, SpaBERT shows significant performance improvement on both tasks. We also analyze the entity representation from SpaBERT in various settings and the effect of spatial coordinate embedding.
abstract_zh: 命名地理实体（简称地理实体）是许多地理数据集的构建块。表征地理实体是各种应用领域不可或缺的一部分，例如地理智能和地图理解，而关键挑战是捕获实体的空间变化上下文。我们假设我们将通过其周围的实体了解地理实体的特征，类似于通过其语言上下文了解单词含义。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的空间语言模型 SpaBERT，它提供了基于地理空间数据中相邻实体的通用地理实体表示。 SpaBERT 扩展了 BERT 以捕获线性化空间上下文，同时结合空间坐标嵌入机制来保留二维空间中实体的空间关系。 SpaBERT 通过屏蔽语言建模和屏蔽实体预测任务进行预训练，以学习空间依赖性。我们将 SpaBERT 应用于两个下游任务：地理实体类型和地理实体链接。与现有不使用空间上下文的语言模型相比，SpaBERT 在这两个任务上都显示出显着的性能提升。我们还分析了 SpaBERT 在各种设置下的实体表示以及空间坐标嵌入的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpaBERT，一种基于地理数据预训练的语言模型，用于捕捉地理实体的空间上下文特征。
AI.motivation: 地理实体的表征需考虑其空间变化的上下文，而现有模型未能有效利用空间关系信息。
AI.method: 扩展BERT架构，引入空间坐标嵌入机制，并通过掩码语言建模和掩码实体预测任务进行预训练。
AI.result: 在地理实体分类和链接任务中显著优于非空间模型，验证了空间坐标嵌入的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SpaBERT通过建模空间依赖关系，有效提升了地理实体表征质量及下游任务性能。

authors_text: Adam Fishman,Adithyavairan Murali,Clemens Eppner,Bryan Peele,Byron Boots,Dieter Fox
title: Motion Policy Networks
title_zh: 运动策略网络
comment: To be published in the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022. 10 pages with 4 figures. Appendix has 10 pages and 1 figure
comments: To be published in the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022. 10 pages with 4 figures. Appendix has 10 pages and 1 figure
abstract: Collision-free motion generation in unknown environments is a core building block for robot manipulation. Generating such motions is challenging due to multiple objectives; not only should the solutions be optimal, the motion generator itself must be fast enough for real-time performance and reliable enough for practical deployment. A wide variety of methods have been proposed ranging from local controllers to global planners, often being combined to offset their shortcomings. We present an end-to-end neural model called Motion Policy Networks (M$π$Nets) to generate collision-free, smooth motion from just a single depth camera observation. M$π$Nets are trained on over 3 million motion planning problems in over 500,000 environments. Our experiments show that M$π$Nets are significantly faster than global planners while exhibiting the reactivity needed to deal with dynamic scenes. They are 46% better than prior neural planners and more robust than local control policies. Despite being only trained in simulation, M$π$Nets transfer well to the real robot with noisy partial point clouds. Code and data are publicly available at https://mpinets.github.io.
summary: Collision-free motion generation in unknown environments is a core building block for robot manipulation. Generating such motions is challenging due to multiple objectives; not only should the solutions be optimal, the motion generator itself must be fast enough for real-time performance and reliable enough for practical deployment. A wide variety of methods have been proposed ranging from local controllers to global planners, often being combined to offset their shortcomings. We present an end-to-end neural model called Motion Policy Networks (M$π$Nets) to generate collision-free, smooth motion from just a single depth camera observation. M$π$Nets are trained on over 3 million motion planning problems in over 500,000 environments. Our experiments show that M$π$Nets are significantly faster than global planners while exhibiting the reactivity needed to deal with dynamic scenes. They are 46% better than prior neural planners and more robust than local control policies. Despite being only trained in simulation, M$π$Nets transfer well to the real robot with noisy partial point clouds. Code and data are publicly available at https://mpinets.github.io.
abstract_zh: 未知环境中的无碰撞运动生成是机器人操纵的核心构建模块。由于多个目标，生成此类动议具有挑战性；不仅解决方案应该是最优的，运动发生器本身也必须足够快以实现实时性能，并且足够可靠以实现实际部署。人们提出了从局部控制器到全局规划器的各种方法，通常将其组合起来以弥补其缺点。我们提出了一种称为运动策略网络 (M$π$Nets) 的端到端神经模型，只需通过单个深度相机观察即可生成无碰撞、平滑的运动。 M$π$Nets 经过超过 500,000 个环境中超过 300 万个运动规划问题的训练。我们的实验表明，M$π$Net 的速度明显快于全局规划器，同时表现出处理动态场景所需的反应能力。它们比之前的神经规划器好 46%，并且比本地控制策略更稳健。尽管仅在模拟中进行训练，但 M$π$Net 可以很好地迁移到具有噪声部分点云的真实机器人。代码和数据可在 https://mpinets.github.io 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端神经网络模型，生成未知环境中无碰撞的平滑机器人运动
AI.motivation: 现有方法在实时性、可靠性和动态场景适应性方面存在不足，需更高效且鲁棒的解决方案
AI.method: 基于单目深度相机观测的端到端神经网络模型，通过大规模模拟数据训练，生成碰撞避免的运动策略
AI.result: 相比全局规划器和局部控制器，MπNets在速度、动态场景适应性和鲁棒性方面表现更优，并成功迁移至真实机器人
AI.conclusion: MπNets在模拟和真实环境中均表现良好，为机器人操作提供高效可靠的运动生成方案

title: Probing with Noise: Unpicking the Warp and Weft of Embeddings
title_zh: 用噪声探测：揭开嵌入的经纱和纬纱
comment: 10 pages, 3 tables, Workshop on analyzing and interpreting neural networks for NLP
comments: 10 pages, 3 tables, Workshop on analyzing and interpreting neural networks for NLP
abstract: Improving our understanding of how information is encoded in vector space can yield valuable interpretability insights. Alongside vector dimensions, we argue that it is possible for the vector norm to also carry linguistic information. We develop a method to test this: an extension of the probing framework which allows for relative intrinsic interpretations of probing results. It relies on introducing noise that ablates information encoded in embeddings, grounded in random baselines and confidence intervals. We apply the method to well-established probing tasks and find evidence that confirms the existence of separate information containers in English GloVe and BERT embeddings. Our correlation analysis aligns with the experimental findings that different encoders use the norm to encode different kinds of information: GloVe stores syntactic and sentence length information in the vector norm, while BERT uses it to encode contextual incongruity.
summary: Improving our understanding of how information is encoded in vector space can yield valuable interpretability insights. Alongside vector dimensions, we argue that it is possible for the vector norm to also carry linguistic information. We develop a method to test this: an extension of the probing framework which allows for relative intrinsic interpretations of probing results. It relies on introducing noise that ablates information encoded in embeddings, grounded in random baselines and confidence intervals. We apply the method to well-established probing tasks and find evidence that confirms the existence of separate information containers in English GloVe and BERT embeddings. Our correlation analysis aligns with the experimental findings that different encoders use the norm to encode different kinds of information: GloVe stores syntactic and sentence length information in the vector norm, while BERT uses it to encode contextual incongruity.
abstract_zh: 提高我们对向量空间中信息如何编码的理解可以产生有价值的可解释性见解。除了向量维度之外，我们认为向量范数也可能携带语言信息。我们开发了一种方法来测试这一点：探测框架的扩展，允许对探测结果进行相对内在的解释。它依赖于引入噪声，消除嵌入中编码的信息，这些信息基于随机基线和置信区间。我们将该方法应用于成熟的探测任务，并找到证据证实英语 GloVe 和 BERT 嵌入中存在单独的信息容器。我们的相关性分析与实验结果一致，即不同的编码器使用范数来编码不同类型的信息：GloVe 在向量范数中存储句法和句子长度信息，而 BERT 使用它来编码上下文不一致。

AI.tldr: 验证向量范数是否携带语言信息，并开发相应方法进行分析。
AI.motivation: 提升对向量空间中信息编码机制的理解，探索范数在嵌入中的潜在语义作用。
AI.method: 扩展探测框架，通过引入噪声消融嵌入信息，结合随机基线与置信区间分析范数中的信息。
AI.result: 发现GloVe嵌入的范数存储句法及句长信息，BERT嵌入的范数编码上下文不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 不同编码器利用范数存储差异化语义信息，需在模型解释中考虑范数维度的作用。

We develop a method to test this: an extension of the probing framework which allows for relative intrinsic interpretations of probing results. It relies on introducing noise that ablates information encoded in embeddings, grounded in random baselines and confidence intervals. We apply the method to well-established probing tasks and find evidence that confirms the existence of separate information containers in English GloVe and BERT embeddings. Our correlation analysis aligns with the experimental findings that different encoders use the norm to encode different kinds of information: GloVe stores syntactic and sentence length information in the vector norm, while BERT uses it to encode contextual incongruity. 提高我们对向量空间中信息如何编码的理解可以产生有价值的可解释性见解。除了向量维度之外，我们认为向量范数也可能携带语言信息。我们开发了一种方法来测试这一点：探测框架的扩展，允许对探测结果进行相对内在的解释。它依赖于引入噪声，消除嵌入中编码的信息，这些信息基于随机基线和置信区间。我们将该方法应用于成熟的探测任务，并找到证据证实英语 GloVe 和 BERT 嵌入中存在单独的信息容器。我们的相关性分析与实验结果一致，即不同的编码器使用范数来编码不同类型的信息：GloVe 在向量范数中存储句法和句子长度信息，而 BERT 使用它来编码上下文不一致。 验证向量范数是否携带语言信息，并开发相应方法进行分析。 Filip Klubička,John D. Kelleher cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: High-Quality RGB-D Reconstruction via Multi-View Uncalibrated Photometric Stereo and Gradient-SDF
title_zh: 通过多视图未校准光度立体和梯度-SDF 进行高质量 RGB-D 重建
abstract: Fine-detailed reconstructions are in high demand in many applications. However, most of the existing RGB-D reconstruction methods rely on pre-calculated accurate camera poses to recover the detailed surface geometry, where the representation of a surface needs to be adapted when optimizing different quantities. In this paper, we present a novel multi-view RGB-D based reconstruction method that tackles camera pose, lighting, albedo, and surface normal estimation via the utilization of a gradient signed distance field (gradient-SDF). The proposed method formulates the image rendering process using specific physically-based model(s) and optimizes the surface's quantities on the actual surface using its volumetric representation, as opposed to other works which estimate surface quantities only near the actual surface. To validate our method, we investigate two physically-based image formation models for natural light and point light source applications. The experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can recover high-quality geometry of the surface more faithfully than the state-of-the-art and further improves the accuracy of estimated camera poses.
summary: Fine-detailed reconstructions are in high demand in many applications. However, most of the existing RGB-D reconstruction methods rely on pre-calculated accurate camera poses to recover the detailed surface geometry, where the representation of a surface needs to be adapted when optimizing different quantities. In this paper, we present a novel multi-view RGB-D based reconstruction method that tackles camera pose, lighting, albedo, and surface normal estimation via the utilization of a gradient signed distance field (gradient-SDF). The proposed method formulates the image rendering process using specific physically-based model(s) and optimizes the surface's quantities on the actual surface using its volumetric representation, as opposed to other works which estimate surface quantities only near the actual surface. To validate our method, we investigate two physically-based image formation models for natural light and point light source applications. The experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can recover high-quality geometry of the surface more faithfully than the state-of-the-art and further improves the accuracy of estimated camera poses.
abstract_zh: 在许多应用中，对精细重建的需求很高。然而，大多数现有的 RGB-D 重建方法依赖于预先计算的精确相机位姿来恢复详细的表面几何形状，其中在优化不同数量时需要调整表面的表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于多视图 RGB-D 的重建方法，该方法通过利用梯度符号距离场（梯度-SDF）来处理相机姿态、照明、反照率和表面法线估计。所提出的方法使用特定的基于物理的模型来制定图像渲染过程，并使用其体积表示来优化实际表面上的表面量，这与仅估计实际表面附近的表面量的其他方法相反。为了验证我们的方法，我们研究了两种用于自然光和点光源应用的基于物理的图像形成模型。合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以比最先进的方法更忠实地恢复高质量的表面几何形状，并进一步提高估计相机位姿的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角未校准光度立体视觉和梯度符号距离场（Gradient-SDF）的高质量RGB-D重建方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D重建方法依赖预计算的准确相机姿态，且表面属性估计局限于表面附近，难以兼顾几何细节与姿态优化。
AI.method: 通过梯度-SDF联合优化相机姿态、光照、反照率及表面法线，结合物理基础模型进行图像渲染，并在体积表示中优化表面属性。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，该方法在几何重建精度和相机姿态估计准确性上均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 梯度-SDF与物理模型的结合有效提升了RGB-D重建质量，适用于复杂光照条件下的多视角场景重建。
