title: Life is a Circus and We are the Clowns: Automatically Finding Analogies between Situations and Processes
title_zh: 生活是马戏团，我们是小丑：自动寻找情境和过程之间的类比
comment: Accepted to EMNLP 2022 main conference (long paper)
comments: Accepted to EMNLP 2022 main conference (long paper)
abstract: Analogy-making gives rise to reasoning, abstraction, flexible categorization and counterfactual inference -- abilities lacking in even the best AI systems today. Much research has suggested that analogies are key to non-brittle systems that can adapt to new domains. Despite their importance, analogies received little attention in the NLP community, with most research focusing on simple word analogies. Work that tackled more complex analogies relied heavily on manually constructed, hard-to-scale input representations. In this work, we explore a more realistic, challenging setup: our input is a pair of natural language procedural texts, describing a situation or a process (e.g., how the heart works/how a pump works). Our goal is to automatically extract entities and their relations from the text and find a mapping between the different domains based on relational similarity (e.g., blood is mapped to water). We develop an interpretable, scalable algorithm and demonstrate that it identifies the correct mappings 87% of the time for procedural texts and 94% for stories from cognitive-psychology literature. We show it can extract analogies from a large dataset of procedural texts, achieving 79% precision (analogy prevalence in data: 3%). Lastly, we demonstrate that our algorithm is robust to paraphrasing the input texts.
summary: Analogy-making gives rise to reasoning, abstraction, flexible categorization and counterfactual inference -- abilities lacking in even the best AI systems today. Much research has suggested that analogies are key to non-brittle systems that can adapt to new domains. Despite their importance, analogies received little attention in the NLP community, with most research focusing on simple word analogies. Work that tackled more complex analogies relied heavily on manually constructed, hard-to-scale input representations. In this work, we explore a more realistic, challenging setup: our input is a pair of natural language procedural texts, describing a situation or a process (e.g., how the heart works/how a pump works). Our goal is to automatically extract entities and their relations from the text and find a mapping between the different domains based on relational similarity (e.g., blood is mapped to water). We develop an interpretable, scalable algorithm and demonstrate that it identifies the correct mappings 87% of the time for procedural texts and 94% for stories from cognitive-psychology literature. We show it can extract analogies from a large dataset of procedural texts, achieving 79% precision (analogy prevalence in data: 3%). Lastly, we demonstrate that our algorithm is robust to paraphrasing the input texts.
abstract_zh: 类比产生了推理、抽象、灵活分类和反事实推理——即使是当今最好的人工智能系统也缺乏这些能力。许多研究表明，类比是能够适应新领域的非脆弱系统的关键。尽管类比很重要，但它在 NLP 界却很少受到关注，大多数研究都集中在简单的单词类比上。处理更复杂类比的工作在很大程度上依赖于手动构建的、难以扩展的输入表示。在这项工作中，我们探索了一种更现实、更具挑战性的设置：我们的输入是一对自然语言程序文本，描述一种情况或一个过程（例如，心脏如何工作/泵如何工作）。我们的目标是从文本中自动提取实体及其关系，并根据关系相似性找到不同域之间的映射（例如，血液映射到水）。我们开发了一种可解释、可扩展的算法，并证明它能够在 87% 的情况下识别出程序文本的正确映射，在 94% 的情况下识别来自认知心理学文献的故事的正确映射。我们证明它可以从大量程序文本数据集中提取类比，达到 79% 的精度（数据中的类比流行率：3%）。最后，我们证明我们的算法对于解释输入文本具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动从自然语言过程文本中提取实体及其关系，并在不同领域间建立类比映射的算法。
AI.motivation: 类比推理是人类智能的核心能力，但现有AI系统对此能力薄弱，且自然语言处理领域对复杂类比研究不足。
AI.method: 开发可解释且可扩展的算法，通过提取文本实体关系并基于关系相似性进行跨领域映射（如将血液映射为水）。
AI.result: 在过程文本上实现87%准确率，在认知心理学故事中达94%，大规模数据集上达到79%精度（类比占比3%），且对文本改写具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效实现了复杂类比的自动提取，为构建适应性强的AI系统提供了新方法。

authors_text: Sumedha Singla,Nihal Murali,Forough Arabshahi,Sofia Triantafyllou,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: Augmentation by Counterfactual Explanation -- Fixing an Overconfident Classifier
title_zh: 通过反事实解释进行增强——修复过度自信的分类器
abstract: A highly accurate but overconfident model is ill-suited for deployment in critical applications such as healthcare and autonomous driving. The classification outcome should reflect a high uncertainty on ambiguous in-distribution samples that lie close to the decision boundary. The model should also refrain from making overconfident decisions on samples that lie far outside its training distribution, far-out-of-distribution (far-OOD), or on unseen samples from novel classes that lie near its training distribution (near-OOD). This paper proposes an application of counterfactual explanations in fixing an over-confident classifier. Specifically, we propose to fine-tune a given pre-trained classifier using augmentations from a counterfactual explainer (ACE) to fix its uncertainty characteristics while retaining its predictive performance. We perform extensive experiments with detecting far-OOD, near-OOD, and ambiguous samples. Our empirical results show that the revised model have improved uncertainty measures, and its performance is competitive to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: A highly accurate but overconfident model is ill-suited for deployment in critical applications such as healthcare and autonomous driving. The classification outcome should reflect a high uncertainty on ambiguous in-distribution samples that lie close to the decision boundary. The model should also refrain from making overconfident decisions on samples that lie far outside its training distribution, far-out-of-distribution (far-OOD), or on unseen samples from novel classes that lie near its training distribution (near-OOD). This paper proposes an application of counterfactual explanations in fixing an over-confident classifier. Specifically, we propose to fine-tune a given pre-trained classifier using augmentations from a counterfactual explainer (ACE) to fix its uncertainty characteristics while retaining its predictive performance. We perform extensive experiments with detecting far-OOD, near-OOD, and ambiguous samples. Our empirical results show that the revised model have improved uncertainty measures, and its performance is competitive to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 高度准确但过于自信的模型不适合部署在医疗保健和自动驾驶等关键应用中。分类结果应反映靠近决策边界的模糊分布样本的高度不确定性。该模型还应该避免对远离其训练分布（远分布（远 OOD））的样本或来自接近其训练分布（近 OOD）的新类别的未见样本做出过度自信的决策。本文提出了一种反事实解释在修复过度自信的分类器中的应用。具体来说，我们建议使用反事实解释器（ACE）的增强来微调给定的预训练分类器，以修复其不确定性特征，同时保留其预测性能。我们进行了大量的实验来检测远 OOD、近 OOD 和模糊样本。我们的实证结果表明，修订后的模型改进了不确定性度量，其性能与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过反事实解释增强方法修复过度自信的分类器，以提升其在分布外样本和模糊样本上的不确定性度量。
AI.motivation: 高度准确但过度自信的模型在医疗和自动驾驶等关键领域存在风险，需改进其对模糊样本和分布外样本的不确定性估计。
AI.method: 使用反事实解释器（ACE）生成数据增强，微调预训练分类器以修正不确定性特征，同时保持预测性能。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在远分布外、近分布外及模糊样本的不确定性度量上表现提升，且性能与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 反事实解释增强有效修复了分类器的过度自信问题，为安全关键应用提供了更可靠的模型不确定性估计。

search_text: Augmentation by Counterfactual Explanation -- Fixing an Overconfident Classifier 通过反事实解释进行增强——修复过度自信的分类器 A highly accurate but overconfident model is ill-suited for deployment in critical applications such as healthcare and autonomous driving. The classification outcome should reflect a high uncertainty on ambiguous in-distribution samples that lie close to the decision boundary. The model should also refrain from making overconfident decisions on samples that lie far outside its training distribution, far-out-of-distribution (far-OOD), or on unseen samples from novel classes that lie near its training distribution (near-OOD). This paper proposes an application of counterfactual explanations in fixing an over-confident classifier. Specifically, we propose to fine-tune a given pre-trained classifier using augmentations from a counterfactual explainer (ACE) to fix its uncertainty characteristics while retaining its predictive performance. We perform extensive experiments with detecting far-OOD, near-OOD, and ambiguous samples. Our empirical results show that the revised model have improved uncertainty measures, and its performance is competitive to the state-of-the-art methods. 高度准确但过于自信的模型不适合部署在医疗保健和自动驾驶等关键应用中。分类结果应反映靠近决策边界的模糊分布样本的高度不确定性。该模型还应该避免对远离其训练分布（远分布（远 OOD））的样本或来自接近其训练分布（近 OOD）的新类别的未见样本做出过度自信的决策。本文提出了一种反事实解释在修复过度自信的分类器中的应用。具体来说，我们建议使用反事实解释器（ACE）的增强来微调给定的预训练分类器，以修复其不确定性特征，同时保留其预测性能。我们进行了大量的实验来检测远 OOD、近 OOD 和模糊样本。我们的实证结果表明，修订后的模型改进了不确定性度量，其性能与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。 本文提出通过反事实解释增强方法修复过度自信的分类器，以提升其在分布外样本和模糊样本上的不确定性度量。 Sumedha Singla,Nihal Murali,Forough Arabshahi,Sofia Triantafyllou,Kayhan Batmanghelich cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jan Hohenheim,Zhaoyu Devon Liu,Tommaso Stecconi,Pietro Palopoli
title: A Trainable Sequence Learner that Learns and Recognizes Two-Input Sequence Patterns
title_zh: 学习和识别双输入序列模式的可训练序列学习器
abstract: We present two designs for an analog circuit that can learn to detect a temporal sequence of two inputs. The training phase is done by feeding the circuit with the desired sequence and, after the training is completed, each time the trained sequence is encountered again the circuit will emit a signal of correct recognition. Sequences are in the order of tens of nanoseconds. The first design can reset the trained sequence on runtime but assumes very strict timing of the inputs. The second design can only be trained once but is lenient in the input's timing.
summary: We present two designs for an analog circuit that can learn to detect a temporal sequence of two inputs. The training phase is done by feeding the circuit with the desired sequence and, after the training is completed, each time the trained sequence is encountered again the circuit will emit a signal of correct recognition. Sequences are in the order of tens of nanoseconds. The first design can reset the trained sequence on runtime but assumes very strict timing of the inputs. The second design can only be trained once but is lenient in the input's timing.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了两种模拟电路设计，可以学习检测两个输入的时间序列。训练阶段是通过向电路馈送所需序列来完成的，训练完成后，每次再次遇到训练序列时，电路都会发出正确识别的信号。序列约为数十纳秒。第一个设计可以在运行时重置训练序列，但假设输入的时序非常严格。第二种设计只能训练一次，但输入时间比较宽松。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种模拟电路设计，能够学习并识别两输入的时间序列模式。
AI.motivation: 开发能够检测特定时间序列的模拟电路，以满足对时序严格或灵活的应用需求。
AI.method: 设计两种电路方案：第一种支持运行时重置但要求严格输入时序，第二种仅支持单次训练但对输入时序更宽容。
AI.result: 实现了两种电路原型，均能正确识别纳秒级时间尺度的训练序列并输出识别信号。
AI.conclusion: 两种设计分别在时序严格性和可重置性方面提供不同 trade-off，适用于不同场景需求。

authors_text: Jean-Benoit Delbrouck,Pierre Chambon,Christian Bluethgen,Emily Tsai,Omar Almusa,Curtis P. Langlotz
title: Improving the Factual Correctness of Radiology Report Generation with Semantic Rewards
title_zh: 通过语义奖励提高放射学报告生成的事实正确性
abstract: Neural image-to-text radiology report generation systems offer the potential to improve radiology reporting by reducing the repetitive process of report drafting and identifying possible medical errors. These systems have achieved promising performance as measured by widely used NLG metrics such as BLEU and CIDEr. However, the current systems face important limitations. First, they present an increased complexity in architecture that offers only marginal improvements on NLG metrics. Secondly, these systems that achieve high performance on these metrics are not always factually complete or consistent due to both inadequate training and evaluation. Recent studies have shown the systems can be substantially improved by using new methods encouraging 1) the generation of domain entities consistent with the reference and 2) describing these entities in inferentially consistent ways. So far, these methods rely on weakly-supervised approaches (rule-based) and named entity recognition systems that are not specific to the chest X-ray domain. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new method, the RadGraph reward, to further improve the factual completeness and correctness of generated radiology reports. More precisely, we leverage the RadGraph dataset containing annotated chest X-ray reports with entities and relations between entities. On two open radiology report datasets, our system substantially improves the scores up to 14.2% and 25.3% on metrics evaluating the factual correctness and completeness of reports.
summary: Neural image-to-text radiology report generation systems offer the potential to improve radiology reporting by reducing the repetitive process of report drafting and identifying possible medical errors. These systems have achieved promising performance as measured by widely used NLG metrics such as BLEU and CIDEr. However, the current systems face important limitations. First, they present an increased complexity in architecture that offers only marginal improvements on NLG metrics. Secondly, these systems that achieve high performance on these metrics are not always factually complete or consistent due to both inadequate training and evaluation. Recent studies have shown the systems can be substantially improved by using new methods encouraging 1) the generation of domain entities consistent with the reference and 2) describing these entities in inferentially consistent ways. So far, these methods rely on weakly-supervised approaches (rule-based) and named entity recognition systems that are not specific to the chest X-ray domain. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new method, the RadGraph reward, to further improve the factual completeness and correctness of generated radiology reports. More precisely, we leverage the RadGraph dataset containing annotated chest X-ray reports with entities and relations between entities. On two open radiology report datasets, our system substantially improves the scores up to 14.2% and 25.3% on metrics evaluating the factual correctness and completeness of reports.
abstract_zh: 神经图像到文本放射学报告生成系统通过减少报告起草和识别可能的医疗错误的重复过程，提供了改进放射学报告的潜力。根据广泛使用的 NLG 指标（例如 BLEU 和 CIDEr）来衡量，这些系统已经取得了可喜的性能。然而，当前的系统面临着重要的局限性。首先，它们增加了架构的复杂性，仅对 NLG 指标提供了微小的改进。其次，由于培训和评估不足，这些在这些指标上实现高性能的系统并不总是完整或一致的。最近的研究表明，通过使用新方法可以显着改进系统，鼓励 1）生成与参考一致的领域实体，2）以推理一致的方式描述这些实体。到目前为止，这些方法依赖于弱监督方法（基于规则）和非特定于胸部 X 射线领域的命名实体识别系统。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种新方法，即 RadGraph 奖励，以进一步提高生成的放射学报告的事实完整性和正确性。更准确地说，我们利用 RadGraph 数据集，其中包含带注释的胸部 X 射线报告以及实体和实体之间的关系。在两个开放的放射学报告数据集上，我们的系统在评估报告的事实正确性和完整性的指标上的得分分别提高了 14.2% 和 25.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义奖励的方法，通过利用RadGraph数据集中的实体和关系，提升放射科报告生成系统的事实准确性和完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经图像到文本的放射科报告生成系统在NLG指标上表现良好，但存在事实不完整或不一致的问题，主要由于训练和评估不足，且依赖非领域特定的弱监督方法。
AI.method: 提出RadGraph奖励机制，利用包含胸部X光报告实体及关系的RadGraph数据集，通过语义层面的奖励引导生成更符合事实的报告。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，系统在事实正确性和完整性指标上分别提升14.2%和25.3%。
AI.conclusion: RadGraph奖励方法通过领域特定的语义信息有效提升了生成报告的事实准确性，为医疗文本生成提供了新思路。

On two open radiology report datasets, our system substantially improves the scores up to 14.2% and 25.3% on metrics evaluating the factual correctness and completeness of reports. 神经图像到文本放射学报告生成系统通过减少报告起草和识别可能的医疗错误的重复过程，提供了改进放射学报告的潜力。根据广泛使用的 NLG 指标（例如 BLEU 和 CIDEr）来衡量，这些系统已经取得了可喜的性能。然而，当前的系统面临着重要的局限性。首先，它们增加了架构的复杂性，仅对 NLG 指标提供了微小的改进。其次，由于培训和评估不足，这些在这些指标上实现高性能的系统并不总是完整或一致的。最近的研究表明，通过使用新方法可以显着改进系统，鼓励 1）生成与参考一致的领域实体，2）以推理一致的方式描述这些实体。到目前为止，这些方法依赖于弱监督方法（基于规则）和非特定于胸部 X 射线领域的命名实体识别系统。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种新方法，即 RadGraph 奖励，以进一步提高生成的放射学报告的事实完整性和正确性。更准确地说，我们利用 RadGraph 数据集，其中包含带注释的胸部 X 射线报告以及实体和实体之间的关系。在两个开放的放射学报告数据集上，我们的系统在评估报告的事实正确性和完整性的指标上的得分分别提高了 14.2% 和 25.3%。 本文提出一种基于语义奖励的方法，通过利用RadGraph数据集中的实体和关系，提升放射科报告生成系统的事实准确性和完整性。 Jean-Benoit Delbrouck,Pierre Chambon,Christian Bluethgen,Emily Tsai,Omar Almusa,Curtis P. Langlotz cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Attention-Based Scattering Network for Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 基于注意力的卫星图像散射网络
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop - Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning, 4 page limit w/ appendix
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop - Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning, 4 page limit w/ appendix
abstract: Multi-channel satellite imagery, from stacked spectral bands or spatiotemporal data, have meaningful representations for various atmospheric properties. Combining these features in an effective manner to create a performant and trustworthy model is of utmost importance to forecasters. Neural networks show promise, yet suffer from unintuitive computations, fusion of high-level features, and may be limited by the quantity of available data. In this work, we leverage the scattering transform to extract high-level features without additional trainable parameters and introduce a separation scheme to bring attention to independent input channels. Experiments show promising results on estimating tropical cyclone intensity and predicting the occurrence of lightning from satellite imagery.
summary: Multi-channel satellite imagery, from stacked spectral bands or spatiotemporal data, have meaningful representations for various atmospheric properties. Combining these features in an effective manner to create a performant and trustworthy model is of utmost importance to forecasters. Neural networks show promise, yet suffer from unintuitive computations, fusion of high-level features, and may be limited by the quantity of available data. In this work, we leverage the scattering transform to extract high-level features without additional trainable parameters and introduce a separation scheme to bring attention to independent input channels. Experiments show promising results on estimating tropical cyclone intensity and predicting the occurrence of lightning from satellite imagery.
abstract_zh: 来自堆叠光谱带或时空数据的多通道卫星图像对各种大气特性具有有意义的表示。对于预测者来说，以有效的方式结合这些功能来创建高性能且值得信赖的模型至关重要。神经网络显示出希望，但存在计算不直观、高级特征融合的问题，并且可能受到可用数据量的限制。在这项工作中，我们利用散射变换来提取高级特征，而无需额外的可训练参数，并引入分离方案来引起对独立输入通道的关注。实验显示，根据卫星图像估算热带气旋强度和预测闪电的发生，取得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的散射网络，用于处理多通道卫星图像以预测气象现象。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在处理卫星图像时存在特征融合不直观、数据量限制及高层特征提取困难的问题，需更高效可靠的方法。
AI.method: 结合散射变换提取高层特征（无需额外参数）与通道分离方案，通过注意力机制增强独立输入通道的重要性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在热带气旋强度估计和闪电预测任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效结合了散射网络与注意力机制，提升了卫星图像分析的性能与可解释性。

title: A New Perspective for Understanding Generalization Gap of Deep Neural Networks Trained with Large Batch Sizes
title_zh: 理解大批量训练深度神经网络泛化差距的新视角
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are typically optimized using various forms of mini-batch gradient descent algorithm. A major motivation for mini-batch gradient descent is that with a suitably chosen batch size, available computing resources can be optimally utilized (including parallelization) for fast model training. However, many works report the progressive loss of model generalization when the training batch size is increased beyond some limits. This is a scenario commonly referred to as generalization gap. Although several works have proposed different methods for alleviating the generalization gap problem, a unanimous account for understanding generalization gap is still lacking in the literature. This is especially important given that recent works have observed that several proposed solutions for generalization gap problem such learning rate scaling and increased training budget do not indeed resolve it. As such, our main exposition in this paper is to investigate and provide new perspectives for the source of generalization loss for DNNs trained with a large batch size. Our analysis suggests that large training batch size results in increased near-rank loss of units' activation (i.e. output) tensors, which consequently impacts model optimization and generalization. Extensive experiments are performed for validation on popular DNN models such as VGG-16, residual network (ResNet-56) and LeNet-5 using CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Fashion-MNIST and MNIST datasets.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are typically optimized using various forms of mini-batch gradient descent algorithm. A major motivation for mini-batch gradient descent is that with a suitably chosen batch size, available computing resources can be optimally utilized (including parallelization) for fast model training. However, many works report the progressive loss of model generalization when the training batch size is increased beyond some limits. This is a scenario commonly referred to as generalization gap. Although several works have proposed different methods for alleviating the generalization gap problem, a unanimous account for understanding generalization gap is still lacking in the literature. This is especially important given that recent works have observed that several proposed solutions for generalization gap problem such learning rate scaling and increased training budget do not indeed resolve it. As such, our main exposition in this paper is to investigate and provide new perspectives for the source of generalization loss for DNNs trained with a large batch size. Our analysis suggests that large training batch size results in increased near-rank loss of units' activation (i.e. output) tensors, which consequently impacts model optimization and generalization. Extensive experiments are performed for validation on popular DNN models such as VGG-16, residual network (ResNet-56) and LeNet-5 using CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Fashion-MNIST and MNIST datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常使用各种形式的小批量梯度下降算法进行优化。小批量梯度下降的一个主要动机是，通过适当选择批量大小，可以最佳地利用可用的计算资源（包括并行化）来进行快速模型训练。然而，许多工作报告当训练批量大小增加超过一定限制时模型泛化能力逐渐丧失。这种情况通常称为泛化差距。尽管一些著作提出了不同的方法来缓解泛化差距问题，但文献中仍然缺乏对理解泛化差距的一致解释。鉴于最近的研究发现，针对泛化差距问题提出的几种解决方案（例如学习率缩放和增加培训预算）并不能真正解决该问题，这一点尤其重要。因此，我们在本文中的主要阐述是调查大批量训练的 DNN 泛化损失的来源并提供新的视角。我们的分析表明，大的训练批量会导致单元激活（即输出）张量的近秩损失增加，从而影响模型优化和泛化。使用 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Fashion-MNIST 和 MNIST 数据集对流行的 DNN 模型（例如 VGG-16、残差网络 (ResNet-56) 和 LeNet-5）进行了大量实验以进行验证。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探究深度神经网络在使用大批次训练时出现的泛化差距现象的根源，并提出新的理解视角。
AI.motivation: 尽管大批次训练能提升计算资源利用率，但现有研究发现其会导致模型泛化能力下降，且现有解决方案（如学习率调整）未能有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 通过分析大批次训练下神经元激活张量的近秩损失，结合VGG-16、ResNet-56等模型在多个数据集上的实验验证。
AI.result: 实验证实大批次训练会加剧激活张量的近秩损失，从而影响模型优化与泛化性能，且该现象在不同网络结构和数据集上具有普适性。
AI.conclusion: 大批次训练导致的激活张量近秩损失是泛化差距的核心原因，为理解该问题提供了新视角，并提示现有优化方法需针对此机制进行改进。

title: High-Fidelity Visual Structural Inspections through Transformers and Learnable Resizers
title_zh: 通过 Transformers 和可学习调整器进行高保真视觉结构检查
abstract: Visual inspection is the predominant technique for evaluating the condition of civil infrastructure. The recent advances in unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and artificial intelligence have made the visual inspections faster, safer, and more reliable. Camera-equipped UAVs are becoming the new standard in the industry by collecting massive amounts of visual data for human inspectors. Meanwhile, there has been significant research on autonomous visual inspections using deep learning algorithms, including semantic segmentation. While UAVs can capture high-resolution images of buildings' façades, high-resolution segmentation is extremely challenging due to the high computational memory demands. Typically, images are uniformly downsized at the price of losing fine local details. Contrarily, breaking the images into multiple smaller patches can cause a loss of global contextual in-formation. We propose a hybrid strategy that can adapt to different inspections tasks by managing the global and local semantics trade-off. The framework comprises a compound, high-resolution deep learning architecture equipped with an attention-based segmentation model and learnable downsampler-upsampler modules designed for optimal efficiency and in-formation retention. The framework also utilizes vision transformers on a grid of image crops aiming for high precision learning without downsizing. An augmented inference technique is used to boost the performance and re-duce the possible loss of context due to grid cropping. Comprehensive experiments have been performed on 3D physics-based graphics models synthetic environments in the Quake City dataset. The proposed framework is evaluated using several metrics on three segmentation tasks: component type, component damage state, and global damage (crack, rebar, spalling).
summary: Visual inspection is the predominant technique for evaluating the condition of civil infrastructure. The framework comprises a compound, high-resolution deep learning architecture equipped with an attention-based segmentation model and learnable downsampler-upsampler modules designed for optimal efficiency and in-formation retention. The framework also utilizes vision transformers on a grid of image crops aiming for high precision learning without downsizing. Comprehensive experiments have been performed on 3D physics-based graphics models synthetic environments in the Quake City dataset. The proposed framework is evaluated using several metrics on three segmentation tasks: component type, component damage state, and global damage (crack, rebar, spalling).
abstract_zh: 目视检查是评估民用基础设施状况的主要技术。无人机 (UAV) 和人工智能的最新进展使目视检查更快、更安全、更可靠。通过为人类检查员收集大量视觉数据，配备摄像头的无人机正在成为行业的新标准。与此同时，使用深度学习算法（包括语义分割）进行自主视觉检查也进行了大量研究。虽然无人机可以捕获建筑物外墙的高分辨率图像，但由于计算内存需求较高，高分辨率分割极具挑战性。通常，图像统一缩小，但代价是丢失精细的局部细节。相反，将图像分成多个较小的块可能会导致全局上下文信息的丢失。我们提出了一种混合策略，可以通过管理全局和局部语义权衡来适应不同的检查任务。该框架由复合的高分辨率深度学习架构组成，配备基于注意力的分割模型和可学习的下采样器-上采样器模块，旨在实现最佳效率和信息保留。该框架还在图像裁剪网格上利用视觉转换器，旨在在不缩小尺寸的情况下实现高精度学习。使用增强推理技术来提高性能并减少由于网格裁剪而可能导致的上下文丢失。在 Quake City 数据集中基于 3D 物理的图形模型合成环境中进行了全面的实验。所提出的框架使用三个分段任务的多个指标进行评估：组件类型、组件损坏状态和全局损坏（裂纹、钢筋、剥落）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Transformer和可学习缩放模块的高保真视觉结构检测框架，用于解决无人机采集的高分辨率建筑立面图像在语义分割中的全局与局部信息平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过统一降采样或分块处理高分辨率图像会导致细节丢失或上下文信息缺失，现有深度学习方法难以兼顾高分辨率分割的计算效率与信息完整性。
AI.method: 设计包含注意力机制分割模型和可学习下采样-上采样模块的复合架构，结合基于Transformer的网格图像裁剪处理，通过增强推理技术减少网格裁剪导致的上下文损失。
AI.result: 在Quake City数据集的三个分割任务（组件类型、损伤状态、全局损伤）中，框架在多个指标上优于现有方法，实现了高分辨率下的精确分割。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过动态平衡全局与局部语义，有效解决了高分辨率结构检测中的计算与信息保留矛盾，为无人机视觉检测提供了新思路。

search_text: High-Fidelity Visual Structural Inspections through Transformers and Learnable Resizers 通过 Transformers 和可学习调整器进行高保真视觉结构检查 Visual inspection is the predominant technique for evaluating the condition of civil infrastructure. The recent advances in unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and artificial intelligence have made the visual inspections faster, safer, and more reliable. Camera-equipped UAVs are becoming the new standard in the industry by collecting massive amounts of visual data for human inspectors. Meanwhile, there has been significant research on autonomous visual inspections using deep learning algorithms, including semantic segmentation. While UAVs can capture high-resolution images of buildings' façades, high-resolution segmentation is extremely challenging due to the high computational memory demands. Typically, images are uniformly downsized at the price of losing fine local details. Contrarily, breaking the images into multiple smaller patches can cause a loss of global contextual in-formation. We propose a hybrid strategy that can adapt to different inspections tasks by managing the global and local semantics trade-off. The framework comprises a compound, high-resolution deep learning architecture equipped with an attention-based segmentation model and learnable downsampler-upsampler modules designed for optimal efficiency and in-formation retention. The framework also utilizes vision transformers on a grid of image crops aiming for high precision learning without downsizing. An augmented inference technique is used to boost the performance and re-duce the possible loss of context due to grid cropping. Comprehensive experiments have been performed on 3D physics-based graphics models synthetic environments in the Quake City dataset. The proposed framework is evaluated using several metrics on three segmentation tasks: component type, component damage state, and global damage (crack, rebar, spalling). 目视检查是评估民用基础设施状况的主要技术。无人机 (UAV) 和人工智能的最新进展使目视检查更快、更安全、更可靠。通过为人类检查员收集大量视觉数据，配备摄像头的无人机正在成为行业的新标准。与此同时，使用深度学习算法（包括语义分割）进行自主视觉检查也进行了大量研究。虽然无人机可以捕获建筑物外墙的高分辨率图像，但由于计算内存需求较高，高分辨率分割极具挑战性。通常，图像统一缩小，但代价是丢失精细的局部细节。相反，将图像分成多个较小的块可能会导致全局上下文信息的丢失。我们提出了一种混合策略，可以通过管理全局和局部语义权衡来适应不同的检查任务。该框架由复合的高分辨率深度学习架构组成，配备基于注意力的分割模型和可学习的下采样器-上采样器模块，旨在实现最佳效率和信息保留。该框架还在图像裁剪网格上利用视觉转换器，旨在在不缩小尺寸的情况下实现高精度学习。使用增强推理技术来提高性能并减少由于网格裁剪而可能导致的上下文丢失。在 Quake City 数据集中基于 3D 物理的图形模型合成环境中进行了全面的实验。所提出的框架使用三个分段任务的多个指标进行评估：组件类型、组件损坏状态和全局损坏（裂纹、钢筋、剥落）。 本文提出一种结合Transformer和可学习缩放模块的高保真视觉结构检测框架，用于解决无人机采集的高分辨率建筑立面图像在语义分割中的全局与局部信息平衡问题。 Kareem Eltouny,Seyedomid Sajedi,Xiao Liang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Joshua D. Herman,Rachel E. Roca,Alexandra G. O'Neill,Marcus L. Wong,Sajan G. Lingala,Angel R. Pineda
title: Task-Based Assessment for Neural Networks: Evaluating Undersampled MRI Reconstructions based on Human Observer Signal Detection
title_zh: 基于任务的神经网络评估：基于人类观察者信号检测评估欠采样 MRI 重建
abstract: Recent research has explored using neural networks to reconstruct undersampled magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data. Because of the complexity of the artifacts in the reconstructed images, there is a need to develop task-based approaches of image quality. Common metrics for evaluating image quality like the normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) and structural similarity (SSIM) are global metrics which average out impact of subtle features in the images. Using measures of image quality which incorporate a subtle signal for a specific task allow for image quality assessment which locally evaluates the effect of undersampling on a signal. We used a U-Net to reconstruct under-sampled images with 2x, 3x, 4x and 5x fold 1-D undersampling rates. Cross validation was performed for a 500 and a 4000 image training set with both structural similarity (SSIM) and mean squared error (MSE) losses. A two alternative forced choice (2-AFC) observer study was carried out for detecting a subtle signal (small blurred disk) from images with the 4000 image training set. We found that for both loss functions and training set sizes, the human observer performance on the 2-AFC studies led to a choice of a 2x undersampling but the SSIM and NRMSE led to a choice of a 3x undersampling. For this task, SSIM and NRMSE led to an overestimate of the achievable undersampling using a U-Net before a steep loss of image quality when compared to the performance of human observers in the detection of a subtle lesion.
summary: Recent research has explored using neural networks to reconstruct undersampled magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data. Because of the complexity of the artifacts in the reconstructed images, there is a need to develop task-based approaches of image quality. Common metrics for evaluating image quality like the normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) and structural similarity (SSIM) are global metrics which average out impact of subtle features in the images. Using measures of image quality which incorporate a subtle signal for a specific task allow for image quality assessment which locally evaluates the effect of undersampling on a signal. We used a U-Net to reconstruct under-sampled images with 2x, 3x, 4x and 5x fold 1-D undersampling rates. Cross validation was performed for a 500 and a 4000 image training set with both structural similarity (SSIM) and mean squared error (MSE) losses. A two alternative forced choice (2-AFC) observer study was carried out for detecting a subtle signal (small blurred disk) from images with the 4000 image training set. We found that for both loss functions and training set sizes, the human observer performance on the 2-AFC studies led to a choice of a 2x undersampling but the SSIM and NRMSE led to a choice of a 3x undersampling. For this task, SSIM and NRMSE led to an overestimate of the achievable undersampling using a U-Net before a steep loss of image quality when compared to the performance of human observers in the detection of a subtle lesion.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究探索了使用神经网络来重建欠采样磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据。由于重建图像中伪影的复杂性，需要开发基于任务的图像质量方法。评估图像质量的常用指标，如归一化均方根误差 (NRMSE) 和结构相似性 (SSIM) 是全局指标，可平均化图像中细微特征的影响。使用包含特定任务的微妙信号的图像质量测量可以进行图像质量评估，从而局部评估欠采样对信号的影响。我们使用 U-Net 以 2 倍、3 倍、4 倍和 5 倍一维欠采样率重建欠采样图像。对具有结构相似性 (SSIM) 和均方误差 (MSE) 损失的 500 和 4000 图像训练集进行交叉验证。进行了两种替代强制选择 (2-AFC) 观察者研究，用于从具有 4000 个图像训练集的图像中检测细微信号（小的模糊圆盘）。我们发现，对于损失函数和训练集大小，人类观察者在 2-AFC 研究中的表现导致选择 2 倍欠采样，但 SSIM 和 NRMSE 导致选择 3 倍欠采样。对于这项任务，与人类观察者在检测细微病变方面的表现相比，SSIM 和 NRMSE 导致了对使用 U-Net 可实现的欠采样的高估，然后图像质量急剧下降。

AI.tldr: 本文基于人类观察者信号检测任务，评估神经网络在欠采样MRI重建中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统全局图像质量指标（如NRMSE和SSIM）无法有效捕捉重建图像中细微特征的影响，需开发针对特定任务的局部评估方法。
AI.method: 使用U-Net网络重建2x至5x欠采样MRI数据，通过500和4000张图像训练集进行交叉验证，并采用二选一强制选择实验检测细微信号。
AI.result: 人类观察者在2-AFC实验中选择2x欠采样最优，而SSIM/NRMSE指标推荐3x欠采样，显示传统指标高估了U-Net的欠采样能力。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定任务的人类观察者评估比传统全局指标更能准确反映MRI重建质量，尤其在检测细微病变时表现更优。

title: On the connection between Bregman divergence and value in regularized Markov decision processes
title_zh: 正则化马尔可夫决策过程中布雷格曼散度与价值的联系
abstract: In this short note we derive a relationship between the Bregman divergence from the current policy to the optimal policy and the suboptimality of the current value function in a regularized Markov decision process. This result has implications for multi-task reinforcement learning, offline reinforcement learning, and regret analysis under function approximation, among others.
summary: In this short note we derive a relationship between the Bregman divergence from the current policy to the optimal policy and the suboptimality of the current value function in a regularized Markov decision process. This result has implications for multi-task reinforcement learning, offline reinforcement learning, and regret analysis under function approximation, among others.
abstract_zh: 在这篇简短的文章中，我们推导出当前策略到最优策略的 Bregman 散度与正则化马尔可夫决策过程中当前价值函数的次优性之间的关系。这一结果对多任务强化学习、离线强化学习、函数逼近下的遗憾分析等具有重要意义。

search_text: On the connection between Bregman divergence and value in regularized Markov decision processes 正则化马尔可夫决策过程中布雷格曼散度与价值的联系 In this short note we derive a relationship between the Bregman divergence from the current policy to the optimal policy and the suboptimality of the current value function in a regularized Markov decision process. This result has implications for multi-task reinforcement learning, offline reinforcement learning, and regret analysis under function approximation, among others. 在这篇简短的文章中，我们推导出当前策略到最优策略的 Bregman 散度与正则化马尔可夫决策过程中当前价值函数的次优性之间的关系。这一结果对多任务强化学习、离线强化学习、函数逼近下的遗憾分析等具有重要意义。 本文推导了正则化马尔可夫决策过程中Bregman散度与当前值函数次优性之间的关系。 Brendan O'Donoghue cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

title: Error-Covariance Analysis of Monocular Pose Estimation Using Total Least Squares
title_zh: 使用总最小二乘法进行单眼姿态估计的误差协方差分析
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.11522. text overlap with arXiv:2210.11697
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.11522. text overlap with arXiv:2210.11697
abstract: This study presents a theoretical structure for the monocular pose estimation problem using the total least squares. The unit-vector line-of-sight observations of the features are extracted from the monocular camera images. First, the optimization framework is formulated for the pose estimation problem with observation vectors extracted from unit vectors from the camera center-of-projection, pointing towards the image features. The attitude and position solutions obtained via the derived optimization framework are proven to reach the Cramér-Rao lower bound under the small angle approximation of the attitude errors. Specifically, The Fisher Information Matrix and the Cramér-Rao bounds are evaluated and compared to the analytical derivations of the error-covariance expressions to rigorously prove the optimality of the estimates. The sensor data for the measurement model is provided through a series of vector observations, and two fully populated noise-covariance matrices are assumed for the body and reference observation data. The inverse of the former matrices appear in terms of a series of weight matrices in the cost function. The proposed solution is simulated in a Monte-Carlo framework with 10,000 samples to validate the error-covariance analysis.
summary: This study presents a theoretical structure for the monocular pose estimation problem using the total least squares. The unit-vector line-of-sight observations of the features are extracted from the monocular camera images. First, the optimization framework is formulated for the pose estimation problem with observation vectors extracted from unit vectors from the camera center-of-projection, pointing towards the image features. The attitude and position solutions obtained via the derived optimization framework are proven to reach the Cramér-Rao lower bound under the small angle approximation of the attitude errors. Specifically, The Fisher Information Matrix and the Cramér-Rao bounds are evaluated and compared to the analytical derivations of the error-covariance expressions to rigorously prove the optimality of the estimates. The sensor data for the measurement model is provided through a series of vector observations, and two fully populated noise-covariance matrices are assumed for the body and reference observation data. The inverse of the former matrices appear in terms of a series of weight matrices in the cost function. The proposed solution is simulated in a Monte-Carlo framework with 10,000 samples to validate the error-covariance analysis.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了使用总最小二乘法的单眼姿态估计问题的理论结构。从单目相机图像中提取特征的单位矢量视线观察结果。首先，针对姿态估计问题制定了优化框架，其中观察向量是从相机投影中心的单位向量中提取的，指向图像特征。通过推导的优化框架获得的姿态和位置解被证明在姿态误差的小角度近似下达到了 Cramér-Rao 下界。具体来说，评估 Fisher 信息矩阵和 Cramér-Rao 界限，并将其与误差协方差表达式的分析推导进行比较，以严格证明估计的最优性。测量模型的传感器数据是通过一系列矢量观测提供的，并且假设两个完全填充的噪声协方差矩阵用于身体和参考观测数据。前一个矩阵的逆矩阵以成本函数中的一系列权重矩阵的形式出现。所提出的解决方案在蒙特卡罗框架中用 10,000 个样本进行模拟，以验证误差协方差分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于总最小二乘法的单目视觉姿态估计误差协方差理论框架，通过分析误差协方差并证明估计值达到克拉美-罗下界。
AI.motivation: 单目视觉姿态估计在存在观测噪声时易产生误差，需通过理论分析确保估计精度达到统计最优下界以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 构建基于单位向量视线观测的优化框架，推导误差协方差解析表达式，结合费舍尔信息矩阵与克拉美-罗界进行理论证明，并通过蒙特卡洛仿真验证。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提方法在小角度近似下达到克拉美-罗下界，验证了误差协方差分析的正确性与估计最优性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过严格的理论分析和仿真验证，为单目视觉姿态估计提供了误差协方差最优解的理论依据与实现方案。

authors_text: Xinlu Zhang,Shiyang Li,Zhiyu Chen,Xifeng Yan,Linda Petzold
title: Improving Medical Predictions by Irregular Multimodal Electronic Health Records Modeling
title_zh: 通过不规则多模态电子健康记录建模改进医疗预测
abstract: Health conditions among patients in intensive care units (ICUs) are monitored via electronic health records (EHRs), composed of numerical time series and lengthy clinical note sequences, both taken at irregular time intervals. Dealing with such irregularity in every modality, and integrating irregularity into multimodal representations to improve medical predictions, is a challenging problem. Our method first addresses irregularity in each single modality by (1) modeling irregular time series by dynamically incorporating hand-crafted imputation embeddings into learned interpolation embeddings via a gating mechanism, and (2) casting a series of clinical note representations as multivariate irregular time series and tackling irregularity via a time attention mechanism. We further integrate irregularity in multimodal fusion with an interleaved attention mechanism across temporal steps. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to thoroughly model irregularity in multimodalities for improving medical predictions. Our proposed methods for two medical prediction tasks consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines in each single modality and multimodal fusion scenarios. Specifically, we observe relative improvements of 6.5\%, 3.6\%, and 4.3\% in F1 for time series, clinical notes, and multimodal fusion, respectively. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods and the importance of considering irregularity in multimodal EHRs.
summary: Health conditions among patients in intensive care units (ICUs) are monitored via electronic health records (EHRs), composed of numerical time series and lengthy clinical note sequences, both taken at irregular time intervals. Dealing with such irregularity in every modality, and integrating irregularity into multimodal representations to improve medical predictions, is a challenging problem. Our method first addresses irregularity in each single modality by (1) modeling irregular time series by dynamically incorporating hand-crafted imputation embeddings into learned interpolation embeddings via a gating mechanism, and (2) casting a series of clinical note representations as multivariate irregular time series and tackling irregularity via a time attention mechanism. We further integrate irregularity in multimodal fusion with an interleaved attention mechanism across temporal steps. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to thoroughly model irregularity in multimodalities for improving medical predictions. Our proposed methods for two medical prediction tasks consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines in each single modality and multimodal fusion scenarios. Specifically, we observe relative improvements of 6.5\%, 3.6\%, and 4.3\% in F1 for time series, clinical notes, and multimodal fusion, respectively. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods and the importance of considering irregularity in multimodal EHRs.
abstract_zh: 重症监护病房 (ICU) 患者的健康状况通过电子健康记录 (EHR) 进行监控，电子健康记录由数字时间序列和冗长的临床记录序列组成，两者均以不规则的时间间隔记录。处理每种模态中的这种不规则性，并将不规则性集成到多模态表示中以改进医学预测，是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们的方法首先通过以下方式解决每个单一模态中的不规则性：（1）通过门控机制将手工制作的插值嵌入动态地合并到学习的插值嵌入中，对不规则时间序列进行建模；（2）将一系列临床记录表示转换为多元不规则时间序列，并通过时间注意机制处理不规则性。我们进一步将多模态融合中的不规则性与跨时间步骤的交错注意力机制相结合。据我们所知，这是第一项彻底模拟多模态不规则性以改善医学预测的工作。我们提出的两个医学预测任务的方法在每个单模态和多模态融合场景中始终优于最先进的（SOTA）基线。具体来说，我们观察到 F1 中时间序列、临床记录和多模态融合的相对改进分别为 6.5%、3.6% 和 4.3%。这些结果证明了我们方法的有效性以及考虑多模式电子病历中不规则性的重要性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种处理不规则多模态电子健康记录（EHRs）的方法，以提升医疗预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 重症监护病房（ICU）患者的健康状况通过包含不规则时间间隔的数值时间序列和临床笔记的EHRs进行监测，如何有效整合多模态数据中的不规则性以提高预测性能是一个挑战。
AI.method: 针对单一模态的不规则性，采用门控机制融合手工插补嵌入与学习插值嵌入，并将临床笔记表示为多变量不规则时间序列以时间注意力机制处理。通过跨时间步的交错注意力机制实现多模态融合。
AI.result: 在两个医疗预测任务中，该方法在时间序列、临床笔记和多模态融合场景下分别实现6.5%、3.6%和4.3%的F1相对提升，优于现有最先进基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过系统建模多模态EHRs的不规则性，验证了其有效性，并强调了在医疗预测中考虑不规则性的必要性。

tldr: 该论文提出了一种处理不规则多模态电子健康记录（EHRs）的方法，以提升医疗预测的准确性。
motivation: 重症监护病房（ICU）患者的健康状况通过包含不规则时间间隔的数值时间序列和临床笔记的EHRs进行监测，如何有效整合多模态数据中的不规则性以提高预测性能是一个挑战。
method: 针对单一模态的不规则性，采用门控机制融合手工插补嵌入与学习插值嵌入，并将临床笔记表示为多变量不规则时间序列以时间注意力机制处理。通过跨时间步的交错注意力机制实现多模态融合。
result: 在两个医疗预测任务中，该方法在时间序列、临床笔记和多模态融合场景下分别实现6.5%、3.6%和4.3%的F1相对提升，优于现有最先进基线。
conclusion: 该方法通过系统建模多模态EHRs的不规则性，验证了其有效性，并强调了在医疗预测中考虑不规则性的必要性。
search_text: Improving Medical Predictions by Irregular Multimodal Electronic Health Records Modeling 通过不规则多模态电子健康记录建模改进医疗预测 Health conditions among patients in intensive care units (ICUs) are monitored via electronic health records (EHRs), composed of numerical time series and lengthy clinical note sequences, both taken at irregular time intervals. Dealing with such irregularity in every modality, and integrating irregularity into multimodal representations to improve medical predictions, is a challenging problem. Our method first addresses irregularity in each single modality by (1) modeling irregular time series by dynamically incorporating hand-crafted imputation embeddings into learned interpolation embeddings via a gating mechanism, and (2) casting a series of clinical note representations as multivariate irregular time series and tackling irregularity via a time attention mechanism. We further integrate irregularity in multimodal fusion with an interleaved attention mechanism across temporal steps. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to thoroughly model irregularity in multimodalities for improving medical predictions. Our proposed methods for two medical prediction tasks consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines in each single modality and multimodal fusion scenarios. Specifically, we observe relative improvements of 6.5\%, 3.6\%, and 4.3\% in F1 for time series, clinical notes, and multimodal fusion, respectively. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods and the importance of considering irregularity in multimodal EHRs. 重症监护病房 (ICU) 患者的健康状况通过电子健康记录 (EHR) 进行监控，电子健康记录由数字时间序列和冗长的临床记录序列组成，两者均以不规则的时间间隔记录。处理每种模态中的这种不规则性，并将不规则性集成到多模态表示中以改进医学预测，是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们的方法首先通过以下方式解决每个单一模态中的不规则性：（1）通过门控机制将手工制作的插值嵌入动态地合并到学习的插值嵌入中，对不规则时间序列进行建模；（2）将一系列临床记录表示转换为多元不规则时间序列，并通过时间注意机制处理不规则性。我们进一步将多模态融合中的不规则性与跨时间步骤的交错注意力机制相结合。据我们所知，这是第一项彻底模拟多模态不规则性以改善医学预测的工作。我们提出的两个医学预测任务的方法在每个单模态和多模态融合场景中始终优于最先进的（SOTA）基线。具体来说，我们观察到 F1 中时间序列、临床记录和多模态融合的相对改进分别为 6.5%、3.6% 和 4.3%。这些结果证明了我们方法的有效性以及考虑多模式电子病历中不规则性的重要性。 该论文提出了一种处理不规则多模态电子健康记录（EHRs）的方法，以提升医疗预测的准确性。 Xinlu Zhang,Shiyang Li,Zhiyu Chen,Xifeng Yan,Linda Petzold cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Use of BNNM for interference wave solutions of the gBS-like equation and comparison with PINNs
title_zh: 使用 BNNM 求解类 gBS 方程的干扰波并与 PINN 进行比较
abstract: In this work, the generalized broken soliton-like (gBS-like) equation is derived through the generalized bilinear method. The neural network model, which can fit the explicit solution with zero error, is found. The interference wave solution of the gBS-like equation is obtained by using the bilinear neural network method (BNNM) and physical informed neural networks (PINNs). Interference waves are shown well via three-dimensional plots and density plots. Compared with PINNs, the bilinear neural network method is not only more accurate but also faster.
summary: In this work, the generalized broken soliton-like (gBS-like) equation is derived through the generalized bilinear method. The neural network model, which can fit the explicit solution with zero error, is found. The interference wave solution of the gBS-like equation is obtained by using the bilinear neural network method (BNNM) and physical informed neural networks (PINNs). Interference waves are shown well via three-dimensional plots and density plots. Compared with PINNs, the bilinear neural network method is not only more accurate but also faster.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，通过广义双线性方法推导出广义破孤子类（g​​BS-like）方程。建立了能以零误差拟合显式解的神经网络模型。利用双线性神经网络方法（BNNM）和物理通知神经网络（PINNs）获得类gBS方程的干扰波解。通过三维图和密度图可以很好地显示干扰波。与PINNs相比，双线性神经网络方法不仅更准确而且更快。

AI.tldr: 本文通过BNNM和PINNs方法求解gBS-like方程的干扰波解，并比较两者性能。
AI.motivation: 寻找更高效准确的求解非线性方程的方法，对比新型神经网络与传统方法的优劣。
AI.method: 采用广义双线性方法推导方程，利用BNNM和PINNs构建神经网络模型，通过三维图和密度图验证解的准确性。
AI.result: BNNM在求解精度和计算速度上均优于PINNs，成功展示了gBS-like方程的干扰波解。
AI.conclusion: BNNM在处理此类非线性方程时表现出更高的准确性和效率，具有应用优势。

title: On amortizing convex conjugates for optimal transport
title_zh: 关于摊销凸共轭以获得最佳传输
abstract: This paper focuses on computing the convex conjugate (also known as the Legendre-Fenchel conjugate or c-transform) that appears in Euclidean Wasserstein-2 optimal transport. This conjugation is considered difficult to compute and in practice, methods are limited by not being able to exactly conjugate the dual potentials in continuous space. To overcome this, the computation of the conjugate can be approximated with amortized optimization, which learns a model to predict the conjugate. I show that combining amortized approximations to the conjugate with a solver for fine-tuning significantly improves the quality of transport maps learned for the Wasserstein-2 benchmark by Korotin et al. (2021a) and is able to model many 2-dimensional couplings and flows considered in the literature. All baselines, methods, and solvers are publicly available at http://github.com/facebookresearch/w2ot.
summary: This paper focuses on computing the convex conjugate (also known as the Legendre-Fenchel conjugate or c-transform) that appears in Euclidean Wasserstein-2 optimal transport. This conjugation is considered difficult to compute and in practice, methods are limited by not being able to exactly conjugate the dual potentials in continuous space. To overcome this, the computation of the conjugate can be approximated with amortized optimization, which learns a model to predict the conjugate. I show that combining amortized approximations to the conjugate with a solver for fine-tuning significantly improves the quality of transport maps learned for the Wasserstein-2 benchmark by Korotin et al. (2021a) and is able to model many 2-dimensional couplings and flows considered in the literature. All baselines, methods, and solvers are publicly available at http://github.com/facebookresearch/w2ot.
abstract_zh: 本文重点计算欧几里得 Wasserstein-2 最优传输中出现的凸共轭（也称为 Legendre-Fenchel 共轭或 c 变换）。这种共轭被认为难以计算，并且在实践中，方法由于无法在连续空间中精确地共轭对偶势而受到限制。为了克服这个问题，共轭的计算可以通过摊销优化来近似，它学习一个模型来预测共轭。我证明，将共轭的摊余近似与求解器相结合进行微调，可以显着提高 Korotin 等人为 Wasserstein-2 基准学习的传输图的质量。 （2021a）并且能够对文献中考虑的许多二维耦合和流动进行建模。所有基线、方法和求解器均可在 http://github.com/facebookresearch/w2ot 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过摊销优化方法近似计算最优传输中的凸共轭，以提升Wasserstein-2运输映射的质量。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以在连续空间中精确计算最优传输的凸共轭，导致对偶势函数的近似效果受限。
AI.method: 结合摊销优化学习模型预测共轭，并通过求解器进行微调，以改进运输映射的生成。
AI.result: 该方法显著提升了Wasserstein-2基准的运输映射质量，并能有效建模多种二维耦合与流。
AI.conclusion: 摊销近似与求解器微调的结合为最优传输中的共轭计算提供了新方法，且所有实现代码已公开。

authors_text: Matthew Ho,Aditya Sharma,Justin Chang,Michael Saxon,Sharon Levy,Yujie Lu,William Yang Wang
title: WikiWhy: Answering and Explaining Cause-and-Effect Questions
title_zh: WikiWhy：回答和解释因果问题
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) grow larger and more sophisticated, assessing their "reasoning" capabilities in natural language grows more challenging. Recent question answering (QA) benchmarks that attempt to assess reasoning are often limited by a narrow scope of covered situations and subject matters. We introduce WikiWhy, a QA dataset built around a novel auxiliary task: explaining why an answer is true in natural language. WikiWhy contains over 9,000 "why" question-answer-rationale triples, grounded on Wikipedia facts across a diverse set of topics. Each rationale is a set of supporting statements connecting the question to the answer. WikiWhy serves as a benchmark for the reasoning capabilities of LLMs because it demands rigorous explicit rationales for each answer to demonstrate the acquisition of implicit commonsense knowledge, which is unlikely to be easily memorized. GPT-3 baselines achieve only 38.7% human-evaluated correctness in the end-to-end answer & explain condition, leaving significant room for future improvements.
summary: As large language models (LLMs) grow larger and more sophisticated, assessing their "reasoning" capabilities in natural language grows more challenging. Recent question answering (QA) benchmarks that attempt to assess reasoning are often limited by a narrow scope of covered situations and subject matters. We introduce WikiWhy, a QA dataset built around a novel auxiliary task: explaining why an answer is true in natural language. WikiWhy contains over 9,000 "why" question-answer-rationale triples, grounded on Wikipedia facts across a diverse set of topics. Each rationale is a set of supporting statements connecting the question to the answer. WikiWhy serves as a benchmark for the reasoning capabilities of LLMs because it demands rigorous explicit rationales for each answer to demonstrate the acquisition of implicit commonsense knowledge, which is unlikely to be easily memorized. GPT-3 baselines achieve only 38.7% human-evaluated correctness in the end-to-end answer & explain condition, leaving significant room for future improvements.
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 变得越来越大、越来越复杂，评估其自然语言的“推理”能力变得越来越具有挑战性。最近试图评估推理的问答 (QA) 基准通常受到所涵盖的情况和主题范围狭窄的限制。我们引入了 WikiWhy，这是一个围绕新颖的辅助任务构建的 QA 数据集：解释为什么用自然语言给出的答案是正确的。 WikiWhy 包含超过 9,000 个“为什么”问题-答案-基本原理三元组，基于跨不同主题的维基百科事实。每个理由都是一组将问题与答案连接起来的支持性陈述。 WikiWhy 是法学硕士推理能力的基准，因为它要求每个答案都有严格明确的理由，以证明获得了隐含的常识性知识，而这些知识不太容易被记住。 GPT-3 基线在端到端答案和解释条件下仅实现了 38.7% 的人工评估正确性，为未来的改进留下了巨大的空间。

AI.tldr: 构建WikiWhy数据集以评估大语言模型在因果推理任务中的能力，要求模型不仅给出答案还需提供自然语言解释。
AI.motivation: 现有问答基准测试覆盖范围有限，难以全面评估模型推理能力，尤其缺乏对隐式常识知识获取的测试。
AI.method: 基于维基百科事实创建包含9000+个'为什么'问题的数据集，每个样本包含问题、答案及连接问题与答案的支持性陈述作为解释。
AI.result: GPT-3在端到端回答与解释任务中仅达到38.7%的人类评估正确率，显示模型在该任务上仍有显著提升空间。
AI.conclusion: WikiWhy为评估模型推理能力提供了新基准，强调了显式解释对验证隐式常识知识获取的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 构建WikiWhy数据集以评估大语言模型在因果推理任务中的能力，要求模型不仅给出答案还需提供自然语言解释。

ai_content.result: GPT-3在端到端回答与解释任务中仅达到38.7%的人类评估正确率，显示模型在该任务上仍有显著提升空间。

search_text: WikiWhy: Answering and Explaining Cause-and-Effect Questions WikiWhy：回答和解释因果问题 As large language models (LLMs) grow larger and more sophisticated, assessing their "reasoning" capabilities in natural language grows more challenging. Recent question answering (QA) benchmarks that attempt to assess reasoning are often limited by a narrow scope of covered situations and subject matters. We introduce WikiWhy, a QA dataset built around a novel auxiliary task: explaining why an answer is true in natural language. WikiWhy contains over 9,000 "why" question-answer-rationale triples, grounded on Wikipedia facts across a diverse set of topics. Each rationale is a set of supporting statements connecting the question to the answer. WikiWhy serves as a benchmark for the reasoning capabilities of LLMs because it demands rigorous explicit rationales for each answer to demonstrate the acquisition of implicit commonsense knowledge, which is unlikely to be easily memorized. GPT-3 baselines achieve only 38.7% human-evaluated correctness in the end-to-end answer & explain condition, leaving significant room for future improvements. 随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 变得越来越大、越来越复杂，评估其自然语言的“推理”能力变得越来越具有挑战性。最近试图评估推理的问答 (QA) 基准通常受到所涵盖的情况和主题范围狭窄的限制。我们引入了 WikiWhy，这是一个围绕新颖的辅助任务构建的 QA 数据集：解释为什么用自然语言给出的答案是正确的。 WikiWhy 包含超过 9,000 个“为什么”问题-答案-基本原理三元组，基于跨不同主题的维基百科事实。每个理由都是一组将问题与答案连接起来的支持性陈述。 WikiWhy 是法学硕士推理能力的基准，因为它要求每个答案都有严格明确的理由，以证明获得了隐含的常识性知识，而这些知识不太容易被记住。 GPT-3 基线在端到端答案和解释条件下仅实现了 38.7% 的人工评估正确性，为未来的改进留下了巨大的空间。 构建WikiWhy数据集以评估大语言模型在因果推理任务中的能力，要求模型不仅给出答案还需提供自然语言解释。 Matthew Ho,Aditya Sharma,Justin Chang,Michael Saxon,Sharon Levy,Yujie Lu,William Yang Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Laurynas Karazija,Subhabrata Choudhury,Iro Laina,Christian Rupprecht,Andrea Vedaldi
title: Unsupervised Multi-object Segmentation by Predicting Probable Motion Patterns
title_zh: 通过预测可能的运动模式进行无监督多对象分割
abstract: We propose a new approach to learn to segment multiple image objects without manual supervision. The method can extract objects form still images, but uses videos for supervision. While prior works have considered motion for segmentation, a key insight is that, while motion can be used to identify objects, not all objects are necessarily in motion: the absence of motion does not imply the absence of objects. Hence, our model learns to predict image regions that are likely to contain motion patterns characteristic of objects moving rigidly. It does not predict specific motion, which cannot be done unambiguously from a still image, but a distribution of possible motions, which includes the possibility that an object does not move at all. We demonstrate the advantage of this approach over its deterministic counterpart and show state-of-the-art unsupervised object segmentation performance on simulated and real-world benchmarks, surpassing methods that use motion even at test time. As our approach is applicable to variety of network architectures that segment the scenes, we also apply it to existing image reconstruction-based models showing drastic improvement. Project page and code: https://www.robots.ox.ac.uk/~vgg/research/ppmp .
summary: We propose a new approach to learn to segment multiple image objects without manual supervision. The method can extract objects form still images, but uses videos for supervision. While prior works have considered motion for segmentation, a key insight is that, while motion can be used to identify objects, not all objects are necessarily in motion: the absence of motion does not imply the absence of objects. Hence, our model learns to predict image regions that are likely to contain motion patterns characteristic of objects moving rigidly. It does not predict specific motion, which cannot be done unambiguously from a still image, but a distribution of possible motions, which includes the possibility that an object does not move at all. We demonstrate the advantage of this approach over its deterministic counterpart and show state-of-the-art unsupervised object segmentation performance on simulated and real-world benchmarks, surpassing methods that use motion even at test time. As our approach is applicable to variety of network architectures that segment the scenes, we also apply it to existing image reconstruction-based models showing drastic improvement. Project page and code: https://www.robots.ox.ac.uk/~vgg/research/ppmp .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法来学习在没有人工监督的情况下分割多个图像对象。该方法可以从静态图像中提取对象，但使用视频进行监督。虽然之前的工作已经考虑了运动进行分割，但一个关键的见解是，虽然运动可以用来识别对象，但并非所有对象都一定在运动：不运动并不意味着不存在对象。因此，我们的模型学习预测可能包含刚性移动物体的运动模式特征的图像区域。它不预测特定的运动（这不能从静止图像中明确地完成），而是预测可能运动的分布，其中包括对象根本不运动的可能性。我们展示了这种方法相对于确定性方法的优势，并在模拟和现实世界基准上展示了最先进的无监督对象分割性能，甚至在测试时也超越了使用运动的方法。由于我们的方法适用于分割场景的各种网络架构，因此我们还将其应用于现有的基于图像重建的模型，显示出巨大的改进。项目页面和代码：https://www.robots.ox.ac.uk/~vgg/research/ppmp。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的多对象分割方法，通过预测视频中可能的运动模式来分割静态图像中的多个物体。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖运动信息进行分割，但静止物体无法通过运动识别。现有方法无法处理静止物体，因此需预测可能的运动分布以涵盖所有情况。
AI.method: 利用视频监督训练模型预测图像区域中可能出现的刚性运动模式分布，包含物体静止的可能性，而非直接预测确定性运动。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上达到最先进水平，优于使用运动信息的其他方法，且可显著提升现有图像重建模型的分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模运动分布解决了静止物体分割问题，具有通用性，可应用于多种分割网络架构并提升性能。

title: Target Aware Poisson-Gaussian Noise Parameters Estimation from Noisy Images
title_zh: 从噪声图像估计目标感知泊松高斯噪声参数
abstract: Digital sensors can lead to noisy results under many circumstances. To be able to remove the undesired noise from images, proper noise modeling and an accurate noise parameter estimation is crucial. In this project, we use a Poisson-Gaussian noise model for the raw-images captured by the sensor, as it fits the physical characteristics of the sensor closely. Moreover, we limit ourselves to the case where observed (noisy), and ground-truth (noise-free) image pairs are available. Using such pairs is beneficial for the noise estimation and is not widely studied in literature. Based on this model, we derive the theoretical maximum likelihood solution, discuss its practical implementation and optimization. Further, we propose two algorithms based on variance and cumulant statistics. Finally, we compare the results of our methods with two different approaches, a CNN we trained ourselves, and another one taken from literature. The comparison between all these methods shows that our algorithms outperform the others in terms of MSE and have good additional properties.
summary: Digital sensors can lead to noisy results under many circumstances. To be able to remove the undesired noise from images, proper noise modeling and an accurate noise parameter estimation is crucial. In this project, we use a Poisson-Gaussian noise model for the raw-images captured by the sensor, as it fits the physical characteristics of the sensor closely. Moreover, we limit ourselves to the case where observed (noisy), and ground-truth (noise-free) image pairs are available. Using such pairs is beneficial for the noise estimation and is not widely studied in literature. Based on this model, we derive the theoretical maximum likelihood solution, discuss its practical implementation and optimization. Further, we propose two algorithms based on variance and cumulant statistics. Finally, we compare the results of our methods with two different approaches, a CNN we trained ourselves, and another one taken from literature. The comparison between all these methods shows that our algorithms outperform the others in terms of MSE and have good additional properties.
abstract_zh: 在许多情况下，数字传感器可能会导致噪声结果。为了能够从图像中去除不需要的噪声，正确的噪声建模和准确的噪声参数估计至关重要。在这个项目中，我们对传感器捕获的原始图像使用泊松高斯噪声模型，因为它非常适合传感器的物理特性。此外，我们将自己限制在观察到的（有噪声的）图像和真实（无噪声）图像对可用的情况。使用此类对有利于噪声估计，并且在文献中并未得到广泛研究。基于该模型，我们推导了理论最大似然解，并讨论了其实际实现和优化。此外，我们提出了两种基于方差和累积统计的算法。最后，我们将我们的方法的结果与两种不同的方法进行比较，一种是我们自己训练的 CNN，另一种是取自文献的方法。所有这些方法之间的比较表明，我们的算法在 MSE 方面优于其他算法，并且具有良好的附加属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对原始图像的泊松-高斯噪声参数估计方法，利用有噪声图像与无噪声图像对进行建模与算法设计。
AI.motivation: 数字传感器在多种场景下会产生噪声，准确的噪声参数估计对图像去噪至关重要。现有研究较少利用有噪声与无噪声图像对进行参数估计，且泊松-高斯模型能更贴近传感器物理特性。
AI.method: 基于泊松-高斯噪声模型推导最大似然解，提出两种基于方差和累积量统计的算法，并与CNN方法及文献方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 所提算法在均方误差（MSE）指标上优于对比方法，且具有良好的附加特性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法在噪声参数估计任务中表现优异，为后续图像去噪提供了更精确的模型支持。

title: Explainability in autonomous pedagogically structured scenarios
title_zh: 自主教学结构场景中的可解释性
comment: Explainable Agency in Artificial Intelligence Workshop - 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: Explainable Agency in Artificial Intelligence Workshop - 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: We present the notion of explainability for decision-making processes in a pedagogically structured autonomous environment. Multi-agent systems that are structured pedagogically consist of pedagogical teachers and learners that operate in environments in which both are sometimes not fully aware of all the states in the environment and beliefs of other agents thus making it challenging to explain their decisions and actions with one another. This work emphasises the need for robust and iterative explanation-based communication between the pedagogical teacher and the learner. Explaining the rationale behind multi-agent decisions in an interactive, partially observable environment is necessary to build trustworthy and reliable communication between pedagogical teachers and learners. Ongoing research is primarily focused on explanations of the agents' behaviour towards humans, and there is a lack of research on inter-agent explainability.
summary: We present the notion of explainability for decision-making processes in a pedagogically structured autonomous environment. Multi-agent systems that are structured pedagogically consist of pedagogical teachers and learners that operate in environments in which both are sometimes not fully aware of all the states in the environment and beliefs of other agents thus making it challenging to explain their decisions and actions with one another. This work emphasises the need for robust and iterative explanation-based communication between the pedagogical teacher and the learner. Explaining the rationale behind multi-agent decisions in an interactive, partially observable environment is necessary to build trustworthy and reliable communication between pedagogical teachers and learners. Ongoing research is primarily focused on explanations of the agents' behaviour towards humans, and there is a lack of research on inter-agent explainability.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了在教学结构自主环境中决策过程的可解释性概念。在教学上构建的多智能体系统由教学教师和学习者组成，他们的环境有时并不完全了解环境中的所有状态和其他智能体的信念，因此很难相互解释他们的决定和行动。这项工作强调了教学教师和学习者之间需要进行强有力的、基于迭代解释的沟通。在交互式、部分可观察的环境中解释多智能体决策背后的基本原理对于在教学教师和学习者之间建立值得信赖和可靠的沟通是必要的。正在进行的研究主要集中在对智能体对人类行为的解释上，缺乏对智能体间可解释性的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了教育结构化自主环境中多智能体系统（教师与学习者）间决策可解释性问题，强调需建立稳健的交互式解释机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重智能体对人类的解释，而缺乏对多智能体间在部分可观测环境中的互解释机制研究，导致信任建立困难。
AI.method: 提出需通过迭代的、基于解释的通信框架，增强教师与学习者在不确定环境中的互信与协作。
AI.result: 指出现有研究的局限性，并论证了智能体间可解释性对构建可靠教育系统的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 未来需重点研究多智能体间的动态解释机制，以提升教育场景中自主系统的透明度与可信度。

authors_text: Marshall Mueller,Shuchin Aeron,James M. Murphy,Abiy Tasissa
title: Geometric Sparse Coding in Wasserstein Space
title_zh: Wasserstein 空间中的几何稀疏编码
abstract: Wasserstein dictionary learning is an unsupervised approach to learning a collection of probability distributions that generate observed distributions as Wasserstein barycentric combinations. Existing methods for Wasserstein dictionary learning optimize an objective that seeks a dictionary with sufficient representation capacity via barycentric interpolation to approximate the observed training data, but without imposing additional structural properties on the coefficients associated to the dictionary. This leads to dictionaries that densely represent the observed data, which makes interpretation of the coefficients challenging and may also lead to poor empirical performance when using the learned coefficients in downstream tasks. In contrast and motivated by sparse dictionary learning in Euclidean spaces, we propose a geometrically sparse regularizer for Wasserstein space that promotes representations of a data point using only nearby dictionary elements. We show this approach leads to sparse representations in Wasserstein space and addresses the problem of non-uniqueness of barycentric representation. Moreover, when data is generated as Wasserstein barycenters of fixed distributions, this regularizer facilitates the recovery of the generating distributions in cases that are ill-posed for unregularized Wasserstein dictionary learning. Through experimentation on synthetic and real data, we show that our geometrically regularized approach yields sparser and more interpretable dictionaries in Wasserstein space, which perform better in downstream applications.
summary: Wasserstein dictionary learning is an unsupervised approach to learning a collection of probability distributions that generate observed distributions as Wasserstein barycentric combinations. Existing methods for Wasserstein dictionary learning optimize an objective that seeks a dictionary with sufficient representation capacity via barycentric interpolation to approximate the observed training data, but without imposing additional structural properties on the coefficients associated to the dictionary. This leads to dictionaries that densely represent the observed data, which makes interpretation of the coefficients challenging and may also lead to poor empirical performance when using the learned coefficients in downstream tasks. In contrast and motivated by sparse dictionary learning in Euclidean spaces, we propose a geometrically sparse regularizer for Wasserstein space that promotes representations of a data point using only nearby dictionary elements. We show this approach leads to sparse representations in Wasserstein space and addresses the problem of non-uniqueness of barycentric representation. Moreover, when data is generated as Wasserstein barycenters of fixed distributions, this regularizer facilitates the recovery of the generating distributions in cases that are ill-posed for unregularized Wasserstein dictionary learning. Through experimentation on synthetic and real data, we show that our geometrically regularized approach yields sparser and more interpretable dictionaries in Wasserstein space, which perform better in downstream applications.
abstract_zh: Wasserstein 字典学习是一种无监督方法，用于学习概率分布集合，这些概率分布生成作为 Wasserstein 重心组合的观察到的分布。 Wasserstein 字典学习的现有方法优化了一个目标，即通过重心插值寻找具有足够表示能力的字典来近似观察到的训练数据，但不会对与字典相关的系数强加额外的结构属性。这导致字典密集地表示观察到的数据，这使得系数的解释具有挑战性，并且在下游任务中使用学习到的系数时还可能导致较差的经验性能。相比之下，受欧几里得空间中稀疏字典学习的启发，我们提出了 Wasserstein 空间的几何稀疏正则化器，它仅使用附近的字典元素来促进数据点的表示。我们证明这种方法会导致 Wasserstein 空间中的稀疏表示，并解决重心表示的非唯一性问题。此外，当数据生成为固定分布的 Wasserstein 重心时，该正则化器有助于在不适合非正则化 Wasserstein 字典学习的情况下恢复生成分布。通过对合成数据和真实数据的实验，我们表明，我们的几何正则化方法在 Wasserstein 空间中产生更稀疏且更可解释的字典，这在下游应用中表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在Wasserstein空间中引入几何稀疏正则化的字典学习方法，以生成更稀疏且可解释的分布表示。
AI.motivation: 现有Wasserstein字典学习方法未对字典系数施加结构约束，导致表示密集、可解释性差且下游任务表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计几何稀疏正则化项，强制数据点仅通过邻近字典元素表示，解决巴氏中心表示的非唯一性问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成与真实数据上生成更稀疏、可解释的字典，且在下游任务中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 几何稀疏正则化有效提升了Wasserstein字典学习的表示能力与实用性，尤其在病态问题中可恢复生成分布。

Existing methods for Wasserstein dictionary learning optimize an objective that seeks a dictionary with sufficient representation capacity via barycentric interpolation to approximate the observed training data, but without imposing additional structural properties on the coefficients associated to the dictionary. authors_text: Pranay Dighe,Prateeth Nayak,Oggi Rudovic,Erik Marchi,Xiaochuan Niu,Ahmed Tewfik
title: Audio-to-Intent Using Acoustic-Textual Subword Representations from End-to-End ASR
title_zh: 使用端到端 ASR 的声学文本子词表示进行音频到意图
abstract: Accurate prediction of the user intent to interact with a voice assistant (VA) on a device (e.g. on the phone) is critical for achieving naturalistic, engaging, and privacy-centric interactions with the VA. To this end, we present a novel approach to predict the user's intent (the user speaking to the device or not) directly from acoustic and textual information encoded at subword tokens which are obtained via an end-to-end ASR model. Modeling directly the subword tokens, compared to modeling of the phonemes and/or full words, has at least two advantages: (i) it provides a unique vocabulary representation, where each token has a semantic meaning, in contrast to the phoneme-level representations, (ii) each subword token has a reusable "sub"-word acoustic pattern (that can be used to construct multiple full words), resulting in a largely reduced vocabulary space than of the full words. To learn the subword representations for the audio-to-intent classification, we extract: (i) acoustic information from an E2E-ASR model, which provides frame-level CTC posterior probabilities for the subword tokens, and (ii) textual information from a pre-trained continuous bag-of-words model capturing the semantic meaning of the subword tokens. The key to our approach is the way it combines acoustic subword-level posteriors with text information using the notion of positional-encoding in order to account for multiple ASR hypotheses simultaneously. We show that our approach provides more robust and richer representations for audio-to-intent classification, and is highly accurate with correctly mitigating 93.3% of unintended user audio from invoking the smart assistant at 99% true positive rate.
summary: Accurate prediction of the user intent to interact with a voice assistant (VA) on a device (e.g. on the phone) is critical for achieving naturalistic, engaging, and privacy-centric interactions with the VA. To this end, we present a novel approach to predict the user's intent (the user speaking to the device or not) directly from acoustic and textual information encoded at subword tokens which are obtained via an end-to-end ASR model. Modeling directly the subword tokens, compared to modeling of the phonemes and/or full words, has at least two advantages: (i) it provides a unique vocabulary representation, where each token has a semantic meaning, in contrast to the phoneme-level representations, (ii) each subword token has a reusable "sub"-word acoustic pattern (that can be used to construct multiple full words), resulting in a largely reduced vocabulary space than of the full words. To learn the subword representations for the audio-to-intent classification, we extract: (i) acoustic information from an E2E-ASR model, which provides frame-level CTC posterior probabilities for the subword tokens, and (ii) textual information from a pre-trained continuous bag-of-words model capturing the semantic meaning of the subword tokens. The key to our approach is the way it combines acoustic subword-level posteriors with text information using the notion of positional-encoding in order to account for multiple ASR hypotheses simultaneously. We show that our approach provides more robust and richer representations for audio-to-intent classification, and is highly accurate with correctly mitigating 93.3% of unintended user audio from invoking the smart assistant at 99% true positive rate.
abstract_zh: 准确预测用户与设备（例如电话）上的语音助手 (VA) 交互的意图对于与 VA 实现自然、有吸引力且以隐私为中心的交互至关重要。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以直接根据通过端到端 ASR 模型获得的子词标记中编码的声音和文本信息来预测用户的意图（用户是否与设备说话）。与音素和/或完整单词的建模相比，直接对子词标记进行建模至少有两个优点：（i）它提供了独特的词汇表示，其中与音素级表示相比，每个标记都具有语义含义，（ii）每个子词标记具有可重用的“子”词声学模式（可用于构造多个完整单词），从而导致比完整单词大大减少的词汇空间。为了学习音频到意图分类的子词表示，我们提取：（i）来自 E2E-ASR 模型的声学信息，该模型为子词标记提供帧级 CTC 后验概率，以及（ii）来自预训练的连续词袋模型的文本信息，捕获子词标记的语义。我们方法的关键是它使用位置编码的概念将声学子字级后验与文本信息相结合，以便同时考虑多个 ASR 假设。我们表明，我们的方法为音频到意图分类提供了更强大、更丰富的表示，并且高度准确，以 99% 的真阳性率正确减少了 93.3% 的无意用户音频因调用智能助手而产生的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于端到端ASR模型的子词表示方法，直接从声学和文本信息预测用户语音助手交互意图。
AI.motivation: 准确预测用户意图对实现自然且隐私保护的语音助手交互至关重要，传统方法存在误触发和隐私风险，需更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合端到端ASR的子词级声学特征（CTC后验概率）与预训练词袋模型的语义信息，通过位置编码融合多假设ASR结果生成联合表示。
AI.result: 方法在99%真阳性率下有效抑制93.3%的非意图音频触发，显著提升音频到意图分类的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 子词级声学-文本联合建模为语音助手意图识别提供了高效且隐私友好的新范式，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于端到端ASR模型的子词表示方法，直接从声学和文本信息预测用户语音助手交互意图。
ai_content.motivation: 准确预测用户意图对实现自然且隐私保护的语音助手交互至关重要，传统方法存在误触发和隐私风险，需更稳健的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 结合端到端ASR的子词级声学特征（CTC后验概率）与预训练词袋模型的语义信息，通过位置编码融合多假设ASR结果生成联合表示。
ai_content.result: 方法在99%真阳性率下有效抑制93.3%的非意图音频触发，显著提升音频到意图分类的鲁棒性与准确性。
ai_content.conclusion: 子词级声学-文本联合建模为语音助手意图识别提供了高效且隐私友好的新范式，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Audio-to-Intent Using Acoustic-Textual Subword Representations from End-to-End ASR 使用端到端 ASR 的声学文本子词表示进行音频到意图 Accurate prediction of the user intent to interact with a voice assistant (VA) on a device (e.g. on the phone) is critical for achieving naturalistic, engaging, and privacy-centric interactions with the VA. To this end, we present a novel approach to predict the user's intent (the user speaking to the device or not) directly from acoustic and textual information encoded at subword tokens which are obtained via an end-to-end ASR model. Modeling directly the subword tokens, compared to modeling of the phonemes and/or full words, has at least two advantages: (i) it provides a unique vocabulary representation, where each token has a semantic meaning, in contrast to the phoneme-level representations, (ii) each subword token has a reusable "sub"-word acoustic pattern (that can be used to construct multiple full words), resulting in a largely reduced vocabulary space than of the full words. To learn the subword representations for the audio-to-intent classification, we extract: (i) acoustic information from an E2E-ASR model, which provides frame-level CTC posterior probabilities for the subword tokens, and (ii) textual information from a pre-trained continuous bag-of-words model capturing the semantic meaning of the subword tokens. The key to our approach is the way it combines acoustic subword-level posteriors with text information using the notion of positional-encoding in order to account for multiple ASR hypotheses simultaneously. We show that our approach provides more robust and richer representations for audio-to-intent classification, and is highly accurate with correctly mitigating 93.3% of unintended user audio from invoking the smart assistant at 99% true positive rate. 准确预测用户与设备（例如电话）上的语音助手 (VA) 交互的意图对于与 VA 实现自然、有吸引力且以隐私为中心的交互至关重要。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以直接根据通过端到端 ASR 模型获得的子词标记中编码的声音和文本信息来预测用户的意图（用户是否与设备说话）。与音素和/或完整单词的建模相比，直接对子词标记进行建模至少有两个优点：（i）它提供了独特的词汇表示，其中与音素级表示相比，每个标记都具有语义含义，（ii）每个子词标记具有可重用的“子”词声学模式（可用于构造多个完整单词），从而导致比完整单词大大减少的词汇空间。为了学习音频到意图分类的子词表示，我们提取：（i）来自 E2E-ASR 模型的声学信息，该模型为子词标记提供帧级 CTC 后验概率，以及（ii）来自预训练的连续词袋模型的文本信息，捕获子词标记的语义。我们方法的关键是它使用位置编码的概念将声学子字级后验与文本信息相结合，以便同时考虑多个 ASR 假设。我们表明，我们的方法为音频到意图分类提供了更强大、更丰富的表示，并且高度准确，以 99% 的真阳性率正确减少了 93.3% 的无意用户音频因调用智能助手而产生的情况。 本文提出一种基于端到端ASR模型的子词表示方法，直接从声学和文本信息预测用户语音助手交互意图。 Pranay Dighe,Prateeth Nayak,Oggi Rudovic,Erik Marchi,Xiaochuan Niu,Ahmed Tewfik cs.CL,cs.HC,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Valts Blukis,Taeyeop Lee,Jonathan Tremblay,Bowen Wen,In So Kweon,Kuk-Jin Yoon,Dieter Fox,Stan Birchfield
title: One-Shot Neural Fields for 3D Object Understanding
title_zh: 用于 3D 对象理解的一次性神经场
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop (CVPRW) on XRNeRF: Advances in NeRF for the Metaverse 2023
comments: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop (CVPRW) on XRNeRF: Advances in NeRF for the Metaverse 2023
abstract: We present a unified and compact scene representation for robotics, where each object in the scene is depicted by a latent code capturing geometry and appearance. This representation can be decoded for various tasks such as novel view rendering, 3D reconstruction (e.g. recovering depth, point clouds, or voxel maps), collision checking, and stable grasp prediction. We build our representation from a single RGB input image at test time by leveraging recent advances in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) that learn category-level priors on large multiview datasets, then fine-tune on novel objects from one or few views. We expand the NeRF model for additional grasp outputs and explore ways to leverage this representation for robotics. At test-time, we build the representation from a single RGB input image observing the scene from only one viewpoint. We find that the recovered representation allows rendering from novel views, including of occluded object parts, and also for predicting successful stable grasps. Grasp poses can be directly decoded from our latent representation with an implicit grasp decoder. We experimented in both simulation and real world and demonstrated the capability for robust robotic grasping using such compact representation. Website: https://nerfgrasp.github.io
summary: We present a unified and compact scene representation for robotics, where each object in the scene is depicted by a latent code capturing geometry and appearance. This representation can be decoded for various tasks such as novel view rendering, 3D reconstruction (e.g. recovering depth, point clouds, or voxel maps), collision checking, and stable grasp prediction. We build our representation from a single RGB input image at test time by leveraging recent advances in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) that learn category-level priors on large multiview datasets, then fine-tune on novel objects from one or few views. We expand the NeRF model for additional grasp outputs and explore ways to leverage this representation for robotics. At test-time, we build the representation from a single RGB input image observing the scene from only one viewpoint. We find that the recovered representation allows rendering from novel views, including of occluded object parts, and also for predicting successful stable grasps. Grasp poses can be directly decoded from our latent representation with an implicit grasp decoder. We experimented in both simulation and real world and demonstrated the capability for robust robotic grasping using such compact representation. Website: https://nerfgrasp.github.io
abstract_zh: 我们为机器人技术提供了一个统一且紧凑的场景表示，其中场景中的每个对象都由捕获几何和外观的潜在代码来描述。该表示可以针对各种任务进行解码，例如新视图渲染、3D 重建（例如恢复深度、点云或体素图）、碰撞检查和稳定抓取预测。我们在测试时利用神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的最新进展，从单个 RGB 输入图像构建表示，神经辐射场 (NeRF) 在大型多视图数据集上学习类别级先验，然后从一个或几个视图对新对象进行微调。我们扩展 NeRF 模型以获得额外的抓取输出，并探索如何利用这种表示形式来实现机器人技术。在测试时，我们从单个 RGB 输入图像构建表示，仅从一个视点观察场景。我们发现恢复的表示允许从新颖的视图进行渲染，包括被遮挡的对象部分，并且还可以预测成功的稳定抓取。抓取姿势可以使用隐式抓取解码器从我们的潜在表示中直接解码。我们在模拟和现实世界中进行了实验，并展示了使用这种紧凑表示的强大机器人抓取能力。网站：https://nerfgrasp.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张RGB图像的紧凑场景表示方法，用于机器人3D物体理解，能够完成新视角渲染、3D重建和稳定抓取预测等任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在机器人视觉任务中需要大量数据和复杂模型，而实际场景中常面临数据稀缺和实时性需求，需开发高效且通用的3D表示方法。
AI.method: 扩展神经辐射场（NeRF）模型，通过单视角RGB图像生成物体的潜在编码，结合类别先验知识和少量视角微调，并引入隐式抓取解码器预测稳定抓取位姿。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中验证了方法有效性，能够从单张图像恢复被遮挡物体部分的渲染效果，并准确预测成功抓取位姿。
AI.conclusion: 该紧凑表示方法为机器人提供了多任务处理能力，在单视角输入下实现了鲁棒的3D理解与抓取规划。

title: Pedestrian Emergency Braking in Ten Weeks
title_zh: 十周内的行人紧急制动
abstract: In the last decade, research in the field of autonomous vehicles has grown immensely, and there is a wealth of information available for researchers to rapidly establish an autonomous vehicle platform for basic maneuvers. In this paper, we design, implement, and test, in ten weeks, a PD approach to longitudinal control for pedestrian emergency braking. We also propose a lateral controller with a similar design for future testing in lane following. Using widely available tools, we demonstrate the safety of the vehicle in pedestrian emergency braking scenarios.
summary: In the last decade, research in the field of autonomous vehicles has grown immensely, and there is a wealth of information available for researchers to rapidly establish an autonomous vehicle platform for basic maneuvers. In this paper, we design, implement, and test, in ten weeks, a PD approach to longitudinal control for pedestrian emergency braking. We also propose a lateral controller with a similar design for future testing in lane following. Using widely available tools, we demonstrate the safety of the vehicle in pedestrian emergency braking scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，自动驾驶汽车领域的研究取得了巨大的发展，并且有大量信息可供研究人员快速建立用于基本操作的自动驾驶汽车平台。在本文中，我们在十周内设计、实施和测试了一种行人紧急制动纵向控制的 PD 方法。我们还提出了一种具有类似设计的横向控制器，用于未来的车道跟踪测试。使用广泛使用的工具，我们演示了车辆在行人紧急制动场景中的安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文在十周内设计并测试了一种基于PD方法的纵向控制策略，用于自动驾驶车辆的行人紧急制动场景，并提出横向控制器用于未来车道跟随测试。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术快速发展，亟需快速验证基础控制策略的安全性，特别是针对行人紧急制动等关键场景的纵向控制方法。
AI.method: 采用PD控制方法设计纵向控制器，通过广泛可用的工具进行仿真与实测，并提出类似架构的横向控制器以支持后续车道保持测试。
AI.result: 成功验证了PD控制方法在行人紧急制动场景中的安全性与有效性，为自动驾驶系统提供了可快速部署的控制方案。
AI.conclusion: 在短时间内完成了紧急制动控制系统的开发与验证，证明PD方法适用于自动驾驶基础控制，横向控制器设计为后续研究奠定基础。
