conclusion: 在短时间内完成了紧急制动控制系统的开发与验证，证明PD方法适用于自动驾驶基础控制，横向控制器设计为后续研究奠定基础。
search_text: Pedestrian Emergency Braking in Ten Weeks 十周内的行人紧急制动 In the last decade, research in the field of autonomous vehicles has grown immensely, and there is a wealth of information available for researchers to rapidly establish an autonomous vehicle platform for basic maneuvers. In this paper, we design, implement, and test, in ten weeks, a PD approach to longitudinal control for pedestrian emergency braking. We also propose a lateral controller with a similar design for future testing in lane following. Using widely available tools, we demonstrate the safety of the vehicle in pedestrian emergency braking scenarios. 在过去的十年中，自动驾驶汽车领域的研究取得了巨大的发展，并且有大量信息可供研究人员快速建立用于基本操作的自动驾驶汽车平台。在本文中，我们在十周内设计、实施和测试了一种行人紧急制动纵向控制的 PD 方法。我们还提出了一种具有类似设计的横向控制器，用于未来的车道跟踪测试。使用广泛使用的工具，我们演示了车辆在行人紧急制动场景中的安全性。 本文在十周内设计并测试了一种基于PD方法的纵向控制策略，用于自动驾驶车辆的行人紧急制动场景，并提出横向控制器用于未来车道跟随测试。 Steven Nguyen,Zillur Rahman,Brendan Tan Morris cs.RO

title: Modelling Control Arguments via Cooperation Logic in Unforeseen Scenarios
title_zh: 在不可预见的场景中通过合作逻辑对控制参数进行建模
comment: Thinking Fast and Slow in AI - AAAI 2022 Fall Symposium Series
comments: Thinking Fast and Slow in AI - AAAI 2022 Fall Symposium Series
abstract: The intent of control argumentation frameworks is to specifically model strategic scenarios from the perspective of an agent by extending the standard model of argumentation framework in a way that takes unquantified uncertainty regarding arguments and attacks into account. They do not, however, adequately account for coalition formation and interactions among a set of agents in an uncertain environment. To address this challenge, we propose a formalism of a multi-agent scenario via cooperation logic and investigate agents' strategies and actions in a dynamic environment.
summary: The intent of control argumentation frameworks is to specifically model strategic scenarios from the perspective of an agent by extending the standard model of argumentation framework in a way that takes unquantified uncertainty regarding arguments and attacks into account. They do not, however, adequately account for coalition formation and interactions among a set of agents in an uncertain environment. To address this challenge, we propose a formalism of a multi-agent scenario via cooperation logic and investigate agents' strategies and actions in a dynamic environment.
abstract_zh: 控制论证框架的目的是通过扩展论证框架的标准模型，从代理的角度专门建模战略场景，并考虑到关于论证和攻击的未量化的不确定性。然而，它们并没有充分考虑不确定环境中一组主体之间的联盟形成和相互作用。为了应对这一挑战，我们通过合作逻辑提出了多智能体场景的形式主义，并研究智能体在动态环境中的策略和行为。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过合作逻辑建模多智能体在不可预见场景中的控制论点，解决现有框架对联盟形成和不确定环境交互不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有控制论辩框架无法有效处理多智能体在不确定环境中的联盟形成及动态交互问题，需新方法应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 提出基于合作逻辑的多智能体场景形式化方法，结合动态环境分析智能体策略与行动。
AI.result: 构建了考虑不确定性的合作逻辑模型，能够有效表征多智能体联盟形成与交互机制。
AI.conclusion: 合作逻辑为处理不确定环境下的多智能体控制论点提供了新框架，拓展了传统论辩模型的应用边界。

authors_text: Pouria Rouzrokh,Bardia Khosravi,Shahriar Faghani,Mana Moassefi,Sanaz Vahdati,Bradley J. Erickson
title: Multitask Brain Tumor Inpainting with Diffusion Models: A Methodological Report
title_zh: 使用扩散模型进行多任务脑肿瘤修复：方法报告
abstract: Despite the ever-increasing interest in applying deep learning (DL) models to medical imaging, the typical scarcity and imbalance of medical datasets can severely impact the performance of DL models. The generation of synthetic data that might be freely shared without compromising patient privacy is a well-known technique for addressing these difficulties. Inpainting algorithms are a subset of DL generative models that can alter one or more regions of an input image while matching its surrounding context and, in certain cases, non-imaging input conditions. Although the majority of inpainting techniques for medical imaging data use generative adversarial networks (GANs), the performance of these algorithms is frequently suboptimal due to their limited output variety, a problem that is already well-known for GANs. Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) are a recently introduced family of generative networks that can generate results of comparable quality to GANs, but with diverse outputs. In this paper, we describe a DDPM to execute multiple inpainting tasks on 2D axial slices of brain MRI with various sequences, and present proof-of-concept examples of its performance in a variety of evaluation scenarios. Our model and a public online interface to try our tool are available at: https://github.com/Mayo-Radiology-Informatics-Lab/MBTI
summary: Despite the ever-increasing interest in applying deep learning (DL) models to medical imaging, the typical scarcity and imbalance of medical datasets can severely impact the performance of DL models. The generation of synthetic data that might be freely shared without compromising patient privacy is a well-known technique for addressing these difficulties. Inpainting algorithms are a subset of DL generative models that can alter one or more regions of an input image while matching its surrounding context and, in certain cases, non-imaging input conditions. Although the majority of inpainting techniques for medical imaging data use generative adversarial networks (GANs), the performance of these algorithms is frequently suboptimal due to their limited output variety, a problem that is already well-known for GANs. Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) are a recently introduced family of generative networks that can generate results of comparable quality to GANs, but with diverse outputs. In this paper, we describe a DDPM to execute multiple inpainting tasks on 2D axial slices of brain MRI with various sequences, and present proof-of-concept examples of its performance in a variety of evaluation scenarios. Our model and a public online interface to try our tool are available at: https://github.com/Mayo-Radiology-Informatics-Lab/MBTI
abstract_zh: 尽管人们对将深度学习 (DL) 模型应用于医学成像的兴趣日益浓厚，但医学数据集典型的稀缺性和不平衡性可能会严重影响 DL 模型的性能。生成可以自由共享而不损害患者隐私的合成数据是解决这些困难的众所周知的技术。修复算法是深度学习生成模型的一个子集，它可以改变输入图像的一个或多个区域，同时匹配其周围的上下文，在某些情况下，还可以匹配非成像输入条件。尽管大多数医学成像数据修复技术都使用生成对抗网络 (GAN)，但由于输出种类有限，这些算法的性能常常不是最优的，这对于 GAN 来说已经是众所周知的问题。去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 是最近推出的生成网络系列，可以生成与 GAN 质量相当的结果，但输出不同。在本文中，我们描述了一种 DDPM，用于在具有各种序列的脑 MRI 的 2D 轴向切片上执行多个修复任务，并提供其在各种评估场景中性能的概念验证示例。我们的模型和用于试用我们工具的公共在线界面可在以下位置找到：https://github.com/Mayo-Radiology-Informatics-Lab/MBTI

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的多任务脑肿瘤MRI图像修复方法，用于生成合成医学数据以解决医疗数据稀缺和不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像数据集通常存在稀缺性和不平衡性，限制了深度学习模型性能。传统生成对抗网络（GANs）修复方法存在输出多样性不足的问题，而扩散概率模型（DDPMs）能生成高质量且多样的结果。
AI.method: 采用去噪扩散概率模型（DDPMs）对2D轴向脑部MRI图像进行多任务修复，支持不同序列的图像生成，并通过公开在线接口验证效果。
AI.result: 在多种评估场景中证明了该模型的有效性，生成结果在质量与多样性上优于传统GANs方法。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型为医疗图像修复提供了可行方案，其开源工具可促进医学影像研究的协作与隐私保护。

title: Describing Sets of Images with Textual-PCA
title_zh: 使用文本 PCA 描述图像集
abstract: We seek to semantically describe a set of images, capturing both the attributes of single images and the variations within the set. Our procedure is analogous to Principle Component Analysis, in which the role of projection vectors is replaced with generated phrases. First, a centroid phrase that has the largest average semantic similarity to the images in the set is generated, where both the computation of the similarity and the generation are based on pretrained vision-language models. Then, the phrase that generates the highest variation among the similarity scores is generated, using the same models. The next phrase maximizes the variance subject to being orthogonal, in the latent space, to the highest-variance phrase, and the process continues. Our experiments show that our method is able to convincingly capture the essence of image sets and describe the individual elements in a semantically meaningful way within the context of the entire set. Our code is available at: https://github.com/OdedH/textual-pca.
summary: We seek to semantically describe a set of images, capturing both the attributes of single images and the variations within the set. Our procedure is analogous to Principle Component Analysis, in which the role of projection vectors is replaced with generated phrases. First, a centroid phrase that has the largest average semantic similarity to the images in the set is generated, where both the computation of the similarity and the generation are based on pretrained vision-language models. Then, the phrase that generates the highest variation among the similarity scores is generated, using the same models. The next phrase maximizes the variance subject to being orthogonal, in the latent space, to the highest-variance phrase, and the process continues. Our experiments show that our method is able to convincingly capture the essence of image sets and describe the individual elements in a semantically meaningful way within the context of the entire set. Our code is available at: https://github.com/OdedH/textual-pca.
abstract_zh: 我们试图从语义上描述一组图像，捕获单个图像的属性和图像组内的变化。我们的过程类似于主成分分析，其中投影向量的作用被生成的短语取代。首先，生成与集合中的图像具有最大平均语义相似度的质心短语，其中相似度的计算和生成都是基于预训练的视觉语言模型。然后，使用相同的模型生成在相似性分数中产生最高变化的短语。下一个短语在潜在空间中最大化与最高方差短语正交的方差，并且该过程继续。我们的实验表明，我们的方法能够令人信服地捕捉图像集的本质，并在整个图像集的上下文中以语义上有意义的方式描述各个元素。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/OdedH/textual-pca。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本的主成分分析方法，用于生成描述图像集合的语义化文本，同时捕捉单张图像属性及集合内变化。
AI.motivation: 传统PCA难以直接生成可解释的文本描述，且无法同时表征图像集合的整体特征与个体差异，需结合视觉-语言模型实现语义化描述。
AI.method: 通过预训练视觉-语言模型生成中心短语（最大平均语义相似度），依次生成正交的高方差短语，构建类似PCA的文本特征空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效捕捉图像集合的核心语义，并在集合上下文中对单张图像进行有意义的描述。
AI.conclusion: 文本PCA为图像集合分析提供了新的可解释方法，结合了传统PCA的统计特性与自然语言描述的可理解性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本的主成分分析方法，用于生成描述图像集合的语义化文本，同时捕捉单张图像属性及集合内变化。
ai_content.motivation: 传统PCA难以直接生成可解释的文本描述，且无法同时表征图像集合的整体特征与个体差异，需结合视觉-语言模型实现语义化描述。
ai_content.method: 通过预训练视觉-语言模型生成中心短语（最大平均语义相似度），依次生成正交的高方差短语，构建类似PCA的文本特征空间。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法能有效捕捉图像集合的核心语义，并在集合上下文中对单张图像进行有意义的描述。
ai_content.conclusion: 文本PCA为图像集合分析提供了新的可解释方法，结合了传统PCA的统计特性与自然语言描述的可理解性。

search_text: Describing Sets of Images with Textual-PCA 使用文本 PCA 描述图像集 We seek to semantically describe a set of images, capturing both the attributes of single images and the variations within the set. Our procedure is analogous to Principle Component Analysis, in which the role of projection vectors is replaced with generated phrases. First, a centroid phrase that has the largest average semantic similarity to the images in the set is generated, where both the computation of the similarity and the generation are based on pretrained vision-language models. Then, the phrase that generates the highest variation among the similarity scores is generated, using the same models. The next phrase maximizes the variance subject to being orthogonal, in the latent space, to the highest-variance phrase, and the process continues. Our experiments show that our method is able to convincingly capture the essence of image sets and describe the individual elements in a semantically meaningful way within the context of the entire set. Our code is available at: https://github.com/OdedH/textual-pca. 我们试图从语义上描述一组图像，捕获单个图像的属性和图像组内的变化。我们的过程类似于主成分分析，其中投影向量的作用被生成的短语取代。首先，生成与集合中的图像具有最大平均语义相似度的质心短语，其中相似度的计算和生成都是基于预训练的视觉语言模型。然后，使用相同的模型生成在相似性分数中产生最高变化的短语。下一个短语在潜在空间中最大化与最高方差短语正交的方差，并且该过程继续。我们的实验表明，我们的方法能够令人信服地捕捉图像集的本质，并在整个图像集的上下文中以语义上有意义的方式描述各个元素。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/OdedH/textual-pca。 本文提出一种基于文本的主成分分析方法，用于生成描述图像集合的语义化文本，同时捕捉单张图像属性及集合内变化。 Oded Hupert,Idan Schwartz,Lior Wolf cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Adversarial Permutation Invariant Training for Universal Sound Separation
title_zh: 通用声音分离的对抗性排列不变训练
comment: Demo page: http://jordipons.me/apps/adversarialPIT/, Accepted at ICASSP-23
comments: Demo page: http://jordipons.me/apps/adversarialPIT/, Accepted at ICASSP-23
abstract: Universal sound separation consists of separating mixes with arbitrary sounds of different types, and permutation invariant training (PIT) is used to train source agnostic models that do so. In this work, we complement PIT with adversarial losses but find it challenging with the standard formulation used in speech source separation. We overcome this challenge with a novel I-replacement context-based adversarial loss, and by training with multiple discriminators. Our experiments show that by simply improving the loss (keeping the same model and dataset) we obtain a non-negligible improvement of 1.4 dB SI-SNRi in the reverberant FUSS dataset. We also find adversarial PIT to be effective at reducing spectral holes, ubiquitous in mask-based separation models, which highlights the potential relevance of adversarial losses for source separation.
summary: Universal sound separation consists of separating mixes with arbitrary sounds of different types, and permutation invariant training (PIT) is used to train source agnostic models that do so. In this work, we complement PIT with adversarial losses but find it challenging with the standard formulation used in speech source separation. We overcome this challenge with a novel I-replacement context-based adversarial loss, and by training with multiple discriminators. Our experiments show that by simply improving the loss (keeping the same model and dataset) we obtain a non-negligible improvement of 1.4 dB SI-SNRi in the reverberant FUSS dataset. We also find adversarial PIT to be effective at reducing spectral holes, ubiquitous in mask-based separation models, which highlights the potential relevance of adversarial losses for source separation.
abstract_zh: 通用声音分离包括分离具有不同类型的任意声音的混音，并且排列不变训练（PIT）用于训练这样做的源不可知模型。在这项工作中，我们用对抗性损失来补充 PIT，但发现它对语音源分离中使用的标准公式具有挑战性。我们通过一种新颖的基于 I 替换上下文的对抗性损失以及通过使用多个判别器进行训练来克服这一挑战。我们的实验表明，通过简单地改进损耗（保持相同的模型和数据集），我们在混响 FUSS 数据集中获得了 1.4 dB SI-SNRi 的不可忽视的改进。我们还发现对抗性 PIT 可以有效减少光谱空洞，这在基于掩模的分离模型中普遍存在，这凸显了对抗性损失对于源分离的潜在相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对抗损失的置换不变训练方法，用于提升通用声音分离的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统置换不变训练（PIT）在处理复杂声学场景时存在局限，尤其在语音源分离任务中难以有效优化对抗性目标。
AI.method: 设计基于I-replacement上下文的对抗损失函数，并引入多判别器协同训练框架以增强模型区分能力。
AI.result: 在FUSS数据集上实现1.4dB SI-SNRi性能提升，显著减少基于掩码的分离模型中常见的频谱孔洞现象。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性损失机制为声音分离任务提供了新的优化方向，尤其在提升分离完整性和鲁棒性方面展现潜力。

In this work, we complement PIT with adversarial losses but find it challenging with the standard formulation used in speech source separation. Our experiments show that by simply improving the loss (keeping the same model and dataset) we obtain a non-negligible improvement of 1.4 dB SI-SNRi in the reverberant FUSS dataset. authors_text: Lorenzo Luzi,Paul M Mayer,Josue Casco-Rodriguez,Ali Siahkoohi,Richard G. Baraniuk
title: Boomerang: Local sampling on image manifolds using diffusion models
title_zh: Boomerang：使用扩散模型对图像流形进行局部采样
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
abstract: The inference stage of diffusion models can be seen as running a reverse-time diffusion stochastic differential equation, where samples from a Gaussian latent distribution are transformed into samples from a target distribution that usually reside on a low-dimensional manifold, e.g., an image manifold. The intermediate values between the initial latent space and the image manifold can be interpreted as noisy images, with the amount of noise determined by the forward diffusion process noise schedule. We utilize this interpretation to present Boomerang, an approach for local sampling of image manifolds. As implied by its name, Boomerang local sampling involves adding noise to an input image, moving it closer to the latent space, and then mapping it back to the image manifold through a partial reverse diffusion process. Thus, Boomerang generates images on the manifold that are ``similar,'' but nonidentical, to the original input image. We can control the proximity of the generated images to the original by adjusting the amount of noise added. Furthermore, due to the stochastic nature of the reverse diffusion process in Boomerang, the generated images display a certain degree of stochasticity, allowing us to obtain local samples from the manifold without encountering any duplicates. Boomerang offers the flexibility to work seamlessly with any pretrained diffusion model, such as Stable Diffusion, without necessitating any adjustments to the reverse diffusion process. We present three applications for Boomerang. First, we provide a framework for constructing privacy-preserving datasets having controllable degrees of anonymity. Second, we show that using Boomerang for data augmentation increases generalization performance and outperforms state-of-the-art synthetic data augmentation. Lastly, we introduce a perceptual image enhancement framework, which enables resolution enhancement.
summary: The inference stage of diffusion models can be seen as running a reverse-time diffusion stochastic differential equation, where samples from a Gaussian latent distribution are transformed into samples from a target distribution that usually reside on a low-dimensional manifold, e.g., an image manifold. The intermediate values between the initial latent space and the image manifold can be interpreted as noisy images, with the amount of noise determined by the forward diffusion process noise schedule. We utilize this interpretation to present Boomerang, an approach for local sampling of image manifolds. As implied by its name, Boomerang local sampling involves adding noise to an input image, moving it closer to the latent space, and then mapping it back to the image manifold through a partial reverse diffusion process. Thus, Boomerang generates images on the manifold that are ``similar,'' but nonidentical, to the original input image. We can control the proximity of the generated images to the original by adjusting the amount of noise added. Furthermore, due to the stochastic nature of the reverse diffusion process in Boomerang, the generated images display a certain degree of stochasticity, allowing us to obtain local samples from the manifold without encountering any duplicates. Boomerang offers the flexibility to work seamlessly with any pretrained diffusion model, such as Stable Diffusion, without necessitating any adjustments to the reverse diffusion process. We present three applications for Boomerang. First, we provide a framework for constructing privacy-preserving datasets having controllable degrees of anonymity. Second, we show that using Boomerang for data augmentation increases generalization performance and outperforms state-of-the-art synthetic data augmentation. Lastly, we introduce a perceptual image enhancement framework, which enables resolution enhancement.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型的推理阶段可以看作是运行逆时扩散随机微分方程，其中来自高斯潜在分布的样本被转换为来自通常驻留在低维流形（例如图像流形）上的目标分布的样本。初始潜在​​空间和图像流形之间的中间值可以解释为噪声图像，噪声量由前向扩散过程噪声表确定。我们利用这种解释来提出 Boomerang，一种图像流形局部采样的方法。顾名思义，Boomerang 局部采样涉及向输入图像添加噪声，将其移近潜在空间，然后通过部分反向扩散过程将其映射回图像流形。因此，Boomerang 在流形上生成与原始输入图像“相似”但不相同的图像。我们可以通过调整添加的噪声量来控制生成图像与原始图像的接近度。此外，由于 Boomerang 中反向扩散过程的随机性，生成的图像显示出一定程度的随机性，使我们能够从流形中获取局部样本，而不会遇到任何重复。 Boomerang 提供了与任何预训练扩散模型（例如稳定扩散）无缝协作的灵活性，无需对反向扩散过程进行任何调整。我们展示了 Boomerang 的三个应用程序。首先，我们提供了一个框架，用于构建具有可控匿名程度的隐私保护数据集。其次，我们证明使用 Boomerang 进行数据增强可以提高泛化性能，并且优于最先进的合成数据增强。最后，我们介绍了一个感知图像增强框架，它可以增强分辨率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的图像流形局部采样方法Boomerang，通过向输入图像添加噪声并部分逆转扩散过程生成相似但非完全相同的图像。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的推理阶段可视为反向扩散过程，能够将高斯潜在空间样本转化为低维流形（如图像流形）上的样本。现有方法缺乏对流形局部区域的有效采样技术，而局部采样在隐私保护、数据增强等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: Boomerang通过向输入图像添加噪声使其接近潜在空间，再通过部分反向扩散过程将其映射回图像流形。该方法通过调整噪声量控制生成图像与原图的相似度，并利用反向扩散的随机性避免重复样本。
AI.result: 实验验证了Boomerang在三个应用方向的有效性：构建可控匿名度的隐私保护数据集、提升数据增强效果（优于现有合成数据增强方法）、以及实现感知图像超分辨率增强。
AI.conclusion: Boomerang为图像流形局部采样提供了灵活且无需修改预训练扩散模型的解决方案，其随机性和可控性使其在多个实际场景中表现出色。

search_text: Boomerang: Local sampling on image manifolds using diffusion models Boomerang：使用扩散模型对图像流形进行局部采样 The inference stage of diffusion models can be seen as running a reverse-time diffusion stochastic differential equation, where samples from a Gaussian latent distribution are transformed into samples from a target distribution that usually reside on a low-dimensional manifold, e.g., an image manifold. The intermediate values between the initial latent space and the image manifold can be interpreted as noisy images, with the amount of noise determined by the forward diffusion process noise schedule. We utilize this interpretation to present Boomerang, an approach for local sampling of image manifolds. As implied by its name, Boomerang local sampling involves adding noise to an input image, moving it closer to the latent space, and then mapping it back to the image manifold through a partial reverse diffusion process. Thus, Boomerang generates images on the manifold that are ``similar,'' but nonidentical, to the original input image. We can control the proximity of the generated images to the original by adjusting the amount of noise added. Furthermore, due to the stochastic nature of the reverse diffusion process in Boomerang, the generated images display a certain degree of stochasticity, allowing us to obtain local samples from the manifold without encountering any duplicates. Boomerang offers the flexibility to work seamlessly with any pretrained diffusion model, such as Stable Diffusion, without necessitating any adjustments to the reverse diffusion process. We present three applications for Boomerang. First, we provide a framework for constructing privacy-preserving datasets having controllable degrees of anonymity. Second, we show that using Boomerang for data augmentation increases generalization performance and outperforms state-of-the-art synthetic data augmentation. Lastly, we introduce a perceptual image enhancement framework, which enables resolution enhancement. 扩散模型的推理阶段可以看作是运行逆时扩散随机微分方程，其中来自高斯潜在分布的样本被转换为来自通常驻留在低维流形（例如图像流形）上的目标分布的样本。初始潜在​​空间和图像流形之间的中间值可以解释为噪声图像，噪声量由前向扩散过程噪声表确定。我们利用这种解释来提出 Boomerang，一种图像流形局部采样的方法。顾名思义，Boomerang 局部采样涉及向输入图像添加噪声，将其移近潜在空间，然后通过部分反向扩散过程将其映射回图像流形。因此，Boomerang 在流形上生成与原始输入图像“相似”但不相同的图像。我们可以通过调整添加的噪声量来控制生成图像与原始图像的接近度。此外，由于 Boomerang 中反向扩散过程的随机性，生成的图像显示出一定程度的随机性，使我们能够从流形中获取局部样本，而不会遇到任何重复。 Boomerang 提供了与任何预训练扩散模型（例如稳定扩散）无缝协作的灵活性，无需对反向扩散过程进行任何调整。我们展示了 Boomerang 的三个应用程序。首先，我们提供了一个框架，用于构建具有可控匿名程度的隐私保护数据集。其次，我们证明使用 Boomerang 进行数据增强可以提高泛化性能，并且优于最先进的合成数据增强。最后，我们介绍了一个感知图像增强框架，它可以增强分辨率。 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的图像流形局部采样方法Boomerang，通过向输入图像添加噪声并部分逆转扩散过程生成相似但非完全相同的图像。 Lorenzo Luzi,Paul M Mayer,Josue Casco-Rodriguez,Ali Siahkoohi,Richard G. Baraniuk cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Rebeca Vétil,Clément Abi Nader,Alexandre Bône,Marie-Pierre Vullierme,Marc-Michel Roheé,Pietro Gori,Isabelle Bloch
title: Learning shape distributions from large databases of healthy organs: applications to zero-shot and few-shot abnormal pancreas detection
title_zh: 从健康器官的大型数据库中学习形状分布：在零样本和少样本异常胰腺检测中的应用
abstract: We propose a scalable and data-driven approach to learn shape distributions from large databases of healthy organs. To do so, volumetric segmentation masks are embedded into a common probabilistic shape space that is learned with a variational auto-encoding network. The resulting latent shape representations are leveraged to derive zeroshot and few-shot methods for abnormal shape detection. The proposed distribution learning approach is illustrated on a large database of 1200 healthy pancreas shapes. Downstream qualitative and quantitative experiments are conducted on a separate test set of 224 pancreas from patients with mixed conditions. The abnormal pancreas detection AUC reached up to 65.41% in the zero-shot configuration, and 78.97% in the few-shot configuration with as few as 15 abnormal examples, outperforming a baseline approach based on the sole volume.
summary: We propose a scalable and data-driven approach to learn shape distributions from large databases of healthy organs. To do so, volumetric segmentation masks are embedded into a common probabilistic shape space that is learned with a variational auto-encoding network. The resulting latent shape representations are leveraged to derive zeroshot and few-shot methods for abnormal shape detection. The proposed distribution learning approach is illustrated on a large database of 1200 healthy pancreas shapes. Downstream qualitative and quantitative experiments are conducted on a separate test set of 224 pancreas from patients with mixed conditions. The abnormal pancreas detection AUC reached up to 65.41% in the zero-shot configuration, and 78.97% in the few-shot configuration with as few as 15 abnormal examples, outperforming a baseline approach based on the sole volume.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展且数据驱动的方法来从健康器官的大型数据库中学习形状分布。为此，体积分割掩模被嵌入到通过变分自动编码网络学习的公共概率形状空间中。由此产生的潜在形状表示可用于导出用于异常形状检测的零样本和少样本方法。所提出的分布学习方法在包含 1200 个健康胰腺形状的大型数据库上进行了说明。下游定性和定量实验是在来自混合病症患者的 224 个胰腺的单独测试集上进行的。异常胰腺检测 AUC 在零样本配置中达到 65.41%，在少样本配置（只有 15 个异常样本）中达到 78.97%，优于基于单一体积的基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从健康器官大数据中学习形状分布的方法，并应用于零样本和少样本异常胰腺检测。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测方法依赖大量标注数据，而医疗数据获取成本高且标注困难，需开发数据驱动的少样本检测方案。
AI.method: 使用变分自编码网络将健康器官的体积分割掩码嵌入到统一的概率形状空间，通过学习的潜在形状表示实现零样本和少样本异常检测。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下胰腺异常检测AUC达65.41%，少样本设置下仅需15个异常样本即可达到78.97%的AUC，优于仅基于体积的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习健康器官形状分布有效捕捉异常特征，在标注数据有限场景下展现出显著的异常检测潜力。

authors_text: Fergus Imrie,Bogdan Cebere,Eoin F. McKinney,Mihaela van der Schaar
title: AutoPrognosis 2.0: Democratizing Diagnostic and Prognostic Modeling in Healthcare with Automated Machine Learning
title_zh: AutoPrognosis 2.0：通过自动化机器学习使医疗保健中的诊断和预后建模民主化
abstract: Diagnostic and prognostic models are increasingly important in medicine and inform many clinical decisions. Recently, machine learning approaches have shown improvement over conventional modeling techniques by better capturing complex interactions between patient covariates in a data-driven manner. However, the use of machine learning introduces a number of technical and practical challenges that have thus far restricted widespread adoption of such techniques in clinical settings. To address these challenges and empower healthcare professionals, we present a machine learning framework, AutoPrognosis 2.0, to develop diagnostic and prognostic models. AutoPrognosis leverages state-of-the-art advances in automated machine learning to develop optimized machine learning pipelines, incorporates model explainability tools, and enables deployment of clinical demonstrators, without requiring significant technical expertise. Our framework eliminates the major technical obstacles to predictive modeling with machine learning that currently impede clinical adoption. To demonstrate AutoPrognosis 2.0, we provide an illustrative application where we construct a prognostic risk score for diabetes using the UK Biobank, a prospective study of 502,467 individuals. The models produced by our automated framework achieve greater discrimination for diabetes than expert clinical risk scores. Our risk score has been implemented as a web-based decision support tool and can be publicly accessed by patients and clinicians worldwide. In addition, AutoPrognosis 2.0 is provided as an open-source python package. By open-sourcing our framework as a tool for the community, clinicians and other medical practitioners will be able to readily develop new risk scores, personalized diagnostics, and prognostics using modern machine learning techniques.
summary: Diagnostic and prognostic models are increasingly important in medicine and inform many clinical decisions. Recently, machine learning approaches have shown improvement over conventional modeling techniques by better capturing complex interactions between patient covariates in a data-driven manner. However, the use of machine learning introduces a number of technical and practical challenges that have thus far restricted widespread adoption of such techniques in clinical settings. To address these challenges and empower healthcare professionals, we present a machine learning framework, AutoPrognosis 2.0, to develop diagnostic and prognostic models. AutoPrognosis leverages state-of-the-art advances in automated machine learning to develop optimized machine learning pipelines, incorporates model explainability tools, and enables deployment of clinical demonstrators, without requiring significant technical expertise. Our framework eliminates the major technical obstacles to predictive modeling with machine learning that currently impede clinical adoption. To demonstrate AutoPrognosis 2.0, we provide an illustrative application where we construct a prognostic risk score for diabetes using the UK Biobank, a prospective study of 502,467 individuals. The models produced by our automated framework achieve greater discrimination for diabetes than expert clinical risk scores. Our risk score has been implemented as a web-based decision support tool and can be publicly accessed by patients and clinicians worldwide. In addition, AutoPrognosis 2.0 is provided as an open-source python package. By open-sourcing our framework as a tool for the community, clinicians and other medical practitioners will be able to readily develop new risk scores, personalized diagnostics, and prognostics using modern machine learning techniques.
abstract_zh: 诊断和预后模型在医学中越来越重要，并为许多临床决策提供信息。最近，机器学习方法通​​过以数据驱动的方式更好地捕获患者协变量之间的复杂相互作用，显示出对传统建模技术的改进。然而，机器学习的使用带来了许多技术和实践挑战，迄今为止限制了此类技术在临床环境中的广泛采用。为了应对这些挑战并为医疗保健专业人员提供支持，我们提出了一个机器学习框架 AutoPrognosis 2.0，用于开发诊断和预后模型。 AutoPrognosis 利用自动化机器学习领域最先进的进步来开发优化的机器学习管道，结合模型可解释性工具，并支持临床演示器的部署，而无需大量的技术专业知识。我们的框架消除了目前阻碍临床采用的机器学习预测建模的主要技术障碍。为了演示 AutoPrognosis 2.0，我们提供了一个说明性应用程序，其中我们使用英国生物库（一项针对 502,467 名个体的前瞻性研究）构建了糖尿病的预后风险评分。我们的自动化框架生成的模型比专家临床风险评分对糖尿病具有更大的区分度。我们的风险评分已作为基于网络的决策支持工具实施，全世界的患者和临床医生都可以公开访问。此外，AutoPrognosis 2.0 作为开源 python 包提供。通过将我们的框架开源为社区工具，临床医生和其他医疗从业者将能够使用现代机器学习技术轻松开发新的风险评分、个性化诊断和预后。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoPrognosis 2.0框架，通过自动化机器学习技术降低医疗诊断与预后建模的技术门槛，助力临床应用。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在临床应用中面临技术复杂性和专业门槛问题，限制了其在医疗领域的广泛采用。
AI.method: 结合自动化机器学习优化模型管道，集成模型可解释性工具，并开发可部署的临床演示系统，无需专业编程知识。
AI.result: 基于UK Biobank数据构建的糖尿病风险评分模型表现优于专家临床评分，且已开源为Python工具包并部署为全球可访问的网页工具。
AI.conclusion: AutoPrognosis 2.0通过技术简化与开源共享，为医疗从业者提供了现代化的个性化诊断与预后建模解决方案。

Our risk score has been implemented as a web-based decision support tool and can be publicly accessed by patients and clinicians worldwide. By open-sourcing our framework as a tool for the community, clinicians and other medical practitioners will be able to readily develop new risk scores, personalized diagnostics, and prognostics using modern machine learning techniques. 诊断和预后模型在医学中越来越重要，并为许多临床决策提供信息。最近，机器学习方法通​​过以数据驱动的方式更好地捕获患者协变量之间的复杂相互作用，显示出对传统建模技术的改进。然而，机器学习的使用带来了许多技术和实践挑战，迄今为止限制了此类技术在临床环境中的广泛采用。为了应对这些挑战并为医疗保健专业人员提供支持，我们提出了一个机器学习框架 AutoPrognosis 2.0，用于开发诊断和预后模型。 AutoPrognosis 利用自动化机器学习领域最先进的进步来开发优化的机器学习管道，结合模型可解释性工具，并支持临床演示器的部署，而无需大量的技术专业知识。我们的框架消除了目前阻碍临床采用的机器学习预测建模的主要技术障碍。为了演示 AutoPrognosis 2.0，我们提供了一个说明性应用程序，其中我们使用英国生物库（一项针对 502,467 名个体的前瞻性研究）构建了糖尿病的预后风险评分。我们的自动化框架生成的模型比专家临床风险评分对糖尿病具有更大的区分度。我们的风险评分已作为基于网络的决策支持工具实施，全世界的患者和临床医生都可以公开访问。此外，AutoPrognosis 2.0 作为开源 python 包提供。通过将我们的框架开源为社区工具，临床医生和其他医疗从业者将能够使用现代机器学习技术轻松开发新的风险评分、个性化诊断和预后。 本文提出AutoPrognosis 2.0框架，通过自动化机器学习技术降低医疗诊断与预后建模的技术门槛，助力临床应用。 Fergus Imrie,Bogdan Cebere,Eoin F. McKinney,Mihaela van der Schaar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mario Alfonso Prado-Romero,Bardh Prenkaj,Giovanni Stilo,Fosca Giannotti
title: A Survey on Graph Counterfactual Explanations: Definitions, Methods, Evaluation, and Research Challenges
title_zh: 图反事实解释调查：定义、方法、评估和研究挑战
comment: ef:ACM Computing Surveys, Volume 56, Issue 7, Article No. 171, pp 1-37, 2024
comments: ef:ACM Computing Surveys, Volume 56, Issue 7, Article No. 171, pp 1-37, 2024
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) perform well in community detection and molecule classification. Counterfactual Explanations (CE) provide counter-examples to overcome the transparency limitations of black-box models. Due to the growing attention in graph learning, we focus on the concepts of CE for GNNs. We analysed the SoA to provide a taxonomy, a uniform notation, and the benchmarking datasets and evaluation metrics. We discuss fourteen methods, their evaluation protocols, twenty-two datasets, and nineteen metrics. We integrated the majority of methods into the GRETEL library to conduct an empirical evaluation to understand their strengths and pitfalls. We highlight open challenges and future work.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) perform well in community detection and molecule classification. Counterfactual Explanations (CE) provide counter-examples to overcome the transparency limitations of black-box models. Due to the growing attention in graph learning, we focus on the concepts of CE for GNNs. We analysed the SoA to provide a taxonomy, a uniform notation, and the benchmarking datasets and evaluation metrics. We discuss fourteen methods, their evaluation protocols, twenty-two datasets, and nineteen metrics. We integrated the majority of methods into the GRETEL library to conduct an empirical evaluation to understand their strengths and pitfalls. We highlight open challenges and future work.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在社区检测和分子分类方面表现良好。反事实解释（CE）提供了反例来克服黑盒模型的透明度限制。由于图学习日益受到关注，我们重点关注 GNN 的 CE 概念。我们分析了 SoA，以提供分类法、统一符号以及基准数据集和评估指标。我们讨论了十四种方法、它们的评估协议、二十二个数据集和十九个指标。我们将大多数方法集成到 GRETEL 库中进行实证评估，以了解它们的优点和缺陷。我们强调开放的挑战和未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图反事实解释的定义、方法、评估及研究挑战，系统分析了现有技术并提出统一框架。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）的黑盒特性限制了其可解释性，反事实解释（CE）能提供可操作的替代方案，但缺乏系统性梳理和评估。
AI.method: 通过分析现有方法构建分类体系，整理基准数据集与评估指标，集成14种方法至GRETEL库进行实证对比。
AI.result: 总结了22个数据集、19项指标，评估了各方法的优劣，发现现有技术在可扩展性和跨领域适应性上存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更统一的评估框架，推动跨领域方法迁移，并探索动态图场景下的解释技术。

authors_text: Leonard Adolphs,Michelle Chen Huebscher,Christian Buck,Sertan Girgin,Olivier Bachem,Massimiliano Ciaramita,Thomas Hofmann
title: Decoding a Neural Retriever's Latent Space for Query Suggestion
title_zh: 解码神经检索器的潜在空间以提供查询建议
abstract: Neural retrieval models have superseded classic bag-of-words methods such as BM25 as the retrieval framework of choice. However, neural systems lack the interpretability of bag-of-words models; it is not trivial to connect a query change to a change in the latent space that ultimately determines the retrieval results. To shed light on this embedding space, we learn a "query decoder" that, given a latent representation of a neural search engine, generates the corresponding query. We show that it is possible to decode a meaningful query from its latent representation and, when moving in the right direction in latent space, to decode a query that retrieves the relevant paragraph. In particular, the query decoder can be useful to understand "what should have been asked" to retrieve a particular paragraph from the collection. We employ the query decoder to generate a large synthetic dataset of query reformulations for MSMarco, leading to improved retrieval performance. On this data, we train a pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF) T5 model for the application of query suggestion that outperforms both query reformulation and PRF information retrieval baselines.
summary: Neural retrieval models have superseded classic bag-of-words methods such as BM25 as the retrieval framework of choice. However, neural systems lack the interpretability of bag-of-words models; it is not trivial to connect a query change to a change in the latent space that ultimately determines the retrieval results. To shed light on this embedding space, we learn a "query decoder" that, given a latent representation of a neural search engine, generates the corresponding query. We show that it is possible to decode a meaningful query from its latent representation and, when moving in the right direction in latent space, to decode a query that retrieves the relevant paragraph. In particular, the query decoder can be useful to understand "what should have been asked" to retrieve a particular paragraph from the collection. We employ the query decoder to generate a large synthetic dataset of query reformulations for MSMarco, leading to improved retrieval performance. On this data, we train a pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF) T5 model for the application of query suggestion that outperforms both query reformulation and PRF information retrieval baselines.
abstract_zh: 神经检索模型已经取代了 BM25 等经典的词袋方法，成为首选的检索框架。然而，神经系统缺乏词袋模型的可解释性；将查询更改与最终决定检索结果的潜在空间中的更改联系起来并非易事。为了阐明这个嵌入空间，我们学习了一个“查询解码器”，在给定神经搜索引擎的潜在表示的情况下，它会生成相应的查询。我们证明，可以从其潜在表示中解码有意义的查询，并且当在潜在空间中向正确的方向移动时，可以解码检索相关段落的查询。特别是，查询解码器对于理解“应该询问什么”以从集合中检索特定段落非常有用。我们使用查询解码器为 MSMarco 生成查询重构的大型综合数据集，从而提高检索性能。在此数据上，我们训练了一个伪相关反馈 (PRF) T5 模型，用于查询建议的应用，该模型的性能优于查询重构和 PRF 信息检索基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过解码神经检索器的潜在空间来生成查询建议，以提高检索性能。
AI.motivation: 神经检索模型虽性能优越，但缺乏可解释性，难以理解查询变化与潜在空间的关系，需通过解码方法提升透明度。
AI.method: 设计一个‘查询解码器’，将神经检索器的潜在表示转换为可解释的查询，并生成合成数据训练伪相关反馈（PRF）模型。
AI.result: 在MSMarco数据集上，基于解码器的PRF模型在查询建议任务中超越了传统重写和PRF基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 解码潜在空间可增强神经检索模型的可解释性，为查询建议和检索优化提供新思路。

authors: Wil. M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil. M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Gyunam Park,Wil. M. P. van der Aalst
title: Monitoring Constraints in Business Processes Using Object-Centric Constraint Graphs
title_zh: 使用以对象为中心的约束图监视业务流程中的约束
abstract: Constraint monitoring aims to monitor the violation of constraints in business processes, e.g., an invoice should be cleared within 48 hours after the corresponding goods receipt, by analyzing event data. Existing techniques for constraint monitoring assume that a single case notion exists in a business process, e.g., a patient in a healthcare process, and each event is associated with the case notion. However, in reality, business processes are object-centric, i.e., multiple case notions (objects) exist, and an event may be associated with multiple objects. For instance, an Order-To-Cash (O2C) process involves order, item, delivery, etc., and they interact when executing an event, e.g., packing multiple items together for a delivery. The existing techniques produce misleading insights when applied to such object-centric business processes. In this work, we propose an approach to monitoring constraints in object-centric business processes. To this end, we introduce Object-Centric Constraint Graphs (OCCGs) to represent constraints that consider the interaction of objects. Next, we evaluate the constraints represented by OCCGs by analyzing Object-Centric Event Logs (OCELs) that store the interaction of different objects in events. We have implemented a web application to support the proposed approach and conducted two case studies using a real-life SAP ERP system.
summary: Constraint monitoring aims to monitor the violation of constraints in business processes, e.g., an invoice should be cleared within 48 hours after the corresponding goods receipt, by analyzing event data. Existing techniques for constraint monitoring assume that a single case notion exists in a business process, e.g., a patient in a healthcare process, and each event is associated with the case notion. However, in reality, business processes are object-centric, i.e., multiple case notions (objects) exist, and an event may be associated with multiple objects. For instance, an Order-To-Cash (O2C) process involves order, item, delivery, etc., and they interact when executing an event, e.g., packing multiple items together for a delivery. The existing techniques produce misleading insights when applied to such object-centric business processes. In this work, we propose an approach to monitoring constraints in object-centric business processes. To this end, we introduce Object-Centric Constraint Graphs (OCCGs) to represent constraints that consider the interaction of objects. Next, we evaluate the constraints represented by OCCGs by analyzing Object-Centric Event Logs (OCELs) that store the interaction of different objects in events. We have implemented a web application to support the proposed approach and conducted two case studies using a real-life SAP ERP system.
abstract_zh: 约束监控旨在通过分析事件数据来监控业务流程中违反约束的情况，例如发票应在相应收货后48小时内清算。现有的约束监控技术假设业务流程中存在单个案例概念，例如医疗保健流程中的患者，并且每个事件都与该案例概念相关联。然而，实际上，业务流程是以对象为中心的，即存在多种情况概念（对象），并且一个事件可能与多个对象相关联。例如，订单到现金 (O2C) 流程涉及订单、商品、交付等，并且它们在执行事件时进行交互，例如将多个商品打包在一起进行交付。当应用于此类以对象为中心的业务流程时，现有技术会产生误导性的见解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种监控以对象为中心的业务流程中的约束的方法。为此，我们引入以对象为中心的约束图（OCCG）来表示考虑对象交互的约束。接下来，我们通过分析存储事件中不同对象交互的以对象为中心的事件日志 (OCEL) 来评估 OCCG 表示的约束。我们实施了一个 Web 应用程序来支持所提出的方法，并使用现实生活中的 SAP ERP 系统进行了两个案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对象中心约束图（OCCGs）的方法，用于监控对象中心业务流程中的约束条件。
AI.motivation: 现有约束监控技术假设业务流程中仅存在单一案例概念，无法处理现实中多个对象交互的复杂场景，导致监控结果失真。
AI.method: 引入对象中心约束图（OCCGs）建模多对象交互约束，并通过对象中心事件日志（OCELs）进行验证，开发了配套的网页应用工具。
AI.result: 通过SAP ERP系统的两个实际案例研究，验证了该方法在对象中心业务流程约束监控中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过考虑多对象交互关系，解决了传统技术在对象中心业务流程中的监控局限性，提升了约束检测的准确性。

search_text: Monitoring Constraints in Business Processes Using Object-Centric Constraint Graphs 使用以对象为中心的约束图监视业务流程中的约束 Constraint monitoring aims to monitor the violation of constraints in business processes, e.g., an invoice should be cleared within 48 hours after the corresponding goods receipt, by analyzing event data. Existing techniques for constraint monitoring assume that a single case notion exists in a business process, e.g., a patient in a healthcare process, and each event is associated with the case notion. However, in reality, business processes are object-centric, i.e., multiple case notions (objects) exist, and an event may be associated with multiple objects. For instance, an Order-To-Cash (O2C) process involves order, item, delivery, etc., and they interact when executing an event, e.g., packing multiple items together for a delivery. The existing techniques produce misleading insights when applied to such object-centric business processes. In this work, we propose an approach to monitoring constraints in object-centric business processes. To this end, we introduce Object-Centric Constraint Graphs (OCCGs) to represent constraints that consider the interaction of objects. Next, we evaluate the constraints represented by OCCGs by analyzing Object-Centric Event Logs (OCELs) that store the interaction of different objects in events. We have implemented a web application to support the proposed approach and conducted two case studies using a real-life SAP ERP system. 约束监控旨在通过分析事件数据来监控业务流程中违反约束的情况，例如发票应在相应收货后48小时内清算。现有的约束监控技术假设业务流程中存在单个案例概念，例如医疗保健流程中的患者，并且每个事件都与该案例概念相关联。然而，实际上，业务流程是以对象为中心的，即存在多种情况概念（对象），并且一个事件可能与多个对象相关联。例如，订单到现金 (O2C) 流程涉及订单、商品、交付等，并且它们在执行事件时进行交互，例如将多个商品打包在一起进行交付。当应用于此类以对象为中心的业务流程时，现有技术会产生误导性的见解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种监控以对象为中心的业务流程中的约束的方法。为此，我们引入以对象为中心的约束图（OCCG）来表示考虑对象交互的约束。接下来，我们通过分析存储事件中不同对象交互的以对象为中心的事件日志 (OCEL) 来评估 OCCG 表示的约束。我们实施了一个 Web 应用程序来支持所提出的方法，并使用现实生活中的 SAP ERP 系统进行了两个案例研究。 本文提出了一种基于对象中心约束图（OCCGs）的方法，用于监控对象中心业务流程中的约束条件。 Gyunam Park,Wil. M. P. van der Aalst cs.AI

authors_text: Mitja Nikolaus,Emmanuelle Salin,Stephane Ayache,Abdellah Fourtassi,Benoit Favre
title: Do Vision-and-Language Transformers Learn Grounded Predicate-Noun Dependencies?
title_zh: 视觉和语言转换器是否能够学习基础谓词-名词依赖关系？
abstract: Recent advances in vision-and-language modeling have seen the development of Transformer architectures that achieve remarkable performance on multimodal reasoning tasks. Yet, the exact capabilities of these black-box models are still poorly understood. While much of previous work has focused on studying their ability to learn meaning at the word-level, their ability to track syntactic dependencies between words has received less attention. We take a first step in closing this gap by creating a new multimodal task targeted at evaluating understanding of predicate-noun dependencies in a controlled setup. We evaluate a range of state-of-the-art models and find that their performance on the task varies considerably, with some models performing relatively well and others at chance level. In an effort to explain this variability, our analyses indicate that the quality (and not only sheer quantity) of pretraining data is essential. Additionally, the best performing models leverage fine-grained multimodal pretraining objectives in addition to the standard image-text matching objectives. This study highlights that targeted and controlled evaluations are a crucial step for a precise and rigorous test of the multimodal knowledge of vision-and-language models.
summary: Recent advances in vision-and-language modeling have seen the development of Transformer architectures that achieve remarkable performance on multimodal reasoning tasks. Yet, the exact capabilities of these black-box models are still poorly understood. While much of previous work has focused on studying their ability to learn meaning at the word-level, their ability to track syntactic dependencies between words has received less attention. We take a first step in closing this gap by creating a new multimodal task targeted at evaluating understanding of predicate-noun dependencies in a controlled setup. We evaluate a range of state-of-the-art models and find that their performance on the task varies considerably, with some models performing relatively well and others at chance level. In an effort to explain this variability, our analyses indicate that the quality (and not only sheer quantity) of pretraining data is essential. Additionally, the best performing models leverage fine-grained multimodal pretraining objectives in addition to the standard image-text matching objectives. This study highlights that targeted and controlled evaluations are a crucial step for a precise and rigorous test of the multimodal knowledge of vision-and-language models.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言建模的最新进展见证了 Transformer 架构的发展，这些架构在多模态推理任务上取得了卓越的性能。然而，人们对这些黑匣子模型的确切功能仍然知之甚少。虽然之前的大部分工作都集中在研究他们在单词层面学习意义的能力，但他们跟踪单词之间句法依赖关系的能力却很少受到关注。我们迈出了缩小这一差距的第一步，创建了一个新的多模态任务，旨在评估对受控设置中谓词-名词依赖关系的理解。我们评估了一系列最先进的模型，发现它们在任务上的表现差异很大，一些模型表现相对较好，而另一些模型则表现不佳。为了解释这种变异性，我们的分析表明预训练数据的质量（而不仅仅是数量）至关重要。此外，除了标准图像文本匹配目标之外，性能最佳的模型还利用细粒度多模式预训练目标。这项研究强调，有针对性和受控的评估是精确和严格测试视觉和语言模型的多模态知识的关键步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文创建了一个新的多模态任务，用于评估视觉-语言Transformer模型对谓词-名词依赖关系的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型在词级语义理解上取得进展，但其对词间句法依赖关系（如谓词-名词关系）的学习能力尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 设计受控实验任务评估模型对谓词-名词依赖关系的捕捉能力，对比多种前沿模型并分析预训练数据质量和目标函数的影响。
AI.result: 模型表现差异显著，优质预训练数据和细粒度多模态目标（如图像-文本匹配）的结合能显著提升任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定语法结构的受控评估是检验视觉-语言模型多模态理解能力的关键手段。

title: Neural Networks for Local Search and Crossover in Vehicle Routing: A Possible Overkill?
title_zh: 用于车辆路径本地搜索和交叉的神经网络：可能是杀伤力大吗？
abstract: Extensive research has been conducted, over recent years, on various ways of enhancing heuristic search for combinatorial optimization problems with machine learning algorithms. In this study, we investigate the use of predictions from graph neural networks (GNNs) in the form of heatmaps to improve the Hybrid Genetic Search (HGS), a state-of-the-art algorithm for the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP). The crossover and local-search components of HGS are instrumental in finding improved solutions, yet these components essentially rely on simple greedy or random choices. It seems intuitive to attempt to incorporate additional knowledge at these levels. Throughout a vast experimental campaign on more than 10,000 problem instances, we show that exploiting more sophisticated strategies using measures of node relatedness (heatmaps, or simply distance) within these algorithmic components can significantly enhance performance. However, contrary to initial expectations, we also observed that heatmaps did not present significant advantages over simpler distance measures for these purposes. Therefore, we faced a common -- though rarely documented -- situation of overkill: GNNs can indeed improve performance on an important optimization task, but an ablation analysis demonstrated that simpler alternatives perform equally well.
summary: Extensive research has been conducted, over recent years, on various ways of enhancing heuristic search for combinatorial optimization problems with machine learning algorithms. In this study, we investigate the use of predictions from graph neural networks (GNNs) in the form of heatmaps to improve the Hybrid Genetic Search (HGS), a state-of-the-art algorithm for the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP). The crossover and local-search components of HGS are instrumental in finding improved solutions, yet these components essentially rely on simple greedy or random choices. It seems intuitive to attempt to incorporate additional knowledge at these levels. Throughout a vast experimental campaign on more than 10,000 problem instances, we show that exploiting more sophisticated strategies using measures of node relatedness (heatmaps, or simply distance) within these algorithmic components can significantly enhance performance. However, contrary to initial expectations, we also observed that heatmaps did not present significant advantages over simpler distance measures for these purposes. Therefore, we faced a common -- though rarely documented -- situation of overkill: GNNs can indeed improve performance on an important optimization task, but an ablation analysis demonstrated that simpler alternatives perform equally well.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对利用机器学习算法增强组合优化问题的启发式搜索的各种方法进行了广泛的研究。在这项研究中，我们研究了使用热图形式的图神经网络 (GNN) 预测来改进混合遗传搜索 (HGS)，这是一种针对容量车辆路径问题 (CVRP) 的最先进算法。 HGS 的交叉和本地搜索组件有助于寻找改进的解决方案，但这些组件本质上依赖于简单的贪婪或随机选择。尝试在这些级别上纳入额外的知识似乎很直观。通过针对 10,000 多个问题实例的大规模实验活动，我们表明，利用这些算法组件中的节点相关性（热图或简单距离）测量来开发更复杂的策略可以显着提高性能。然而，与最初的预期相反，我们还观察到，对于这些目的，热图并没有比简单的距离测量具有显着的优势。因此，我们面临着一种常见的（尽管很少有记录）过度杀伤的情况：GNN 确实可以提高重要优化任务的性能，但消融分析表明，更简单的替代方案同样表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用图神经网络生成的热图优化车辆路径问题的混合遗传搜索算法，发现复杂策略可能过度设计。
AI.motivation: 现有混合遗传搜索算法在局部搜索和交叉操作中依赖简单策略，难以充分利用问题结构信息。
AI.method: 将图神经网络预测的节点相关性热图整合到混合遗传搜索算法中，通过10,000+实例对比热图与距离度量的性能差异。
AI.result: 复杂策略提升性能但热图未显著优于简单距离度量，证明更简单方法可达到相似效果。
AI.conclusion: 尽管GNN能改进优化任务，但简单替代方案效果相当，需警惕算法复杂性带来的过度设计风险。

search_text: Neural Networks for Local Search and Crossover in Vehicle Routing: A Possible Overkill? 用于车辆路径本地搜索和交叉的神经网络：可能是杀伤力大吗？ Extensive research has been conducted, over recent years, on various ways of enhancing heuristic search for combinatorial optimization problems with machine learning algorithms. In this study, we investigate the use of predictions from graph neural networks (GNNs) in the form of heatmaps to improve the Hybrid Genetic Search (HGS), a state-of-the-art algorithm for the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP). The crossover and local-search components of HGS are instrumental in finding improved solutions, yet these components essentially rely on simple greedy or random choices. It seems intuitive to attempt to incorporate additional knowledge at these levels. Throughout a vast experimental campaign on more than 10,000 problem instances, we show that exploiting more sophisticated strategies using measures of node relatedness (heatmaps, or simply distance) within these algorithmic components can significantly enhance performance. However, contrary to initial expectations, we also observed that heatmaps did not present significant advantages over simpler distance measures for these purposes. Therefore, we faced a common -- though rarely documented -- situation of overkill: GNNs can indeed improve performance on an important optimization task, but an ablation analysis demonstrated that simpler alternatives perform equally well. 近年来，人们对利用机器学习算法增强组合优化问题的启发式搜索的各种方法进行了广泛的研究。在这项研究中，我们研究了使用热图形式的图神经网络 (GNN) 预测来改进混合遗传搜索 (HGS)，这是一种针对容量车辆路径问题 (CVRP) 的最先进算法。 HGS 的交叉和本地搜索组件有助于寻找改进的解决方案，但这些组件本质上依赖于简单的贪婪或随机选择。尝试在这些级别上纳入额外的知识似乎很直观。通过针对 10,000 多个问题实例的大规模实验活动，我们表明，利用这些算法组件中的节点相关性（热图或简单距离）测量来开发更复杂的策略可以显着提高性能。然而，与最初的预期相反，我们还观察到，对于这些目的，热图并没有比简单的距离测量具有显着的优势。因此，我们面临着一种常见的（尽管很少有记录）过度杀伤的情况：GNN 确实可以提高重要优化任务的性能，但消融分析表明，更简单的替代方案同样表现良好。 本文研究使用图神经网络生成的热图优化车辆路径问题的混合遗传搜索算法，发现复杂策略可能过度设计。 Ítalo Santana,Andrea Lodi,Thibaut Vidal cs.NE,cs.LG

title: Grid cells and their potential application in AI
title_zh: 网格单元及其在人工智能中的潜在应用
abstract: Since their Nobel Prize winning discovery in 2005, grid cells have been studied extensively by neuroscientists. Their multi-scale periodic firing rates tiling the environment as the animal moves around has been shown as critical for path integration. Multiple experiments have shown that grid cells also fire for other representations such as olfactory, attention mechanisms, imagined movement, and concept organization potentially acting as a form of neural recycling and showing the possible brain mechanism for cognitive maps that Tolman envisioned in 1948. Grid cell integration into artificial neural networks may enable more robust, generalized, and smarter computers. In this paper we give an overview of grid cell research since their discovery, their role in neuroscience and cognitive science, and possible future directions of artificial intelligence research.
summary: Since their Nobel Prize winning discovery in 2005, grid cells have been studied extensively by neuroscientists. Their multi-scale periodic firing rates tiling the environment as the animal moves around has been shown as critical for path integration. Multiple experiments have shown that grid cells also fire for other representations such as olfactory, attention mechanisms, imagined movement, and concept organization potentially acting as a form of neural recycling and showing the possible brain mechanism for cognitive maps that Tolman envisioned in 1948. Grid cell integration into artificial neural networks may enable more robust, generalized, and smarter computers. In this paper we give an overview of grid cell research since their discovery, their role in neuroscience and cognitive science, and possible future directions of artificial intelligence research.
abstract_zh: 自 2005 年获得诺贝尔奖以来，神经科学家对网格细胞进行了广泛的研究。当动物四处移动时，它们的多尺度周期性发射率对环境进行平铺已被证明对于路径整合至关重要。多项实验表明，网格细胞还激发其他表征，例如嗅觉、注意力机制、想象的运动和概念组织，可能充当神经循环的一种形式，并展示了托尔曼在 1948 年设想的认知图的可能大脑机制。将网格细胞集成到人工神经网络中可能会使计算机变得更强大、更通用、更智能。在本文中，我们概述了网格细胞自发现以来的研究、它们在神经科学和认知科学中的作用以及人工智能研究的未来可能的方向。

AI.tldr: 综述网格细胞的研究进展及其在人工智能中的潜在应用
AI.motivation: 探索网格细胞在认知功能中的作用，以启发更智能的人工神经网络设计
AI.method: 文献综述与跨学科分析，结合神经科学和人工智能理论
AI.result: 总结网格细胞的多尺度放电特性及其在认知任务中的应用，并提出其在人工神经网络中的潜在整合方法
AI.conclusion: 网格细胞机制为构建更高效、通用的AI系统提供了生物启发的路径，需进一步探索其在深度学习中的具体应用

title: Efficient Dataset Distillation Using Random Feature Approximation
title_zh: 使用随机特征近似进行高效数据集蒸馏
comment: Accepted to the Conference on the Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Accepted to the Conference on the Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: Dataset distillation compresses large datasets into smaller synthetic coresets which retain performance with the aim of reducing the storage and computational burden of processing the entire dataset. Today's best-performing algorithm, \textit{Kernel Inducing Points} (KIP), which makes use of the correspondence between infinite-width neural networks and kernel-ridge regression, is prohibitively slow due to the exact computation of the neural tangent kernel matrix, scaling $O(|S|^2)$, with $|S|$ being the coreset size. To improve this, we propose a novel algorithm that uses a random feature approximation (RFA) of the Neural Network Gaussian Process (NNGP) kernel, which reduces the kernel matrix computation to $O(|S|)$. Our algorithm provides at least a 100-fold speedup over KIP and can run on a single GPU. Our new method, termed an RFA Distillation (RFAD), performs competitively with KIP and other dataset condensation algorithms in accuracy over a range of large-scale datasets, both in kernel regression and finite-width network training. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on tasks involving model interpretability and privacy preservation.
summary: Dataset distillation compresses large datasets into smaller synthetic coresets which retain performance with the aim of reducing the storage and computational burden of processing the entire dataset. Today's best-performing algorithm, \textit{Kernel Inducing Points} (KIP), which makes use of the correspondence between infinite-width neural networks and kernel-ridge regression, is prohibitively slow due to the exact computation of the neural tangent kernel matrix, scaling $O(|S|^2)$, with $|S|$ being the coreset size. To improve this, we propose a novel algorithm that uses a random feature approximation (RFA) of the Neural Network Gaussian Process (NNGP) kernel, which reduces the kernel matrix computation to $O(|S|)$. Our algorithm provides at least a 100-fold speedup over KIP and can run on a single GPU. Our new method, termed an RFA Distillation (RFAD), performs competitively with KIP and other dataset condensation algorithms in accuracy over a range of large-scale datasets, both in kernel regression and finite-width network training. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on tasks involving model interpretability and privacy preservation.
abstract_zh: 数据集蒸馏将大型数据集压缩为较小的合成核心集，这些核心集保留性能，旨在减少处理整个数据集的存储和计算负担。当今性能最好的算法 \textit{Kernel Inducing Points} (KIP) 利用无限宽度神经网络和核岭回归之间的对应关系，由于神经切线核矩阵的精确计算，缩放 $O(|S|^2)$，其中 $|S|$ 是核心集大小，因此速度非常慢。为了改进这一点，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，该算法使用神经网络高斯过程 (NNGP) 内核的随机特征近似 (RFA)，将内核矩阵计算减少到 $O(|S|)$。我们的算法比 KIP 提供至少 100 倍的加速，并且可以在单个 GPU 上运行。我们的新方法称为 RFA 蒸馏 (RFAD)，在核回归和有限宽度网络训练中，在一系列大规模数据集上的准确性方面，与 KIP 和其他数据集压缩算法相比具有竞争力。我们证明了我们的方法在涉及模型可解释性和隐私保护的任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机特征近似的高效数据集蒸馏方法（RFAD），用于生成保留性能的小型合成数据集核心集。
AI.motivation: 现有最佳算法KIP因需精确计算神经切线核矩阵而计算复杂度高达O(|S|²)，难以处理大规模数据集。
AI.method: 通过随机特征近似（RFA）近似神经网络高斯过程（NNGP）核，将核矩阵计算复杂度降至O(|S|)。
AI.result: RFAD在单块GPU上实现比KIP快100倍的速度，且在多个大规模数据集上的准确率与KIP及其他算法相当。
AI.conclusion: RFAD在保持性能的同时显著提升了数据集蒸馏效率，适用于模型可解释性和隐私保护等任务。

authors_text: Shengjie Zheng,Ling Liu,Junjie Yang,Jianwei Zhang,Tao Su,Bin Yue,Xiaojian Li
title: Embedded Silicon-Organic Integrated Neuromorphic System
title_zh: 嵌入式有机硅集成神经形态系统
comment: This article need to update the corrected figure and data
comments: This article need to update the corrected figure and data
abstract: The development of artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics are both based on the tenet of "science and technology are people-oriented", and both need to achieve efficient communication with the human brain. Based on multi-disciplinary research in systems neuroscience, computer architecture, and functional organic materials, we proposed the concept of using AI to simulate the operating principles and materials of the brain in hardware to develop brain-inspired intelligence technology, and realized the preparation of neuromorphic computing devices and basic materials. We simulated neurons and neural networks in terms of material and morphology, using a variety of organic polymers as the base materials for neuroelectronic devices, for building neural interfaces as well as organic neural devices and silicon neural computational modules. We assemble organic artificial synapses with simulated neurons from silicon-based Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) into organic artificial neurons, the basic components of neural networks, and later construct biological neural network models based on the interpreted neural circuits. Finally, we also discuss how to further build neuromorphic devices based on these organic artificial neurons, which have both a neural interface friendly to nervous tissue and interact with information from real biological neural networks.
summary: The development of artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics are both based on the tenet of "science and technology are people-oriented", and both need to achieve efficient communication with the human brain. Based on multi-disciplinary research in systems neuroscience, computer architecture, and functional organic materials, we proposed the concept of using AI to simulate the operating principles and materials of the brain in hardware to develop brain-inspired intelligence technology, and realized the preparation of neuromorphic computing devices and basic materials. We simulated neurons and neural networks in terms of material and morphology, using a variety of organic polymers as the base materials for neuroelectronic devices, for building neural interfaces as well as organic neural devices and silicon neural computational modules. We assemble organic artificial synapses with simulated neurons from silicon-based Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) into organic artificial neurons, the basic components of neural networks, and later construct biological neural network models based on the interpreted neural circuits. Finally, we also discuss how to further build neuromorphic devices based on these organic artificial neurons, which have both a neural interface friendly to nervous tissue and interact with information from real biological neural networks.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）和机器人技术的发展都是基于“科技以人为本”的宗旨，都需要实现与人脑的高效沟通。基于系统神经科学、计算机体系结构、功能有机材料等多学科研究，提出利用人工智能在硬件中模拟大脑的工作原理和材料的理念，开发类脑智能技术，实现了神经形态计算器件和基础材料的制备。我们从材料和形态方面模拟神经元和神经网络，使用各种有机聚合物作为神经电子器件的基础材料，用于构建神经接口以及有机神经器件和硅神经计算模块。我们将有机人工突触与来自硅基现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的模拟神经元组装成有机人工神经元（神经网络的基本组成部分），然后基于解释的神经回路构建生物神经网络模型。最后，我们还讨论了如何基于这些有机人工神经元进一步构建神经形态设备，该神经形态设备既具有对神经组织友好的神经接口，又与来自真实生物神经网络的信息进行交互。

AI.tldr: 开发嵌入式硅-有机集成神经形态系统，模拟生物神经元与网络以实现类脑智能计算。
AI.motivation: 人工智能与机器人技术需高效与人脑通信，传统硬件难以模拟生物神经系统的复杂性与能效，需跨学科融合材料与计算技术。
AI.method: 结合系统神经科学、计算机架构与有机功能材料，以有机聚合物构建神经电子器件，集成硅基FPGA实现人工突触与神经元，构建神经接口及生物神经网络模型。
AI.result: 制备出有机人工神经元与硅基计算模块，实现神经接口与生物网络的信息交互，并提出进一步构建神经形态器件的方案。
AI.conclusion: 硅-有机混合架构为类脑计算提供新路径，兼具神经接口兼容性与生物网络交互能力，推动脑启发智能技术发展。

ai_content.tldr: 开发嵌入式硅-有机集成神经形态系统，模拟生物神经元与网络以实现类脑智能计算。
ai_content.motivation: 人工智能与机器人技术需高效与人脑通信，传统硬件难以模拟生物神经系统的复杂性与能效，需跨学科融合材料与计算技术。
ai_content.method: 结合系统神经科学、计算机架构与有机功能材料，以有机聚合物构建神经电子器件，集成硅基FPGA实现人工突触与神经元，构建神经接口及生物神经网络模型。
ai_content.result: 制备出有机人工神经元与硅基计算模块，实现神经接口与生物网络的信息交互，并提出进一步构建神经形态器件的方案。
ai_content.conclusion: 硅-有机混合架构为类脑计算提供新路径，兼具神经接口兼容性与生物网络交互能力，推动脑启发智能技术发展。

search_text: Embedded Silicon-Organic Integrated Neuromorphic System 嵌入式有机硅集成神经形态系统 The development of artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics are both based on the tenet of "science and technology are people-oriented", and both need to achieve efficient communication with the human brain. Based on multi-disciplinary research in systems neuroscience, computer architecture, and functional organic materials, we proposed the concept of using AI to simulate the operating principles and materials of the brain in hardware to develop brain-inspired intelligence technology, and realized the preparation of neuromorphic computing devices and basic materials. We simulated neurons and neural networks in terms of material and morphology, using a variety of organic polymers as the base materials for neuroelectronic devices, for building neural interfaces as well as organic neural devices and silicon neural computational modules. We assemble organic artificial synapses with simulated neurons from silicon-based Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) into organic artificial neurons, the basic components of neural networks, and later construct biological neural network models based on the interpreted neural circuits. Finally, we also discuss how to further build neuromorphic devices based on these organic artificial neurons, which have both a neural interface friendly to nervous tissue and interact with information from real biological neural networks. 人工智能（AI）和机器人技术的发展都是基于“科技以人为本”的宗旨，都需要实现与人脑的高效沟通。基于系统神经科学、计算机体系结构、功能有机材料等多学科研究，提出利用人工智能在硬件中模拟大脑的工作原理和材料的理念，开发类脑智能技术，实现了神经形态计算器件和基础材料的制备。我们从材料和形态方面模拟神经元和神经网络，使用各种有机聚合物作为神经电子器件的基础材料，用于构建神经接口以及有机神经器件和硅神经计算模块。我们将有机人工突触与来自硅基现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的模拟神经元组装成有机人工神经元（神经网络的基本组成部分），然后基于解释的神经回路构建生物神经网络模型。最后，我们还讨论了如何基于这些有机人工神经元进一步构建神经形态设备，该神经形态设备既具有对神经组织友好的神经接口，又与来自真实生物神经网络的信息进行交互。 开发嵌入式硅-有机集成神经形态系统，模拟生物神经元与网络以实现类脑智能计算。 Shengjie Zheng,Ling Liu,Junjie Yang,Jianwei Zhang,Tao Su,Bin Yue,Xiaojian Li q-bio.NC,cs.NE

title: Query Semantic Reconstruction for Background in Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: 少镜头分割中背景的查询语义重建
abstract: Few-shot segmentation (FSS) aims to segment unseen classes using a few annotated samples. Typically, a prototype representing the foreground class is extracted from annotated support image(s) and is matched to features representing each pixel in the query image. However, models learnt in this way are insufficiently discriminatory, and often produce false positives: misclassifying background pixels as foreground. Some FSS methods try to address this issue by using the background in the support image(s) to help identify the background in the query image. However, the backgrounds of theses images is often quite distinct, and hence, the support image background information is uninformative. This article proposes a method, QSR, that extracts the background from the query image itself, and as a result is better able to discriminate between foreground and background features in the query image. This is achieved by modifying the training process to associate prototypes with class labels including known classes from the training data and latent classes representing unknown background objects. This class information is then used to extract a background prototype from the query image. To successfully associate prototypes with class labels and extract a background prototype that is capable of predicting a mask for the background regions of the image, the machinery for extracting and using foreground prototypes is induced to become more discriminative between different classes. Experiments for both 1-shot and 5-shot FSS on both the PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i datasets demonstrate that the proposed method results in a significant improvement in performance for the baseline methods it is applied to. As QSR operates only during training, these improved results are produced with no extra computational complexity during testing.

Typically, a prototype representing the foreground class is extracted from annotated support image(s) and is matched to features representing each pixel in the query image. However, models learnt in this way are insufficiently discriminatory, and often produce false positives: misclassifying background pixels as foreground. Some FSS methods try to address this issue by using the background in the support image(s) to help identify the background in the query image. However, the backgrounds of theses images is often quite distinct, and hence, the support image background information is uninformative. This article proposes a method, QSR, that extracts the background from the query image itself, and as a result is better able to discriminate between foreground and background features in the query image. This is achieved by modifying the training process to associate prototypes with class labels including known classes from the training data and latent classes representing unknown background objects. This class information is then used to extract a background prototype from the query image. To successfully associate prototypes with class labels and extract a background prototype that is capable of predicting a mask for the background regions of the image, the machinery for extracting and using foreground prototypes is induced to become more discriminative between different classes. Experiments for both 1-shot and 5-shot FSS on both the PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i datasets demonstrate that the proposed method results in a significant improvement in performance for the baseline methods it is applied to. As QSR operates only during training, these improved results are produced with no extra computational complexity during testing.
abstract_zh: 少镜头分割（FSS）旨在使用一些带注释的样本来分割看不见的类。通常，表示前景类的原型是从带注释的支持图像中提取的，并与表示查询图像中每个像素的特征进行匹配。然而，以这种方式学习的模型的辨别力不够，并且经常产生误报：将背景像素错误地分类为前景。一些 FSS 方法尝试通过使用支持图像中的背景来帮助识别查询图像中的背景来解决此问题。然而，这些图像的背景通常非常明显，因此，支持图像背景信息信息量不大。本文提出了一种方法 QSR，该方法从查询图像本身提取背景，从而能够更好地区分查询图像中的前景和背景特征。这是通过修改训练过程以将原型与类标签相关联来实现的，类标签包括训练数据中的已知类和表示未知背景对象的潜在类。然后使用此类信息从查询图像中提取背景原型。为了成功地将原型与类标签相关联并提取能够预测图像背景区域掩模的背景原型，用于提取和使用前景原型的机制被诱导以在不同类之间变得更具区分性。在 PASCAL-5i 和 COCO-20i 数据集上进行的 1-shot 和 5-shot FSS 实验表明，所提出的方法可以显着提高其所应用的基线方法的性能。由于 QSR 仅在训练期间运行，因此在测试期间无需额外的计算复杂性即可产生这些改进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为QSR的方法，通过重构查询图像中的背景语义来改进少样本分割任务中的背景区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分割方法在利用支持图像背景信息时效果有限，因为支持图像与查询图像的背景差异较大，导致模型难以区分前景和背景。
AI.method: 通过修改训练过程，将原型与已知类别和表示未知背景的潜在类别关联，从查询图像中提取背景原型，增强不同类别间的判别能力。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i和COCO-20i数据集上，QSR方法在1-shot和5-shot任务中显著提升了基线模型的性能，且测试时无额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: QSR通过重构查询图像背景语义有效解决了少样本分割中的背景误判问题，为提升模型判别能力提供了新思路。

title: Optimization of side lobe level of linear antenna array using nature optimized ants bridging solutions(NOABS)
title_zh: 使用自然优化蚂蚁桥接解决方案（NOABS）优化线性天线阵列的旁瓣电平
abstract: Nature inspired algorithms has brought solutions to complex problems in optimization where the optimization and solution of complex problems is highly complex and nonlinear. There is a need to use proper design of the cost function or the fitness function in terms of the parameters to be optimized, this can be used in solving any type of such problems. In this paper the nature inspired algorithms has played important role in the optimal design of antenna array with improved radiation characteristics. In this paper, 20 elements linearly spaced array is used as an example of nature inspired optimization in antenna array system. This bridge inspired army ant algorithm(NOABS) is used to reduce the side lobes and to improve the other radiation characteristics to show the effect of the optimization on design characteristics by implementation of NOABS nature inspired algorithm. The entire simulation is carried out on 20 elements linear antenna array.
summary: Nature inspired algorithms has brought solutions to complex problems in optimization where the optimization and solution of complex problems is highly complex and nonlinear. There is a need to use proper design of the cost function or the fitness function in terms of the parameters to be optimized, this can be used in solving any type of such problems. In this paper the nature inspired algorithms has played important role in the optimal design of antenna array with improved radiation characteristics. In this paper, 20 elements linearly spaced array is used as an example of nature inspired optimization in antenna array system. This bridge inspired army ant algorithm(NOABS) is used to reduce the side lobes and to improve the other radiation characteristics to show the effect of the optimization on design characteristics by implementation of NOABS nature inspired algorithm. The entire simulation is carried out on 20 elements linear antenna array.
abstract_zh: 受自然启发的算法为优化中的复杂问题带来了解决方案，其中复杂问题的优化和解决是高度复杂和非线性的。需要根据要优化的参数使用成本函数或适应度函数的适当设计，这可以用于解决任何类型的此类问题。本文中受自然启发的算法在改善辐射特性的天线阵列优化设计中发挥了重要作用。本文以20阵元线性间隔阵列作为天线阵列系统中自然启发优化的例子。采用桥梁启发军蚁算法(NOABS)来减少旁瓣并改善其他辐射特性，以显示通过实施NOABS自然启发算法对设计特性进行优化的效果。整个仿真是在20阵元线性天线阵列上进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用桥接启发的蚁群算法(NOABS)优化线性天线阵列的旁瓣电平，提升辐射特性。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法难以处理天线阵列设计中复杂的非线性问题，需寻找更高效的自然启发式算法解决方案。
AI.method: 基于桥接蚁群算法(NOABS)对20元线性天线阵列进行参数优化，通过改进成本函数实现旁瓣抑制。
AI.result: 成功降低天线阵列旁瓣电平，同时改善方向图波束宽度等辐射性能指标。
AI.conclusion: NOABS算法在天线阵列优化中展现出优于传统方法的性能，为复杂电磁系统设计提供新思路。

search_text: Optimization of side lobe level of linear antenna array using nature optimized ants bridging solutions(NOABS) 使用自然优化蚂蚁桥接解决方案（NOABS）优化线性天线阵列的旁瓣电平 Nature inspired algorithms has brought solutions to complex problems in optimization where the optimization and solution of complex problems is highly complex and nonlinear. There is a need to use proper design of the cost function or the fitness function in terms of the parameters to be optimized, this can be used in solving any type of such problems. In this paper the nature inspired algorithms has played important role in the optimal design of antenna array with improved radiation characteristics. In this paper, 20 elements linearly spaced array is used as an example of nature inspired optimization in antenna array system. This bridge inspired army ant algorithm(NOABS) is used to reduce the side lobes and to improve the other radiation characteristics to show the effect of the optimization on design characteristics by implementation of NOABS nature inspired algorithm. The entire simulation is carried out on 20 elements linear antenna array. 受自然启发的算法为优化中的复杂问题带来了解决方案，其中复杂问题的优化和解决是高度复杂和非线性的。需要根据要优化的参数使用成本函数或适应度函数的适当设计，这可以用于解决任何类型的此类问题。本文中受自然启发的算法在改善辐射特性的天线阵列优化设计中发挥了重要作用。本文以20阵元线性间隔阵列作为天线阵列系统中自然启发优化的例子。采用桥梁启发军蚁算法(NOABS)来减少旁瓣并改善其他辐射特性，以显示通过实施NOABS自然启发算法对设计特性进行优化的效果。整个仿真是在20阵元线性天线阵列上进行的。 本文提出使用桥接启发的蚁群算法(NOABS)优化线性天线阵列的旁瓣电平，提升辐射特性。 Sunit Shantanu Digamber Fulari cs.NE

authors_text: João Carmona,Tamás Karácsony,João Paulo Silva Cunha
title: BlanketGen - A synthetic blanket occlusion augmentation pipeline for MoCap datasets
title_zh: BlanketGen - 用于 MoCap 数据集的合成毯遮挡增强管道
comment: 4 pages, Code and further information to generate the dataset is available at: https://gitlab.inesctec.pt/brain-lab/brain-lab-public/blanket-gen-releases
comments: 4 pages, Code and further information to generate the dataset is available at: https://gitlab.inesctec.pt/brain-lab/brain-lab-public/blanket-gen-releases
abstract: Human motion analysis has seen drastic improvements recently, however, due to the lack of representative datasets, for clinical in-bed scenarios it is still lagging behind. To address this issue, we implemented BlanketGen, a pipeline that augments videos with synthetic blanket occlusions. With this pipeline, we generated an augmented version of the pose estimation dataset 3DPW called BlanketGen-3DPW. We then used this new dataset to fine-tune a Deep Learning model to improve its performance in these scenarios with promising results. Code and further information are available at https://gitlab.inesctec.pt/brain-lab/brain-lab-public/blanket-gen-releases.
summary: Human motion analysis has seen drastic improvements recently, however, due to the lack of representative datasets, for clinical in-bed scenarios it is still lagging behind. To address this issue, we implemented BlanketGen, a pipeline that augments videos with synthetic blanket occlusions. With this pipeline, we generated an augmented version of the pose estimation dataset 3DPW called BlanketGen-3DPW. We then used this new dataset to fine-tune a Deep Learning model to improve its performance in these scenarios with promising results. Code and further information are available at https://gitlab.inesctec.pt/brain-lab/brain-lab-public/blanket-gen-releases.
abstract_zh: 人体运动分析最近有了很大的进步，但由于缺乏代表性数据集，对于临床床上场景来说仍然落后。为了解决这个问题，我们实施了 BlanketGen，这是一个通过合成毯子遮挡来增强视频的管道。通过这个流程，我们生成了姿态估计数据集 3DPW 的增强版本，称为 BlanketGen-3DPW。然后，我们使用这个新数据集来微调深度学习模型，以提高其在这些场景中的性能，并取得可喜的结果。代码和更多信息可在 https://gitlab.inesctec.pt/brain-lab/brain-lab-public/blanket-gen-releases 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BlanketGen管道，通过合成毯子遮挡增强MoCap数据集，以提升临床在床场景下的人体动作分析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对临床在床场景的代表性，导致相关动作分析技术进展滞后，需通过数据增强解决这一问题。
AI.method: 开发合成毯子遮挡生成管道，生成BlanketGen-3DPW数据集，并基于此微调深度学习模型以优化临床场景下的动作估计。
AI.result: 使用增强数据集微调后的模型在临床在床场景中表现出提升效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BlanketGen为临床场景下的动作分析提供了有效数据增强方案，可推动相关技术发展并支持未来研究。

title: Proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
title_zh: 2022年对话机器人大赛论文集
comment: Proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: Proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: The proceedings contain papers on the dialogue systems developed by the twelve teams participating in DRC2022, as well as an overview paper summarizing the competition.
summary: The proceedings contain papers on the dialogue systems developed by the twelve teams participating in DRC2022, as well as an overview paper summarizing the competition.
abstract_zh: 该会议记录包含有关参加 DRC2022 的 12 支团队开发的对话系统的论文，以及总结比赛的概述论文。

AI.tldr: 本文主要介绍2022年对话机器人竞赛（DRC2022）中十二支队伍开发的对话系统，并提供竞赛概述。
AI.motivation: 通过举办竞赛，促进对话系统技术的发展与交流，展示不同团队在对话机器人领域的研究成果。
AI.method: 竞赛组织者收集并整理了各参赛队伍提交的对话系统，并撰写概述论文总结竞赛情况。
AI.result: 论文集收录了十二支队伍的对话系统研究成果，并提供了竞赛的整体分析和总结。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛为对话机器人技术提供了展示平台，有助于推动该领域的发展和技术创新。

title: Evolution of Neural Tangent Kernels under Benign and Adversarial Training
title_zh: 良性和对抗性训练下神经切线核的演化
comment: Accepted to the Conference on Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Accepted to the Conference on Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: Two key challenges facing modern deep learning are mitigating deep networks' vulnerability to adversarial attacks and understanding deep learning's generalization capabilities. Towards the first issue, many defense strategies have been developed, with the most common being Adversarial Training (AT). Towards the second challenge, one of the dominant theories that has emerged is the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) -- a characterization of neural network behavior in the infinite-width limit. In this limit, the kernel is frozen, and the underlying feature map is fixed. In finite widths, however, there is evidence that feature learning happens at the earlier stages of the training (kernel learning) before a second phase where the kernel remains fixed (lazy training). While prior work has aimed at studying adversarial vulnerability through the lens of the frozen infinite-width NTK, there is no work that studies the adversarial robustness of the empirical/finite NTK during training. In this work, we perform an empirical study of the evolution of the empirical NTK under standard and adversarial training, aiming to disambiguate the effect of adversarial training on kernel learning and lazy training. We find under adversarial training, the empirical NTK rapidly converges to a different kernel (and feature map) than standard training. This new kernel provides adversarial robustness, even when non-robust training is performed on top of it. Furthermore, we find that adversarial training on top of a fixed kernel can yield a classifier with $76.1\%$ robust accuracy under PGD attacks with $\varepsilon = 4/255$ on CIFAR-10.
summary: Two key challenges facing modern deep learning are mitigating deep networks' vulnerability to adversarial attacks and understanding deep learning's generalization capabilities. Towards the first issue, many defense strategies have been developed, with the most common being Adversarial Training (AT). Towards the second challenge, one of the dominant theories that has emerged is the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) -- a characterization of neural network behavior in the infinite-width limit. In this limit, the kernel is frozen, and the underlying feature map is fixed. In finite widths, however, there is evidence that feature learning happens at the earlier stages of the training (kernel learning) before a second phase where the kernel remains fixed (lazy training). While prior work has aimed at studying adversarial vulnerability through the lens of the frozen infinite-width NTK, there is no work that studies the adversarial robustness of the empirical/finite NTK during training. In this work, we perform an empirical study of the evolution of the empirical NTK under standard and adversarial training, aiming to disambiguate the effect of adversarial training on kernel learning and lazy training. We find under adversarial training, the empirical NTK rapidly converges to a different kernel (and feature map) than standard training. This new kernel provides adversarial robustness, even when non-robust training is performed on top of it. Furthermore, we find that adversarial training on top of a fixed kernel can yield a classifier with $76.1\%$ robust accuracy under PGD attacks with $\varepsilon = 4/255$ on CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 现代深度学习面临的两个关键挑战是减轻深度网络面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性和理解深度学习的泛化能力。针对第一个问题，人们制定了许多防御策略，其中最常见的是对抗训练（AT）。针对第二个挑战，已出现的主流理论之一是神经正切核（NTK）——无限宽度限制下神经网络行为的表征。在这个限制下，内核被冻结，底层特征图被固定。然而，在有限宽度中，有证据表明特征学习发生在训练的早期阶段（内核学习），然后是内核保持固定的第二阶段（惰性训练）。虽然之前的工作旨在通过冻结的无限宽度 NTK 的视角来研究对抗性脆弱性，但目前还没有研究训练期间经验/有限 NTK 的对抗性鲁棒性的工作。在这项工作中，我们对标准训练和对抗训练下经验 NTK 的演化进行了实证研究，旨在消除对抗训练对内核学习和惰性训练的影响。我们发现在对抗性训练下，经验 NTK 快速收敛到与标准训练不同的内核（和特征图）。即使在其之上执行非鲁棒训练，这个新内核也能提供对抗鲁棒性。此外，我们发现，在 CIFAR-10 上 $\varepsilon = 4/255$ 的 PGD 攻击下，固定内核之上的对抗性训练可以产生具有 $76.1\%$ 鲁棒精度的分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了标准训练和对抗训练下经验神经切线核（NTK）的演化过程，分析对抗训练对核学习和懒惰训练阶段的影响。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习面临两个核心挑战：缓解深度网络对对抗攻击的脆弱性以及理解其泛化能力。现有研究多聚焦于无限宽度下冻结的NTK，但缺乏对有限宽度下对抗训练中经验NTK演化机制的分析。
AI.method: 通过实证方法跟踪标准训练和对抗训练过程中经验NTK的动态变化，对比两种训练方式下核函数及特征映射的收敛差异。
AI.result: 对抗训练使经验NTK快速收敛到与标准训练不同的核函数，该核函数即使在非鲁棒训练下仍能提供对抗鲁棒性，在CIFAR-10数据集上实现76.1%的PGD攻击鲁棒准确率。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练显著改变了神经网络的核学习阶段，生成的新型NTK为模型提供了内在的对抗鲁棒性，揭示了对抗训练与核演化之间的深层关联。
