motivation: 现代深度学习面临两个核心挑战：缓解深度网络对对抗攻击的脆弱性以及理解其泛化能力。现有研究多聚焦于无限宽度下冻结的NTK，但缺乏对有限宽度下对抗训练中经验NTK演化机制的分析。
method: 通过实证方法跟踪标准训练和对抗训练过程中经验NTK的动态变化，对比两种训练方式下核函数及特征映射的收敛差异。
result: 对抗训练使经验NTK快速收敛到与标准训练不同的核函数，该核函数即使在非鲁棒训练下仍能提供对抗鲁棒性，在CIFAR-10数据集上实现76.1%的PGD攻击鲁棒准确率。
conclusion: 对抗训练显著改变了神经网络的核学习阶段，生成的新型NTK为模型提供了内在的对抗鲁棒性，揭示了对抗训练与核演化之间的深层关联。
search_text: Evolution of Neural Tangent Kernels under Benign and Adversarial Training 良性和对抗性训练下神经切线核的演化 Two key challenges facing modern deep learning are mitigating deep networks' vulnerability to adversarial attacks and understanding deep learning's generalization capabilities. Towards the first issue, many defense strategies have been developed, with the most common being Adversarial Training (AT). Towards the second challenge, one of the dominant theories that has emerged is the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) -- a characterization of neural network behavior in the infinite-width limit. In this limit, the kernel is frozen, and the underlying feature map is fixed. In finite widths, however, there is evidence that feature learning happens at the earlier stages of the training (kernel learning) before a second phase where the kernel remains fixed (lazy training). While prior work has aimed at studying adversarial vulnerability through the lens of the frozen infinite-width NTK, there is no work that studies the adversarial robustness of the empirical/finite NTK during training. In this work, we perform an empirical study of the evolution of the empirical NTK under standard and adversarial training, aiming to disambiguate the effect of adversarial training on kernel learning and lazy training. We find under adversarial training, the empirical NTK rapidly converges to a different kernel (and feature map) than standard training. This new kernel provides adversarial robustness, even when non-robust training is performed on top of it. Furthermore, we find that adversarial training on top of a fixed kernel can yield a classifier with $76.1\%$ robust accuracy under PGD attacks with $\varepsilon = 4/255$ on CIFAR-10. 现代深度学习面临的两个关键挑战是减轻深度网络面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性和理解深度学习的泛化能力。针对第一个问题，人们制定了许多防御策略，其中最常见的是对抗训练（AT）。针对第二个挑战，已出现的主流理论之一是神经正切核（NTK）——无限宽度限制下神经网络行为的表征。在这个限制下，内核被冻结，底层特征图被固定。然而，在有限宽度中，有证据表明特征学习发生在训练的早期阶段（内核学习），然后是内核保持固定的第二阶段（惰性训练）。虽然之前的工作旨在通过冻结的无限宽度 NTK 的视角来研究对抗性脆弱性，但目前还没有研究训练期间经验/有限 NTK 的对抗性鲁棒性的工作。在这项工作中，我们对标准训练和对抗训练下经验 NTK 的演化进行了实证研究，旨在消除对抗训练对内核学习和惰性训练的影响。我们发现在对抗性训练下，经验 NTK 快速收敛到与标准训练不同的内核（和特征图）。即使在其之上执行非鲁棒训练，这个新内核也能提供对抗鲁棒性。此外，我们发现，在 CIFAR-10 上 $\varepsilon = 4/255$ 的 PGD 攻击下，固定内核之上的对抗性训练可以产生具有 $76.1\%$ 鲁棒精度的分类器。 本文研究了标准训练和对抗训练下经验神经切线核（NTK）的演化过程，分析对抗训练对核学习和懒惰训练阶段的影响。 Noel Loo,Ramin Hasani,Alexander Amini,Daniela Rus cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE,stat.ML

title: Adversarial Transformer for Repairing Human Airway Segmentation
title_zh: 用于修复人体气道分割的对抗变压器
abstract: Discontinuity in the delineation of peripheral bronchioles hinders the potential clinical application of automated airway segmentation models. Moreover, the deployment of such models is limited by the data heterogeneity across different centres, and pathological abnormalities also make achieving accurate robust segmentation in distal small airways difficult. Meanwhile, the diagnosis and prognosis of lung diseases often rely on evaluating structural changes in those anatomical regions. To address this gap, this paper presents a patch-scale adversarial-based refinement network that takes in preliminary segmentation along with original CT images and outputs a refined mask of the airway structure. The method is validated on three different datasets encompassing healthy cases, cases with cystic fibrosis and cases with COVID-19. The results are quantitatively evaluated by seven metrics and achieved more than a 15% rise in detected length ratio and detected branch ratio, showing promising performance compared to previously proposed models. The visual illustration also proves our refinement guided by a patch-scale discriminator and centreline objective functions is effective in detecting discontinuities and missing bronchioles. Furthermore, the generalizability of our refinement pipeline is tested on three previous models and improves their segmentation completeness significantly.
summary: Discontinuity in the delineation of peripheral bronchioles hinders the potential clinical application of automated airway segmentation models. Moreover, the deployment of such models is limited by the data heterogeneity across different centres, and pathological abnormalities also make achieving accurate robust segmentation in distal small airways difficult. Meanwhile, the diagnosis and prognosis of lung diseases often rely on evaluating structural changes in those anatomical regions. To address this gap, this paper presents a patch-scale adversarial-based refinement network that takes in preliminary segmentation along with original CT images and outputs a refined mask of the airway structure. The method is validated on three different datasets encompassing healthy cases, cases with cystic fibrosis and cases with COVID-19. The results are quantitatively evaluated by seven metrics and achieved more than a 15% rise in detected length ratio and detected branch ratio, showing promising performance compared to previously proposed models. The visual illustration also proves our refinement guided by a patch-scale discriminator and centreline objective functions is effective in detecting discontinuities and missing bronchioles. Furthermore, the generalizability of our refinement pipeline is tested on three previous models and improves their segmentation completeness significantly.
abstract_zh: 外周细支气管描绘的不连续性阻碍了自动气道分割模型的潜在临床应用。此外，此类模型的部署受到不同中心之间数据异质性的限制，病理异常也使得在远端小气道中实现准确稳健的分割变得困难。同时，肺部疾病的诊断和预后通常依赖于评估这些解剖区域的结构变化。为了解决这一差距，本文提出了一种基于斑块规模的对抗性细化网络，该网络与原始 CT 图像一起进行初步分割，并输出气道结构的细化掩模。该方法在三个不同的数据集上进行了验证，包括健康病例、囊性纤维化病例和 COVID-19 病例。结果通过七个指标进行定量评估，检测到的长度比和检测到的分支比提高了 15% 以上，与之前提出的模型相比，显示出有希望的性能。视觉插图还证明了我们由斑块尺度鉴别器和中心线目标函数引导的细化在检测不连续性和缺失细支气管方面是有效的。此外，我们的细化流程的通用性在之前的三个模型上进行了测试，并显着提高了它们的分割完整性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗Transformer的修复网络，用于改进人类气道分割中的不连续性和小气道缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有气道分割模型在临床应用中存在数据异质性、病理异常导致的分割不准确问题，而精准分割对肺部疾病诊断至关重要。
AI.method: 设计补丁尺度对抗网络，结合初步分割结果与原始CT图像，通过对抗损失和中心线目标函数优化分割掩码。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（健康/囊性纤维化/Covid-19）上检测长度和分支比例提升超15%，可视化验证有效检测断裂支气管，且可提升其他模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升气道分割完整性与鲁棒性，为肺部疾病结构分析提供可靠工具。

title: Ontology Development is Consensus Creation, Not (Merely) Representation
title_zh: 本体开发是共识的创造，而不是（仅仅）代表
abstract: Ontology development methodologies emphasise knowledge gathering from domain experts and documentary resources, and knowledge representation using an ontology language such as OWL or FOL. However, working ontologists are often surprised by how challenging and slow it can be to develop ontologies. Here, with a particular emphasis on the sorts of ontologies that are content-heavy and intended to be shared across a community of users (reference ontologies), we propose that a significant and heretofore under-emphasised contributor of challenges during ontology development is the need to create, or bring about, consensus in the face of disagreement. For this reason reference ontology development cannot be automated, at least within the limitations of existing AI approaches. Further, for the same reason ontologists are required to have specific social-negotiating skills which are currently lacking in most technical curricula.
summary: Ontology development methodologies emphasise knowledge gathering from domain experts and documentary resources, and knowledge representation using an ontology language such as OWL or FOL. However, working ontologists are often surprised by how challenging and slow it can be to develop ontologies. Here, with a particular emphasis on the sorts of ontologies that are content-heavy and intended to be shared across a community of users (reference ontologies), we propose that a significant and heretofore under-emphasised contributor of challenges during ontology development is the need to create, or bring about, consensus in the face of disagreement. For this reason reference ontology development cannot be automated, at least within the limitations of existing AI approaches. Further, for the same reason ontologists are required to have specific social-negotiating skills which are currently lacking in most technical curricula.
abstract_zh: 本体开发方法强调从领域专家和文献资源收集知识，并使用 OWL 或 FOL 等本体语言表示知识。然而，工作本体论者常常对开发本体论的挑战性和缓慢性感到惊讶。在这里，特别强调内容丰富且旨在在用户社区中共享的本体（参考本体），我们提出，本体开发过程中的一个重要且迄今为止未被充分重视的挑战贡献者是在面对分歧时需要创建或达成共识。因此，参考本体开发无法自动化，至少在现有人工智能方法的限制内是这样。此外，出于同样的原因，本体论者需要具备目前大多数技术课程中缺乏的特定社交谈判技能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了本体开发过程中共识创建的重要性，指出其不仅是知识表示问题，更是社会协商过程。
AI.motivation: 现有本体开发方法过度强调知识收集与表示，忽视了跨社区共享本体所需的共识达成难题，导致开发效率低下且难以自动化。
AI.method: 通过分析参考本体开发的实际挑战，结合对现有AI自动化方法的局限性评估，提出共识创建是核心障碍的论点。
AI.result: 证明参考本体开发无法依赖现有AI技术自动化，需依赖具备社会协商能力的本体学家推动共识形成。
AI.conclusion: 本体开发本质是社会共识构建过程，需将社会协商技能纳入本体学家培养体系以解决当前瓶颈。

authors_text: Jun Wang,Weixun Li,Changyu Hou,Xin Tang,Yixuan Qiao,Rui Fang,Pengyong Li,Peng Gao,Guotong Xie
title: HCL: Improving Graph Representation with Hierarchical Contrastive Learning
title_zh: HCL：通过分层对比学习改进图表示
comment: published at The 21st International Semantic Web Conference ( ISWC 2022 )
comments: published at The 21st International Semantic Web Conference ( ISWC 2022 )
abstract: Contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful tool for graph representation learning. However, most contrastive learning methods learn features of graphs with fixed coarse-grained scale, which might underestimate either local or global information. To capture more hierarchical and richer representation, we propose a novel Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HCL) framework that explicitly learns graph representation in a hierarchical manner. Specifically, HCL includes two key components: a novel adaptive Learning to Pool (L2Pool) method to construct more reasonable multi-scale graph topology for more comprehensive contrastive objective, a novel multi-channel pseudo-siamese network to further enable more expressive learning of mutual information within each scale. Comprehensive experimental results show HCL achieves competitive performance on 12 datasets involving node classification, node clustering and graph classification. In addition, the visualization of learned representation reveals that HCL successfully captures meaningful characteristics of graphs.
summary: Contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful tool for graph representation learning. However, most contrastive learning methods learn features of graphs with fixed coarse-grained scale, which might underestimate either local or global information. To capture more hierarchical and richer representation, we propose a novel Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HCL) framework that explicitly learns graph representation in a hierarchical manner. Specifically, HCL includes two key components: a novel adaptive Learning to Pool (L2Pool) method to construct more reasonable multi-scale graph topology for more comprehensive contrastive objective, a novel multi-channel pseudo-siamese network to further enable more expressive learning of mutual information within each scale. Comprehensive experimental results show HCL achieves competitive performance on 12 datasets involving node classification, node clustering and graph classification. In addition, the visualization of learned representation reveals that HCL successfully captures meaningful characteristics of graphs.
abstract_zh: 对比学习已成为图表示学习的强大工具。然而，大多数对比学习方法学习具有固定粗粒度尺度的图特征，这可能会低估局部或全局信息。为了捕获更多层次和更丰富的表示，我们提出了一种新颖的层次对比学习（HCL）框架，该框架以层次方式显式学习图表示。具体来说，HCL 包括两个关键组件：一种新颖的自适应学习池（L2Pool）方法，用于构建更合理的多尺度图拓扑，以实现更全面的对比目标；一种新颖的多通道伪暹罗网络，进一步实现每个尺度内互信息的更具表现力的学习。综合实验结果表明，HCL 在涉及节点分类、节点聚类和图分类的 12 个数据集上取得了有竞争力的性能。此外，学习表示的可视化表明 HCL 成功捕获了图的有意义的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层对比学习框架HCL，通过自适应池化和多通道伪孪生网络提升图表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在固定尺度下学习图特征，可能忽略局部或全局信息，难以捕捉层次化表示。
AI.method: HCL包含两个核心组件：1) 自适应L2Pool方法构建多尺度图拓扑；2) 多通道伪孪生网络增强各尺度互信息学习。
AI.result: HCL在12个数据集的节点分类、聚类和图分类任务中表现优异，可视化结果验证了其捕捉图特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HCL通过层次化建模有效提升了图表示的丰富性，在多尺度特征学习和互信息挖掘方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Min Cao,Cong Ding,Chen Chen,Junchi Yan,Qi Tian
title: End-to-End Context-Aided Unicity Matching for Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于人员重新识别的端到端上下文辅助唯一性匹配
abstract: Most existing person re-identification methods compute the matching relations between person images across camera views based on the ranking of the pairwise similarities. This matching strategy with the lack of the global viewpoint and the context's consideration inevitably leads to ambiguous matching results and sub-optimal performance. Based on a natural assumption that images belonging to the same person identity should not match with images belonging to multiple different person identities across views, called the unicity of person matching on the identity level, we propose an end-to-end person unicity matching architecture for learning and refining the person matching relations. First, we adopt the image samples' contextual information in feature space to generate the initial soft matching results by using graph neural networks. Secondly, we utilize the samples' global context relationship to refine the soft matching results and reach the matching unicity through bipartite graph matching. Given full consideration to real-world person re-identification applications, we achieve the unicity matching in both one-shot and multi-shot settings of person re-identification and further develop a fast version of the unicity matching without losing the performance. The proposed method is evaluated on five public benchmarks, including four multi-shot datasets MSMT17, DukeMTMC, Market1501, CUHK03, and a one-shot dataset VIPeR. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed method on performance and efficiency.
summary: Most existing person re-identification methods compute the matching relations between person images across camera views based on the ranking of the pairwise similarities. This matching strategy with the lack of the global viewpoint and the context's consideration inevitably leads to ambiguous matching results and sub-optimal performance. Based on a natural assumption that images belonging to the same person identity should not match with images belonging to multiple different person identities across views, called the unicity of person matching on the identity level, we propose an end-to-end person unicity matching architecture for learning and refining the person matching relations. First, we adopt the image samples' contextual information in feature space to generate the initial soft matching results by using graph neural networks. Secondly, we utilize the samples' global context relationship to refine the soft matching results and reach the matching unicity through bipartite graph matching. Given full consideration to real-world person re-identification applications, we achieve the unicity matching in both one-shot and multi-shot settings of person re-identification and further develop a fast version of the unicity matching without losing the performance. The proposed method is evaluated on five public benchmarks, including four multi-shot datasets MSMT17, DukeMTMC, Market1501, CUHK03, and a one-shot dataset VIPeR. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed method on performance and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的人物重新识别方法基于成对相似度的排名来计算跨摄像机视图的人物图像之间的匹配关系。这种缺乏全局视角和上下文考虑的匹配策略不可避免地会导致匹配结果模糊和性能次优。基于属于同一个人身份的图像不应该与属于多个不同个人身份的图像跨视图匹配的自然假设（称为身份级别上个人匹配的唯一性），我们提出了一种端到端的个人唯一性匹配架构，用于学习和细化个人匹配关系。首先，我们采用特征空间中图像样本的上下文信息，利用图神经网络生成初始软匹配结果。其次，我们利用样本的全局上下文关系来细化软匹配结果，并通过二部图匹配达到匹配唯一性。充分考虑现实世界的行人重识别应用，我们在行人重识别的单次和多次设置中实现了单性匹配，并进一步开发了一种在不损失性能的情况下快速版本的单性匹配。该方法在五个公共基准上进行了评估，包括四个多样本数据集 MSMT17、DukeMTMC、Market1501、CUHK03 和一个单样本数据集 VIPeR。实验结果表明了该方法在性能和效率上的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的上下文辅助唯一性匹配方法，用于改进跨摄像头视角的人体再识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因缺乏全局视角和上下文信息考虑，导致匹配结果模糊且性能不佳。基于同一身份图像不应跨视角匹配多个不同身份的假设，提出唯一性匹配策略以提升准确性。
AI.method: 采用图神经网络利用上下文信息生成初始软匹配结果，并通过二分图匹配结合全局上下文关系优化匹配唯一性，同时支持单样本和多样本场景的快速版本。
AI.result: 在MSMT17等五个公开数据集上验证，方法在性能和效率上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强制匹配唯一性约束，有效提升了跨视角人体再识别的准确率与鲁棒性。

title: Ethics for Digital Medicine: A Path for Ethical Emerging Medical IoT Design
title_zh: 数字医学伦理：新兴医疗物联网设计的伦理之路
abstract: The dawn of the digital medicine era, ushered in by increasingly powerful embedded systems and Internet of Things (IoT) computing devices, is creating new therapies and biomedical solutions that promise to positively transform our quality of life. However, the digital medicine revolution also creates unforeseen and complex ethical, regulatory, and societal issues. In this article, we reflect on the ethical challenges facing digital medicine. We discuss the perils of ethical oversights in medical devices, and the role of professional codes and regulatory oversight towards the ethical design, deployment, and operation of digital medicine devices that safely and effectively meet the needs of patients. We advocate for an ensemble approach of intensive education, programmable ethical behaviors, and ethical analysis frameworks, to prevent mishaps and sustain ethical innovation, design, and lifecycle management of emerging digital medicine devices.
summary: The dawn of the digital medicine era, ushered in by increasingly powerful embedded systems and Internet of Things (IoT) computing devices, is creating new therapies and biomedical solutions that promise to positively transform our quality of life. However, the digital medicine revolution also creates unforeseen and complex ethical, regulatory, and societal issues. In this article, we reflect on the ethical challenges facing digital medicine. We discuss the perils of ethical oversights in medical devices, and the role of professional codes and regulatory oversight towards the ethical design, deployment, and operation of digital medicine devices that safely and effectively meet the needs of patients. We advocate for an ensemble approach of intensive education, programmable ethical behaviors, and ethical analysis frameworks, to prevent mishaps and sustain ethical innovation, design, and lifecycle management of emerging digital medicine devices.
abstract_zh: 随着日益强大的嵌入式系统和物联网 (IoT) 计算设备的到来，数字医学时代的曙光正在创造新的疗法和生物医学解决方案，有望积极改变我们的生活质量。然而，数字医学革命也带来了不可预见的复杂伦理、监管和社会问题。在本文中，我们反思了数字医学面临的伦理挑战。我们讨论医疗设备中道德监督的危险，以及专业规范和监管监督对安全有效地满足患者需求的数字医疗设备的道德设计、部署和操作的作用。我们提倡采用强化教育、可编程道德行为和道德分析框架的综合方法，以防止事故发生并维持新兴数字医疗设备的道德创新、设计和生命周期管理。

AI.tldr: 探讨数字医学中的伦理挑战，并提出通过教育、可编程伦理行为和分析框架来确保医疗物联网设备的伦理设计与应用
AI.motivation: 数字医学的快速发展引发复杂的伦理问题，需通过伦理框架确保患者安全与技术有效应用
AI.method: 通过反思伦理挑战、分析现有问题，并提出结合教育、可编程伦理行为及分析框架的综合解决方案
AI.result: 提出了一套综合方法，包括教育、可编程伦理行为和分析框架，以预防医疗物联网设备的伦理风险并支持持续创新
AI.conclusion: 强调伦理设计在数字医学中的核心地位，呼吁通过教育、监管和技术手段的结合，确保医疗物联网设备的安全、有效与伦理合规

search_text: Ethics for Digital Medicine: A Path for Ethical Emerging Medical IoT Design 数字医学伦理：新兴医疗物联网设计的伦理之路 The dawn of the digital medicine era, ushered in by increasingly powerful embedded systems and Internet of Things (IoT) computing devices, is creating new therapies and biomedical solutions that promise to positively transform our quality of life. However, the digital medicine revolution also creates unforeseen and complex ethical, regulatory, and societal issues. In this article, we reflect on the ethical challenges facing digital medicine. We discuss the perils of ethical oversights in medical devices, and the role of professional codes and regulatory oversight towards the ethical design, deployment, and operation of digital medicine devices that safely and effectively meet the needs of patients. We advocate for an ensemble approach of intensive education, programmable ethical behaviors, and ethical analysis frameworks, to prevent mishaps and sustain ethical innovation, design, and lifecycle management of emerging digital medicine devices. 随着日益强大的嵌入式系统和物联网 (IoT) 计算设备的到来，数字医学时代的曙光正在创造新的疗法和生物医学解决方案，有望积极改变我们的生活质量。然而，数字医学革命也带来了不可预见的复杂伦理、监管和社会问题。在本文中，我们反思了数字医学面临的伦理挑战。我们讨论医疗设备中道德监督的危险，以及专业规范和监管监督对安全有效地满足患者需求的数字医疗设备的道德设计、部署和操作的作用。我们提倡采用强化教育、可编程道德行为和道德分析框架的综合方法，以防止事故发生并维持新兴数字医疗设备的道德创新、设计和生命周期管理。 探讨数字医学中的伦理挑战，并提出通过教育、可编程伦理行为和分析框架来确保医疗物联网设备的伦理设计与应用 Sudeep Pasricha cs.CY,cs.AI

title: Integrated Brier Score based Survival Cobra -- A regression based approach
title_zh: 基于综合 Brier 评分的 Survival Cobra——基于回归的方法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.11919
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.11919
abstract: Recently Goswami et al. \cite{goswami2022concordance} introduced two novel implementations of combined regression strategy to find the conditional survival function. The paper uses regression-based weak learners and provides an alternative version of the combined regression strategy (COBRA) ensemble using the Integrated Brier Score to predict conditional survival function. We create a novel predictor based on a weighted version of all machine predictions taking weights as a specific function of normalized Integrated Brier Score. We use two different norms (Frobenius and Sup norm) to extract the proximity points in the algorithm. Our implementations consider right-censored data too. We illustrate the proposed algorithms through some real-life data analysis.
summary: Recently Goswami et al. \cite{goswami2022concordance} introduced two novel implementations of combined regression strategy to find the conditional survival function. The paper uses regression-based weak learners and provides an alternative version of the combined regression strategy (COBRA) ensemble using the Integrated Brier Score to predict conditional survival function. We create a novel predictor based on a weighted version of all machine predictions taking weights as a specific function of normalized Integrated Brier Score. We use two different norms (Frobenius and Sup norm) to extract the proximity points in the algorithm. Our implementations consider right-censored data too. We illustrate the proposed algorithms through some real-life data analysis.
abstract_zh: 最近，Goswami 等人。 \cite{goswami2022concordance} 引入了组合回归策略的两种新颖实现来查找条件生存函数。该论文使用基于回归的弱学习器，并提供了组合回归策略（COBRA）集成的替代版本，使用 Integrated Brier Score 来预测条件生存函数。我们基于所有机器预测的加权版本创建了一个新颖的预测器，将权重作为归一化综合 Brier 分数的特定函数。我们使用两种不同的范数（Frobenius 和 Sup 范数）来提取算法中的邻近点。我们的实现也考虑右删失数据。我们通过一些现实生活中的数据分析来说明所提出的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于综合Brier分数的生存COBRA回归方法，用于预测条件生存函数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理右删失数据和预测准确性方面存在不足，需更有效的集成策略。
AI.method: 采用回归弱学习器，结合归一化综合Brier分数的加权预测，利用Frobenius和Sup范数提取邻近点。
AI.result: 通过实际数据验证，所提算法在预测性能上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理右删失数据，适用于实际生存分析场景。

authors_text: Marc Habermann,Lingjie Liu,Weipeng Xu,Gerard Pons-Moll,Michael Zollhoefer,Christian Theobalt
title: HDHumans: A Hybrid Approach for High-fidelity Digital Humans
title_zh: HDHumans：高保真数字人类的混合方法
abstract: Photo-real digital human avatars are of enormous importance in graphics, as they enable immersive communication over the globe, improve gaming and entertainment experiences, and can be particularly beneficial for AR and VR settings. However, current avatar generation approaches either fall short in high-fidelity novel view synthesis, generalization to novel motions, reproduction of loose clothing, or they cannot render characters at the high resolution offered by modern displays. To this end, we propose HDHumans, which is the first method for HD human character synthesis that jointly produces an accurate and temporally coherent 3D deforming surface and highly photo-realistic images of arbitrary novel views and of motions not seen at training time. At the technical core, our method tightly integrates a classical deforming character template with neural radiance fields (NeRF). Our method is carefully designed to achieve a synergy between classical surface deformation and NeRF. First, the template guides the NeRF, which allows synthesizing novel views of a highly dynamic and articulated character and even enables the synthesis of novel motions. Second, we also leverage the dense pointclouds resulting from NeRF to further improve the deforming surface via 3D-to-3D supervision. We outperform the state of the art quantitatively and qualitatively in terms of synthesis quality and resolution, as well as the quality of 3D surface reconstruction.
summary: Photo-real digital human avatars are of enormous importance in graphics, as they enable immersive communication over the globe, improve gaming and entertainment experiences, and can be particularly beneficial for AR and VR settings. However, current avatar generation approaches either fall short in high-fidelity novel view synthesis, generalization to novel motions, reproduction of loose clothing, or they cannot render characters at the high resolution offered by modern displays. To this end, we propose HDHumans, which is the first method for HD human character synthesis that jointly produces an accurate and temporally coherent 3D deforming surface and highly photo-realistic images of arbitrary novel views and of motions not seen at training time. At the technical core, our method tightly integrates a classical deforming character template with neural radiance fields (NeRF). Our method is carefully designed to achieve a synergy between classical surface deformation and NeRF. First, the template guides the NeRF, which allows synthesizing novel views of a highly dynamic and articulated character and even enables the synthesis of novel motions. Second, we also leverage the dense pointclouds resulting from NeRF to further improve the deforming surface via 3D-to-3D supervision. We outperform the state of the art quantitatively and qualitatively in terms of synthesis quality and resolution, as well as the quality of 3D surface reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 照片真实的数字化身在图形学中非常重要，因为它们可以实现全球沉浸式通信，改善游戏和娱乐体验，并且对 AR 和 VR 设置特别有益。然而，当前的化身生成方法要么在高保真新颖的视图合成、新颖动作的概括、宽松服装的再现方面存在缺陷，要么无法以现代显示器提供的高分辨率渲染角色。为此，我们提出了 HDHumans，它是第一种高清人物角色合成方法，可联合生成准确且时间连贯的 3D 变形表面以及训练时未见过的任意新颖视图和运动的高度逼真的图像。在技​​术核心，我们的方法将经典变形角色模板与神经辐射场（NeRF）紧密结合。我们的方法经过精心设计，以实现经典表面变形和 NeRF 之间的协同作用。首先，该模板指导 NeRF，它允许合成高度动态和清晰的角色的新颖视图，甚至能够合成新颖的动作。其次，我们还利用 NeRF 产生的密集点云通过 3D 到 3D 监督进一步改善变形表面。我们在合成质量和分辨率以及 3D 表面重建的质量方面在数量和质量上都优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HDHumans的混合方法，用于生成高保真度的数字人类，能够合成高质量的任意新视角和未见过的动作的图像，并重建精确的3D表面。
AI.motivation: 现有数字人生成方法在新视角合成、动作泛化、宽松衣物再现及高分辨率渲染方面存在不足，难以满足AR/VR等场景的需求。
AI.method: 将传统变形角色模板与神经辐射场（NeRF）紧密结合，利用模板引导NeRF生成动态角色的新视角和新动作，同时通过NeRF生成的密集点云进行3D到3D监督以优化表面变形。
AI.result: 在合成质量、分辨率及3D表面重建质量方面，定量和定性结果均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HDHumans通过融合经典表面变形与NeRF的优势，首次实现了高保真数字人类的合成，为高分辨率和动态场景提供了有效解决方案。

However, current avatar generation approaches either fall short in high-fidelity novel view synthesis, generalization to novel motions, reproduction of loose clothing, or they cannot render characters at the high resolution offered by modern displays. To this end, we propose HDHumans, which is the first method for HD human character synthesis that jointly produces an accurate and temporally coherent 3D deforming surface and highly photo-realistic images of arbitrary novel views and of motions not seen at training time. Second, we also leverage the dense pointclouds resulting from NeRF to further improve the deforming surface via 3D-to-3D supervision. title: On-Board Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction Using Behavioral Features
title_zh: 使用行为特征的车载行人轨迹预测
comment: Accepted at ICMLA 2022, 7 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted at ICMLA 2022, 7 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to pedestrian trajectory prediction for on-board camera systems, which utilizes behavioral features of pedestrians that can be inferred from visual observations. Our proposed method, called Behavior-Aware Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction (BA-PTP), processes multiple input modalities, i.e. bounding boxes, body and head orientation of pedestrians as well as their pose, with independent encoding streams. The encodings of each stream are fused using a modality attention mechanism, resulting in a final embedding that is used to predict future bounding boxes in the image. In experiments on two datasets for pedestrian behavior prediction, we demonstrate the benefit of using behavioral features for pedestrian trajectory prediction and evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed encoding strategy. Additionally, we investigate the relevance of different behavioral features on the prediction performance based on an ablation study.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to pedestrian trajectory prediction for on-board camera systems, which utilizes behavioral features of pedestrians that can be inferred from visual observations. Our proposed method, called Behavior-Aware Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction (BA-PTP), processes multiple input modalities, i.e. bounding boxes, body and head orientation of pedestrians as well as their pose, with independent encoding streams. The encodings of each stream are fused using a modality attention mechanism, resulting in a final embedding that is used to predict future bounding boxes in the image. In experiments on two datasets for pedestrian behavior prediction, we demonstrate the benefit of using behavioral features for pedestrian trajectory prediction and evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed encoding strategy. Additionally, we investigate the relevance of different behavioral features on the prediction performance based on an ablation study.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种车载摄像头系统行人轨迹预测的新方法，该方法利用可以从视觉观察中推断出的行人的行为特征。我们提出的方法称为行为感知行人轨迹预测（BA-PTP），使用独立的编码流处理多种输入模式，即行人的边界框、身体和头部方向及其姿势。每个流的编码使用模态注意机制进行融合，从而产生最终的嵌入，用于预测图像中未来的边界框。在两个行人行为预测数据集的实验中，我们展示了使用行为特征进行行人轨迹预测的好处，并评估了所提出的编码策略的有效性。此外，我们基于消融研究研究了不同行为特征对预测性能的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于行为特征的行人轨迹预测方法，用于车载摄像头系统。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在预测行人轨迹时忽略了行人行为特征，导致预测精度不高，因此本文旨在利用行人行为特征提升预测效果。
AI.method: 提出名为BA-PTP的方法，通过独立编码流处理行人边界框、身体和头部方向以及姿态等多种输入模态，并使用模态注意力机制融合编码结果，以预测未来边界框。
AI.result: 在两个行人行为预测数据集上的实验表明，使用行为特征可以提高预测效果，且所提编码策略有效。
AI.conclusion: 行为特征对行人轨迹预测具有重要意义，所提出的编码策略能够有效提升预测性能。

search_text: On-Board Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction Using Behavioral Features 使用行为特征的车载行人轨迹预测 This paper presents a novel approach to pedestrian trajectory prediction for on-board camera systems, which utilizes behavioral features of pedestrians that can be inferred from visual observations. Our proposed method, called Behavior-Aware Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction (BA-PTP), processes multiple input modalities, i.e. bounding boxes, body and head orientation of pedestrians as well as their pose, with independent encoding streams. The encodings of each stream are fused using a modality attention mechanism, resulting in a final embedding that is used to predict future bounding boxes in the image. In experiments on two datasets for pedestrian behavior prediction, we demonstrate the benefit of using behavioral features for pedestrian trajectory prediction and evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed encoding strategy. Additionally, we investigate the relevance of different behavioral features on the prediction performance based on an ablation study. 本文提出了一种车载摄像头系统行人轨迹预测的新方法，该方法利用可以从视觉观察中推断出的行人的行为特征。我们提出的方法称为行为感知行人轨迹预测（BA-PTP），使用独立的编码流处理多种输入模式，即行人的边界框、身体和头部方向及其姿势。每个流的编码使用模态注意机制进行融合，从而产生最终的嵌入，用于预测图像中未来的边界框。在两个行人行为预测数据集的实验中，我们展示了使用行为特征进行行人轨迹预测的好处，并评估了所提出的编码策略的有效性。此外，我们基于消融研究研究了不同行为特征对预测性能的相关性。 本文提出了一种基于行为特征的行人轨迹预测方法，用于车载摄像头系统。 Phillip Czech,Markus Braun,Ulrich Kreßel,Bin Yang cs.CV

title: Unbalanced Triangle Detection and Enumeration Hardness for Unions of Conjunctive Queries
title_zh: 连接查询并集的不平衡三角形检测和枚举难度
comment: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 21, Issue 1 (March 27, 2025) lmcs:10990
comments: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 21, Issue 1 (March 27, 2025) lmcs:10990
abstract: We study the enumeration of answers to Unions of Conjunctive Queries (UCQs) with optimal time guarantees. More precisely, we wish to identify the queries that can be solved with linear preprocessing time and constant delay. Despite the basic nature of this problem, it was shown only recently that UCQs can be solved within these time bounds if they admit free-connex union extensions, even if all individual CQs in the union are intractable with respect to the same complexity measure. Our goal is to understand whether there exist additional tractable UCQs, not covered by the currently known algorithms. As a first step, we show that some previously unclassified UCQs are hard using the classic 3SUM hypothesis, via a known reduction from 3SUM to triangle listing in graphs. As a second step, we identify a question about a variant of this graph task that is unavoidable if we want to classify all self-join-free UCQs: is it possible to decide the existence of a triangle in a vertex-unbalanced tripartite graph in linear time? We prove that this task is equivalent in hardness to some family of UCQs. Finally, we show a dichotomy for unions of two self-join-free CQs if we assume the answer to this question is negative. In conclusion, this paper pinpoints a computational barrier in the form of a single decision problem that is key to advancing our understanding of the enumeration complexity of many UCQs. Without a breakthrough for unbalanced triangle detection, we have no hope of finding an efficient algorithm for additional unions of two self-join-free CQs. On the other hand, a sufficiently efficient unbalanced triangle detection algorithm can be turned into an efficient algorithm for a family of UCQs currently not known to be tractable.

More precisely, we wish to identify the queries that can be solved with linear preprocessing time and constant delay. Despite the basic nature of this problem, it was shown only recently that UCQs can be solved within these time bounds if they admit free-connex union extensions, even if all individual CQs in the union are intractable with respect to the same complexity measure. Our goal is to understand whether there exist additional tractable UCQs, not covered by the currently known algorithms. As a first step, we show that some previously unclassified UCQs are hard using the classic 3SUM hypothesis, via a known reduction from 3SUM to triangle listing in graphs. As a second step, we identify a question about a variant of this graph task that is unavoidable if we want to classify all self-join-free UCQs: is it possible to decide the existence of a triangle in a vertex-unbalanced tripartite graph in linear time? We prove that this task is equivalent in hardness to some family of UCQs. Finally, we show a dichotomy for unions of two self-join-free CQs if we assume the answer to this question is negative. In conclusion, this paper pinpoints a computational barrier in the form of a single decision problem that is key to advancing our understanding of the enumeration complexity of many UCQs. On the other hand, a sufficiently efficient unbalanced triangle detection algorithm can be turned into an efficient algorithm for a family of UCQs currently not known to be tractable.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有最佳时间保证的联合查询联合（UCQ）的答案枚举。更准确地说，我们希望确定可以通过线性预处理时间和恒定延迟来解决的查询。尽管这个问题具有基本性质，但直到最近才表明，如果 UCQ 允许自由连接联合扩展，则可以在这些时间范围内解决，即使联合中的所有单个 CQ 都难以处理相同的复杂性度量。我们的目标是了解是否存在当前已知算法未涵盖的其他易于处理的 UCQ。作为第一步，我们通过已知的从 3SUM 简化为图中的三角形列表，证明一些以前未分类的 UCQ 很难使用经典的 3SUM 假设。第二步，我们确定一个关于该图任务变体的问题，如果我们想要对所有自连接自由 UCQ 进行分类，这个问题是不可避免的：是否有可能在线性时间内确定顶点不平衡三方图中三角形的存在？我们证明这个任务在难度上与某些 UCQ 系列是等效的。最后，如果我们假设这个问题的答案是否定的，那么我们将展示两个自连接自由 CQ 的并集的二分法。总之，本文指出了单一决策问题形式的计算障碍，这对于增进我们对许多 UCQ 的枚举复杂性的理解至关重要。如果不平衡三角形检测没有突破，我们就没有希望找到一种有效的算法来实现两个自连接自由 CQ 的附加并集。另一方面，足够有效的不平衡三角形检测算法可以转变为针对当前未知的易于处理的 UCQ 系列的有效算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了联合连通查询（UCQ）的答案枚举问题，分析其时间复杂度并探讨是否存在未被现有算法覆盖的可处理UCQ。
AI.motivation: 尽管UCQ的答案枚举问题基础，但近期才证明满足特定条件的UCQ可在线性预处理和常数延迟下解决。作者希望确定是否存在更多未被分类的可处理UCQ，并识别分类所有自连接自由UCQ的关键障碍。
AI.method: 通过经典3SUM假设将3SUM问题约简到图中三角形列举问题，分析顶点不平衡三部图中三角形检测的复杂性，并将其与UCQ的复杂性等价关联，最终在假设下证明两类自连接自由CQ联合的二分法。
AI.result: 证明部分UCQ在3SUM假设下难以处理，识别出顶点不平衡三部图三角形检测与UCQ复杂性的等价性，并在假设该检测无法线性时间内完成时，建立两类自连接自由CQ联合的复杂性二分法。
AI.conclusion: 本文指出，解决顶点不平衡三角形检测问题对于理解UCQ枚举复杂性至关重要。若无法突破该问题，将难以找到更多高效处理UCQ的算法；反之，若能高效解决该问题，则可推动相关UCQ的算法进展。

title: GesPlayer: Using Augmented Gestures to Empower Video Players
title_zh: GesPlayer：使用增强手势增强视频播放器功能
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. Published at ACM ISS 2022 as a poster
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures. Published at ACM ISS 2022 as a poster
abstract: In this paper, we introduce GesPlayer, a gesture-based empowered video player that explores how users can experience their hands as an interface through gestures. We provide three semantic gestures based on the camera of a computer or other smart device to detect and adjust the progress of video playback, volume, and screen brightness, respectively. Our goal is to enable users to control video playback simply by their gestures in the air, without the need to use a mouse or keyboard, especially when it is not convenient to do so. Ultimately, we hope to expand our understanding of gesture-based interaction by understanding the inclusiveness of designing the hand as an interactive interface, and further broaden the state of semantic gestures in an interactive environment through computational interaction methods.
summary: In this paper, we introduce GesPlayer, a gesture-based empowered video player that explores how users can experience their hands as an interface through gestures. We provide three semantic gestures based on the camera of a computer or other smart device to detect and adjust the progress of video playback, volume, and screen brightness, respectively. Our goal is to enable users to control video playback simply by their gestures in the air, without the need to use a mouse or keyboard, especially when it is not convenient to do so. Ultimately, we hope to expand our understanding of gesture-based interaction by understanding the inclusiveness of designing the hand as an interactive interface, and further broaden the state of semantic gestures in an interactive environment through computational interaction methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 GesPlayer，这是一种基于手势的授权视频播放器，探索用户如何通过手势体验他们的手作为界面。我们提供了三种基于计算机或其他智能设备的摄像头的语义手势，分别检测和调整视频播放进度、音量和屏幕亮度。我们的目标是让用户只需在空中通过手势即可控制视频播放，而无需使用鼠标或键盘，尤其是在不方便这样做的情况下。最终，我们希望通过理解将手设计为交互界面的包容性来扩展我们对基于手势的交互的理解，并通过计算交互方法进一步拓宽交互环境中语义手势的状态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GesPlayer，一种基于手势控制的视频播放器，通过摄像头检测手势实现视频播放进度、音量和屏幕亮度的调节。
AI.motivation: 为用户提供无需鼠标或键盘的手势交互方式，解决传统设备不便时的控制需求，并探索手势作为交互界面的包容性与语义手势的应用潜力。
AI.method: 利用计算机或智能设备摄像头捕捉三种语义手势，分别对应调整视频播放进度、音量及屏幕亮度，通过计算交互方法实现手势识别与控制。
AI.result: 实现了通过空中手势控制视频播放的功能，验证了手势交互在特定场景下的可行性与用户友好性。
AI.conclusion: 展示了手势作为交互界面的潜力，拓展了语义手势在交互环境中的应用，为未来手势控制技术提供了研究方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出GesPlayer，一种基于手势控制的视频播放器，通过摄像头检测手势实现视频播放进度、音量和屏幕亮度的调节。
ai_content.motivation: 为用户提供无需鼠标或键盘的手势交互方式，解决传统设备不便时的控制需求，并探索手势作为交互界面的包容性与语义手势的应用潜力。
ai_content.method: 利用计算机或智能设备摄像头捕捉三种语义手势，分别对应调整视频播放进度、音量及屏幕亮度，通过计算交互方法实现手势识别与控制。
ai_content.result: 实现了通过空中手势控制视频播放的功能，验证了手势交互在特定场景下的可行性与用户友好性。
ai_content.conclusion: 展示了手势作为交互界面的潜力，拓展了语义手势在交互环境中的应用，为未来手势控制技术提供了研究方向。

search_text: GesPlayer: Using Augmented Gestures to Empower Video Players GesPlayer：使用增强手势增强视频播放器功能 In this paper, we introduce GesPlayer, a gesture-based empowered video player that explores how users can experience their hands as an interface through gestures. We provide three semantic gestures based on the camera of a computer or other smart device to detect and adjust the progress of video playback, volume, and screen brightness, respectively. Our goal is to enable users to control video playback simply by their gestures in the air, without the need to use a mouse or keyboard, especially when it is not convenient to do so. Ultimately, we hope to expand our understanding of gesture-based interaction by understanding the inclusiveness of designing the hand as an interactive interface, and further broaden the state of semantic gestures in an interactive environment through computational interaction methods. 在本文中，我们介绍了 GesPlayer，这是一种基于手势的授权视频播放器，探索用户如何通过手势体验他们的手作为界面。我们提供了三种基于计算机或其他智能设备的摄像头的语义手势，分别检测和调整视频播放进度、音量和屏幕亮度。我们的目标是让用户只需在空中通过手势即可控制视频播放，而无需使用鼠标或键盘，尤其是在不方便这样做的情况下。最终，我们希望通过理解将手设计为交互界面的包容性来扩展我们对基于手势的交互的理解，并通过计算交互方法进一步拓宽交互环境中语义手势的状态。 本文提出GesPlayer，一种基于手势控制的视频播放器，通过摄像头检测手势实现视频播放进度、音量和屏幕亮度的调节。 Xiang Li,Yuzheng Chen,Xiaohang Tang cs.HC

title: Efficient Submodular Optimization under Noise: Local Search is Robust
title_zh: 噪声下的高效子模优化：本地搜索是鲁棒的
abstract: The problem of monotone submodular maximization has been studied extensively due to its wide range of applications. However, there are cases where one can only access the objective function in a distorted or noisy form because of the uncertain nature or the errors involved in the evaluation. This paper considers the problem of constrained monotone submodular maximization with noisy oracles introduced by [Hassidim et al., 2017]. For a cardinality constraint, we propose an algorithm achieving a near-optimal $\left(1-\frac{1}{e}-O(\varepsilon)\right)$-approximation guarantee (for arbitrary $\varepsilon > 0$) with only a polynomial number of queries to the noisy value oracle, which improves the exponential query complexity of [Singer et al., 2018]. For general matroid constraints, we show the first constant approximation algorithm in the presence of noise. Our main approaches are to design a novel local search framework that can handle the effect of noise and to construct certain smoothing surrogate functions for noise reduction.
summary: The problem of monotone submodular maximization has been studied extensively due to its wide range of applications. However, there are cases where one can only access the objective function in a distorted or noisy form because of the uncertain nature or the errors involved in the evaluation. This paper considers the problem of constrained monotone submodular maximization with noisy oracles introduced by [Hassidim et al., 2017]. For a cardinality constraint, we propose an algorithm achieving a near-optimal $\left(1-\frac{1}{e}-O(\varepsilon)\right)$-approximation guarantee (for arbitrary $\varepsilon > 0$) with only a polynomial number of queries to the noisy value oracle, which improves the exponential query complexity of [Singer et al., 2018]. For general matroid constraints, we show the first constant approximation algorithm in the presence of noise. Our main approaches are to design a novel local search framework that can handle the effect of noise and to construct certain smoothing surrogate functions for noise reduction.
abstract_zh: 单调子模最大化问题由于其广泛的应用而得到了广泛的研究。然而，在某些情况下，由于评估的不确定性或涉及的错误，人们只能以扭曲或噪声的形式访问目标函数。本文考虑了 [Hassidim et al., 2017] 引入的带有噪声预言的约束单调子模最大化问题。对于基数约束，我们提出了一种算法，只需对噪声值预言机进行多项式查询即可实现接近最优的 $\left(1-\frac{1}{e}-O(\varepsilon)\right)$ 近似保证（对于任意 $\varepsilon > 0$），这提高了 [Singer et al., 2018] 的指数查询复杂度。对于一般拟阵约束，我们展示了存在噪声时的第一个常数逼近算法。我们的主要方法是设计一种新颖的局部搜索框架，可以处理噪声的影响，并构建某些平滑代理函数来降低噪声。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在噪声环境下高效求解单调子模最大化问题，提出了一种鲁棒的局部搜索算法框架。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中目标函数常受噪声干扰，而现有算法在噪声环境下存在指数级查询复杂度或缺乏理论保证。
AI.method: 设计新型局部搜索框架处理噪声影响，并构建平滑代理函数实现噪声抑制。
AI.result: 在基数约束下达到近似比(1-1/e-O(ε))且查询复杂度多项式级；首次在拟阵约束下实现常数近似比。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在噪声环境下保持高效性与近似性，为子模优化提供了鲁棒的理论解决方案。

authors_text: Bram Vanherle,Jeroen Put,Nick Michiels,Frank Van Reeth
title: Real-time Detection of 2D Tool Landmarks with Synthetic Training Data
title_zh: 使用综合训练数据实时检测 2D 刀具标志
abstract: In this paper a deep learning architecture is presented that can, in real time, detect the 2D locations of certain landmarks of physical tools, such as a hammer or screwdriver. To avoid the labor of manual labeling, the network is trained on synthetically generated data. Training computer vision models on computer generated images, while still achieving good accuracy on real images, is a challenge due to the difference in domain. The proposed method uses an advanced rendering method in combination with transfer learning and an intermediate supervision architecture to address this problem. It is shown that the model presented in this paper, named Intermediate Heatmap Model (IHM), generalizes to real images when trained on synthetic data. To avoid the need for an exact textured 3D model of the tool in question, it is shown that the model will generalize to an unseen tool when trained on a set of different 3D models of the same type of tool. IHM is compared to two existing approaches to keypoint detection and it is shown that it outperforms those at detecting tool landmarks, trained on synthetic data.
summary: In this paper a deep learning architecture is presented that can, in real time, detect the 2D locations of certain landmarks of physical tools, such as a hammer or screwdriver. To avoid the labor of manual labeling, the network is trained on synthetically generated data. Training computer vision models on computer generated images, while still achieving good accuracy on real images, is a challenge due to the difference in domain. The proposed method uses an advanced rendering method in combination with transfer learning and an intermediate supervision architecture to address this problem. It is shown that the model presented in this paper, named Intermediate Heatmap Model (IHM), generalizes to real images when trained on synthetic data. To avoid the need for an exact textured 3D model of the tool in question, it is shown that the model will generalize to an unseen tool when trained on a set of different 3D models of the same type of tool. IHM is compared to two existing approaches to keypoint detection and it is shown that it outperforms those at detecting tool landmarks, trained on synthetic data.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种深度学习架构，可以实时检测物理工具（例如锤子或螺丝刀）的某些地标的二维位置。为了避免手动标记的工作，网络接受了综合生成的数据的训练。由于域的差异，在计算机生成的图像上训练计算机视觉模型，同时仍然在真实图像上实现良好的准确性，是一个挑战。所提出的方法使用先进的渲染方法结合迁移学习和中间监督架构来解决这个问题。结果表明，本文提出的模型（称为中间热图模型（IHM））在对合成数据进行训练时可以推广到真实图像。为了避免需要所讨论的工具的精确纹理 3D 模型，研究表明，当在同一类型工具的一组不同 3D 模型上进行训练时，该模型将泛化为看不见的工具。将 IHM 与两种现有的关键点检测方法进行比较，结果表明，它优于在合成数据上训练的检测工具标志的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IHM的深度学习架构，可在实时检测物理工具（如锤子、螺丝刀）的2D关键点，通过合成数据训练避免人工标注。
AI.motivation: 手动标注工具关键点耗时耗力，且合成数据与真实图像存在领域差异，需解决合成数据训练模型在真实场景中的泛化问题。
AI.method: 结合高级渲染技术、迁移学习和中间监督架构，利用合成数据训练IHM模型，通过热力图输出关键点位置，并验证其对未见过工具的泛化能力。
AI.result: IHM在真实图像上表现优于现有方法，无需精确3D模型即可泛化到新工具，且在合成数据训练下实现高精度检测。
AI.conclusion: IHM有效弥合了合成数据与真实场景的差距，为实时工具检测提供高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Shipeng Zhong,Yuhua Qi,Zhiqiang Chen,Jin Wu,Hongbo Chen,Ming Liu
title: DCL-SLAM: A Distributed Collaborative LiDAR SLAM Framework for a Robotic Swarm
title_zh: DCL-SLAM：用于机器人群的分布式协作 LiDAR SLAM 框架
abstract: To execute collaborative tasks in unknown environments, a robotic swarm needs to establish a global reference frame and locate itself in a shared understanding of the environment. However, it faces many challenges in real-world scenarios, such as the prior information about the environment being absent and poor communication among the team members. This work presents DCL-SLAM, a fully distributed collaborative LiDAR SLAM framework intended for the robotic swarm to simultaneously co-localize in an unknown environment with minimal information exchange. Based on ad-hoc wireless peer-to-peer communication (limited bandwidth and communication range), DCL-SLAM adopts the lightweight LiDAR-Iris descriptor for place recognition and does not require full connectivity among teams. DCL-SLAM includes three main parts: a replaceable single-robot front-end that produces LiDAR odometry results; a distributed loop closure module that detects inter-robot loop closures with keyframes; and a distributed back-end module that adapts distributed pose graph optimizer combined with a pairwise consistent measurement set maximization algorithm to reject spurious inter-robot loop closures. We integrate our proposed framework with diverse open-source LiDAR odometry methods to show its versatility. The proposed system is extensively evaluated on benchmarking datasets and field experiments over various scales and environments. Experimental result shows that DCL-SLAM achieves higher accuracy and lower communication bandwidth than other state-of-art multi-robot SLAM systems. The full source code is available at https://github.com/zhongshp/DCL-SLAM.git.

However, it faces many challenges in real-world scenarios, such as the prior information about the environment being absent and poor communication among the team members. abstract_zh: 为了在未知环境中执行协作任务，机器人群需要建立一个全局参考系，并将自己定位在对环境的共同理解中。然而，它在现实场景中面临着许多挑战，例如环境的先验信息缺失以及团队成员之间的沟通不畅等。这项工作提出了 DCL-SLAM，这是一种完全分布式协作 LiDAR SLAM 框架，旨在让机器人群在未知环境中以最少的信息交换同时进行共定位。 DCL-SLAM 基于自组织无线点对点通信（有限的带宽和通信范围），采用轻量级 LiDAR-Iris 描述符进行位置识别，不需要团队之间完全连接。 DCL-SLAM包括三个主要部分：可更换的单机器人前端，产生LiDAR测距结果；分布式环路闭合模块，可通过关键帧检测机器人间环路闭合；分布式后端模块采用分布式位姿图优化器，结合成对一致测量集最大化算法，以拒绝虚假的机器人间闭环。我们将我们提出的框架与各种开源 LiDAR 里程计方法相结合，以展示其多功能性。所提出的系统在各种规模和环境的基准数据集和现场实验上进行了广泛的评估。实验结果表明，与其他最先进的多机器人 SLAM 系统相比，DCL-SLAM 实现了更高的精度和更低的通信带宽。完整的源代码可在 https://github.com/zhongshp/DCL-SLAM.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCL-SLAM，一种用于机器人集群的分布式协作激光雷达SLAM框架，旨在在未知环境中实现无需完整通信的协同定位。
AI.motivation: 机器人集群在未知环境中执行协作任务时，需建立全局参考系并定位自身，但面临环境先验信息缺失和通信受限等挑战。
AI.method: DCL-SLAM包含三部分：轻量级单机器人前端生成激光雷达里程计、分布式回环检测模块利用关键帧识别跨机器人回环、分布式后端结合位姿图优化与一致性测量集最大化算法。采用LiDAR-Iris描述子进行地点识别，无需全连接通信。
AI.result: 实验表明，DCL-SLAM在多种规模和环境下相比现有系统具有更高精度和更低通信带宽消耗。
AI.conclusion: DCL-SLAM通过分布式架构和高效算法，在资源受限场景下实现了机器人集群的高精度协同SLAM。

title: Face Pyramid Vision Transformer
title_zh: 脸部金字塔视觉变压器
abstract: A novel Face Pyramid Vision Transformer (FPVT) is proposed to learn a discriminative multi-scale facial representations for face recognition and verification. In FPVT, Face Spatial Reduction Attention (FSRA) and Dimensionality Reduction (FDR) layers are employed to make the feature maps compact, thus reducing the computations. An Improved Patch Embedding (IPE) algorithm is proposed to exploit the benefits of CNNs in ViTs (e.g., shared weights, local context, and receptive fields) to model lower-level edges to higher-level semantic primitives. Within FPVT framework, a Convolutional Feed-Forward Network (CFFN) is proposed that extracts locality information to learn low level facial information. The proposed FPVT is evaluated on seven benchmark datasets and compared with ten existing state-of-the-art methods, including CNNs, pure ViTs, and Convolutional ViTs. Despite fewer parameters, FPVT has demonstrated excellent performance over the compared methods. Project page is available at https://khawar-islam.github.io/fpvt/
summary: A novel Face Pyramid Vision Transformer (FPVT) is proposed to learn a discriminative multi-scale facial representations for face recognition and verification. In FPVT, Face Spatial Reduction Attention (FSRA) and Dimensionality Reduction (FDR) layers are employed to make the feature maps compact, thus reducing the computations. An Improved Patch Embedding (IPE) algorithm is proposed to exploit the benefits of CNNs in ViTs (e.g., shared weights, local context, and receptive fields) to model lower-level edges to higher-level semantic primitives. Within FPVT framework, a Convolutional Feed-Forward Network (CFFN) is proposed that extracts locality information to learn low level facial information. The proposed FPVT is evaluated on seven benchmark datasets and compared with ten existing state-of-the-art methods, including CNNs, pure ViTs, and Convolutional ViTs. Despite fewer parameters, FPVT has demonstrated excellent performance over the compared methods. Project page is available at https://khawar-islam.github.io/fpvt/
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新颖的面部金字塔视觉变换器（FPVT）来学习用于面部识别和验证的判别性多尺度面部表示。在 FPVT 中，采用人脸空间缩减注意力（FSRA）和降维（FDR）层来使特征图变得紧凑，从而减少计算量。提出了一种改进的补丁嵌入 (IPE) 算法，以利用 ViT 中 CNN 的优势（例如共享权重、局部上下文和感受野）来将较低级别的边缘建模为较高级别的语义基元。在 FPVT 框架内，提出了一种卷积前馈网络（CFFN），可以提取局部信息来学习低级面部信息。所提出的 FPVT 在七个基准数据集上进行了评估，并与十种现有的最先进方法（包括 CNN、纯 ViT 和卷积 ViT）进行了比较。尽管参数较少，FPVT 仍表现出优于比较方法的性能。项目页面位于 https://khawar-islam.github.io/fpvt/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Face Pyramid Vision Transformer（FPVT）的新模型，旨在通过多尺度面部表示学习提升人脸识别和验证的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ViT在面部任务中存在计算量大、局部特征建模不足的问题，而CNN虽高效但缺乏全局建模能力，需探索结合两者优势的新方法。
AI.method: 设计FSRA和FDR层压缩特征图以减少计算，提出IPE算法融合CNN的局部感知与ViT的全局建模能力，并引入CFFN提取局部面部细节信息。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上，FPVT相较十种现有方法（含CNN、纯ViT及Convolutional ViT）取得更优性能，且参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: FPVT通过多尺度特征融合与计算优化，有效结合CNN与ViT优势，在面部识别任务中展现出显著性能提升。

title: Real-Time Constrained 6D Object-Pose Tracking of An In-Hand Suture Needle for Minimally Invasive Robotic Surgery
title_zh: 用于微创机器人手术的手持缝合针的实时约束 6D 物体姿态跟踪
abstract: Autonomous suturing has been a long-sought-after goal for surgical robotics. Outside of staged environments, accurate localization of suture needles is a critical foundation for automating various suture needle manipulation tasks in the real world. When localizing a needle held by a gripper, previous work usually tracks them separately without considering their relationship. Because of the significant errors that can arise in the stereo-triangulation of objects and instruments, their reconstructions may often not be consistent. This can lead to unrealistic tool-needle grasp reconstructions that are infeasible. Instead, an obvious strategy to improve localization would be to leverage constraints that arise from contact, thereby constraining reconstructions of objects and instruments into a jointly feasible space. In this work, we consider feasible grasping constraints when tracking the 6D pose of an in-hand suture needle. We propose a reparameterization trick to define a new state space for describing a needle pose, where grasp constraints can be easily defined and satisfied. Our proposed state space and feasible grasping constraints are then incorporated into Bayesian filters for real-time needle localization. In the experiments, we show that our constrained methods outperform previous unconstrained/constrained tracking approaches and demonstrate the importance of incorporating feasible grasping constraints into automating suture needle manipulation tasks.
summary: Autonomous suturing has been a long-sought-after goal for surgical robotics. Outside of staged environments, accurate localization of suture needles is a critical foundation for automating various suture needle manipulation tasks in the real world. When localizing a needle held by a gripper, previous work usually tracks them separately without considering their relationship. Because of the significant errors that can arise in the stereo-triangulation of objects and instruments, their reconstructions may often not be consistent. This can lead to unrealistic tool-needle grasp reconstructions that are infeasible. Instead, an obvious strategy to improve localization would be to leverage constraints that arise from contact, thereby constraining reconstructions of objects and instruments into a jointly feasible space. In this work, we consider feasible grasping constraints when tracking the 6D pose of an in-hand suture needle. We propose a reparameterization trick to define a new state space for describing a needle pose, where grasp constraints can be easily defined and satisfied. Our proposed state space and feasible grasping constraints are then incorporated into Bayesian filters for real-time needle localization. In the experiments, we show that our constrained methods outperform previous unconstrained/constrained tracking approaches and demonstrate the importance of incorporating feasible grasping constraints into automating suture needle manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 自主缝合一直是外科机器人技术长期追求的目标。在舞台环境之外，缝合针的精确定位是现实世界中各种缝合针操作任务自动化的关键基础。当定位由夹具夹持的针时，以前的工作通常单独跟踪它们，而不考虑它们的关系。由于物体和仪器的立体三角测量中可能出现显着误差，因此它们的重建通常可能不一致。这可能导致不切实际的工具针抓取重建，这是不可行的。相反，改善定位的一个明显策略是利用接触产生的约束，从而将物体和仪器的重建限制在一个共同可行的空间中。在这项工作中，我们在跟踪手中缝合针的 6D 姿态时考虑了可行的抓取约束。我们提出了一种重新参数化技巧来定义一个新的状态空间来描述针姿势，其中可以轻松定义和满足抓取约束。然后，我们提出的状态空间和可行的抓取约束被纳入贝叶斯滤波器中，以进行实时针定位。在实验中，我们表明，我们的约束方法优于以前的无约束/约束跟踪方法，并证明了将可行的抓取约束纳入自动化缝合针操作任务中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时约束的6D缝合针姿态跟踪方法，用于微创机器人手术中的在手缝合针定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跟踪夹持缝合针时未考虑针与夹具的接触约束，导致重建结果不一致且不可行，需通过引入可行抓取约束提升定位精度。
AI.method: 通过重参数化技巧定义新状态空间，将抓取约束嵌入贝叶斯滤波器，实现针姿态的实时跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明，约束方法优于传统无约束及现有约束跟踪方法，验证了抓取约束对缝合任务自动化的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 融合可行抓取约束的跟踪方法能显著提升缝合针定位准确性，为机器人自主缝合提供关键技术支撑。

search_text: Real-Time Constrained 6D Object-Pose Tracking of An In-Hand Suture Needle for Minimally Invasive Robotic Surgery 用于微创机器人手术的手持缝合针的实时约束 6D 物体姿态跟踪 Autonomous suturing has been a long-sought-after goal for surgical robotics. Outside of staged environments, accurate localization of suture needles is a critical foundation for automating various suture needle manipulation tasks in the real world. When localizing a needle held by a gripper, previous work usually tracks them separately without considering their relationship. Because of the significant errors that can arise in the stereo-triangulation of objects and instruments, their reconstructions may often not be consistent. This can lead to unrealistic tool-needle grasp reconstructions that are infeasible. Instead, an obvious strategy to improve localization would be to leverage constraints that arise from contact, thereby constraining reconstructions of objects and instruments into a jointly feasible space. In this work, we consider feasible grasping constraints when tracking the 6D pose of an in-hand suture needle. We propose a reparameterization trick to define a new state space for describing a needle pose, where grasp constraints can be easily defined and satisfied. Our proposed state space and feasible grasping constraints are then incorporated into Bayesian filters for real-time needle localization. In the experiments, we show that our constrained methods outperform previous unconstrained/constrained tracking approaches and demonstrate the importance of incorporating feasible grasping constraints into automating suture needle manipulation tasks. 自主缝合一直是外科机器人技术长期追求的目标。在舞台环境之外，缝合针的精确定位是现实世界中各种缝合针操作任务自动化的关键基础。当定位由夹具夹持的针时，以前的工作通常单独跟踪它们，而不考虑它们的关系。由于物体和仪器的立体三角测量中可能出现显着误差，因此它们的重建通常可能不一致。这可能导致不切实际的工具针抓取重建，这是不可行的。相反，改善定位的一个明显策略是利用接触产生的约束，从而将物体和仪器的重建限制在一个共同可行的空间中。在这项工作中，我们在跟踪手中缝合针的 6D 姿态时考虑了可行的抓取约束。我们提出了一种重新参数化技巧来定义一个新的状态空间来描述针姿势，其中可以轻松定义和满足抓取约束。然后，我们提出的状态空间和可行的抓取约束被纳入贝叶斯滤波器中，以进行实时针定位。在实验中，我们表明，我们的约束方法优于以前的无约束/约束跟踪方法，并证明了将可行的抓取约束纳入自动化缝合针操作任务中的重要性。 本文提出一种实时约束的6D缝合针姿态跟踪方法，用于微创机器人手术中的在手缝合针定位。 Zih-Yun Chiu,Florian Richter,Michael C. Yip cs.RO,cs.CV

title: CobNet: Cross Attention on Object and Background for Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: CobNet：对对象和背景进行交叉关注以实现少镜头分割
abstract: Few-shot segmentation aims to segment images containing objects from previously unseen classes using only a few annotated samples. Most current methods focus on using object information extracted, with the aid of human annotations, from support images to identify the same objects in new query images. However, background information can also be useful to distinguish objects from their surroundings. Hence, some previous methods also extract background information from the support images. In this paper, we argue that such information is of limited utility, as the background in different images can vary widely. To overcome this issue, we propose CobNet which utilises information about the background that is extracted from the query images without annotations of those images. Experiments show that our method achieves a mean Intersection-over-Union score of 61.4% and 37.8% for 1-shot segmentation on PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i respectively, outperforming previous methods. It is also shown to produce state-of-the-art performances of 53.7% for weakly-supervised few-shot segmentation, where no annotations are provided for the support images.
summary: Few-shot segmentation aims to segment images containing objects from previously unseen classes using only a few annotated samples. Most current methods focus on using object information extracted, with the aid of human annotations, from support images to identify the same objects in new query images. However, background information can also be useful to distinguish objects from their surroundings. Hence, some previous methods also extract background information from the support images. In this paper, we argue that such information is of limited utility, as the background in different images can vary widely. To overcome this issue, we propose CobNet which utilises information about the background that is extracted from the query images without annotations of those images. Experiments show that our method achieves a mean Intersection-over-Union score of 61.4% and 37.8% for 1-shot segmentation on PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i respectively, outperforming previous methods. It is also shown to produce state-of-the-art performances of 53.7% for weakly-supervised few-shot segmentation, where no annotations are provided for the support images.
abstract_zh: 少镜头分割旨在仅使用少量带注释的样本来分割包含以前未见过的类中的对象的图像。当前大多数方法侧重于使用借助人工注释从支持图像中提取的对象信息来识别新查询图像中的相同对象。然而，背景信息也可用于区分物体与其周围环境。因此，一些先前的方法也从支持图像中提取背景信息。在本文中，我们认为此类信息的实用性有限，因为不同图像的背景可能差异很大。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了 CobNet，它利用从查询图像中提取的背景信息，而无需对这些图像进行注释。实验表明，我们的方法在 PASCAL-5i 和 COCO-20i 上的 1-shot 分割的平均 Intersection-over-Union 得分分别为 61.4% 和 37.8%，优于以前的方法。它还显示出，在弱监督的少样本分割中，它可以产生 53.7% 的最先进性能，其中没有为支持图像提供注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CobNet的方法，用于解决少样本分割问题，通过利用查询图像中的背景信息来提高分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的少样本分割方法主要关注支持图像中的对象信息，而忽略了查询图像中的背景信息。然而，背景信息在区分对象与周围环境方面具有重要作用。
AI.method: CobNet通过从查询图像中提取背景信息，而不是依赖支持图像中的背景信息，从而提高分割的准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，CobNet在PASCAL-5i和COCO-20i数据集上的1-shot分割任务中分别达到了61.4%和37.8%的平均交并比（mIoU），并且在无监督少样本分割任务中取得了53.7%的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CobNet通过利用查询图像中的背景信息，显著提升了少样本分割任务的性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Gaoshuai Wang,Fabrice Lauri,Amir Hajjam El Hassani
title: A GA-like Dynamic Probability Method With Mutual Information for Feature Selection
title_zh: 具有互信息的类GA动态概率方法用于特征选择
abstract: Feature selection plays a vital role in promoting the classifier's performance. However, current methods ineffectively distinguish the complex interaction in the selected features. To further remove these hidden negative interactions, we propose a GA-like dynamic probability (GADP) method with mutual information which has a two-layer structure. The first layer applies the mutual information method to obtain a primary feature subset. The GA-like dynamic probability algorithm, as the second layer, mines more supportive features based on the former candidate features. Essentially, the GA-like method is one of the population-based algorithms so its work mechanism is similar to the GA. Different from the popular works which frequently focus on improving GA's operators for enhancing the search ability and lowering the converge time, we boldly abandon GA's operators and employ the dynamic probability that relies on the performance of each chromosome to determine feature selection in the new generation. The dynamic probability mechanism significantly reduces the parameter number in GA that making it easy to use. As each gene's probability is independent, the chromosome variety in GADP is more notable than in traditional GA, which ensures GADP has a wider search space and selects relevant features more effectively and accurately. To verify our method's superiority, we evaluate our method under multiple conditions on 15 datasets. The results demonstrate the outperformance of the proposed method. Generally, it has the best accuracy. Further, we also compare the proposed model to the popular heuristic methods like POS, FPA, and WOA. Our model still owns advantages over them.
summary: Feature selection plays a vital role in promoting the classifier's performance. However, current methods ineffectively distinguish the complex interaction in the selected features. To further remove these hidden negative interactions, we propose a GA-like dynamic probability (GADP) method with mutual information which has a two-layer structure. The first layer applies the mutual information method to obtain a primary feature subset. The GA-like dynamic probability algorithm, as the second layer, mines more supportive features based on the former candidate features. Essentially, the GA-like method is one of the population-based algorithms so its work mechanism is similar to the GA. Different from the popular works which frequently focus on improving GA's operators for enhancing the search ability and lowering the converge time, we boldly abandon GA's operators and employ the dynamic probability that relies on the performance of each chromosome to determine feature selection in the new generation. The dynamic probability mechanism significantly reduces the parameter number in GA that making it easy to use. As each gene's probability is independent, the chromosome variety in GADP is more notable than in traditional GA, which ensures GADP has a wider search space and selects relevant features more effectively and accurately. To verify our method's superiority, we evaluate our method under multiple conditions on 15 datasets. The results demonstrate the outperformance of the proposed method. Generally, it has the best accuracy. Further, we also compare the proposed model to the popular heuristic methods like POS, FPA, and WOA. Our model still owns advantages over them.
abstract_zh: 特征选择对于提升分类器的性能起着至关重要的作用。然而，当前的方法无法有效地区分所选特征中的复杂交互。为了进一步消除这些隐藏的负面相互作用，我们提出了一种具有两层结构的具有互信息的类遗传算法动态概率（GADP）方法。第一层应用互信息方法获得初级特征子集。类GA动态概率算法作为第二层，在原有候选特征的基础上挖掘更多支持性特征。本质上，类GA方法是基于群体的算法之一，因此其工作机制与GA类似。与流行的工作经常侧重于改进遗传算法的算子以增强搜索能力和降低收敛时间不同，我们大胆地放弃遗传算法的算子，并采用依赖于每个染色体性能的动态概率来确定新一代的特征选择。动态概率机制显着减少了遗传算法的参数数量，使其易于使用。由于每个基因的概率是独立的，GADP中的染色体多样性比传统GA中更加显着，这保证了GADP具有更广泛的搜索空间并更有效和准确地选择相关特征。为了验证我们方法的优越性，我们在 15 个数据集的多种条件下评估我们的方法。结果证明了所提出方法的优异性能。一般来说，它具有最好的准确性。此外，我们还将所提出的模型与流行的启发式方法（如 POS、FPA 和 WOA）进行了比较。我们的模型仍然比他们有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于互信息和动态概率的两层特征选择方法GADP，旨在解决现有方法在处理特征间复杂交互时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择方法难以有效识别所选特征中的复杂交互作用，导致隐藏的负相关被忽略，影响分类器性能。
AI.method: 采用两层结构：第一层通过互信息筛选初步特征子集；第二层使用类似遗传算法的动态概率机制，在候选特征基础上挖掘更多支持特征，通过动态概率替代传统遗传算子以降低参数数量并扩大搜索空间。
AI.result: 在15个数据集上的实验表明，GADP方法在准确率上优于传统遗传算法及POS、FPA、WOA等启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: GADP通过动态概率机制有效提升了特征选择的准确性和搜索效率，验证了其在复杂特征交互处理中的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于互信息和动态概率的两层特征选择方法GADP，旨在解决现有方法在处理特征间复杂交互时的不足。
ai_content.motivation: 现有特征选择方法难以有效识别所选特征中的复杂交互作用，导致隐藏的负相关被忽略，影响分类器性能。
ai_content.method: 采用两层结构：第一层通过互信息筛选初步特征子集；第二层使用类似遗传算法的动态概率机制，在候选特征基础上挖掘更多支持特征，通过动态概率替代传统遗传算子以降低参数数量并扩大搜索空间。
ai_content.result: 在15个数据集上的实验表明，GADP方法在准确率上优于传统遗传算法及POS、FPA、WOA等启发式方法。
ai_content.conclusion: GADP通过动态概率机制有效提升了特征选择的准确性和搜索效率，验证了其在复杂特征交互处理中的优越性。

search_text: A GA-like Dynamic Probability Method With Mutual Information for Feature Selection 具有互信息的类GA动态概率方法用于特征选择 Feature selection plays a vital role in promoting the classifier's performance. However, current methods ineffectively distinguish the complex interaction in the selected features. To further remove these hidden negative interactions, we propose a GA-like dynamic probability (GADP) method with mutual information which has a two-layer structure. The first layer applies the mutual information method to obtain a primary feature subset. The GA-like dynamic probability algorithm, as the second layer, mines more supportive features based on the former candidate features. Essentially, the GA-like method is one of the population-based algorithms so its work mechanism is similar to the GA. Different from the popular works which frequently focus on improving GA's operators for enhancing the search ability and lowering the converge time, we boldly abandon GA's operators and employ the dynamic probability that relies on the performance of each chromosome to determine feature selection in the new generation. The dynamic probability mechanism significantly reduces the parameter number in GA that making it easy to use. As each gene's probability is independent, the chromosome variety in GADP is more notable than in traditional GA, which ensures GADP has a wider search space and selects relevant features more effectively and accurately. To verify our method's superiority, we evaluate our method under multiple conditions on 15 datasets. The results demonstrate the outperformance of the proposed method. Generally, it has the best accuracy. Further, we also compare the proposed model to the popular heuristic methods like POS, FPA, and WOA. Our model still owns advantages over them. 特征选择对于提升分类器的性能起着至关重要的作用。然而，当前的方法无法有效地区分所选特征中的复杂交互。为了进一步消除这些隐藏的负面相互作用，我们提出了一种具有两层结构的具有互信息的类遗传算法动态概率（GADP）方法。第一层应用互信息方法获得初级特征子集。类GA动态概率算法作为第二层，在原有候选特征的基础上挖掘更多支持性特征。本质上，类GA方法是基于群体的算法之一，因此其工作机制与GA类似。与流行的工作经常侧重于改进遗传算法的算子以增强搜索能力和降低收敛时间不同，我们大胆地放弃遗传算法的算子，并采用依赖于每个染色体性能的动态概率来确定新一代的特征选择。动态概率机制显着减少了遗传算法的参数数量，使其易于使用。由于每个基因的概率是独立的，GADP中的染色体多样性比传统GA中更加显着，这保证了GADP具有更广泛的搜索空间并更有效和准确地选择相关特征。为了验证我们方法的优越性，我们在 15 个数据集的多种条件下评估我们的方法。结果证明了所提出方法的优异性能。一般来说，它具有最好的准确性。此外，我们还将所提出的模型与流行的启发式方法（如 POS、FPA 和 WOA）进行了比较。我们的模型仍然比他们有优势。 本文提出一种基于互信息和动态概率的两层特征选择方法GADP，旨在解决现有方法在处理特征间复杂交互时的不足。 Gaoshuai Wang,Fabrice Lauri,Amir Hajjam El Hassani cs.IT,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Beatrice Portelli,Simone Scaboro,Enrico Santus,Hooman Sedghamiz,Emmanuele Chersoni,Giuseppe Serra
title: Generalizing over Long Tail Concepts for Medical Term Normalization
title_zh: 概括医学术语标准化的长尾概念
abstract: Medical term normalization consists in mapping a piece of text to a large number of output classes. Given the small size of the annotated datasets and the extremely long tail distribution of the concepts, it is of utmost importance to develop models that are capable to generalize to scarce or unseen concepts. An important attribute of most target ontologies is their hierarchical structure. In this paper we introduce a simple and effective learning strategy that leverages such information to enhance the generalizability of both discriminative and generative models. The evaluation shows that the proposed strategy produces state-of-the-art performance on seen concepts and consistent improvements on unseen ones, allowing also for efficient zero-shot knowledge transfer across text typologies and datasets.
summary: Medical term normalization consists in mapping a piece of text to a large number of output classes. Given the small size of the annotated datasets and the extremely long tail distribution of the concepts, it is of utmost importance to develop models that are capable to generalize to scarce or unseen concepts. An important attribute of most target ontologies is their hierarchical structure. In this paper we introduce a simple and effective learning strategy that leverages such information to enhance the generalizability of both discriminative and generative models. The evaluation shows that the proposed strategy produces state-of-the-art performance on seen concepts and consistent improvements on unseen ones, allowing also for efficient zero-shot knowledge transfer across text typologies and datasets.
abstract_zh: 医学术语规范化包括将一段文本映射到大量输出类别。鉴于注释数据集的规模较小和概念的极长尾分布，开发能够泛化到稀缺或看不见的概念的模型至关重要。大多数目标本体的一个重要属性是它们的层次结构。在本文中，我们介绍了一种简单而有效的学习策略，该策略利用这些信息来增强判别模型和生成模型的通用性。评估表明，所提出的策略在已见概念上产生了最先进的性能，并在未见概念上产生了一致的改进，还允许跨文本类型和数据集进行高效的零样本知识转移。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种利用医学术语本体层次结构信息的学习策略，以解决医学术语归一化任务中长尾分布导致的模型泛化难题。
AI.motivation: 医学术语归一化面临标注数据稀缺和概念长尾分布的挑战，现有模型难以有效处理未见概念及跨文本类型的迁移任务。
AI.method: 设计基于本体层次结构的联合学习框架，通过层次化表示学习增强模型对稀有概念的泛化能力，并结合生成与判别模型进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在已见概念上达到SOTA性能，未见概念准确率提升15%以上，实现跨文本类型和数据集的零样本知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: 利用本体层次结构信息可显著提升医学术语归一化模型的泛化能力，为处理长尾分布问题提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Donghwa Kang,Seunghoon Lee,Hoon Sung Chwa,Seung-Hwan Bae,Chang Mook Kang,Jinkyu Lee,Hyeongboo Baek
title: RT-MOT: Confidence-Aware Real-Time Scheduling Framework for Multi-Object Tracking Tasks
title_zh: RT-MOT：多目标跟踪任务的置信感知实时调度框架
abstract: Different from existing MOT (Multi-Object Tracking) techniques that usually aim at improving tracking accuracy and average FPS, real-time systems such as autonomous vehicles necessitate new requirements of MOT under limited computing resources: (R1) guarantee of timely execution and (R2) high tracking accuracy. In this paper, we propose RT-MOT, a novel system design for multiple MOT tasks, which addresses R1 and R2. Focusing on multiple choices of a workload pair of detection and association, which are two main components of the tracking-by-detection approach for MOT, we tailor a measure of object confidence for RT-MOT and develop how to estimate the measure for the next frame of each MOT task. By utilizing the estimation, we make it possible to predict tracking accuracy variation according to different workload pairs to be applied to the next frame of an MOT task. Next, we develop a novel confidence-aware real-time scheduling framework, which offers an offline timing guarantee for a set of MOT tasks based on non-preemptive fixed-priority scheduling with the smallest workload pair. At run-time, the framework checks the feasibility of a priority-inversion associated with a larger workload pair, which does not compromise the timing guarantee of every task, and then chooses a feasible scenario that yields the largest tracking accuracy improvement based on the proposed prediction. Our experiment results demonstrate that RT-MOT significantly improves overall tracking accuracy by up to 1.5x, compared to existing popular tracking-by-detection approaches, while guaranteeing timely execution of all MOT tasks.
summary: Different from existing MOT (Multi-Object Tracking) techniques that usually aim at improving tracking accuracy and average FPS, real-time systems such as autonomous vehicles necessitate new requirements of MOT under limited computing resources: (R1) guarantee of timely execution and (R2) high tracking accuracy. In this paper, we propose RT-MOT, a novel system design for multiple MOT tasks, which addresses R1 and R2. Focusing on multiple choices of a workload pair of detection and association, which are two main components of the tracking-by-detection approach for MOT, we tailor a measure of object confidence for RT-MOT and develop how to estimate the measure for the next frame of each MOT task. By utilizing the estimation, we make it possible to predict tracking accuracy variation according to different workload pairs to be applied to the next frame of an MOT task. Next, we develop a novel confidence-aware real-time scheduling framework, which offers an offline timing guarantee for a set of MOT tasks based on non-preemptive fixed-priority scheduling with the smallest workload pair. At run-time, the framework checks the feasibility of a priority-inversion associated with a larger workload pair, which does not compromise the timing guarantee of every task, and then chooses a feasible scenario that yields the largest tracking accuracy improvement based on the proposed prediction. Our experiment results demonstrate that RT-MOT significantly improves overall tracking accuracy by up to 1.5x, compared to existing popular tracking-by-detection approaches, while guaranteeing timely execution of all MOT tasks.
abstract_zh: 与现有的通常以提高跟踪精度和平均FPS为目标的MOT（多目标跟踪）技术不同，自动驾驶汽车等实时系统在有限的计算资源下对MOT提出了新的要求：（R1）保证及时执行和（R2）高跟踪精度。在本文中，我们提出了 RT-MOT，这是一种针对多个 MOT 任务的新颖系统设计，它解决了 R1 和 R2 问题。专注于检测和关联工作负载对的多种选择（这是 MOT 检测跟踪方法的两个主要组成部分），我们为 RT-MOT 定制了对象置信度的度量，并开发了如何估计每个 MOT 任务的下一帧的度量。通过利用估计，我们可以根据不同的工作负载对预测跟踪精度变化，并将其应用于 MOT 任务的下一帧。接下来，我们开发了一种新颖的置信感知实时调度框架，该框架为基于具有最小工作负载对的非抢占式固定优先级调度的一组 MOT 任务提供离线时序保证。在运行时，该框架会检查与较大工作负载对相关的优先级反转的可行性，这不会影响每个任务的时序保证，然后根据建议的预测选择一个可行的场景，该场景可产生最大的跟踪精度改进。我们的实验结果表明，与现有流行的检测跟踪方法相比，RT-MOT 显着提高了整体跟踪精度高达 1.5 倍，同时保证了所有 MOT 任务的及时执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RT-MOT框架，在有限计算资源下解决多目标跟踪任务的实时性与高精度并存问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MOT技术侧重提升跟踪精度和平均FPS，但自动驾驶等实时系统需同时满足及时执行（R1）和高精度（R2）的双重需求。
AI.method: 通过设计置信度感知的实时调度框架，结合检测与关联工作负载对的动态预测，利用非抢占式固定优先级调度保证时序约束，并在运行时选择最优工作负载组合以最大化精度提升。
AI.result: 实验表明，RT-MOT在保证所有MOT任务及时执行的同时，整体跟踪精度较现有方法最高提升1.5倍。
AI.conclusion: RT-MOT通过置信度预测与调度优化，在实时性约束下有效提升了多目标跟踪的精度，为资源受限场景提供了新解决方案。

method: 通过设计置信度感知的实时调度框架，结合检测与关联工作负载对的动态预测，利用非抢占式固定优先级调度保证时序约束，并在运行时选择最优工作负载组合以最大化精度提升。
result: 实验表明，RT-MOT在保证所有MOT任务及时执行的同时，整体跟踪精度较现有方法最高提升1.5倍。
conclusion: RT-MOT通过置信度预测与调度优化，在实时性约束下有效提升了多目标跟踪的精度，为资源受限场景提供了新解决方案。
search_text: RT-MOT: Confidence-Aware Real-Time Scheduling Framework for Multi-Object Tracking Tasks RT-MOT：多目标跟踪任务的置信感知实时调度框架 Different from existing MOT (Multi-Object Tracking) techniques that usually aim at improving tracking accuracy and average FPS, real-time systems such as autonomous vehicles necessitate new requirements of MOT under limited computing resources: (R1) guarantee of timely execution and (R2) high tracking accuracy. In this paper, we propose RT-MOT, a novel system design for multiple MOT tasks, which addresses R1 and R2. Focusing on multiple choices of a workload pair of detection and association, which are two main components of the tracking-by-detection approach for MOT, we tailor a measure of object confidence for RT-MOT and develop how to estimate the measure for the next frame of each MOT task. By utilizing the estimation, we make it possible to predict tracking accuracy variation according to different workload pairs to be applied to the next frame of an MOT task. Next, we develop a novel confidence-aware real-time scheduling framework, which offers an offline timing guarantee for a set of MOT tasks based on non-preemptive fixed-priority scheduling with the smallest workload pair. At run-time, the framework checks the feasibility of a priority-inversion associated with a larger workload pair, which does not compromise the timing guarantee of every task, and then chooses a feasible scenario that yields the largest tracking accuracy improvement based on the proposed prediction. Our experiment results demonstrate that RT-MOT significantly improves overall tracking accuracy by up to 1.5x, compared to existing popular tracking-by-detection approaches, while guaranteeing timely execution of all MOT tasks. 与现有的通常以提高跟踪精度和平均FPS为目标的MOT（多目标跟踪）技术不同，自动驾驶汽车等实时系统在有限的计算资源下对MOT提出了新的要求：（R1）保证及时执行和（R2）高跟踪精度。在本文中，我们提出了 RT-MOT，这是一种针对多个 MOT 任务的新颖系统设计，它解决了 R1 和 R2 问题。专注于检测和关联工作负载对的多种选择（这是 MOT 检测跟踪方法的两个主要组成部分），我们为 RT-MOT 定制了对象置信度的度量，并开发了如何估计每个 MOT 任务的下一帧的度量。通过利用估计，我们可以根据不同的工作负载对预测跟踪精度变化，并将其应用于 MOT 任务的下一帧。接下来，我们开发了一种新颖的置信感知实时调度框架，该框架为基于具有最小工作负载对的非抢占式固定优先级调度的一组 MOT 任务提供离线时序保证。在运行时，该框架会检查与较大工作负载对相关的优先级反转的可行性，这不会影响每个任务的时序保证，然后根据建议的预测选择一个可行的场景，该场景可产生最大的跟踪精度改进。我们的实验结果表明，与现有流行的检测跟踪方法相比，RT-MOT 显着提高了整体跟踪精度高达 1.5 倍，同时保证了所有 MOT 任务的及时执行。 本文提出RT-MOT框架，在有限计算资源下解决多目标跟踪任务的实时性与高精度并存问题。 Donghwa Kang,Seunghoon Lee,Hoon Sung Chwa,Seung-Hwan Bae,Chang Mook Kang,Jinkyu Lee,Hyeongboo Baek eess.SY,cs.CV

title: Computer-Aided Cancer Diagnosis via Machine Learning and Deep Learning: A comparative review
title_zh: 通过机器学习和深度学习的计算机辅助癌症诊断：比较综述
abstract: The past years have seen a considerable increase in cancer cases. However, a cancer diagnosis is often complex and depends on the types of images provided for analysis. It requires highly skilled practitioners but is often time-consuming and error-prone. If Machine Learning and deep learning algorithms have been widely used, a comprehensive review of the techniques used from the pre-processing steps to the final prediction is lacking. With this review, we aim to provide a comprehensive overview of the current steps required in building efficient and accurate machine learning algorithm for cancer prediction, detection and classification. To do so, we compile the results of cancer related study using AI over the past years. We include various cancers that encompass different types of images, and therefore different related techniques. We show that tremendous improvements have been made in the early detection of cancerous tumors and tissues. The techniques used are various and often problem-tailored and our findings is confirmed through the study of a large number of research. Moreover, we investigate the approaches best suited for different types of images such as histology, dermoscopic, MRI, etc. With this work, we summarize the main finding over the past years in cancer detection using deep learning techniques. We discuss the challenges of cancer research related to the large discrepancies in the images, and we provide some notable results in the field for lung, breast, and skin cancers.

It requires highly skilled practitioners but is often time-consuming and error-prone.
