To do so, we compile the results of cancer related study using AI over the past years. We include various cancers that encompass different types of images, and therefore different related techniques. We show that tremendous improvements have been made in the early detection of cancerous tumors and tissues. The techniques used are various and often problem-tailored and our findings is confirmed through the study of a large number of research. Moreover, we investigate the approaches best suited for different types of images such as histology, dermoscopic, MRI, etc. With this work, we summarize the main finding over the past years in cancer detection using deep learning techniques. We discuss the challenges of cancer research related to the large discrepancies in the images, and we provide some notable results in the field for lung, breast, and skin cancers.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，癌症病例大幅增加。然而，癌症诊断通常很复杂，并且取决于提供用于分析的图像类型。它需要高度熟练的从业者，但通常非常耗时且容易出错。如果机器学习和深度学习算法已经被广泛使用，那么从预处理步骤到最终预测所使用的技术却缺乏全面的回顾。通过这篇综述，我们的目的是全面概述当前构建用于癌症预测、检测和分类的高效且准确的机器学习算法所需的步骤。为此，我们汇总了过去几年使用人工智能进行的癌症相关研究的结果。我们包括包含不同类型图像的各种癌症，因此也包括不同的相关技术。我们表明，在癌性肿瘤和组织的早期检测方面已经取得了巨大的进步。所使用的技术多种多样，并且通常是针对问题量身定制的，我们的发现通过大量研究得到了证实。此外，我们还研究了最适合不同类型图像的方法，例如组织学、皮肤镜、MRI 等。通过这项工作，我们总结了过去几年使用深度学习技术进行癌症检测的主要发现。我们讨论了与图像巨大差异相关的癌症研究挑战，并在肺癌、乳腺癌和皮肤癌领域提供了一些值得注意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了机器学习和深度学习在计算机辅助癌症诊断中的应用，比较了不同技术在癌症预测、检测和分类中的步骤与效果。
AI.motivation: 癌症诊断复杂且耗时，传统方法依赖高技能人员且易出错，需通过AI技术提升效率与准确性，但缺乏对现有方法的系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过整理近年AI相关癌症研究，涵盖多种癌症类型及图像数据（如组织学、皮肤镜、MRI等），分析从预处理到最终预测的全流程技术，并比较不同图像类型的最佳方法。
AI.result: 发现早期肿瘤检测技术显著进步，不同癌症（如肺癌、乳腺癌、皮肤癌）的AI方法各有特点，但图像差异性仍是主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习在癌症诊断中潜力巨大，但需解决数据不均衡等问题，未来研究应聚焦于跨模态图像分析与通用化模型开发。

title: Oracles & Followers: Stackelberg Equilibria in Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 预言者与追随者：深度多智能体强化学习中的 Stackelberg 均衡
abstract: Stackelberg equilibria arise naturally in a range of popular learning problems, such as in security games or indirect mechanism design, and have received increasing attention in the reinforcement learning literature. We present a general framework for implementing Stackelberg equilibria search as a multi-agent RL problem, allowing a wide range of algorithmic design choices. We discuss how previous approaches can be seen as specific instantiations of this framework. As a key insight, we note that the design space allows for approaches not previously seen in the literature, for instance by leveraging multitask and meta-RL techniques for follower convergence. We propose one such approach using contextual policies, and evaluate it experimentally on both standard and novel benchmark domains, showing greatly improved sample efficiency compared to previous approaches. Finally, we explore the effect of adopting algorithm designs outside the borders of our framework.
summary: Stackelberg equilibria arise naturally in a range of popular learning problems, such as in security games or indirect mechanism design, and have received increasing attention in the reinforcement learning literature. We present a general framework for implementing Stackelberg equilibria search as a multi-agent RL problem, allowing a wide range of algorithmic design choices. We discuss how previous approaches can be seen as specific instantiations of this framework. As a key insight, we note that the design space allows for approaches not previously seen in the literature, for instance by leveraging multitask and meta-RL techniques for follower convergence. We propose one such approach using contextual policies, and evaluate it experimentally on both standard and novel benchmark domains, showing greatly improved sample efficiency compared to previous approaches. Finally, we explore the effect of adopting algorithm designs outside the borders of our framework.
abstract_zh: 斯塔克尔伯格均衡自然出现在一系列流行的学习问题中，例如安全游戏或间接机制设计，并且在强化学习文献中受到越来越多的关注。我们提出了一个将 Stackelberg 均衡搜索实现为多智能体 RL 问题的通用框架，允许广泛的算法设计选择。我们讨论如何将以前的方法视为该框架的具体实例。作为一个关键的见解，我们注意到设计空间允许使用以前在文献中未见过的方法，例如利用多任务和元强化学习技术进行追随者收敛。我们提出了一种使用上下文策略的方法，并在标准和新颖的基准域上对其进行实验评估，结果表明与以前的方法相比，样本效率大大提高。最后，我们探讨了在框架之外采用算法设计的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用框架，将Stackelberg均衡搜索转化为多智能体强化学习问题，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: Stackelberg均衡在安全博弈等领域有广泛应用，但现有方法存在算法设计受限、样本效率低等问题，需更通用的求解框架。
AI.method: 构建包含领导者-跟随者结构的多智能体RL框架，提出基于上下文策略的新方法，结合多任务与元强化学习技术加速跟随者收敛。
AI.result: 在标准与新型基准环境中，相比现有方法样本效率提升显著，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为Stackelberg均衡求解提供新思路，同时发现框架外算法设计可能带来额外优化空间。

Finally, we explore the effect of adopting algorithm designs outside the borders of our framework. 斯塔克尔伯格均衡自然出现在一系列流行的学习问题中，例如安全游戏或间接机制设计，并且在强化学习文献中受到越来越多的关注。我们提出了一个将 Stackelberg 均衡搜索实现为多智能体 RL 问题的通用框架，允许广泛的算法设计选择。我们讨论如何将以前的方法视为该框架的具体实例。作为一个关键的见解，我们注意到设计空间允许使用以前在文献中未见过的方法，例如利用多任务和元强化学习技术进行追随者收敛。我们提出了一种使用上下文策略的方法，并在标准和新颖的基准域上对其进行实验评估，结果表明与以前的方法相比，样本效率大大提高。最后，我们探讨了在框架之外采用算法设计的效果。 本文提出一种通用框架，将Stackelberg均衡搜索转化为多智能体强化学习问题，并通过实验验证其有效性。 Matthias Gerstgrasser,David C. Parkes cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Edward Vendrow,Duy Tho Le,Jianfei Cai,Hamid Rezatofighi
title: JRDB-Pose: A Large-scale Dataset for Multi-Person Pose Estimation and Tracking
title_zh: JRDB-Pose：用于多人姿势估计和跟踪的大规模数据集
abstract: Autonomous robotic systems operating in human environments must understand their surroundings to make accurate and safe decisions. In crowded human scenes with close-up human-robot interaction and robot navigation, a deep understanding requires reasoning about human motion and body dynamics over time with human body pose estimation and tracking. However, existing datasets either do not provide pose annotations or include scene types unrelated to robotic applications. Many datasets also lack the diversity of poses and occlusions found in crowded human scenes. To address this limitation we introduce JRDB-Pose, a large-scale dataset and benchmark for multi-person pose estimation and tracking using videos captured from a social navigation robot. The dataset contains challenge scenes with crowded indoor and outdoor locations and a diverse range of scales and occlusion types. JRDB-Pose provides human pose annotations with per-keypoint occlusion labels and track IDs consistent across the scene. A public evaluation server is made available for fair evaluation on a held-out test set. JRDB-Pose is available at https://jrdb.erc.monash.edu/ .
summary: Autonomous robotic systems operating in human environments must understand their surroundings to make accurate and safe decisions. In crowded human scenes with close-up human-robot interaction and robot navigation, a deep understanding requires reasoning about human motion and body dynamics over time with human body pose estimation and tracking. However, existing datasets either do not provide pose annotations or include scene types unrelated to robotic applications. Many datasets also lack the diversity of poses and occlusions found in crowded human scenes. To address this limitation we introduce JRDB-Pose, a large-scale dataset and benchmark for multi-person pose estimation and tracking using videos captured from a social navigation robot. The dataset contains challenge scenes with crowded indoor and outdoor locations and a diverse range of scales and occlusion types. JRDB-Pose provides human pose annotations with per-keypoint occlusion labels and track IDs consistent across the scene. A public evaluation server is made available for fair evaluation on a held-out test set. JRDB-Pose is available at https://jrdb.erc.monash.edu/ .
abstract_zh: 在人类环境中运行的自主机器人系统必须了解周围环境，才能做出准确、安全的决策。在具有近距离人机交互和机器人导航的拥挤人类场景中，深入理解需要通过人体姿势估计和跟踪来推理人体运动和身体动态随时间的变化。然而，现有数据集要么不提供姿势注释，要么包含与机器人应用程序无关的场景类型。许多数据集还缺乏在拥挤的人类场景中发现的姿势和遮挡的多样性。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了 JRDB-Pose，这是一个使用从社交导航机器人捕获的视频进行多人姿势估计和跟踪的大型数据集和基准。该数据集包含具有拥挤的室内和室外位置以及各种尺度和遮挡类型的挑战场景。 JRDB-Pose 提供人体姿势注释，以及整个场景中一致的每个关键点遮挡标签和轨迹 ID。公共评估服务器可用于对保留的测试集进行公平评估。 JRDB-Pose 可在 https://jrdb.erc.monash.edu/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JRDB-Pose数据集，用于多人姿态估计与跟踪，解决现有数据集在机器人应用场景中缺乏姿态标注和复杂场景多样性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集或缺乏姿态标注，或包含与机器人应用无关的场景类型，且难以满足密集人群场景中姿态和遮挡的多样性需求。
AI.method: 通过社交导航机器人采集室内外密集场景视频，标注关键点遮挡信息及跨场景一致的跟踪ID，构建包含多尺度、多遮挡类型的基准数据集。
AI.result: 发布包含挑战性场景的大型数据集，提供公开评估服务器，支持在保留测试集上的公平性能评估。
AI.conclusion: JRDB-Pose填补了机器人应用中多人姿态估计与跟踪数据集的空白，为相关算法研究提供基准测试平台。

authors_text: Rabin Dulal,Lihong Zheng,Muhammad Ashad Kabir,Shawn McGrath,Jonathan Medway,Dave Swain,Will Swain
title: Automatic Cattle Identification using YOLOv5 and Mosaic Augmentation: A Comparative Analysis
title_zh: 使用 YOLOv5 和马赛克增强的自动牛识别：比较分析
comment: Accepted in the Digital Image Computing: Techniques and Applications, 2022 (DICTA 2022)
comments: Accepted in the Digital Image Computing: Techniques and Applications, 2022 (DICTA 2022)
abstract: You Only Look Once (YOLO) is a single-stage object detection model popular for real-time object detection, accuracy, and speed. This paper investigates the YOLOv5 model to identify cattle in the yards. The current solution to cattle identification includes radio-frequency identification (RFID) tags. The problem occurs when the RFID tag is lost or damaged. A biometric solution identifies the cattle and helps to assign the lost or damaged tag or replace the RFID-based system. Muzzle patterns in cattle are unique biometric solutions like a fingerprint in humans. This paper aims to present our recent research in utilizing five popular object detection models, looking at the architecture of YOLOv5, investigating the performance of eight backbones with the YOLOv5 model, and the influence of mosaic augmentation in YOLOv5 by experimental results on the available cattle muzzle images. Finally, we concluded with the excellent potential of using YOLOv5 in automatic cattle identification. Our experiments show YOLOv5 with transformer performed best with mean Average Precision (mAP) 0.5 (the average of AP when the IoU is greater than 50%) of 0.995, and mAP 0.5:0.95 (the average of AP from 50% to 95% IoU with an interval of 5%) of 0.9366. In addition, our experiments show the increase in accuracy of the model by using mosaic augmentation in all backbones used in our experiments. Moreover, we can also detect cattle with partial muzzle images.

The problem occurs when the RFID tag is lost or damaged. A biometric solution identifies the cattle and helps to assign the lost or damaged tag or replace the RFID-based system. Muzzle patterns in cattle are unique biometric solutions like a fingerprint in humans. This paper aims to present our recent research in utilizing five popular object detection models, looking at the architecture of YOLOv5, investigating the performance of eight backbones with the YOLOv5 model, and the influence of mosaic augmentation in YOLOv5 by experimental results on the available cattle muzzle images. Finally, we concluded with the excellent potential of using YOLOv5 in automatic cattle identification. Our experiments show YOLOv5 with transformer performed best with mean Average Precision (mAP) 0.5 (the average of AP when the IoU is greater than 50%) of 0.995, and mAP 0.5:0.95 (the average of AP from 50% to 95% IoU with an interval of 5%) of 0.9366. In addition, our experiments show the increase in accuracy of the model by using mosaic augmentation in all backbones used in our experiments. Moreover, we can also detect cattle with partial muzzle images.
abstract_zh: You Only Look Once (YOLO) 是一种单阶段对象检测模型，在实时对象检测、准确性和速度方面很受欢迎。本文研究了 YOLOv5 模型来识别院子里的牛。目前的牛识别解决方案包括射频识别 (RFID) 标签。当 RFID 标签丢失或损坏时，就会出现此问题。生物识别解决方案可识别牛群并帮助分配丢失或损坏的标签或更换基于 RFID 的系统。牛的枪口图案是独特的生物识别解决方案，就像人类的指纹一样。本文旨在介绍我们最近的研究，利用五种流行的目标检测模型，研究 YOLOv5 的架构，研究 YOLOv5 模型的八个骨干网的性能，以及通过对可用牛口吻图像的实验结果来研究 YOLOv5 中马赛克增强的影响。最后，我们总结了使用 YOLOv5 在自动牛识别中的巨大潜力。我们的实验表明，带有 Transformer 的 YOLOv5 表现最好，平均精度 (mAP) 0.5（IoU 大于 50% 时的 AP 平均值）为 0.995，mAP 0.5:0.95（50% 到 95% IoU 之间的 AP 平均值，间隔为 5%）为 0.9366。此外，我们的实验表明，通过在实验中使用的所有主干中使用马赛克增强，可以提高模型的准确性。此外，我们还可以通过部分枪口图像来检测牛。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用YOLOv5模型结合Mosaic数据增强技术，实现对牛只 muzzle 图像的自动识别，以替代传统RFID标签的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统RFID标签存在丢失或损坏的问题，需通过生物特征（如牛 muzzle 模式）实现可靠的身份识别与标签分配。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv5框架，测试八种不同主干网络结构，结合Mosaic数据增强技术，分析其对牛 muzzle 图像识别性能的影响。
AI.result: YOLOv5结合Transformer主干网络在mAP0.5指标下达到0.995，mAP0.5:0.95为0.9366，且Mosaic增强显著提升所有主干网络的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv5在牛自动识别任务中表现出卓越潜力，尤其在部分 muzzle 图像检测中仍保持高精度，验证了其实际应用价值。

title: Fine-grained Semantic Alignment Network for Weakly Supervised Temporal Language Grounding
title_zh: 用于弱监督时间语言基础的细粒度语义对齐网络
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, accepted by Findings of EMNLP 2021
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, accepted by Findings of EMNLP 2021
abstract: Temporal language grounding (TLG) aims to localize a video segment in an untrimmed video based on a natural language description. To alleviate the expensive cost of manual annotations for temporal boundary labels, we are dedicated to the weakly supervised setting, where only video-level descriptions are provided for training. Most of the existing weakly supervised methods generate a candidate segment set and learn cross-modal alignment through a MIL-based framework. However, the temporal structure of the video as well as the complicated semantics in the sentence are lost during the learning. In this work, we propose a novel candidate-free framework: Fine-grained Semantic Alignment Network (FSAN), for weakly supervised TLG. Instead of view the sentence and candidate moments as a whole, FSAN learns token-by-clip cross-modal semantic alignment by an iterative cross-modal interaction module, generates a fine-grained cross-modal semantic alignment map, and performs grounding directly on top of the map. Extensive experiments are conducted on two widely-used benchmarks: ActivityNet-Captions, and DiDeMo, where our FSAN achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Temporal language grounding (TLG) aims to localize a video segment in an untrimmed video based on a natural language description. To alleviate the expensive cost of manual annotations for temporal boundary labels, we are dedicated to the weakly supervised setting, where only video-level descriptions are provided for training. Most of the existing weakly supervised methods generate a candidate segment set and learn cross-modal alignment through a MIL-based framework. However, the temporal structure of the video as well as the complicated semantics in the sentence are lost during the learning. In this work, we propose a novel candidate-free framework: Fine-grained Semantic Alignment Network (FSAN), for weakly supervised TLG. Instead of view the sentence and candidate moments as a whole, FSAN learns token-by-clip cross-modal semantic alignment by an iterative cross-modal interaction module, generates a fine-grained cross-modal semantic alignment map, and performs grounding directly on top of the map. Extensive experiments are conducted on two widely-used benchmarks: ActivityNet-Captions, and DiDeMo, where our FSAN achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 时间语言基础（TLG）旨在基于自然语言描述来定位未修剪视频中的视频片段。为了减轻时间边界标签手动注释的昂贵成本，我们致力于弱监督设置，其中仅提供视频级描述用于训练。大多数现有的弱监督方法都会生成候选片段集，并通过基于 MIL 的框架学习跨模态对齐。然而，视频的时间结构以及句子中复杂的语义在学习过程中都会丢失。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的无候选框架：细粒度语义对齐网络（FSAN），用于弱监督 TLG。 FSAN 不是将句子和候选时刻视为一个整体，而是通过迭代跨模态交互模块学习逐个片段的跨模态语义对齐，生成细粒度的跨模态语义对齐图，并直接在该图的顶部进行接地。在两个广泛使用的基准测试上进行了大量实验：ActivityNet-Captions 和 DiDeMo，其中我们的 FSAN 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种细粒度语义对齐网络（FSAN），用于弱监督下的时序语言定位任务，旨在通过视频级描述而非人工标注的时序边界标签来定位视频片段。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法依赖候选片段集和MIL框架，导致视频时序结构及句子复杂语义在学习过程中丢失，难以实现精确定位。
AI.method: FSAN通过迭代的跨模态交互模块，实现逐词-逐视频片段的细粒度语义对齐，生成跨模态语义对齐图并直接进行定位，无需候选片段。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet-Captions和DiDeMo两个基准数据集上，FSAN达到当时最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: FSAN通过保留时序结构和语义细节的细粒度对齐机制，有效提升了弱监督时序语言定位的准确性。

search_text: Fine-grained Semantic Alignment Network for Weakly Supervised Temporal Language Grounding 用于弱监督时间语言基础的细粒度语义对齐网络 Temporal language grounding (TLG) aims to localize a video segment in an untrimmed video based on a natural language description. To alleviate the expensive cost of manual annotations for temporal boundary labels, we are dedicated to the weakly supervised setting, where only video-level descriptions are provided for training. Most of the existing weakly supervised methods generate a candidate segment set and learn cross-modal alignment through a MIL-based framework. However, the temporal structure of the video as well as the complicated semantics in the sentence are lost during the learning. In this work, we propose a novel candidate-free framework: Fine-grained Semantic Alignment Network (FSAN), for weakly supervised TLG. Instead of view the sentence and candidate moments as a whole, FSAN learns token-by-clip cross-modal semantic alignment by an iterative cross-modal interaction module, generates a fine-grained cross-modal semantic alignment map, and performs grounding directly on top of the map. Extensive experiments are conducted on two widely-used benchmarks: ActivityNet-Captions, and DiDeMo, where our FSAN achieves state-of-the-art performance. 时间语言基础（TLG）旨在基于自然语言描述来定位未修剪视频中的视频片段。为了减轻时间边界标签手动注释的昂贵成本，我们致力于弱监督设置，其中仅提供视频级描述用于训练。大多数现有的弱监督方法都会生成候选片段集，并通过基于 MIL 的框架学习跨模态对齐。然而，视频的时间结构以及句子中复杂的语义在学习过程中都会丢失。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的无候选框架：细粒度语义对齐网络（FSAN），用于弱监督 TLG。 FSAN 不是将句子和候选时刻视为一个整体，而是通过迭代跨模态交互模块学习逐个片段的跨模态语义对齐，生成细粒度的跨模态语义对齐图，并直接在该图的顶部进行接地。在两个广泛使用的基准测试上进行了大量实验：ActivityNet-Captions 和 DiDeMo，其中我们的 FSAN 实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种细粒度语义对齐网络（FSAN），用于弱监督下的时序语言定位任务，旨在通过视频级描述而非人工标注的时序边界标签来定位视频片段。 Yuechen Wang,Wengang Zhou,Houqiang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Dongsheng Chen,Chaofan Tao,Lu Hou,Lifeng Shang,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu
title: LiteVL: Efficient Video-Language Learning with Enhanced Spatial-Temporal Modeling
title_zh: LiteVL：通过增强的时空建模进行高效的视频语言学习
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, accepted by EMNLP 2022 main conference
comments: 13 pages, 6 figures, accepted by EMNLP 2022 main conference
abstract: Recent large-scale video-language pre-trained models have shown appealing performance on various downstream tasks. However, the pre-training process is computationally expensive due to the requirement of millions of video-text pairs and the redundant data structure of each video. To mitigate these problems, we propose LiteVL, which adapts a pre-trained image-language model BLIP into a video-text model directly on downstream tasks, without heavy pre-training. To enhance the temporal modeling lacking in the image-language model, we propose to add temporal attention modules in the image encoder of BLIP with dynamic temporal scaling. Besides the model-wise adaptation, we also propose a non-parametric pooling mechanism to adaptively reweight the fine-grained video embedding conditioned on the text. Experimental results on text-video retrieval and video question answering show that the proposed LiteVL even outperforms previous video-language pre-trained models by a clear margin, though without any video-language pre-training.
summary: Recent large-scale video-language pre-trained models have shown appealing performance on various downstream tasks. However, the pre-training process is computationally expensive due to the requirement of millions of video-text pairs and the redundant data structure of each video. To mitigate these problems, we propose LiteVL, which adapts a pre-trained image-language model BLIP into a video-text model directly on downstream tasks, without heavy pre-training. To enhance the temporal modeling lacking in the image-language model, we propose to add temporal attention modules in the image encoder of BLIP with dynamic temporal scaling. Besides the model-wise adaptation, we also propose a non-parametric pooling mechanism to adaptively reweight the fine-grained video embedding conditioned on the text. Experimental results on text-video retrieval and video question answering show that the proposed LiteVL even outperforms previous video-language pre-trained models by a clear margin, though without any video-language pre-training.
abstract_zh: 最近的大规模视频语言预训练模型在各种下游任务上表现出了引人注目的性能。然而，由于需要数百万个视频文本对以及每个视频的冗余数据结构，预训练过程的计算成本很高。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 LiteVL，它将预训练的图像语言模型 BLIP 直接应用于下游任务的视频文本模型，而无需进行大量的预训练。为了增强图像语言模型中缺乏的时间建模，我们建议在具有动态时间缩放的 BLIP 图像编码器中添加时间注意模块。除了模型自适应之外，我们还提出了一种非参数池机制来自适应地重新加权以文本为条件的细粒度视频嵌入。文本视频检索和视频问答的实验结果表明，尽管没有任何视频语言预训练，但所提出的 LiteVL 甚至明显优于之前的视频语言预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiteVL模型，通过改进图像语言模型BLIP，实现无需大规模预训练的高效视频-语言学习。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言预训练模型因需要大量视频-文本对及冗余数据结构导致计算成本高昂，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将BLIP模型适配至视频任务，引入动态时间缩放的时序注意力模块，并设计非参数池化机制自适应调整视频嵌入权重。
AI.result: 在文本-视频检索和视频问答任务中，LiteVL在无视频-语言预训练情况下超越了现有预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: LiteVL通过模型结构改进和数据适配策略，在保持性能的同时显著降低了视频-语言预训练的计算成本。

search_text: LiteVL: Efficient Video-Language Learning with Enhanced Spatial-Temporal Modeling LiteVL：通过增强的时空建模进行高效的视频语言学习 Recent large-scale video-language pre-trained models have shown appealing performance on various downstream tasks. However, the pre-training process is computationally expensive due to the requirement of millions of video-text pairs and the redundant data structure of each video. To mitigate these problems, we propose LiteVL, which adapts a pre-trained image-language model BLIP into a video-text model directly on downstream tasks, without heavy pre-training. To enhance the temporal modeling lacking in the image-language model, we propose to add temporal attention modules in the image encoder of BLIP with dynamic temporal scaling. Besides the model-wise adaptation, we also propose a non-parametric pooling mechanism to adaptively reweight the fine-grained video embedding conditioned on the text. Experimental results on text-video retrieval and video question answering show that the proposed LiteVL even outperforms previous video-language pre-trained models by a clear margin, though without any video-language pre-training. 最近的大规模视频语言预训练模型在各种下游任务上表现出了引人注目的性能。然而，由于需要数百万个视频文本对以及每个视频的冗余数据结构，预训练过程的计算成本很高。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 LiteVL，它将预训练的图像语言模型 BLIP 直接应用于下游任务的视频文本模型，而无需进行大量的预训练。为了增强图像语言模型中缺乏的时间建模，我们建议在具有动态时间缩放的 BLIP 图像编码器中添加时间注意模块。除了模型自适应之外，我们还提出了一种非参数池机制来自适应地重新加权以文本为条件的细粒度视频嵌入。文本视频检索和视频问答的实验结果表明，尽管没有任何视频语言预训练，但所提出的 LiteVL 甚至明显优于之前的视频语言预训练模型。 本文提出LiteVL模型，通过改进图像语言模型BLIP，实现无需大规模预训练的高效视频-语言学习。 Dongsheng Chen,Chaofan Tao,Lu Hou,Lifeng Shang,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Dora Zhao,Jerone T. A. Andrews,Alice Xiang
title: Men Also Do Laundry: Multi-Attribute Bias Amplification
title_zh: 男人也洗衣服：多属性偏差放大
abstract: As computer vision systems become more widely deployed, there is increasing concern from both the research community and the public that these systems are not only reproducing but amplifying harmful social biases. The phenomenon of bias amplification, which is the focus of this work, refers to models amplifying inherent training set biases at test time. Existing metrics measure bias amplification with respect to single annotated attributes (e.g., $\texttt{computer}$). However, several visual datasets consist of images with multiple attribute annotations. We show models can learn to exploit correlations with respect to multiple attributes (e.g., {$\texttt{computer}$, $\texttt{keyboard}$}), which are not accounted for by current metrics. In addition, we show current metrics can give the erroneous impression that minimal or no bias amplification has occurred as they involve aggregating over positive and negative values. Further, these metrics lack a clear desired value, making them difficult to interpret. To address these shortcomings, we propose a new metric: Multi-Attribute Bias Amplification. We validate our proposed metric through an analysis of gender bias amplification on the COCO and imSitu datasets. Finally, we benchmark bias mitigation methods using our proposed metric, suggesting possible avenues for future bias mitigation
summary: As computer vision systems become more widely deployed, there is increasing concern from both the research community and the public that these systems are not only reproducing but amplifying harmful social biases. The phenomenon of bias amplification, which is the focus of this work, refers to models amplifying inherent training set biases at test time. Existing metrics measure bias amplification with respect to single annotated attributes (e.g., $\texttt{computer}$). However, several visual datasets consist of images with multiple attribute annotations. We show models can learn to exploit correlations with respect to multiple attributes (e.g., {$\texttt{computer}$, $\texttt{keyboard}$}), which are not accounted for by current metrics. In addition, we show current metrics can give the erroneous impression that minimal or no bias amplification has occurred as they involve aggregating over positive and negative values. Further, these metrics lack a clear desired value, making them difficult to interpret. To address these shortcomings, we propose a new metric: Multi-Attribute Bias Amplification. We validate our proposed metric through an analysis of gender bias amplification on the COCO and imSitu datasets. Finally, we benchmark bias mitigation methods using our proposed metric, suggesting possible avenues for future bias mitigation
abstract_zh: 随着计算机视觉系统的部署越来越广泛，研究界和公众越来越担心这些系统不仅会复制而且会放大有害的社会偏见。偏差放大现象是这项工作的重点，是指模型在测试时放大固有的训练集偏差。现有指标衡量单个注释属性的偏差放大（例如，$\texttt{computer}$）。然而，一些视觉数据集由具有多个属性注释的图像组成。我们证明模型可以学习利用多个属性（例如，{$\texttt{computer}$, $\texttt{keyboard}$}）的相关性，而当前指标并未考虑这些属性。此外，我们表明当前的指标可能会给人一种错误的印象，即发生了最小的偏差放大或没有发生偏差放大，因为它们涉及对正值和负值的聚合。此外，这些指标缺乏明确的期望值，使得它们难以解释。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一个新的指标：多属性偏差放大。我们通过对 COCO 和 imSitu 数据集上的性别偏见放大分析来验证我们提出的指标。最后，我们使用我们提出的指标对偏差缓解方法进行基准测试，提出未来偏差缓解的可能途径

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多属性偏见放大度量方法，用于更准确地评估计算机视觉系统中因多属性关联导致的偏见放大问题。
AI.motivation: 现有偏见放大度量仅针对单一属性，无法捕捉多属性间的关联性，且易因正负值聚合产生误导性结论，难以有效指导偏见缓解方法的改进。
AI.method: 设计多属性偏见放大度量指标，通过分析多个属性间的相关性（如计算机与键盘），验证其在COCO和imSitu数据集上的有效性，并用于评估现有偏见缓解方法。
AI.result: 实验表明新指标能更准确揭示模型在性别偏见上的放大现象，且发现现有缓解方法在多属性场景下效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 多属性度量能更全面评估偏见问题，未来需开发更有效的多属性偏见缓解策略。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多属性偏见放大度量方法，用于更准确地评估计算机视觉系统中因多属性关联导致的偏见放大问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有偏见放大度量仅针对单一属性，无法捕捉多属性间的关联性，且易因正负值聚合产生误导性结论，难以有效指导偏见缓解方法的改进。
ai_content.method: 设计多属性偏见放大度量指标，通过分析多个属性间的相关性（如计算机与键盘），验证其在COCO和imSitu数据集上的有效性，并用于评估现有偏见缓解方法。
ai_content.result: 实验表明新指标能更准确揭示模型在性别偏见上的放大现象，且发现现有缓解方法在多属性场景下效果有限。
ai_content.conclusion: 多属性度量能更全面评估偏见问题，未来需开发更有效的多属性偏见缓解策略。

search_text: Men Also Do Laundry: Multi-Attribute Bias Amplification 男人也洗衣服：多属性偏差放大 As computer vision systems become more widely deployed, there is increasing concern from both the research community and the public that these systems are not only reproducing but amplifying harmful social biases. The phenomenon of bias amplification, which is the focus of this work, refers to models amplifying inherent training set biases at test time. Existing metrics measure bias amplification with respect to single annotated attributes (e.g., $\texttt{computer}$). However, several visual datasets consist of images with multiple attribute annotations. We show models can learn to exploit correlations with respect to multiple attributes (e.g., {$\texttt{computer}$, $\texttt{keyboard}$}), which are not accounted for by current metrics. In addition, we show current metrics can give the erroneous impression that minimal or no bias amplification has occurred as they involve aggregating over positive and negative values. Further, these metrics lack a clear desired value, making them difficult to interpret. To address these shortcomings, we propose a new metric: Multi-Attribute Bias Amplification. We validate our proposed metric through an analysis of gender bias amplification on the COCO and imSitu datasets. Finally, we benchmark bias mitigation methods using our proposed metric, suggesting possible avenues for future bias mitigation 随着计算机视觉系统的部署越来越广泛，研究界和公众越来越担心这些系统不仅会复制而且会放大有害的社会偏见。偏差放大现象是这项工作的重点，是指模型在测试时放大固有的训练集偏差。现有指标衡量单个注释属性的偏差放大（例如，$\texttt{computer}$）。然而，一些视觉数据集由具有多个属性注释的图像组成。我们证明模型可以学习利用多个属性（例如，{$\texttt{computer}$, $\texttt{keyboard}$}）的相关性，而当前指标并未考虑这些属性。此外，我们表明当前的指标可能会给人一种错误的印象，即发生了最小的偏差放大或没有发生偏差放大，因为它们涉及对正值和负值的聚合。此外，这些指标缺乏明确的期望值，使得它们难以解释。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一个新的指标：多属性偏差放大。我们通过对 COCO 和 imSitu 数据集上的性别偏见放大分析来验证我们提出的指标。最后，我们使用我们提出的指标对偏差缓解方法进行基准测试，提出未来偏差缓解的可能途径 本文提出了一种新的多属性偏见放大度量方法，用于更准确地评估计算机视觉系统中因多属性关联导致的偏见放大问题。 Dora Zhao,Jerone T. A. Andrews,Alice Xiang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Tianyi Li,Michele Buzzicotti,Luca Biferale,Fabio Bonaccorso,Shiyi Chen,Minping Wan
title: Multi-scale data reconstruction of turbulent rotating flows with Gappy POD, Extended POD and Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用 Gappy POD、扩展 POD 和生成对抗网络对湍流旋转流进行多尺度数据重建
abstract: Data reconstruction of rotating turbulent snapshots is investigated utilizing data-driven tools. This problem is crucial for numerous geophysical applications and fundamental aspects, given the concurrent effects of direct and inverse energy cascades, which lead to non-Gaussian statistics at both large and small scales. Data assimilation also serves as a tool to rank physical features within turbulence, by evaluating the performance of reconstruction in terms of the quality and quantity of the information used. Additionally, benchmarking various reconstruction techniques is essential to assess the trade-off between quantitative supremacy, implementation complexity, and explicability. In this study, we use linear and non-linear tools based on the Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD) and Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) for reconstructing rotating turbulence snapshots with spatial damages (inpainting). We focus on accurately reproducing both statistical properties and instantaneous velocity fields. Different gap sizes and gap geometries are investigated in order to assess the importance of coherency and multi-scale properties of the missing information. Surprisingly enough, concerning point-wise reconstruction, the non-linear GAN does not outperform one of the linear POD techniques. On the other hand, supremacy of the GAN approach is shown when the statistical multi-scale properties are compared. Similarly, extreme events in the gap region are better predicted when using GAN. The balance between point-wise error and statistical properties is controlled by the adversarial ratio, which determines the relative importance of the generator and the discriminator in the GAN training. Robustness against the measurement noise is also discussed.
summary: Data reconstruction of rotating turbulent snapshots is investigated utilizing data-driven tools. This problem is crucial for numerous geophysical applications and fundamental aspects, given the concurrent effects of direct and inverse energy cascades, which lead to non-Gaussian statistics at both large and small scales. Data assimilation also serves as a tool to rank physical features within turbulence, by evaluating the performance of reconstruction in terms of the quality and quantity of the information used. Additionally, benchmarking various reconstruction techniques is essential to assess the trade-off between quantitative supremacy, implementation complexity, and explicability. In this study, we use linear and non-linear tools based on the Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD) and Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) for reconstructing rotating turbulence snapshots with spatial damages (inpainting). We focus on accurately reproducing both statistical properties and instantaneous velocity fields. Different gap sizes and gap geometries are investigated in order to assess the importance of coherency and multi-scale properties of the missing information. Surprisingly enough, concerning point-wise reconstruction, the non-linear GAN does not outperform one of the linear POD techniques. On the other hand, supremacy of the GAN approach is shown when the statistical multi-scale properties are compared. Similarly, extreme events in the gap region are better predicted when using GAN. The balance between point-wise error and statistical properties is controlled by the adversarial ratio, which determines the relative importance of the generator and the discriminator in the GAN training. Robustness against the measurement noise is also discussed.
abstract_zh: 利用数据驱动工具研究旋转湍流快照的数据重建。考虑到直接和反向能量级联的并发影响，该问题对于许多地球物理应用和基本方面至关重要，这会导致大尺度和小尺度的非高斯统计。数据同化还可以作为一种工具，通过根据所使用的信息的质量和数量来评估重建的性能，对湍流中的物理特征进行排序。此外，对各种重建技术进行基准测试对于评估定量优势、实现复杂性和可解释性之间的权衡至关重要。在本研究中，我们使用基于本征正交分解 (POD) 和生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的线性和非线性工具来重建具有空间损伤的旋转湍流快照（修复）。我们专注于准确再现统计特性和瞬时速度场。研究不同的间隙大小和间隙几何形状，以评估缺失信息的一致性和多尺度特性的重要性。令人惊讶的是，就逐点重建而言，非线性 GAN 的性能并不优于其中一种线性 POD 技术。另一方面，当比较统计多尺度特性时，GAN 方法的优势就显现出来了。同样，使用 GAN 可以更好地预测间隙区域的极端事件。逐点误差和统计特性之间的平衡由对抗比控制，这决定了生成器和判别器在 GAN 训练中的相对重要性。还讨论了针对测量噪声的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用Gappy POD、Extended POD和生成对抗网络（GAN）对旋转湍流快照进行多尺度数据重建的方法，重点评估不同技术在统计特性与瞬时速度场重建中的表现。
AI.motivation: 旋转湍流数据重建对地球物理应用至关重要，因其涉及直接与逆向能量级联导致的非高斯统计特性。需通过对比不同方法的性能，平衡定量精度、实现复杂度与可解释性。
AI.method: 采用基于本征正交分解（POD）的线性方法与生成对抗网络（GAN）的非线性方法，针对具有空间缺失区域的旋转湍流数据进行重建，分析不同缺失区域尺寸与几何形状对相干性及多尺度特性的影响。
AI.result: 在点wise重建中，非线性GAN未优于部分线性POD方法，但在统计多尺度特性及极端事件预测中表现更优。对抗训练中的生成器与判别器比例（对抗比）可调控重建误差与统计特性间的平衡，且GAN对测量噪声更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GAN在统计多尺度重建与极端事件预测中优于线性方法，但点wise精度需权衡对抗比参数，表明不同重建目标需适配相应方法，且噪声鲁棒性是关键考量因素。

title: Splay Top Trees
title_zh: 八字形顶树
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures, published at SOSA'23, license information updated
comments: 27 pages, 6 figures, published at SOSA'23, license information updated
abstract: The top tree data structure is an important and fundamental tool in dynamic graph algorithms. Top trees have existed for decades, and today serve as an ingredient in many state-of-the-art algorithms for dynamic graphs. In this work, we give a new direct proof of the existence of top trees, facilitating simpler and more direct implementations of top trees, based on ideas from splay trees. This result hinges on new insights into the structure of top trees, and in particular the structure of each root path in a top tree.
summary: The top tree data structure is an important and fundamental tool in dynamic graph algorithms. Top trees have existed for decades, and today serve as an ingredient in many state-of-the-art algorithms for dynamic graphs. In this work, we give a new direct proof of the existence of top trees, facilitating simpler and more direct implementations of top trees, based on ideas from splay trees. This result hinges on new insights into the structure of top trees, and in particular the structure of each root path in a top tree.
abstract_zh: 顶树数据结构是动态图算法中重要且基本的工具。顶树已经存在了几十年，如今已成为许多最先进的动态图算法的组成部分。在这项工作中，我们基于展开树的思想，给出了顶树存在的新直接证明，促进了顶树更简单、更直接的实现。这一结果取决于对顶树结构的新见解，特别是顶树中每个根路径的结构。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于splay树思想的新方法，直接证明Top树的存在性，从而简化其实现。
AI.motivation: 为动态图算法提供更简单直接的Top树实现方法，促进其在现代算法中的应用。
AI.method: 基于splay树的原理，结合对Top树根路径结构的新分析，提出新的存在性证明方法。
AI.result: 成功证明了Top树的存在性，为实现更简洁的Top树结构提供了理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 新证明简化了Top树的实现，为动态图算法的优化和进一步研究提供了基础。

method: 基于splay树的原理，结合对Top树根路径结构的新分析，提出新的存在性证明方法。
result: 成功证明了Top树的存在性，为实现更简洁的Top树结构提供了理论依据。
conclusion: 新证明简化了Top树的实现，为动态图算法的优化和进一步研究提供了基础。
search_text: Splay Top Trees 八字形顶树 The top tree data structure is an important and fundamental tool in dynamic graph algorithms. Top trees have existed for decades, and today serve as an ingredient in many state-of-the-art algorithms for dynamic graphs. In this work, we give a new direct proof of the existence of top trees, facilitating simpler and more direct implementations of top trees, based on ideas from splay trees. This result hinges on new insights into the structure of top trees, and in particular the structure of each root path in a top tree. 顶树数据结构是动态图算法中重要且基本的工具。顶树已经存在了几十年，如今已成为许多最先进的动态图算法的组成部分。在这项工作中，我们基于展开树的思想，给出了顶树存在的新直接证明，促进了顶树更简单、更直接的实现。这一结果取决于对顶树结构的新见解，特别是顶树中每个根路径的结构。 提出一种基于splay树思想的新方法，直接证明Top树的存在性，从而简化其实现。 Jacob Holm,Eva Rotenberg,Alice Ryhl cs.DS

authors_text: Chull Hwan Song,Jooyoung Yoon,Shunghyun Choi,Yannis Avrithis
title: Boosting vision transformers for image retrieval
title_zh: 增强图像检索的视觉转换器
abstract: Vision transformers have achieved remarkable progress in vision tasks such as image classification and detection. However, in instance-level image retrieval, transformers have not yet shown good performance compared to convolutional networks. We propose a number of improvements that make transformers outperform the state of the art for the first time. (1) We show that a hybrid architecture is more effective than plain transformers, by a large margin. (2) We introduce two branches collecting global (classification token) and local (patch tokens) information, from which we form a global image representation. (3) In each branch, we collect multi-layer features from the transformer encoder, corresponding to skip connections across distant layers. (4) We enhance locality of interactions at the deeper layers of the encoder, which is the relative weakness of vision transformers. We train our model on all commonly used training sets and, for the first time, we make fair comparisons separately per training set. In all cases, we outperform previous models based on global representation. Public code is available at https://github.com/dealicious-inc/DToP.
summary: Vision transformers have achieved remarkable progress in vision tasks such as image classification and detection. However, in instance-level image retrieval, transformers have not yet shown good performance compared to convolutional networks. We propose a number of improvements that make transformers outperform the state of the art for the first time. (1) We show that a hybrid architecture is more effective than plain transformers, by a large margin. (2) We introduce two branches collecting global (classification token) and local (patch tokens) information, from which we form a global image representation. (3) In each branch, we collect multi-layer features from the transformer encoder, corresponding to skip connections across distant layers. (4) We enhance locality of interactions at the deeper layers of the encoder, which is the relative weakness of vision transformers. We train our model on all commonly used training sets and, for the first time, we make fair comparisons separately per training set. In all cases, we outperform previous models based on global representation. Public code is available at https://github.com/dealicious-inc/DToP.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器在图像分类和检测等视觉任务中取得了显着的进步。然而，在实例级图像检索中，与卷积网络相比，Transformer 尚未表现出良好的性能。我们提出了许多改进，使变压器首次超越了现有技术。 (1) 我们证明混合架构比普通变压器更有效，而且效率大大提高。 （2）我们引入两个收集全局（分类标记）和局部（补丁标记）信息的分支，从中我们形成全局图像表示。 (3) 在每个分支中，我们从 Transformer 编码器收集多层特征，对应于跨远距离层的跳过连接。 (4) 我们增强了编码器更深层交互的局部性，这是视觉 Transformer 的相对弱点。我们在所有常用的训练集上训练我们的模型，并且我们第一次对每个训练集分别进行公平的比较。在所有情况下，我们都优于以前基于全局表示的模型。公共代码可在 https://github.com/dealicious-inc/DToP 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出改进方法，使视觉Transformer在图像检索任务中首次超越现有最佳模型。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer在图像分类等任务中表现优异，但在实例级图像检索中仍不如卷积网络，需针对性改进其性能。
AI.method: 提出混合架构并设计全局与局部信息分支，结合多层特征与增强深层局部交互，优化Transformer编码器结构。
AI.result: 在多个常用数据集上均超越基于全局表示的先前模型，首次实现公平的跨数据集比较，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构优化与特征融合策略，视觉Transformer在图像检索任务中可达到与卷积网络相当甚至更优的性能。

title: Collaborative Image Understanding
title_zh: 协作图像理解
abstract: Automatically understanding the contents of an image is a highly relevant problem in practice. In e-commerce and social media settings, for example, a common problem is to automatically categorize user-provided pictures. Nowadays, a standard approach is to fine-tune pre-trained image models with application-specific data. Besides images, organizations however often also collect collaborative signals in the context of their application, in particular how users interacted with the provided online content, e.g., in forms of viewing, rating, or tagging. Such signals are commonly used for item recommendation, typically by deriving latent user and item representations from the data. In this work, we show that such collaborative information can be leveraged to improve the classification process of new images. Specifically, we propose a multitask learning framework, where the auxiliary task is to reconstruct collaborative latent item representations. A series of experiments on datasets from e-commerce and social media demonstrates that considering collaborative signals helps to significantly improve the performance of the main task of image classification by up to 9.1%.
summary: Automatically understanding the contents of an image is a highly relevant problem in practice. In e-commerce and social media settings, for example, a common problem is to automatically categorize user-provided pictures. Nowadays, a standard approach is to fine-tune pre-trained image models with application-specific data. Besides images, organizations however often also collect collaborative signals in the context of their application, in particular how users interacted with the provided online content, e.g., in forms of viewing, rating, or tagging. Such signals are commonly used for item recommendation, typically by deriving latent user and item representations from the data. In this work, we show that such collaborative information can be leveraged to improve the classification process of new images. Specifically, we propose a multitask learning framework, where the auxiliary task is to reconstruct collaborative latent item representations. A series of experiments on datasets from e-commerce and social media demonstrates that considering collaborative signals helps to significantly improve the performance of the main task of image classification by up to 9.1%.
abstract_zh: 自动理解图像的内容是实践中一个高度相关的问题。例如，在电子商务和社交媒体设置中，一个常见问题是自动对用户提供的图片进行分类。如今，标准方法是使用特定于应用程序的数据来微调预先训练的图像模型。然而，除了图像之外，组织还经常在其应用程序的上下文中收集协作信号，特别是用户如何与所提供的在线内容交互，例如以查看、评级或标记的形式。此类信号通常用于项目推荐，通常通过从数据中导出潜在用户和项目表示来实现。在这项工作中，我们表明可以利用此类协作信息来改进新图像的分类过程。具体来说，我们提出了一个多任务学习框架，其中辅助任务是重建协作潜在项目表示。对电子商务和社交媒体数据集的一系列实验表明，考虑协作信号有助于将图像分类主要任务的性能显着提高高达 9.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用用户协作信号（如浏览、评分、标签）改进图像分类任务，通过多任务学习框架提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分类仅依赖图像数据，而用户协作信号（如浏览、评分）包含丰富的上下文信息，可辅助提升分类准确性。
AI.method: 提出多任务学习框架，主任务为图像分类，辅助任务通过重建协作信号（用户交互数据）生成的潜在物品表示，实现信息共享。
AI.result: 在电商与社交媒体数据集上实验表明，结合协作信号可使图像分类准确率最高提升9.1%。
AI.conclusion: 协作信号有效提升图像分类性能，验证了多任务学习融合用户行为数据的潜力，为多模态学习提供新思路。

title: Turning Fixed to Adaptive: Integrating Post-Evaluation into Simultaneous Machine Translation
title_zh: 变固定为自适应：将后评估集成到同步机器翻译中
abstract: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) starts its translation before reading the whole source sentence and employs either fixed or adaptive policy to generate the target sentence. Compared to the fixed policy, the adaptive policy achieves better latency-quality tradeoffs by adopting a flexible translation policy. If the policy can evaluate rationality before taking action, the probability of incorrect actions will also decrease. However, previous methods lack evaluation of actions before taking them. In this paper, we propose a method of performing the adaptive policy via integrating post-evaluation into the fixed policy. Specifically, whenever a candidate token is generated, our model will evaluate the rationality of the next action by measuring the change in the source content. Our model will then take different actions based on the evaluation results. Experiments on three translation tasks show that our method can exceed strong baselines under all latency.
summary: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) starts its translation before reading the whole source sentence and employs either fixed or adaptive policy to generate the target sentence. Compared to the fixed policy, the adaptive policy achieves better latency-quality tradeoffs by adopting a flexible translation policy. If the policy can evaluate rationality before taking action, the probability of incorrect actions will also decrease. However, previous methods lack evaluation of actions before taking them. In this paper, we propose a method of performing the adaptive policy via integrating post-evaluation into the fixed policy. Specifically, whenever a candidate token is generated, our model will evaluate the rationality of the next action by measuring the change in the source content. Our model will then take different actions based on the evaluation results. Experiments on three translation tasks show that our method can exceed strong baselines under all latency.
abstract_zh: 同步机器翻译 (SiMT) 在读取整个源句子之前开始翻译，并采用固定或自适应策略来生成目标句子。与固定策略相比，自适应策略通过采用灵活的转换策略实现了更好的延迟质量权衡。如果政策在采取行动之前能够评估合理性，那么错误行动的概率也会降低。然而，以前的方法缺乏在采取行动之前对行动进行评估。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过将后评估集成到固定策略中来执行自适应策略的方法。具体来说，每当生成候选令牌时，我们的模型都会通过测量源内容的变化来评估下一步操作的合理性。然后我们的模型将根据评估结果采取不同的行动。对三个翻译任务的实验表明，我们的方法可以在所有延迟下超过强基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将后评估整合到固定策略中，以改进同步机器翻译中的自适应策略，实现更优的延迟-质量权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应策略虽能优化延迟与质量的平衡，但缺乏在采取行动前对动作合理性的评估，导致错误率较高。
AI.method: 每当生成候选词时，模型通过衡量源内容变化来评估下一步动作的合理性，并根据评估结果采取不同动作。
AI.result: 在三个翻译任务的实验中，该方法在所有延迟条件下均优于现有强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 将后评估引入固定策略可有效提升同步机器翻译的自适应性，实现更优的延迟-质量平衡并减少错误动作概率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出将后评估整合到固定策略中，以改进同步机器翻译中的自适应策略，实现更优的延迟-质量权衡。

search_text: Turning Fixed to Adaptive: Integrating Post-Evaluation into Simultaneous Machine Translation 变固定为自适应：将后评估集成到同步机器翻译中 Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) starts its translation before reading the whole source sentence and employs either fixed or adaptive policy to generate the target sentence. Compared to the fixed policy, the adaptive policy achieves better latency-quality tradeoffs by adopting a flexible translation policy. If the policy can evaluate rationality before taking action, the probability of incorrect actions will also decrease. However, previous methods lack evaluation of actions before taking them. In this paper, we propose a method of performing the adaptive policy via integrating post-evaluation into the fixed policy. Specifically, whenever a candidate token is generated, our model will evaluate the rationality of the next action by measuring the change in the source content. Our model will then take different actions based on the evaluation results. Experiments on three translation tasks show that our method can exceed strong baselines under all latency. 同步机器翻译 (SiMT) 在读取整个源句子之前开始翻译，并采用固定或自适应策略来生成目标句子。与固定策略相比，自适应策略通过采用灵活的转换策略实现了更好的延迟质量权衡。如果政策在采取行动之前能够评估合理性，那么错误行动的概率也会降低。然而，以前的方法缺乏在采取行动之前对行动进行评估。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过将后评估集成到固定策略中来执行自适应策略的方法。具体来说，每当生成候选令牌时，我们的模型都会通过测量源内容的变化来评估下一步操作的合理性。然后我们的模型将根据评估结果采取不同的行动。对三个翻译任务的实验表明，我们的方法可以在所有延迟下超过强基线。 本文提出将后评估整合到固定策略中，以改进同步机器翻译中的自适应策略，实现更优的延迟-质量权衡。 Shoutao Guo,Shaolei Zhang,Yang Feng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jan Švec,Luboš Šmídl,Josef V. Psutka,Aleš Pražák
title: Spoken Term Detection and Relevance Score Estimation using Dot-Product of Pronunciation Embeddings
title_zh: 使用发音嵌入的点积进行口语术语检测和相关性分数估计
comment: ef:Švec, J., Šmídl, L., Psutka, J.V., Pražák, A. (2021) Spoken Term Detection and Relevance Score Estimation Using Dot-Product of Pronunciation Embeddings. Proc. Interspeech 2021, 4398-4402
comments: ef:Švec, J., Šmídl, L., Psutka, J.V., Pražák, A. (2021) Spoken Term Detection and Relevance Score Estimation Using Dot-Product of Pronunciation Embeddings. Proc. Interspeech 2021, 4398-4402
abstract: The paper describes a novel approach to Spoken Term Detection (STD) in large spoken archives using deep LSTM networks. The work is based on the previous approach of using Siamese neural networks for STD and naturally extends it to directly localize a spoken term and estimate its relevance score. The phoneme confusion network generated by a phoneme recognizer is processed by the deep LSTM network which projects each segment of the confusion network into an embedding space. The searched term is projected into the same embedding space using another deep LSTM network. The relevance score is then computed using a simple dot-product in the embedding space and calibrated using a sigmoid function to predict the probability of occurrence. The location of the searched term is then estimated from the sequence of output probabilities. The deep LSTM networks are trained in a self-supervised manner from paired recognition hypotheses on word and phoneme levels. The method is experimentally evaluated on MALACH data in English and Czech languages.
summary: The paper describes a novel approach to Spoken Term Detection (STD) in large spoken archives using deep LSTM networks. The work is based on the previous approach of using Siamese neural networks for STD and naturally extends it to directly localize a spoken term and estimate its relevance score. The phoneme confusion network generated by a phoneme recognizer is processed by the deep LSTM network which projects each segment of the confusion network into an embedding space. The searched term is projected into the same embedding space using another deep LSTM network. The relevance score is then computed using a simple dot-product in the embedding space and calibrated using a sigmoid function to predict the probability of occurrence. The location of the searched term is then estimated from the sequence of output probabilities. The deep LSTM networks are trained in a self-supervised manner from paired recognition hypotheses on word and phoneme levels. The method is experimentally evaluated on MALACH data in English and Czech languages.
abstract_zh: 该论文描述了一种使用深度 LSTM 网络在大型口语档案中进行口语术语检测 (STD) 的新方法。这项工作基于之前使用 Siamese 神经网络处理 STD 的方法，并自然地将其扩展为直接定位口语术语并估计其相关性得分。音素识别器生成的音素混淆网络由深度 LSTM 网络处理，该网络将混淆网络的每个片段投影到嵌入空间中。使用另一个深度 LSTM 网络将搜索到的术语投影到相同的嵌入空间中。然后使用嵌入空间中的简单点积计算相关性分数，并使用 sigmoid 函数进行校准以预测发生的概率。然后根据输出概率序列估计搜索项的位置。深度 LSTM 网络根据单词和音素级别的配对识别假设以自我监督的方式进行训练。该方法在英语和捷克语的 MALACH 数据上进行了实验评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于发音嵌入点积的语音术语检测与相关性评分估计方法，利用深度LSTM网络处理音素混淆网络并计算相关性。
AI.motivation: 传统语音术语检测方法在定位和相关性评分上存在不足，需更高效的嵌入空间计算方法以提升检测精度与适应性。
AI.method: 通过深度LSTM网络将音素混淆网络分段映射到嵌入空间，同时将目标术语映射至相同空间，利用点积计算相关性并经sigmoid函数校准概率，结合自监督训练优化模型。
AI.result: 在英语和捷克语的MALACH数据集上验证了方法有效性，实现了术语定位与相关性评分的准确估计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过嵌入空间点积计算显著提升了语音术语检测的性能，自监督训练策略增强了跨语言适应能力。

title: Deep LSTM Spoken Term Detection using Wav2Vec 2.0 Recognizer
title_zh: 使用 Wav2Vec 2.0 识别器进行深度 LSTM 口语检测
comment: ef:Švec, J., Lehečka, J., Šmídl, L. (2022) Deep LSTM Spoken Term Detection using Wav2Vec 2.0 Recognizer. Proc. Interspeech 2022, 1886-1890
comments: ef:Švec, J., Lehečka, J., Šmídl, L. (2022) Deep LSTM Spoken Term Detection using Wav2Vec 2.0 Recognizer. Proc. Interspeech 2022, 1886-1890
abstract: In recent years, the standard hybrid DNN-HMM speech recognizers are outperformed by the end-to-end speech recognition systems. One of the very promising approaches is the grapheme Wav2Vec 2.0 model, which uses the self-supervised pretraining approach combined with transfer learning of the fine-tuned speech recognizer. Since it lacks the pronunciation vocabulary and language model, the approach is suitable for tasks where obtaining such models is not easy or almost impossible. In this paper, we use the Wav2Vec speech recognizer in the task of spoken term detection over a large set of spoken documents. The method employs a deep LSTM network which maps the recognized hypothesis and the searched term into a shared pronunciation embedding space in which the term occurrences and the assigned scores are easily computed. The paper describes a bootstrapping approach that allows the transfer of the knowledge contained in traditional pronunciation vocabulary of DNN-HMM hybrid ASR into the context of grapheme-based Wav2Vec. The proposed method outperforms the previously published system based on the combination of the DNN-HMM hybrid ASR and phoneme recognizer by a large margin on the MALACH data in both English and Czech languages.
summary: In recent years, the standard hybrid DNN-HMM speech recognizers are outperformed by the end-to-end speech recognition systems. One of the very promising approaches is the grapheme Wav2Vec 2.0 model, which uses the self-supervised pretraining approach combined with transfer learning of the fine-tuned speech recognizer. Since it lacks the pronunciation vocabulary and language model, the approach is suitable for tasks where obtaining such models is not easy or almost impossible. In this paper, we use the Wav2Vec speech recognizer in the task of spoken term detection over a large set of spoken documents. The method employs a deep LSTM network which maps the recognized hypothesis and the searched term into a shared pronunciation embedding space in which the term occurrences and the assigned scores are easily computed. The paper describes a bootstrapping approach that allows the transfer of the knowledge contained in traditional pronunciation vocabulary of DNN-HMM hybrid ASR into the context of grapheme-based Wav2Vec. The proposed method outperforms the previously published system based on the combination of the DNN-HMM hybrid ASR and phoneme recognizer by a large margin on the MALACH data in both English and Czech languages.
abstract_zh: 近年来，标准混合 DNN-HMM 语音识别器的性能优于端到端语音识别系统。非常有前途的方法之一是 grapheme Wav2Vec 2.0 模型，它使用自监督预训练方法与微调语音识别器的迁移学习相结合。由于它缺乏发音词汇和语言模型，因此该方法适用于获得此类模型不容易或几乎不可能的任务。在本文中，我们使用 Wav2Vec 语音识别器来对大量语音文档进行口语术语检测。该方法采用深度 LSTM 网络，将识别的假设和搜索的术语映射到共享发音嵌入空间，在该空间中可以轻松计算术语出现次数和分配的分数。该论文描述了一种引导方法，该方法允许将 DNN-HMM 混合 ASR 的传统发音词汇中包含的知识转移到基于字素的 Wav2Vec 的上下文中。该方法在英语和捷克语的 MALACH 数据上大幅优于之前发布的基于 DNN-HMM 混合 ASR 和音素识别器组合的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Wav2Vec 2.0语音识别器和深度LSTM网络的语音术语检测方法，通过共享发音嵌入空间实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音识别系统（如Wav2Vec 2.0）在无需发音词典和语言模型的情况下表现优异，适合难以获取传统模型资源的场景。传统DNN-HMM混合系统在术语检测任务中存在局限性。
AI.method: 利用Wav2Vec 2.0识别假设与目标术语的发音嵌入映射，通过深度LSTM网络构建共享空间，并采用引导方法迁移DNN-HMM发音词典知识至图素级Wav2Vec模型。
AI.result: 在MALACH数据集的英捷双语实验中，该方法较传统DNN-HMM混合系统与音素识别器组合的基线系统性能提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过知识迁移有效解决了图素级模型的发音对齐问题，在无需传统语言模型的情况下实现了更优的语音术语检测效果。

One of the very promising approaches is the grapheme Wav2Vec 2.0 model, which uses the self-supervised pretraining approach combined with transfer learning of the fine-tuned speech recognizer. Since it lacks the pronunciation vocabulary and language model, the approach is suitable for tasks where obtaining such models is not easy or almost impossible. In this paper, we use the Wav2Vec speech recognizer in the task of spoken term detection over a large set of spoken documents. The method employs a deep LSTM network which maps the recognized hypothesis and the searched term into a shared pronunciation embedding space in which the term occurrences and the assigned scores are easily computed. The paper describes a bootstrapping approach that allows the transfer of the knowledge contained in traditional pronunciation vocabulary of DNN-HMM hybrid ASR into the context of grapheme-based Wav2Vec. The proposed method outperforms the previously published system based on the combination of the DNN-HMM hybrid ASR and phoneme recognizer by a large margin on the MALACH data in both English and Czech languages. 近年来，标准混合 DNN-HMM 语音识别器的性能优于端到端语音识别系统。非常有前途的方法之一是 grapheme Wav2Vec 2.0 模型，它使用自监督预训练方法与微调语音识别器的迁移学习相结合。由于它缺乏发音词汇和语言模型，因此该方法适用于获得此类模型不容易或几乎不可能的任务。在本文中，我们使用 Wav2Vec 语音识别器来对大量语音文档进行口语术语检测。该方法采用深度 LSTM 网络，将识别的假设和搜索的术语映射到共享发音嵌入空间，在该空间中可以轻松计算术语出现次数和分配的分数。该论文描述了一种引导方法，该方法允许将 DNN-HMM 混合 ASR 的传统发音词汇中包含的知识转移到基于字素的 Wav2Vec 的上下文中。该方法在英语和捷克语的 MALACH 数据上大幅优于之前发布的基于 DNN-HMM 混合 ASR 和音素识别器组合的系统。 本文提出了一种结合Wav2Vec 2.0语音识别器和深度LSTM网络的语音术语检测方法，通过共享发音嵌入空间实现高效检测。 Jan Švec,Jan Lehečka,Luboš Šmídl cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Solving the Probabilistic Profitable Tour Problem on a Tree
title_zh: 解决树上的概率盈利旅游问题
abstract: The profitable tour problem (PTP) is a well-known NP-hard routing problem searching for a tour visiting a subset of customers while maximizing profit as the difference between total revenue collected and traveling costs. PTP is known to be solvable in polynomial time when special structures of the underlying graph are considered. However, the computational complexity of the corresponding probabilistic generalizations is still an open issue in many cases. In this paper, we analyze the probabilistic PTP where customers are located on a tree and need, with a known probability, for a service provision at a predefined prize. The problem objective is to select a priori a subset of customers with whom to commit the service so to maximize the expected profit. We provide a polynomial time algorithm computing the optimal solution in $O(n^2)$, where $n$ is the number of nodes in the tree.
summary: The profitable tour problem (PTP) is a well-known NP-hard routing problem searching for a tour visiting a subset of customers while maximizing profit as the difference between total revenue collected and traveling costs. PTP is known to be solvable in polynomial time when special structures of the underlying graph are considered. However, the computational complexity of the corresponding probabilistic generalizations is still an open issue in many cases. In this paper, we analyze the probabilistic PTP where customers are located on a tree and need, with a known probability, for a service provision at a predefined prize. The problem objective is to select a priori a subset of customers with whom to commit the service so to maximize the expected profit. We provide a polynomial time algorithm computing the optimal solution in $O(n^2)$, where $n$ is the number of nodes in the tree.
abstract_zh: 盈利旅游问题 (PTP) 是一个著名的 NP 难路由问题，搜索访问一部分客户的旅游，同时将利润最大化，即总收入与旅行成本之间的差额。当考虑底层图的特殊结构时，已知 PTP 可在多项式时间内求解。然而，在许多情况下，相应的概率概括的计算复杂性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们分析了概率 PTP，其中客户位于树上，并且需要以已知的概率以预定义的奖励提供服务。问题的目标是先选择一部分客户来提供服务，以实现预期利润最大化。我们提供了一种多项式时间算法，以 $O(n^2)$ 计算最优解，其中 $n$ 是树中的节点数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在树结构上解决概率盈利巡回问题，旨在通过选择客户子集最大化预期利润。
AI.motivation: 传统PTP在特定图结构下可解，但概率版本的计算复杂性尚不明确，需探索有效算法。
AI.method: 提出一种多项式时间算法，利用树结构特性，以O(n²)时间计算最优解。
AI.result: 开发出O(n²)的算法，有效解决树结构下的概率PTP问题，实现预期利润最大化。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在树结构下高效解决概率PTP，为类似问题提供理论依据和实用方法。

authors_text: Wei Ju,Yiyang Gu,Binqi Chen,Gongbo Sun,Yifang Qin,Xingyuming Liu,Xiao Luo,Ming Zhang
title: GLCC: A General Framework for Graph-Level Clustering
title_zh: GLCC：图级聚类的通用框架
comment: Accepted by Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
comments: Accepted by Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
abstract: This paper studies the problem of graph-level clustering, which is a novel yet challenging task. This problem is critical in a variety of real-world applications such as protein clustering and genome analysis in bioinformatics. Recent years have witnessed the success of deep clustering coupled with graph neural networks (GNNs). However, existing methods focus on clustering among nodes given a single graph, while exploring clustering on multiple graphs is still under-explored. In this paper, we propose a general graph-level clustering framework named Graph-Level Contrastive Clustering (GLCC) given multiple graphs. Specifically, GLCC first constructs an adaptive affinity graph to explore instance- and cluster-level contrastive learning (CL). Instance-level CL leverages graph Laplacian based contrastive loss to learn clustering-friendly representations while cluster-level CL captures discriminative cluster representations incorporating neighbor information of each sample. Moreover, we utilize neighbor-aware pseudo-labels to reward the optimization of representation learning. The two steps can be alternatively trained to collaborate and benefit each other. Experiments on a range of well-known datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed GLCC over competitive baselines.
summary: This paper studies the problem of graph-level clustering, which is a novel yet challenging task. This problem is critical in a variety of real-world applications such as protein clustering and genome analysis in bioinformatics. Recent years have witnessed the success of deep clustering coupled with graph neural networks (GNNs). However, existing methods focus on clustering among nodes given a single graph, while exploring clustering on multiple graphs is still under-explored. In this paper, we propose a general graph-level clustering framework named Graph-Level Contrastive Clustering (GLCC) given multiple graphs. Specifically, GLCC first constructs an adaptive affinity graph to explore instance- and cluster-level contrastive learning (CL). Instance-level CL leverages graph Laplacian based contrastive loss to learn clustering-friendly representations while cluster-level CL captures discriminative cluster representations incorporating neighbor information of each sample. Moreover, we utilize neighbor-aware pseudo-labels to reward the optimization of representation learning. The two steps can be alternatively trained to collaborate and benefit each other. Experiments on a range of well-known datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed GLCC over competitive baselines.
abstract_zh: 本文研究图级聚类问题，这是一项新颖但具有挑战性的任务。这个问题在各种现实应用中至关重要，例如生物信息学中的蛋白质聚类和基因组分析。近年来，深度聚类与图神经网络（GNN）相结合取得了成功。然而，现有的方法侧重于给定单个图的节点之间的聚类，而探索多个图上的聚类仍有待探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的图级聚类框架，称为给定多个图的图级对比聚类（GLCC）。具体来说，GLCC 首先构建一个自适应亲和图来探索实例级和集群级对比学习（CL）。实例级 CL 利用基于图拉普拉斯算子的对比损失来学习聚类友好的表示，而集群级 CL 捕获包含每个样本的邻居信息的判别性集群表示。此外，我们利用邻居感知的伪标签来奖励表示学习的优化。这两个步骤可以交替训练，以相互协作、互惠互利。对一系列知名数据集的实验证明了我们提出的 GLCC 相对于竞争基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GLCC的通用图级聚类框架，用于处理多个图的聚类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要聚焦于单图节点聚类，而多图聚类研究不足，需开发适用于多图的通用框架以解决生物信息学等领域的实际需求。
AI.method: GLCC通过构建自适应亲和图，结合实例级和聚类级对比学习（CL），利用图拉普拉斯对比损失学习聚类友好表示，并通过邻域感知伪标签优化表示学习，交替训练两个步骤以协同提升效果。
AI.result: 在多个知名数据集上的实验表明，GLCC优于现有竞争性基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GLCC通过双级对比学习和伪标签机制有效解决了多图聚类问题，验证了其方法的有效性和优越性。

authors_text: Murilo Marques Marinho,Juan José Quiroz-Omaña,Kanako Harada
title: A Multi-Arm Robotic Platform for Scientific Exploration
title_zh: 用于科学探索的多臂机器人平台
abstract: There are a large number of robotic platforms with two or more arms targeting surgical applications. Despite that, very few groups have employed such platforms for scientific exploration. Possible applications of a multi-arm platform in scientific exploration involve the study of the mechanisms of intractable diseases by using organoids, i.e., miniature human organs) The study of organoids requires the preparation of a cranial window, which is done by carefully removing an 8 mm patch of the skull of a mouse. In this work, we present the first prototype of our AI-robot science platform for scientific experimentation, its digital twins, and perform validation experiments under teleoperation. The experiments showcase the dexterity of the platform by performing peg transfer, gauze cutting, mock experiments using eggs, and the world's first four-hand teleoperated drilling for a cranial window. The digital twins and related control software are freely available for noncommercial use at https://AISciencePlatform.github.io.
summary: There are a large number of robotic platforms with two or more arms targeting surgical applications. Despite that, very few groups have employed such platforms for scientific exploration. Possible applications of a multi-arm platform in scientific exploration involve the study of the mechanisms of intractable diseases by using organoids, i.e., miniature human organs) The study of organoids requires the preparation of a cranial window, which is done by carefully removing an 8 mm patch of the skull of a mouse. In this work, we present the first prototype of our AI-robot science platform for scientific experimentation, its digital twins, and perform validation experiments under teleoperation. The experiments showcase the dexterity of the platform by performing peg transfer, gauze cutting, mock experiments using eggs, and the world's first four-hand teleoperated drilling for a cranial window. The digital twins and related control software are freely available for noncommercial use at https://AISciencePlatform.github.io.
abstract_zh: 有大量具有两个或更多手臂的机器人平台针对外科手术应用。尽管如此，很少有团体利用这样的平台进行科学探索。多臂平台在科学探索中的可能应用包括使用类器官（即微型人体器官）研究疑难疾病的机制。类器官的研究需要制备颅窗，这是通过小心地去除小鼠头骨的 8 毫米斑块来完成的。在这项工作中，我们展示了用于科学实验的人工智能机器人科学平台的第一个原型及其数字双胞胎，并在远程操作下进行验证实验。这些实验通过执行钉子转移、纱布切割、使用鸡蛋的模拟实验以及世界上第一个四手遥控颅窗钻孔来展示该平台的灵巧性。数字孪生和相关控制软件可在 https://AISciencePlatform.github.io 免费用于非商业用途。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多臂机器人平台及其数字孪生系统，用于科学探索实验，包括颅骨窗口钻孔等精密操作。
AI.motivation: 现有手术用多臂机器人未被充分应用于科学探索，而类器官研究需精确操作（如颅骨窗口制备），亟需专用机器人平台。
AI.method: 开发AI驱动的多臂机器人平台，构建数字孪生模型，通过遥操作完成圆柱体转移、纱布切割、鸡蛋模拟实验及四手协同颅骨钻孔验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了平台灵巧性，成功实现颅骨钻孔等任务，数字孪生系统及控制软件已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为科学探索提供新工具，证明多臂机器人可胜任精密科研任务，开源促进后续研究。

search_text: A Multi-Arm Robotic Platform for Scientific Exploration 用于科学探索的多臂机器人平台 There are a large number of robotic platforms with two or more arms targeting surgical applications. Despite that, very few groups have employed such platforms for scientific exploration. Possible applications of a multi-arm platform in scientific exploration involve the study of the mechanisms of intractable diseases by using organoids, i.e., miniature human organs) The study of organoids requires the preparation of a cranial window, which is done by carefully removing an 8 mm patch of the skull of a mouse. In this work, we present the first prototype of our AI-robot science platform for scientific experimentation, its digital twins, and perform validation experiments under teleoperation. The experiments showcase the dexterity of the platform by performing peg transfer, gauze cutting, mock experiments using eggs, and the world's first four-hand teleoperated drilling for a cranial window. The digital twins and related control software are freely available for noncommercial use at https://AISciencePlatform.github.io. 有大量具有两个或更多手臂的机器人平台针对外科手术应用。尽管如此，很少有团体利用这样的平台进行科学探索。多臂平台在科学探索中的可能应用包括使用类器官（即微型人体器官）研究疑难疾病的机制。类器官的研究需要制备颅窗，这是通过小心地去除小鼠头骨的 8 毫米斑块来完成的。在这项工作中，我们展示了用于科学实验的人工智能机器人科学平台的第一个原型及其数字双胞胎，并在远程操作下进行验证实验。这些实验通过执行钉子转移、纱布切割、使用鸡蛋的模拟实验以及世界上第一个四手遥控颅窗钻孔来展示该平台的灵巧性。数字孪生和相关控制软件可在 https://AISciencePlatform.github.io 免费用于非商业用途。 本文提出一种多臂机器人平台及其数字孪生系统，用于科学探索实验，包括颅骨窗口钻孔等精密操作。 Murilo Marques Marinho,Juan José Quiroz-Omaña,Kanako Harada cs.RO

title: LittleBird: Efficient Faster & Longer Transformer for Question Answering
title_zh: LittleBird：高效、更快、更长的问答变压器
abstract: BERT has shown a lot of sucess in a wide variety of NLP tasks. But it has a limitation dealing with long inputs due to its attention mechanism. Longformer, ETC and BigBird addressed this issue and effectively solved the quadratic dependency problem. However we find that these models are not sufficient, and propose LittleBird, a novel model based on BigBird with improved speed and memory footprint while maintaining accuracy. In particular, we devise a more flexible and efficient position representation method based on Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi). We also show that replacing the method of global information represented in the BigBird with pack and unpack attention is more effective. The proposed model can work on long inputs even after being pre-trained on short inputs, and can be trained efficiently reusing existing pre-trained language model for short inputs. This is a significant benefit for low-resource languages where large amounts of long text data are difficult to obtain. As a result, our experiments show that LittleBird works very well in a variety of languages, achieving high performance in question answering tasks, particularly in KorQuAD2.0, Korean Question Answering Dataset for long paragraphs.
summary: BERT has shown a lot of sucess in a wide variety of NLP tasks. But it has a limitation dealing with long inputs due to its attention mechanism. Longformer, ETC and BigBird addressed this issue and effectively solved the quadratic dependency problem. However we find that these models are not sufficient, and propose LittleBird, a novel model based on BigBird with improved speed and memory footprint while maintaining accuracy. In particular, we devise a more flexible and efficient position representation method based on Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi). We also show that replacing the method of global information represented in the BigBird with pack and unpack attention is more effective. The proposed model can work on long inputs even after being pre-trained on short inputs, and can be trained efficiently reusing existing pre-trained language model for short inputs. This is a significant benefit for low-resource languages where large amounts of long text data are difficult to obtain. As a result, our experiments show that LittleBird works very well in a variety of languages, achieving high performance in question answering tasks, particularly in KorQuAD2.0, Korean Question Answering Dataset for long paragraphs.
abstract_zh: BERT 在各种 NLP 任务中都取得了巨大的成功。但由于其注意力机制，它在处理长输入时存在局限性。 Longformer、ETC 和 BigBird 针对这个问题，有效解决了二次依赖问题。然而，我们发现这些模型还不够，因此提出了 LittleBird，这是一种基于 BigBird 的新颖模型，在保持准确性的同时提高了速度和内存占用。特别是，我们设计了一种基于线性偏差注意力机制（ALiBi）的更灵活、更高效的位置表示方法。我们还表明，用打包和解包注意力替换 BigBird 中表示的全局信息的方法更有效。即使在短输入上进行预训练后，所提出的模型也可以在长输入上工作，并且可以重新使用现有的针对短输入的预训练语言模型进行有效训练。这对于难以获取大量长文本数据的资源匮乏的语言来说是一个显着的好处。结果，我们的实验表明，LittleBird 在多种语言中都表现良好，在问答任务中取得了高性能，特别是在 KorQuAD2.0（韩语长段落问答数据集）中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LittleBird模型，通过改进BigBird的注意力机制和位置表示方法，实现更高效、更长文本处理的问答任务Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型如BERT、Longformer和BigBird在处理长文本时存在效率或内存限制，且难以在低资源语言中有效应用，需开发兼顾速度、内存和准确率的新型模型。
AI.method: 基于BigBird改进，采用ALiBi线性偏差注意力机制优化位置表示，并用打包解包注意力替代全局注意力，支持在短文本预训练后处理长文本，降低资源需求。
AI.result: LittleBird在多语言问答任务中表现优异，尤其在KorQuAD2.0数据集上取得高准确率，验证了其对长段落处理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LittleBird通过创新注意力机制和训练策略，有效解决了长文本处理难题，在保持精度的同时提升效率，为低资源语言的问答任务提供了可行方案。

title: Redefining Counterfactual Explanations for Reinforcement Learning: Overview, Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: 重新定义强化学习的反事实解释：概述、挑战和机遇
abstract: While AI algorithms have shown remarkable success in various fields, their lack of transparency hinders their application to real-life tasks. Although explanations targeted at non-experts are necessary for user trust and human-AI collaboration, the majority of explanation methods for AI are focused on developers and expert users. Counterfactual explanations are local explanations that offer users advice on what can be changed in the input for the output of the black-box model to change. Counterfactuals are user-friendly and provide actionable advice for achieving the desired output from the AI system. While extensively researched in supervised learning, there are few methods applying them to reinforcement learning (RL). In this work, we explore the reasons for the underrepresentation of a powerful explanation method in RL. We start by reviewing the current work in counterfactual explanations in supervised learning. Additionally, we explore the differences between counterfactual explanations in supervised learning and RL and identify the main challenges that prevent the adoption of methods from supervised in reinforcement learning. Finally, we redefine counterfactuals for RL and propose research directions for implementing counterfactuals in RL.
summary: While AI algorithms have shown remarkable success in various fields, their lack of transparency hinders their application to real-life tasks. Although explanations targeted at non-experts are necessary for user trust and human-AI collaboration, the majority of explanation methods for AI are focused on developers and expert users. Counterfactual explanations are local explanations that offer users advice on what can be changed in the input for the output of the black-box model to change. Counterfactuals are user-friendly and provide actionable advice for achieving the desired output from the AI system. While extensively researched in supervised learning, there are few methods applying them to reinforcement learning (RL). In this work, we explore the reasons for the underrepresentation of a powerful explanation method in RL. We start by reviewing the current work in counterfactual explanations in supervised learning. Additionally, we explore the differences between counterfactual explanations in supervised learning and RL and identify the main challenges that prevent the adoption of methods from supervised in reinforcement learning. Finally, we redefine counterfactuals for RL and propose research directions for implementing counterfactuals in RL.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能算法在各个领域都取得了显着的成功，但其缺乏透明度阻碍了其在现实生活中的应用。尽管针对非专家的解释对于用户信任和人类与人工智能的协作是必要的，但大多数人工智能的解释方法都集中在开发人员和专家用户身上。反事实解释是局部解释，为用户提供有关可以更改输入中的内容以更改黑盒模型输出的建议。反事实是用户友好的，并为实现人工智能系统所需的输出提供可行的建议。尽管对监督学习进行了广泛的研究，但将其应用于强化学习（RL）的方法却很少。在这项工作中，我们探讨了强化学习中强大的解释方法代表性不足的原因。我们首先回顾监督学习中反事实解释的当前工作。此外，我们还探讨了监督学习和强化学习中反事实解释之间的差异，并确定了阻碍在强化学习中采用监督方法的主要挑战。最后，我们重新定义了强化学习的反事实，并提出了在强化学习中实施反事实的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将反事实解释方法从监督学习扩展到强化学习（RL）的挑战与机遇，重新定义了适用于RL的反事实解释框架。
AI.motivation: AI算法的透明性不足限制了其在现实任务中的应用，而现有解释方法多面向开发者而非普通用户。反事实解释能提供用户友好的操作建议，但在RL领域研究不足。
AI.method: 通过回顾监督学习中的反事实解释方法，分析其与RL的差异，识别迁移至RL的主要挑战，并提出针对RL的反事实解释重新定义及研究方向。
AI.result: 明确了监督学习反事实方法在RL中的适用障碍，提出了适应RL特性的反事实解释框架，并指出了未来研究的关键方向。
AI.conclusion: 反事实解释对提升RL系统的透明性和用户信任至关重要，需结合RL动态决策特性进行方法创新，未来研究应聚焦于可解释性与算法性能的平衡。

conclusion: 反事实解释对提升RL系统的透明性和用户信任至关重要，需结合RL动态决策特性进行方法创新，未来研究应聚焦于可解释性与算法性能的平衡。
search_text: Redefining Counterfactual Explanations for Reinforcement Learning: Overview, Challenges and Opportunities 重新定义强化学习的反事实解释：概述、挑战和机遇 While AI algorithms have shown remarkable success in various fields, their lack of transparency hinders their application to real-life tasks. Although explanations targeted at non-experts are necessary for user trust and human-AI collaboration, the majority of explanation methods for AI are focused on developers and expert users. Counterfactual explanations are local explanations that offer users advice on what can be changed in the input for the output of the black-box model to change. Counterfactuals are user-friendly and provide actionable advice for achieving the desired output from the AI system. While extensively researched in supervised learning, there are few methods applying them to reinforcement learning (RL). In this work, we explore the reasons for the underrepresentation of a powerful explanation method in RL. We start by reviewing the current work in counterfactual explanations in supervised learning. Additionally, we explore the differences between counterfactual explanations in supervised learning and RL and identify the main challenges that prevent the adoption of methods from supervised in reinforcement learning. Finally, we redefine counterfactuals for RL and propose research directions for implementing counterfactuals in RL. 尽管人工智能算法在各个领域都取得了显着的成功，但其缺乏透明度阻碍了其在现实生活中的应用。尽管针对非专家的解释对于用户信任和人类与人工智能的协作是必要的，但大多数人工智能的解释方法都集中在开发人员和专家用户身上。反事实解释是局部解释，为用户提供有关可以更改输入中的内容以更改黑盒模型输出的建议。反事实是用户友好的，并为实现人工智能系统所需的输出提供可行的建议。尽管对监督学习进行了广泛的研究，但将其应用于强化学习（RL）的方法却很少。在这项工作中，我们探讨了强化学习中强大的解释方法代表性不足的原因。我们首先回顾监督学习中反事实解释的当前工作。此外，我们还探讨了监督学习和强化学习中反事实解释之间的差异，并确定了阻碍在强化学习中采用监督方法的主要挑战。最后，我们重新定义了强化学习的反事实，并提出了在强化学习中实施反事实的研究方向。 本文探讨了将反事实解释方法从监督学习扩展到强化学习（RL）的挑战与机遇，重新定义了适用于RL的反事实解释框架。 Jasmina Gajcin,Ivana Dusparic cs.AI

title: Diffusion Visual Counterfactual Explanations
title_zh: 扩散视觉反事实解释
abstract: Visual Counterfactual Explanations (VCEs) are an important tool to understand the decisions of an image classifier. They are 'small' but 'realistic' semantic changes of the image changing the classifier decision. Current approaches for the generation of VCEs are restricted to adversarially robust models and often contain non-realistic artefacts, or are limited to image classification problems with few classes. In this paper, we overcome this by generating Diffusion Visual Counterfactual Explanations (DVCEs) for arbitrary ImageNet classifiers via a diffusion process. Two modifications to the diffusion process are key for our DVCEs: first, an adaptive parameterization, whose hyperparameters generalize across images and models, together with distance regularization and late start of the diffusion process, allow us to generate images with minimal semantic changes to the original ones but different classification. Second, our cone regularization via an adversarially robust model ensures that the diffusion process does not converge to trivial non-semantic changes, but instead produces realistic images of the target class which achieve high confidence by the classifier.
summary: Visual Counterfactual Explanations (VCEs) are an important tool to understand the decisions of an image classifier. They are 'small' but 'realistic' semantic changes of the image changing the classifier decision. Current approaches for the generation of VCEs are restricted to adversarially robust models and often contain non-realistic artefacts, or are limited to image classification problems with few classes. In this paper, we overcome this by generating Diffusion Visual Counterfactual Explanations (DVCEs) for arbitrary ImageNet classifiers via a diffusion process. Two modifications to the diffusion process are key for our DVCEs: first, an adaptive parameterization, whose hyperparameters generalize across images and models, together with distance regularization and late start of the diffusion process, allow us to generate images with minimal semantic changes to the original ones but different classification. Second, our cone regularization via an adversarially robust model ensures that the diffusion process does not converge to trivial non-semantic changes, but instead produces realistic images of the target class which achieve high confidence by the classifier.
abstract_zh: 视觉反事实解释（VCE）是理解图像分类器决策的重要工具。它们是图像的“小”但“现实”的语义变化，改变了分类器的决策。当前生成 VCE 的方法仅限于对抗性鲁棒模型，并且通常包含不真实的伪影，或者仅限于类别很少的图像分类问题。在本文中，我们通过扩散过程为任意 ImageNet 分类器生成扩散视觉反事实解释（DVCE）来克服这个问题。对扩散过程的两项修改是我们的 DVCE 的关键：首先，自适应参数化，其超参数可泛化到图像和模型上，再加上距离正则化和扩散过程的延迟启动，使我们能够生成对原始图像语义变化最小但分类不同的图像。其次，我们通过对抗性鲁棒模型进行锥体正则化，确保扩散过程不会收敛到微不足道的非语义变化，而是生成目标类的真实图像，从而使分类器实现高置信度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过扩散过程生成适用于任意ImageNet分类器的扩散视觉反事实解释（DVCEs），解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有VCE生成方法受限于对抗鲁棒模型，常产生非现实伪影或仅适用于少类别分类问题，缺乏通用性与真实性。
AI.method: 提出两种关键扩散过程修改：1）自适应参数化结合距离正则化和延迟扩散，生成语义变化最小的图像；2）通过对抗鲁棒模型的锥形正则化确保生成目标类别的高置信度图像。
AI.result: 生成的DVCEs能有效改变分类结果，具有最小语义变化和高置信度，适用于各种ImageNet分类器，避免非现实伪影。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了现有VCE生成的局限性，为图像分类器提供了更真实、通用的反事实解释新途径。

title: Structural Kernel Search via Bayesian Optimization and Symbolical Optimal Transport
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯优化和符号最优传输进行结构核搜索
abstract: Despite recent advances in automated machine learning, model selection is still a complex and computationally intensive process. For Gaussian processes (GPs), selecting the kernel is a crucial task, often done manually by the expert. Additionally, evaluating the model selection criteria for Gaussian processes typically scales cubically in the sample size, rendering kernel search particularly computationally expensive. We propose a novel, efficient search method through a general, structured kernel space. Previous methods solved this task via Bayesian optimization and relied on measuring the distance between GP's directly in function space to construct a kernel-kernel. We present an alternative approach by defining a kernel-kernel over the symbolic representation of the statistical hypothesis that is associated with a kernel. We empirically show that this leads to a computationally more efficient way of searching through a discrete kernel space.
summary: Despite recent advances in automated machine learning, model selection is still a complex and computationally intensive process. For Gaussian processes (GPs), selecting the kernel is a crucial task, often done manually by the expert. Additionally, evaluating the model selection criteria for Gaussian processes typically scales cubically in the sample size, rendering kernel search particularly computationally expensive. We propose a novel, efficient search method through a general, structured kernel space. Previous methods solved this task via Bayesian optimization and relied on measuring the distance between GP's directly in function space to construct a kernel-kernel. We present an alternative approach by defining a kernel-kernel over the symbolic representation of the statistical hypothesis that is associated with a kernel. We empirically show that this leads to a computationally more efficient way of searching through a discrete kernel space.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动化机器学习最近取得了进展，但模型选择仍然是一个复杂且计算密集的过程。对于高斯过程 (GP)，选择内核是一项至关重要的任务，通常由专家手动完成。此外，评估高斯过程的模型选择标准通常会按样本大小进行三次缩放，从而导致核搜索的计算成本特别高。我们通过通用的结构化内核空间提出了一种新颖、高效的搜索方法。以前的方法通过贝叶斯优化来解决此任务，并依赖于直接在函数空间中测量 GP 之间的距离来构建内核。我们提出了一种替代方法，通过在与内核相关的统计假设的符号表示上定义内核-内核。我们凭经验表明，这导致了一种在计算上更有效的离散内核空间搜索方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过贝叶斯优化和符号最优运输的结构核搜索方法，用于高效地选择高斯过程的核。
AI.motivation: 尽管自动机器学习取得了进展，但模型选择仍然复杂且计算成本高。对于高斯过程（GPs）而言，手动选择核是常见做法，但计算模型选择标准通常需要立方时间复杂度，因此需要更高效的搜索方法。
AI.method: 本文通过定义一个基于统计假设符号表示的核-核，提出了一种新的结构化核搜索方法，替代了传统在函数空间中直接测量GP之间距离的方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在离散核空间搜索中计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种更高效的高斯过程核选择方法，通过符号表示和最优运输技术降低了计算复杂度。
