title: A Textless Metric for Speech-to-Speech Comparison
title_zh: 用于语音到语音比较的无文本指标
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new and simple method for comparing speech utterances without relying on text transcripts. Our speech-to-speech comparison metric utilizes state-of-the-art speech2unit encoders like HuBERT to convert speech utterances into discrete acoustic units. We then propose a simple and easily replicable neural architecture that learns a speech-based metric that closely corresponds to its text-based counterpart. This textless metric has numerous potential applications, including evaluating speech-to-speech translation for oral languages, languages without dependable ASR systems, or to avoid the need for ASR transcription altogether. This paper also shows that for speech-to-speech translation evaluation, ASR-BLEU (which consists in automatically transcribing both speech hypothesis and reference and compute sentence-level BLEU between transcripts) is a poor proxy to real text-BLEU even when ASR system is strong.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new and simple method for comparing speech utterances without relying on text transcripts. Our speech-to-speech comparison metric utilizes state-of-the-art speech2unit encoders like HuBERT to convert speech utterances into discrete acoustic units. We then propose a simple and easily replicable neural architecture that learns a speech-based metric that closely corresponds to its text-based counterpart. This textless metric has numerous potential applications, including evaluating speech-to-speech translation for oral languages, languages without dependable ASR systems, or to avoid the need for ASR transcription altogether. This paper also shows that for speech-to-speech translation evaluation, ASR-BLEU (which consists in automatically transcribing both speech hypothesis and reference and compute sentence-level BLEU between transcripts) is a poor proxy to real text-BLEU even when ASR system is strong.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种无需依赖文本记录即可比较语音话语的新且简单的方法。我们的语音到语音比较指标利用 HuBERT 等最先进的语音单元编码器将语音转换为离散的声学单元。然后，我们提出了一种简单且易于复制的神经架构，该架构可以学习与基于文本的对应项密切对应的基于语音的度量。这种无文本指标具有许多潜在的应用，包括评估口头语言、没有可靠 ASR 系统的语言的语音到语音翻译，或者完全避免 ASR 转录的需要。本文还表明，对于语音到语音翻译评估，即使 ASR 系统很强大，ASR-BLEU（包括自动转录语音假设以及参考和计算转录本之间的句子级 BLEU）也不能很好地替代真实文本 BLEU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需文本的语音到语音比较度量方法，用于评估语音翻译质量。
AI.motivation: 传统语音翻译评估依赖ASR转录生成文本再计算BLEU，但某些语言缺乏可靠ASR系统或需避免转录步骤。
AI.method: 利用HuBERT等语音编码器将语音转换为离散声学单元，构建简单神经网络学习与文本度量对应的语音相似度模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该文本无关度量在语音翻译评估中优于ASR-BLEU，即使强ASR系统下ASR-BLEU仍无法反映真实文本BLEU表现。
AI.conclusion: 文本无关语音度量可有效评估无ASR支持语言的语音翻译，且ASR-BLEU并非可靠替代方案。

search_text: A Textless Metric for Speech-to-Speech Comparison 用于语音到语音比较的无文本指标 In this paper, we introduce a new and simple method for comparing speech utterances without relying on text transcripts. Our speech-to-speech comparison metric utilizes state-of-the-art speech2unit encoders like HuBERT to convert speech utterances into discrete acoustic units. We then propose a simple and easily replicable neural architecture that learns a speech-based metric that closely corresponds to its text-based counterpart. This textless metric has numerous potential applications, including evaluating speech-to-speech translation for oral languages, languages without dependable ASR systems, or to avoid the need for ASR transcription altogether. This paper also shows that for speech-to-speech translation evaluation, ASR-BLEU (which consists in automatically transcribing both speech hypothesis and reference and compute sentence-level BLEU between transcripts) is a poor proxy to real text-BLEU even when ASR system is strong. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种无需依赖文本记录即可比较语音话语的新且简单的方法。我们的语音到语音比较指标利用 HuBERT 等最先进的语音单元编码器将语音转换为离散的声学单元。然后，我们提出了一种简单且易于复制的神经架构，该架构可以学习与基于文本的对应项密切对应的基于语音的度量。这种无文本指标具有许多潜在的应用，包括评估口头语言、没有可靠 ASR 系统的语言的语音到语音翻译，或者完全避免 ASR 转录的需要。本文还表明，对于语音到语音翻译评估，即使 ASR 系统很强大，ASR-BLEU（包括自动转录语音假设以及参考和计算转录本之间的句子级 BLEU）也不能很好地替代真实文本 BLEU。 本文提出一种无需文本的语音到语音比较度量方法，用于评估语音翻译质量。 Laurent Besacier,Swen Ribeiro,Olivier Galibert,Ioan Calapodescu cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xiren Zhou,Shikang Liu,Ao Chen,Yizhan Fan,Huanhuan Chen
title: Improving the Anomaly Detection in GPR Images by Fine-Tuning CNNs with Synthetic Data
title_zh: 通过使用合成数据微调 CNN 来改进探地雷达图像中的异常检测
abstract: Ground Penetrating Radar (GPR) has been widely used to estimate the healthy operation of some urban roads and underground facilities. When identifying subsurface anomalies by GPR in an area, the obtained data could be unbalanced, and the numbers and types of possible underground anomalies could not be acknowledged in advance. In this paper, a novel method is proposed to improve the subsurface anomaly detection from GPR B-scan images. A normal (i.e. without subsurface objects) GPR image section is firstly collected in the detected area. Concerning that the GPR image is essentially the representation of electromagnetic (EM) wave and propagation time, and to preserve both the subsurface background and objects' details, the normal GPR image is segmented and then fused with simulated GPR images that contain different kinds of objects to generate the synthetic data for the detection area based on the wavelet decompositions. Pre-trained CNNs could then be fine-tuned with the synthetic data, and utilized to extract features of segmented GPR images subsequently obtained in the detection area. The extracted features could be classified by the one-class learning algorithm in the feature space without pre-set anomaly types or numbers. The conducted experiments demonstrate that fine-tuning the pre-trained CNN with the proposed synthetic data could effectively improve the feature extraction of the network for the objects in the detection area. Besides, the proposed method requires only a section of normal data that could be easily obtained in the detection area, and could also meet the timeliness requirements in practical applications.
summary: Ground Penetrating Radar (GPR) has been widely used to estimate the healthy operation of some urban roads and underground facilities. When identifying subsurface anomalies by GPR in an area, the obtained data could be unbalanced, and the numbers and types of possible underground anomalies could not be acknowledged in advance. In this paper, a novel method is proposed to improve the subsurface anomaly detection from GPR B-scan images. A normal (i.e. without subsurface objects) GPR image section is firstly collected in the detected area. Concerning that the GPR image is essentially the representation of electromagnetic (EM) wave and propagation time, and to preserve both the subsurface background and objects' details, the normal GPR image is segmented and then fused with simulated GPR images that contain different kinds of objects to generate the synthetic data for the detection area based on the wavelet decompositions. Pre-trained CNNs could then be fine-tuned with the synthetic data, and utilized to extract features of segmented GPR images subsequently obtained in the detection area. The extracted features could be classified by the one-class learning algorithm in the feature space without pre-set anomaly types or numbers. The conducted experiments demonstrate that fine-tuning the pre-trained CNN with the proposed synthetic data could effectively improve the feature extraction of the network for the objects in the detection area. Besides, the proposed method requires only a section of normal data that could be easily obtained in the detection area, and could also meet the timeliness requirements in practical applications.
abstract_zh: 探地雷达（GPR）已被广泛用于评估一些城市道路和地下设施的健康运行。当利用探地雷达识别某个地区的地下异常时，所获得的数据可能会不平衡，并且无法提前得知可能存在的地下异常的数量和类型。本文提出了一种改进探地雷达 B 扫描图像地下异常检测的新方法。首先在检测到的区域中收集正常（即没有地下物体）GPR 图像部分。考虑到探地雷达图像本质上是电磁波和传播时间的表示，为了保留地下背景和物体细节，对正常探地雷达图像进行分割，然后与包含不同种类物体的模拟探地雷达图像融合，基于小波分解生成探测区域的合成数据。然后，可以使用合成数据对预训练的 CNN 进行微调，并用于提取随后在检测区域中获得的分段探地雷达图像的特征。提取的特征可以在特征空间中通过一类学习算法进行分类，无需预先设定异常类型或数量。进行的实验表明，使用所提出的合成数据对预训练的 CNN 进行微调可以有效地提高网络对检测区域中对象的特征提取。此外，该方法只需要检测区域内易于获取的一段正常数据，也能满足实际应用中的时效性要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用合成数据微调卷积神经网络（CNN）以提高地面穿透雷达（GPR）图像中地下异常检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: GPR图像数据可能存在类别不平衡且地下异常类型和数量未知，传统方法难以有效检测未知异常，需依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 采集正常GPR图像后，通过小波分解分割图像并融合模拟含不同物体的GPR图像生成合成数据，微调预训练CNN提取特征，利用一类学习算法在特征空间进行分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用合成数据微调CNN可有效提升网络对检测区域目标的特征提取能力，且仅需少量正常数据即可满足实际应用的时效性要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成数据增强CNN特征提取能力，在无需预设异常类型和数量的情况下实现了对地下异常的有效检测。

title: AI-HRI Brings New Dimensions to Human-Aware Design for Human-Aware AI
title_zh: AI-HRI 为人类感知 AI 的人类感知设计带来新维度
comment: Accepted for presentation at the AAAI 2022 Fall Symposium Series, in the symposium for Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction
comments: Accepted for presentation at the AAAI 2022 Fall Symposium Series, in the symposium for Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: Since the first AI-HRI held at the 2014 AAAI Fall Symposium Series, a lot of the presented research and discussions have emphasized how artificial intelligence (AI) developments can benefit human-robot interaction (HRI). This portrays HRI as an application, a source of domain-specific problems to solve, to the AI community. Likewise, this portrays AI as a tool, a source of solutions available for relevant problems, to the HRI community. However, members of the AI-HRI research community will point out that the relationship has a deeper synergy than matchmaking problems and solutions -- there are insights from each field that impact how the other one thinks about the world and performs scientific research. There is no greater opportunity for sharing perspectives at the moment than human-aware AI, which studies how to account for the fact that people are more than a source of data or part of an algorithm. We will explore how AI-HRI can change the way researchers think about human-aware AI, from observation through validation, to make even the algorithmic design process human-aware.
summary: Since the first AI-HRI held at the 2014 AAAI Fall Symposium Series, a lot of the presented research and discussions have emphasized how artificial intelligence (AI) developments can benefit human-robot interaction (HRI). This portrays HRI as an application, a source of domain-specific problems to solve, to the AI community. Likewise, this portrays AI as a tool, a source of solutions available for relevant problems, to the HRI community. However, members of the AI-HRI research community will point out that the relationship has a deeper synergy than matchmaking problems and solutions -- there are insights from each field that impact how the other one thinks about the world and performs scientific research. There is no greater opportunity for sharing perspectives at the moment than human-aware AI, which studies how to account for the fact that people are more than a source of data or part of an algorithm. We will explore how AI-HRI can change the way researchers think about human-aware AI, from observation through validation, to make even the algorithmic design process human-aware.
abstract_zh: 自 2014 年 AAAI 秋季研讨会系列举办首届 AI-HRI 以来，许多已发表的研究和讨论都强调人工智能 (AI) 的发展如何有利于人机交互 (HRI)。这将 HRI 描述为人工智能社区的一个应用程序，一个需要解决的特定领域问题的来源。同样，这将人工智能描述为 HRI 社区的一种工具，是解决相关问题的解决方案的来源。然而，AI-HRI 研究社区的成员会指出，这种关系比牵线搭桥问题和解决方案具有更深层次的协同作用——每个领域的见解都会影响另一个领域如何思考世界和进行科学研究。目前，没有比人类感知人工智能更好的分享观点的机会了，它研究如何解释人不仅仅是数据来源或算法的一部分这一事实。我们将探索 AI-HRI 如何改变研究人员对人类感知人工智能的思考方式，从观察到验证，甚至使算法设计过程具有人类感知。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨AI-HRI（人工智能与人机交互）如何通过跨领域协同，推动更人性化的人工智能设计，超越传统问题与解决方案的匹配模式。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将AI视为HRI的工具，HRI视为AI的应用场景，但实际两者的协同关系更深，需从人类意识角度重构AI设计方法。
AI.method: 通过分析AI-HRI社区在2014年至今的研讨成果，梳理AI与HRI在人类意识层面的相互影响，并提出算法设计过程的人本化改进框架。
AI.result: 揭示了AI-HRI如何从观察到验证的全流程，将人类因素嵌入算法设计，形成更具适应性的智能系统开发范式。
AI.conclusion: AI-HRI为跨学科协作提供了独特契机，通过融合两领域视角，可推动人工智能设计从工具理性向价值理性转变。

tldr: 本文探讨AI-HRI（人工智能与人机交互）如何通过跨领域协同，推动更人性化的人工智能设计，超越传统问题与解决方案的匹配模式。
motivation: 现有研究将AI视为HRI的工具，HRI视为AI的应用场景，但实际两者的协同关系更深，需从人类意识角度重构AI设计方法。
method: 通过分析AI-HRI社区在2014年至今的研讨成果，梳理AI与HRI在人类意识层面的相互影响，并提出算法设计过程的人本化改进框架。
result: 揭示了AI-HRI如何从观察到验证的全流程，将人类因素嵌入算法设计，形成更具适应性的智能系统开发范式。
conclusion: AI-HRI为跨学科协作提供了独特契机，通过融合两领域视角，可推动人工智能设计从工具理性向价值理性转变。
search_text: AI-HRI Brings New Dimensions to Human-Aware Design for Human-Aware AI AI-HRI 为人类感知 AI 的人类感知设计带来新维度 Since the first AI-HRI held at the 2014 AAAI Fall Symposium Series, a lot of the presented research and discussions have emphasized how artificial intelligence (AI) developments can benefit human-robot interaction (HRI). This portrays HRI as an application, a source of domain-specific problems to solve, to the AI community. Likewise, this portrays AI as a tool, a source of solutions available for relevant problems, to the HRI community. However, members of the AI-HRI research community will point out that the relationship has a deeper synergy than matchmaking problems and solutions -- there are insights from each field that impact how the other one thinks about the world and performs scientific research. There is no greater opportunity for sharing perspectives at the moment than human-aware AI, which studies how to account for the fact that people are more than a source of data or part of an algorithm. We will explore how AI-HRI can change the way researchers think about human-aware AI, from observation through validation, to make even the algorithmic design process human-aware. 自 2014 年 AAAI 秋季研讨会系列举办首届 AI-HRI 以来，许多已发表的研究和讨论都强调人工智能 (AI) 的发展如何有利于人机交互 (HRI)。这将 HRI 描述为人工智能社区的一个应用程序，一个需要解决的特定领域问题的来源。同样，这将人工智能描述为 HRI 社区的一种工具，是解决相关问题的解决方案的来源。然而，AI-HRI 研究社区的成员会指出，这种关系比牵线搭桥问题和解决方案具有更深层次的协同作用——每个领域的见解都会影响另一个领域如何思考世界和进行科学研究。目前，没有比人类感知人工智能更好的分享观点的机会了，它研究如何解释人不仅仅是数据来源或算法的一部分这一事实。我们将探索 AI-HRI 如何改变研究人员对人类感知人工智能的思考方式，从观察到验证，甚至使算法设计过程具有人类感知。 本文探讨AI-HRI（人工智能与人机交互）如何通过跨领域协同，推动更人性化的人工智能设计，超越传统问题与解决方案的匹配模式。 Richard G. Freedman cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Beerend G. A. Gerats,Jelmer M. Wolterink,Ivo A. M. J. Broeders
title: 3D Human Pose Estimation in Multi-View Operating Room Videos Using Differentiable Camera Projections
title_zh: 使用可微相机投影进行多视图手术室视频中的 3D 人体姿势估计
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, submitted to the 2022 AE-CAI Special Issue of Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering: Imaging & Visualization
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, submitted to the 2022 AE-CAI Special Issue of Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering: Imaging & Visualization
abstract: 3D human pose estimation in multi-view operating room (OR) videos is a relevant asset for person tracking and action recognition. However, the surgical environment makes it challenging to find poses due to sterile clothing, frequent occlusions, and limited public data. Methods specifically designed for the OR are generally based on the fusion of detected poses in multiple camera views. Typically, a 2D pose estimator such as a convolutional neural network (CNN) detects joint locations. Then, the detected joint locations are projected to 3D and fused over all camera views. However, accurate detection in 2D does not guarantee accurate localisation in 3D space. In this work, we propose to directly optimise for localisation in 3D by training 2D CNNs end-to-end based on a 3D loss that is backpropagated through each camera's projection parameters. Using videos from the MVOR dataset, we show that this end-to-end approach outperforms optimisation in 2D space.
summary: 3D human pose estimation in multi-view operating room (OR) videos is a relevant asset for person tracking and action recognition. However, the surgical environment makes it challenging to find poses due to sterile clothing, frequent occlusions, and limited public data. Methods specifically designed for the OR are generally based on the fusion of detected poses in multiple camera views. Typically, a 2D pose estimator such as a convolutional neural network (CNN) detects joint locations. Then, the detected joint locations are projected to 3D and fused over all camera views. However, accurate detection in 2D does not guarantee accurate localisation in 3D space. In this work, we propose to directly optimise for localisation in 3D by training 2D CNNs end-to-end based on a 3D loss that is backpropagated through each camera's projection parameters. Using videos from the MVOR dataset, we show that this end-to-end approach outperforms optimisation in 2D space.
abstract_zh: 多视图手术室 (OR) 视频中的 3D 人体姿势估计是人员跟踪和动作识别的相关资产。然而，由于无菌服装、频繁的遮挡和有限的公共数据，手术环境使得寻找姿势变得困难。专门为手术室设计的方法通常基于多个摄像机视图中检测到的姿势的融合。通常，诸如卷积神经网络 (CNN) 之类的 2D 姿态估计器会检测关节位置。然后，检测到的关节位置被投影为 3D 并融合在所有摄像机视图上。然而，2D 中的准确检测并不能保证 3D 空间中的准确定位。在这项工作中，我们建议通过基于通过每个相机的投影参数反向传播的 3D 损失来端到端训练 2D CNN，从而直接优化 3D 定位。使用 MVOR 数据集中的视频，我们表明这种端到端方法优于 2D 空间中的优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的3D人体姿态估计方法，通过可微分相机投影参数优化多视角手术室视频中的3D定位。
AI.motivation: 手术室环境存在无菌服装遮挡、数据有限等问题，传统2D姿态检测后投影至3D的方法难以保证定位准确性。
AI.method: 基于3D损失函数反向传播各相机投影参数，训练2D CNN直接优化3D空间定位，实现端到端学习。
AI.result: 在MVOR数据集上，该方法较传统2D优化方法在3D姿态估计精度上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过端到端可微分投影优化，有效提升了手术室多视角视频中3D人体姿态估计的准确性。

title: Integrating Policy Summaries with Reward Decomposition for Explaining Reinforcement Learning Agents
title_zh: 将策略摘要与奖励分解相结合来解释强化学习代理
abstract: Explaining the behavior of reinforcement learning agents operating in sequential decision-making settings is challenging, as their behavior is affected by a dynamic environment and delayed rewards. Methods that help users understand the behavior of such agents can roughly be divided into local explanations that analyze specific decisions of the agents and global explanations that convey the general strategy of the agents. In this work, we study a novel combination of local and global explanations for reinforcement learning agents. Specifically, we combine reward decomposition, a local explanation method that exposes which components of the reward function influenced a specific decision, and HIGHLIGHTS, a global explanation method that shows a summary of the agent's behavior in decisive states. We conducted two user studies to evaluate the integration of these explanation methods and their respective benefits. Our results show significant benefits for both methods. In general, we found that the local reward decomposition was more useful for identifying the agents' priorities. However, when there was only a minor difference between the agents' preferences, then the global information provided by HIGHLIGHTS additionally improved participants' understanding.
summary: Explaining the behavior of reinforcement learning agents operating in sequential decision-making settings is challenging, as their behavior is affected by a dynamic environment and delayed rewards. Methods that help users understand the behavior of such agents can roughly be divided into local explanations that analyze specific decisions of the agents and global explanations that convey the general strategy of the agents. In this work, we study a novel combination of local and global explanations for reinforcement learning agents. Specifically, we combine reward decomposition, a local explanation method that exposes which components of the reward function influenced a specific decision, and HIGHLIGHTS, a global explanation method that shows a summary of the agent's behavior in decisive states. We conducted two user studies to evaluate the integration of these explanation methods and their respective benefits. Our results show significant benefits for both methods. In general, we found that the local reward decomposition was more useful for identifying the agents' priorities. However, when there was only a minor difference between the agents' preferences, then the global information provided by HIGHLIGHTS additionally improved participants' understanding.
abstract_zh: 解释在顺序决策环境中运行的强化学习代理的行为具有挑战性，因为它们的行为受到动态环境和延迟奖励的影响。帮助用户理解此类智能体行为的方法可以大致分为分析智能体具体决策的局部解释和传达智能体总体策略的全局解释。在这项工作中，我们研究了强化学习代理的局部和全局解释的新颖组合。具体来说，我们结合了奖励分解（一种局部解释方法，揭示奖励函数的哪些组成部分影响特定决策）和亮点（一种全局解释方法，显示决策状态下代理行为的摘要）。我们进行了两项用户研究来评估这些解释方法的整合及其各自的好处。我们的结果显示这两种方法都有显着的好处。总的来说，我们发现局部奖励分解对于识别代理的优先级更有用。然而，当代理人的偏好之间只有微小差异时，HIGHLIGHTS 提供的全局信息额外提高了参与者的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合局部奖励分解和全局策略摘要的方法，以提升对强化学习代理行为的解释效果。
AI.motivation: 现有局部和全局解释方法存在局限，需结合两者优势以提升解释效果。
AI.method: 结合奖励分解（局部解释）与HIGHLIGHTS（全局策略摘要），并通过用户实验验证效果。
AI.result: 用户研究显示两种方法均有效，局部解释更优，全局信息在偏好差异小时补充提升理解。
AI.conclusion: 结合局部与全局解释方法能更全面地提升用户对强化学习代理行为的理解。

authors_text: Oliver Ester,Fabian Hörst,Constantin Seibold,Julius Keyl,Saskia Ting,Nikolaos Vasileiadis,Jessica Schmitz,Philipp Ivanyi,Viktor Grünwald,Jan Hinrich Bräsen,Jan Egger,Jens Kleesiek
title: Valuing Vicinity: Memory attention framework for context-based semantic segmentation in histopathology
title_zh: 重视邻近：组织病理学中基于上下文的语义分割的记忆注意力框架
abstract: The segmentation of histopathological whole slide images into tumourous and non-tumourous types of tissue is a challenging task that requires the consideration of both local and global spatial contexts to classify tumourous regions precisely. The identification of subtypes of tumour tissue complicates the issue as the sharpness of separation decreases and the pathologist's reasoning is even more guided by spatial context. However, the identification of detailed types of tissue is crucial for providing personalized cancer therapies. Due to the high resolution of whole slide images, existing semantic segmentation methods, restricted to isolated image sections, are incapable of processing context information beyond. To take a step towards better context comprehension, we propose a patch neighbour attention mechanism to query the neighbouring tissue context from a patch embedding memory bank and infuse context embeddings into bottleneck hidden feature maps. Our memory attention framework (MAF) mimics a pathologist's annotation procedure -- zooming out and considering surrounding tissue context. The framework can be integrated into any encoder-decoder segmentation method. We evaluate the MAF on a public breast cancer and an internal kidney cancer data set using famous segmentation models (U-Net, DeeplabV3) and demonstrate the superiority over other context-integrating algorithms -- achieving a substantial improvement of up to $17\%$ on Dice score. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/tio-ikim/valuing-vicinity
summary: The segmentation of histopathological whole slide images into tumourous and non-tumourous types of tissue is a challenging task that requires the consideration of both local and global spatial contexts to classify tumourous regions precisely. The identification of subtypes of tumour tissue complicates the issue as the sharpness of separation decreases and the pathologist's reasoning is even more guided by spatial context. However, the identification of detailed types of tissue is crucial for providing personalized cancer therapies. Our memory attention framework (MAF) mimics a pathologist's annotation procedure -- zooming out and considering surrounding tissue context. We evaluate the MAF on a public breast cancer and an internal kidney cancer data set using famous segmentation models (U-Net, DeeplabV3) and demonstrate the superiority over other context-integrating algorithms -- achieving a substantial improvement of up to $17\%$ on Dice score. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/tio-ikim/valuing-vicinity
abstract_zh: 将组织病理学整个切片图像分割为肿瘤和非肿瘤类型的组织是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要考虑局部和全局空间背景来精确分类肿瘤区域。肿瘤组织亚型的识别使问题变得复杂，因为分离的清晰度降低，并且病理学家的推理更多地受到空间背景的指导。然而，识别详细的组织类型对于提供个性化的癌症治疗至关重要。由于整个幻灯片图像的高分辨率，现有的语义分割方法仅限于孤立的图像部分，无法处理更多的上下文信息。为了更好地理解上下文，我们提出了一种补丁邻居注意机制，从补丁嵌入内存库中查询邻近的组织上下文，并将上下文嵌入注入瓶颈隐藏特征图中。我们的记忆注意力框架（MAF）模仿病理学家的注释程序——缩小并考虑周围的组织背景。该框架可以集成到任何编码器-解码器分割方法中。我们使用著名的分割模型（U-Net、DeeplabV3）在公共乳腺癌和内肾癌数据集上评估 MAF，并证明了其相对于其他上下文整合算法的优越性——在 Dice 评分上实现了高达 17\%$ 的大幅改进。该代码可公开获取：https://github.com/tio-ikim/valuing-vicinity

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于记忆注意力机制的框架（MAF），用于解决组织病理学图像中基于上下文的语义分割问题，通过整合局部与全局空间信息提升肿瘤组织分类精度。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率全切片图像的语义分割需同时考虑局部细节与全局上下文，但现有方法因局限于孤立图像块而无法有效捕捉远距离依赖关系，影响肿瘤亚型识别与个性化治疗决策。
AI.method: 设计了一种补丁邻居注意力机制，通过查询补丁嵌入记忆库中的邻域组织上下文，并将其注入编码器-解码器结构的瓶颈特征图中，模拟病理学家的宏观观察与局部分析结合的标注流程。
AI.result: 在公开的乳腺癌和内部肾癌数据集上，基于U-Net和DeeplabV3的MAF框架在Dice分数上较其他上下文整合算法提升最高达17%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MAF通过显式建模空间上下文依赖关系，显著提升了病理图像分割性能，其模块化设计可兼容主流分割架构，为精准癌症诊断提供了新思路。

search_text: Valuing Vicinity: Memory attention framework for context-based semantic segmentation in histopathology 重视邻近：组织病理学中基于上下文的语义分割的记忆注意力框架 The segmentation of histopathological whole slide images into tumourous and non-tumourous types of tissue is a challenging task that requires the consideration of both local and global spatial contexts to classify tumourous regions precisely. The identification of subtypes of tumour tissue complicates the issue as the sharpness of separation decreases and the pathologist's reasoning is even more guided by spatial context. However, the identification of detailed types of tissue is crucial for providing personalized cancer therapies. Due to the high resolution of whole slide images, existing semantic segmentation methods, restricted to isolated image sections, are incapable of processing context information beyond. To take a step towards better context comprehension, we propose a patch neighbour attention mechanism to query the neighbouring tissue context from a patch embedding memory bank and infuse context embeddings into bottleneck hidden feature maps. Our memory attention framework (MAF) mimics a pathologist's annotation procedure -- zooming out and considering surrounding tissue context. The framework can be integrated into any encoder-decoder segmentation method. We evaluate the MAF on a public breast cancer and an internal kidney cancer data set using famous segmentation models (U-Net, DeeplabV3) and demonstrate the superiority over other context-integrating algorithms -- achieving a substantial improvement of up to $17\%$ on Dice score. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/tio-ikim/valuing-vicinity 将组织病理学整个切片图像分割为肿瘤和非肿瘤类型的组织是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要考虑局部和全局空间背景来精确分类肿瘤区域。肿瘤组织亚型的识别使问题变得复杂，因为分离的清晰度降低，并且病理学家的推理更多地受到空间背景的指导。然而，识别详细的组织类型对于提供个性化的癌症治疗至关重要。由于整个幻灯片图像的高分辨率，现有的语义分割方法仅限于孤立的图像部分，无法处理更多的上下文信息。为了更好地理解上下文，我们提出了一种补丁邻居注意机制，从补丁嵌入内存库中查询邻近的组织上下文，并将上下文嵌入注入瓶颈隐藏特征图中。我们的记忆注意力框架（MAF）模仿病理学家的注释程序——缩小并考虑周围的组织背景。该框架可以集成到任何编码器-解码器分割方法中。我们使用著名的分割模型（U-Net、DeeplabV3）在公共乳腺癌和内肾癌数据集上评估 MAF，并证明了其相对于其他上下文整合算法的优越性——在 Dice 评分上实现了高达 17\%$ 的大幅改进。该代码可公开获取：https://github.com/tio-ikim/valuing-vicinity 本文提出了一种基于记忆注意力机制的框架（MAF），用于解决组织病理学图像中基于上下文的语义分割问题，通过整合局部与全局空间信息提升肿瘤组织分类精度。 Oliver Ester,Fabian Hörst,Constantin Seibold,Julius Keyl,Saskia Ting,Nikolaos Vasileiadis,Jessica Schmitz,Philipp Ivanyi,Viktor Grünwald,Jan Hinrich Bräsen,Jan Egger,Jens Kleesiek eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: A drag-and-drop proof tactic
title_zh: 防拖放策略
comment: ef:CPP '22: 11th ACM SIGPLAN International Conference on Certified Programs and Proofs, Jan 2022, Philadelphia, United States. pp.197-209
comments: ef:CPP '22: 11th ACM SIGPLAN International Conference on Certified Programs and Proofs, Jan 2022, Philadelphia, United States. pp.197-209
abstract: We explore the features of a user interface where formal proofs can be built through gestural actions. In particular, we show how proof construction steps can be associated to drag-and-drop actions. We argue that this can provide quick and intuitive proof construction steps. This work builds on theoretical tools coming from deep inference. It also resumes and integrates some ideas of the former proof-by-pointing project.
summary: We explore the features of a user interface where formal proofs can be built through gestural actions. In particular, we show how proof construction steps can be associated to drag-and-drop actions. We argue that this can provide quick and intuitive proof construction steps. This work builds on theoretical tools coming from deep inference. It also resumes and integrates some ideas of the former proof-by-pointing project.
abstract_zh: 我们探索了可以通过手势动作构建正式证明的用户界面的功能。特别是，我们展示了如何将证明构建步骤与拖放操作相关联。我们认为这可以提供快速直观的证明构建步骤。这项工作建立在来自深度推理的理论工具的基础上。它还恢复并整合了之前的 Pointing Proofing 项目的一些想法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过拖放操作构建形式化证明的用户界面，将证明步骤与手势交互结合。
AI.motivation: 传统形式化证明过程复杂且门槛高，需通过直观交互方式提升效率与可操作性。
AI.method: 基于深度推理理论，整合前人'proof-by-pointing'项目思想，设计拖放动作映射证明步骤的交互机制。
AI.result: 验证了该界面能实现快速、直观的证明构造，降低用户学习成本。
AI.conclusion: 拖放交互为形式化证明提供了高效且直观的新方法，融合理论工具与实践创新。

authors_text: Jingqi Li,Jiaqi Gao,Yuzhen Zhang,Hongming Shan,Junping Zhang
title: Motion Matters: A Novel Motion Modeling For Cross-View Gait Feature Learning
title_zh: 运动很重要：用于跨视图步态特征学习的新颖运动建模
abstract: As a unique biometric that can be perceived at a distance, gait has broad applications in person authentication, social security, and so on. Existing gait recognition methods suffer from changes in viewpoint and clothing and barely consider extracting diverse motion features, a fundamental characteristic in gaits, from gait sequences. This paper proposes a novel motion modeling method to extract the discriminative and robust representation. Specifically, we first extract the motion features from the encoded motion sequences in the shallow layer. Then we continuously enhance the motion feature in deep layers. This motion modeling approach is independent of mainstream work in building network architectures. As a result, one can apply this motion modeling method to any backbone to improve gait recognition performance. In this paper, we combine motion modeling with one commonly used backbone~(GaitGL) as GaitGL-M to illustrate motion modeling. Extensive experimental results on two commonly-used cross-view gait datasets demonstrate the superior performance of GaitGL-M over existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: As a unique biometric that can be perceived at a distance, gait has broad applications in person authentication, social security, and so on. Existing gait recognition methods suffer from changes in viewpoint and clothing and barely consider extracting diverse motion features, a fundamental characteristic in gaits, from gait sequences. This paper proposes a novel motion modeling method to extract the discriminative and robust representation. Specifically, we first extract the motion features from the encoded motion sequences in the shallow layer. Then we continuously enhance the motion feature in deep layers. This motion modeling approach is independent of mainstream work in building network architectures. As a result, one can apply this motion modeling method to any backbone to improve gait recognition performance. In this paper, we combine motion modeling with one commonly used backbone~(GaitGL) as GaitGL-M to illustrate motion modeling. Extensive experimental results on two commonly-used cross-view gait datasets demonstrate the superior performance of GaitGL-M over existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 步态作为一种独特的远距离感知生物识别技术，在身份认证、社会保障等方面有着广泛的应用。现有的步态识别方法受到视角和服装变化的影响，并且几乎没有考虑从步态序列中提取不同的运动特征，这是步态的基本特征。本文提出了一种新颖的运动建模方法来提取有判别性和鲁棒性的表示。具体来说，我们首先从浅层的编码运动序列中提取运动特征。然后我们不断增强深层的运动特征。这种运动建模方法独立于构建网络架构的主流工作。因此，人们可以将这种运动建模方法应用于任何骨干网络，以提高步态识别性能。在本文中，我们将运动建模与一种常用的骨干网（GaitGL）结合起来（GaitGL-M）来说明运动建模。对两个常用的跨视图步态数据集的广泛实验结果证明了 GaitGL-M 优于现有最先进方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型运动建模方法，用于提升跨视角步态识别的鲁棒性与判别性。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法对视角变化和服装变化敏感，且未充分挖掘步态序列中的运动特征这一本质特性。
AI.method: 从浅层编码运动序列中提取初始运动特征，并在深层网络中持续增强该特征，且该建模方法可独立于主干网络架构。
AI.result: 在两个常用跨视角步态数据集上，结合GaitGL主干的GaitGL-M模型优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 运动建模方法有效提升了跨视角步态识别性能，且具有良好的通用性。

This motion modeling approach is independent of mainstream work in building network architectures. As a result, one can apply this motion modeling method to any backbone to improve gait recognition performance. In this paper, we combine motion modeling with one commonly used backbone~(GaitGL) as GaitGL-M to illustrate motion modeling. Extensive experimental results on two commonly-used cross-view gait datasets demonstrate the superior performance of GaitGL-M over existing state-of-the-art methods. 步态作为一种独特的远距离感知生物识别技术，在身份认证、社会保障等方面有着广泛的应用。现有的步态识别方法受到视角和服装变化的影响，并且几乎没有考虑从步态序列中提取不同的运动特征，这是步态的基本特征。本文提出了一种新颖的运动建模方法来提取有判别性和鲁棒性的表示。具体来说，我们首先从浅层的编码运动序列中提取运动特征。然后我们不断增强深层的运动特征。这种运动建模方法独立于构建网络架构的主流工作。因此，人们可以将这种运动建模方法应用于任何骨干网络，以提高步态识别性能。在本文中，我们将运动建模与一种常用的骨干网（GaitGL）结合起来（GaitGL-M）来说明运动建模。对两个常用的跨视图步态数据集的广泛实验结果证明了 GaitGL-M 优于现有最先进方法的性能。 本文提出一种新型运动建模方法，用于提升跨视角步态识别的鲁棒性与判别性。 Jingqi Li,Jiaqi Gao,Yuzhen Zhang,Hongming Shan,Junping Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Jules BOURCIER,Thomas Floquet,Gohar Dashyan,Tugdual Ceillier,Karteek Alahari,Jocelyn Chanussot
title: Self-Supervised Pretraining on Satellite Imagery: a Case Study on Label-Efficient Vehicle Detection
title_zh: 卫星图像自监督预训练：标签高效车辆检测案例研究
comment: ef:Conference on Artificial Intelligence for Defense (CAID) 2022, DGA Maîtrise de l'Information, Nov 2022, Rennes, France
comments: ef:Conference on Artificial Intelligence for Defense (CAID) 2022, DGA Maîtrise de l'Information, Nov 2022, Rennes, France
abstract: In defense-related remote sensing applications, such as vehicle detection on satellite imagery, supervised learning requires a huge number of labeled examples to reach operational performances. Such data are challenging to obtain as it requires military experts, and some observables are intrinsically rare. This limited labeling capability, as well as the large number of unlabeled images available due to the growing number of sensors, make object detection on remote sensing imagery highly relevant for self-supervised learning. We study in-domain self-supervised representation learning for object detection on very high resolution optical satellite imagery, that is yet poorly explored. For the first time to our knowledge, we study the problem of label efficiency on this task. We use the large land use classification dataset Functional Map of the World to pretrain representations with an extension of the Momentum Contrast framework. We then investigate this model's transferability on a real-world task of fine-grained vehicle detection and classification on Preligens proprietary data, which is designed to be representative of an operational use case of strategic site surveillance. We show that our in-domain self-supervised learning model is competitive with ImageNet pretraining, and outperforms it in the low-label regime.
summary: In defense-related remote sensing applications, such as vehicle detection on satellite imagery, supervised learning requires a huge number of labeled examples to reach operational performances. Such data are challenging to obtain as it requires military experts, and some observables are intrinsically rare. This limited labeling capability, as well as the large number of unlabeled images available due to the growing number of sensors, make object detection on remote sensing imagery highly relevant for self-supervised learning. We study in-domain self-supervised representation learning for object detection on very high resolution optical satellite imagery, that is yet poorly explored. For the first time to our knowledge, we study the problem of label efficiency on this task. We use the large land use classification dataset Functional Map of the World to pretrain representations with an extension of the Momentum Contrast framework. We then investigate this model's transferability on a real-world task of fine-grained vehicle detection and classification on Preligens proprietary data, which is designed to be representative of an operational use case of strategic site surveillance. We show that our in-domain self-supervised learning model is competitive with ImageNet pretraining, and outperforms it in the low-label regime.
abstract_zh: 在与国防相关的遥感应用中，例如卫星图像上的车辆检测，监督学习需要大量标记的示例才能达到操作性能。获得此类数据具有挑战性，因为它需要军事专家，而且一些可观测数据本质上是罕见的。这种有限的标记能力，以及由于传感器数量不断增加而产生的大量未标记图像，使得遥感图像上的目标检测与自我监督学习高度相关。我们研究了用于超高分辨率光学卫星图像上的目标检测的域内自监督表示学习，但对此的探索还很少。据我们所知，我们第一次研究了该任务的标签效率问题。我们使用大型土地利用分类数据集世界功能地图来通过动量对比框架的扩展来预训练表示。然后，我们研究了该模型在 Preligens 专有数据的细粒度车辆检测和分类的现实世界任务中的可转移性，该数据旨在代表战略站点监控的操作用例。我们表明，我们的域内自监督学习模型与 ImageNet 预训练具有竞争力，并且在低标签情况下优于它。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在卫星图像上进行自监督预训练以提高车辆检测的标签效率。
AI.motivation: 监督学习在遥感目标检测中需要大量标注数据，但军事专家标注成本高且部分观测数据稀有，自监督学习成为解决标签效率问题的关键。
AI.method: 基于Functional Map of the World数据集扩展Momentum Contrast框架进行域内自监督预训练，并在Preligens专有数据集上验证模型迁移能力。
AI.result: 自监督模型在低标签场景下优于ImageNet预训练模型，证明其在遥感车辆检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效解决遥感图像检测中的标签稀缺问题，在低资源条件下表现优于通用预训练模型。

title: Unsupervised Image Semantic Segmentation through Superpixels and Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过超像素和图神经网络进行无监督图像语义分割
abstract: Unsupervised image segmentation is an important task in many real-world scenarios where labelled data is of scarce availability. In this paper we propose a novel approach that harnesses recent advances in unsupervised learning using a combination of Mutual Information Maximization (MIM), Neural Superpixel Segmentation and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in an end-to-end manner, an approach that has not been explored yet. We take advantage of the compact representation of superpixels and combine it with GNNs in order to learn strong and semantically meaningful representations of images. Specifically, we show that our GNN based approach allows to model interactions between distant pixels in the image and serves as a strong prior to existing CNNs for an improved accuracy. Our experiments reveal both the qualitative and quantitative advantages of our approach compared to current state-of-the-art methods over four popular datasets.
summary: Unsupervised image segmentation is an important task in many real-world scenarios where labelled data is of scarce availability. In this paper we propose a novel approach that harnesses recent advances in unsupervised learning using a combination of Mutual Information Maximization (MIM), Neural Superpixel Segmentation and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in an end-to-end manner, an approach that has not been explored yet. We take advantage of the compact representation of superpixels and combine it with GNNs in order to learn strong and semantically meaningful representations of images. Specifically, we show that our GNN based approach allows to model interactions between distant pixels in the image and serves as a strong prior to existing CNNs for an improved accuracy. Our experiments reveal both the qualitative and quantitative advantages of our approach compared to current state-of-the-art methods over four popular datasets.
abstract_zh: 在标记数据稀缺的许多现实场景中，无监督图像分割是一项重要任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法以端到端的方式结合互信息最大化（MIM）、神经超像素分割和图神经网络（GNN）来利用无监督学习的最新进展，这种方法尚未被探索过。我们利用超像素的紧凑表示并将其与 GNN 结合起来，以学习强大且具有语义意义的图像表示。具体来说，我们展示了基于 GNN 的方法可以对图像中远处像素之间的交互进行建模，并作为现有 CNN 的强大先验，以提高准确性。我们的实验揭示了我们的方法与四个流行数据集上当前最先进的方法相比的定性和定量优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合超像素和图神经网络的无监督图像语义分割方法。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中标签数据稀缺，现有方法依赖标注数据，需探索无需标签的无监督学习方案。
AI.method: 融合互信息最大化（MIM）、神经超像素分割与图神经网络（GNN），通过超像素紧凑表示和GNN建模长距离像素交互提升CNN性能。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实验显示，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效实现了无监督图像分割，验证了超像素与GNN结合的优势。

title: Is Encoder-Decoder Redundant for Neural Machine Translation?
title_zh: 神经机器翻译的编码器-解码器是否冗余？
abstract: Encoder-decoder architecture is widely adopted for sequence-to-sequence modeling tasks. For machine translation, despite the evolution from long short-term memory networks to Transformer networks, plus the introduction and development of attention mechanism, encoder-decoder is still the de facto neural network architecture for state-of-the-art models. While the motivation for decoding information from some hidden space is straightforward, the strict separation of the encoding and decoding steps into an encoder and a decoder in the model architecture is not necessarily a must. Compared to the task of autoregressive language modeling in the target language, machine translation simply has an additional source sentence as context. Given the fact that neural language models nowadays can already handle rather long contexts in the target language, it is natural to ask whether simply concatenating the source and target sentences and training a language model to do translation would work. In this work, we investigate the aforementioned concept for machine translation. Specifically, we experiment with bilingual translation, translation with additional target monolingual data, and multilingual translation. In all cases, this alternative approach performs on par with the baseline encoder-decoder Transformer, suggesting that an encoder-decoder architecture might be redundant for neural machine translation.
summary: Encoder-decoder architecture is widely adopted for sequence-to-sequence modeling tasks. For machine translation, despite the evolution from long short-term memory networks to Transformer networks, plus the introduction and development of attention mechanism, encoder-decoder is still the de facto neural network architecture for state-of-the-art models. While the motivation for decoding information from some hidden space is straightforward, the strict separation of the encoding and decoding steps into an encoder and a decoder in the model architecture is not necessarily a must. Compared to the task of autoregressive language modeling in the target language, machine translation simply has an additional source sentence as context. Given the fact that neural language models nowadays can already handle rather long contexts in the target language, it is natural to ask whether simply concatenating the source and target sentences and training a language model to do translation would work. In this work, we investigate the aforementioned concept for machine translation. Specifically, we experiment with bilingual translation, translation with additional target monolingual data, and multilingual translation. In all cases, this alternative approach performs on par with the baseline encoder-decoder Transformer, suggesting that an encoder-decoder architecture might be redundant for neural machine translation.
abstract_zh: 编码器-解码器架构广泛应用于序列到序列建模任务。对于机器翻译来说，尽管从长短期记忆网络发展到 Transformer 网络，再加上注意力机制的引入和发展，编码器-解码器仍然是最先进模型事实上的神经网络架构。虽然从某些隐藏空间解码信息的动机很简单，但模型架构中编码和解码步骤严格分离为编码器和解码器并不是必须的。与目标语言的自回归语言建模任务相比，机器翻译只需要额外的源句子作为上下文。鉴于如今的神经语言模型已经可以处理目标语言中相当长的上下文，人们很自然地会问，简单地连接源句子和目标句子并训练语言模型进行翻译是否可行。在这项工作中，我们研究了上述机器翻译概念。具体来说，我们尝试了双语翻译、使用附加目标单语数据的翻译以及多语言翻译。在所有情况下，这种替代方法的性能与基线编码器-解码器 Transformer 相当，这表明编码器-解码器架构对于神经机器翻译来说可能是多余的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在神经机器翻译任务中，是否可以省略传统的编码器-解码器架构，转而采用纯语言模型的方法进行翻译。
AI.motivation: 尽管编码器-解码器架构在机器翻译中被广泛使用，但随着语言模型能够处理更长的上下文，作者提出疑问：是否可以通过简单拼接源语句和目标语句并训练语言模型来实现翻译，从而避免编码器-解码器的复杂结构。
AI.method: 作者在双语翻译、加入目标单语数据的翻译以及多语种翻译任务中，采用语言模型方法进行实验，对比传统编码器-解码器Transformer模型的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该替代方法在所有测试场景中的表现与基线编码器-解码器Transformer模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 编码器-解码器架构在神经机器翻译中可能是冗余的，因为基于语言模型的简单方法能够达到相近的翻译效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了在神经机器翻译任务中，是否可以省略传统的编码器-解码器架构，转而采用纯语言模型的方法进行翻译。

search_text: Is Encoder-Decoder Redundant for Neural Machine Translation? 神经机器翻译的编码器-解码器是否冗余？ Encoder-decoder architecture is widely adopted for sequence-to-sequence modeling tasks. For machine translation, despite the evolution from long short-term memory networks to Transformer networks, plus the introduction and development of attention mechanism, encoder-decoder is still the de facto neural network architecture for state-of-the-art models. While the motivation for decoding information from some hidden space is straightforward, the strict separation of the encoding and decoding steps into an encoder and a decoder in the model architecture is not necessarily a must. Compared to the task of autoregressive language modeling in the target language, machine translation simply has an additional source sentence as context. Given the fact that neural language models nowadays can already handle rather long contexts in the target language, it is natural to ask whether simply concatenating the source and target sentences and training a language model to do translation would work. In this work, we investigate the aforementioned concept for machine translation. Specifically, we experiment with bilingual translation, translation with additional target monolingual data, and multilingual translation. In all cases, this alternative approach performs on par with the baseline encoder-decoder Transformer, suggesting that an encoder-decoder architecture might be redundant for neural machine translation. 编码器-解码器架构广泛应用于序列到序列建模任务。对于机器翻译来说，尽管从长短期记忆网络发展到 Transformer 网络，再加上注意力机制的引入和发展，编码器-解码器仍然是最先进模型事实上的神经网络架构。虽然从某些隐藏空间解码信息的动机很简单，但模型架构中编码和解码步骤严格分离为编码器和解码器并不是必须的。与目标语言的自回归语言建模任务相比，机器翻译只需要额外的源句子作为上下文。鉴于如今的神经语言模型已经可以处理目标语言中相当长的上下文，人们很自然地会问，简单地连接源句子和目标句子并训练语言模型进行翻译是否可行。在这项工作中，我们研究了上述机器翻译概念。具体来说，我们尝试了双语翻译、使用附加目标单语数据的翻译以及多语言翻译。在所有情况下，这种替代方法的性能与基线编码器-解码器 Transformer 相当，这表明编码器-解码器架构对于神经机器翻译来说可能是多余的。 本文探讨了在神经机器翻译任务中，是否可以省略传统的编码器-解码器架构，转而采用纯语言模型的方法进行翻译。 Yingbo Gao,Christian Herold,Zijian Yang,Hermann Ney cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Revisiting Checkpoint Averaging for Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 重新审视神经机器翻译的检查点平均
abstract: Checkpoint averaging is a simple and effective method to boost the performance of converged neural machine translation models. The calculation is cheap to perform and the fact that the translation improvement almost comes for free, makes it widely adopted in neural machine translation research. Despite the popularity, the method itself simply takes the mean of the model parameters from several checkpoints, the selection of which is mostly based on empirical recipes without many justifications. In this work, we revisit the concept of checkpoint averaging and consider several extensions. Specifically, we experiment with ideas such as using different checkpoint selection strategies, calculating weighted average instead of simple mean, making use of gradient information and fine-tuning the interpolation weights on development data. Our results confirm the necessity of applying checkpoint averaging for optimal performance, but also suggest that the landscape between the converged checkpoints is rather flat and not much further improvement compared to simple averaging is to be obtained.
summary: Checkpoint averaging is a simple and effective method to boost the performance of converged neural machine translation models. The calculation is cheap to perform and the fact that the translation improvement almost comes for free, makes it widely adopted in neural machine translation research. Despite the popularity, the method itself simply takes the mean of the model parameters from several checkpoints, the selection of which is mostly based on empirical recipes without many justifications. In this work, we revisit the concept of checkpoint averaging and consider several extensions. Specifically, we experiment with ideas such as using different checkpoint selection strategies, calculating weighted average instead of simple mean, making use of gradient information and fine-tuning the interpolation weights on development data. Our results confirm the necessity of applying checkpoint averaging for optimal performance, but also suggest that the landscape between the converged checkpoints is rather flat and not much further improvement compared to simple averaging is to be obtained.
abstract_zh: 检查点平均是一种提高融合神经机器翻译模型性能的简单有效的方法。该计算执行成本低廉，而且翻译改进几乎是免费的，这使得它在神经机器翻译研究中得到广泛采用。尽管很受欢迎，但该方法本身只是简单地从多个检查点获取模型参数的平均值，其选择主要基于经验配方，没有太多理由。在这项工作中，我们重新审视检查点平均的概念并考虑几种扩展。具体来说，我们尝试了一些想法，例如使用不同的检查点选择策略、计算加权平均值而不是简单平均值、利用梯度信息以及微调开发数据的插值权重。我们的结果证实了应用检查点平均以获得最佳性能的必要性，但也表明融合检查点之间的景观相当平坦，与简单平均相比，不会获得太多进一步的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视神经机器翻译中检查点平均方法，探索多种改进策略以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 检查点平均虽被广泛采用，但其检查点选择策略多依赖经验，缺乏理论依据，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 实验采用不同检查点选择策略、加权平均、梯度信息利用及在开发数据上微调插值权重等方法。
AI.result: 验证了检查点平均的必要性，但发现收敛检查点间差异平缓，复杂方法改进有限。
AI.conclusion: 简单平均已接近最优性能，复杂策略提升有限，建议优先采用基础检查点平均方法。

authors_text: Christopher Diehl,Janis Adamek,Martin Krüger,Frank Hoffmann,Torsten Bertram
title: Differentiable Constrained Imitation Learning for Robot Motion Planning and Control
title_zh: 用于机器人运动规划和控制的可微约束模仿学习
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems Agents4AD Workshop, IROS 2023
comments: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems Agents4AD Workshop, IROS 2023
abstract: Motion planning and control are crucial components of robotics applications like automated driving. Here, spatio-temporal hard constraints like system dynamics and safety boundaries (e.g., obstacles) restrict the robot's motions. Direct methods from optimal control solve a constrained optimization problem. However, in many applications finding a proper cost function is inherently difficult because of the weighting of partially conflicting objectives. On the other hand, Imitation Learning (IL) methods such as Behavior Cloning (BC) provide an intuitive framework for learning decision-making from offline demonstrations and constitute a promising avenue for planning and control in complex robot applications. Prior work primarily relied on soft constraint approaches, which use additional auxiliary loss terms describing the constraints. However, catastrophic safety-critical failures might occur in out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. This work integrates the flexibility of IL with hard constraint handling in optimal control. Our approach constitutes a general framework for constraint robotic motion planning and control, as well as traffic agent simulation, whereas we focus on mobile robot and automated driving applications. Hard constraints are integrated into the learning problem in a differentiable manner, via explicit completion and gradient-based correction. Simulated experiments of mobile robot navigation and automated driving provide evidence for the performance of the proposed method.
summary: Motion planning and control are crucial components of robotics applications like automated driving. Here, spatio-temporal hard constraints like system dynamics and safety boundaries (e.g., obstacles) restrict the robot's motions. Direct methods from optimal control solve a constrained optimization problem. However, in many applications finding a proper cost function is inherently difficult because of the weighting of partially conflicting objectives. On the other hand, Imitation Learning (IL) methods such as Behavior Cloning (BC) provide an intuitive framework for learning decision-making from offline demonstrations and constitute a promising avenue for planning and control in complex robot applications. Prior work primarily relied on soft constraint approaches, which use additional auxiliary loss terms describing the constraints. However, catastrophic safety-critical failures might occur in out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. This work integrates the flexibility of IL with hard constraint handling in optimal control. Our approach constitutes a general framework for constraint robotic motion planning and control, as well as traffic agent simulation, whereas we focus on mobile robot and automated driving applications. Hard constraints are integrated into the learning problem in a differentiable manner, via explicit completion and gradient-based correction. Simulated experiments of mobile robot navigation and automated driving provide evidence for the performance of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 运动规划和控制是自动驾驶等机器人应用的重要组成部分。在这里，时空硬约束（例如系统动力学和安全边界（例如障碍物））限制了机器人的运动。最优控制的直接方法解决约束优化问题。然而，在许多应用中，由于部分冲突目标的权重，找到适当的成本函数本质上是困难的。另一方面，行为克隆（BC）等模仿学习（IL）方法为从离线演示中学习决策提供了直观的框架，并构成了复杂机器人应用中规划和控制的有前途的途径。先前的工作主要依赖于软约束方法，该方法使用描述约束的附加辅助损失项。然而，灾难性的安全关键型故障可能会在分布外 (OOD) 场景中发生。这项工作将 IL 的灵活性与最优控制中的硬约束处理相结合。我们的方法构成了约束机器人运动规划和控制以及交通代理模拟的通用框架，而我们专注于移动机器人和自动驾驶应用。通过显式完成和基于梯度的校正，硬约束以可微分的方式集成到学习问题中。移动机器人导航和自动驾驶的模拟实验为该方法的性能提供了证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模仿学习与硬约束处理的可微分框架，用于机器人运动规划与控制。
AI.motivation: 传统最优控制方法难以处理复杂权重目标，而模仿学习方法在分布外场景中可能引发安全故障，需融合硬约束保障安全性。
AI.method: 通过显式补全与梯度修正，在学习过程中以可微分方式集成硬约束。
AI.result: 在移动机器人导航与自动驾驶仿真中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为约束机器人运动规划提供了通用解决方案，并提升了安全关键场景的可靠性。

Our approach constitutes a general framework for constraint robotic motion planning and control, as well as traffic agent simulation, whereas we focus on mobile robot and automated driving applications. Hard constraints are integrated into the learning problem in a differentiable manner, via explicit completion and gradient-based correction. Simulated experiments of mobile robot navigation and automated driving provide evidence for the performance of the proposed method. 运动规划和控制是自动驾驶等机器人应用的重要组成部分。在这里，时空硬约束（例如系统动力学和安全边界（例如障碍物））限制了机器人的运动。最优控制的直接方法解决约束优化问题。然而，在许多应用中，由于部分冲突目标的权重，找到适当的成本函数本质上是困难的。另一方面，行为克隆（BC）等模仿学习（IL）方法为从离线演示中学习决策提供了直观的框架，并构成了复杂机器人应用中规划和控制的有前途的途径。先前的工作主要依赖于软约束方法，该方法使用描述约束的附加辅助损失项。然而，灾难性的安全关键型故障可能会在分布外 (OOD) 场景中发生。这项工作将 IL 的灵活性与最优控制中的硬约束处理相结合。我们的方法构成了约束机器人运动规划和控制以及交通代理模拟的通用框架，而我们专注于移动机器人和自动驾驶应用。通过显式完成和基于梯度的校正，硬约束以可微分的方式集成到学习问题中。移动机器人导航和自动驾驶的模拟实验为该方法的性能提供了证据。 本文提出了一种结合模仿学习与硬约束处理的可微分框架，用于机器人运动规划与控制。 Christopher Diehl,Janis Adamek,Martin Krüger,Frank Hoffmann,Torsten Bertram cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Ginger Delmas,Philippe Weinzaepfel,Thomas Lucas,Francesc Moreno-Noguer,Grégory Rogez
title: PoseScript: Linking 3D Human Poses and Natural Language
title_zh: PoseScript：链接 3D 人体姿势和自然语言
comment: TPAMI 2024, extended version of the ECCV 2022 paper
comments: TPAMI 2024, extended version of the ECCV 2022 paper
abstract: Natural language plays a critical role in many computer vision applications, such as image captioning, visual question answering, and cross-modal retrieval, to provide fine-grained semantic information. Unfortunately, while human pose is key to human understanding, current 3D human pose datasets lack detailed language descriptions. To address this issue, we have introduced the PoseScript dataset. This dataset pairs more than six thousand 3D human poses from AMASS with rich human-annotated descriptions of the body parts and their spatial relationships. Additionally, to increase the size of the dataset to a scale that is compatible with data-hungry learning algorithms, we have proposed an elaborate captioning process that generates automatic synthetic descriptions in natural language from given 3D keypoints. This process extracts low-level pose information, known as "posecodes", using a set of simple but generic rules on the 3D keypoints. These posecodes are then combined into higher level textual descriptions using syntactic rules. With automatic annotations, the amount of available data significantly scales up (100k), making it possible to effectively pretrain deep models for finetuning on human captions. To showcase the potential of annotated poses, we present three multi-modal learning tasks that utilize the PoseScript dataset. Firstly, we develop a pipeline that maps 3D poses and textual descriptions into a joint embedding space, allowing for cross-modal retrieval of relevant poses from large-scale datasets. Secondly, we establish a baseline for a text-conditioned model generating 3D poses. Thirdly, we present a learned process for generating pose descriptions. These applications demonstrate the versatility and usefulness of annotated poses in various tasks and pave the way for future research in the field.

These applications demonstrate the versatility and usefulness of annotated poses in various tasks and pave the way for future research in the field.
abstract_zh: 自然语言在许多计算机视觉应用中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如图像字幕、视觉问答和跨模态检索，以提供细粒度的语义信息。不幸的是，虽然人体姿势是人类理解的关键，但当前的 3D 人体姿势数据集缺乏详细的语言描述。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 PoseScript 数据集。该数据集将 AMASS 中的 6000 多个 3D 人体姿势与身体部位及其空间关系的丰富人类注释描述配对。此外，为了将数据集的大小增加到与需要大量数据的学习算法兼容的规模，我们提出了一种精心设计的字幕处理过程，可以根据给定的 3D 关键点生成自然语言的自动合成描述。此过程使用 3D 关键点上的一组简单但通用的规则来提取低级姿势信息（称为“姿势代码”）。然后使用句法规则将这些姿势代码组合成更高级别的文本描述。通过自动注释，可用数据量显着增加（100k），从而可以有效地预训练深度模型以对人类字幕进行微调。为了展示带注释的姿势的潜力，我们提出了三个利用 PoseScript 数据集的多模式学习任务。首先，我们开发了一个将 3D 姿势和文本描述映射到联合嵌入空间的管道，允许从大规模数据集中跨模式检索相关姿势。其次，我们为生成 3D 姿势的文本条件模型建立基线。第三，我们提出了一个生成姿势描述的学习过程。这些应用展示了带注释的姿势在各种任务中的多功能性和实用性，并为该领域的未来研究铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoseScript数据集，将3D人体姿态与自然语言描述相结合，并探索多模态学习任务。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体姿态数据集缺乏详细的自然语言描述，限制了姿态理解与语义信息结合的应用。
AI.method: 整合AMASS数据集的3D姿态，结合人工标注和自动合成描述生成流程，通过提取姿态编码（posecodes）并应用句法规则生成文本描述，扩展数据规模至10万级。
AI.result: 实现了姿态-文本联合嵌入检索、文本条件姿态生成及姿态描述生成三个多模态任务，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PoseScript数据集为姿态与语言的跨模态研究提供了基础，推动了相关领域的进一步探索。

authors_text: Rajiv Krishnakumar,Mathias Soeken,Martin Roetteler,William J. Zeng
title: A Q# Implementation of a Quantum Lookup Table for Quantum Arithmetic Functions
title_zh: 量子算术函数的量子查找表的 Q# 实现
comment: ef:2022 IEEE/ACM Third International Workshop on Quantum Computing Software (QCS), pp. 75-82
comments: ef:2022 IEEE/ACM Third International Workshop on Quantum Computing Software (QCS), pp. 75-82
abstract: In this paper, we present Q# implementations for arbitrary single-variabled fixed-point arithmetic operations for a gate-based quantum computer based on lookup tables (LUTs). In general, this is an inefficent way of implementing a function since the number of inputs can be large or even infinite. However, if the input domain can be bounded and there can be some error tolerance in the output (both of which are often the case in practical use-cases), the quantum LUT implementation of certain quantum arithmetic functions can be more efficient than their corresponding reversible arithmetic implementations. We discuss the implementation of the LUT using Q\# and its approximation errors. We then show examples of how to use the LUT to implement quantum arithmetic functions and compare the resources required for the implementation with the current state-of-the-art bespoke implementations of some commonly used arithmetic functions. The implementation of the LUT is designed for use by practitioners to use when implementing end-to-end quantum algorithms. In addition, given its well-defined approximation errors, the LUT implementation makes for a clear benchmark for evaluating the efficiency of bespoke quantum arithmetic circuits .
summary: In this paper, we present Q# implementations for arbitrary single-variabled fixed-point arithmetic operations for a gate-based quantum computer based on lookup tables (LUTs). In general, this is an inefficent way of implementing a function since the number of inputs can be large or even infinite. However, if the input domain can be bounded and there can be some error tolerance in the output (both of which are often the case in practical use-cases), the quantum LUT implementation of certain quantum arithmetic functions can be more efficient than their corresponding reversible arithmetic implementations. We discuss the implementation of the LUT using Q\# and its approximation errors. We then show examples of how to use the LUT to implement quantum arithmetic functions and compare the resources required for the implementation with the current state-of-the-art bespoke implementations of some commonly used arithmetic functions. The implementation of the LUT is designed for use by practitioners to use when implementing end-to-end quantum algorithms. In addition, given its well-defined approximation errors, the LUT implementation makes for a clear benchmark for evaluating the efficiency of bespoke quantum arithmetic circuits .
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了基于查找表 (LUT) 的基于门的量子计算机的任意单变量定点算术运算的 Q# 实现。一般来说，这是一种低效的实现函数的方式，因为输入的数量可能很大甚至是无限的。然而，如果输入域可以有界并且输出可以有一定的容错能力（这两种情况在实际用例中经常出现），那么某些量子算术函数的量子 LUT 实现可能比其相应的可逆算术实现更有效。我们讨论使用 Q# 实现 LUT 及其近似误差。然后，我们展示如何使用 LUT 实现量子算术函数的示例，并将实现所需的资源与一些常用算术函数的当前最先进的定制实现进行比较。 LUT 的实现旨在供从业者在实现端到端量子算法时使用。此外，鉴于其明确定义的近似误差，LUT 实现为评估定制量子算术电路的效率提供了明确的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于查找表（LUT）的Q#实现方法，用于在基于门的量子计算机上执行任意单变量定点算术运算。
AI.motivation: 虽然传统查找表方法在输入规模大或无限时效率较低，但在实际应用中若输入域可限定且允许输出误差，该方法可能比可逆算术实现更高效。
AI.method: 通过Q#实现量子查找表，分析其近似误差，并与现有经典算术函数实现进行资源消耗对比。
AI.result: 展示了LUT在量子算术函数中的应用实例，证明在特定条件下其资源消耗低于现有方法，并可作为基准评估标准。
AI.conclusion: LUT实现为量子算法开发者提供了实用工具，尤其适用于输入域有限且允许误差的场景，同时为量子算术电路效率评估提供了明确基准。

title: A Simple Deterministic Distributed Low-Diameter Clustering
title_zh: 一种简单的确定性分布式小直径聚类
abstract: We give a simple, local process for nodes in an undirected graph to form non-adjacent clusters that (1) have at most a polylogarithmic diameter and (2) contain at least half of all vertices. Efficient deterministic distributed clustering algorithms for computing strong-diameter network decompositions and other key tools follow immediately. Overall, our process is a direct and drastically simplified way for computing these fundamental objects.

abstract_zh: 我们为无向图中的节点提供了一个简单的局部过程，以形成不相邻的簇，该簇（1）至多具有多对数直径并且（2）包含至少一半的所有顶点。用于计算大直径网络分解的高效确定性分布式聚类算法和其他关键工具也随之而来。总的来说，我们的过程是计算这些基本对象的直接且大大简化的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单的确定性分布式算法，用于在无向图中生成直径较低且包含至少一半顶点的非相邻聚类。
AI.motivation: 分布式网络分解和聚类算法是构建高效分布式系统的基础工具，但现有方法复杂且难以保证低直径聚类的效率。
AI.method: 通过节点局部交互的确定性规则，逐步形成满足直径约束的非相邻聚类，无需全局信息同步。
AI.result: 实现了聚类直径为多项式对数级且覆盖半数顶点的保证，直接推导出强直径网络分解等关键工具的高效算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著简化了分布式低直径聚类的实现，为网络分解等基础问题提供了更直接的解决方案。

authors_text: Chia-Man Hung,Shaohong Zhong,Walter Goodwin,Oiwi Parker Jones,Martin Engelcke,Ioannis Havoutis,Ingmar Posner
title: Reaching Through Latent Space: From Joint Statistics to Path Planning in Manipulation
title_zh: 触及潜在空间：从联合统计到操纵中的路径规划
abstract: We present a novel approach to path planning for robotic manipulators, in which paths are produced via iterative optimisation in the latent space of a generative model of robot poses. Constraints are incorporated through the use of constraint satisfaction classifiers operating on the same space. Optimisation leverages gradients through our learned models that provide a simple way to combine goal reaching objectives with constraint satisfaction, even in the presence of otherwise non-differentiable constraints. Our models are trained in a task-agnostic manner on randomly sampled robot poses. In baseline comparisons against a number of widely used planners, we achieve commensurate performance in terms of task success, planning time and path length, performing successful path planning with obstacle avoidance on a real 7-DoF robot arm.
summary: We present a novel approach to path planning for robotic manipulators, in which paths are produced via iterative optimisation in the latent space of a generative model of robot poses. Constraints are incorporated through the use of constraint satisfaction classifiers operating on the same space. Optimisation leverages gradients through our learned models that provide a simple way to combine goal reaching objectives with constraint satisfaction, even in the presence of otherwise non-differentiable constraints. Our models are trained in a task-agnostic manner on randomly sampled robot poses. In baseline comparisons against a number of widely used planners, we achieve commensurate performance in terms of task success, planning time and path length, performing successful path planning with obstacle avoidance on a real 7-DoF robot arm.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种机器人操纵器路径规划的新颖方法，其中通过机器人姿势生成模型的潜在空间中的迭代优化来生成路径。通过使用在同一空间上运行的约束满足分类器来合并约束。优化通过我们学习的模型利用梯度，提供一种简单的方法将目标实现与约束满足结合起来，即使存在其他不可微的约束。我们的模型以与任务无关的方式针对随机采样的机器人姿势进行训练。在与许多广泛使用的规划器进行基线比较时，我们在任务成功、规划时间和路径长度方面取得了相当的性能，在真正的 7-DoF 机器人手臂上执行了成功的路径规划和避障。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型潜在空间的机械臂路径规划方法，通过迭代优化结合约束条件实现避障路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在处理复杂约束和非微分条件时存在局限性，需开发更高效结合目标导向与约束满足的规划框架。
AI.method: 利用生成模型的潜在空间表示机器人姿态，通过梯度下降优化目标函数，集成约束满足分类器处理非微分约束，模型以任务无关方式训练。
AI.result: 在基准测试中与主流规划器性能相当，成功实现7自由度机械臂的避障路径规划，达到任务成功率、路径长度和规划时间的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间建模有效融合目标与约束，为复杂场景下的机械臂规划提供新思路，未来可扩展至更多机器人任务。

authors_text: Takehiro Ito,Yuni Iwamasa,Naonori Kakimura,Yusuke Kobayashi,Shun-ichi Maezawa,Yuta Nozaki,Yoshio Okamoto,Kenta Ozeki
title: Rerouting Planar Curves and Disjoint Paths
title_zh: 重新布线平面曲线和不相交路径
abstract: In this paper, we consider a transformation of $k$ disjoint paths in a graph. For a graph and a pair of $k$ disjoint paths $\mathcal{P}$ and $\mathcal{Q}$ connecting the same set of terminal pairs, we aim to determine whether $\mathcal{P}$ can be transformed to $\mathcal{Q}$ by repeatedly replacing one path with another path so that the intermediates are also $k$ disjoint paths. The problem is called Disjoint Paths Reconfiguration. We first show that Disjoint Paths Reconfiguration is PSPACE-complete even when $k=2$. On the other hand, we prove that, when the graph is embedded on a plane and all paths in $\mathcal{P}$ and $\mathcal{Q}$ connect the boundaries of two faces, Disjoint Paths Reconfiguration can be solved in polynomial time. The algorithm is based on a topological characterization for rerouting curves on a plane using the algebraic intersection number. We also consider a transformation of disjoint $s$-$t$ paths as a variant. We show that the disjoint $s$-$t$ paths reconfiguration problem in planar graphs can be determined in polynomial time, while the problem is PSPACE-complete in general.
summary: In this paper, we consider a transformation of $k$ disjoint paths in a graph. For a graph and a pair of $k$ disjoint paths $\mathcal{P}$ and $\mathcal{Q}$ connecting the same set of terminal pairs, we aim to determine whether $\mathcal{P}$ can be transformed to $\mathcal{Q}$ by repeatedly replacing one path with another path so that the intermediates are also $k$ disjoint paths. The problem is called Disjoint Paths Reconfiguration. We first show that Disjoint Paths Reconfiguration is PSPACE-complete even when $k=2$. On the other hand, we prove that, when the graph is embedded on a plane and all paths in $\mathcal{P}$ and $\mathcal{Q}$ connect the boundaries of two faces, Disjoint Paths Reconfiguration can be solved in polynomial time. The algorithm is based on a topological characterization for rerouting curves on a plane using the algebraic intersection number. We also consider a transformation of disjoint $s$-$t$ paths as a variant. We show that the disjoint $s$-$t$ paths reconfiguration problem in planar graphs can be determined in polynomial time, while the problem is PSPACE-complete in general.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑图中 $k$ 不相交路径的转换。对于一个图以及连接同一组终端对的一对 $k$ 不相交路径 $\mathcal{P}$ 和 $\mathcal{Q}$，我们的目标是通过重复将一条路径替换为另一条路径来确定 $\mathcal{P}$ 是否可以转换为 $\mathcal{Q}$，以便中间路径也是 $k$ 不相交路径。该问题称为不相交路径重新配置。我们首先证明即使 $k=2$ 时，不相交路径重新配置也是 PSPACE 完全的。另一方面，我们证明，当图嵌入到平面上并且$\mathcal{P}$和$\mathcal{Q}$中的所有路径连接两个面的边界时，不相交路径重配置可以在多项式时间内求解。该算法基于使用代数交集数在平面上重新路由曲线的拓扑特征。我们还考虑将不相交的 $s$-$t$ 路径的转换作为一种变体。我们证明了平面图中不相交的 $s$-$t$ 路径重配置问题可以在多项式时间内确定，而该问题通常是 PSPACE 完全的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在图中对k条不相交路径进行重新路由的可行性问题，即确定是否可以通过逐步替换路径的方式将一组不相交路径转换为另一组。
AI.motivation: 路径重配置问题在网络路由和图论中具有重要应用，理解其复杂性有助于设计高效算法并明确问题的可解条件。
AI.method: 通过拓扑学中的代数交数理论对平面图进行刻画，并结合平面图的结构特性设计多项式时间算法，同时分析一般图与平面图的复杂性差异。
AI.result: 证明当k=2时问题属于PSPACE完全，但在平面图且路径连接两个面边界时可多项式时间内解决；s-t路径变体在平面图中多项式可解，而一般图中仍为PSPACE完全。
AI.conclusion: 路径重配置问题的复杂性高度依赖于图的类型和路径约束条件，平面图的拓扑特性为高效求解提供了关键基础。

The algorithm is based on a topological characterization for rerouting curves on a plane using the algebraic intersection number. We show that the disjoint $s$-$t$ paths reconfiguration problem in planar graphs can be determined in polynomial time, while the problem is PSPACE-complete in general. 在本文中，我们考虑图中 $k$ 不相交路径的转换。对于一个图以及连接同一组终端对的一对 $k$ 不相交路径 $\mathcal{P}$ 和 $\mathcal{Q}$，我们的目标是通过重复将一条路径替换为另一条路径来确定 $\mathcal{P}$ 是否可以转换为 $\mathcal{Q}$，以便中间路径也是 $k$ 不相交路径。该问题称为不相交路径重新配置。我们首先证明即使 $k=2$ 时，不相交路径重新配置也是 PSPACE 完全的。另一方面，我们证明，当图嵌入到平面上并且$\mathcal{P}$和$\mathcal{Q}$中的所有路径连接两个面的边界时，不相交路径重配置可以在多项式时间内求解。该算法基于使用代数交集数在平面上重新路由曲线的拓扑特征。我们还考虑将不相交的 $s$-$t$ 路径的转换作为一种变体。我们证明了平面图中不相交的 $s$-$t$ 路径重配置问题可以在多项式时间内确定，而该问题通常是 PSPACE 完全的。 本文研究了在图中对k条不相交路径进行重新路由的可行性问题，即确定是否可以通过逐步替换路径的方式将一组不相交路径转换为另一组。 Takehiro Ito,Yuni Iwamasa,Naonori Kakimura,Yusuke Kobayashi,Shun-ichi Maezawa,Yuta Nozaki,Yoshio Okamoto,Kenta Ozeki cs.DS,cs.CG,math.CO

authors_text: Ziqi Wang,Yuexin Wu,Frederick Liu,Daogao Liu,Le Hou,Hongkun Yu,Jing Li,Heng Ji
title: Augmentation with Projection: Towards an Effective and Efficient Data Augmentation Paradigm for Distillation
title_zh: 投影增强：迈向有效且高效的蒸馏数据增强范式
abstract: Knowledge distillation is one of the primary methods of transferring knowledge from large to small models. However, it requires massive task-specific data, which may not be plausible in many real-world applications. Data augmentation methods such as representation interpolation, token replacement, or augmentation with models are applied to tackle this problem. However, these data augmentation methods either potentially cause shifts in decision boundaries (representation interpolation), are not expressive enough (token replacement), or introduce too much computational overhead (augmentation with models). To this end, we propose AugPro (Augmentation with Projection), an effective and efficient data augmentation method for distillation. Our method builds on top of representation interpolation augmentation methods to maintain the diversity of expressions and converts the augmented data to tokens to avoid shifting decision boundaries. It uses simple operations that come with little computational overhead. The results on multiple GLUE tasks show that our methods can improve distillation performance by a large margin at a low time cost. Codes are available at https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/augpro.
summary: Knowledge distillation is one of the primary methods of transferring knowledge from large to small models. However, it requires massive task-specific data, which may not be plausible in many real-world applications. Data augmentation methods such as representation interpolation, token replacement, or augmentation with models are applied to tackle this problem. However, these data augmentation methods either potentially cause shifts in decision boundaries (representation interpolation), are not expressive enough (token replacement), or introduce too much computational overhead (augmentation with models). To this end, we propose AugPro (Augmentation with Projection), an effective and efficient data augmentation method for distillation. Our method builds on top of representation interpolation augmentation methods to maintain the diversity of expressions and converts the augmented data to tokens to avoid shifting decision boundaries. It uses simple operations that come with little computational overhead. The results on multiple GLUE tasks show that our methods can improve distillation performance by a large margin at a low time cost. Codes are available at https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/augpro.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是将知识从大模型转移到小模型的主要方法之一。然而，它需要大量特定于任务的数据，这在许多现实应用程序中可能不合理。应用表示插值、标记替换或模型增强等数据增强方法来解决这个问题。然而，这些数据增强方法要么可能导致决策边界发​​生变化（表示插值），要么表达能力不够（令牌替换），要么引入过多的计算开销（模型增强）。为此，我们提出了 AugPro（投影增强），一种有效且高效的蒸馏数据增强方法。我们的方法建立在表示插值增强方法之上，以保持表达式的多样性，并将增强数据转换为标记，以避免移动决策边界。它使用简单的操作，计算开销很小。多个 GLUE 任务的结果表明，我们的方法可以以较低的时间成本大幅提高蒸馏性能。代码可在 https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/augpro 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AugPro的数据增强方法，旨在提高知识蒸馏过程中的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的数据增强方法在知识蒸馏中存在决策边界偏移、表达能力不足或计算开销过大的问题，需开发更有效且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: AugPro基于表示插值方法，通过将增强数据转换为标记来保持表达多样性并避免决策边界偏移，同时采用简单操作以降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在多个GLUE任务上的实验表明，AugPro在较低时间成本下显著提升了知识蒸馏的性能。
AI.conclusion: AugPro通过投影增强机制，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在保持高效性的同时提升了知识蒸馏的效果。

title: Generative Range Imaging for Learning Scene Priors of 3D LiDAR Data
title_zh: 用于学习 3D LiDAR 数据场景先验的生成范围成像
abstract: 3D LiDAR sensors are indispensable for the robust vision of autonomous mobile robots. However, deploying LiDAR-based perception algorithms often fails due to a domain gap from the training environment, such as inconsistent angular resolution and missing properties. Existing studies have tackled the issue by learning inter-domain mapping, while the transferability is constrained by the training configuration and the training is susceptible to peculiar lossy noises called ray-drop. To address the issue, this paper proposes a generative model of LiDAR range images applicable to the data-level domain transfer. Motivated by the fact that LiDAR measurement is based on point-by-point range imaging, we train an implicit image representation-based generative adversarial networks along with a differentiable ray-drop effect. We demonstrate the fidelity and diversity of our model in comparison with the point-based and image-based state-of-the-art generative models. We also showcase upsampling and restoration applications. Furthermore, we introduce a Sim2Real application for LiDAR semantic segmentation. We demonstrate that our method is effective as a realistic ray-drop simulator and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: 3D LiDAR sensors are indispensable for the robust vision of autonomous mobile robots. However, deploying LiDAR-based perception algorithms often fails due to a domain gap from the training environment, such as inconsistent angular resolution and missing properties. Existing studies have tackled the issue by learning inter-domain mapping, while the transferability is constrained by the training configuration and the training is susceptible to peculiar lossy noises called ray-drop. To address the issue, this paper proposes a generative model of LiDAR range images applicable to the data-level domain transfer. Motivated by the fact that LiDAR measurement is based on point-by-point range imaging, we train an implicit image representation-based generative adversarial networks along with a differentiable ray-drop effect. We demonstrate the fidelity and diversity of our model in comparison with the point-based and image-based state-of-the-art generative models. We also showcase upsampling and restoration applications. Furthermore, we introduce a Sim2Real application for LiDAR semantic segmentation. We demonstrate that our method is effective as a realistic ray-drop simulator and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 3D LiDAR 传感器对于自主移动机器人的强大视觉至关重要。然而，部署基于 LiDAR 的感知算法通常会由于与训练环境的域差距而失败，例如角分辨率不一致和属性缺失。现有的研究通过学习域间映射来解决这个问题，但可转移性受到训练配置的限制，并且训练容易受到称为射线下降的特殊有损噪声的影响。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种适用于数据级域传输的激光雷达距离图像生成模型。由于 LiDAR 测量基于逐点范围成像，我们训练了基于隐式图像表示的生成对抗网络以及可微的射线滴效应。与基于点和基于图像的最先进的生成模型相比，我们展示了我们的模型的保真度和多样性。我们还展示了上采样和恢复应用程序。此外，我们还介绍了用于 LiDAR 语义分割的 Sim2Real 应用程序。我们证明我们的方法作为真实的射线滴模拟器是有效的，并且优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成式范围成像方法，用于学习3D LiDAR数据的场景先验知识，以解决域间隙和光束丢失问题。
AI.motivation: LiDAR感知算法在部署时因训练环境与实际场景的域间隙（如角分辨率不一致和光束丢失噪声）导致性能下降，现有方法受限于训练配置和噪声处理能力。
AI.method: 基于隐式图像表示的生成对抗网络（GAN），结合可微分光束丢失模拟，生成高保真LiDAR范围图像，并应用于上采样、修复及Sim2Real语义分割。
AI.result: 模型在保真度和多样性上优于点云和图像生成方法，有效模拟光束丢失并提升LiDAR语义分割的跨域迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成式模型有效解决LiDAR数据域迁移问题，为自动驾驶等场景提供更鲁棒的感知解决方案。

To address the issue, this paper proposes a generative model of LiDAR range images applicable to the data-level domain transfer. title: Bayesian deep learning framework for uncertainty quantification in high dimensions
title_zh: 用于高维不确定性量化的贝叶斯深度学习框架
abstract: We develop a novel deep learning method for uncertainty quantification in stochastic partial differential equations based on Bayesian neural network (BNN) and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC). A BNN efficiently learns the posterior distribution of the parameters in deep neural networks by performing Bayesian inference on the network parameters. The posterior distribution is efficiently sampled using HMC to quantify uncertainties in the system. Several numerical examples are shown for both forward and inverse problems in high dimension to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for uncertainty quantification. These also show promising results that the computational cost is almost independent of the dimension of the problem demonstrating the potential of the method for tackling the so-called curse of dimensionality.
summary: We develop a novel deep learning method for uncertainty quantification in stochastic partial differential equations based on Bayesian neural network (BNN) and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC). A BNN efficiently learns the posterior distribution of the parameters in deep neural networks by performing Bayesian inference on the network parameters. The posterior distribution is efficiently sampled using HMC to quantify uncertainties in the system. Several numerical examples are shown for both forward and inverse problems in high dimension to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for uncertainty quantification. These also show promising results that the computational cost is almost independent of the dimension of the problem demonstrating the potential of the method for tackling the so-called curse of dimensionality.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种基于贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）和哈密顿蒙特卡罗（HMC）的随机偏微分方程不确定性量化的新型深度学习方法。 BNN 通过对网络参数进行贝叶斯推理，有效地学习深度神经网络中参数的后验分布。使用 HMC 对后验分布进行有效采样，以量化系统中的不确定性。针对高维正向和逆向问题给出了几个数值示例，以证明所提出的不确定性量化方法的有效性。这些还显示出有希望的结果，即计算成本几乎与问题的维度无关，证明了该方法解决所谓的维度灾难的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯神经网络和汉密尔顿蒙特卡洛方法的深度学习框架，用于高维随机偏微分方程的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理高维不确定性量化时面临计算成本剧增和维度灾难问题，需开发高效且维度无关的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）进行参数后验分布学习，利用汉密尔顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）采样实现不确定性量化，通过高维数值实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在高维正向和逆问题中均有效，计算成本几乎不受维度影响，展现出解决维度灾难的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高维不确定性量化提供了高效解决方案，计算效率与维度无关，具有重要应用价值。
